Genesis1:1 Ubga mbere na mbere Imana yaremye ijuru n’isi.
Genesis1:2 Isi yar’ ikir’ i buziba
Genesis1:3 Imana iravuga
Genesis1:4 Imana ibona umuco kw ari mwiza: iraheza itandukanya umuco n’umwiza.
Genesis1:5 Imana yita umuco umurango
Genesis1:6 Imana iravuga
Genesis1:7 Imana iraritāzānura
Genesis1:8 Maz’ iryo tāzānure Imana iryita Ijuru. Buragoroba
Genesis1:9 Imana iravuga
Genesis1:10 Maz’ i musozi Imana ihita Isi
Genesis1:11 Imana iravuga
Genesis1:12 Nukw isi imera ivyatsi n’ibimera vyose vyama utubuto ukw amoko yavyo ari
Genesis1:13 Buragoroba
Genesis1:14 Imana iravuga
Genesis1:15 kandi bibe ivyāka vyo mw itāzānure ry’ ijuru vyo kwākira isi: biba kuno.
Genesis1:16 Imana irema ivyāka bibiri binini
Genesis1:17 Imana ibishira mw itāzānure ry’ijuru kugira ngo vyākire isi
Genesis1:18 biganze umurango n’ijoro
Genesis1:19 Buragoroba
Genesis1:20 Imana iravuga
Genesis1:21 Imana irema ibifi binini‐binini
Genesis1:22 Imana irabihezagira
Genesis1:23 Buragoroba
Genesis1:24 Imana iravuga
Genesis1:25 Nukw Imana irema ibikōko vyo mw isi
Genesis1:26 Imana iravuga
Genesis1:27 Nukw Imana irema umuntu mw ishusho yayo
Genesis1:28 Maz’ Imana irabahezagira
Genesis1:29 Imana irababgira
Genesis1:30 Kand’ ibikōko vyose vyo kw isi
Genesis1:31 Nukw Imana yihweza ivyo yaremye vyose
Genesis2:1 Ijuru n’isi binonosorwa kuremwa
Genesis2:2 Ku musi ugira indwi Imana inonosora ibikorwa vyayo yakoze; iruhuka ku musi ugira indwi ibikorwa vyayo vyose yakoze.
Genesis2:3 Nukw Imana ihezagira uwo musi w’indwi
Genesis2:4 Aya ni yo mamo y’ijuru n’isi igihe vyaremwa
Genesis2:5 Kandi nta gati ko ku misozi karibgabeho kw isi
Genesis2:6 arikw igipfungu cadūga kiva kw isi kigatosa isi yose.
Genesis2:7 Uhoraho Imana abumba umuntu mu mukungugu wo hasi
Genesis2:8 Uhoraho Imana atunganya itongo muri Edeni
Genesis2:9 Uhoraho Imana ahameza igiti cose c’igikundiro kibereye kuribga
Genesis2:10 Kand’ uruzi ruturuka muri Edeni rwo kunywesha iryo tongo; ruharenganye
Genesis2:11 Urwa mbere rwitwa Pishoni: ni rwo rukīkūje igihugu cose c’i Havila
Genesis2:12 kand’ izahabu yo mur’ ico gihugu ni nziza; aho ni ho haba ivyitwa budola n’utubuyenge twitwa shohamu.
Genesis2:13 Uruzi rwa kabiri rwitwa Gihoni: ni rwo rukīkūje igihugu cose c’i Kushi.
Genesis2:14 Uruzi rwa gatatu rwitwa Hidekeli
Genesis2:15 Uhoraho Imana ajana wa muntu
Genesis2:16 Uhoraho Imana abarira uwo muntu
Genesis2:17 arikw igiti kimenyekanisha iciza n’ikibi ntuz’ ukiryeko: kuk’ umusi wakiriyeko
Genesis2:18 Uhoraho Imana aravuga
Genesis2:19 Nukw ibikōko vyose vyo ku misozi n’ibiguruka mu kirere vyose
Genesis2:20 Uwo muntu avyita amazina uhereye ku bitungano vyose no ku biguruka mu kirere no ku bikōko vyo mw ishamba vyose: ariko ntihabonekamw’ umufasha akwiranye n’umuntu.
Genesis2:21 Maz’ Uhoraho Imana asinziriza uwo muntu ubutikoma
Genesis2:22 Urwo rubavu Uhoraho Imana akūye mur’ uwo muntu
Genesis2:23 Maz’ uwo muntu aravuga
Genesis2:24 Ni co gituma umuntu azosiga se na nyina
Genesis2:25 Kand’ uwo mugabo n’umugore wiwe bompi bāgenda amēnya
Genesis3:1 Inzoka yarusha ubugunge ibikōko vyose vyo mw ishamba Uhoraho Imana yaremye. Ibaza uwo mugore
Genesis3:2 Umugore yishura iyo nzoka
Genesis3:3 arikw ivyama ku giti kiri hagati mw itongo
Genesis3:4 Iyo nzoka yishura uwo mugore
Genesis3:5 kukw Imana izi yuk’ umusi mwabiriyeko
Genesis3:6 Uwo mugore abonye ico giti yukw ar’ ikibereye kuribga
Genesis3:7 Amaso yabo bompi arihweza
Genesis3:8 Bumva ijwi ry’Uhoraho Imana agendagenda mur’ iryo tongo mu gihe c’akayaga ko ku kagoroba: uwo muntu n’umugore wiwe binyegeza mu biti vyo mur’ iryo tongo
Genesis3:9 Uhoraho Imana ahamagara uwo muntu
Genesis3:10 Aramwishura
Genesis3:11 Aramubaza
Genesis3:12 Uwo muntu aramwishura
Genesis3:13 Uhoraho Imana abaza uwo mugore
Genesis3:14 Uhoraho Imana abarira iyo nzoka
Genesis3:15 Nzoshira inyankane hagati yawe n’uyu mugore
Genesis3:16 Kand’ abarira uwo mugore
Genesis3:17 Abarira Adamu na we
Genesis3:18 rizohora rikumerera imikere n’ibitovu
Genesis3:19 kwirirwa urabira akuya ni kwo kuzoguhesha ivyo kurya uz’ urinde usubira mw ivu
Genesis3:20 Uwo muntu yita umugore wiwe Eva
Genesis3:21 Uhoraho Imana aronkera Adamu n’umugore wiwe imyambaro y’insāto
Genesis3:22 Uhoraho Imana aravuga
Genesis3:23 Ni co catumye Uhoraho Imana amukūra mur’ iryo tongo ryo muri Edeni
Genesis3:24 Nuko yirukana uwo muntu; kandi mu ruhande ruhera i burasirazuba rw’iryo tongo ryo muri Edeni
Genesis4:1 Kand’ uwo mugabo abana na Eva umugore wiwe; nukw asama inda
Genesis4:2 Asubizako
Genesis4:3 Igihe kiragera
Genesis4:4 Abeli na we azana ku ntungwa z’uburiza zo mu mukuku wiwe
Genesis4:5 ariko ntiyākīrira Kayini ishikanwa ryiwe. Maze Kayini araraka cane
Genesis4:6 Uhoraho abaza Kayini
Genesis4:7 Ni wakora neza ntuzokwemerwa? ariko n’utākora neza
Genesis4:8 Nuko Kayini abarira Abeli murumuna we

Genesis4:10 Na we aramubaza
Genesis4:11 Uhereye none ubaye ikivume

Genesis4:14 Rāba

Genesis4:17 Maze Kayini abana n’umugore wiwe
Genesis4:18 Henoki avyara Iradi: Iradi avyara Mehuyayeli: Mehuyayeli avyara Metushayeli: Metushayeli avyara Lameki.
Genesis4:19 Lameki yābīra abagore babiri: umwe yitwa Ada uwundi Zila.
Genesis4:20 Ada avyara Yabalu
Genesis4:21 Murumuna we yitwa Yubalu
Genesis4:22 Zila na we avyara Tubali‐Kayini
Genesis4:23 Lameki abarira abagore biwe

Genesis4:25 Adamu yongera kubana n’ umugore wiwe
Genesis4:26 Seti na we arahava avyara umuhungu
Genesis5:1 Iki n’igitabo kidōndōra uruvyaro rwa Adamu. Ku musi Imana yaremeyek’ umuntu
Genesis5:2 irema abantu bar’ uburyo bubiri: irabahezagira
Genesis5:3 Nuko Adamu amaze imyaka ijana na mirongwitatu avyara umuhungu afise ishusho yiwe
Genesis5:4 Adamu amaze kuvyara Seti
Genesis5:5 Imisi yose Adamu yamaze yabaye imyaka amajana cenda na mirongwitatu: araheza arapfa.
Genesis5:6 Seti amaze imyaka ijana n’iyindi itanu avyara Enoshi.
Genesis5:7 Seti amaze kuvyara Enoshi
Genesis5:8 Imisi yose Seti yamaze yabaye imyaka amajana cenda n’icumi n’ibiri: araheza arapfa.
Genesis5:9 Enoshi amaze imyaka mirongwicenda avyara Kenani.
Genesis5:10 Enoshi amaze kuvyara Kenani
Genesis5:11 Imisi yose Enoshi yamaze yabaye imyaka amajana cenda n’iyindi itanu: araheza arapfa.
Genesis5:12 Kenani amaze imyaka mirongwirindwi avyara Mahalaleli.
Genesis5:13 Kenani amaze kuvyara Mahalaleli
Genesis5:14 Imisi yose Kenani yamaze yabaye imyaka amajana cenda n’ icumi: araheza arapfa.
Genesis5:15 Mahalaleli amaze imyaka mirongwitandatu n’itanu avyara Yeredi.
Genesis5:16 Mahalaleli amaze kuvyara Yeredi
Genesis5:17 Imisi yose Mahalaleli yamaze yabaye imyaka amajana munani na mirongwicenda n’itanu: araheza arapfa.
Genesis5:18 Yeredi amaze imyaka ijana na mirongwitandatu n’ibiri avyara Henoki.
Genesis5:19 Yeredi amaze kuvyara Henoki
Genesis5:20 Imisi yose Yeredi yamaze yabaye imyaka amajana cenda na mirongwitandatu n’ibiri: araheza arapfa.
Genesis5:21 Henoki amaze imyaka mirongwitandatu n’itanu avyara Metusela.
Genesis5:22 Henoki amaze kuvyara Metusela agendana n’Imana imyaka amajana atatu
Genesis5:23 Imisi yose Henoki yamaze yabaye imyaka amajana atatu na mirongwitandatu n’itanu.
Genesis5:24 Kandi Henoki yagendana n’Imana: araheza ntiyaba akiboneka
Genesis5:25 Metusela amaze imyaka ijana na mirongumunani n’indwi avyara Lameki.
Genesis5:26 Metusela amaze kuvyara Lameki amara iyindi myaka amajana ndwi na mirongumunani n’ibiri
Genesis5:27 Imisi yose Metusela yamaze yabaye imyaka amajana cenda na mirongwitandatu n’ icenda: araheza arapfa.
Genesis5:28 Lameki amaze imyaka ijana na mirongumunani n’ibiri avyara umwana w’umuhungu:
Genesis5:29 amwita Nowa
Genesis5:30 Lameki amaze kuvyara Nowa amara iyindi myaka amajana atanu na mirongwicenda n’itanu
Genesis5:31 Imisi yose Lameki yamaze yabaye imyaka amajana ndwi na mirongwirindwi n’indwi: araheza arapfa.
Genesis5:32 Nowa amaze imyaka amajana atanu avyara Shemu na Hamu na Yafeti.
Genesis6:1 Maz’ abantu batanguye kugwira kw isi
Genesis6:2 abana b’Imana bitegereje abakobga b’abantu babona ari beza; barongora muri bo abo bitoranirije bose.

Genesis6:4 Mur’ ico gihe hār’ibigatanya mw isi
Genesis6:5 Nuk’ Uhoraho abona ibibi vy’abantu ingen’ ari vyinshi mw isi
Genesis6:6 Uhoraho yicuza ico yaremeye abantu mw isi
Genesis6:7 Uhoraho aravuga
Genesis6:8 Ariko Nowa we Uhoraho aramushima.
Genesis6:9 Uru ni rwo ruvyaro rwa Nowa. Nowa yar’ umugororotsi
Genesis6:10 Yavyaye abahungu batatu
Genesis6:11 Kand’ isi yari yononekaye imbere y’Imana
Genesis6:12 Imana yitegereza isi
Genesis6:13 Imana ibarira Nowa
Genesis6:14 Wibāzire ubgato mu biti vyitwa goferu
Genesis6:15 Uz’ ububāze urtya: uburebure bg’umurambararo bg’ubgo bgato buze bube amatambge amajana atatu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora
Genesis6:16 Kand’ ubgo bgato uz’ ubuce amadirisha
Genesis6:17 Maze nanje nzozana umwuzure w’amazi mw isi
Genesis6:18 Ariko nzoshinga isezerano nzogusezeranira: uzokwinjirana mur’ubgo bgato n’ abana bawe n’umugore n’abakazana bawe.
Genesis6:19 Kandi mu bgoko bgose bg’ibiri n’ubugingo bifise umubiri
Genesis6:20 Mu biguruka
Genesis6:21 Kand’ uze wijanire mu biribga vyose
Genesis6:22 Nuko Nowa abigenza artyo: ukw Imana yamubariye kwose ni ko yakoze.
Genesis7:1 Maz’ Uhoraho abgira Nowa
Genesis7:2 Mu bitungano vyose bitazira no mu bikōko vyose bitazira
Genesis7:3 no mu biguruka mu kirere
Genesis7:4 Kukw imisi ndwi ishize
Genesis7:5 Nuko Nowa abigenza nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabimugeze vyose.
Genesis7:6 Igihe umwuzure w’amazi waza kw isi
Genesis7:7 Nowa aca yinjirana mur’ ubgo bgato n’abana biwe n’umugore wiwe n’abakazana biwe
Genesis7:8 Mu bitungano bitazira no mu bikōko bitazira
Genesis7:9 bibiri‐bibiri vyinjirana na Nowa mur’ ubgo bgato
Genesis7:10 Maz’ iyo misi ndwi ishize
Genesis7:11 Mu mwaka ugira amajana atandatu Nowa abayeho
Genesis7:12 Imvura imara imisi mirongwine igwa kw isi umurango n’ijoro.
Genesis7:13 Kur’ uwo musi nyene Nowa yinjira mur’ubgo bgato
Genesis7:14 binjirana n’ibikōko vyose nk’ukw amoko yavyo ari
Genesis7:15 Vyinjirana na Nowa mu bgato
Genesis7:16 Ivyinjiye vyar’ ikigabo n’ikigore vyo mu bifise umubiri vyose
Genesis7:17 Umwuzure umara kw isi imisi mirongwine
Genesis7:18 Amazi arīganza
Genesis7:19 Amazi arushiriza cane kwiganza kw isi
Genesis7:20 Amazi arīganza asumba imisozi
Genesis7:21 Ibifise umubiri vyose bigenda kw isi birapfa
Genesis7:22 Ibihumeka impwemu z’ubugingo mu mazuru vyose
Genesis7:23 Ibifise ubugingo vyose biri kw isi biraherengetezwa
Genesis7:24 Amazi amara imisi ijana na mirongwitanu yīganziye kw isi.

Genesis9:4 Ariko ntimukarye inyama zikirimw’ ubugingo bgazo
Genesis9:5 Kand’ amaraso yanyu
Genesis9:6 Ūzovisha amaraso y’ umuntu
Genesis9:7 Nuko namwe

Genesis9:9 iti Rāba jewe ubganje nshinze isezerano mbasezeraniye
Genesis9:10 n’ibifise ubugingo vyose biri kumwe namwe
Genesis9:11 Nuko nshinze isezerano mbasezeraniye: ibifise umubiri vyose ntibizosubira kurandurwa n’amazi y’umwuzure ukundi
Genesis9:12 Imana iravuga
Genesis9:13 Nshize umuheto wanje ku gicu
Genesis9:14 Nuk’ uko nzozana igicu hejuru y’isi

Genesis9:16 Nuk’ uwo munywamazi ubaye ku gicu
Genesis9:17 Imana ibarira Nowa
Genesis9:18 Bene Nowa bāsohotse mu bgato ni Shemu na Hamu na Yafeti: Hamu ni we se wa Kanani.

Genesis9:21 anywa vino y’izo nzabibu

Genesis10:1 Uru ni rwo ruvyaro rwa bene Nowa
Genesis10:2 Aba Yafeti ni Gomeri na Magogi na Madayi na Yavani na Tubali na Mesheki na Tirasi.
Genesis10:3 Aba Gomeri ni Ashikenazi na Rifati na Togaruma.
Genesis10:4 Aba Yavani ni Elisha na Tarushishi na Kitimu na Dodanimu.
Genesis10:5 Abo ni bo bandurutsweko n’amahanga aba ku kiyaga
Genesis10:6 Aba Hamu ni Kushi na Misirayimu na Puti na Kanani.
Genesis10:7 Aba Kushi ni Seba na Havila na Sabuta na Rama na Sabuteka; aba Rama ni Sheba na Dedani.
Genesis10:8 Kandi Kushi yavyaye na Nimurodi: ni we wa mbere yabaye cihabugabo mw isi.
Genesis10:9 Yar’ umuhigi w’agahebuza imbere y’Uhoraho
Genesis10:10 Ubgami bgiwe bga mbere bgagarukira i Babeli no muri Ereki no muri Akadi n’i Kalune
Genesis10:11 Yāgāmba ico gihugu
Genesis10:12 n’i Reseni hari hagati y’i Ninewe n’i Kala (ni co ca gisagara kinini).
Genesis10:13 Misirayimu yakomōtsweko n’Abaludi n’Abanami n’ Abalehabi n’Abanafutuhi
Genesis10:14 n’ Abapatirusi n’Abakasiluhi (ni bo bākomōtsweko n’Abafilisitiya)
Genesis10:15 Kanani yavyaye imfura yiwe Sidoni
Genesis10:16 kandi Kanani ni we yakomōtsweko n’Abayebusi n’Abamori n’Abagirugashi
Genesis10:17 n’Abahiwi n’Abaruki n’Abasini
Genesis10:18 n’Abaruvadi n’Abasemari n’Abahamati: hanyuma imiryango y’Abanyakanani igenda irakwira.
Genesis10:19 Urugabano rw’Abanyakanani rwahēra i Sidoni
Genesis10:20 Urwo ni rwo ruvyaro rwa Hamu
Genesis10:21 Na Shemu
Genesis10:22 Aba Shemu ni Elamu na Ashuri na Arupakisadi na Ludi na Aramu.
Genesis10:23 Aba Aramu ni Uzi na Huli na Geteri na Mashi.
Genesis10:24 Arupakisadi yavyaye Shela; Shela yavyaye Eberi.
Genesis10:25 Eberi yavyaye abahungu babiri: umwe yitwa Pelegi
Genesis10:26 Yokitani yavyaye Alumodadi na Shelefu na Hasarumaweti na Yera
Genesis10:27 na Hadoramu na Uzalu na Dikila
Genesis10:28 na Obalu na Abimayeli na Sheba
Genesis10:29 na Ofiru na Havila na Yobabu; abo bose ni bene Yokitani.
Genesis10:30 Igihugu cabo cāhēra i Mesha
Genesis10:31 Abo ni bo ruvyaro rwa Shemu
Genesis10:32 Iyo ni yo miryango ya bene Nowa
Genesis11:1 Abo mw isi yose bari bafise ururimi rumwe n’ukuvuga kumwe.
Genesis11:2 Nuko bariko baragenda berekeye i burasirazuba
Genesis11:3 Baravugana
Genesis11:4 Baravuga
Genesis11:5 Maz’ Uhoraho amanukanwa no kurāba ico gisagara n’uwo munara
Genesis11:6 Uhoraho aravuga
Genesis11:7 Nuko ngo tumanuke tuyoberanye ururimi rwabo
Genesis11:8 Nuk’ Uhoraho abasābagiriza mw isi yose: baca baheba kwubaka ca gisagara.
Genesis11:9 Ni co catumye izina ryaco citwa Babeli; kukw ari h’Uhoraho yayoberanirije ururimi rw’abo mw isi yose; kand’ ari h’Uhoraho yabasābagirije mw isi yose.
Genesis11:10 Uru ni rwo ruvyaro rwa Shemu. Shemu amaze imyaka ijana avyara Arupakisadi
Genesis11:11 Shemu amaze kuvyara Arupakisadi
Genesis11:12 Arupakisadi amaze imyaka mirongwitatu n’itanu avyara Shela:
Genesis11:13 Arupakisadi amaze kuvyara Shela
Genesis11:14 Shela amaze imyaka mirongwitatu avyara Eberi.
Genesis11:15 Shela amaze kuvyara Eberi
Genesis11:16 Eberi amaze imyaka mirongwitatu n’ine avyara Pelegi.
Genesis11:17 Eberi amaze kuvyara Pelegi
Genesis11:18 Pelegi amaze imyaka mirongwitatu avyara Reyu.
Genesis11:19 Pelegi amaze kuvyara Reyu
Genesis11:20 Reyu amaze imyaka mirongwitatu n’ibiri avyara Serugi.
Genesis11:21 Reyu amaze kuvyara Serugi
Genesis11:22 Serugi amaze imyaka mirongwitatu avyara Nahori.
Genesis11:23 Serugi amaze kuvyara Nahori
Genesis11:24 Nahori amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’icenda avyara Tera.
Genesis11:25 Nahori amaze kuvyara Tera
Genesis11:26 Tera amaze imyaka mirongwirindwi avyara Aburamu na Nahori na Harani.
Genesis11:27 Uru ni rwo ruvyaro rwa Tera: Tera yavyaye Aburamu na Nahori na Harani; Harani yavyaye Loti.
Genesis11:28 Harani apfira mu gihugu yavukiyemwo
Genesis11:29 Aburamu na Nahori bararongora: muka Aburamu yitwa Sarayi
Genesis11:30 Sarayi yar’ intavyara
Genesis11:31 Tera ajana Aburamu umwana wiwe
Genesis11:32 Imisi Tera yamaze yabaye imyaka amajana abiri n’iyindi itanu: Tera araheza apfira i Harani.
Genesis12:1 Uhoraho abarira Aburamu
Genesis12:2 Nanje nzoguhindura ubgoko bukomeye
Genesis12:3 Abazoguhezagira nzobahezagira
Genesis12:4 Nuko Aburamu aragenda
Genesis12:5 Aburamu ajana Sarayi umugore wiwe na Loti umuhungwabo
Genesis12:6 Aburamu adwēbēra ico gihugu
Genesis12:7 Uhoraho yiyereka Aburamu
Genesis12:8 Arikora avayo
Genesis12:9 Nuko Aburamu akomeza kugenda aratāhīra
Genesis12:10 Maz’ inzara itera mur’ ico gihugu: nuko Aburamu aramanuka
Genesis12:11 Ari hafi gushika muri Egiputa
Genesis12:12 nukw Abanyegiputa ni bakubona
Genesis12:13 Ndakwinginze
Genesis12:14 Nuko Aburamu ashitse muri Egiputa
Genesis12:15 Abamenyekana ba Farawo bamubonye
Genesis12:16 Farawo agirira Aburamu neza kubg’ uwo

Genesis25:1 Aburahamu arongora uwundi mugore
Genesis25:2 Bavyarana Zimurani na Yokishani na Medani na Midiyani na Yishibaki na Shuwa.
Genesis25:3 Yokishani avyara Sheba na Dedani. Abakomōtse kuri Dedani n’Abashuri n’Abaletushi n’Abaleyumi.
Genesis25:4 Bene Midiyani ni Efa na Eferi na Hanoki na Abida na Eludaya. Abo bose n’uruvyaro rwa Ketura.

Genesis36:5 Oholibama bavyarana Yushi na Yalamu na Kora: abo ni bo bahungu ba Esau
Genesis36:6 Esau akora abagore biwe n’abahungu biwe n’abakobga biwe
Genesis36:7 Kukw itunga ryabo ryari ryinshi
Genesis36:8 Nuko Esau aja kuba ku musozi Seyiri: Esau ni we Edomu.
Genesis36:9 Uru ni rwo ruvyaro rwa Esau sekuruza w’Abanyedomu bo ku musozi Seyiri.
Genesis36:10 Bene Esau aya ni yo mazina yabo: uwa Ada muka Esau ni Elifazi
Genesis36:11 Bene Elifazi ni Temani na Omari na Sefo na Gatamu na Kenazi.
Genesis36:12 Kandi Timuna yar’ incoreke ya Elifazi mwene Esau: Elifazi avyarana na we Amaleki: abo ni bo buzukuru ba Ada
Genesis36:13 Kand’ aba ni bo bene Ruweli: Nahati na Zera na Shama na Miza: abo ni bo buzukuru ba Basemati
Genesis36:14 Kand’ aba ni bo bene Oholibama muka Esau
Genesis36:15 Aba ni bo bakuru b’imiryango yakomōtse ku bahungu ba Esau. Bene Elifazi imfura ya Esau
Genesis36:16 na Kora
Genesis36:17 Kandi bene Ruweli mwene Esau
Genesis36:18 Abo Esau yavyaranye na Oholibama umugore wiwe
Genesis36:19 Abo ni bo bo mu nda ya Esau
Genesis36:20 Aba ni bo bene Seyiri Umuhori
Genesis36:21 na Dishoni na Etseri na Dishani: abo ni bo bakuru b’imiryango bākomōtse mu Bahori
Genesis36:22 Bene Lotani ni Hori na Hemamu; kandi mushiki wa Lotani yari Timuna.
Genesis36:23 Kand’ aba ni bo bene Shobali: Alivani na Manahati na Ebali na Shefo na Onamu.
Genesis36:24 Kand’ aba ni bo bene Sibeyoni: Aya na Ana: Ana uwo ni we yahūmutse ku mbizi y’amashuha mu bugaragwa
Genesis36:25 Kand’ aba ni bo bene Ana: Dishoni na Oholibama
Genesis36:26 Kand’ aba ni bo bene Dishoni: Hemudani na Eshibani na Yitirani na Kerani.
Genesis36:27 Kand’ aba ni bo bene Etseri: Biluhani na Zavani na Akani.
Genesis36:28 Kand’ aba ni bo bene Dishani: Uzi na Arani.
Genesis36:29 Aba ni bo bakuru b’imiryango bākomōtse mu Bahori: Lotani na Shobali na Sibeyoni na Ana
Genesis36:30 na Dishoni na Etseri na Dishani; abo ni bo bakuru b’imiryango bākomōtse mu Bahori
Genesis36:31 Aba ni bo bami babaye ku ngoma mu gihugu ca Edomu
Genesis36:32 Bela mwene Beyori yaganza muri Edomu; umurwa wiwe witwa Dinihaba.
Genesis36:33 Bela atanze
Genesis36:34 Yobabu atanze
Genesis36:35 Hushamu atanze
Genesis36:36 Hadadi atanze
Genesis36:37 Samula atanze
Genesis36:38 Sauli atanze
Genesis36:39 Bayali‐hanani mwene Akibori atanze
Genesis36:40 Aya ni yo mazina y’abakuru b’ imiryango bandurutse kuri Esau
Genesis36:41 na Oholibama na Ela na Pinoni
Genesis36:42 na Kenazi na Temani na Mibusari
Genesis36:43 na Magidiyeli na Iramu. Abo ni bo bakuru b’imiryango yakomōtse kuri Edomu ari we Esau

Genesis41:1 Hahise imyaka ibiri yiramvuriye
Genesis41:2 Agize artya abona mu ruzi havuye inka ndwi z’inyambo zivyibushe; zirisha mu rufunzo.

Genesis41:4 Maze za nka zinanutse z’ umwaku zirya za zindi z’inyambo zivyibushe
Genesis41:5 Arongera aribikira

Genesis41:19 maze zikurikirwa n’ izindi nka ndwi mbi‐mbi
Genesis41:20 Izo nka zinanutse z’umwaku zirya za nka zivyibushe zabanje
Genesis41:21 zimaze kuzirya
Genesis41:22 Kandi nongera kurota
Genesis41:23 maze mu nyuma zayo haca hamera iyindi mihuruhumbi ndwi ikabiranye y’ibihumbirane

Genesis41:25 Yosefu abarira Farawo
Genesis41:26 Za nka ndwi nziza n’imyaka ndwi
Genesis41:27 Na za nka zinanutse z’umwaku zazikurikiye n’imyaka ndwi
Genesis41:28 Ico ni co nakubariye
Genesis41:29 Hazoba imyaka ndwi y’uburumbuke bginshi mu gihugu ca Egiputa iyo kiva kikagera:
Genesis41:30 hanyuma hazokurikirakw imyaka ndwi y’ikigoyi
Genesis41:31 ubgo burumbuke ntibuzoba bucibukwa
Genesis41:32 Kand’ icatumye urota izo nzozi kabiri n’ukw ivyo vyashinzwe n’ Imana

Exodus26:1 Maz’ ihema ry’imbere uz’ urikore urtya: urikoreshe impuzu cumi; izo mpuzu zijishwe mu nyuzi zera derere nziza zihinzwe neza

Exodus26:3 Impuzu zitanu zirōngōranywe ukwazo
Exodus26:4 Kand’ uz’ utēre utugombo tw’udutambara tw’amasufe ku ruhande rumwe rw’impuzu iherera izarōngōranijwe za mbere; uheze utēre n’utundi tugombo nk’utwo ku ruhande rw’ impuzu iherera izindi mu zārōngōranijwe za kabiri.

Exodus26:21 na zo uzicurire ibitereko vyazo mirongwine mw ifeza: ibitereko bibiri‐bibiri bije musi y’urubaho rumwe‐rumwe.

Exodus27:7 Iyo miniho yaco ize yinjizwe mur’ ivyo bigombo

Exodus28:1 Kand’ uze wīgize hafi yawe Aroni mukurwawe n’abana biwe
Exodus28:2 Uz’ ujishishirize Aroni mukurwawe imyambaro
Exodus28:3 Kand’ uz’ ubgire abahinga bose
Exodus28:4 Iyi abe ari yo myambaro bazojisha: umupfuko wo kwambara mu gikiriza
Exodus28:5 Baze bakoreshe intahe z’izahabu
Exodus28:6 Umwambaro witwa efodi baze bawujishishe intahe z’izahabu
Exodus28:7 Uz’ ugire ibizāna bibiri vyo ku bitugu
Exodus28:8 Kand’ umusipi ujishwe n’abahinga
Exodus28:9 Kand’ uze wābīre utubuyenge tubiri twitwa shohamu
Exodus28:10 Mu mazina yabo uze wandike atandatu ku kabuyenge kamwe
Exodus28:11 Nk’uk’ umuntu azi guca amagarwe ku kabuyenge ko kudoma ikimenyetso
Exodus28:12 Utēre utwo tubuyenge twompi ahahera ku bitugu ku bizāna vya efodi
Exodus28:13 Kand’ uz’ ucure utugenegene mw izahabu
Exodus28:14 n’imigufu ibiri y’izahabu iramuye
Exodus28:15 Kand’ uz’ ujishishe umupfuko wo kwambara mu gikiriza wo kwahukanya imanza: abahinga bavyo abe ari bo bawujisha; uko efodi ijishwe abe ari k’uwujishisha: uwujishishe mu ntahe z’izahabu no mu nyuzi z’amasufe n’iz’ amashigisha n’izisa n’agahama n’izera derere nziza zihinzwe neza.
Exodus28:16 Uz’ ukorwe ukubiranijwe
Exodus28:17 Kand’ uheze uwudombagizek’ utubuyenge mu mirongo ine: mu murongo wa mbere haze habe utubuyenge twitwa odemu na pitida na bareketi;
Exodus28:18 mu wa kabiri habe utwitwa nofekina na safiro na yahalomu;
Exodus28:19 mu wa gatatu habe utwitwa leshemu na shevo na akilama;
Exodus28:20 mu wa kane habe utwitwa tarushishi na shohamu na yasipi: tuze tugende turumikwa mu tugenegene tw’izahabu.
Exodus28:21 Utwo tubuyenge tunganye igitigiri n’amazina y’ abana ba Isirayeli: tube icumi na tubiri nk’ukw amazina yabo ar’ icumi n’abiri: tumere nk’utubuyenge two kudoma ibimenyetso
Exodus28:22 Kandi kur’ uwo mupfuko wo kwambara mu gikiriza uz’ uwushireko ya migufu icuzwe mw izahabu iramuye
Exodus28:23 Uwo mupfuko uz’ uwucurire impeta zibiri z’izahabu
Exodus28:24 Uheze urumye iyo migufu yompi y’izahabu itsivye kur’ izo mpeta zompi zo ku mitwe y’uwo mupfuko wo ku gikiriza.
Exodus28:25 Iyindi mitwe yompi y’ivyo bitsibo vyompi vy’imigufu uyirumye kur’ utwo tugenegene twompi
Exodus28:26 Kand’ uz’ ucure izindi mpeta zibiri mw izahabu
Exodus28:27 Kand’ uz’ ucure izindi mpeta zibiri mw izahabu
Exodus28:28 Kand’ uwo mupfuko wo kwambara ku gikiriza baze bawufatanishe impeta zawo n’impeta zo kuri efodi akagozi ko mu nyuzi z’amasufe
Exodus28:29 Aroni
Exodus28:30 Kand’ uz’ ushire Urimu na Tumimu imbere mur’ uwo mupfuko wo ku gikiriza wo kwahukanya imanza
Exodus28:31 Kand’ umwinjiro wo kwambarirwako efodi uz’ uwujishe mu nyuzi z’amasufe gusa;
Exodus28:32 urwano rw’aho gucisha umutwe ruze rusaturwe muri wo hagati
Exodus28:33 Ku mubuga wawo uz’ uwutērek’ udusa n’ amakomamanga dukozwe mu nyuzi z’amasufe n’iz’ amashigisha n’izisa n’agahama
Exodus28:34 iyo midende y’izahabu iz’ irobekeranywe n’ayo makomamanga
Exodus28:35 Aroni aze yame awambara ukw agiye guhereza
Exodus28:36 Uheze ucure akabāte mw izahabu iramuye
Exodus28:37 Ugapfundikishe akagozi ko mu nyuzi z’ amasufe
Exodus28:38 Kaze kabe mu ruhanga rwa Aroni
Exodus28:39 Kandi ya kanzo uz’ uyijishe mu buryo bg’insobane mu nyuzi zera derere nziza; uz’ ujishe n’ igitambara co kuzingīra mu mutwe mu nyuzi zera derere nziza
Exodus28:40 Kandi n’abana ba Aroni na bo uz’ ubajishire amakanzo
Exodus28:41 Iyo myambaro yose uz’ uyambike Aroni mukurwawe
Exodus28:42 Kand’ uz’ ubajishire amabutura mu nyuzi zera derere
Exodus28:43 yambare Aroni n’ abana biwe
Exodus29:1 Uku abe ari k’uzobagenza mu kubarobanura
Exodus29:2 n’imitsima itambiwe
Exodus29:3 Uyishire mu ndumane imwe
Exodus29:4 Kandi Aroni n’abana biwe uz’ ubazane ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro
Exodus29:5 Wābīre ya myambaro
Exodus29:6 umwambike na ca gitambara mu mutwe
Exodus29:7 Maze wābīre amavuta yo kurobanuza abahabga ibango
Exodus29:8 Uheze uzane n’abana biwe
Exodus29:9 Aroni n’abana biwe ubakenyeze imikanda
Exodus29:10 Uz’ uzane ya masa imbere y’ ihema ry’ibonaniro: Aroni n’abana biwe bayirambike ibiganza mu ruhanga.
Exodus29:11 Uyikererere imbere yanje
Exodus29:12 Wābīre ku maraso y’iyo masa

Exodus29:14 Arikw inyama z’iyo masa

Exodus29:17 Uyijanjagure

Exodus29:19 Maz’ uze wābīre iyo mpfizi y’intama ya kabiri
Exodus29:20 Uheze uyikerere
Exodus29:21 Wābīre ku maraso yo ku gicaniro
Exodus29:22 Uheze wābīre ibinure vy’iyo mpfizi y’intama

Exodus29:30 Umwana wiwe amusubiriye mu gishingo c’ubuherezi az’ ayambare imisi ndwi
Exodus29:31 Kandi wābīre ivya ya mpfizi y’intama yo kubinjiza mur’ iryo bango
Exodus29:32 Aroni n’abana biwe bazirishe ya mitsima yo mu ndumane
Exodus29:33 Babirye

Exodus29:37 Uz’ umare imisi ndwi utangira impongano ico gicaniro
Exodus29:38 Ibi abe ari vyo uzohora utangira kur’ ico gicaniro: uko bukeye
Exodus29:39 Umwagazi umwe uz’ uwutange mu gitondo
Exodus29:40 Umwagazi wa mbere uz’ uwutangane n’ifu igogōretse y’ikigiracumi c’ingero yitwa efa
Exodus29:41 Uwundi mwagazi uz’ uwutange ku mugoroba

Exodus36:16 Arōngōranya impuzu zitanu ukwazo

Exodus36:20 Abāza imbaho mu giti c’ umushita zo guhagarika iryo hema ry’imbere
Exodus36:21 Uburebure bg’urubaho rumwe‐rumwe bgar’ amatambge cumi y’ ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora
Exodus36:22 Kandi ku rubaho rumwe‐rumwe har’ inkago zibiri zifatanye; uko ni ko yakoze ku mbaho zose z’iryo hema.
Exodus36:23 Nuko rer’ abāza izo mbaho z’iryo hema
Exodus36:24 Kand’ acura ibitereko mirongwine mw ifeza
Exodus36:25 Abāza n’izindi mbaho mirongwibiri z’ urundi ruhande rw’iryo hema
Exodus36:26 na zo azicurira ibitereko vyazo mirongwine mw ifeza: ibitereko bibiri‐bibiri vyo kuja musi y’urubaho rumwe‐rumwe.
Exodus36:27 Kand’ abāza imbaho zitandatu z’ahahera inyuma kur’ iryo hema
Exodus36:28 Abāza n’imbaho zibiri zo ku mfuruka z’iryo hema ahahera inyuma nyene.
Exodus36:29 Hasi zari zibiri‐zibiri
Exodus36:30 Nukw izo mbaho zose na zose zari munani

Exodus36:32 n’ibindi bitanu vyo kuja ku zo ku rundi ruhande rwaryo
Exodus36:33 Igiti co hagati y’ibindi
Exodus36:34 Kand’ izo mbaho azomekakw izahabu

Exodus37:1 Besaleli abāza isandugu mu giti citwa umushita: uburebure bgayo bg’umurambararo bgar’ amatambge abiri n’igice y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora
Exodus37:2 Ayomekakw izahabu iramuye imbere n’inyuma
Exodus37:3 Avugutira izahabu
Exodus37:4 Abāza iminiho mu mushita
Exodus37:5 araheza yinjiza iyo miniho yo kurerura iyo sandugu mur’ ivyo bigombo vyo ku mpande zayo.
Exodus37:6 Acura n’umutemere wo guhongerako mw izahabu iramuye; uburebure bgawo bg’ umurambararo bgar’ amatambge abiri n’igihimba y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora
Exodus37:7 Akora abakerubi babiri mw izahabu
Exodus37:8 Umukerubi umwe amukora mu mutwe umwe
Exodus37:9 Abo bakerubi bari bashanje amababa hejuru
Exodus37:10 Maz’ abāza ameza mu giti citwa umushita: uburebure bgayo bg’umurambararo bgar’ amatambge abiri y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora
Exodus37:11 Ayomekakw izahabu iramuye
Exodus37:12 Ayabāzira ibizingiti vyo kugumya amaguru bikīkūje impande zose
Exodus37:13 Avugutira izahabu
Exodus37:14 Ivyo bigombo vyari hafi ya vya bizingiti
Exodus37:15 Abāza iminiho mu mushita yo kurerura ameza
Exodus37:16 Acura ibintu vyo kur’ ayo meza
Exodus37:17 Akora ico guterekakw amatara mw izahabu iramuye; ico gitereko cose
Exodus37:18 Cari gifise amashami atandatu mu mbavu zaco: mu ruhande rumwe rw’ico gitereko hār’ amashami atatu
Exodus37:19 Ishami rimwe ryari rifise ibikombe bitatu bisa n’amashurwe y’igiti citwa shakedi
Exodus37:20 Kand’ umutumba w’ico gitereko warikw ibikombe bine
Exodus37:21 aho amashami ashamikiye kur’ ico gitereko hose ukw ar’atandatu
Exodus37:22 Amapfundo yaco n’amashami yaco vyari bicuriwe kuri co
Exodus37:23 Araheza agicurira amatara ndwi
Exodus37:24 Ico gitereko
Exodus37:25 Abāza igicaniro co kwoserezakw imibavu mu giti citwa umushita; uburebure bgaco bgar’ itambge rimwe ry’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora
Exodus37:26 Acomekakw izahabu iramuye
Exodus37:27 Musi y’uwo muguno waco
Exodus37:28 Abāza iminiho mu giti c’umushita
Exodus37:29 Atunganya amavuta yera yo kurobanuza abahabga ibango
Exodus38:1 Abāza igicaniro co kwoserezakw ibimazi mu giti c’ umushita; uburebure bgaco bgar’ amatambge atanu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora
Exodus38:2 Agiha amahembe ku nkokora zaco ukw ari zine
Exodus38:3 Acura ibintu vyose vy’ ico gicaniro: inzavya
Exodus38:4 Ico gicaniro agicurira ikintu c’insobane kimeze bga rusenga
Exodus38:5 Avugutira imiringa
Exodus38:6 Abāza iminiho mu giti c’umushita
Exodus38:7 Yinjiza iyo miniho mur’ ivyo bigombo biri mu mbavu z’ico gicaniro
Exodus38:8 Maz’ acura ikigārigāri mu miringa
Exodus38:9 Maz’ akora urugo; ku ruhande ruhera i bumanuko
Exodus38:10 Ibirimbi vyo kuzimanikako vyari mirongwibiri
Exodus38:11 No ku ruhande ruhera i burārūko na rwo uburebure bg’amakika bg’izo mpuzu bgar’ amatambge ijana nyene
Exodus38:12 Ku ruhande rw’i burengerazuba
Exodus38:13 No ku ruhande rw’i burasirazuba
Exodus38:14 Ku ruhande rumwe ruhera kw irembo impuzu zo kubamba zar’ iz’ amatambge cumi n’atanu; ibirimbi vyazo vyari bitatu
Exodus38:15 No ku rundi ruhande rwaryo vyari kuno; hepfo y’ irembo ry’urwo rugo no haruguru
Exodus38:16 Impuzu zose zo kubamba impande zose ngo zibe urugo
Exodus38:17 Ibitereko vyo kunegamw’ ibirimbi vyari bicuzwe mu miringa; imisumari yo kur’ ivyo birimbi
Exodus38:18 Igihuzu co gukinga mw irembo ry’urwo rugo cari kijererenzwekw amabara n’abahinga
Exodus38:19 Ibirimbi vyaco vyari bine
Exodus38:20 Imambo zose z’iryo hema
Exodus38:21 Iki ni co gitigiri c’ivyakoze iryo hema
Exodus38:22 Kandi Besaleli mwene Uri
Exodus38:23 Yar’ afatanije na Oholiyabu mwene Ahisamaki
Exodus38:24 Amazahabu yose yakoreshejwe mu gucura ivy’ iryo hema vyose
Exodus38:25 Amafeza yatanzwe n’ abaharūwe bo mw ikoraniro yanganya kuriba n’italanto ijana na shekeli igihumbi n’amajana ndwi na mirongwirindwi na zitanu
Exodus38:26 yatanzwe n’abantu ibihumbi amajana atandatu na bitatu n’ amajana atanu na mirongwitanu
Exodus38:27 Izo talanto z’ifeza
Exodus38:28 Na za shekeli z’ifeza ukw ar’ igihumbi n’amajana ndwi na mirongwirindwi na zitanu
Exodus38:29 Kand’ imiringa y’amashikanwa yanganya kuriba n’italanto mirongwirindwi na shekeli ibihumbi bibiri n’amajana ane.
Exodus38:30 Na yo ayicuramw’ ibitereko vyo kurokezamw’ inkingi za ca gihuzu co gukinga ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro
Exodus38:31 n’ibitereko vyo kunegamw’ ibirimbi vy’urugo impande zose
Exodus39:1 Za nyuzi z’amasufe n’iz’ amashigisha n’izisa n’agahama bazijishamw’ imyambaro ijishitse neza yo kwambara mu gukora Ahēra
Exodus39:2 Besaleli ajishisha umwambaro witwa efodi intahe z’izahabu
Exodus39:3 Bacura amazahabu kugeza abaye uduhuhwa
Exodus39:4 Bakora ibizāna vy’uwo mwambaro
Exodus39:5 Umusipi ujishwe n’abahinga
Exodus39:6 Batunganya utubuyenge twitwa shohamu
Exodus39:7 Besaleli adutēra ahahera ku bitugu ku bizāna vya efodi
Exodus39:8 Ajishisha umupfuko wo kwambara mu gikiriza
Exodus39:9 Bawukora bawukubiranije
Exodus39:10 Bawudombagizak’ utubuyenge mu mirongo ine: umurongo wa mbere war’ umurongo w’utwitwa odemu na pitida na bareketi;
Exodus39:11 mu wa kabiri har’ utwitwa nofekina na safiro na yahalomu;
Exodus39:12 mu wa gatatu har’ utwitwa leshemu na shevo na akilama;
Exodus39:13 mu wa kane har’ utwitwa tarushishi na shohamu na yasipi; twagenda turumikwa mu tugenegene tw’izahabu.
Exodus39:14 Utwo tubuyenge twanganya igitigiri n’amazina y’abana ba Isirayeli; twar’ icumi na tubiri
Exodus39:15 Kur’ uwo mupfuko wo kwambara mu gikiriza bashirakw imigufu icuzwe mw izahabu iramuye
Exodus39:16 Bacura utugenegene tubiri mw izahabu
Exodus39:17 Baraheza barumya iyo migufu yompi y’izahabu itsivye kur’ izo mpeta zompi zo ku mitwe y’uwo mupfuko wo ku gikiriza.
Exodus39:18 Iyindi mitwe yompi y’ivyo bitsibo vy’ imigufu vyompi bayirumya kur’ utwo tugenegene twompi
Exodus39:19 Bacura izindi mpeta zibiri mw izahabu
Exodus39:20 Bacura n’izindi mpeta zibiri mw izahabu
Exodus39:21 Uwo mupfuko wo kwambara ku gikiriza bawufatanisha impeta zawo n’impeta zo kuri efodi akagozi ko mu nyuzi z’amasufe
Exodus39:22 Kand’ umwinjiro wo kwambarirwako efodi Besaleli awujisha mu nyuzi z’amasufe gusa;
Exodus39:23 asatura urwano muri wo hagati
Exodus39:24 Ku mubuga w’uwo mwambaro bawutērak’ udusa n’amakomamanga dukozwe mu nyuzi z’amasufe n’iz’ amashigisha n’izisa n’agahama
Exodus39:25 Bacura imidende mw izahabu iramuye
Exodus39:26 iyo midende bayirobekeranya n’ayo makomamanga
Exodus39:27 Kandi bajishira Aroni n’ abana biwe amakanzo mu nyuzi zera derere nziza
Exodus39:28 bajisha n’ igitambara co kuzingīra mu mutwe mu nyuzi zera derere nziza
Exodus39:29 n’ umukanda mu nyuzi zera derere nziza zihinzwe neza
Exodus39:30 Maze bacura akabāte
Exodus39:31 Bagapfundikakw akagozi ko mu nyuzi z’amasufe
Exodus39:32 Uko ni ko barangije gukora ivy’ iryo hema vyose
Exodus39:33 Bazanira Mose iryo hema ry’imbere
Exodus39:34 n’ico kurenza hejuru yaryo cakozwe mu nsāto z’amapfizi y’intama zazizwe mu gahama
Exodus39:35 n’ isandugu y’Ibishinga intahe
Exodus39:36 n’ameza
Exodus39:37 n’igiterekwakw amatara c’izahabu iramuye
Exodus39:38 n’igicaniro cacuzwe mw izahabu
Exodus39:39 n’igicaniro cacuzwe mu miringa
Exodus39:40 n’ impuzu zo kubamba ngo zibe urugo
Exodus39:41 n’ imyambaro ijishitse neza yo kwambara mu gukora Ahēra
Exodus39:42 Nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yarabibariye Mose
Exodus39:43 Mose yitegereza ivyo bākoze vyose
Exodus40:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose
Exodus40:2 ati Ku musi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa mbere uz’ ushinge iryo hema
Exodus40:3 Uheze ushiremwo ya sandugu y’ Ibishinga intahe
Exodus40:4 Maze winjizemwo ya meza
Exodus40:5 na ca gicaniro c’izahabu co kwoserezakw imibavu uz’ ugitereke hino ya ya sandugu y’Ibishinga intahe
Exodus40:6 Uheze ushire ca gicaniro co kwoserezakw ibimazi imbere y’ umuryango w’iryo hema
Exodus40:7 Maz’ utereke ca kigārigāri co gukaraba hagati y’ihema ry’ibonaniro n’ico gicaniro
Exodus40:8 Uheze ushireh’ urugo rukikuza impande zose
Exodus40:9 Uheze wābire ya mavuta yo kurobanuza abahabga ibango
Exodus40:10 Uyarobanuze n’igicaniro co kwoserezakw ibimazi
Exodus40:11 Uyarobanuze n’ikigārigāri bo n’intebe yaco
Exodus40:12 Uheze uzane Aroni n’abana biwe ku muryango w’iryo hema ry’ibonaniro
Exodus40:13 Wambike Aroni ya myambaro yejejwe
Exodus40:14 Uheze uzane n’abana biwe
Exodus40:15 Ubarobanuze amavuta
Exodus40:16 Nuko Mose abigenza artyo: uk’ Uhoraho yamubariye kwose
Exodus40:17 Nuko mu kwezi kwa mbere kwo mu mwaka ugira kabiri
Exodus40:18 Mose ararishinga
Exodus40:19 Araheza arirenzako rya hema ryo hejuru
Exodus40:20 Yābīra vya Bishinga intahe
Exodus40:21 yinjiza iyo sandugu mw ihema
Exodus40:22 Ashira ya meza mur’ iryo hema ry’ibonaniro
Exodus40:23 Ayaterekako ya mitsima imbere y’Uhoraho
Exodus40:24 Ashira na ca giterekwakw amatara mur’ iryo hema ry’ibonaniro
Exodus40:25 Agishirakw amatara imbere y’ Uhoraho
Exodus40:26 Ashira na ca gicaniro c’izahabu mur’ iryo hema ry’ibonaniro
Exodus40:27 acoserezakw imibavu y’ibintu bimoga
Exodus40:28 Akinga ca gihuzu ku muryango w’iryo hema.
Exodus40:29 Ashira ca gicaniro co kwoserezakw ibimazi imbere y’umuryango w’iryo hema
Exodus40:30 Atereka ca kigārigāri hagati y’ihema ry’ibonaniro n’ico gicaniro
Exodus40:31 Mose ubgiwe na Aroni n’abana biwe barayakaraba
Exodus40:32 iyo bagiye kwinjira mw ihema ry’ ibonaniro
Exodus40:33 Araheza ashirah’ urugo rukīkūza iryo hema n’igicaniro impande zose
Exodus40:34 Maze ca gicu gipfuka ihema ry’ibonaniro
Exodus40:35 Mose ntiyashobora kwinjira mur’ iryo hema ry’ibonaniro
Exodus40:36 Kandi mu rugendo rwabo rwose
Exodus40:37 arikw iy’ ico gicu kidasubiye hejuru
Exodus40:38 Kukw ico gicu c’Uhoraho ku murango caba kur’ iryo hema
Leviticus1:1 Uhoraho ari mw ihema ry’ibonaniro ahamagara Mose
Leviticus1:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli
Leviticus1:3 Ikimazi c’umuntu co kwoswa
Leviticus1:4 Maz’ arambike ikiganza mu ruhanga rw’ico kimazi co kwoswa
Leviticus1:5 Aheze akererere iyo masa imbere yanje
Leviticus1:6 Aheze abāge ico kimazi co kwoswa
Leviticus1:7 Bene Aroni abaherezi bashire umuriro kur’ ico gicaniro
Leviticus1:8 bene Aroni abaherezi bagereke ivyo bikenye n’umutwe n’ibinure ku nkwi ziri ku muriro kur’ ico gicaniro;
Leviticus1:9 arikw amara yayo n’ibikenye vyayo vy’amaguru abanze abironge mu mazi; maz’ umuherezi avyosereze vyose ku gicaniro
Leviticus1:10 Kand’ ikimazi ciwe co kwoswa ni caba ar’ ico mu mukuku
Leviticus1:11 Az’ agikererere i ruhande y’igicaniro
Leviticus1:12 Ayijanjagure
Leviticus1:13 arikw amara n’ibikenye vy’amaguru abanze abironge mu mazi; maz’ umuherezi abihereze vyose
Leviticus1:14 Kand’ ikimazi ciwe co kwoswa azompa ni caba ar’ inyoni
Leviticus1:15 Umuherezi az’ akizane ku gicaniro
Leviticus1:16 agikūrekw agatorero kaco n’amoya yaco
Leviticus1:17 Aheze afate amababa yaco agitānye
Leviticus2:1 Ni hagira umuntu azonshikanira ishikanwa ry’ifu
Leviticus2:2 Aheze ayizanire bene Aroni abaherezi; akamate urushi rumwe kur’ iyo fu n’ayo mavuta
Leviticus2:3 Ibisigaye kur’ iryo shikanwa ry’ifu bize bibe ivya Aroni n’abana biwe: kizoba ar’ ikintu cera cane mu mashikanwa atōngōrwa n’umuriro nshikanirwa
Leviticus2:4 Kandi ni mwashikana ishikanwa ry’ivyokejwe mu ziko vyakozwe mw ifu
Leviticus2:5 Kand’ ishikanwa ryanyu ni ryaba iry’ ivyakaranzwe ku cuma vyakozwe mw ifu
Leviticus2:6 Mubicemw’ utumanyu
Leviticus2:7 Kand’ ishikanwa ryanyu ni ryaba iry’ ivyakaranganywe n’amavuta
Leviticus2:8 Muze munzanire ishikanwa ry’ivyakozwe mw ifu
Leviticus2:9 Umuherezi aheze akamate kur’ iryo shikanwa ry’ ivyakozwe mw ifu
Leviticus2:10 Ibisigaye kur’ iryo shikanwa ry’ivyakozwe mw ifu bize bibe ivya Aroni n’abana biwe: kizoba ar’ umugabane wera cane mu mashikanwa atōngōrwa n’umuriro nshikanirwa jewe Uhoraho.
Leviticus2:11 Ntihaze hagire ishikanwa ryakozwe mw ifu munshikanira ryacumbanywe n’umwambiro: kuko mudakwiye kugira umwambiro cank’ ubūki mwosa ngo bibe ishikanwa ritōngōrwa n’umuriro munshikaniye.
Leviticus2:12 Ivyo mushobora kubinshikanira nk’ishikanwa ry’umushuzo
Leviticus2:13 Kand’ ishikanwa ryose ry’ivyakozwe mw ifu muzoshikana muze mubirunge umunyu; ntimuze mugire ishikanwa ry’ivyakozwe mw ifu mushikana ritarimw’ umunyu
Leviticus2:14 Kandi ni mwanshikanira ishikanwa ry’ivyakozwe mw ifu ivuye mu vy’umushuzo
Leviticus2:15 Mugisukekw amavuta ya elayo
Leviticus2:16 Umuherezi aheze akūre kuri ryo ikizoba icibutso caryo

Leviticus4:7 Kur’ ayo maraso nyene ayasīge ku mahembe y’igicaniro co kwoserezakw imibavu itamirana
Leviticus4:8 Kand’ iyo masa y’ikimazi gitangiwe ivyaha
Leviticus4:9 n’amafyigo yompi
Leviticus4:10 babikūre nk’uko nyene bahora babikūra ku masa y’ikimazi c’ishimwe; uyo muherezi avyosereze ku gicaniro co kwoserezakw ibimazi.
Leviticus4:11 Kand’ urusato rw’iyo masa
Leviticus4:12 ivy’ iyo masa vyose iyo biva bikagera
Leviticus4:13 Kand’ ikoraniro ryose ry’ Abisirayeli ni ryaramuka ricumuye
Leviticus4:14 igicumuro bacumuye ni camenyekana
Leviticus4:15 Abakuru b’iryo koraniro baheze barambike ibiganza mu ruhanga rw’iyo masa imbere yanje: baheze bayikererere ngaho nyene imbere yanje.
Leviticus4:16 Maz’ umuherezi yarobanujwe amavuta az’ azane ku maraso y’iyo masa mw ihema ry’ibonaniro
Leviticus4:17 ajōbeke urutoke rwiwe mur’ ayo maraso
Leviticus4:18 Kur’ ayo maraso nyene ayasīge ku mahembe y’igicaniro kir’ imbere yanje mw ihema ry’ibonaniro; ayandi maraso yose ayavyagize hasi hambavu y’igicaniro co kwoserezakw ibimazi
Leviticus4:19 Az’ ayikūremw’ ibinure vyayo vyose
Leviticus4:20 Ukw az’ abe ari kw agira iyo masa: nk’uko yagize ya masa yindi y’ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha
Leviticus4:21 Aheze ajane ivy’ iyo masa inyuma y’aho mushagaje
Leviticus4:22 Umukuru ni yakora icaha
Leviticus4:23 icaha yakoze amaze kukimenyeshwa
Leviticus4:24 Arambike ikiganza mu ruhanga rwayo
Leviticus4:25 Umuherezi aheze yābirize urutoke ku maraso y’ico kimazi gitangiwe ivyaha
Leviticus4:26 Ibinure vyaco vyose avyosereze ku gicaniro
Leviticus4:27 Ni hagira umuntu mu banyagihugu akora icaha atabigize ibigirankana
Leviticus4:28 icaha yakoze amaze kukimenyeshwa
Leviticus4:29 Arambike ikiganza mu ruhanga rw’ico kimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha

Leviticus6:3 cank’ akabona icazimiye

Leviticus6:12 Nuk’ umuriro wo ku gicaniro uze wame waka
Leviticus6:13 Umuriro uze wame waka ku gicaniro udahengeshanya

Leviticus6:17 Ntibaze babicumbane n’umwambiro. Ndabibahaye

Leviticus6:22 Umuherezi wo mu bana biwe azorobanuzwa amavuta

Leviticus6:26 Umuherezi ahereje ico kimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha az’ abe ari we akirya: kize kirīwe ahantu hēra

Leviticus6:28 Kandi ni catekwa mu nkono y’ imbumbano
Leviticus6:29 Izinamuhungu wese wo mu baherezi yemererwa kukiryako: kizoba ar’ icera cane.
Leviticus6:30 Kand’ ikimazi cose gitangirwa ivyaha
Leviticus7:1 Iki ni co cagezwe co ku kimazi c’impongano: kizoba ar’ icera cane.
Leviticus7:2 Aho bakererera ikimazi co kwoswa
Leviticus7:3 Kandi batange ibinure vyaco vyose
Leviticus7:4 n’amafyigo yompi
Leviticus7:5 Umuherezi aheze avyosereze ku gicaniro
Leviticus7:6 Izinamuhungu wese wo mu baherezi yemererwa kukiryako: kize kirīrwe ahantu hēra: n’icera cane.
Leviticus7:7 Nk’uko bigenzwa ku kimazi gitangirwa ivyaha
Leviticus7:8 Kand’ umuherezi ahereje ikimazi c’umuntu uw’ ari we wese co kwoswa
Leviticus7:9 Ishikanwa ryose ry’ivyakozwe mw ifu vyokejwe mu ziko
Leviticus7:10 Ishikanwa ryose ry’ifu
Leviticus7:11 Iki ni co cagezwe co ku kimazi c’ishimwe umuntu azonshikanira.
Leviticus7:12 Ni yagitanga kubgo gukenguruka
Leviticus7:13 Iryo shikanwa ryiwe
Leviticus7:14 Kandi kur’ iryo shikanwa ryiwe ry’udutsima tw’ uburyo bgose
Leviticus7:15 Kand’ inyama z’ico kimazi ciwe c’ishimwe yatanze kubgo gukenguruka
Leviticus7:16 Arikw ico kimazi ashikanye
Leviticus7:17 Arikw inyama z’ico kimazi ni zashika ku musi ugira gatatu
Leviticus7:18 Ariko ni haramuka hagize inyama z’ico kimazi ciwe c’ishimwe ziribga ku musi ugira gatatu
Leviticus7:19 Ni hagira inyama zikora ku kintu gihumanya ntizize ziribge
Leviticus7:20 Arik’ ūzorya ku nyama z’ico kimazi c’ishimwe
Leviticus7:21 Kand’ umuntu wese azokora ku kintu gihumanya ic’ ari co cose
Leviticus7:22 Uhoraho abarira Mose
Leviticus7:23 ati Barira Abisirayeli
Leviticus7:24 Arikw ibinure vy’ iyipfiriye
Leviticus7:25 Kuk’ ūzorya wese ku binure vy’ibitunzwe
Leviticus7:26 Ntimuze mwigere mugeza ubuseri mu kanwa mu ngo zanyu zose
Leviticus7:27 Umuntu wese azobugeza mu kanwa
Leviticus7:28 Uhoraho abarira Mose
Leviticus7:29 ati Barira Abisirayeli
Leviticus7:30 Ubgiwe yizanire mu minwe yiwe ishikanwa anshikaniye ryo gutōngōrwa n’ umuriro; az’ azane ibinure bo n’inkoro
Leviticus7:31 Maz’ ivyo binure umuherezi az’ avyosereze ku gicaniro; arikw inkoro ibe umwanya wa Aroni n’abana biwe.
Leviticus7:32 Kand’ igikenye c’ukuguru kw’i buryo muze mugihe umuherezi
Leviticus7:33 Uwo muri bene Aroni azohereza amaraso n’ibinure vy’ikimazi c’ishimwe
Leviticus7:34 Kuko ya nkoro ishikanishwa kuzunguzwa
Leviticus7:35 Uwo ni wo mwanya wa Aroni n’abana biwe bashinguriwe ku bimazi bishikaniwe Uhoraho bigatōngōrwa n’umuriro
Leviticus7:36 Uhoraho yashinze yukw Abisirayeli bazohora babaha uwo mwanya
Leviticus7:37 Ico ni co cagezwe co ku kimazi co kwoswa
Leviticus7:38 ivyo Uhoraho yageze Mose ari ku musozi Sinayi

Leviticus8:2 ati Jana Aroni n’abana biwe
Leviticus8:3 uheze ukoranirize ikoraniro ryose ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro.
Leviticus8:4 Nuko Mose agenza nk’uk’ Uhoraho yamubariye; iryo koraniro rikoranira ku muryango w’ihema ry’ ibonaniro.
Leviticus8:5 Mose abarira iryo koraniro
Leviticus8:6 Mose araheza azana Aroni n’abana biwe
Leviticus8:7 Yambika Aroni ya kanzo
Leviticus8:8 amwambika na wa mupfuko mu gikiriza
Leviticus8:9 Amwambika na ca gitambara mu mutwe; imbere kur’ ico gitambara agishirako ka kabāte k’izahabu
Leviticus8:10 Mose araheza yābīra ya mavuta yo kurobanuza
Leviticus8:11 Ayacucagira ku gicaniro ibihetangabo ndwi
Leviticus8:12 Maz’ ayo mavuta yo kurobanuza abahabga ibango ayasuka ku mutwe wa Aroni

Leviticus8:14 Araheza azana ya masa y’ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha

Leviticus8:17 Arikw ivy’ iyo masa
Leviticus8:18 Araheza azana impfizi y’ intama y’ikimazi co kwoswa; Aroni n’abana biwe bayirambika ibiganza mu ruhanga.

Leviticus8:20 Arayijanjagura

Leviticus8:23 Maze Mose arayikerera

Leviticus11:2 ati Mubarire Abisirayeli
Leviticus11:3 igifise inzāra cose ziri n’umwanya hagati
Leviticus11:4 Ariko mu vyūza no mu bifise inzāra ziri n’umwanya hagati
Leviticus11:5 N’ inkezi
Leviticus11:6 N’urukwavu
Leviticus11:7 N’ ingurube
Leviticus11:8 Inyama zavyo ntimuze muzirye
Leviticus11:9 Ibi ni vyo mwemererwa kurya mu biba mu mazi vyose: ibiba mu mazi
Leviticus11:10 Ibidafise amababa n’ ibigaragamba vyo mu biyaga no mu nzūzi
Leviticus11:11 Bize bihore biba umuziro kuri mwebge; ntimuze mwigere murya ku nyama zavyo
Leviticus11:12 Ico mu mazi cose kitagira amababa n’ibigaragamba kize kibe umuziro kuri mwebge.
Leviticus11:13 Ibi az’ abe ari vyo mugira umuziro mu bisīga; ntibize vyigere biribga
Leviticus11:14 n’ ikinyamwanira
Leviticus11:15 n’icitwa igikōna cose
Leviticus11:16 n’imbuni
Leviticus11:17 n’igihuna
Leviticus11:18 na tinishemeti
Leviticus11:19 na sarumfune
Leviticus11:20 Udukōko twose tw’amababa tunyonyera
Leviticus11:21 Arikw ivyo mwemererwa kurya muri two n’ibi: udufise amaguru maremare akonye ahahera hejuru y’ibirenge
Leviticus11:22 Utwo mwemererwa kurya muri two n’uruzige
Leviticus11:23 Arik’ utundi twose tw’amababa tunyonyera
Leviticus11:24 Kand’ ibi ni vyo vyobahumanya: uwokora ku muvyimba wavyo yoba ahumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba;
Leviticus11:25 kandi n’uwogira ico aterura co ku muvyimba wavyo
Leviticus11:26 Ikigenda gifise inzāra ziri n’imyanya hagati cose
Leviticus11:27 Ikigendesha amajanja cose co mu bigenza amaguru ane vyose
Leviticus11:28 Kandi n’ uwogira ico aterura co ku muvyimba wavyo
Leviticus11:29 Ibi ni vyo bihumanya kuri mwebge mu binyonyera bigenda hasi: igikara
Leviticus11:30 n’ icūgu
Leviticus11:31 Ivyo vyose n’ibihumanya kuri mwebge mu binyonyera vyose; uwokora ku gipfuye muri vyo yoba ahumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba.
Leviticus11:32 Kand’ ikintu cose cokorokerwako n’umuvyimba w’ico muri vyo coba gihumanye; kandi naho coba ikintu cose cabājwe mu giti
Leviticus11:33 Kand’ ikibumbano cose cokorokerwamwo na kimwe muri vyo
Leviticus11:34 Ibirībga vyose vyosukwakw amazi yo muri co
Leviticus11:35 Ikintu cose cokorokerwako n’icavuye ku muvyimba wavyo coba gihumanye; ar’ iziko cank’ amashiga
Leviticus11:36 Mugabo icokorokera mw isōko canke mu rwobo rwimbiwe kubīkamw’ amazi
Leviticus11:37 Kandi ni hagira ico ku muvyimba wavyo cogwa mu mbuto zo kubibga iz’ ari zo zose
Leviticus11:38 Ariko namb’ izo mbuto zīnitswe mu mazi
Leviticus11:39 Kand’ igikōko cose cank’ igitunzwe mu vyo mwemererwa kurya
Leviticus11:40 Kandi horamuka har’ ūriye ku muvyimba waco
Leviticus11:41 Kand’ ikinyonyera cose kinyonyera hasi n’ikizira: ntikize cigere kiribga.
Leviticus11:42 Igikwega inda hasi cose
Leviticus11:43 Ntimuze mwiyandurishe ak’ ari ko kose ko mu tunyonyera
Leviticus11:44 Kuko nd’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu: ni mwiyeze rero
Leviticus11:45 Kukw ari jewe Uhoraho nabadūganye mbakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa
Leviticus11:46 Ivyo ni vyo vyagezwe vyo ku bikōko no ku bitunzwe
Leviticus11:47 vyo gutandukanya igihumanya n’ikidahumanya

Leviticus13:2 at’ Umuntu ni yagira igishundu

Leviticus13:4 Na ho ni yasanga ico kibibi co ku mubiri wiwe cera
Leviticus13:5 Ku musi ugira indwi uwo muherezi amusuzume; ni yasanga iyo ndwara itayegayeze
Leviticus13:6 Ku musi ugira indwi
Leviticus13:7 Arikw amaze guheza kwiyereka umuherezi
Leviticus13:8 Uwo muherezi amusuzume
Leviticus13:9 Umuntu ni yafatwa n’indwara y’imibembe
Leviticus13:10 uwo muherezi amusuzume; maze ni haboneka ahashundashe

Leviticus13:12 Arikw imibembe ni yasēsa ku mubiri
Leviticus13:13 uwo muherezi amusuzume: maze ni yabona iyo mibembe imukwiye umubiri wose
Leviticus13:14 Ariko ni yaramuka agize ahamyotse
Leviticus13:15 Umuherezi az’ ahasuzume

Leviticus13:17 na we amusuzume; maze ni yasanga aho hārwaye hahindutse
Leviticus13:18 Umuntu ni yagira inkovu y’ahahora igihute inyuma ku rukoba
Leviticus13:19 maze muri nya nkovu hagashundaha hakabenjuka
Leviticus13:20 na we ahasuzume
Leviticus13:21 Arik’ umuherezi ni yahasuzuma
Leviticus13:22 Maze ni yasanga cunguruje inyuma ku rukoba
Leviticus13:23 Arikw ico kibibi ni kitayegayega ngo cunguruze
Leviticus13:24 Cank’ umuntu ni yagira ubushe ku mubiri wiwe
Leviticus13:25 umuherezi az’ ahasuzume; ni yasanga ubgoya bgo mur’ ico kibibi buhindutse
Leviticus13:26 Arik’ umuherezi ni yahasuzuma
Leviticus13:27 Ku musi ugira indwi
Leviticus13:28 Arikw ico kibibi ni kitayegayega ngo cunguruze inyuma ku rukoba
Leviticus13:29 Kand’ umugabo cank’ umugore ni yafatwa n’indwara mu mutwe canke mu bganwa
Leviticus13:30 umuherezi az’ asuzume iyo ndwara; ni yabona isa n’iyinjiye musi y’ urukoba
Leviticus13:31 Arik’ umuherezi ni yasuzuma iyo ndwara y’igiturika
Leviticus13:32 Ku musi ugira indwi umuherezi az’ asuzume iyo ndwara; maze ni yasanga ico giturika kitunguruje
Leviticus13:33 baheze bamumwe
Leviticus13:34 Ku musi ugira indwi uwo muherezi asuzume ico giturika: maze ni yasanga kitunguruje inyuma ku rukoba
Leviticus13:35 Arikw amaze guheza kwitwa uweze
Leviticus13:36 umuherezi aheze amusuzume; maze ni yasanga ico giturika cunguruje inyuma ku rukoba
Leviticus13:37 Na ho ku ruhande rwiwe ni yasanga ico giturika kitayegayeze
Leviticus13:38 Kandi ni hagira umugabo cank’ umugore agira ibibibi ku mubiri wiwe inyuma ku rukoba
Leviticus13:39 umuherezi az’ abisuzume: maze ni yasanga ivyo bibibi vyo ku mubiri wiwe vyeragurika gusa
Leviticus13:40 Kand’ umugabo ni yavunguka umushatsi
Leviticus13:41 Kandi ni yavunguka umushatsi wo mu gitwariro
Leviticus13:42 Ariko ni haturika ibintu vy’indwara bitukura mu buhanza bgo mu gakomokomo canke mu bgo mu gitwariro; izoba ar’ imibembe yaje mur’ ubgo buhanza bgo mu gakomokomo canke mu bgo mu gitwariro.
Leviticus13:43 Nuk’ umuherezi az’ amusuzume: maze ni yasanga ico gishundu arwaye gitukura aho nyene mu buhanza bgo mu gakomokomo canke mu bgo mu gitwariro
Leviticus13:44 uwo muntu azoba ar’ umunyamibembe
Leviticus13:45 Kand’ umunyamibembe iy’ arwaye iyo ndwara
Leviticus13:46 Imisi yose akirwaye iyo ndwara azoba ahumanye; mber’ azoba ar’ igihumane
Leviticus13:47 Kandi ni hagira umwambaro urikw indwara yo mu buryo bg’ imibembe
Leviticus13:48 iyo ndwara igafata kur’ ico kijishano uko kijishwe kwose
Leviticus13:49 iyo ndwara ikagomba gusa n’akatsi gatoto canke n’agahama
Leviticus13:50 Na we asuzume iyo ndwara
Leviticus13:51 Ku musi ugira indwi asubire asuzume iyo ndwara; maze ni yasanga iyo ndwara yunguruje kur’ uwo mwambaro uk’ ujishwe kwose
Leviticus13:52 Aheze aturire uwo mwambaro
Leviticus13:53 Arik’ uwo muherezi ni yasuzuma
Leviticus13:54 avuge ko bamesura ico iyo ndwara yafashe
Leviticus13:55 Maz’ ico kintu indwara yafashe
Leviticus13:56 Maz’ ico kintu indwara yafashe
Leviticus13:57 Maz’ iyo ndwara ni yasubira kwubuka kur’ uwo mwambaro uk’ ujishwe kwose
Leviticus13:58 Na ho iyo ndwara ni yaba yavuye mur’ uwo mwambaro uk’ ujishwe kwose
Leviticus13:59 Ico ni co cagezwe c’indwara yo mu buryo bg’imibembe ifashe umwambaro

Leviticus14:2 at’ Iki abe ari co kiba icagezwe co ku munyamibembe
Leviticus14:3 Na we aheze agende inyuma y’aho mushagaje
Leviticus14:4 avuge ko bazanira uyo agira ahumanurwe inyoni zibiri zibona
Leviticus14:5 umuherezi avuge ko bakererera imwe mur’ izo nyoni hejuru y’ikintu c’ikibumbano
Leviticus14:6 Aheze yābīre imwe ikidora
Leviticus14:7 Aheze ayacucagire ibihetangabo ndwi kur’ uwo nyene guhumanurwa ngw avekw imibembe
Leviticus14:8 Nyene guhumanurwa aheze amesure impuzu ziwe
Leviticus14:9 Ku musi ugira indwi yimoshe umushatsi wose wo ku mutwe
Leviticus14:10 Ku musi ugira umunani aze yābīre abana b’ intama babiri b’amasuguru
Leviticus14:11 Umuherezi amuhumanura ashire uwo muntu nyene guhumanurwa hamwe n’ivyo bintu
Leviticus14:12 Uwo muherezi yābīre imwe mur’ ayo masuguru y’intama
Leviticus14:13 akererere iyo suguru y’intama aho bakererera ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha bo n’ikimazi co kwoswa
Leviticus14:14 Uwo muherezi yābīre ku maraso y’ico kimazi c’impongano
Leviticus14:15 Uwo muherezi aheze yābīre ku mavuta ari muri logi

Leviticus14:17 amavuta asigaye ku rushi rwiwe
Leviticus14:18 Ayandi mavuta asigaye ku rushi rwiwe
Leviticus14:19 atange ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha
Leviticus14:20 Uwo muherezi atangire ku gicaniro ico kimazi co kwoswa bo na rya shikanwa ry’ifu; uko ni kw azoba amuhongeye
Leviticus14:21 Kandi ni yaba ar’ umworo
Leviticus14:22 bo n’intunguru zibiri cank’ ivyana vy’inuma bibiri
Leviticus14:23 Ku musi ugira umunani
Leviticus14:24 Umuherezi yābīre uwo mwana w’intama w’ikimazi c’impongano
Leviticus14:25 Akerere uwo mwana w’intama w’ ikimazi c’impongano
Leviticus14:26 Uwo muherezi aheze asuke kur’ ayo mavuta
Leviticus14:27 ayacucagirishe urutoke rwiwe rwo ku kuryo imbere yanje ibihetangabo ndwi;
Leviticus14:28 aheze yābīre kur’ ayo mavuta ari ku rushi rwiwe
Leviticus14:29 Ayandi mavuta asigaye ku rushi rwiwe
Leviticus14:30 Kand’ atange imwe muri za ntunguru canke kimwe muri vya vyana vy’inuma
Leviticus14:31 atange ku vy’uwo ashoboye kuronka
Leviticus14:32 Ico ni co cagezwe c’uwafashwe n’ indwara y’imibembe
Leviticus14:33 Uhoraho abarira Mose na Aroni
Leviticus14:34 ati Ni mwamara gushika mu gihugu c’i Kanani
Leviticus14:35 nyen’ iyo nzu az’ agende abarire umuherezi
Leviticus14:36 Uwo muherezi avuge ko basohora ibintu vyose muri yo
Leviticus14:37 nukw asuzume iyo ndwara: maze ni yabona iyo ndwara yateye amarabaga ku bisika agomba gusa n’akatsi gatoto canke n’agahama
Leviticus14:38 uwo muherezi aheze yisohokere
Leviticus14:39 Ku musi ugira indwi
Leviticus14:40 avuge ko basambura amabuye afashweko n’iyo ndwara
Leviticus14:41 Atekw avuge ko bahomōra iyo nzu imbere hose
Leviticus14:42 Baheze bazane ayandi mabuye
Leviticus14:43 Na h’iyo ndwara ni yagaruka
Leviticus14:44 uwo muherezi aze yinjire
Leviticus14:45 Maze bayisambure
Leviticus14:46 Ikindi
Leviticus14:47 Kand’ uwoyirāramwo az’ amesure impuzu ziwe; n’uwoyirīramwo na we amesure impuzu ziwe.
Leviticus14:48 Na ho umuherezi ni yinjira
Leviticus14:49 Yābīre ivyo guhumanura iyo nzu
Leviticus14:50 Aheze akererere imwe mur’ izo nyoni hejuru y’ ikintu c’ikibumbano
Leviticus14:51 yābīre iyo ngegene y’isederi
Leviticus14:52 Ahumanuze iyo nzu amaraso y’iyo nyoni
Leviticus14:53 Aheze agende arekurire iyo nyoni idora mu gahinga
Leviticus14:54 Ivyo ni vyo vyagezwe vy’ uburyo bgose bg’indwara y’imibembe: ar’ igiturika
Leviticus14:55 ar’ indwara yo mu buryo bg’imibembe ifashe umwambaro cank’ inzu
Leviticus14:56 ar’ igishundu
Leviticus14:57 kugira ngo vyigishe umuntu kw ikintu gihumanye
Leviticus15:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose na Aroni
Leviticus15:2 ati Mubarire Abisirayeli
Leviticus15:3 Uku ni kwo kuzoba guhumana kwiwe gutewe n’ico gisokoro ciwe: ni yaba agenda arajejeta cank’ azibiye
Leviticus15:4 Uburiri bgose umunyagisokoro aryamyeko buzoba buhumanye
Leviticus15:5 Kand’ umuntu wese azokora ku buriri bgiwe az’ amesure impuzu ziwe
Leviticus15:6 Ūzokwicara ku kintu na kimwe umunyagisokoro yicayeko

Leviticus15:11 Kand’ umunyagisokoro ni yakora ku muntu adakaravye

Leviticus15:15 uwo muherezi abitange kw ibimazi
Leviticus15:16 Kand’ intanga z’umugabo ni zamuvamwo

Leviticus15:20 Ikintu cose azoryamako akiri mu miziro yiwe kizoba gihumanye
Leviticus15:21 Kand’ umuntu wese azokora ku buriri bgiwe az’ amesure impuzu ziwe
Leviticus15:22 Ūzokora ku kintu na kimwe yicayeko
Leviticus15:23 Uhereye ku buriri bgiwe
Leviticus15:24 Kandi ni hagira umugabo aryamana na we

Leviticus23:3 mu misi itandatu abe ari ho ibikorwa bikorerwa

Leviticus23:5 mu kwezi kwa mbere
Leviticus23:6 Ku musi w’icumi na gatanu w’ukwo kwezi nyene
Leviticus23:7 Ku musi w’intangamarāra wayo muze mukoranywe no kuba ikoraniro ryera: ntihaze hagire igikorwa kiruhisha muwukorako.
Leviticus23:8 Mur’ iyo misi ukw ar’ indwi
Leviticus23:9 Uhoraho abarira Mose
Leviticus23:10 ati Barira Abisirayeli
Leviticus23:11 na we awuzungurize imbere yanje
Leviticus23:12 Ku musi muwujungujeko muze munshikanire n’isuguru y’intama itaramara umwaka kw ikimazi co kwoswa.
Leviticus23:13 Kand’ ishikanwa ry’ ivyakozwe mw ifu ritanganwa na co rize ribe ibigiracumi bibiri vy’ingero y’ifu igogōretse
Leviticus23:14 Kandi ntimuze mugire umutsima w’iyo fu murya
Leviticus23:15 Kandi muze muharūre imisi
Leviticus23:16 Muharūre
Leviticus23:17 Mu ngo zanyu muze mukūremw’ imitsima ibiri yo kuba ishikanwa ryo kuzunguzwa; ibe ivy’ ibigiracumi bibiri vy’ingero yitwa efa y’ifu; iyo fu ibe igogōretse
Leviticus23:18 Kandi hamwe n’iyo mitsima mushikane abana b’intama ndwi batagira agasembga
Leviticus23:19 Mutange n’isuguru y’impene kw ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha
Leviticus23:20 Umuherezi abizunguzanye na ya mitsima yo ku vyimburwa vy’umushuzo
Leviticus23:21 Kur’ uwo musi nyene muze mutāngāze kw ar’ umusi mukuru: muze muwugire uwo gukorana kwera; ntihaze hagire igikorwa kiruhisha muwukorako: iryo rize ribabere ibgirizwa ry’ intahava mu ngo zanyu zose no ku runganwe rwanyu
Leviticus23:22 Kandi ni mwimbura ivyimburwa vyo mu gihugu canyu
Leviticus23:23 Uhoraho abarira Mose
Leviticus23:24 ati Barira Abisirayeli
Leviticus23:25 Ntihaze hagire igikorwa kiruhisha muwukorako
