Leviticus23:27 at’ Umusi ugira icumi w’ukwo kwezi nye ne kw’indwi ni wo musi w’impongano: uz’ ubabere uwo gukorana kwera
Leviticus23:28 Ntimuze mugire igikorwa na kimwe mukora kur’ uwo musi
Leviticus23:29 Kandi ni hagira umuntu atazokwibabaza kur’ uwo musi
Leviticus23:30 Kandi ni hagira ūzogira igikorwa na kimwe akora kur’ uwo musi
Leviticus23:31 Ntimuze mugire igikorwa na kimwe mukora: iryo rize ribabere ibgirizwa ry’intahava mu ngo zanyu zose
Leviticus23:32 Uwo musi uz’ ubabere isabato yo kuruhuka bihebuje
Leviticus23:33 Uhoraho abarira Mose
Leviticus23:34 ati Barira Abisirayeli
Leviticus23:35 Ku musi w’intangamarāra muze mukoranywe no kuba ikoraniro ryera: ntihaze hagire igikorwa kiruhisha muwukorako.
Leviticus23:36 Mur’ iyo misi ukw ar’ indwi
Leviticus23:37 Iyo ni yo misi mikuru yanje jewe Uhoraho; mukwiye kuyitāngāza kw ar’ iyo gukorana kwera
Leviticus23:38 kand’ ivyo ntibikwiye kubabuza kwitondera amasabato yanje
Leviticus23:39 Nuko muhereye kur’ uwo musi ugira icumi na gatanu w’ ukwo kwezi kw’indwi
Leviticus23:40 Kandi kur’ uwo musi w’intangamarāra muze mwābīre ku vyiza‐vyiza vyamye ku biti
Leviticus23:41 Uk’ umwaka utashe
Leviticus23:42 Muze mumare iyo misi ndwi muri mu nsago; Abisirayeli b’imvukira bose baze bayimare bari mu nsago;
Leviticus23:43 kugira ngw ab’ urunganwe rwanyu
Leviticus23:44 Nuko Mose amenyesha Abisirayeli imisi mikuru y’Uhoraho ishinzwe iy’ ari yo.
Leviticus24:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose
Leviticus24:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli bakuzanire amavuta y’umwisengesure avuye muri elayo zisekuwe
Leviticus24:3 Inyuma ya ca gihuzu gikingiriye vya Bishinga intahe
Leviticus24:4 Aze yame atunganiriza ayo matara kur’ ico gitereko c’izahabu iramuye
Leviticus24:5 Kandi wābīre ifu igogōretse
Leviticus24:6 Uyigire ibirundo bibiri kuri ya meza y’izahabu iramuye ar’ imbere yanje
Leviticus24:7 Ku kirundo kimwe ugerekekw imibavu itunganye
Leviticus24:8 Ukw isabato itashe
Leviticus24:9 Kand’ iyo mitsima iz’ ibe iya Aroni n’abana biwe; baze bahore bayirīra ahantu hera
Leviticus24:10 Umuhungu w’Umwisirayelikazi yavyaranye n’Umunyegiputa arasohoka
Leviticus24:11 Uwo muhungu w’Umwisirayelikazi arogota kuri rya Zina
Leviticus24:12 Baramwugarana kugeza igihe baja kubgirwa ivyo Uhoraho aribushinge.
Leviticus24:13 Uhoraho abarira Mose
Leviticus24:14 ati Jana uwatukanye inyuma y’aho mushagaje
Leviticus24:15 Nawe ubarire Abisirayeli
Leviticus24:16 Kand’ ūzorogota kw izina ryanje
Leviticus24:17 Ūzokubita umuntu akamutsindaho
Leviticus24:18 ūzokubita igitunzwe
Leviticus24:19 Umuntu ni yatera agasembga uwundi
Leviticus24:20 Imvune ihōrwe iyindi
Leviticus24:21 Ūzokwica igitunzwe akirihe; ūzokwica umuntu na we yicwe.
Leviticus24:22 Muze mugire icagezwe kimwe ku munyamahanga ar’i wanyu no ku mvukira: kuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu.
Leviticus24:23 Nuko Mose abarira Abisirayeli
Leviticus25:1 Uhoraho abaririra Mose ku musozi Sinayi
Leviticus25:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli
Leviticus25:3 Muze murime mu ndimiro zanyu imyaka itandatu
Leviticus25:4 Arik’ umwaka ugira indwi uz’ ubere igihugu nk’isabato yo kuruhuka bihebuje
Leviticus25:5 Ivyimeza bikurikiye ivyo mwimbuye ntimuze muvyimburire mu bigega
Leviticus25:6 Mugabo
Leviticus25:7 kandi n’ibiragirano vyanyu n’ibikōko vyo mu gihugu canyu
Leviticus25:8 Iyo myaka yabaye nk’isabato
Leviticus25:9 Maze ku musi ugira icumi w’ukwezi kw’indwi muze muvugishe inzamba y’ijwi rirenga; ku musi w’impongano az’ abe ari ho muvugisha inzamba mu gihugu canyu cose.
Leviticus25:10 Muze murobanure uwo mwaka ugira mirongwitanu
Leviticus25:11 Uwo mwaka ugira mirongwitanu uze wame ubabera uwa yubile; ntimuze muwurimemwo
Leviticus25:12 Kukw ar’ umwaka wa yubile; uze wame ubabera uwejejwe; muzotungwa n’ivyimeza vyo muri wo
Leviticus25:13 Mur’ uwo mwaka wa yubile umuntu wese muri mwebge az’ agaruke mw itongo ryiwe.
Leviticus25:14 Kandi ni hagira ūgurira ikintu mugenzi we
Leviticus25:15 Ukw imyaka ingana
Leviticus25:16 Uk’ umuntu azobona imyaka igisigaye ari myinshi
Leviticus25:17 Nuko ntimuze mugungane
Leviticus25:18 Ni co gituma mukwiye kwumvira amabgirizwa yanje
Leviticus25:19 Kand’ ico gihugu kizokwimbuka
Leviticus25:20 Ariko ni mwavuga
Leviticus25:21 Mu mwaka ugira gatandatu nzobarungikira umugisha utuma haba uburumbuke bg’indya zizobatunga imyaka itatu.
Leviticus25:22 Mu mwaka ugira umunani ni ho muzorima
Leviticus25:23 Amatongo ntaz’ agurwe herandaheze
Leviticus25:24 Kandi mu gihugu cose c’ishamvu yanyu
Leviticus25:25 Uw’i wanyu ni yahinduka umugorwa
Leviticus25:26 Arik’ umuntu ni yabura uwo kuricungura
Leviticus25:27 az’ aharūre imyaka ryaguriwemwo
Leviticus25:28 Ariko n’atashobora kuricungura ubgiwe
Leviticus25:29 Umuntu ni yagura inzu yiwe iri mu gisagara gikikijwe n’uruzitiro rw’amabuye
Leviticus25:30 Ariko n’atayicungura uwo mwaka wose utarashira
Leviticus25:31 Arikw inzu zo mu mihana idakikijwe n’uruzitiro rw’ amabuye
Leviticus25:32 Arikw ibisagara vy’Abalewi vyo si ko bimeze: inzu zo mu bisagara vy’amashamvu yabo
Leviticus25:33 Umwe mu Balewi n’adacungura inzu
Leviticus25:34 Arikw ah’Abalewi baragira inyuma y’ ibisagara vyabo ntihaze hagurwe
Leviticus25:35 Kand’ uw’i wanyu ni yahinduka umugorwa
Leviticus25:36 Ntihaze hagire ūmwaka inyungu cank’ ibirenze ku vyo yatwaye
Leviticus25:37 Ntaz’ amuguranire amahera kuzohabga ay’inyungu
Leviticus25:38 Nd’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu
Leviticus25:39 Kand’ uw’i wanyu ni yagorerwa mu maso yanyu
Leviticus25:40 az’ abane na we nk’umukozi aca ingero canke nk’ umugerērwa; az’ amukorere gushitsa ku mwaka wa yubile.
Leviticus25:41 Ni ho azobona kumuvako
Leviticus25:42 kukw ar’ abagurano banje nakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa: ntibaze bagurwe ngo babe abagurano b’abandi.
Leviticus25:43 Ntimuze mubatwaze igitugu
Leviticus25:44 Arikw abagurano banyu n’abaguranokazi muzogira
Leviticus25:45 Kandi mu bagerērwa bababamwo
Leviticus25:46 mukazobaraga n’abana banyu muzosiga
Leviticus25:47 Kand’ umunyamahanga cank’ umugerērwa ari muri mwebge ni yahinduka umutunzi
Leviticus25:48 amaze kugurwa ashobora gucungurwa: umwe muri bene wabo yomucungura
Leviticus25:49 canke se wabo
Leviticus25:50 Aharūre imyaka hamwe n’uwo yamuguze
Leviticus25:51 Ni yaba imyaka izoba igisigaye ari myinshi
Leviticus25:52 Ni yaba imyaka yo gushitsa kuri yubile izoba isigaye ari mike
Leviticus25:53 Az’ abane na we nk’umucangero akorera ingero uk’ umwaka utashe; ntaz’ amutwaze igitugu mu maso yanyu.
Leviticus25:54 Kandi ni hatagira ikimucungura mur’ ivyo
Leviticus25:55 Kukw Abisirayeli ar’ abagurano banje niharije; n’abagurano banje nakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa: ni jewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu.
Leviticus26:1 Ntimuze mwironderere ibigirwamana
Leviticus26:2 Muze mwitondere amasabato yanje
Leviticus26:3 Ni mwahora mugendera mu mabgirizwa yanje
Leviticus26:4 nuko nanje nzogenda mbarekurira imvura mu bihe vyayo
Leviticus26:5 Igihe canyu c’isekura kizorinda gishitsa mw iyimbura ry’inzabibu
Leviticus26:6 Kandi nzoha ico gihugu kugira impore
Leviticus26:7 Muzokinagiza abansi banyu
Leviticus26:8 Batanu muri mwebge bazokinagiza ijana
Leviticus26:9 Nzokwama mbashizek’ umutima
Leviticus26:10 Muzorya ibigugu vyahitikiranye
Leviticus26:11 Nzoshira ihema ryanje hagati muri mwebge
Leviticus26:12 Nzogendera hagati muri mwebge
Leviticus26:13 Ni jewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu
Leviticus26:14 Ariko ni mutanyumvira
Leviticus26:15 kandi ni mwagaya amabgirizwa yanje
Leviticus26:16 nanje uko nzobagira n’uku: nzobagomorera ibibaca ivutu; kugenda mukōnyēra bo no kurwara inyonko bizotuma muhwera mu kajisho
Leviticus26:17 Kandi nzohoza igitsūre canje kuri mwebge
Leviticus26:18 Ivyo ni bitātuma munyumvira
Leviticus26:19 Nzocobogoza ubushobozi bganyu mwihaya
Leviticus26:20 Amaboko yanyu azopfa ubusa
Leviticus26:21 Kandi ni mwashishikara kugenda munyuranya nanje
Leviticus26:22 Kandi nzobatērēra ibikōko vyo mw ishamba
Leviticus26:23 Ivyo ni bitātuma mwihana ngo mumpindukirire
Leviticus26:24 nuko nanje nzogenda nnyuranya namwe
Leviticus26:25 Kandi nzobatērēra inkota
Leviticus26:26 Ni navuna inkoni mwegamiye
Leviticus26:27 Ivyo vyose ni bitātuma munyumvira
Leviticus26:28 nuko nanje nzogenda nnyuranya namwe ndi n’uburake
Leviticus26:29 Muzorya abahungu banyu n’ abakobga banyu.
Leviticus26:30 Kandi nzokomvomvora ibitabo vyanyu vyo ku mpinga z’imisozi
Leviticus26:31 Nzohindura ibisagara vyanyu imisaka
Leviticus26:32 Nzotuma igihugu canyu gitamārirwa
Leviticus26:33 Namwe nzobashwiragiriza mu mahanga
Leviticus26:34 Ico gihe igihugu kizobona uko gishumbushwa ya masabato yaco
Leviticus26:35 Igihe cose kikir’ amatongo kizoruhuka ukuruhuka kitigeze kuruhuka ku masabato yanyu mukikibamwo.
Leviticus26:36 Amasigarira yo muri mwebge nzotuma barandukira imitima mu gihugu c’abansi babo: bazokangwa n’ ukwumva akababi gakakaje
Leviticus26:37 Bazogwanako nk’abahunga inkota
Leviticus26:38 Muzohonera mu mahanga
Leviticus26:39 Amasigarira yo muri mwebge bazogenda bashirira umunywera mu gihugu c’abansi banyu kubg’ ibigabitanyo vyabo; kandi n’ibigabitanyo vya ba sekuruza bizotuma bagenda bashira umunywera nka bo.
Leviticus26:40 Ariko ni bātura ibigabitanyo vyabo n’ibigabitanyo vya ba sekuruza
Leviticus26:41 ari kwo kwatumye nanje nnyuranya na bo
Leviticus26:42 ni ho nanje nzokwibuka isezerano ryanje nasezeraniye Yakobo
Leviticus26:43 Mber’ ico gihugu bazoba barakivuyemwo
Leviticus26:44 Ariko naho bizomera birtyo
Leviticus26:45 Ariko kubgabo nzokwibuka isezerano nasezeraniye ba sekuruza
Leviticus26:46 Ayo ni yo mabgirizwa n’ ivyashinzwe n’ivyagezwe
Leviticus27:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose
Leviticus27:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli
Leviticus27:3 Umuhungu cank’ umugabo
Leviticus27:4 Ni yaba umukobga cank’ umugore
Leviticus27:5 Kand’ uhereye k’ūmaze imyaka itanu gushitsa k’ūshikanye mirongwibiri
Leviticus27:6 Kand’ uhereye k’ūmaze ukwezi kumwe gushitsa k’ūshikanye imyaka itanu
Leviticus27:7 Kand’ uhereye k’ūrengeje imyaka mirongwitandatu
Leviticus27:8 Arik’ uwasezeranye ni yaba umworo
Leviticus27:9 Ni caba ar’ igitunzwe co mu vyo basanzwe bampakw ibimazi
Leviticus27:10 Ntaz’ akiguze ico bidahuje
Leviticus27:11 Kandi ni caba ar’ igitunzwe co mu bisanzwe bizira
Leviticus27:12 uwo muherezi agicire igiciro kimaze
Leviticus27:13 Arik’ uwagitanze
Leviticus27:14 Umuntu ni yarobanura inzu yiwe
Leviticus27:15 Arik’ uwayirobanuye akayitanga
Leviticus27:16 Umuntu ni yarobanura igice co kw itongo ryo mw ishamvu yiwe
Leviticus27:17 Nuko ni yahēra mu mwaka wa yubile
Leviticus27:18 Na ho ni yarobanura iyo ndimiro yiwe inyuma ya yubile
Leviticus27:19 Arik’ uwarobanuye iyo ndimiro
Leviticus27:20 Na ho n’atāgomba kuyicungura
Leviticus27:21 arikw iyo ndimiro ni yakomōrwa n’umwaka wa yubile
Leviticus27:22 Kand’ umuntu ni yarobanura indimiro
Leviticus27:23 umuherezi az’ acire uyo igiciro gihwanye n’ico waciriye kuzoshitsa ku mwaka wa yubile: az’ atange kur’ uwo musi igiciro waciriye
Leviticus27:24 Maze mu mwaka wa yubile
Leviticus27:25 Kand’ igiciro cose uzohora ucira
Leviticus27:26 Arikw ic’ uburiza co mu bitunzwe
Leviticus27:27 Na ho ni caba ico mu bitunzwe bizira
Leviticus27:28 Mugabo
Leviticus27:29 Uwo abantu baciriyekw iteka barunduye
Leviticus27:30 Mu vyeze mu gihugu
Leviticus27:31 Maz’ umuntu ni yagomba gucungura ikigiracumi ciwe mur’ ivyo
Leviticus27:32 Kandi mu masho no mu mikuku
Leviticus27:33 Umuntu ntaze yibaze kw ari nziza canke kw ari mbi
Leviticus27:34 Ivyo ni vyo vyagezwe Uhoraho yagereye Mose ku musozi Sinayi
Numbers1:1 Ku musi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa kabiri kw’umwaka ugira kabiri bavuye mu gihugu ca Egiputa
Numbers1:2 ati Muharūre igitigiri c’ishengero ryose ry’Abisirayeli
Numbers1:3 muhēreye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru
Numbers1:4 Kandi muze mufatanye n’umuntu umwe‐umwe wo mu miryango yose
Numbers1:5 Aya ni yo mazina y’abo bantu bazofatanya namwe: mu ba Reyubeni ni Esisuri mwene Shedeyuri;
Numbers1:6 mu ba Simeyoni ni Shelumiyeli mwene Surishadayi;
Numbers1:7 mu ba Yuda ni Nahashoni mwene Aminadabu;
Numbers1:8 mu ba Isakari ni Netaneli mwene Suwari;
Numbers1:9 mu ba Zebuloni ni Eliyabu mwene Heloni;
Numbers1:10 muri bene Yosefu
Numbers1:11 mu ba Benyamini ni Abidani mwene Gideyoni;
Numbers1:12 mu ba Dani ni Ahiyeseri mwene Amishadayi;
Numbers1:13 mu ba Asheri ni Pagiyeli mwene Okirani;
Numbers1:14 mu ba Gadi ni Eliyasafu mwene Duweli;
Numbers1:15 mu ba Nafutali ni Ahira mwene Enani.
Numbers1:16 Abo ni bo bātowe mw ikoraniro
Numbers1:17 Nuko Mose na Aroni bajana abo bantu bavuzwe amazina
Numbers1:18 bakoranya ikoraniro ryose ku musi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa kabiri; abantu bariyandikisha nk’ukw amavuka yabo ari
Numbers1:19 nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose; nukw abaharūrira mu bugaragwa bg’i Sinayi.
Numbers1:20 Baharūra amavuka ya ba Reyubeni imfura ya Isirayeli
Numbers1:21 abāharūwe bo mu muryango wa Reyubeni baba ibihumbi mirongwine na bitandatu n’amajana atanu.
Numbers1:22 Baharūra amavuka ya ba Simeyoni
Numbers1:23 abāharūwe bo mu muryango wa Simeyoni baba ibihumbi mirongwitanu n’ icenda n’amajana atatu.
Numbers1:24 Baharūra amavuka ya ba Gadi
Numbers1:25 abāharūwe bo mu muryango wa Gadi baba ibihumbi mirongwine na bitanu n’amajana atandatu na mirongwitanu.
Numbers1:26 Baharūra amavuka ya ba Yuda
Numbers1:27 abāharūwe bo mu muryango wa Yuda baba ibihumbi mirongwirindwi n’amajana atandatu.
Numbers1:28 Baharūra amavuka ya ba Isakari
Numbers1:29 abāharūwe bo mu muryango wa Isakari baba ibihumbi mirongwitanu na bine n’amajana ane.
Numbers1:30 Baharūra amavuka ya ba Zebuloni
Numbers1:31 abāharūwe bo mu muryango wa Zebuloni baba ibihumbi mirongwitanu n’ indwi n’amajana ane.
Numbers1:32 Mu ba Yosefu
Numbers1:33 abāharūwe bo mu muryango wa Efurayimu baba ibihumbi mirongwine n’amajana atanu.
Numbers1:34 Baharūra amavuka ya ba Manase
Numbers1:35 abāharūwe bo mu muryango wa Manase baba ibihumbi mirongwitatu na bibiri n’amajana abiri.
Numbers1:36 Baharūra amavuka ya ba Benyamini
Numbers1:37 abāharūwe bo mu muryango wa Benyamini baba ibihumbi mirongwitatu na bitanu n’amajana ane.
Numbers1:38 Baharūra amavuka ya ba Dani
Numbers1:39 abāharūwe bo mu muryango wa Dani baba ibihumbi mirongwitandatu na bibiri n’amajana ndwi.
Numbers1:40 Baharūra amavuka ya ba Asheri
Numbers1:41 abāharūwe bo mu muryango wa Asheri baba ibihumbi mirongwine na kimwe n’amajana atanu.
Numbers1:42 Baharūra amavuka ya ba Nafutali
Numbers1:43 abāharūwe bo mu muryango wa Nafutali baba ibihumbi mirongwitanu na bitatu n’amajana ane.
Numbers1:44 Abo ni bo bāharūwe na Mose na Aroni bafatanije na ba bakuru b’Abisirayeli ukw ar’ icumi na babiri
Numbers1:45 Nukw abāharūwe bose bo mu Bisirayeli
Numbers1:46 abāharūwe bose na bose baba ibihumbi amajana atandatu na bitatu
Numbers1:47 Arikw Abalewi
Numbers1:48 kuk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose
Numbers1:49 at’ Umuryango wa Lewi wo ntuz’ uwuharūre
Numbers1:50 Arikw Abalewi uz’ ubagire abo kuzezwa iryo hema ry’Ibishinga intahe
Numbers1:51 Kandi mu kurishingūra rigeze kugenda
Numbers1:52 Abisirayeli baze bashinge amahema yabo
Numbers1:53 Arikw Abalewi bo baze bashinge ayabo impande zose z’iryo hema ry’Ibishinga intahe
Numbers1:54 Nukw Abisirayeli babigenza kuno
Numbers2:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose na Aroni
Numbers2:2 at’ Abisirayeli baze bame bashinga amahema yabo
Numbers2:3 I burasirazuba haze hasagaze ab’ ibendera y’igugu rya Yuda
Numbers2:4 Ingabo zāharūwe zabo zar’ ibihumbi mirongwirindwi na bine n’amajana atandatu.
Numbers2:5 Ab’ umuryango wa Isakari abe ari bo bahererana na bo; kand’ umukuru w’Abisakari ni Netaneli mwene Suwari:
Numbers2:6 ingabo zāharūwe zabo zar’ ibihumbi mirongwitanu na bine n’amajana ane.
Numbers2:7 Bakurikirwe n’umuryango wa Zebuloni; umukuru w’Abazebuloni ni Eliyabu mwene Heloni;
Numbers2:8 ingabo zāharūwe zabo zar’ ibihumbi mirongwitanu n’indwi n’amajana ane.
Numbers2:9 Bose na bose abāharūwe mw igugu rya Yuda bar’ ingabo ibihumbi ijana na mirongumunani na bitandatu n’amajana ane
Numbers2:10 Ku ruhande rw’i bumanuko haze habe igugu rya Reyubeni
Numbers2:11 Ingabo zāharūwe zabo zar’ ibihumbi mirongwine na bitandatu n’amajana atanu.
Numbers2:12 Ab’ umuryango wa Simeyoni abe ari bo bahererana na bo; kand’ umukuru w’Abasimeyoni ni Shelumiyeli mwene Surishadayi:
Numbers2:13 ingabo zāharūwe zabo zar’ ibihumbi mirongwitanu n’icenda n’amajana atatu.
Numbers2:14 Bakurikirwe n’umuryango wa Gadi; umukuru w’Abagadi ni Eliyasafu mwene Ruweli:
Numbers2:15 ingabo zāharūwe zabo zar’ ibihumbi mirongwine na bitanu n’amajana atandatu na mirongwitanu.
Numbers2:16 Bose na bose abāharūwe mw igugu rya Reyubeni bar’ ingabo ibihumbi ijana na mirongwitanu na kimwe n’amajana ane na mirongwitanu
Numbers2:17 Hanyuma haze hagende ihema ry’ibonaniro
Numbers2:18 Ku ruhande rw’i burengerazuba haze habe igugu rya Efurayimu
Numbers2:19 Ingabo zāharūwe zabo zar’ ibihumbi mirongwine n’amajana atanu.
Numbers2:20 Ab’ umuryango wa Manase abe ari bo bahererana na bo; kand’ umukuru w’Abamanase ni Gamaliyeli mwene Pedasuri:
Numbers2:21 ingabo zāharūwe zabo zar’ ibihumbi mirongwitatu na bibiri n’amajana abiri.
Numbers2:22 Bakurikirwe n’umuryango wa Benyamini; umukuru w’Ababenyamini ni Abidani mwene Gideyoni:
Numbers2:23 ingabo zāharūwe zabo zar’ ibihumbi mirongwitatu na bitanu n’amajana ane.
Numbers2:24 Bose na bose abāharūwe mw igugu rya Efurayimu bar’ ingabo ibihumbi ijana n’umunani n’ijana rimwe
Numbers2:25 Ku ruhande rw’i burārūko haze habe igugu rya Dani
Numbers2:26 Ingabo zāharūwe zabo zar’ ibihumbi mirongwitandatu na bibiri n’amajana ndwi.
Numbers2:27 Ab’ umuryango wa Asheri abe ari bo bahererana na bo; kand’ umukuru w’Abasheri ni Pagiyeli mwene Okirani:
Numbers2:28 ingabo zāharūwe zabo zar’ ibihumbi mirongwine na kimwe n’amajana atanu.
Numbers2:29 Bakurikirwe n’umuryango wa Nafutali; umukuru w’Abanafutali ni Ahira mwene Enani:
Numbers2:30 ingabo zāharūwe zabo zar’ ibihumbi mirongwitanu na bitatu n’amajana ane.
Numbers2:31 Bose na bose abāharūwe mw igugu rya Dani bar’ ingabo ibihumbi ijana na mirongwitanu n’indwi n’amajana atandatu. Abo baze babe ababaherukira mu kugenda
Numbers2:32 Abo ni bo bāharūwe mu Bisirayeli
Numbers2:33 Arikw Abalewi ntibāharūranwa n’Abisirayeli
Numbers2:34 Abisirayeli bakora kuno; basagaza baherereye ku mabendera yabo; ngo hagere kugenda bakagenda
Numbers3:1 Uru ni rwo ruvyaro Aroni na Mose bari bafise igihe Uhoraho yavuganira na Mose ku musozi Sinayi.
Numbers3:2 Aya ni yo mazina ya bene Aroni: imfura yiwe ni Nadabu
Numbers3:3 Ayo ni yo mazina ya bene Aroni
Numbers3:4 Mugabo Nadabu na Abihu bāpfiriye imbere y’Uhoraho
Numbers3:5 Uhoraho abarira Mose
Numbers3:6 at’ Igiza hafi umuryango wa Lewi
Numbers3:7 bamutumikire mu vyo yagezweko
Numbers3:8 Bazezwe ibintu vyose vyo mw ihema ry’ibonaniro
Numbers3:9 Nukw Abalewi ubashikirize Aroni n’ abana biwe
Numbers3:10 Ushireho Aroni n’abana biwe
Numbers3:11 Uhoraho abarira Mose
Numbers3:12 ati Rāba jewe nisobanuriye Abalewi mu Bisirayeli bandi
Numbers3:13 Kukw abana bose b’imfura ar’ abanje: ku musi nicirakw abana bose b’imfura bo mu gihugu ca Egiputa
Numbers3:14 Uhoraho abaririra Mose mu bugaragwa bg’i Sinayi
Numbers3:15 ati Harūra Abalewi
Numbers3:16 Nuko Mose arabaharūra
Numbers3:17 Aba ni bo bana ba Lewi
Numbers3:18 Aya ni yo mazina ya bene Gerushoni
Numbers3:19 Aba ni bo bene Kohati
Numbers3:20 Aba ni bo bene Merari
Numbers3:21 Abākomōtse kuri Gerushoni n’umuryango w’Abalibuni n’uw’ Abashimeyi: iyo ni yo miryango ya ba Gerushoni.
Numbers3:22 Abāharūwe bo muri bo
Numbers3:23 Ab’ imiryango ya ba Gerushoni bāsagaza inyuma ya rya hema ahahera i burengerazuba.
Numbers3:24 Umukuru w’ inzu ya ba sekuruza b’aba Gerushoni yari Eliyasafu mwene Layeli.
Numbers3:25 Ivy’ ihema ry’ibonaniro aba Gerushoni bāzēzwa vyar’ ihema ry’imbere
Numbers3:26 n’impuzu zo kubamba ngo zibe urugo
Numbers3:27 Abākomōtse kuri Kohati n’ umuryango w’Abamuramu n’uw’ Abisihari n’uw’ Abaheburoni n’uw’ Abuziyeli: iyo ni yo miryango y’aba Kohati.
Numbers3:28 Nk’ukw igitigiri c’izinamuhungu wese cari kiri
Numbers3:29 Ab’ imiryango y’aba Kohati bāsagaza ku ruhande rw’iryo hema ahahera i bumanuko.
Numbers3:30 Umukuru w’inzu ya ba sekuruza b’aba Kohati yari Elisafani mwene Uziyeli.
Numbers3:31 Ivyo bāzēzwa yar’ isandugu n’ameza n’ico guterekwakw amatara
Numbers3:32 Eleyazari mwene Aroni umuherezi ni we yagizwe mukuru kuri ba bakuru b’Abalewi
Numbers3:33 Abākomōtse kuri Merari n’umuryango w’Abamahili n’uw’ Abamushi: iyo ni yo miryango y’aba Merari.
Numbers3:34 Abāharūwe bo muri bo
Numbers3:35 Umukuru w’inzu ya ba sekuruza b’aba Merari yari Suriyeli mwene Abihayili; abo ni bo bāsagaza ku ruhande rw’iryo hema ahahera i burārūko.
Numbers3:36 Aba Merari
Numbers3:37 n’ibirimbi vy’ urugo rwo kurikīkūza
Numbers3:38 Abāshinga amahema yabo imbere y’iryo hema ahahera i burasirazuba
Numbers3:39 Abāharūwe bo mu Balewi
Numbers3:40 Uhoraho abarira Mose
Numbers3:41 Unshingūrire Abalewi
Numbers3:42 Nuko Mose aharūra imfura zose zo mu Bisirayeli
Numbers3:43 Abahungu b’imfura bose bāharūwe
Numbers3:44 Uhoraho abarira Mose
Numbers3:45 ati Shingūra Abalewi
Numbers3:46 Kand’ abana b’imfura b’Abisirayeli basigaye
Numbers3:47 uz’ ubāke shekeli zitanu kw incungu
Numbers3:48 Ayo mahera acunguye abasāgutse uyahe Aroni n’abana biwe.
Numbers3:49 Nuko Mose yāka amahera y’incungu abo bāsāgutse ku bācunguwe n’Abalewi:
Numbers3:50 amahera yātse abo bana b’ imfura b’Abisirayeli aba shekeli igihumbi n’amajana atatu na mirongwitandatu na zitanu
Numbers3:51 Ayo mahera y’incungu Mose ayaha Aroni n’abana biwe
Numbers4:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose na Aroni
Numbers4:2 ati Muharūre igitigiri c’aba Kohati
Numbers4:3 muhēre ku bamaze imyaka mirongwitatu no kuja hejuru
Numbers4:4 Kand’ ibi ni vyo bikorwa aba Kohati bazokora mur’ iryo hema ry’ibonaniro no mu vyera cane.
Numbers4:5 Iyo hageze guhaguruka ngo mugende
Numbers4:6 baheze barenzekw ico kubitwikira co mu nsāto z’ibikōko vyitwa tahashi
Numbers4:7 Kand’ ameza y’imitsima y’ibiterekērwa bayarenzekw impuzu y’isufe
Numbers4:8 baheze babirenzekw impuzu isa n’agahama
Numbers4:9 Baheze bābīre impuzu y’isufe
Numbers4:10 bagitēkerane n’ibintu vyaco vyose mu co kubitwikira co mu nsāto za tahashi
Numbers4:11 Kand’ igicaniro c’izahabu bakirenzekw impuzu y’isufe
Numbers4:12 Kandi bābīre imbombovu yose y’ibikoreshwa
Numbers4:13 Bayore umunyota ku gicaniro
Numbers4:14 bagereke hejuru ibintu vyaco vyose bakoresha ibikorwa vyaco
Numbers4:15 Maze Aroni n’abana biwe ni baheza gutwikira ivy’ Ahēra n’ibintu vyaho vyose
Numbers4:16 Kand’ ivyo Eleyazari mwene Aroni umuherezi ajējwe bize bibe amavuta y’amatara
Numbers4:17 Uhoraho abarira Mose na Aroni
Numbers4:18 at’ Ubgoko bg’aba Kohati
Numbers4:19 ariko muze mwame mubagirira murtya
Numbers4:20 Ariko bo ntibakinjire ngo bītegereze ivyēra
Numbers4:21 Uhoraho abarira Mose
Numbers4:22 ati Harūra igitigiri c’aba Gerushoni na bo
Numbers4:23 ubaharūre uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwitatu no kuja hejuru
Numbers4:24 Kand’ ibi ni vyo bikorwa ab’ imiryango y’aba Gerushoni bazokora
Numbers4:25 baze barerure impuzu zirōngōranijwe z’ihema ry’imbere
Numbers4:26 n’ impuzu zo kubamba ngo zibe urugo
Numbers4:27 Aroni n’abana biwe babe ari bo bagera aba Gerushoni mu bikorwa vyabo vyose
Numbers4:28 Ivyo abe ari vyo biba ibikorwa vy’imiryango y’aba Gerushoni vyo mu vy’ihema ry’ ibonaniro; kand’ ibikorwa bajējwe baze babirābirwe na Itamari mwene Aroni umuherezi.
Numbers4:29 Ku vy’aba Merari na bo
Numbers4:30 ubaharūre uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwitatu no kuja hejuru
Numbers4:31 Ibi abe ari vyo bazēzwa kurerura
Numbers4:32 n’ibirimbi vy’urugo rwo kurikīkūza
Numbers4:33 Ivyo abe ari vyo biba ibikorwa vy’imiryango y’aba Merari
Numbers4:34 Nuko Mose na Aroni na ba bakuru b’ikoraniro baharūra aba Kohati
Numbers4:35 bahēreye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwitatu no kuja hejuru
Numbers4:36 Abāharūwe bo muri bo
Numbers4:37 Abo ni bo bāharūwe bo mu miryango y’aba Kohati
Numbers4:38 Kand’ abāharūwe bo mu ba Gerushoni
Numbers4:39 uhēreye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwitatu no kuja hejuru
Numbers4:40 bār’ ibihumbi bibiri n’amajana atandatu na mirongwitatu
Numbers4:41 Abo ni bo bāharūwe bo mu miryango y’aba Gerushoni
Numbers4:42 Kand’ abāharūwe bo mu miryango y’aba Merari
Numbers4:43 uhēreye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwitatu no kuja hejuru
Numbers4:44 bār’ ibihumbi bitatu n’amajana abiri
Numbers4:45 Abo ni bo bāharūwe bo mu miryango y’aba Merari
Numbers4:46 Nukw abāharūwe bose na bose bo mu Balewi
Numbers4:47 uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwitatu no kuja hejuru
Numbers4:48 abāharūwe bo muri bo baba ibihumbi munani n’amajana atanu na mirongumunani.
Numbers4:49 Nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabigeze
Numbers5:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose
Numbers5:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli
Numbers5:3 ar’ icitwa izinamuhungu cank’ izinamukobga
Numbers5:4 Nukw Abisirayeli babigenza bartyo
Numbers5:5 Uhoraho abarira Mose
Numbers5:6 ati Barira Abisirayeli
Numbers5:7 aze yature icaha yakoze
Numbers5:8 Ariko nyene kugirirwa nabi
Numbers5:9 Umugabane wose uzoshingūrwa ku vyēra vyose Abisirayeli bashikana
Numbers5:10 Ivy’ umuntu wese arobanuye ngw abitange
Numbers5:11 Uhoraho abarira Mose
Numbers5:12 ati Barira Abisirayeli
Numbers5:13 uwundi mugabo akaryamana na we
Numbers5:14 umugabo wiwe agafatwa n’ifūhe
Numbers5:15 nuk’ uwo mugabo akwiye kujana umugore wiwe ku muherezi
Numbers5:16 Umuherezi amwīgize hafi
Numbers5:17 uwo muherezi aheze yābīre amazi yejejwe mu kintu c’ikibumbano
Numbers5:18 Ashire uwo mugore imbere yanje
Numbers5:19 Uwo muherezi aheze arahize uwo mugore
Numbers5:20 Arikw asangwa wararetse kuba ari we urāba
Numbers5:21 uwo muherezi aheze arahize uwo mugore indahiro yo kwivuma
Numbers5:22 Kandi n’aya mazi atera umuvumo araja mu mara yawe
Numbers5:23 Uwo muherezi aheze yandike iyo mivumo mu gitabo
Numbers5:24 aheze anyweshe uwo mugore ayo mazi arura atera umuvumo
Numbers5:25 Uwo muherezi acishemwo
Numbers5:26 arikamatek’ urushi rumwe rwo kuba icibutso caryo
Numbers5:27 Ni yamara kuyamunywesha
Numbers5:28 Arik’ uwo mugore ni yaba atāhumanye
Numbers5:29 Ico ni co cagezwe c’ifūhe
Numbers5:30 no ku mugabo afatwa n’ifūhe
Numbers5:31 Uwo mugabo azoba atsinze ntazoba yaragabitanije
Numbers6:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose
Numbers6:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli
Numbers6:3 aze yitandukanye na vino n’ibiboreza bindi; ntaz’ asome no ku nkarisha ya vino canke ku nkarisha y’ikiboreza kindi
Numbers6:4 Mu misi yose y’ubunaziri bgiwe ntaz’ arye ikintu na kimwe kiva ku muzabibu
Numbers6:5 Mu misi yose y’isezerano ryiwe ry’ubunaziri ntihaze hagire urupfuhe rugera ku mutwe wiwe: az’ abe uwera gushitsa ah’ imisi yo kunyiyegurira jewe Uhoraho izoshirira; az’ areke umushatsi wiwe utendere.
Numbers6:6 Imisi yose yo kunyiyegurira kwiwe ntaze yēgēre umuvyimba.
Numbers6:7 Ivyo ntaz’ avyiyandurishe
Numbers6:8 Imisi yose y’ubunaziri bgiwe az’ abe uwera kuri jewe Uhoraho.
Numbers6:9 Kandi ni hagira umuntu agwa bukumbi i ruhande yiwe
Numbers6:10 Maze ku w’umunani az’ azane intunguru zibiri cank’ ivyana vy’inuma bibiri ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro
Numbers6:11 maz’ umuherezi atange kimwe kw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha
Numbers6:12 Aze yongere anyiyegurire jewe Uhoraho imisi y’ubunaziri bgiwe
Numbers6:13 Iki ni co cagezwe co ku Munaziri
Numbers6:14 anzanire ishikanwa ryiwe
Numbers6:15 n’indumane irimw’ imitsima itambiwe; udutsima twacumbge mw ifu igogōretse
Numbers6:16 Umuherezi abizane imbere yanje
Numbers6:17 atange na ya mpfizi y’intama kw ikimazi anshikaniye c’ishimwe
Numbers6:18 Maz’ uwo Munaziri yimoshereze umushatsi wiwe w’ubunaziri ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro
Numbers6:19 Maz’ umuherezi yābīre igikenye c’ukuboko kwa ya mpfizi y’intama gutetse
Numbers6:20 Umuherezi abizunguze
Numbers6:21 Ico ni co cagezwe co ku Munaziri yasezeranye isezerano

Numbers6:23 ati Barira Aroni n’abana biwe
Numbers6:24 mut’ Uhoraho aguhe umugisha
Numbers6:25 Uhoraho akumurikishirize mu nyonga hiwe
Numbers6:26 Uhoraho akurābe neza
Numbers6:27 Ukw abe ari ko bashira izina ryanje ku Bisirayeli; nanje nzobaha umugisha.

Numbers7:89 Maze Mose yinjiye mw ihema ry’ibonaniro kubonana n’Uhoraho
Numbers8:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose
Numbers8:2 ati Barira Aroni
Numbers8:3 Nuko Aroni abigenza artyo; ashira ayo matara ku gitereko
Numbers8:4 Uku ni kw ico gitereko cākozwe: cari gicuzwe mw izahabu; car’ igicurano uhereye ku ntebe yaco ugashitsa no ku bimeze nk’amashurwe biri kuri co; nk’ukw icitegererezo cari kiri
Numbers8:5 Uhoraho abarira Mose
Numbers8:6 ati Robanura Abalewi mu Bisirayeli
Numbers8:7 Uku abe ari k’ugenza mu kubahumanura: ubacucagire amazi y’impongano y’ivyaha
Numbers8:8 Maze bābīre imasa y’umukangara
Numbers8:9 Maz’ uzane Abalewi imbere y’ihema ry’ibonaniro
Numbers8:10 Kand’ igihe uzanye Abalewi imbere yanje jewe Uhoraho
Numbers8:11 Aroni aheze atange Abalewi kw ishikanwa rijungujwe imbere yanje
Numbers8:12 Maz’ Abalewi barambike ibiganza mu ruhanga rw’ ayo mamasa
Numbers8:13 Maz’ ushire Abalewi imbere ya Aroni n’ abana biwe
Numbers8:14 Ukw abe ari k’urobanura Abalewi mu Bisirayeli bandi: Abalewi babe abanje niharije.
Numbers8:15 Hanyuma y’ivyo Abalewi babone kuza ngo bakore ibikorwa vy’ihema ry’ibonaniro; nuk’ ubahumanure
Numbers8:16 Kukw abo mbahawe mbeguriwe mu Bisirayeli bandi; kuko mbitoranirije ngo basubire mu gishingo c’ubuzibūra bgose
Numbers8:17 Kukw imfura zose z’Abisirayeli ar’ izanje
Numbers8:18 None ntwaye Abalewi ngo basubire mu gishingo c’abana bose b’imfura b’Abisirayeli.
Numbers8:19 Kandi ntanze Abalewi
Numbers8:20 Uko ni ko Mose na Aroni n’ ishengero ryose ry’Abisirayeli bagenjeje ku Balewi: Abisirayeli babagenza nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yarabariye Mose ku vyabo.
Numbers8:21 Nukw Abalewi biyuhagira ivyaha
Numbers8:22 Hanyuma y’ivyo Abalewi babona kuza gukora ibikorwa vyabo vy’ ihema ry’ibonaniro
Numbers8:23 Uhoraho abarira Mose
Numbers8:24 at’ Ibi ni vyo ngeze ku Balewi: abamaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’ itanu no kuja hejuru baze binjire mw ibango ry’igikorwa c’ihema ry’ ibonaniro.
Numbers8:25 Ni bageza imyaka mirongwitanu baze bakūkuruke mur’ iryo bango ry’ico gikorwa
Numbers8:26 ariko bashobora kwifashiriza bagenzi babo mu vy’ ihema ry’ibonaniro

Numbers9:2 at’ Abisirayeli bakwiye kurya ivya Pasika mu gihe cayo cashinzwe.
Numbers9:3 Ku musi w’icumi na kane w’uku kwezi nyene ku mugoroba
Numbers9:4 Mose araheza abarira Abisirayeli yuko bakwiye kuzorya ivya Pasika.

Numbers9:6 Maze hār’ abagabo bahumanijwe n’umuvyimba w’umuntu
Numbers9:7 baramubarira
Numbers9:8 Mose arabishura

Numbers9:10 ati Barira Abisirayeli
Numbers9:11 baze babirye mu kwezi kwa kabiri
Numbers9:12 ntibaze bagire izo basiga ngo zirāre
Numbers9:13 Arik’ umuntu adahumanye
Numbers9:14 Umunyamahanga ni yaza kuba muri mwebge
Numbers9:15 Ku musi rya hema ryashinzweko
Numbers9:16 Uko ni ko vyagenda biba imisi yose: ico gicu cama kiripfutse
Numbers9:17 Kand’ ico gicu iyo kidūze kivuye kur’ iryo hema
Numbers9:18 Icagezwe c’Uhoraho ni co cahagurutsa Abisirayeli

Numbers9:22 Naho yaba imisi ibiri

Numbers10:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose
Numbers10:2 at’ Uz’ ukore inzumbete zibiri mw ifeza
Numbers10:3 Uko bazivugije
Numbers10:4 Ni bavuza rumwe gusa
Numbers10:5 Na ho iyo muvugije ijwi rirengēra
Numbers10:6 Maze mwongeye kuvuza ijwi rirengēra
Numbers10:7 Ariko ni mwagomba gukoranya ikoraniro
Numbers10:8 Bene Aroni abaherezi az’ abe ari bo bavuza izo nzumbete
Numbers10:9 Kandi ni mwaba mu gihugu canyu
Numbers10:10 No mu gihe c’umunezero wanyu
Numbers10:11 Mu mwaka ugira kabiri
Numbers10:12 Abisirayeli barahaguruka
Numbers10:13 Urwo rugendo ni rwo rwabaye urwa mbere bāgenda barōngōwe n’ivyo Uhoraho yatumye Mose.
Numbers10:14 Habanje guhaguruka ab’ ibendera y’igugu rya Yuda
Numbers10:15 Umukuru w’ ingabo zo mu muryango wa Isakari yari Netaneli mwene Suwari.
Numbers10:16 Umukuru w’ingabo zo mu muryango wa Zebuloni yari Eliyabu mwene Heloni.
Numbers10:17 Rya hema riraheza rirashingūrwa: aba Gerushoni n’aba Merari
Numbers10:18 Maze hahaguruka ab’ ibendera y’igugu rya Reyubeni
Numbers10:19 Umukuru w’ingabo zo mu muryango wa Simeyoni yari Shelumiyeli mwene Surishadayi.
Numbers10:20 Umukuru w’ingabo zo mu muryango wa Gadi yari Eliyasafu mwene Duweli.
Numbers10:21 Hatako hahaguruka bene Kohati
Numbers10:22 Maze hahaguruka ab’ ibendera y’igugu rya Efurayimu
Numbers10:23 Umukuru w’ingabo zo mu muryango wa Manase yari Gamaliyeli mwene Pedasuri.
Numbers10:24 Umukuru w’ingabo zo mu muryango wa Benyamini yari Abidani mwene Gideyoni.
Numbers10:25 Maze hahaguruka ab’ ibendera y’igugu rya Dani
Numbers10:26 Umukuru w’ ingabo zo mu muryango wa Asheri ni Pagiyeli mwene Okirani.
Numbers10:27 Umukuru w’ingabo zo mu muryango wa Nafutali yari Ahira mwene Enani.
Numbers10:28 Uko ni kw Abisirayeli bākurikirana
Numbers10:29 Mose abarira Hobabu
Numbers10:30 Na we aramwishura
Numbers10:31 Aramwishura
Numbers10:32 Kandi ni wajana natwe
Numbers10:33 Nuko barahaguruka
Numbers10:34 Ca gicu c’Uhoraho cirirwa hejuru yabo
Numbers10:35 Maz’ ukw isandugu ihagurutse
Numbers10:36 Iy’ ihagaze
Numbers11:1 Abantu baridodomba kubg’ ibibagoye; bigwa mu matwi y’Uhoraho; avyumvise
Numbers11:2 Abantu batakambira Mose
Numbers11:3 Aho hantu bahita Tabera
Numbers11:4 Abanyamahanga b’ikivange bari muri bo batangura kwifuza inyama; Abisirayeli na bo bongera kurira
Numbers11:5 Twibutse ya mafi twarya tukiri muri Egiputa ata co dutanze
Numbers11:6 Ariko non’ uburuma buratwishe: nta kindi na kimwe twezakw ijisho atar’ iyi manu gusa.

Numbers19:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose na Aroni
Numbers19:2 at’ Ibi ni vyo bibgirijwe n’icagezwe jewe Uhoraho nshinze: Barira Abisirayeli bakuzanire inka y’iriza y’akagajo itagira ibara cank’ agasembga
Numbers19:3 Muyihe Eleyazari umuherezi
Numbers19:4 Maze Eleyazari umuherezi akoze urutoke mu maraso yayo
Numbers19:5 Iyo nka iheze ituririrwe aho nyene imbere yiwe; iturirwe yose
Numbers19:6 Maz’ umuherezi yābīre ingegene y’igiti c’isederi
Numbers19:7 Uwo muherezi aheze amesure impuzu ziwe
Numbers19:8 Uwayituriye na we nyene amesure impuzu ziwe
Numbers19:9 Umuntu adahumanye ayore umunyota w’iyo nka
Numbers19:10 Ūyoye umunyota wayo amesure impuzu ziwe
Numbers19:11 Ūzokora ku kiziga c’umuntu uw’ ari we wese azoba ahumanye kumara imisi ndwi:
Numbers19:12 aze yihumanuze ayo mazi ku musi ugira gatatu no ku wugira indwi
Numbers19:13 Ūzokora ku kiziga c’umuntu uw’ ari we wese
Numbers19:14 Iki ni co cagezwe co ku muntu aguye i we mw ihema: umuntu wese azokwinjira mur’ iryo hema
Numbers19:15 Kand’ ikintu cose gisanzwe kirāngāye
Numbers19:16 Kand’ umuntu azoba ari ku gahinga
Numbers19:17 Ūhumanye bamukamatire kuri wa munyota wa ca kimazi co gukūra ivyaha caturiwe
Numbers19:18 Umuntu adahumanye aheze yābīre utubabi twa ezobu
Numbers19:19 Kand’ uwo muntu adahumanye az’ acucagire k’ūhumanye ku musi ugira gatatu no ku wugira indwi: nuko ku musi ugira indwi amuhumanure; na we aheze amesure impuzu ziwe
Numbers19:20 Arik’ umuntu azoba ahumanye
Numbers19:21 Iryo rize ribabere ibgirizwa ry’ intahava. Kand’ ūzoba acucagiye ayo mazi ahumanura az’ amesure impuzu ziwe; ūzoyakorako azoba ahumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba.
Numbers19:22 Kand’ ikintu cose ūhumanye azokorako na co kizoba gihumanye: ūzogikorako azoba ahumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba.

Numbers28:13 umwana w’intama umwe‐umwe muwutangane n’ikigiracumi kimwe c’ifu igogōretse ivanzwe n’amavuta ya elayo: bize bibe ikimazi co kwoswa

Numbers28:25 Kandi ku musi ugira indwi muze mukoranywe no kuba ikoraniro ryera: ntihaze hagire igikorwa kiruhisha muwukorako.

Numbers30:1 Mose abarira abakuru b’ imiryango y’Abisirayeli
Numbers30:2 umugabo ni yasezeranira Uhoraho isezerano
Numbers30:3 Kand’ umukobga ni yasezeranira Uhoraho isezerano
Numbers30:4 se akumva ivyo asezeranye
Numbers30:5 Ariko se ni yamubuza kur’ uwo musi avyumviyeko
Numbers30:6 Na ho ni yarongorwa akiri mur’ ayo masezerano
Numbers30:7 umugabo wiwe akavyumva
Numbers30:8 Arik’ umugabo wiwe ni yamubuza ku musi avyumviyeko
Numbers30:9 Arikw isezerano ry’umupfakazi
Numbers30:10 Kand’ umugore ni yasezerana isezerano ari mu rugo
Numbers30:11 umugabo wiwe akavyumva
Numbers30:12 Arik’ umugabo wiwe ni yavyanzuza ku musi avyumviyeko
Numbers30:13 Isezerano ryose n’indahiro yose yokwibohesha ngo yibabaze
Numbers30:14 Arik’ umugabo wiwe ni yapfa kwihorera uko bukeye uko bgije
Numbers30:15 Ariko ni yavyanzuza amaze igihe yaravyumvise
Numbers30:16 Ayo ni yo mabgirizwa Uhoraho yabariye Mose
Numbers31:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose
Numbers31:2 ati Subiriza Abamidiyani mu nkōko ku vyo bāgiriye Abisirayeli; hanyuma uzotāmbūra
Numbers31:3 Nuko Mose abarira abantu
Numbers31:4 Mu muryango wose wo mu miryango y’Abisirayeli mukūremw’ ingabo igihumbi‐igihumbi
Numbers31:5 Nuko mu bihumbi vy’Abisirayeli basobanura mu muryango wose igihumbi‐igihumbi
Numbers31:6 Nuko Mose arungika izo ngabo gutera
Numbers31:7 Nuko barwana n’Abamidiyani
Numbers31:8 Kand’ ukūye abandi bishe
Numbers31:9 Abisirayeli bafata mpiri Abamidiyanikazi n’abana babo; banyaga inka zabo zose n’imikuku yabo yose
Numbers31:10 Baturira ibisagara bābamwo vyose
Numbers31:11 Batabarukana isahu yose n’iminyago yose y’ abantu n’ibigenda.
Numbers31:12 Abafashwe mpiri n’iminyago n’amasahu babizanira Mose na Eleyazari umuherezi n’ikoraniro ry’Abisirayeli
Numbers31:13 Mose na Eleyazari umuherezi
Numbers31:14 Maze Mose arakira abagabisha b’ingabo
Numbers31:15 Arababaza
Numbers31:16 Ereg’ abo ni bo bacumuje mwebge Abisirayeli k’Uhoraho ngo mumuhemukire mu vyabaye i Peyori
Numbers31:17 Nuko rero ni mwice umuhungu wese mu bana
Numbers31:18 Arikw abigeme bose batigeze kumenya icitwa umugabo abe ari bo mureka
Numbers31:19 Kandi namwe ubganyu
Numbers31:20 Muhumanure n’imyambaro yose
Numbers31:21 Maze Eleyazari umuherezi abarira izo ngabo zitabarutse
Numbers31:22 kw ibintu vyo mw izahabu n’ivyo mw ifeza n’ivyo mu miringa n’ivyo mu vyuma n’ivyo mw ibāti n’ivyo mw isāsu
Numbers31:23 ibintu vyose birinda umuriro
Numbers31:24 Maze ku musi ugira indwi muze mumesūre impuzu zanyu
Numbers31:25 Uhoraho abarira Mose
Numbers31:26 ati Harūra igitigiri c’iminyago yanyazwe y’abantu n’ibigenda
Numbers31:27 Uheze ugabanye iminyago mu bitigiri bibiri bingana; kimwe gihabge abahizi batabarutse
Numbers31:28 Maze mu gitigiri gihawe abahizi batabarutse
Numbers31:29 ubikūre mu gitigiri cabo
Numbers31:30 Kandi mu gitigiri gihawe ishengero ry’ Abisirayeli musobanure kimwe‐kimwe muri mirongwitanu
Numbers31:31 Nuko Mose na Eleyazari umuherezi babigenza nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose.
Numbers31:32 Kand’ iminyago abo bahizi bari banyaze
Numbers31:33 n’ inka ibihumbi mirongwirindwi na bibiri
Numbers31:34 n’indogoba ibihumbi mirongwitandatu na kimwe
Numbers31:35 n’ abantu ibihumbi mirongwitatu na bibiri vy’abakobga batigeze kumenya icitwa umugabo.
Numbers31:36 Igitigiri c’umugabane abatabarutse bahawe car’ intama ibihumbi amajana atatu na mirongwitatu n’indwi n’ amajana atanu:
Numbers31:37 izo Uhoraho yirogōjemwo zar’ amajana atandatu na mirongwirindwi na zitanu;
Numbers31:38 inka na zo bahawe zar’ ibihumbi mirongwitatu na bitandatu; izo Uhoraho yirogōje muri zo zari mirongwirindwi na zibiri;
Numbers31:39 indogoba na zo bahawe zar’ ibihumbi mirongwitatu n’amajana atanu; izo Uhoraho yirogōje muri zo zari mirongwitandatu n’imwe.
Numbers31:40 Mu bantu banyaze
Numbers31:41 Nuko Mose ashikiriza Eleyazari umuherezi izo ndogōzo
Numbers31:42 Umugabane w’abandi Bisirayeli
Numbers31:43 uwo mugabane w’ishengero war’ intama ibihumbi amajana atatu na mirongwitatu n’indwi n’amajana atanu
Numbers31:44 n’inka ibihumbi mirongwitatu na bitandatu
Numbers31:45 n’indogoba ibihumbi mirongwitatu n’amajana atanu
Numbers31:46 n’abantu ibihumbi cumi na bitandatu.
Numbers31:47 Nuko kur’ uwo mugabane w’Abisirayeli Mose akūra kimwe‐kimwe muri mirongwitanu
Numbers31:48 Maz’ abagabisha b’imitwe y’ingabo
Numbers31:49 baramubarira
Numbers31:50 None tuzaniye Uhoraho ishikanwa ry’ utugenegene tw’izahabu ku vyo twaronse: utwambarwa mu bizigira no ku maboko
Numbers31:51 Nuko Mose na Eleyazari umuherezi babākīrira ayo mazahabu: yose yar’ utugenegene tw’uducurano.
Numbers31:52 Ayo mazahabu yose
Numbers31:53 Kuk’ umuntu wese mur’ izo ngabo yari yisahuriye isahu.
Numbers31:54 Nuko Mose na Eleyazari umuherezi bākīra ayo mazahabu y’abo bagabisha bagaba ibihumbi n’abagaba amajana

Deuteronomy12:2 Ntimuze mubure gusangangura ahantu hose aho ayo mahanga mugiye kwirukana yahora asengera ibigirwamana vyabo
Deuteronomy12:3 Muze musangangure ibicaniro vyabo
Deuteronomy12:4 Ntimuze musenge Uhoraho Imana yanyu ubgo buryo bgabo
Deuteronomy12:5 arikw ahantu Uhoraho Imana yanyu azotoranya mu miryango yanyu yose ngw ahashire izina ryiwe
Deuteronomy12:6 Kand’ az’ abe ari ho mujana ibimazi vyanyu vyo kwoswa n’ibimazi vyanyu bindi
Deuteronomy12:7 az’ abe ari ho murīra imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu
Deuteronomy12:8 Ntimuze mugenze nk’uko twagenza tukir’ ino mur’ iki gihe
Deuteronomy12:9 kuko mutarashika mu buruhukiro no mw ishamvu Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabahaye.
Deuteronomy12:10 Ni mwajabuka Yorodani
Deuteronomy12:11 maz’ ahantu Uhoraho Imana yanyu azotoranya ngw ahashire izina ryiwe ngo rihabe
Deuteronomy12:12 muheze munezererwe imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu
Deuteronomy12:13 Muze mwirinde
Deuteronomy12:14 arikw ahantu Uhoraho azotoranya mw ishamvu y’umwe mu miryango yanyu
Deuteronomy12:15 Mugabo
Deuteronomy12:16 Mugabo ntimuze murye ubuseri: muze muyareke asēseke hasi nk’amazi.
Deuteronomy12:17 Arikw ibigiracumi vyo mu masaka yanyu n’ivya vino zanyu n’ivy’ amavuta yanyu ya elayo
Deuteronomy12:18 Ariko muze mubirīre imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu aho hantu azoba yātoranije
Deuteronomy12:19 Igihe cose muzomara mukiriho mu gihugu canyu muze mwirinde ntimupfe uko mufashe Umulewi.
Deuteronomy12:20 Uhoraho Imana yanyu ni yamara gusunika hirya imbibe zanyu
Deuteronomy12:21 Ahantu Uhoraho Imana yanyu azoba yaratoranije ngw ahashire izina ryiwe
Deuteronomy12:22 Azirye nk’uko barya iz’ ingeregere n’impongo: abazoba bahumanye n’abadahumanye bashobora kuzirya ata tandukaniro.
Deuteronomy12:23 Mugabo
Deuteronomy12:24 Nuk’ ubuseri ntimukaburye: muze muyareke asēseke hasi nk’amazi.
Deuteronomy12:25 Ntimukaburye
Deuteronomy12:26 Mugabo
Deuteronomy12:27 mu bimazi vyo kwoswa
Deuteronomy12:28 Aya majambo yose mbageze muze muyitondere

Deuteronomy12:30 ni baherengetera imbere yanyu

Deuteronomy13:2 ico kimenyamenya cank’ ico gitangaza kigashika

Deuteronomy14:1 Mwebge mur’ abana b’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu: ntimukikebagure ku mibiri yanyu

Deuteronomy14:3 Ntimuze murye ikintu na kimwe kizira.
Deuteronomy14:4 Ibi ni vyo mwemererwa kurya mu bigenda: inka n’intama n’impene
Deuteronomy14:5 n’impongo n’ingeregere n’ifumberi n’impene y’inyeshamba n’inzobe n’imbogo n’intama y’inyeshamba.
Deuteronomy14:6 Mu bigenda
Deuteronomy14:7 Ariko mu vyūza no mu bifise inzāra ziri n’umwanya hagati
Deuteronomy14:8 N’ingurube
Deuteronomy14:9 Ibi ni vyo mwemererwa kurya mu biba mu mazi vyose: ibifise amababa n’ibigaragamba
Deuteronomy14:10 Ibidafise amababa n’ibigaragamba ntimuze mubirye: n’umuziro kuri mwebge.
Deuteronomy14:11 Ibisīga n’inyoni vyose bidahumanya mwemererwa kubirya.
Deuteronomy14:12 Arikw ibi ntimuze mubirye: inkukuma n’itarangabo na oziniya;
Deuteronomy14:13 n’ikinyamwotsi n’inkōna n’ikinyamwanira

Deuteronomy14:16 n’igihuna n’inyanana na tinishemeti;
Deuteronomy14:17 n’inkongori n’ikinyakabaka na shalaki;
Deuteronomy14:18 na sarumfune n’agasōza
Deuteronomy14:19 Kand’ udukōko twose tw’amababa tunyonyera
Deuteronomy14:20 Ibisīga n’inyoni vyose bidahumanya ni vyo mwemererwa kurya.

Deuteronomy15:4 Ariko nta bakene bazoba muri mwebge

Deuteronomy15:8 ariko ntimuze mubure kumuramvurira ukuboko ngo mumugurāne ibimumara ubukene bg’ico akeneye.

Deuteronomy15:21 Ariko ni hagira ikigira agasembga

Deuteronomy34:5 Nuko Mose umusavyi w’ Uhoraho apfira ngaho mu gihugu c’i Mowabu
Deuteronomy34:6 Uhoraho amuhamba mu mwonga wo mu gihugu c’i Mowabu
Deuteronomy34:7 Mose yapfuye amaze imyaka ijana na mirongwibiri; kand’ amaso yiwe ntiyaribgarābe ivyijiji
Deuteronomy34:8 Abisirayeli bamara imisi mirongwitatu baririra Mose
Deuteronomy34:9 Kandi Yosuwa mwene Nuni yari yuzuye impwemu y’ubgenge
Deuteronomy34:10 Kandi mu Bisirayeli ntihigeze kuboncka ūvugishwa n’Imana ahwanye na Mose
Deuteronomy34:11 Nta wogereranywa na we kubg’ ibimenyetso n’ibitangaza vyose Uhoraho yamutumye gukorera mu gihugu ca Egiputa
Deuteronomy34:12 no kubg’ ivy’ ububasha n’ibiteye ubgoba vyose Mose yakoreye imbere y’ Abisirayeli bose.
Joshua1:1 Mose umusavyi w’Uhoraho amaze gupfa
Joshua1:2 ati Mose umusavyi wanje yāpfuye; none rero va hasi
Joshua1:3 Ahantu hose muzokandagiza ibirenge ndahabahaye
Joshua1:4 Uhereye mu bugaragwa no kur’ uriya musozi Lebanoni
Joshua1:5 Nta muntu n’umwe azoshobora kuguhagarara imbere imisi yose uzomara ukiriho: nk’uko nabanye na Mose ni ko nzobana nawe; sinzoguhemukira
Joshua1:6 Shikama
Joshua1:7 Mugabo shikama
Joshua1:8 Ibiri mur’ ico gitabo c’ivyagezwe ntuz’ ubikūre mu kanwa kawe; arik’ uze wame ubirīmbūra ku murango no mw ijoro
Joshua1:9 None si jewe nkwibaririye
Joshua1:10 Maze Yosuwa abarira abagaba abantu
Joshua1:11 ati Ni mugende munyuranganye aho mushagaje
Joshua1:12 Kandi Yosuwa abarira Abareyubeni n’Abagadi n’igice c’umuryango wa Manase
Joshua1:13 ati Ni mwibuke rya jambo Mose umusavyi w’Uhoraho yababariye
Joshua1:14 Nukw abagore banyu n’abana banyu n’amasho yanyu bize bisigare mur’ iki gihugu Mose yabahaye co hakuno ya’Yorodani; ariko mwebge mwese abahizi
Joshua1:15 gushitsa ah’ Uhoraho azoruhurira bagenzi banyu nk’uko namwe yabaruhuye
Joshua1:16 Na bo bishura Yosuwa
Joshua1:17 Nk’uko twahora twumvira Mose muri vyose
Joshua1:18 Umuntu wese azogarariza
Joshua2:1 Bakir’ i Shitimu
Joshua2:2 Baja kubarira umwami w’i Yeriko
Joshua2:3 Uwo mwami atuma kuri Rahabu
Joshua2:4 Arik’ uwo mugore ajana abo bantu bompi
Joshua2:5 nuko hageze mu mūgarira
Joshua2:6 Ariko yari yabūrije hejuru ku nzu
Joshua2:7 Nuko ba bandi baragenda
Joshua2:8 Nuko batararyama
Joshua2:9 arababarira
Joshua2:10 Kuko twumvise ingen’ Uhoraho yakamije Ikiyaga Gitukura imbere yanyu
Joshua2:11 Tuvyumvise
Joshua2:12 Nuko rero ndabinginze
Joshua2:13 yuko muzorokora data na mama
Joshua2:14 Abo bantu baramwishura
Joshua2:15 Araheza abūrurukisha umugozi abacishije mw idirisha
Joshua2:16 Arababarira
Joshua2:17 Abo bantu baramwishura
Joshua2:18 Enda ni twashika mur’ iki gihugu
Joshua2:19 Mugabo
Joshua2:20 Ariko ni watuvuga
Joshua2:21 Arabishura
Joshua2:22 Nuko baragenda barengera imisozi
Joshua2:23 Maz’ abo bantu bompi baragaruka
Joshua2:24 Baramubarira
Joshua3:1 Bukeye Yosuwa arazinduka
Joshua3:2 Hashize imisi itatu
Joshua3:3 babarira abantu
Joshua3:4 kugira ngo mumenye inzira mukwiye kujana
Joshua3:5 Maze Yosuwa abarira abantu
Joshua3:6 Yosuwa araheza abarira abaherezi
Joshua3:7 Maz’ Uhoraho abarira Yosuwa
Joshua3:8 Kand’ ubarire abaherezi bareruye isandugu y’isezerano
Joshua3:9 Yosuwa abarira Abisirayeli
Joshua3:10 Araheza aravuga
Joshua3:11 Ehe rāba
Joshua3:12 Nuko ni murobanure abantu cumi na babiri mu miryango y’Abisirayeli
Joshua3:13 Maz’ abaherezi barerura isandugu y’ Uhoraho Nyen’ isi yose ni bashinga ibirenge mu mazi ya Yorodani
Joshua3:14 Nukw abantu bashīngūra amahema yabo
Joshua3:15 Nukw abo baherezi bareruye iyo sandugu bashika kuri Yorodani
Joshua3:16 amazi ava ruguru aca arīmīrwa
Joshua3:17 Abaherezi bareruye isandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho bahagarara muri Yorodani hūmūtse
Joshua4:1 Iryo hanga ryose rimaze kujabuka Yorodani
Joshua4:2 ati Musobanure ba bagabo cumi na babiri mu bantu
Joshua4:3 mubabarire
Joshua4:4 Nuko Yosuwa ahamagaza ba bagabo ukw ar’ icumi na babiri yarobanuye mu Bisirayeli
Joshua4:5 arababarira
Joshua4:6 kugira ngw az’ abe ikimenyamenya muri mwebge. Hanyuma mu bihe bizoza
Joshua4:7 muze mubishure
Joshua4:8 Nukw abo bagabo b’Abisirayeli bakora nk’uko Yosuwa yababariye
Joshua4:9 Yosuwa na we ashinga amabuye cumi n’abiri nyene muri Yorodani
Joshua4:10 Kukw abo baherezi bareruye iyo sandugu bari bahagaze muri Yorodani
Joshua4:11 Maz’ abantu bose bamaze kujabuka
Joshua4:12 Kand’ Abareyubeni n’Abagadi n’igihimba c’umuryango wa Manase ni bo bagiye imbere y’ abandi Bisirayeli mu kujabuka
Joshua4:13 Ingabo zabo zari nk’ibihumbi mirongwine
Joshua4:14 Kur’ uwo musi Uhoraho akuza Yosuwa imbere y’Abisirayeli bose
Joshua4:15 Uhoraho abarira Yosuwa
Joshua4:16 ati Barira abaherezi bareruye isandugu y’Ibishinga intahe bave muri Yorodani.
Joshua4:17 Nuko Yosuwa abarira abaherezi
Joshua4:18 Maz’ abaherezi bareruye iyo sandugu y’ isezerano ry’Uhoraho bavuye muri Yorodani
Joshua4:19 Abantu bādūze bava muri Yorodani ku musi w’icumi w’ ukwezi kwa mbere
Joshua4:20 Ya mabuye cumi n’abiri bakūye muri Yorodani Yosuwa ayashinga i Gilugali.
Joshua4:21 Maz’ abarira Abisirayeli
Joshua4:22 muze mubabarire
Joshua4:23 Ati Kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu yakamije amazi yarwo imbere yanyu
Joshua4:24 kugira ngw amahanga yose yo mw isi amenye yuk’ ukuboko kw’Uhoraho gukomeye
Joshua5:1 Maz’ abami bose b’Abamori bāba hakuno ya Yorodani mu ruhande rw’i burengerazuba
Joshua5:2 Ico gihe Uhoraho abarira Yosuwa
Joshua5:3 Yosuwa asatuza amabuye akarishe bga mbugita
Joshua5:4 Inyanduruko Yosuwa abakebesha n’iyi: n’ukw abagabo bose b’abahizi bari bavuye muri Egiputa bari baraguye mu nzira
Joshua5:5 kukw abantu bose bavuyeyo bari barakebge
Joshua5:6 kukw Abisirayeli bari bamaze imyaka mirongwine bagendagenda mu bugaragwa
Joshua5:7 Abana babo
Joshua5:8 Nukw abantu bose bamaze kubakeba baguma ngaho nyene aho bari bashagaje
Joshua5:9 Uhoraho abarira Yosuwa
Joshua5:10 Nukw Abisirayeli bagishagaje i Gilugali barya ivya Pasika ku musi ugira icumi na kane w’ukwo kwezi
Joshua5:11 Bukeye
Joshua5:12 Maz’ uwo musi nyene bariye ku vyeze mur’ ico gihugu

Joshua5:14 Aramwishura

Joshua6:1 Kand’ i Yeriko bari biyugaranye bahadadiye kubgo gutinya Abisirayeli; nta warenga irembo
Joshua6:2 Uhoraho abarira Yosuwa
Joshua6:3 Muze muzenguke ico gisagara
Joshua6:4 Kand’ abaherezi ndwi baze bajane inzamba ndwi z’amahembe y’impfizi z’intama
Joshua6:5 Maz’ ayo mahembe y’impfizi z’intama ni bayavuza ijwi rirandiriye
Joshua6:6 Nuko Yosuwa mwene Nuni ahamagaza abaherezi
Joshua6:7 Maz’ abarira abantu
Joshua6:8 Nuko Yosuwa amaze kubarira abantu
Joshua6:9 Abītwaje ibirwanishwa baja imbere ya ba baherezi bagenda baravuza inzamba
Joshua6:10 Ariko Yosuwa abarira abantu
Joshua6:11 Nukw atuma iyo sandugu y’Uhoraho izenguka ico gisagara
Joshua6:12 Bukeye Yosuwa azinduka mu gatondo kare
Joshua6:13 Maze ba baherezi ndwi batwaye za nzamba ndwi
Joshua6:14 Kur’ uwo musi ugira kabiri bazenguka ico gisagara rimwe nyene
Joshua6:15 Maze ku musi ugira indwi
Joshua6:16 Maze ku muzenguko ugira indwi
Joshua6:17 Ati Kand’ igisagara n’ibiri muri co vyose bicitse inyegu y’Uhoraho; mugabo Rahabu
Joshua6:18 Ariko mwebge muzire akaziri ntimugire ico mukorako mu vyabaye inyegu y’ Uhoraho; kuko ni mwavyifuza
Joshua6:19 Arikw amafeza yose n’amazahabu n’ibintu vyose vyo mu miringa n’ivyo mu vyuma bibaye ivyera vy’Uhoraho: bizoja mu bushinguro bgiwe.
Joshua6:20 Nuko za nzamba zivuze
Joshua6:21 Bageseza ivyari mur’ ico gisagara vyose
Joshua6:22 Maze Yosuwa abarira ba bantu babiri bāja gutata igihugu
Joshua6:23 Nukw iyo misore yagiye gutata igihugu irinjira
Joshua6:24 Igisagara bagitōngōza umuriro
Joshua6:25 Nuko Yosuwa arokora Rahabu umwe maraya
Joshua6:26 Ico gihe Yosuwa aca amahani abantu
Joshua6:27 Nuk’ Uhoraho yabana na Yosuwa; aba rurangiranwa mur’ ico gihugu cose.
Joshua7:1 Arikw Abisirayeli bacumura mu vyagizwe inyegu y’Uhoraho; Akani mwene Karami
Joshua7:2 Yosuwa atuma abantu bava i Yeriko ngo baje i Hayi; hari hafi y’i Betaveni
Joshua7:3 Bagaruka aho Yosuwa ari
Joshua7:4 Nuko mu bantu havamwo nk’ibihumbi bitatu
Joshua7:5 Ab’i Hayi babīcamw’ abantu nka mirongwitatu na batandatu
Joshua7:6 Yosuwa na we yitantamurirakw impuzu ziwe
Joshua7:7 Yosuwa aravuga
Joshua7:8 None ga Mwami
Joshua7:9 Kukw Abanyakanani n’abari mu gihugu bose bazovyumva
Joshua7:10 Maz’ Uhoraho abarira Yosuwa
Joshua7:11 Ereg’ Abisirayeli bacumuye
Joshua7:12 Ico ni co gitumye Abisirayeli badashobora guhagarara imbere y’abansi babo
Joshua7:13 Va hasi
Joshua7:14 Nuko mu gitondo muze mukorane
Joshua7:15 Maz’ ūzofatanwa ivyagizwe inyegu yanje azoturiranwa n’ivyiwe vyose
Joshua7:16 Nuko Yosuwa azinduka kare mu gatondo
Joshua7:17 Ahamagaza amazu ya ba Yuda
Joshua7:18 Ahamagaza abo mu rugo rwiwe
Joshua7:19 Maze Yosuwa abarira Akani
Joshua7:20 Akani yishura Yosuwa
Joshua7:21 nabonye mw isahu umwambaro mwiza uvuye i Shinari
Joshua7:22 Maze Yosuwa atuma abantu
Joshua7:23 Babikūrayo
Joshua7:24 Nuko Yosuwa n’Abisirayeli bose bafata Akani wo mu ba Zerahi
Joshua7:25 Maze Yosuwa aravuga
Joshua7:26 Baraheza bamurundakw ikirundo kinini c’ amabuye: kiracariho na bugingo n’ubu. Maz’ Uhoraho arigarura
Joshua8:1 Uhoraho abarira Yosuwa
Joshua8:2 Kand’ uz’ ugire Hayi n’umwami waho nk’uko wagiriye Yeriko n’umwami waho; mugabo ivyo muzosahura vyose n’inka zaho
Joshua8:3 Nuko Yosuwa arahaguruka
Joshua8:4 Arababarira
Joshua8:5 Nanje n’ abantu turi kumwe bose tuzokwēgereza igisagara: maze ni badushwabadukira nk’ubga mbere
Joshua8:6 na bo bazoca badukurikira
Joshua8:7 Maze namwe muze muheze muvyuke aho mubunze mu gico
Joshua8:8 Maze ni mwamara kukivyagira
Joshua8:9 Nuko Yosuwa arabarungika; baja aho baja kubunda
Joshua8:10 Yosuwa ahenga kare mu gatondo akoranya ingabo
Joshua8:11 Izo ngabo zose zari kumwe na we ziradūga
Joshua8:12 Maz’ atoranya abantu nk’ibihumbi bitanu
Joshua8:13 Uko ni ko bāciye abantu intēko: itsitsi ry’ingabo risigara i burārūko bg’ico gisagara
Joshua8:14 Maz’ umwami w’i Hayi abibonye
Joshua8:15 Yosuwa n’Abisirayeli bose bīgira nk’abaneshejwe imbere yabo
Joshua8:16 Uko ni kw abo mur’ ico gisagara bose bāciye bīvuta ngo babakōndōrere inyuma; kandi bakiriko barakōndōrera inyuma ya Yosuwa
Joshua8:17 Ntihasigara umugabo n’umwe i Hayi cank’ i Beteli
Joshua8:18 Maz’ Uhoraho abarira Yosuwa
Joshua8:19 Agitunga ukuboko
Joshua8:20 Ab’ i Hayi bagize ngo barasubiza amaso inyuma
Joshua8:21 Nuko Yosuwa n’Abisirayeli bose babonye kw abāri bīcīye igico bavyagiye ico gisagara
Joshua8:22 Ba bandi na bo bava mu gisagara
Joshua8:23 Umwami w’i Hayi bamufata mpiri
Joshua8:24 Maz’ Abisirayeli bahejeje kwicira ab’ i Hayi mu gahinga no mu bugaragwa aho bāri babirukaniye
Joshua8:25 Nukw abantu b’i Hayi iyo bava bakagera
Joshua8:26 Kandi Yosuwa ntiyagarura ukuboko yari yatungishije icumu
Joshua8:27 Mugabo
Joshua8:28 Uko ni ko Yosuwa yaturiye Hayi
Joshua8:29 Na we umwami w’i Hayi amumanika ku giti gushitsa ku mugoroba; maze ku kirengazuba Yosuwa abarira abamanura umuvyimba wiwe ku giti
Joshua8:30 Maze Yosuwa yubakira Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli igicaniro ku musozi Ebalu
Joshua8:31 nk’uko Mose umusavyi w’Uhoraho yabariye Abisirayeli
Joshua8:32 Maze yandikira imbere y’Abisirayeli ivyagezwe vya Mose ku mabuye
Joshua8:33 Abisirayeli bose n’abakuru babo n’abashingantahe n’abacamanza bahagarara imbere y’Abalewi barerura isandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho
Joshua8:34 Hanyuma asoma amajambo yose y’ivyagezwe
Joshua8:35 Nta jambo na rimwe mu yo Mose yageze yose

Joshua10:12 Ku musi Uhoraho yagabuye Abamori mu maboko y’Abisirayeli

Joshua10:14 Kand’ uwo musi nta wigeze guhwana na wo
Joshua10:15 Hanyuma Yosuwa atabarukana n’Abisirayeli bose
Joshua10:16 Abo bami ukw ari batanu barahunga
Joshua10:17 Maze Yosuwa abarirwa inkuru yuko ba bami ukw ari batanu bababonye aho banyegeye
Joshua10:18 Nuko Yosuwa arababarira
Joshua10:19 At’ Ariko mwebge ntimuhatebe: mukurikire abansi banyu

Joshua10:23 Bagira nk’uko babariwe

Joshua10:27 Maze ku kirengazuba

Joshua10:29 Hanyuma Yosuwa ava i Makeda
Joshua10:30 Uhoraho agabura ico gisagara na co mu maboko y’Abisirayeli
Joshua10:31 Hanyuma Yosuwa ava i Libuna
Joshua10:32 maz’ Uhoraho ahagabura mu maboko y’Abisirayeli
Joshua10:33 Maze Horamu umwami w’i Gezeri adūga gutabara i Lakishi: Yosuwa amwicana n’ingabo ziwe

Joshua10:39 ahaneshanya n’umwami waho

Joshua11:1 Yabina umwami w’i Hasori avyumvise
Joshua11:2 atuma no ku bami bo mu mugamba w’i burārūko
Joshua11:3 atuma no ku Banyakanani b’i burasirazuba n’ab’i burengerazuba
Joshua11:4 Nuko bazanana n’ingabo zabo zose; bāri benshi nk’umusenyi wo kw isēsero ry’ikiyaga
Joshua11:5 Abo bami bose bakoranira hamwe
Joshua11:6 Maz’ Uhoraho abarira Yosuwa
Joshua11:7 Nuko Yosuwa azanana n’ingabo ziwe zose
Joshua11:8 Uhoraho abagabura mu maboko y’Abisirayeli
Joshua11:9 Yosuwa abagirira nk’uk’ Uhoraho yamubariye; amafarasi yabo ayacagagura ibitsi
Joshua11:10 Maz’ ico gihe Yosuwa arakebanuka
Joshua11:11 Batōngōza inkota abari muri co bose
Joshua11:12 Yosuwa atsinda ibisagara vyose vy’abo bami
Joshua11:13 Arikw ibisagara vyubatswe ku dusozi tunungaraye
Joshua11:14 Iminyago yose y’ivyo bisagara
Joshua11:15 Nk’ uk’ Uhoraho yageze Mose umusavyi wiwe
Joshua11:16 Uko ni ko Yosuwa yanesheje ico gihugu cose: umugamba waho
Joshua11:17 uhereye ku musozi Halaki
Joshua11:18 Mbere Yosuwa yamaze igihe kirekire arwana n’abo bami bose.
Joshua11:19 Nta gisagara na kimwe cigeze kwisaba Abisirayeli
Joshua11:20 Kukw ivyo vyari bivuye k’Uhoraho
Joshua11:21 Ico gihe Yosuwa aragenda
Joshua11:22 Ntihagira n’umwe wo mu Banaki asigara mu gihugu c’Abisirayeli
Joshua11:23 Uko ni ko Yosuwa yanesheje ico gihugu cose
Joshua12:1 Aba ni bo bami b’ibihugu Abisirayeli bānesheje
Joshua12:2 Sihoni umwami w’Abamori
Joshua12:3 bo n’ikiyaya Araba
Joshua12:4 Kandi banesha n’igihugu ca Ogi
Joshua12:5 yatwara uhereye ku musozi Herumoni n’i Saleka n’i Bashani hose
Joshua12:6 Abo ni bo Mose umusavyi w’Uhoraho
Joshua12:7 Kand’ aba ni bo bār’ abami b’ ibihugu vyo hakuno ya Yorodani i burengerazuba
Joshua12:8 igihugu c’ umugamba n’igiciye bugufi
Joshua12:9 Abo bami n’aba: umwe n’umwami w’i Yeriko
