Joshua12:11 n’uw’i Yaramuti
Joshua12:12 n’uw’i Eguloni
Joshua12:13 n’uw’i Debira
Joshua12:14 n’uw’i Horuma
Joshua12:15 n’uw’i Libuna
Joshua12:16 n’uw’i Makeda
Joshua12:17 n’uw’i Tapuwa
Joshua12:18 n’uw’ i Afeka
Joshua12:19 n’ uw’i Madoni
Joshua12:20 n’uw’i Shimuroni‐meroni
Joshua12:21 n’uw’i Tanaki
Joshua12:22 n’uw’i Kedeshi
Joshua12:23 n’uw’i Dori yātwara mu mugamba w’i Dori nyene
Joshua12:24 n’uw’i Tirusa. Bose na bose abo bami bari mirongwitatu n’umwe.
Joshua13:1 Kandi Yosuwa yar’ ashaje
Joshua13:2 Ibi ni vyo bihugu bisigaye: igihugu cose c’Abafilisitiya
Joshua13:3 uhēreye ku ruzi Shihori rurābana na Egiputa
Joshua13:4 ahahera i bumanuko; bo n’igihugu cose c’ Abanyakanani
Joshua13:5 bo n’igihugu c’Abagebali
Joshua13:6 ababa mu mugamba bose
Joshua13:7 None rer’ ivyo bihugu ubigabanganye imiryango cenda
Joshua13:8 Ikindi gihimba c’Abamanase
Joshua13:9 uhereye kuri Aroweri ho ku mucāmo hejuru y’umwonga wo kuri Arunoni
Joshua13:10 n’ibisagara vyose vya Sihoni umwami w’Abamori yatwara i Heshiboni
Joshua13:11 n’i Gileyadi
Joshua13:12 n’igihugu cose ca Ogi umwami w’i Bashani
Joshua13:13 Yamar’ Abisirayeli bo ntibirukanye Abageshuri cank’ Abanyamayaka; arikw Abageshuri n’Abanyamayaka baciye babana n’Abisirayeli kugeza na bugingo n’ubu.
Joshua13:14 Arik’ umuryango w’Abalewi wo nta shamvu Mose yabahaye; ibimazi vyashikaniwe Uhoraho Imana y’ Abisirayeli bigatōngōrwa n’umuriro
Joshua13:15 Mose ni we yahaye umuryango w’Abareyubeni ishamvu
Joshua13:16 Igihugu cabo cāhēra kuri Aroweri ho ku mucāmo hejuru y’umwonga wo kuri Arunoni
Joshua13:17 n’i Heshiboni n’ibisagara vyose vyo mu kiyaya bihakūkira
Joshua13:18 n’i Yahasi n’i Kedemoti n’i Mefayati
Joshua13:19 n’i Kiriyatayimu n’i Sibuma
Joshua13:20 n’i Beti‐peyori
Joshua13:21 n’ibisagara vyose vyo mu kiyaya
Joshua13:22 Kandi na Balamu mwene Beyori w’umumenyi
Joshua13:23 Igihugu c’Abareyubeni cāgarukira kuri Yorodani: ni rwo rwar’ urubibe rwabo. Iyo ni yo shamvu y’Abareyubeni
Joshua13:24 Kandi Mose yahaye umuryango w’Abagadi ishamvu
Joshua13:25 Igihugu cabo cāhēra i Yazeri
Joshua13:26 no guhēra i Heshiboni ugashitsa i Ramati‐Misipa n’i Betonimu
Joshua13:27 bo n’ibisagara vyo mu kiyaya
Joshua13:28 Iyo ni yo shamvu y’Abagadi
Joshua13:29 Kandi Mose yahaye ishamvu igihimba c’umuryango wa Manase: haba umugabane wabo
Joshua13:30 Igihugu cabo cāhēra i Mahanayimu
Joshua13:31 n’igihimba c’i Gileyadi
Joshua13:32 Ayo ni yo mashamvu Mose yagabuye ari mu kiyaya c’i Mowabu
Joshua13:33 Arik’ umuryango wa Lewi wo
Joshua14:1 Aya ni yo mashamvu Abisirayeli bāhawe mu gihugu c’i Kanani
Joshua14:2 Imiryango cenda n’igihimba
Joshua14:3 kuko Mose ubgiwe ari we yari yagaburiye iyindi miryango ibiri n’igihimba amashamvu hakurya ya Yorodani; arikw Abalewi bo ntiyabahaye ishamvu mu bandi.
Joshua14:4 Kuko bene Yosefu babayemw’ imiryango ibiri: uw’Abamanase n’uw’Abefurayimu; nta mugabane Abalewi bāhawe
Joshua14:5 Nk’ uk’ Uhoraho yari yarabariye Mose
Joshua14:6 Maz’ Abayuda baza kuri Yosuwa i Gilugali; Kalebu mwene Yefune Umukenizi aramubarira
Joshua14:7 Nari mmaze imyaka mirongwine
Joshua14:8 ariko bagenzi banje twari twadūganye bakarandura abantu imitima: mugabo jeho nakurikiye Uhoraho Imana yanje muri vyose.
Joshua14:9 Maz’ uwo musi nyene Mose arandahira
Joshua14:10 Kalebu arongera aravuga
Joshua14:11 Kandi n’uyu musi ndacafise inkomezi
Joshua14:12 None rero n’umpe uriya musozi Uhoraho yavuze wa musi. Ico gihe wumvise kw ar’ah’ Abanaki
Joshua14:13 Maze Yosuwa ahezagira Kalebu mwene Yefune
Joshua14:14 Nuko Heburoni hacika ishamvu ya Kalebu mwene Yefune Umukenizi na bugingo n’ubu
Joshua14:15 Kand’ i Heburoni kera hitwa Igisagara ca Araba: Araba uwo yasumba abandi Banaki bose. Nukw igihugu gihabga impore.
Joshua15:1 Ishamvu umuryango w’Abayuda waheshejwe n’ubupfindo
Joshua15:2 Urubibe rwabo rw’i bumanuko rwāhēra ah’ Ikiyaga c’Umunyu gitaye ikirimi aharāba i bumanuko;
Joshua15:3 rugaca hirya y’umudūgo w’i Akurabimu ahahera i bumanuko nyene
Joshua15:4 rugaca ahitwa Asimoni
Joshua15:5 Urubibe rw’i burasirazuba rwar’ Ikiyaga c’Umunyu gushitsa aho Yorodani rushikira muri co. Urubibe rw’i burārūko rwāhēra ah’ ico kiyaga gitaye ikirimi
Joshua15:6 urwo rubibe rwādūga i Beti‐hogula
Joshua15:7 rugakomeza rukadūga i Debira ruvuye mu Kiyaya Akori
Joshua15:8 rugaheza rukadūga rukajana umwonga wa mwene Hinomu gushitsa ku mucāmo w’ umusozi w’Abayebusi ahahera i bumanuko
Joshua15:9 Nuk’ urwo rubibe rukamanuka ku mpinga y’uwo musozi gushitsa kw iriba ry’i Nefutowa
Joshua15:10 rugaheza rugakevya
Joshua15:11 rugakomeza rugashika ku mucāmo wa Ekuroni ahahera i burārūko; rugakevya
Joshua15:12 Urubibe rw’i burasirazuba rwar’ ikiyaga kinini
Joshua15:13 Nuko Kalebu mwene Yefune Yosuwa amuha ishamvu mu muryango wa Yuda
Joshua15:14 Maze Kalebu ahīrukana bene Anaki batatu
Joshua15:15 Nukw avayo
Joshua15:16 Kalebu aravuga
Joshua15:17 Otiniyeli mwene Kenazi
Joshua15:18 Maz’ agishika i w’umugabo wiwe
Joshua15:19 Aramwishura
Joshua15:20 Iyi ni yo shamvu y’umuryango w’Abayuda
Joshua15:21 ibisagara vy’umuryango w’Abayuda birābana n’urubibe rw’ Abanyedomu i bumanuko vyari Kabuseri na Ederi na Yagura
Joshua15:22 na Kina na Dimona na Adada
Joshua15:23 na Kedeshi na Hasori na Itunani
Joshua15:24 na Zifu na Teremu na Beyaloti
Joshua15:25 na Hasori‐hadata na Keriyoti‐hezeroni (ari ho Hasori)
Joshua15:26 na Amamu na Shema na Molada
Joshua15:27 na Hasari‐gada na Heshimoni na Beti‐peleti
Joshua15:28 na Hasari‐shuwali na Beri‐sheba na Biziyotiya
Joshua15:29 na Bala na Yimu na Esemu
Joshua15:30 na Elitoladi na Kesili na Horuma
Joshua15:31 na Sikulagi na Medumani na Sanusana
Joshua15:32 na Lebayoti na Shiluhimu na Ayini na Rimona; ibisagara vyose na vyose vyari mirongwibiri n’icenda
Joshua15:33 Ibisagara vyo mu kiyaya vyar’ ibi: Eshitayoli na Sora na Ashina
Joshua15:34 na Sanowa na Eni‐ganimu
Joshua15:35 na Yaramuti na Aduwamu na Sokoho na Azeka
Joshua15:36 na Sharayimu na Aditayimu na Gedera na Gederotayimu; vyose na vyose vyar’ icumi na bine
Joshua15:37 Hāri na Senani na Hadasha na Migudali‐gadi
Joshua15:38 na Dilani na Misipe na Yokiteli
Joshua15:39 na Lakishi na Bosikati na Eguloni
Joshua15:40 na Kaboni na Lahimamu na Kitilishi
Joshua15:41 na Gederoti na Beti‐dagoni na Nayama na Makeda; vyose na vyose n’ icumi na bitandatu
Joshua15:42 Hāri na Libuna na Eteri na Ashanu
Joshua15:43 na Ifuta na Ashuna na Nesibu
Joshua15:44 na Keyila na Akizibu na Maresha; vyose na vyose vyar’ ibisagara cenda
Joshua15:45 Hāri na Ekuroni bo n’udusagara n’imihana bihakūkira
Joshua15:46 uhereye Ekuroni nyene ugashitsa ku kiyaga
Joshua15:47 Hāri na Ashidodi nyene
Joshua15:48 Ibisagara vyo mu mugamba vyār’ ibi: Shamira na Yatira na Sokoho
Joshua15:49 na Dana na Kiriyati‐sana
Joshua15:50 na Anaba na Eshitemo na Animu
Joshua15:51 na Gosheni na Holoni na Gilo; vyar’ ibisagara cumi na kimwe bifise imihana ibikūkira.
Joshua15:52 Hāri na Araba na Duma na Eshana
Joshua15:53 na Yanimu na Beti‐tapuwa na Afeka
Joshua15:54 na Humata na Kiriyati‐Araba (ari ho Heburoni) na Siyori; vyar’ ibisagara cenda bifise imihana ibikūkira.
Joshua15:55 Hāri na Mayoni na Karumeli na Zifu na Yuta
Joshua15:56 na Yezireli na Yokodeyamu na Sanowa
Joshua15:57 na Kayini na Gibeya na Timuna; vyar’ ibisagara cumi bifise imihana ibikūkira.
Joshua15:58 Hāri na Halihuli na Beti‐suri na Gedora
Joshua15:59 na Mara na Beti‐anoti na Elitekoni; vyar’ ibisagara bitandatu bifise imihana ibikūkira.
Joshua15:60 Hāri na Kiriyati‐bayali (ari ho Kiriyati‐yeyarimu) na Raba: ibisagara bibiri bifise imihana ibikūkira.
Joshua15:61 Ibisagara vyo mu bugaragwa vyar’ ibi: Beti‐araba na Midina na Sekaka
Joshua15:62 na Nibushani n’Igisagara c’Umunyu na Eni‐gedi; vyar’ ibisagara bitandatu bifise imihana ibikūkira.
Joshua15:63 Arikw Abayebusi bo
Joshua16:1 Ishamvu aba Yosefu baheshejwe n’ubupfindo yahēra kuri Yorodani aharābana n’i Yeriko
Joshua16:2 rukava i Beteli rugashika i Luzi
Joshua16:3 rukamanuka rwerekeye i burengerazuba
Joshua16:4 Aho ni ho aba Yosefu bāronse ishamvu
Joshua16:5 Urubibe rw’Abefurayimu
Joshua16:6 ku ruhande rw’i burengerazuba rwagarukira i Mikimetati ahahera i burārūko; rugaheza rugakebereza ahahera i burasirazuba
Joshua16:7 ruvuye i Yanowa rukamanuka rugaca i Ataroti n’i Nara
Joshua16:8 Kuva i Tapuwa
Joshua16:9 hamwe n’ibisagara bāsobanuriwe mw ishamvu y’Abamanase
Joshua16:10 Mugabo ntibirukanye Abanyakanani bāba i Gezeri
Joshua17:1 Maz’ ubupfindo bgerekana ishamvu y’umuryango wa Manase
Joshua17:2 Ubupfindo bgerekana n’amashamvu ya bene Manase bandi
Joshua17:3 Ariko Selofehadi mwene Heferi
Joshua17:4 Baza kuri Eleyazari umuherezi na Yosuwa mwene Nuni n’abakuru
Joshua17:5 Nuk’ umuryango wa Manase wahawe imigabane cumi
Joshua17:6 kukw abuzukuruza ba Manase b’abakobga bāhānye amashamvu n’abandi bo mu biwe; kand’ igihugu c’i Gileyadi kiba ic’ abandi bo mu ba Manase nyene.
Joshua17:7 Nuk’ urubibe rw’Abamanase rwāhēra ahitwa Asheri
Joshua17:8 Intāra y’i Tapuwa yar’ iy’ Abamanase
Joshua17:9 Urwo rubibe rugaheza rukamanuka
Joshua17:10 i bumanuko bgawo hār’ ah’ Abefurayimu
Joshua17:11 Kand’ Abamanase ibisagara bāhāwe mu bg’Abisakari no mu bg’Abasheri ni vy’ ibi: Beti‐sheyani na Ibuleyamu n’ababa i Dori n’ababa i Endori
Joshua17:12 Mugabo
Joshua17:13 Maz’ Abisirayeli bamaze guhama
Joshua17:14 Ab’ umuryango wa Yosefu babaza Yosuwa
Joshua17:15 Nuko Yosuwa arabishura
Joshua17:16 Aba Yosefu baravuga
Joshua17:17 Yosuwa yishura ab’ umuryango wa Yosefu
Joshua17:18 Arikw igihugu c’umugamba kizoba icanyu
Joshua18:1 Maz’ ikoraniro ryose ry’Abisirayeli bakoranira i Shilo
Joshua18:2 Kandi mu Bisirayeli hari hagisigaye imiryango ndwi itarahabga amashamvu yayo.
Joshua18:3 Maze Yosuwa abaza Abisirayeli
Joshua18:4 Enda ni mwitoranirize abantu batatu‐batatu mu muryango wose; nanje ndabatume banyuranganye igihugu
Joshua18:5 Baze bakigaburemw’ imigabane ndwi; Abayuda bazoguma mu mugabane wabo i bumanuko
Joshua18:6 Kand’ ati Muze mwandike ico gihugu mu migabane ndwi; maz’ ivyo mwanditse mubinzanire hano
Joshua18:7 Mugabo
Joshua18:8 Nukw abo bantu bīkoze ngo bagende kwandika ico gihugu uko gisa
Joshua18:9 Nukw abo bantu baragenda
Joshua18:10 Nuko Yosuwa abapfindira ubupfindo imbere y’Uhoraho i Shilo; agabanganya Abisirayeli ico gihugu
Joshua18:11 Bapfindiye ubupfindo Ababenyamini
Joshua18:12 Urubibe rwabo rw’i burārūko rwāhēra kuri Yorodani
Joshua18:13 Ruvuye aho rukagenda rugashika i Luzi
Joshua18:14 Urwo rubibe rugaheza rugakevya
Joshua18:15 Urubibe rw’i bumanuko rwāhēra kw iherezo ry’i Kiriyati‐yeyarimu
Joshua18:16 Urwo rubibe rugaheza rukamanuka ku mucāmo w’umusozi uhanamiye umwonga wa mwene Hinomu
Joshua18:17 rugaheza rugakevya
Joshua18:18 rugakomeza rukagenda rubangikanye n’ ikiyaya Araba ahahera i burārūko
Joshua18:19 rugakomeza rugashika ku mucāmo w’i Beti‐hogula ahahera i burārūko
Joshua18:20 Kandi Yorodani ni rwo rwar’ urubibe rwaho rw’i burasirazuba. Iyo ni yo shamvu y’Ababenyamini
Joshua18:21 Kand’ ibisagara vy’umuryango w’Ababenyamini
Joshua18:22 na Beti‐araba na Semarayimu na Beteli
Joshua18:23 na Avimu na Para na Ofura
Joshua18:24 na Kefaramoni na Ofuni na Geba: ivyo bisagara vyose na vyose vyar’ icumi na bibiri
Joshua18:25 hāri na Gibeyoni na Rama na Beroti
Joshua18:26 na Misipe na Kefira na Mosa
Joshua18:27 na Rekemu na Irupeli na Tarala
Joshua18:28 na Sela na Elefu na Yebusi (ari ho Yerusalemu) na Gibeyati na Kiriyati: ivyo bisagara vyose na vyose vyar’ icumi na bine
Joshua19:1 Ubupfindo bga kabiri bushika ku ba Simeyoni
Joshua19:2 Ishamvu yabo bahawe yari Beri‐sheba na Sheba na Molada
Joshua19:3 na Hasari‐shuwali na Bala na Esemu
Joshua19:4 na Elitoladi na Betula na Horuma
Joshua19:5 na Sikulagi na Beti‐marakaboti na Hasari‐susa
Joshua19:6 na Beti‐lebayoti na Sharuheni: ivyo bisagara vyose na vyose vyar’ icumi na bitatu
Joshua19:7 hāri na Ayini na Rimona na Eteri na Ashani: ivyo na vyo vyari bine
Joshua19:8 bāhawe n’imihana yose ikikije ivyo bisagara
Joshua19:9 iyo shamvu y’Abasimeyoni yakūwe ku mugabane w’Abayuda
Joshua19:10 Ubupfindo bga gatatu bushika ku Bazebuloni
Joshua19:11 urubibe rwabo rwādūga rwerekeye i burengerazuba
Joshua19:12 kandi kuva i Sarida nyene
Joshua19:13 ruvudutse aho
Joshua19:14 ruvuye aho
Joshua19:15 Batwara na Katati na Nahalali na Shimuroni na Idala na Betelehemu: ibisagara vyose na vyose vyar’ icumi na bibiri
Joshua19:16 Iyo ni yo shamvu y’Abazebuloni
Joshua19:17 Ubupfindo bga kane bushika ku Bisakari
Joshua19:18 Urubibe rwabo rwaca i Yezireli n’i Kesuloti n’i Shunemu
Joshua19:19 n’i Hafarayimu n’i Shiyoni n’i Anaharati
Joshua19:20 n’i Rabiti n’i Kishiyoni n’i Ebeza
Joshua19:21 n’i Remeti n’i Eni‐ganimu n’i Eni‐hada n’i Beti‐pazezi;
Joshua19:22 kand’ urwo rubibe rwaca n’i Tabora n’i Shahazuma n’i Beti‐shemeshi
Joshua19:23 Iyo ni yo shamvu y’ umuryango w’Abisakari
Joshua19:24 Ubupfindo bga gatanu bushika ku muryango w’Abasheri
Joshua19:25 Urubibe rwabo rwaca i Helikati n’i Hali n’i Beteni n’i Akishafu
Joshua19:26 n’i Alameleki n’i Amadi n’i Mishali
Joshua19:27 rugaheza rugakebereza i burasirazuba
Joshua19:28 n’i Eburoni n’i Rehoba n’i Hamoni n’i Kana
Joshua19:29 maz’ urwo rubibe rugakevya rugaca i Rama
Joshua19:30 na Uma na Afeka na Rehobu: ibisagara vyose na vyose vyari mirongwibiri na bibiri
Joshua19:31 Iyo ni yo shamvu y’umuryango w’Abasheri
Joshua19:32 Ubupfindo bga gatandatu bushika ku Banafutali
Joshua19:33 Urubibe rwabo rwāhēra i Helefu
Joshua19:34 urwo rubibe rugakebereza i burengerazuba rugashika i Azinoti‐tabora
Joshua19:35 Ibisagara bātwaye vyubakiwe inzitiro z’amabuye vyar’ ibi: Sidimu na Sera na Hamati na Rakati na Kinereti
Joshua19:36 na Adama na Rama na Hasori
Joshua19:37 na Kedeshi na Edireyi na Eni‐hasori
Joshua19:38 na Ironi na Migudali‐eli na Horemu na Beti‐anati na Beti‐shemeshi; ivyo bisagara vyose na vyose vyar’ icumi n’icenda
Joshua19:39 Iyo ni yo shamvu y’ umuryango w’Abanafutali
Joshua19:40 Ubupfindo bugira indwi bushika ku muryango w’Abadani nk’ukw amazu yabo ari.
Joshua19:41 Urubibe rw’ishamvu yabo rwaca i Sora n’i Eshitayoli n’i Irishemeshi
Joshua19:42 n’i Shalabina n’i Ayaloni n’i Itula
Joshua19:43 n’i Eloni n’i Timuna n’i Ekuroni
Joshua19:44 n’i Eliteke n’i Gibetoni n’i Balati
Joshua19:45 n’i Yehudi n’i Beneberake n’i Gati‐rimoni
Joshua19:46 n’i Meyarakoni n’i Rakoni no mu ntāra irābana n’i Yopa.
Joshua19:47 Maz’ igihugu c’Abadani kibāgiye
Joshua19:48 Iyo ni yo shamvu y’ umuryango w’Abadani
Joshua19:49 Bahejeje kugabanganya igihugu mw amashamvu nk’ukw imbibe zayo ziri
Joshua19:50 bamuha igisagara yasavye citwa i Timunati‐sera
Joshua19:51 Ayo ni yo mashamvu Eleyazari umuherezi
Joshua20:1 Uhoraho abarira Yosuwa
Joshua20:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli
Joshua20:3 uti Kugira ng’ umukoracumu yishe umuntu atabigize ibigirankana
Joshua20:4 Kand’ umukoracumu ni yahungira mu gisagara kimwe mur’ ivyo
Joshua20:5 Maz’ ūhōra uwishwe ni yamukurikira
Joshua20:6 Nukw az’ agume mur’ ico gisagara gushitsa ah’ azogīra mw ikombe agacirwa urubanza
Joshua20:7 Nuko batoranya i Kedeshi i Galilaya mu mugamba w’Abanafutali
Joshua20:8 Kandi hakurya ya Yorodani i burasirazuba bg’i Yeriko batoranyay’ i Beseri mu bugaragwa bgo mu kiyaya
Joshua20:9 Ivyo ni vyo bisagara vyashingiwe Abisirayeli bose
Joshua21:1 Maz’ abakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza b’Abalewi baza kuri Eleyazari umuherezi na Yosuwa mwene Nuni n’abakuru b’ amazu ya ba sekuruza b’imiryango y’Abisirayeli
Joshua21:2 aho bāri bari nyene i Shilo mur’ ico gihugu c’i Kanani
Joshua21:3 Nukw Abisirayeli baha Abalewi mu mashamvu yabo ibi bisagara hamwe n’amaragiro ar’ inyuma yavyo
Joshua21:4 Ubupfindo bushika ku mazu y’ Abakohati; maz’ abuzukuruza ba Aroni umuherezi
Joshua21:5 Abasigaye mu Bakohati ubupfindo bubaha ibisagara cumi
Joshua21:6 Abagerushoni ubupfindo bubaha ibisagara cumi na bitatu
Joshua21:7 Abamerari bahabga ibisagara cumi na bibiri
Joshua21:8 Ibisagara Abisirayeli bāhesheje Abalewi ubupfindo
Joshua21:9 ku vy’umuryango w’Abayuda no ku vy’uw’ Abasimeyoni batanga ibi bisagara bigiye kudōndwa amazina
Joshua21:10 ngo bibe ivy’ ab’ inzu ya Aroni
Joshua21:11 Nuko babaha Igisagara ca Araba
Joshua21:12 Arikw indimiro zo kur’ ico gisagara
Joshua21:13 Nukw ab’inzu ya Aroni umuherezi ni kwo kubaha i Heburoni nyene
Joshua21:14 n’i Yatiri n’i Eshitemowa
Joshua21:15 n’i Holoni n’i Debira
Joshua21:16 n’i Ayini n’i Yuta n’i Beti‐shemeshi
Joshua21:17 Kandi ku vy’ umuryango w’Ababenyamini batanga Gibeyoni n’i Geba
Joshua21:18 n’i Anatoti n’i Alunoni
Joshua21:19 Ibisagara vyose na vyose vy’ab’ inzu ya Aroni
Joshua21:20 Abalewi bo mu yandi mazu y’Abakohati asigaye
Joshua21:21 Babaha Shekemu n’amaragiro yaho mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu nyene
Joshua21:22 n’i Kibuzayimu n’i Beti‐horoni
Joshua21:23 Ku vy’umuryango w’ Abadani babaha Eliteke n’i Gibetoni
Joshua21:24 n’i Ayaloni n’i Gati‐rimoni
Joshua21:25 Ku vy’igihimba c’umuryango w’Abamanase babaha Tanaki n’amaragiro yaho
Joshua21:26 Ibisagara vyose na vyose vy’amazu asigaye y’Abakohati vyar’ icumi
Joshua21:27 Abagerushoni bo mu mazu y’ Abalewi
Joshua21:28 Ku vy’umuryango w’Abisakari babaha Kishiyoni n’i Daberati
Joshua21:29 n’i Yaramuti n’i Eni‐ganimu
Joshua21:30 Ku vy’umuryango w’Abasheri babaha Mishali n’i Abudoni
Joshua21:31 n’i Helikati n’i Rehobu
Joshua21:32 Ku vy’umuryango w’Abanafutali babaha Kedeshi i Galilaya n’ amaragiro yaho; car’ igisagara c’ ubuhungiro bg’uwishe uwundi; babaha n’i Hamoti‐dora n’amaragiro yaho
Joshua21:33 Ibisagara vyose na vyose vy’Abagerushoni
Joshua21:34 Amazu y’Abamerari
Joshua21:35 n’i Dimuna n’i Nahalali
Joshua21:36 Ku vy’umuryango w’Abareyubeni babaha Beseri n’i Yahasi
Joshua21:37 n’i Kedemoti n’i Mefati
Joshua21:38 Ku vy’umuryango w’Abagadi babaha Ramoti i Gileyadi n’amaragiro yaho; car’ igisagara c’ubuhungiro bg’uwishe uwundi; babaha n’i Mahanayimu
Joshua21:39 n’i Heshiboni n’i Yazeri
Joshua21:40 Ivyo vyose vyar’ ibisagara vy’ Abamerari
Joshua21:41 Ibisagara Abalewi bāhawe mu mashamvu y’Abisirayeli bandi
Joshua21:42 Ivyo bisagara vyose vyari bikikijwe n’amaragiro yavyo; vyose iyo biva bikagera ni ko vyari bimeze.
Joshua21:43 Uko ni k’Uhoraho yahaye Abisirayeli bose igihugu yasezeraniye ba sekuruza
Joshua21:44 Uhoraho abaha impore impande zose
Joshua21:45 Nta kintu na kimwe mu vyiza vyose Uhoraho yasezeraniye ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli kitāshitse: ariko vyose vyarasohoye.
Joshua22:1 Maze Yosuwa ahamagaza Abareyubeni n’Abagadi n’ ab’igihimba c’umuryango wa Manase;
Joshua22:2 arababarira
Joshua22:3 Ikindi
Joshua22:4 Non’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu amaze guha impore bagenzi banyu
Joshua22:5 Mugabo
Joshua22:6 Nuko Yosuwa arabahezagira
Joshua22:7 Arikw igihimba kimwe c’umuryango wa Manase Mose yari yarabahaye ishamvu yabo i Bashani; ikindi gihimba Yosuwa ni we yabahaye mu b’i wabo hakuno ya Yorodani i burengerazuba. Kandi Yosuwa akirikw arabasezera ngo basubire i wabo
Joshua22:8 arababgira
Joshua22:9 Nukw Abareyubeni n’Abagadi n’igihimba c’umuryango w’Abamanase barahindukira
Joshua22:10 Bashitse mu ntāra yo mu gihugu c’i Kanani iherereye kuri Yorodani
Joshua22:11 Bukeye Abisirayeli bandi bumva kw Abareyubeni n’Abagadi n’igihimba c’umuryango w’ Abamanase bubatse igicaniro ku rubibe rw’igihugu c’i Kanani
Joshua22:12 Abisirayeli babimenye
Joshua22:13 Abisirayeli baraheza batuma Finehasi mwene Eleyazari umuherezi
Joshua22:14 bamutumana n’abakuru cumi
Joshua22:15 Nuko bashikiriye Abareyubeni n’Abagadi n’igihimba c’umuryango w’Abamanase
Joshua22:16 bat’ Ikoraniro ryose ry’Uhoraho ryadutumye
Joshua22:17 Mbeg’ igicumuro c’i Peyori catubereye icoroshe
Joshua22:18 Icātumye uyu musi mureka gukurikira Uhoraho n’iki? Kandi ko mugararije Uhoraho uyu musi
Joshua22:19 Mugabo
Joshua22:20 Mbega Akani
Joshua22:21 Nukw Abareyubeni n’Abagadi n’igihimba c’umuryango w’ Abamanase
Joshua22:22 bat’ Uhoraho Imana nyamana
Joshua22:23 Asangwa twiyubakiye igicaniro ngo tureke gukurikira Uhoraho
Joshua22:24 Arikw icabiduteye kwar’ ugutinya yuko mu gihe kizoza abana banyu bohava babarira abacu
Joshua22:25 Bakavuga
Joshua22:26 Ico ni co catumye twīgīra inama
Joshua22:27 ariko ngo kize kibe icabona hagati yacu namwe
Joshua22:28 Ni co catumye twiyumvira
Joshua22:29 Barongera baravuga
Joshua22:30 Maze Finehasi umuherezi
Joshua22:31 Nuko Finehasi mwene Eleyazari umuherezi abarira Abareyubeni n’Abagadi n’Abamanase
Joshua22:32 Maze Finehasi mwene Eleyazari umuherezi na ba bakuru barahindukira
Joshua22:33 Abo bavyumvise
Joshua22:34 Nukw Abareyubeni n’Abagadi bita ico gicaniro Icabona
Joshua23:1 Hashize igihe kirekire
Joshua23:2 Yosuwa ahamagaza Abisirayeli bose
Joshua23:3 Kandi mwabonye ivyo Uhoraho yagiriye ayo mahanga yose kubganyu; kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu ari we yagenda abarwanira.
Joshua23:4 None rāba amahanga agisigaye
Joshua23:5 Kand’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu azobakinagiza imbere yanyu
Joshua23:6 Nuko rero ni mugumye imitima
Joshua23:7 mukifatanya n’ayo mahanga agisigaye muri mwebge
Joshua23:8 ariko muze mwifatanye akaramata n’Uhoraho Imana yanyu
Joshua23:9 Kuk’ Uhoraho yirukanye imbere yanyu amahanga ahambaye afise amagara; ariko mwebge nta muntu n’umwe yigeze kubahagarara imbere gushitsa ubu;
Joshua23:10 arik’ umwe muri mwebge akinagiza abantu igihumbi
Joshua23:11 Mugire umwete cane wo kubera maso ubugingo bganyu
Joshua23:12 Ariko ni mwahīrahīra mukarāba irya
Joshua23:13 mumenye rwose yuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu atazosubira kwirukana ayo mahanga ngw ayabakūre imbere
Joshua23:14 Rāba ubu ngiye kugenda nk’ ukw abandi bose bagenda; namwe mu mitima yanyu no mu vyiyumviro vyanyu murazi neza mwese yukw ata kintu na kimwe mu vyiza vyose Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabasezeraniye kitāshitse; vyose vyarasohoye
Joshua23:15 Nk’ ukw ivyiza vyose Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabasezeraniye vyāshitse
Joshua23:16 ni mwaca mw isezerano ryiwe yabasezeraniye
Joshua24:1 Maze Yosuwa akoraniriza imiryango yose y’Abisirayeli i Shekemu
Joshua24:2 Yosuwa abarira abantu bose
Joshua24:3 Bukeye njana sogokuruza wanyu Aburahamu
Joshua24:4 Isaka na we mmuha Yakobo na Esau; Esau mmuha umusozi Seyiri ngw awegukire
Joshua24:5 Bukeye ntuma Mose na Aroni
Joshua24:6 nkūra ba sogokuruza banyu muri Egiputa
Joshua24:7 Maze bantakambiye jewe Uhoraho
Joshua24:8 Hanyuma mbashikana mu gihugu c’Abamori bo hakurya ya Yorodani
Joshua24:9 Bukeye Balaki mwene Sipori umwami w’i Mowabu arahaguruka
Joshua24:10 Ariko nanka kwumvira Balamu
Joshua24:11 Hanyuma mujabuka Yorodani
Joshua24:12 Kandi nagomoye amavubi abītangira imbere
Joshua24:13 Maze mbaha igihugu mutigeze kurimamwo
Joshua24:14 None rero ni mwubahe Uhoraho
Joshua24:15 Kandi namba mubona bibabangamiye gusaba Uhoraho
Joshua24:16 Abantu baramwishura
Joshua24:17 Kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yacu ari we yadukūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa
Joshua24:18 Ikindi
Joshua24:19 Ariko Yosuwa abarira abantu
Joshua24:20 Kuko ni mwaheba Uhoraho
Joshua24:21 Abantu babarira Yosuwa
Joshua24:22 Yosuwa abarira abantu
Joshua24:23 Yosuwa ati None rero ni mukūreh’ imana z’inyamahanga ziri muri mwebge
Joshua24:24 Abantu bishura Yosuwa
Joshua24:25 Nuk’ uwo musi Yosuwa asezeranira abantu isezerano
Joshua24:26 Nuko Yosuwa yandika ayo majambo mu gitabo c’ivyagezwe vy’Imana; yābīra ikibuye kinini
Joshua24:27 Yosuwa abarira abantu bose
Joshua24:28 Nuko Yosuwa asezera abantu
Joshua24:29 Ivyo vyose bibaye
Joshua24:30 Bamuhamba mw ishamvu yiwe bgite i Timunati‐sera mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu
Joshua24:31 Yosuwa akiriho
Joshua24:32 Kand’ amagufa ya Yosefu
Joshua24:33 Na Eleyazari mwene Aroni arahwera; bamuhamba mu gisagara ca Finehasi umwana wiwe i Gibeya
Judges1:1 Yosuwa amaze gupfa
Judges1:2 Uhoraho arishura
Judges1:3 Nukw Abayuda babarira ab’i wabo b’Abasimeyoni
Judges1:4 Nukw Abayuda badūga gutera
Judges1:5 Basanga Adoni‐bezeki i Bezeki nyene
Judges1:6 Ariko Adoni‐bezeki arahunga
Judges1:7 Adoni‐bezeki aravuga
Judges1:8 Maz’ Abayuda batera Yerusalemu
Judges1:9 Maze baramanuka
Judges1:10 Baraheza baja gutera Abanyakanani baba i Heburoni; Heburoni kera hitwa Kiriyati‐Araba: maze bica Sheshayi na Ahimanu na Talumayi.
Judges1:11 Nuko bavayo
Judges1:12 Kalebu aravuga
Judges1:13 Otiniyeli mwene Kenazi
Judges1:14 Maz’ agishika i w’umugabo wiwe
Judges1:15 Aramwishura
Judges1:16 Maz’ abo mu ruvyaro rwa wa Munyakeni
Judges1:17 Bukeye Abayuda bafatanya n’ab’i wabo b’Abasimeyoni
Judges1:18 Abayuda banesha i Gaza n’impande zaho zose
Judges1:19 Uhoraho yari kumwe n’Abayuda; birukana ababa mu gihugu c’umugamba
Judges1:20 Kalebu bamuha Heburoni nk’uko Mose yari yaravuze; ahirukana bene Anaki ukw ari batatu.
Judges1:21 Arikw Ababenyamini ntibirukanye Abayebusi bāba i Yerusalemu; nukw Abayebusi babana n’Ababenyamini i Yerusalemu gushitsa na bugingo n’ubu.
Judges1:22 Ab’ umuryango wa Yosefu na bo baradūga ngo batere i Beteli; kand’ Uhoraho yari kumwe na bo.
Judges1:23 Batuma abaja gutata i Beteli; ico gisagara kera citwa Luzi.
Judges1:24 Abo batasi babona umuntu avuye mur’ ico gisagara
Judges1:25 Aca abereka aho baca ngo bagishikemwo; ni kwo kuranduza inkota ico gisagara
Judges1:26 Uwo muntu araheza aragenda
Judges1:27 Arikw Abamanase ntibirukanye ab’i Beti‐sheyani cank’ ab’i Tanaki cank’ ababa i Dori
Judges1:28 Maz’ Abisirayeli bamaze guhama
Judges1:29 Abefurayimu na bo ntibirukanye Abanyakanani baba i Gezeri
Judges1:30 N’Abazebuloni na bo ntibirukanye ababa i Kitironi cank’ ababa i Nahalolo; arikw abo Banyakanani babana na bo
Judges1:31 N’Abasheri na bo ntibirukanye ababa ahitwa Ako
Judges1:32 arikw Abasheri babana n’Abanyakanani
Judges1:33 N’Abanafutali na bo ntibirukanye ababa i Beti‐shemeshi
Judges1:34 Abamori bagenda barasegenya
Judges1:35 arikw abo Bamori bāgataye kuva ku musozi Heresi n’i Ayaloni n’i Shalubimu; arikw ab’ inzu ya Yosefu bamaze gukomera bashinga abo Bamori ibikebere.
Judges1:36 Kand’ urubibe rw’Abamori rwāhēra ku mudūgo w’i Akurabimu rugashitsa i Sela rugasubiza amajaruguru.
Judges2:1 Umumarayika w’Uhoraho ava i Gilugali aradūga
Judges2:2 nti Namwe ntimuze musezerane na ben’ iki gihugu
Judges2:3 None nanje hinge ndababarire: Abo sinzobirukana ngo bababise
Judges2:4 Maz’ umumarayika w’Uhoraho amaze kubgira Abisirayeli bose ayo majambo
Judges2:5 Aho hantu baca bahita i Bokimu; bahatangira ibimazi
Judges2:6 Kandi Yosuwa igihe yar’ amaze gusēzera abantu
Judges2:7 Yosuwa akiriho
Judges2:8 Yosuwa mwene Nuni umusavyi w’Uhoraho ahwera amaze imyaka ijana n’icumi.
Judges2:9 Bāmuhamvye mw ishamvu yiwe bgite i Timunati‐sera mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu
Judges2:10 Hanyuma ab’ urwo runganwe bose na bo barapfa
Judges2:11 Maz’ Abisirayeli bakora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi
Judges2:12 bava k’Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza yabakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa
Judges2:13 Uko ni ko bātaye Uhoraho
Judges2:14 Uburake bg’ Uhoraho buca buziriringira Abisirayeli
Judges2:15 Aho bāja gutera hose
Judges2:16 Maz’ Uhoraho akabahagurukiriza abacamanza
Judges2:17 Ariko bakanka kwumvira abo bacamanza babo
Judges2:18 Kand’ uk’ Uhoraho yabaha umucamanza
Judges2:19 Ariko hanyuma
Judges2:20 Maz’ uburake bg’Uhoraho buziriringira Abisirayeli
Judges2:21 nanje guhēra ubu sinzokwongera kwirukana ihanga na rimwe ngo ribabise
Judges2:22 kugira ngw Abisirayeli ndabageragereshe ayo mahanga
Judges2:23 Ni co catumye Uhoraho areka ayo mahanga
Judges3:1 Aya ni yo mahanga Uhoraho yaretse
Judges3:2 ico yagomba gusa kwar’ ukugira ngw abārutse hanyuma bo mu Bisirayeli bamenyerezwe ivy’ intambara
Judges3:3 Hār’ abaganwa batanu b’Abafilisitiya
Judges3:4 Abo ni bo Uhoraho yaretse
Judges3:5 Nukw Abisirayeli baba hagati y’Abanyakanani n’Abaheti n’Abamori n’Abaferizi n’Abahiwi n’Abayebusi.
Judges3:6 Barashingirana
Judges3:7 Maz’ Abisirayeli bakora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi
Judges3:8 Bituma uburake bg’Uhoraho buziriringira Abisirayeli
Judges3:9 Maz’ Abisirayeli batakambiye Uhoraho
Judges3:10 Mpwemu w’Uhoraho amuzako
Judges3:11 Nukw ico gihugu gihabga impore kumara imyaka mirongwine. Maze Otiniyeli mwene Kenazi arapfa.
Judges3:12 Abisirayeli bongera gukora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi
Judges3:13 Eguloni atabaza Abamoni n’ Abamaleki
Judges3:14 Nukw Abisirayeli baganzwa na Eguloni umwami w’i Mowabu imyaka cumi n’ umunani.
Judges3:15 Maz’ Abisirayeli batakambiye Uhoraho
Judges3:16 Maze Ehudi yicurishiriza intambi; uburebure bgayo bgar’ itambge rimwe ry’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora; ayambara kw itako ry’i buryo
Judges3:17 Nukw aragenda
Judges3:18 Nuko Ehudi ahejeje kwākīrirwa iryo shikanwa
Judges3:19 Ariko we
Judges3:20 Nuko Ehudi aramwēgēra aho yar’ avyagiye ari wenyene
Judges3:21 Maze Ehudi atuma ukuboko kwiwe kw’i bumoso
Judges3:22 iyo ntambi ijana n’ikirindi na co
Judges3:23 Maze Ehudi arasohoka
Judges3:24 Amaze gusohoka
Judges3:25 Bararorēra gushitsa bibazazaniye kukw atuguruye inzugi z’ico cumba; bararuha bazana urupfunguzo
Judges3:26 Ico gihe bāmaze bagitebaganye
Judges3:27 Ashitseyo
Judges3:28 Arababarira
Judges3:29 Ico gihe bica abagabo nk’ ibihumbi cumi b’Abanyamowabu
Judges3:30 Nuk’ uwo musi Abanyamowabu baneshwa n’Abisirayeli. Igihugu gihabga impore kumara imyaka mirongumunani.
Judges3:31 Ehudi akurikirwa na Shamugari mwene Anati

Judges4:9 Aramwishura

Judges6:3 Kand’ Abisirayeli iyo bahejeje kurangiriza imbuto hanze
Judges6:4 bagasagazayo
Judges6:5 Bādūgana amasho yabo n’amahema yabo
Judges6:6 Nukw Abisirayeli baja mu karindiro kubg’ Abamidiyani
Judges6:7 Ico gihe Abisirayeli batakambiye Uhoraho kubg’ Abamidiyani
Judges6:8 Uhoraho abatumak’ ūvugishwa na we

Judges6:10 ngw Arababgira

Judges6:19 Nuko Gideyoni yinjira i we
Judges6:20 Maz’ uwo mumarayika w’ Imana aramubarira
Judges6:21 Maz’ umumarayika w’Uhoraho atuma inkoni yari yitwaje
Judges6:22 Maze Gideyoni aca amenya ko yar’ umumarayika w’Uhoraho; aravuga
Judges6:23 Maz’ Uhoraho aramubarira
Judges6:24 Nuko Gideyoni araheza ahubakira Uhoraho igicaniro
Judges6:25 Mw ijoro ry’uwo musi
Judges6:26 uheze unyubakire igicaniro kur’ iki gitandara
Judges6:27 Nuko Gideyoni ajana abantu cumi bo mu bantu biwe
Judges6:28 Bukeye abantu bo mu gisagara bavyutse
Judges6:29 Barabazanya
Judges6:30 Maz’ abantu bo mur’ ico gisagara babarira Yowasi
Judges6:31 Yowasi yishura abamuhagurukiye bose
Judges6:32 Nuko kur’ uwo musi aca yita Gideyoni Yerubayali; ati Bayali ni yirwanirire
Judges6:33 Maz’ Abamidiyani bose n’ Abamaleki n’ab’i burasirazuba bakoranira hamwe
Judges6:34 Mpwemu w’Uhoraho aza kuri Gideyoni; aca avuza inzamba
Judges6:35 Atuma intabaza mu gihugu cose c’Abamanase
Judges6:36 Maze Gideyoni abarira Imana
Judges6:37 ehe ngiye gushira ubgoya bg’ intama ku mbuga; ni nasanga ikime gitonze ku bgoya bgonyene
Judges6:38 Nuko biba birtyo: bukeye azinduka kare
Judges6:39 Gideyoni yongera kubarira Imana
Judges6:40 Nukw Imana ibigenza irtyo no mur’ iryo joro: ubgoya bgonyene busigara bgūmye
Judges7:1 Yerubayali
Judges7:2 Maz’ Uhoraho abarira Gideyoni
Judges7:3 None genda ubitāngāze
Judges7:4 Uhoraho yongera kubarira Gideyoni
Judges7:5 Nukw amanukana abo bantu ku mazi
Judges7:6 Igitigiri c’abānyoye basabagiye ku mashi yabo car’ amajana atatu; arikw abandi bose bārapfukamye mu kunywa amazi.
Judges7:7 Maz’ Uhoraho abarira Gideyoni
Judges7:8 Nukw abo amajana atatu bāka abo bandi impamba zabo n’inzamba zabo. Maze Gideyoni arungika abo Bisirayeli bose bacaguwe
Judges7:9 Ijoro ry’uwo musi Uhoraho aramubarira
Judges7:10 Ariko ni waba utinya kumanukayo
Judges7:11 wumvirize ivyo bavuga; ni ho uja kurema
Judges7:12 Kand’ Abamidiyani n’Abamaleki n’ab’i burasirazuba bose bari bajimagije ico kiyaya
Judges7:13 Nuko Gideyoni ashitseyo
Judges7:14 Mugenzi we aramwishura
Judges7:15 Nuko Gideyoni yumvise izo nzozi n’uko zisobanuwe
Judges7:16 Nukw abo bantu ukw ar’ amajana atatu abagabanyamw’ imitwe itatu
Judges7:17 Arababarira
Judges7:18 Ni navuza inzamba
Judges7:19 Nuko Gideyoni n’abantu ijana bajanye na we bashika ku nsago za mbere
Judges7:20 Nuko ya mitwe ukw ar’ itatu baca bavuza inzamba
Judges7:21 Umuntu wese ahagarara aho yar’ ari
Judges7:22 Nuko bakomeza kuvuza za nzamba ukw ar’ amajana atatu
Judges7:23 Batabaza Abisirayeli bo mu Banafutali n’abo mu Basheri n’abo mu Bamanase bose
Judges7:24 Gideyoni atuma intabaza mu mugamba wose w’Abefurayimu
Judges7:25 Bafata abaganwa bompi b’Abamidiyani
Judges8:1 Maz’ Abefurayimu babaza Gideyoni
Judges8:2 Arabishura
Judges8:3 Erega ni mwebge Imana yahaye abo baganwa b’Abamidiyani
Judges8:4 Nuko Gideyoni ashika kuri Yorodani
Judges8:5 Ashitse i Sukoti abarira abaho
Judges8:6 Abatware b’i Sukoti baramwishura
Judges8:7 Gideyoni arabishura
Judges8:8 Avayo
Judges8:9 Nukw abgira ab’i Peniyeli
Judges8:10 Kandi Zeba na Salumuna bar’ i Karikori
Judges8:11 Maze Gideyoni adūgana inzira ica mu bībēra mu mahema hirya y’i Noba n’i Yogi‐beha ku ruhande rw’i burasirazuba
Judges8:12 Zeba na Salumuna barahunga
Judges8:13 Nuko Gideyoni mwene Yowasi agarukira ku mudūgo w’i Heresi
Judges8:14 Ahūra n’umusore wo mu b’i Sukoti
Judges8:15 Ashitse i Sukoti abarira abaho
Judges8:16 Nukw afata abakuru bo mur’ ico gisagara
Judges8:17 Maz’ ahomvagura na wa munara w’i Peniyeli
Judges8:18 Maz’ abaza Zeba na Salumuna
Judges8:19 Arababgira
Judges8:20 Maz’ abarira imfura yiwe Yeteri
Judges8:21 Nuko Zeba na Salumuna baravuga
Judges8:22 Maz’ Abisirayeli babarira Gideyoni
Judges8:23 Gideyoni arabishura
Judges8:24 Maz’ arababarira
Judges8:25 Baramwishura
Judges8:26 Kandi kuriba kw’izo mpeta z’izahabu kwari shekeli igihumbi n’amajana ndwi
Judges8:27 Maz’ izo zahabu Gideyoni azikoramw’ icitwa efodi
Judges8:28 Nukw Abamidiyani bamarwa igabo n’Abisirayeli: ntibāsubira kuvyutsa umutwe ukundi; mu gihe ca Gideyoni igihugu gihabga impore kumara imyaka mirongwine.

Judges8:30 kand’ abahungu yivyariye bāri mirongwirindwi

Judges8:35 Kandi ntibagirira neza ab’ inzu ya Yerubayali
Judges9:1 Maze Abimeleki mwene Yerubayali aja i Shekemu kwa ba inarume
Judges9:2 at’ Enda ni mumbarize ab’i Shekemu bose
Judges9:3 Ba inarume baragenda bīgānira ayo majambo yose ab’i Shekemu bose; na bo imitima yabo baca bayishira kuri Abimeleki
Judges9:4 Bamuha intete z’ifeza mirongwirindwi bakūye mu ngoro ya Bayali‐beriti; Abimeleki azihēra abantu b’imburakimazi kandi b’inshirukanya
Judges9:5 Aja i wabo i Ofura
Judges9:6 Maz’ abantu bose b’i Shekemu bakoranira hamwe n’ab’ inzu ya Milo bose
Judges9:7 Maze Yotamu avyumvise
Judges9:8 Kera ibiti vyari bigiye kwiyimikamw’ umwami wo kubiganza. Bibarira igiti c’umwelayo
Judges9:9 Umwelayo uravyishura
Judges9:10 Maz’ ibiti bibarira umusukoni
Judges9:11 Umusukoni uravyishura
Judges9:12 Maz’ ibiti bibarira umuzabibu
Judges9:13 Umuzabibu uravyishura
Judges9:14 Maz’ ibiti vyose bibarira umubambangwe
Judges9:15 Umubambangwe wishura ivyo biti
Judges9:16 Yotamu yungamwo
Judges9:17 Data ko yabarwanira ahevye amagara yiwe
Judges9:18 none mwebge ko mwakūriye hasi inzu yiwe
Judges9:19 None rero
Judges9:20 Na ho bitabaye birtyo
Judges9:21 Maze Yotamu aca yiruka arahunga
Judges9:22 Nuko Abimeleki amara imyaka itatu

Judges9:24 kugira ngw asubirizwe mu nkōko agatikizo yatikije bene Yerubayali mirongwirindwi
Judges9:25 Maz’ ab’i Shekemu bashirah’ abantu bo kumuryamira ku mpinga z’imisozi
Judges9:26 Maze Gayali mwene Ebedi yimukana n’abo bavukana
Judges9:27 Bukeye baja mu ndimiro
Judges9:28 Gayali mwene Ebedi aravuga
Judges9:29 Icompa nkaba ari jewe mbaganza! Nokūraho Abimeleki! Nobarira Abimeleki
Judges9:30 Zebuli umutware w’ico gisagara
Judges9:31 Atuma intumwa kwa Abimeleki mu mpisho

Judges9:36 Nuko Gayali ababonye

Judges9:41 Nuko Abimeleki arāra i Aruma
Judges9:42 Bukeye bgaho abantu baragenda baja mu mirima; Abimeleki barabimubarira.
Judges9:43 Aca ajana ingabo ziwe
Judges9:44 Maze Abimeleki n’umuce wari kumwe na we birukira kw ishikiro ry’irembo
Judges9:45 Abimeleki yiriza uwo musi wose arwanya ico gisagara
Judges9:46 Maz’ abantu bose bo ku munara w’i Shekemu bumvise ivyo
Judges9:47 Abimeleki abarirwa yukw abantu bose bo ku munara w’i Shekemu bakoraniye hamwe.

Judges9:53 Maz’ umugore umwe mur’ abo atera Abimeleki ingasire mu ruhanga

Judges17:4 Nukw amaze gusubiza nyina izo feza
Judges17:5 Uwo mugabo Mika yar’ afise akanyabugoro k’ibigirwamana; arondeza umwambaro witwa efodi na terafimu
Judges17:6 Mur’ iyo misi Abisirayeli nta mwami bāribgagire: umuntu wese yakora ico yigombeye.
Judges17:7 Kandi hārih’ umusore w’i Betelehemu h’i Buyuda wo mu muryango wa Yuda w’Umulewi

Judges17:10 Mika aramwishura

Judges17:13 Maze Mika aravuga

Judges19:5 Ku musi ugira kane bavyutse kare
Judges19:6 Nuko bompi baca baricara
Judges19:7 Arik’ uwo mugabo arahaguruka ngw agende; sebukwe aramwinginga

Judges19:25 Arikw abo bagabo banka kumwumvira; nuk’ uwo mushitsi afata umugore wiwe

Judges20:2 Maz’ abakuru bo mu bantu bose b’imiryango yose y’Abisirayeli bava hasi mw ikoraniro ry’abantu b’Imana
Judges20:3 (Kand’ Ababenyamini bari bumvise kw Abisirayeli badūze i Misipa.) Maz’ Abisirayeli barabaza
Judges20:4 Wa Mulewi
Judges20:5 Maz’ abagabo b’i Gibeya bahenga mw ijoro barantera
Judges20:6 Ndaheza ndamufata
Judges20:7 None rero yemwe Bisirayeli mwese
Judges20:8 Maz’ abantu bose bavira hasi icarimwe
Judges20:9 arikw ico dukwiye kugirira i Gibeya n’ ukuhatera
Judges20:10 Kandi tuzogenda dutora abantu
Judges20:11 Nukw ingabo zose z’Abisirayeli zikoranira kurwanya ico gisagara
Judges20:12 Maz’ ab’ imiryango y’Abisirayeli batuma intumwa mu muryango w’Ababenyamini iy’ uva ukagera
Judges20:13 Uti None ni mubahe abo bantu b’abagesera b’i Gibeya
Judges20:14 Maz’ Ababenyamini bava mu bisagara vyabo bakoranira i Gibeya
Judges20:15 Uwo musi hakorana Ababenyamini bavuye mur’ ivyo bisagara ingabo zizi kurwanisha inkota ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bitandatu
Judges20:16 Kandi mur’ izo ngabo zose hārimw’ abantu b’intorwa amajana ndwi b’amabamfu
Judges20:17 Abandi Bisirayeli
Judges20:18 Maz’ Abisirayeli barahaguruka baja i Beteli
Judges20:19 Nuko bukeye Abisirayeli barahaguruka
Judges20:20 Ingabo zabo zitera Ababenyamini
Judges20:21 Maz’ Ababenyamini barasokoroka bava i Gibeya
Judges20:22 Arikw izo ngabo z’Abisirayeli zirīyūngūnganya
Judges20:23 Maz’ Abisirayeli baradūga
Judges20:24 Nuko ku musi ugira kabiri Abisirayeli bongera kwēgereza Ababenyamini.
Judges20:25 Maz’ Ababenyamini bongera gusokoroka bava i Gibeya kur’ uwo musi wa kabiri nyene
Judges20:26 Maz’ ingabo zose z’Abisirayeli n’abantu bose baradūga
Judges20:27 Maz’ Abisirayeli basiguza Uhoraho
Judges20:28 na Finehasi mwene Eleyazari umwuzukuru wa Aroni ni we yahagarara imbere yayo); babaza Uhoraho
Judges20:29 Nukw Abisirayeli barekura abaca ibico ngo batangatange i Gibeya impande zose.
Judges20:30 Maze ku musi ugira gatatu Abisirayeli baja gutera Ababenyamini
Judges20:31 Ababenyamini baraza barabarwanya
Judges20:32 Maz’ Ababenyamini barihaya
Judges20:33 Uko ni kw Abisirayeli bose bāvuye aho bāri bari
Judges20:34 nukw abo bantu
Judges20:35 Maz’ Uhoraho atuma Ababenyamini baneshwa imbere y’Abisirayeli; kur’ uwo musi Abisirayeli batikiza mu Babenyamini abantu ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bitanu n’ijana
Judges20:36 Nukw Ababenyamini babona ko baneshejwe. Uko ni kw Abisirayeli bāhenze Ababenyamini
Judges20:37 abo bāri mu bico ni kwo kwiruka akābushūngwe
Judges20:38 Ikimenyetso Abisirayeli bāri bāhānye n’abāri mu bico n’uko ni bāturira igisagara
Judges20:39 Abisirayeli ni ho bazoca babahindukirana. Kand’ Ababenyamini bāri bamaze gutangura kwica mu Bisirayeli abantu nka mirongwitatu
Judges20:40 Arik’ umwotsi utanguye kudūga utwaje uva mu gisagara
Judges20:41 Abisirayeli ni kwo kubahindukirana
Judges20:42 Nuko baha ibitugu Abisirayeli
Judges20:43 Baca Ababenyamini hirya no hino
Judges20:44 Mu Babenyamini hapfa abantu ibihumbi cumi n’ umunani
Judges20:45 Uko ni ko bākebeje
Judges20:46 Nukw abāpfuye kur’ uwo musi mu Babenyamini bose na bose bār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bitanu bazi kurwanisha inkota; abo bose bār’ abahizi.
Judges20:47 Mugabo
Judges20:48 Maz’ Abisirayeli barahindukira
Judges21:1 Kand’ Abisirayeli bāri bararahiriye i Misipa
Judges21:2 Nukw abantu baja i Beteli
Judges21:3 bat’ Ewe Uhoraho
Judges21:4 Bukeye abantu bakoroka kare
Judges21:5 Maz’ Abisirayeli barabazanya
Judges21:6 Nukw Abisirayeli baricuza kubg’ Ababenyamini bene wabo
Judges21:7 None twobigenza dute ngo turonderere amasigarira yabo abagore
Judges21:8 Ni kwo kubazanya
Judges21:9 kukw igihe abantu bāharūrwa ntihābonetse n’umwe wo mu baba i Yabeshi‐gileyadi.
Judges21:10 Nukw iryo koraniro ritumay’ abantu ibihumbi cumi na bibiri b’abahizi barusha abandi; barababarira
Judges21:11 Uku abe ari ko muzobigenza: muze mugeseze umugabo wese iyo bava bakagera
Judges21:12 Nuko mu baba i Yabeshi‐gileyadi babonay’ abakobga b’inkumi amajana ane batīgeze kumenya icitwa umugabo; babazana aho bashagaje i Shilo
Judges21:13 Maz’ iryo koraniro ryose rituma impore ku Babenyamini bāri kuri ca gitandara c’i Rimona.
Judges21:14 Buno Ababenyamini baca barahūngūka
Judges21:15 Nukw abantu barīcuza kubg’ Ababenyamini
Judges21:16 Maz’ abakuru b’iryo koraniro barabazanya
Judges21:17 Bat’ Amasigarira y’Ababenyamini ntakwiye kubura ishingiro
Judges21:18 Yamara twebge ntidushobora kubashingira abakobga bacu! Icabiteye n’ukw Abisirayeli bari bararahiye
Judges21:19 Maze baravuga
Judges21:20 Nuko babarira Ababenyamini
Judges21:21 murereke: maz’ abakobga b’i Shilo ni basokoroka baja kuvyina
Judges21:22 Maze ba se canke basāza babo ni baza kutwitwarako
Judges21:23 Nukw Ababenyamini babigenza kuno
Judges21:24 Ico gihe nyene Abisirayeli na bo bavayo
Judges21:25 Kandi mur’ iyo misi Abisirayeli nta mwami bāribgagire: umuntu wese yakora ico yigombeye.
Ruth1:1 Mu misi y’abacamanza ikigoyi cateye mu gihugu. Nuk’ umugabo w’i Betelehemu h’i Buyuda asuhukira mu gihugu c’i Mowabu
Ruth1:2 Uwo mugabo yitwa Elimeleki
Ruth1:3 Elimeleki
Ruth1:4 Bābīra Abanyamowabukazi; umwe yitwa Orupa
Ruth1:5 Maze Mahaloni na Kiliyoni bompi barapfa; uwo mugore abura abana biwe bompi n’umugabo wiwe.
Ruth1:6 Bukeye avana hasi n’abakazana biwe
Ruth1:7 Ava aho hantu yar’ ari
Ruth1:8 Nawomi abgira abakazana biwe bompi
Ruth1:9 Uhoraho abahe mwempi gusubira kwubaka ingo mugire abagabo. Arabagūmbīra
Ruth1:10 Baramwishura
Ruth1:11 Nawomi arabishura
Ruth1:12 Ni mwisubirire inyuma
Ruth1:13 mbeg’ ivyo vyotuma mubarīndīra gushitsa aho bazokurira? Ivyo vyotuma mureka kurondera abagabo? Vyoye kuba birtyo
Ruth1:14 Barongera baraturikīsha
Ruth1:15 Nawomi aravuga
Ruth1:16 Rusi aramwishura
Ruth1:17 ah’ uzogwa ni ho nzogwa
Ruth1:18 Nawomi abonye yukw amaramaje kujana na we aca arahora.
Ruth1:19 Nuko bompi barajana kurinda bashika i Betelehemu. Nuko rero bashitse i Betelehemu abo mu gisagara bose barashwabāduka
Ruth1:20 Arabishura
Ruth1:21 Navuye ino nninahaye
Ruth1:22 Uko ni ko Nawomi yagarukanye na Rusi Umunyamowabukazi umukazana wiwe
Ruth2:1 Kandi Nawomi yar’ afise mwene wabo w’umugabo wiwe

Ruth3:1 Nawomi inabukwe aramubaza

Ruth4:1 Nuko Bowazi aradūga
Ruth4:2 Azana abantu cumi bo mu bashingantahe b’ico gisagara
Ruth4:3 Abgira wa mucunguzi
Ruth4:4 nagomvye kubikumenyesha
Ruth4:5 Maze Bowazi aramubarira

Ruth4:19 Hesironi yavyaye Ramu; Ramu yavyaye Aminadabu;
Ruth4:20 Aminadabu yavyaye Nahashoni; Nahashoni yavyaye Salumoni;
Ruth4:21 Salumoni yavyaye Bowazi; Bowazi yavyaye Obedi;
Ruth4:22 Obedi yavyaye Isayi; Isayi yavyaye Dawidi.
1Samuel1:1 Hār’ umuntu w’i Ramatayimu‐sofimu
1Samuel1:2 Yar’ afise abagore babiri

1Samuel1:25 Babāga nya masa

1Samuel2:2 Nta wera nk’Uhoraho

1Samuel2:6 Uhoraho ni we atuma umuntu apfa
1Samuel2:7 Uhoraho ni we amukenesha kandi ni we amukenura
1Samuel2:8 Ni we akūra umugorwa mu mukungugu
1Samuel2:9 Azozigama ibirenge vy’abagororotsi biwe
1Samuel2:10 Abarwanya Uhoraho bazovunagurika

1Samuel2:13 n’ivy’imituri abaherezi bāgenewe ku bimazi vy’abantu. Iy’ umuntu atanze ikimazi
1Samuel2:14 akagita mw isafuriya

1Samuel2:21 Maz’ Uhoraho agendera Hana

1Samuel8:12 abandi azobashinga kuba abagabisha b’ingabo
1Samuel8:13 Kand’ azofata abakobga banyu
1Samuel8:14 Kand’ azofata imirima yanyu n’imizabibu yanyu n’imyelayo yanyu
1Samuel8:15 Kand’ azobatoza ibigiracumi vy’impeke zanyu n’inzabibu kw amarari
1Samuel8:16 Kand’ azobanyaga abagurano banyu b’abahungu n’abakobga
1Samuel8:17 Kand’ azobatwara ikigiracumi c’imikuku yanyu
1Samuel8:18 Maz’ umusi muzobibona muzoborōzwa n’uwo mwami mwitoreye; arik’ uwo musi nta co Uhoraho azobishura.
1Samuel8:19 Arikw abantu banka kwumva ivyo Samweli ababariye
1Samuel8:20 kugira ngo natwe tumere nk’ayandi mahanga yose
1Samuel8:21 Samweli yumvise ivyo abantu bavuze vyose
1Samuel8:22 Uhoraho aramwishura
1Samuel9:1 Hār’ umuntu w’Umubenyamini yitwa Kishi; yari mwene Abiyeli
1Samuel9:2 Kandi yar’ afise umuhungu mwiza w’umusore yitwa Sauli. Nta n’umwe mu Bisirayeli yamurusha ubgiza
1Samuel9:3 Bukeye indogoba za Kishi se wiwe ziratakara. Kishi abarira Sauli umuhungu wiwe
1Samuel9:4 Nuko baca mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu no mu ntāra y’i Shalisha
1Samuel9:5 Hanyuma bashitse mu ntāra y’i Sufi
1Samuel9:6 Na we aramwishura
1Samuel9:7 Maze Sauli abaza uwo muntu wiwe
1Samuel9:8 Uwo muntu yishura Sauli
1Samuel9:9 (Kera mu Bisirayeli
1Samuel9:10 Nuko Sauli abgira uwo muntu wiwe
1Samuel9:11 Bakidūga umusozi ngo bashike ku gisagara
1Samuel9:12 Barabishura
1Samuel9:13 Ni mwashika mu gisagara muca mumubona ataradūga ku mpinga y’umusozi kurīrayo; kukw abantu badashobora kurya ataraza
1Samuel9:14 Nuko baradūga ngo baje mu gisagara; bagishikayo baca bahūra na Samweli avayo ngw adūge ku mpinga y’umusozi.
1Samuel9:15 Kand’ umusi Sauli ashikayo
1Samuel9:16 at’ Ejo nka magingo aya nzokurungikira umuntu avuye mu gihugu c’Ababenyamini; uz’ umwimikishe amavuta
1Samuel9:17 Nuko Samweli agikubita ijisho Sauli
1Samuel9:18 Nuko Sauli yēgēra Samweli aho nyene mw irembo ry’igisagara
1Samuel9:19 Samweli aramwishura
1Samuel9:20 Kandi ku vya za ndogoba zawe
1Samuel9:21 Maze Sauli aramwishura
1Samuel9:22 Maze Samweli ajana Sauli n’ umuntu wiwe
1Samuel9:23 Maze Samweli abarira umusuku
1Samuel9:24 Nuk’ uwo musuku azana igikenye c’ukuguru n’inkenyūre zaco
1Samuel9:25 Bavuye aho ku mpinga y’umusozi
1Samuel9:26 Bukeye barazinduka; hakiri mu gaturuturu Samweli ahamagara Sauli iy’ ari hejuru ku nzu
1Samuel9:27 Bakimanuka
1Samuel10:1 Maze Samweli yābīra agakuza k’amavuta ya elayo
1Samuel10:2 Uyu musi ni twamara gutandukana
1Samuel10:3 Maz’ uvuye aho
1Samuel10:4 Barakuramutsa
1Samuel10:5 Hanyuma urashika ku musozi w’ Imana
1Samuel10:6 Maze Mpwemu w’Uhoraho aca akuzako akābushūngwe
1Samuel10:7 Kand’ ivyo bimenyamenya ni vyagushikako
1Samuel10:8 Kand’ uz’ unyitangire imbere
1Samuel10:9 Akirora irya avuye aho Samweli ari
1Samuel10:10 Nuko bashitse kuri wa musozi
1Samuel10:11 Maz’ abāri basanzwe bamuzi bose
1Samuel10:12 Umwe wo mu baba aho hantu arabaza
1Samuel10:13 Maz’ arangije kuvugishwa aja ha hantu hēra ku mpinga y’umusozi.
1Samuel10:14 Se wabo wa Sauli abaza Sauli na wa muntu wiwe
1Samuel10:15 Se wabo wa Sauli aramwishura
1Samuel10:16 Sauli yishura se wabo

1Samuel10:23 Bagenda biruka
1Samuel10:24 Maze Samweli abarira abantu bose
1Samuel10:25 Maze Samweli amenyesha abantu imiganzirize y’ubgami ukw izobamerera
1Samuel10:26 Sauli na we arītāhira
1Samuel10:27 Arikw abantu b’abagesera bamwe baravuga

1Samuel11:2 Nahashi umwami w’Abamoni arabishura

1Samuel11:4 Nukw intabaza zishitse i Gibeya ho kwa Sauli
1Samuel11:5 Ako kanya Sauli araza yimirije inka zivuye kurima
1Samuel11:6 Sauli yumvise ivyo
1Samuel11:7 afata inka zibiri

1Samuel11:9 Maze babarira za ntabaza
1Samuel11:10 Ab’i Yabeshi ni kwo kubarira Abamoni

1Samuel12:1 Maze Samweli abarira Abisirayeli bose
1Samuel12:2 Eh’ umwami azobarōngōra nguyo; jeho ndashaje
1Samuel12:3 Ehe ndi hano: ni munyagirize imbere y’Uhoraho n’imbere y’uwo yimikishije amavuta. Mbega har’ uwo nanyaze inka? Canke har’ uwo nanyaze indogoba? Har’ uwo nagunze? Har’ uwo natwaje igitugu? Canke har’ uwo nātse impongano ikampuma amaso? Vuga ndabarihe.
1Samuel12:4 Baramwishura
1Samuel12:5 Arababgira
1Samuel12:6 Maze Samweli abarira abantu
1Samuel12:7 Nuko none ni muhagarare
1Samuel12:8 Yakobo yagiye muri Egiputa
1Samuel12:9 Ariko bibagira Uhoraho Imana yabo
1Samuel12:10 Maze batakambira Uhoraho
1Samuel12:11 Maz’ Uhoraho arungika Yerubayali na Bedani na Yefuta nanje Samweli
1Samuel12:12 Maze mubona Nahashi umwami w’Abamoni abateye; kandi nah’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu ari we yar’ umwami wanyu
1Samuel12:13 None rero
1Samuel12:14 Mugabo
1Samuel12:15 Ariko ni mutumvira Uhoraho
1Samuel12:16 Nuko none hagarara murābe ikintu gihambaye Uhoraho agira akorere imbere yanyu.
1Samuel12:17 Mbeg’ ubu si mw igenya ry’ingano? None ngira nsabe Uhoraho arungike imvura irimw’ imituragaro; muca mumenya kandi mubone kw ibigabitanyo vyanyu ari vyinshi
1Samuel12:18 Nuko Samweli asaba Uhoraho; maz’ uwo musi nyene Uhoraho arekura imvura irimw’ imituragaro; abantu bose baca bagirira Uhoraho na Samweli ubgoba bginshi.
1Samuel12:19 Nukw abantu bose babarira Samweli
1Samuel12:20 Maze Samweli yishura abantu

1Samuel12:24 Ariko gusa
1Samuel12:25 Ariko ni mwashishikara kugabitanya
1Samuel13:1 Sauli yīmye amaze imyaka mirongwitatu; amara imyaka ibiri ari ku ngoma aganza Abisirayeli.
1Samuel13:2 Sauli yitoraniriza abantu mu Bisirayeli ibihumbi bitatu; muri bo
1Samuel13:3 Bukeye Yonatani atera abo mu nsago z’ Abafilisitiya i Geba
1Samuel13:4 Abisirayeli bose bumva bavuga ko Sauli yatsinze Abafilisitiya bo mur’ izo nsago
1Samuel13:5 Nukw Abafilisitiya barakorakorana ngo barwanye Abisirayeli; bāri bafise imikogote y’intambara ibihumbi mirongwitatu
1Samuel13:6 Maz’ Abisirayeli babonye ko babuze epfo na ruguru
1Samuel13:7 Mbere bamwe bo mu Baheburayo bāri bajabutse Yorodani
1Samuel13:8 Nuko Sauli amaray’ imisi ndwi
1Samuel13:9 Sauli ni kwo kuvuga
1Samuel13:10 Agiheza kucosa
1Samuel13:11 Maze Samweli aramubaza
1Samuel13:12 nuko nca niyumvira
1Samuel13:13 Maze Samweli abgira Sauli
1Samuel13:14 Ariko noneh’ ubgami bgawe ntibuzohangama; Uhoraho aramaze kwironderera umuntu ameze nk’uk’ umutima wiwe ugomba; kandi ni we Uhoraho yashinze ngw az’ abe segaba w’abantu biwe
1Samuel13:15 Nuko Samweli ava hasi
1Samuel13:16 Nuko Sauli na Yonatani umuhungu wiwe n’abari kumwe na bo baguma i Geba h’i Bubenyamini; arikw Abafilisitiya bāri bashagaje i Mikimashi.
1Samuel13:17 Bukeye abanyazi b’Abafilisitiya bava aho bashagaje
1Samuel13:18 uwundi ujana inzira ija i Beti‐horoni; uwundi ujana inzira igendana urubibe rurāba ku mwonga w’i Seboyimu ahahera mu bugaragwa.
1Samuel13:19 Ico gihe nta mucuzi yar’ akiboneka mu gihugu cose c’Abisirayeli; kukw Abafilisitiya bari bavuze

1Samuel13:22 Ni co gituma umusi intambara yarumanako
1Samuel13:23 Maz’ abo mu nsago z’Abafilisitiya barunguruza

1Samuel14:2 Kandi Sauli yar’ ashagaje ah’ i Gibeya hagarukira

1Samuel14:5 Igitandara kimwe cari gihagaze ahahera i burārūko

1Samuel14:21 Maz’ Abaheburayo bari basanzwe bafatanije n’Abafilisitiya ubga mbere
1Samuel14:22 Kand’ Abisirayeli bose bari binyegeje mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu
1Samuel14:23 Uko ni k’Uhoraho yarokoye Abisirayeli uwo musi; kand’ urugamba rurinda rurenga i Beti‐aveni.
1Samuel14:24 Maz’ uwo musi Abisirayeli bacika intege; kuko Sauli yari yarahije abantu

1Samuel14:26 Nuko bashitse mur’ ico kibira
1Samuel14:27 Ariko Yonatani we

1Samuel16:2 Samweli arasiguza
1Samuel16:3 Uheze uhamagare Isayi aze kur’ ico kimazi; nanje nzokwereka uk’ uzogenza; uz’ undobanurize amavuta uwo nzokurangira.
1Samuel16:4 Nuko Samweli agenza nk’uk’ Uhoraho yamubgiye
1Samuel16:5 At’ Ego me n’amahoro; nzanywe no gushikanira Uhoraho ikimazi. Nuko ni mwiyeze
1Samuel16:6 Nuko bashitseyo
1Samuel16:7 Arik’ Uhoraho abarira Samweli

1Samuel16:9 Isayi arongera amwereka Shama; na ho nyene Samweli aravuga

1Samuel16:23 Hanyuma uko ya mpwemu mbi yarungitswe n’Imana yafata Sauli
1Samuel17:1 Maz’ Abafilisitiya bakoranya ingabo zabo ngo batere; bazikoraniriza i Sokoho h’i Buyuda
1Samuel17:2 Sauli n’Abisirayeli na bo barakorakorana
1Samuel17:3 Abafilisitiya batonda ku musozi wo hakurya
1Samuel17:4 Bukeye mu nsago z’Abafilisitiya havamw’ umuhizi yitwa Goliyati w’i Gati; uburebure bgiwe bgar’ amatambge atandatu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora n’itambge rimwe ry’intoke.
1Samuel17:5 Kandi yari yambaye inkofero y’umuringa mu mutwe
1Samuel17:6 ku maguru yari yambaye ibikingira imirundi bikozwe mu miringa; kandi yar’ afise agakobero k’umuringa nyene gatendera inyuma mu butīkorwa.
1Samuel17:7 Uruti rw’icumu ryiwe rwāngana n’umwaro ujishirwakw impuzu
1Samuel17:8 Arahagarara
1Samuel17:9 Ni yashobora kundwanya akanyica
1Samuel17:10 Uwo Mufilisitiya arongera aravuga
1Samuel17:11 Maze Sauli n’Abisirayeli bose bumvise ayo magambo y’Umufilisitiya
1Samuel17:12 Kandi Dawidi yar’ umwana wa wa Munyefurata w’i Betelehemu h’i Buyuda yitwa Isayi; Isayi yar’ afise abahungu munani; kand’ igihe Sauli yīma Isayi yar’ ashitse mu zabukuru.
1Samuel17:13 Kand’ abahungu batatu bakuru ba Isayi bāri bāratabaranye na Sauli; amazina y’abo bahungu biwe batatu bātabaye
1Samuel17:14 Dawidi ni we yar’ umuhererezi; kand’ abo bakuru be batatu bāri bāratabaranye na Sauli.
1Samuel17:15 Kandi Dawidi yaja agīshanya imbu
1Samuel17:16 Nuk’ uwo Mufilisitiya
1Samuel17:17 Bukeye Isayi abarira umuhungu wiwe Dawidi
1Samuel17:18 Kand’ ugemurire umugabisha w’umuce barimwo
1Samuel17:19 Kandi Sauli n’abo bakuru ba Dawidi n’ingabo zose z’Abisirayeli bāri kuri wa mwonga Ela bashāmiranye n’Abafilisitiya.
1Samuel17:20 Nuko Dawidi akoroka kare
1Samuel17:21 Nukw Abisirayeli batonda urugamba
1Samuel17:22 Maze Dawidi abītsa ivyo yar’ agemuye ūsigarana ibintu vy’intēkera
1Samuel17:23 Akirikw arayāga na bo
1Samuel17:24 Abisirayeli bose bamubonye
1Samuel17:25 Abisirayeli baravuga
1Samuel17:26 Maze Dawidi abaza abantu bahagaze i ruhande yiwe
1Samuel17:27 Abantu bamwishura nk’ivyo bari bahejeje kuvuga
1Samuel17:28 Maze Eliyabu mukuru we
1Samuel17:29 Dawidi aramwishura
1Samuel17:30 Arahindukira
1Samuel17:31 Bumvise amajambo Dawidi avuga
1Samuel17:32 Dawidi ashitse
1Samuel17:33 Sauli yishura Dawidi
1Samuel17:34 Dawidi yishura Sauli
1Samuel17:35 twāca tugerekerana nkagikubita
1Samuel17:36 Non’ umusavyi wawe ko namaze kwica intambge n’idubu
1Samuel17:37 Dawidi atakw aravuga
1Samuel17:38 Maze Sauli yambika Dawidi imyambaro yiwe
1Samuel17:39 Dawidi araheza ahagatira inkota yiwe hejuru y’iyo myambaro
1Samuel17:40 Araheza ahitana inkoni yiwe
1Samuel17:41 Wa Mufilisitiya na we aza guhūra na Dawidi
1Samuel17:42 Nuko wa Mufilisitiya abonye Dawidi
1Samuel17:43 Wa Mufilisitiya abaza Dawidi
1Samuel17:44 Uwo Mufilisitiya abarira Dawidi
1Samuel17:45 Dawidi yishura uwo Mufilisitiya
1Samuel17:46 Uyu musi Uhoraho arakugabuye mu maboko yanje; ngira nkwice
1Samuel17:47 kand’ iri koraniro ryose rimenye yuk’ Uhoraho adakirisha inkota cank’ icumu
1Samuel17:48 Nuko wa Mufilisitiya atanguye kuza ngw ahūre na Dawidi
1Samuel17:49 Maze Dawidi atuma ukuboko mw isaho yiwe
1Samuel17:50 Uko ni ko Dawidi yagangahuje uwo Mufilisitiya ibuye yateresheje umugozi
1Samuel17:51 Maze Dawidi arirukanga
1Samuel17:52 Maz’ ingabo z’Abisirayeli n’iz’ Abayuda zikūra hasi
1Samuel17:53 Abisirayeli baraheza bava inyuma y’ Abafilisitiya
1Samuel17:54 Maze Dawidi afata umutwe wa wa Mufilisitiya
1Samuel17:55 Igihe Sauli yabona Dawidi agiye kurwana na wa Mufilisitiya
1Samuel17:56 Umwami aramwishura
1Samuel17:57 Hanyuma Dawidi atabarutse
1Samuel17:58 Sauli aramubaza
1Samuel18:1 Nuko Dawidi amaze kugānīra na Sauli
1Samuel18:2 Maz’ uwo musi Sauli aca agumya Dawidi
1Samuel18:3 Bukeye Yonatani asezerana isezerano na Dawidi
1Samuel18:4 Yonatani yikiza umutamana wiwe yari yambaye
1Samuel18:5 Nuko Dawidi yama agenda aho Sauli yamutuma hose
1Samuel18:6 Maze mw itabaruka ryabo
1Samuel18:7 Mur’ ukwo kuvyina
1Samuel18:8 Sauli aca arashangashirwa
1Samuel18:9 Kuva uyo musi Sauli yama arāba Dawidi ijisho ribi.
1Samuel18:10 Bukeye impwemu mbi irungitswe n’Imana iza kuri Sauli akābushūngwe
1Samuel18:11 Araheza ararirekura
1Samuel18:12 Maze Sauli atinya Dawidi
1Samuel18:13 Ni co catumye amwigizayo
1Samuel18:14 Kandi Dawidi yagira ikiganza ciza mu vyo yakora vyose
1Samuel18:15 Maze Sauli abonye ukuntu agira ikiganza ciza
1Samuel18:16 Arikw Abisirayeli n’Abayuda bose bākunda Dawidi
1Samuel18:17 Bukeye Sauli abarira Dawidi
1Samuel18:18 Ariko Dawidi abarira Sauli
1Samuel18:19 Arikw igihe Merabu uwo mukobga wa Sauli yar’ akwiye gushingirwa Dawidi
1Samuel18:20 Hanyuma Mikali umukobga wa Sauli agomwa Dawidi; babibgira Sauli
1Samuel18:21 Aravuga
1Samuel18:22 Nuko Sauli abarira abantu biwe
1Samuel18:23 Nukw abo bantu ba Sauli babarira Dawidi ayo majambo; Dawidi arabishura
1Samuel18:24 Hanyuma abo bantu ba Sauli baramubarira
1Samuel18:25 Maze Sauli arababarira
1Samuel18:26 Nukw abo bantu biwe bamaze kubarira Dawidi ayo majambo
1Samuel18:27 Igihe gishinzwe kitaragera
1Samuel18:28 Kandi Sauli amenya yuk’ Uhoraho ari kumwe na Dawidi
1Samuel18:29 Nuko Sauli arushiriza gutinya Dawidi
1Samuel18:30 Bukeye abaganwa b’Abafilisitiya baza gutera; kand’ uko bātera kwose
1Samuel19:1 Bukeye Sauli abarira Yonatani umuhungu wiwe bo n’ abantu biwe bose ngo bice Dawidi. Ariko Yonatani mwene Sauli yakunda Dawidi cane.
1Samuel19:2 Nukw abūrira Dawidi
1Samuel19:3 Nanje nzogenda mpagararane na data ku musozi ah’ uzoba uri nyene
1Samuel19:4 Bukeye Yonatani avugana na se Sauli
1Samuel19:5 kuko yahevye amagara yiwe
1Samuel19:6 Nuko Sauli yumvira Yonatani
1Samuel19:7 Yonatani arahava ahamagara Dawidi
1Samuel19:8 Bukeye hasubira kuba intambara; Dawidi aratabara
1Samuel19:9 Bukeye ya mpwemu mbi irungitswe n’Uhoraho iza kuri Sauli
1Samuel19:10 Sauli agerageza gusākiza Dawidi icumu
1Samuel19:11 Maze Sauli atuma abantu ngo baje kwa Dawidi
1Samuel19:12 Nuko Mikali acisha Dawidi mw idirisha
1Samuel19:13 Mikali araheza ahitana terafimu
1Samuel19:14 Nukw izo ntumwa Sauli yarungitse gufata Dawidi
1Samuel19:15 Hanyuma Sauli yongera gutuma izo ntumwa ngo barābe Dawidi
1Samuel19:16 Nukw izo ntumwa zinjiye zisanga terafimu ari yo iri ku buriri
1Samuel19:17 Sauli abimenye
1Samuel19:18 Nuko Dawidi ni kwo guhunga agacika
1Samuel19:19 Maze babgira Sauli
1Samuel19:20 Nuko Sauli atuma abantu gufata Dawidi: bashitseyo
1Samuel19:21 Babibgiye Sauli
1Samuel19:22 Araheza arisidukira
1Samuel19:23 Aca agenda i Nayoti i Rama; maze Mpwemu w’Imana amuzako na we
1Samuel19:24 Ashitseyo yīkiza impuzu ziwe
1Samuel20:1 Nuko Dawidi arahunga
1Samuel20:2 Na we aramwishura
1Samuel20:3 Dawidi aramwishura
1Samuel20:4 Maze Yonatani yishura Dawidi
1Samuel20:5 Dawidi aramwishura
1Samuel20:6 maze so ni yaramuka andāvye akambura
1Samuel20:7 Maze ni yavuga
1Samuel20:8 Nuko rer’ ungirire neza
1Samuel20:9 Yonatani aramwishura
1Samuel20:10 Maze Dawidi abaza Yonatani
1Samuel20:11 Yonatani aramubarira
1Samuel20:12 Nuko Yonatani abarira Dawidi
1Samuel20:13 Ariko data ni yaramuka agomba kukugirira nabi
1Samuel20:14 Namba nzoba nkibayeho
1Samuel20:15 na ho ni napfa
1Samuel20:16 Nuko Yonatani asezerana isezerano n’inzu ya Dawidi
1Samuel20:17 Nuko Yonatani yongera kurahiza Dawidi kubg’ urukundo yamukunda
1Samuel20:18 Maze Yonatani aramubarira
1Samuel20:19 Maze ku musi ugira gatatu
1Samuel20:20 Nanje nzorasa imyampi itatu i ruhande yaco
1Samuel20:21 nce ntuma umwana
1Samuel20:22 Ariko ni nabarira nya muhungu
1Samuel20:23 Kand’ iri jambo tuvuganye twe nawe
1Samuel20:24 Nuko Dawidi yinyegeza ku musozi; bukeye ukwezi kubonetse
1Samuel20:25 Kandi yar’ avyagiye ku ntebe yiwe
1Samuel20:26 Yamara Sauli kur’ uwo musi ntiyagira ico avuga
1Samuel20:27 Ku musi ugira kabiri
1Samuel20:28 Yonatani aramwishura
1Samuel20:29 yarambgiye ngo ndamutabare ndamurekure
1Samuel20:30 Maz’ uburake bga Sauli buziriringira Yonatani
1Samuel20:31 Erega mwene Isayi agihumeka
1Samuel20:32 Maze Yonatani yishura se Sauli
1Samuel20:33 Sauli amutera icumu ngw amwice; bituma Yonatani amenya ko se yamaramaje kwica Dawidi.
1Samuel20:34 Maze Yonatani aca ava ku meza afise ishavu ryinshi; kur’ uwo musi ugira kabiri w’ukwezi ntiyagira ico atamira na mba
1Samuel20:35 Bukeye mu gitondo Yonatani aja kuri wa musozi mu gihe yaraganye na Dawidi
1Samuel20:36 Maz’ abarira uwo mwana
1Samuel20:37 Nya mwana ashitse aho Yonatani arashe umwampi
1Samuel20:38 Yongera kumutera akamo
1Samuel20:39 Arik’ uwo mwana ntiyagira ico amenya; Yonatani na Dawidi bonyene ni bo bāri babizi.
1Samuel20:40 Maze Yonatani aha uwo mwana umuheto wiwe n’imyampi
1Samuel20:41 Nuk’ uwo mwana amaze kugenda
1Samuel20:42 Maze Yonatani abarira Dawidi
1Samuel21:1 Maze Dawidi aja i Nobu kwa Ahimeleki umuherezi; Ahimeleki aza kumusanganira ahinda agashitsi; aramubaza
1Samuel21:2 Dawidi yishura Ahimeleki umuherezi
1Samuel21:3 Mbega nta kazimano? Ntabaza udutsima dutanu
1Samuel21:4 Uwo muherezi yishura Dawidi
1Samuel21:5 Dawidi yishura uwo muherezi
1Samuel21:6 Nuk’ uwo muherezi amuha imitsima yejejwe
1Samuel21:7 Kur’ uwo musi nyene hār’ umuntu umwe wo mu basavyi ba Sauli yari yashībijwe ngw agume imbere y’Uhoraho
1Samuel21:8 Dawidi abaza Ahimeleki
1Samuel21:9 Uwo muherezi aramwishura
1Samuel21:10 Uwo musi Dawidi arahaguruka ahunga Sauli
1Samuel21:11 Abantu ba Akishi baramubarira
1Samuel21:12 Ayo magambo atuma Dawidi ahagarika umutima
1Samuel21:13 Araheza yigira ukundi imbere yabo
1Samuel21:14 Akishi abarira abo bantu biwe
1Samuel21:15 Mbega har’ abasazi nari nkennye mu ko munzanira uru rugabo kunsarira imbere? Urugabo nk’uru rwongīra mu nzu?
1Samuel22:1 Nuko Dawidi avayo
1Samuel22:2 Kand’ umuntu wese yari mu magorwa
1Samuel22:3 Bukeye Dawidi aja i Misipa h’i Mowabu
1Samuel22:4 Nukw abashikiriza umwami w’i Mowabu; baba i we igihe cose Dawidi yamaze mw isenga.
1Samuel22:5 Bukeye ūvugishwa n’Imana Gadi abarira Dawidi
1Samuel22:6 Bukeye Sauli yumva ko Dawidi n’abo bari kumwe har’ abababonye; kandi yar’ avyāgiye musi y’igiti c’umwesheli ku gatwe k’ umusozi i Gibeya; yar’ afise icumu mu minwe
1Samuel22:7 Sauli abaza abo bagendanyi biwe bamuhagaze irya n’ino
1Samuel22:8 ngo bitume mwese mungarariza? Kw ata n’umwe yarushe ammenyesha k’umwana wanje yasezeranye na mwene Isayi
1Samuel22:9 Maze Dowegi w’Umunyedomu
1Samuel22:10 na we amusiguriza Uhoraho
1Samuel22:11 Umwami avyumvise
1Samuel22:12 Bashitse
1Samuel22:13 Sauli aramubaza
1Samuel22:14 Ahimeleki yishura umwami
1Samuel22:15 Ugira ngo ni bgo bga mbere kumusiguriza Imana? Ntibikabeho ko nokora nk’ivyo! Mugenzi
1Samuel22:16 Umwami aramwishura
1Samuel22:17 Umwami araheza abarira abashibamyi bamukikije
1Samuel22:18 Maz’ umwami abarira Dowegi
1Samuel22:19 Maz’ i Nobu
1Samuel22:20 Arik’ umwe mu bahungu ba Ahimeleki mwene Ahitubu
1Samuel22:21 Abikira Dawidi ko Sauli yagesheje abaherezi b’ Uhoraho.
1Samuel22:22 Dawidi abarira Abiyatari
1Samuel22:23 N’ugume aho ndi

1Samuel23:2 Nuko Dawidi asiguza Uhoraho
1Samuel23:3 Arikw ingabo za Dawidi ziramubaza
1Samuel23:4 Nuko Dawidi yongera gusiguza Uhoraho. Uhoraho aramwishura
1Samuel23:5 Nuko Dawidi ahagurukana n’ingabo ziwe
1Samuel23:6 Kand’ igihe Abiyatari mwene Ahimeleki yahungira iyo Dawidi ari
1Samuel23:7 Bukeye babarira Sauli yuko Dawidi yagiye i Keyila; Sauli aravuga
1Samuel23:8 Nuko Sauli ahamagaza ingabo zose ngo zitabare

1Samuel23:10 Nuko Dawidi arasenga

1Samuel23:12 Maze Dawidi arongera arabaza
1Samuel23:13 Nuko Dawidi ahagurukana n’ingabo ziwe
1Samuel23:14 Nuko Dawidi aba mu masenga yo mu bugaragwa
1Samuel23:15 Maze Dawidi abonye ko Sauli amurondera ngw amwice

1Samuel23:17 Aramubarira

1Samuel23:20 None rero mugenzi
1Samuel23:21 Sauli arabishura
1Samuel23:22 None rero ni mugende
1Samuel23:23 Nuko murābe mwitegereze utunyegero twiwe twose aho yihisha; muheze mungarukanire inkuru y’imvāho

1Samuel24:1 Bukeye Sauli atabarutse
1Samuel24:2 Nuko Sauli ahitana ingabo ibihumbi bitatu zitoranijwe mu Bisirayeli bose
1Samuel24:3 Nukw araza
1Samuel24:4 Maz’ izo ngabo za Dawidi ziramubarira
1Samuel24:5 Hanyuma Dawidi yumva umutima umuseka
1Samuel24:6 Maz’ abarira ingabo ziwe
1Samuel24:7 Uko ni ko Dawidi yatesheje ingabo ziwe

1Samuel24:9 Nuko Dawidi aramubaza
1Samuel24:10 Aho ntubonye k’Uhoraho yar’ akugabuye mu maboko yanje uyu musi
1Samuel24:11 Kandi ga muvyeyi
1Samuel24:12 Uhoraho n’aducire urubanza twe nawe

1Samuel24:14 None ga mwami w’Abisirayeli

1Samuel24:17 Abarira Dawidi

1Samuel24:19 Mbeg’ umuntu yobona umwansi wiwe
1Samuel24:20 Kandi rero ndazi k’utazobura kuba umwami
1Samuel24:21 None rero ndahira Uhoraho k’utazorandura uruvyaro rwanje
1Samuel24:22 Nuko Dawidi aramurahira. Sauli araheza yisubirira i we
1Samuel25:1 Maze Samweli apfuye
1Samuel25:2 Hār’ umuntu w’i Mayoni
1Samuel25:3 Uwo muntu yitwa Nabali
1Samuel25:4 Maze Dawidi ari mu bugaragwa yumva ko Nabali arikw arakemuza intama ziwe.
1Samuel25:5 Nuko Dawidi atuma abahungu b’imisore cumi
1Samuel25:6 mubgire uwo mutungwa
1Samuel25:7 Muti Yumvise k’ufise abantu bariko barakemura; muti Kand’ abungere bawe bābāna na bo
1Samuel25:8 Muti Baza imikangara yawe barabikubarira; muti Ngo Kandi natwe abantu biwe utugirire ubuntu
1Samuel25:9 Abo bahungu bo kwa Dawidi bashitse
1Samuel25:10 Nabali yishura abo bantu ba Dawidi
1Samuel25:11 None ntore imitsima yanje n’amazi yanje n’inyama nabāgiye abakemuzi banje
1Samuel25:12 Nukw iyo mikangara ya Dawidi barahindukira
1Samuel25:13 Nuko Dawidi abarira abantu biwe
1Samuel25:14 Maz’ umwe mu mikangara ya Nabali abarira Abigayili muka Nabali
1Samuel25:15 Arikw abo bantu bāhora batugirira neza cane
1Samuel25:16 bātubereye uruzitiro rudukingira mw ijoro no ku murango igihe cose twāmaranye na bo turagiye intama.
1Samuel25:17 None rer’ ubimenye
1Samuel25:18 Maze Abigayili arakwakwanya
1Samuel25:19 Abarira abantu biwe
1Samuel25:20 Nukw akimanuka ari ku ndogoba yiwe
1Samuel25:21 Kandi Dawidi yari yāvuze
1Samuel25:22 Ni bgāca hakir’ izinamuhungu n’umwe nja gusiga mu bantu biwe
1Samuel25:23 Nuko Abigayili abonye Dawidi
1Samuel25:24 yitembagaza imbere y’ ibirenge vyiwe
1Samuel25:25 Ndakwinginze

1Samuel25:27 None rero mwami wanje

1Samuel25:29 Kandi nah’ abantu bagukūriye hasi ngo baguhīge
1Samuel25:30 Nuko mugenzi
1Samuel25:31 ntuzohava wicuza canke ngo wītek’ umwikomo ko wavishije amaraso ata nyanduruko

1Samuel25:33 hahezagirwe n’ubgenge bgawe

1Samuel27:2 Nuko Dawidi arahaguruka

1Samuel27:5 Maze Dawidi abarira Akishi

1Samuel27:7 Igihe Dawidi yamaze mu gihugu c’Abafilisitiya n’ umwaka n’amezi ane.

1Samuel28:5 Sauli abonye ingabo z’Abafilisitiya

1Samuel28:17 Uhoraho yakugiriye nk’uko yari yarabivugiye muri jewe. Akunyaze ingoma
1Samuel28:18 kuk’ utumviye Uhoraho

1Samuel28:21 Maze nya mupfumukazi aza aho Sauli ari
1Samuel28:22 None rero ndakwinginze
1Samuel28:23 Aranka
1Samuel28:24 Kandi nya mupfumukazi yar’ afise imasa inuze mu ruhongore; aranyanyasa arayikerera

1Samuel29:8 Dawidi abaza Akishi

1Samuel30:2 bānyaze abagore n’abāri mur’ ico gisagara bose

1Samuel30:10 Ariko Dawidi araramiriza

1Samuel30:12 bamuha n’ikimanyu c’irobe ribumbabumbge mu nsukoni

1Samuel30:15 Dawidi aramubaza
1Samuel30:16 Nukw amumanukanye
1Samuel30:17 Dawidi aca ashirakw arabica
1Samuel30:18 Dawidi yigarukanira ivyo Abamaleki bari banyaze vyose

1Samuel30:20 Dawidi anyaga intama n’inka zose

1Samuel30:22 Maz’ abantu bose b’abanyakibi b’abagesera mu bāri bājanye na Dawidi baravuga
1Samuel30:23 Ariko Dawidi arababarira
1Samuel30:24 Har’ uwokwemera iyo nama yanyu? Uwagiye mu ntambara n’uwasigaye ku bintu bararinganiza umutigiri: baragabangana banganye.
1Samuel30:25 Nuk’ uhereye uwo musi abigira icagezwe n’ibgirizwa mu Bisirayeli na bugingo n’ ubu.
1Samuel30:26 Maze Dawidi ashitse i Sikulagi
1Samuel30:27 Abirungikira ab’i Beteli
1Samuel30:28 n’ab’i Aroweri
1Samuel30:29 n’ab’i Rakala
1Samuel30:30 n’ab’i Horuma
1Samuel30:31 n’ ab’i Heburoni
1Samuel31:1 Nukw Abafilisitiya batera Abisirayeli
1Samuel31:2 Abafilisitiya bakinagiza Sauli n’abahungu biwe
1Samuel31:3 Urubgamba rusugereza Sauli
1Samuel31:4 Maze Sauli abarira ūmutwaje ibirwanishwa
1Samuel31:5 Uno yamutwaza ibirwanishwa abonye ko Sauli apfuye
1Samuel31:6 Uko ni ko Sauli yapfuye
1Samuel31:7 Maz’ ingabo z’Abisirayeli zo hakurya y’umwonga n’izo hakurya ya Yorodani
1Samuel31:8 Bukeye bgaho
1Samuel31:9 Bamuca izosi
1Samuel31:10 Ibirwanishwa vyiwe babishira mu rusengero rwa Ashitaroti
