1Samuel31:12 abahizi bose barahaguruka
1Samuel31:13 Maze bābīra amagufa yabo
2Samuel1:1 Sauli amaze gutanga
2Samuel1:2 ku musi ugira gatatu haza umuntu avuye aho Sauli yar’ ashagaje
2Samuel1:3 Dawidi aramubaza
2Samuel1:4 Dawidi aramubaza
2Samuel1:5 Maze Dawidi abaza uwo muhungu amubikiye
2Samuel1:6 Nya muhungu amubikiye aramwishura
2Samuel1:7 Maze Sauli akebutse inyuma arambona
2Samuel1:8 Arambaza
2Samuel1:9 Arambarira
2Samuel1:10 Nuko ndamwēgēra
2Samuel1:11 Maze Dawidi afata impuzu ziwe
2Samuel1:12 baraboroga
2Samuel1:13 Dawidi abaza uno muhungu amubikiye
2Samuel1:14 Dawidi aramubaza
2Samuel1:15 Dawidi araheza ahamagara umwe mu basore
2Samuel1:16 Dawidi aramubarira
2Samuel1:17 Maze Dawidi acura intimba ya Sauli n’umuhungu wiwe Yonatani;
2Samuel1:18 avyita Agacurantimba k’Umuheto
2Samuel1:19 At’ Ewe Isirayeli
2Samuel1:20 Ntimukabikerutse i Gati
2Samuel1:21 Yemwe misozi y’i Gilibowa
2Samuel1:22 Umuheto wa Yonatani ntiwatabaruka Utanyoye amaraso y’abishwe
2Samuel1:23 Ewe kuntu Sauli na Yonatani bākundwa
2Samuel1:24 Yemwe bakobga b’Abisirayeli
2Samuel1:25 Ewe kuntu abahizi bāguye mu ntambara hagati! Yonatani arambaraye ku mpinga y’umusozi wawe
2Samuel1:26 Unteye akabonge
2Samuel1:27 Ewe kuntu abahizi bāguye
2Samuel2:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo
2Samuel2:2 Nuko Dawidi adūganayo n’abagore biwe bompi
2Samuel2:3 Adūgana n’abantu biwe
2Samuel2:4 Bukeye abantu b’i Buyuda baraza
2Samuel2:5 Nuko Dawidi atuma intumwa ku b’i Yabeshi‐gileyadi
2Samuel2:6 Nuko rer’ Uhoraho abagirire ikigongwe ababere umwizigirwa; nanje nyene nzobishura ico kigongwe mwāgize
2Samuel2:7 None rero
2Samuel2:8 Kandi Abuneri mwene Neri
2Samuel2:9 Aramwimika ngw abe umwami w’i Gileyadi n’ uw’ Abashuri n’uw’ i Yezireli n’ uw’ Abefurayimu n’uw’ Ababenyamini n’uw’ Abisirayeli bose.
2Samuel2:10 Kandi Ishibosheti mwene Sauli
2Samuel2:11 Kandi Dawidi igihe yamaze i Heburoni ar’ umwami w’umuryango w’ Abayuda
2Samuel2:12 Bukeye Abuneri mwene Neri
2Samuel2:13 Yowabu umwana wa Seruwiya na we
2Samuel2:14 Abuneri abarira Yowabu
2Samuel2:15 Nuko bava hasi
2Samuel2:16 Bose barasūmirana
2Samuel2:17 Uwo musi haca haba intambara ihambaye cane; Abuneri n’Abisirayeli baraneshwa
2Samuel2:18 Kand’ abana ba Seruwiya ukw ari batatu
2Samuel2:19 Maze Asaheli yōma kuri Abuneri
2Samuel2:20 Maze Abuneri akebutse inyuma
2Samuel2:21 Abuneri aramubarira
2Samuel2:22 Abuneri asubira kubarira Asaheli
2Samuel2:23 Ariko na ho nyene yanka gukebereza i ruhande
2Samuel2:24 Ariko Yowabu na Abishayi bakurikira Abuneri; izuba rirenga bafashe ku musozi Ama
2Samuel2:25 Maz’ Ababenyamini biyegeraniriza kuri Abuneri
2Samuel2:26 Maze Abuneri atera akamo Yowabu
2Samuel2:27 Yowabu aramwishura
2Samuel2:28 Nuko Yowabu aca avuza inzamba
2Samuel2:29 Nuko Abuneri n’ingabo ziwe bakesha iryo joro bajanye ikiyaya Araba; bajabuka Yorodani
2Samuel2:30 Yowabu na we arahindukira
2Samuel2:31 Arikw ingabo za Dawidi zari zishe abantu amajana atatu na mirongwitandatu mu Babenyamini no mu ngabo za Abuneri.
2Samuel2:32 Nuko baterura Asaheli
2Samuel3:1 Nuko haba intambara kumara igihe kirekire hagati y’ab’ inzu ya Sauli n’ab’ iya Dawidi; Dawidi agenda arushiriza kuba agahambaye
2Samuel3:2 Abana b’abahungu Dawidi yavyariye i Heburoni
2Samuel3:3 uwa kabiri ni Kileyabu
2Samuel3:4 uwa kane ni Adoniya
2Samuel3:5 uwa gatandatu ni Itureyamu
2Samuel3:6 Ico gihe c’intambara y’ab’ inzu ya Sauli n’ab’ iya Dawidi
2Samuel3:7 Kandi Sauli yar’ afise incoreke yari yaragize umugore
2Samuel3:8 Ayo majambo ya Ishibosheti ashavuza Abuneri cane; aramwishura
2Samuel3:9 Imana iz’ ibimpanire
2Samuel3:10 ngakūra ingoma mu nzu ya Sauli
2Samuel3:11 Maze Ishibosheti ntiyaronka irindi na rimwe yishura Abuneri
2Samuel3:12 Bukeye Abuneri atuma intumwa kuri Dawidi
2Samuel3:13 Dawidi arishura
2Samuel3:14 Maze Dawidi atuma intumwa kuri Ishibosheti mwene Sauli
2Samuel3:15 Nuko Ishibosheti aratuma
2Samuel3:16 Maz’ uwo mugabo wiwe aramuherekeza
2Samuel3:17 Bukeye Abuneri aja inama n’ abakuru bo mu Bisirayeli
2Samuel3:18 none rero ni mubirāngūre; kuk’ Uhoraho yavuze ivya Dawidi
2Samuel3:19 Abuneri abibarira n’ Ababenyamini na bo. Bukeye aja i Heburoni
2Samuel3:20 Nukw ashitse i Heburoni kwa Dawidi
2Samuel3:21 Maze Abuneri abarira Dawidi
2Samuel3:22 Maze Yowabu n’abantu ba Dawidi baragaruka bavuye gutera
2Samuel3:23 Nuko Yowabu n’ingabo ziwe zose bagishika bartya
2Samuel3:24 Maze Yowabu aragenda abaza umwami
2Samuel3:25 Aho ntuzi yuko Abuneri mwene Neri yazanywe no kuguhenda
2Samuel3:26 Nuko Yowabu
2Samuel3:27 Nuko Abuneri ashitse i Heburoni
2Samuel3:28 Hanyuma Dawidi avyumvise
2Samuel3:29 arikw arasubira ku mutwe wa Yowabu no ku b’inzu ya se bose; mu nzu ya Yowabu ntihakabure umunyagisokoro
2Samuel3:30 Uko ni ko Yowabu na Abishayi murumuna we bishe Abuneri
2Samuel3:31 Dawidi araheza abarira Yowabu n’abari kumwe na we bose
2Samuel3:32 Nuko Abuneri bamuhamba i Heburoni
2Samuel3:33 Umwami acurira intimba Abuneri
2Samuel3:34 Amaboko yawe kw atar’ aboshwe
2Samuel3:35 Hanyuma abantu bose baza kwinginga Dawidi ngw afūngure hakiri ku murango; ariko Dawidi ararahira
2Samuel3:36 Abantu bose babibonye birabanezera; mber’ ivy’ umwami yakora vyose vyagenda binezera abantu bose.
2Samuel3:37 Nuk’ uwo musi abantu bose n’Abisirayeli bose bamenya ko bitāvuye ku mwami kwica Abuneri mwene Neri.
2Samuel3:38 Maz’ umwami abarira abantu biwe
2Samuel3:39 Kandi nanje naho nd’umwami yimikishijwe amavuta
2Samuel4:1 Bukeye Ishibosheti mwene Sauli yumvise ko Abuneri yaguye i Heburoni
2Samuel4:2 Kandi mwene Sauli uwo yar’ afise abagabisha babiri b’ imice y’ingabo
2Samuel4:3 kand’ ab’ i Beroti bari barahungiye i Gitayimu
2Samuel4:4 Kandi Yonatani mwene Sauli yar’ afise umwana yamugaye ibirenge. Igihe imbitsi yaza ivuye i Yezireli kubika Sauli na Yonatani
2Samuel4:5 Bukeye bene Rimona w’i Beroti
2Samuel4:6 Kand’ incoreke ikumīra yari yamye aragosora ingano
2Samuel4:7 Bīteye mu ngoro
2Samuel4:8 Maz’ uwo mutwe wa Ishibosheti bawushīra umwami Dawidi i Heburoni
2Samuel4:9 Maze Dawidi yishura Rekabu na mwene nyina Bayana
2Samuel4:10 igihe umuntu yaje kumbarira
2Samuel4:11 None mbega
2Samuel4:12 Maze Dawidi abarira imisore yamugendanira
2Samuel5:1 Bukeye imiryango yose y’ Abisirayeli ija i Heburoni kwa Dawidi
2Samuel5:2 Kandi mu bihe vya kera
2Samuel5:3 Uko ni kw abashingantahe bose b’Abisirayeli bāshengereye umwami i Heburoni; nuk’ umwami Dawidi asezeranira na bo isezerano imbere y’Uhoraho i Heburoni nyene; bamwimikisha amavuta ngw abe umwami w’Abisirayeli.
2Samuel5:4 Kandi Dawidi yimye amaze imyaka mirongwitatu avutse; amara imyaka mirongwine ku ngoma.
2Samuel5:5 Yamaze imyaka ndwi n’amezi atandatu i Heburoni
2Samuel5:6 Igihe umwami Dawidi yaja i Yerusalemu n’ingabo ziwe gutera Abayebusi
2Samuel5:7 Ariko Dawidi atsinda iboma ry’i Siyoni
2Samuel5:8 Uwo musi Dawidi aravuga
2Samuel5:9 Nuko Dawidi aba mur’ iryo boma
2Samuel5:10 Nuko Dawidi arushiriza kuba agahambaye
2Samuel5:11 Bukeye Hiramu umwami w’i Tiro atuma intumwa kuri Dawidi
2Samuel5:12 Nuko Dawidi aca atahura yuk’ Uhoraho ari we yamuteretse ngw abe umwami w’ Abisirayeli
2Samuel5:13 Maze Dawidi yābīrira i Yerusalemu abandi bamikazi
2Samuel5:14 Aya ni yo mazina y’abo yavyariye i Yerusalemu: Shamuwa na Shobabu na Natani na Salomo
2Samuel5:15 na Ibuhari na Elishuwa na Nefegi na Yafiya
2Samuel5:16 na Elishama na Eliyada na Elifeleti.
2Samuel5:17 Maz’ Abafilisitiya bumvise ko Dawidi yimikishijwe amavuta ngw abe umwami w’Abisirayeli
2Samuel5:18 Kand’ abo Bafilisitiya bari baje
2Samuel5:19 Maze Dawidi asiguza Uhoraho
2Samuel5:20 Nuko Dawidi aja i Bayali‐perasimu
2Samuel5:21 Abafilisitiya batayo ibigirwamana vyabo; Dawidi n’ ingabo ziwe barabijana.
2Samuel5:22 Bukeye Abafilisitiya basubira kudūga ubugira kabiri
2Samuel5:23 Maze Dawidi asiguje Uhoraho
2Samuel5:24 Maze ni wumva imirindi y’ingabo ihindira hejuru kur’ iyo mibaka
2Samuel5:25 Nuko Dawidi abigenza artyo
2Samuel6:1 Bukeye Dawidi yongera gukoranya ingabo zose zatoranijwe mu Bisirayeli; bār’ ibihumbi mirongwitatu.
2Samuel6:2 Dawidi ahagurukana n’abo bantu bose bari kumwe na we
2Samuel6:3 Nuko bashira iyo sandugu y’Imana ku mukogote musha
2Samuel6:4 Uko ni ko bākūye iyo sandugu y’ Imana kwa Abinadabu kur’ uwo musozi
2Samuel6:5 Dawidi n’umuryango wose w’Abisirayeli bagenda biyereka biginagura
2Samuel6:6 Maze bashitse ku mbuga ya Nakoni
2Samuel6:7 Maz’ uburake bg’Uhoraho buziriringira Uza
2Samuel6:8 Bibabaza Dawidi k’ Uhoraho yahwikiye Uza; aho hantu haca hitwa Peresi‐uza
2Samuel6:9 Uwo musi Dawidi aca aterwa ubgoba n’Uhoraho; aravuga
2Samuel6:10 Nukw iyo sandugu y’Uhoraho Dawidi ntiyakunda kuyijana i we ku murwa wiwe
2Samuel6:11 imara amezi atatu mu nzu yiwe
2Samuel6:12 Bukeye babarira umwami Dawidi
2Samuel6:13 Kand’ uko vyagenze n’uku: abareruye isandugu y’Uhoraho batambutse intambuko zitandatu
2Samuel6:14 Maze Dawidi yiyerekera imbere y’Uhoraho yiginagura; kandi yar’ akenyeye efodi yera derere.
2Samuel6:15 Nuko Dawidi n’umuryango wose w’Abisirayeli badūgana isandugu y’Uhoraho basēsereza impundu
2Samuel6:16 Maz’ isandugu y’Uhoraho igitamaje ku murwa wa Dawidi
2Samuel6:17 Nuko binjiza iyo sandugu y’Uhoraho
2Samuel6:18 Nuko Dawidi amaze kwosa ikimazi no gutanga ibimazi vy’ishimwe
2Samuel6:19 Maz’ agaburira abantu bose bo mur’ iryo shengero ryose ry’Abisirayeli
2Samuel6:20 Dawidi na we asubira i we ngw ahezagire abo mu rugo rwiwe. Maze Mikali umukobga wa Sauli asohoka gusanganira Dawidi
2Samuel6:21 Dawidi yishura Mikali
2Samuel6:22 Mbere nzorushiriza kwigira inkēngērwa
2Samuel6:23 Maze Mikali umukobga wa Sauli ntiyabona akana arinda apfa.
2Samuel7:1 Nuk’ umwami amaze kwinjira ingoro yiwe
2Samuel7:2 abarira ūvugishwa n’Imana Natani
2Samuel7:3 Natani yishura umwami
2Samuel7:4 Arikw iryo joro nyene ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri Natani
2Samuel7:5 riti Genda ubgire umusavyi wanje Dawidi
2Samuel7:6 Ut’ Erega ntiyigeze kuba mu nzu uhereye igihe yadūganiye Abisirayeli abakūye muri Egiputa gushitsa n’ubu. Uti Yahora aba mw ihema nk’ urusago.
2Samuel7:7 Uti Mbeg’ ahantu hose yagiye agendana n’Abisirayeli bose
2Samuel7:8 Nuko rero
2Samuel7:9 uti Kandi yagendana nawe aho waja hose
2Samuel7:10 Uti Kand’ abantu biwe b’ Abisirayeli azobagenera ahantu
2Samuel7:11 nko mu bihe yaha abacamanza kuganza abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli; uti Kand’ azoguha impore hagati y’abansi bawe bose. Uti Mber’ Uhoraho arakubariye yukw azokugira igisata.
2Samuel7:12 Uti Kand’ imisi yawe ni yashika
2Samuel7:13 Ut’ Uwo ni we azomwubakira ingoro
2Samuel7:14 Ut’ Azomubera se
2Samuel7:15 ut’ Arikw imbabazi ziwe ntazozimukūrako nk’uko yazikūye kuri Sauli
2Samuel7:16 Uti Kand’ inzu yawe n’ubgami bgawe bizohora bihamye imbere yiwe
2Samuel7:17 Maz’ ayo majambo yose n’ ukwo kwerekwa kwose
2Samuel7:18 Maz’ umwami Dawidi arinjira
2Samuel7:19 Kand’ ivyo kuri wewe vyari vyoroshe
2Samuel7:20 Non’ ikindi jewe Dawidi nokubgira n’iki? kuk’ uzi umusavyi wawe
2Samuel7:21 Ivyo vyose bikomeye wabikoze kubg’ ijambo ryawe
2Samuel7:22 Ni co gituma ur’ ūhambaye
2Samuel7:23 Har’ irindi hanga na rimwe mw isi rihwanye n’abantu bawe b’Abisirayeli
2Samuel7:24 Ni wewe wahaye abantu bawe b’Abisirayeli gutsindaza
2Samuel7:25 Nuko none
2Samuel7:26 Maz’ izina ryawe baze barishemagize ibihe bidashira
2Samuel7:27 kuk’ umpishuriye
2Samuel7:28 Kandi none
2Samuel7:29 None rero
2Samuel8:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo Dawidi anesha Abafilisitiya
2Samuel8:2 Maz’ anesha Abanyamowabu
2Samuel8:3 Bukeye Dawidi anesha n’ umwami w’i Zoba
2Samuel8:4 Dawidi amunyaga ingabo zigendera ku mafarasi igihumbi n’amajana ndwi
2Samuel8:5 Maz’ Abasiriya b’i Damasiko baje gutabara Hadadezeri umwami w’i Zoba
2Samuel8:6 Araheza akwiragiza amaboma mu gihugu c’i Siriya gikūkira i Damasiko; nukw Abasiriya baba abatwarwa ba Dawidi
2Samuel8:7 Kandi Dawidi yari yaranyaze abantu ba Hadadezeri inkinzo z’izahabu bari bafise
2Samuel8:8 Kand’ umwami Dawidi yari yarasahuye imiringa myinshi cane mu bisagara vya Hadadezeri
2Samuel8:9 Bukeye Toyu umwami w’i Hamati yumvise ko Dawidi yanesheje ingabo zose za Hadadezeri
2Samuel8:10 atuma umuhungu wiwe Yoramu ku mwami Dawidi kumuramutsa no kumushima
2Samuel8:11 Na vyo nyene umwami Dawidi abirobanurira Uhoraho
2Samuel8:12 i Siriya n’i Mowabu no mu Bamoni no mu Bafilisitiya no mu Bamaleki
2Samuel8:13 Nuko Dawidi yironkera izina rya rurangiranwa. Maz’ atabarutse avuye kunesha Abasiriya
2Samuel8:14 Nukw ashira amaboma mu gihugu c’Abanyedomu
2Samuel8:15 Nuko Dawidi yaganza Abisirayeli bose
2Samuel8:16 Kandi Yowabu umwana wa Seruwiya ni we yar’ umugabisha w’ingabo
2Samuel8:17 Sadoki mwene Ahitubu na Ahimeleki mwene Abiyatari ni bo bār’ abaherezi; Seraya ni we yar’ umukarani;
2Samuel8:18 Benaya mwene Yehoyada ni we yagabisha Abakereti n’Abapeleti; kandi bene Dawidi bār’ abakuru b’igihugu.
2Samuel9:1 Bukeye Dawidi arabaza
2Samuel9:2 Maze hār’ umunyarugo wa Sauli yitwa Ziba; nuko baramuhamagara ngo yitabe Dawidi. Umwami aramubaza
2Samuel9:3 Umwami aramubaza
2Samuel9:4 Umwami aramubaza
2Samuel9:5 Maz’ umwami Dawidi aratuma
2Samuel9:6 Nuko Mefibosheti mwene Yonatani umwuzukuru wa Sauli arenguka imbere ya Dawidi; akubita inkoro hasi
2Samuel9:7 Dawidi aramubarira
2Samuel9:8 Arasubira aramwunamira
2Samuel9:9 Umwami araheza ahamagaza Ziba
2Samuel9:10 Nawe uz’ uhore umurimira
2Samuel9:11 Maze Ziba yishura umwami
2Samuel9:12 Kandi Mefibosheti yar’ afise akana k’agahungu kitwa Mika. Nukw abo mu rugo rwa Ziba bose baba abantu ba Mefibosheti.
2Samuel9:13 Nuko Mefibosheti aba i Yerusalemu
2Samuel10:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo umwami w’Abamoni aratanga; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Hanuni asubira ku ngoma yiwe.

2Samuel10:3 Arikw abaganwa b’Abamoni babarira umwami wabo Hanuni
2Samuel10:4 Nuko Hanuni afata abo bantu ba Dawidi
2Samuel10:5 Dawidi abibariwe
2Samuel10:6 Maz’ Abamoni babonye ko bateye Dawidi akayigo
2Samuel10:7 Maze Dawidi avyumvise
2Samuel10:8 Nukw Abamoni basokoroka mu gisagara
2Samuel10:9 Maze Yowabu abonye ko batonze urugamba
2Samuel10:10 Izindi ngabo zose aziha murumuna we Abishayi ngw azigabishe
2Samuel10:11 Maze Yowabu aramubarira
2Samuel10:12 Nuko shira ubgoba
2Samuel10:13 Nuko Yowabu n’ingabo ziri kumwe na we begereza Abasiriya ngo barumaneko; baca bariruka baramuhunga.
2Samuel10:14 Maz’ Abamoni babonye Abasiriya bahunze
2Samuel10:15 Bukeye Abasiriya babonye ko baneshejwe n’Abisirayeli
2Samuel10:16 Maze Hadadezeri atuma no ku Basiriya bo hakurya y’uruzi Efurate
2Samuel10:17 Maze Dawidi abibariwe
2Samuel10:18 Maz’ Abasiriya bahunga Abisirayeli; Dawidi yica mu Basiriya abagendera mu mikogote amajana ndwi y’intambara
2Samuel10:19 Maz’ abami bose baganzwa na Hadadezeri
2Samuel11:1 Nuk’ umwaka utashe
2Samuel11:2 Maz’ umusi ur’ izina ku mugoroba
2Samuel11:3 Nuko Dawidi atuma kubaza uwo mugore uw’ ari we. Baramubarira
2Samuel11:4 Nuko Dawidi atuma intumwa zo kumuzana
2Samuel11:5 Nya mugore asamye inda
2Samuel11:6 Maze Dawidi atuma kuri Yowabu
2Samuel11:7 Uriya amushikiriye
2Samuel11:8 Maze Dawidi aramubarira
2Samuel11:9 Ariko Uriya yīrārira hamwe n’abanyarugo ba shebuja bose
2Samuel11:10 Maze babariye Dawidi
2Samuel11:11 Uriya yishura Dawidi
2Samuel11:12 Maze Dawidi aramubarira
2Samuel11:13 Maze Dawidi aramurengukisha ngw aze kurya no kunywa ar’ imbere yiwe
2Samuel11:14 Bukeye mu gitondo Dawidi yandikira Yowabu icete
2Samuel11:15 Yandika mur’ ico cete
2Samuel11:16 Nuko rero Yowabu
2Samuel11:17 Maz’ abantu bo muri nya gisagara barasokoroka
2Samuel11:18 Maze Yowabu atuma kumenyesha Dawidi ivy’ intambara uko bimeze;

2Samuel11:20 umwami ni yaramuka aratse

2Samuel11:22 Nukw iyo ntumwa iragenda; ishitse
2Samuel11:23 Iramubarira
2Samuel11:24 Kand’ abanyamiheto bari bahagaze ku ruzitiro baturasa
2Samuel11:25 Maze Dawidi yishura iyo ntumwa
2Samuel11:26 Maze muka Uriya yumvise k’ umugabo wiwe yapfuye
2Samuel11:27 Hanyuma agandutse
2Samuel12:1 Bukeye Uhoraho atuma Natani kuri Dawidi; araza
2Samuel12:2 Kand’ uwo mutunzi yar’ afise amasinzi y’intama n’inka.
2Samuel12:3 Ariko nya mworo nta co yar’ afise
2Samuel12:4 Bukeye haza umushitsi kwa nya mutunzi
2Samuel12:5 Maz’ uburake bga Dawidi buca buziriringira uwo muntu; abarira Natani
2Samuel12:6 non’ az’ amurihe uwo mwana w’intama kane
2Samuel12:7 Maze Natani abarira Dawidi
2Samuel12:8 nkwinjiza ingoro ya shobuja
2Samuel12:9 N’iki catumye ukēngēra ijambo ryanje jewe Uhoraho
2Samuel12:10 None rero
2Samuel12:11 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize
2Samuel12:12 Wewe wabikoreye mu mpisho
2Samuel12:13 Maze Dawidi yishura Natani
2Samuel12:14 Ariko kuko wahaye abansi b’Uhoraho urwitwazo rukomeye rwo kumurogotako kubg’ ico wakoze
2Samuel12:15 Natani araheza yitahira i we. Hanyuma Uhoraho atēza indwara wa mwana muka Uriya yavyarana na Dawidi
2Samuel12:16 Ni co catumye Dawidi yinginga Imana kubg’ uwo mwana
2Samuel12:17 Abantu bakuru bo mu rugo rwiwe babibonye bamuhagarara i ruhande
2Samuel12:18 Maze ku musi ugira indwi uwo mwana arapfa; abantu ba Dawidi batinya kumubgira k’umwana acīkānye; bati Mbega ko twamuhanūye umwana akiriho
2Samuel12:19 Maze Dawidi abonye kw abantu biwe bongorerana
2Samuel12:20 Maze Dawidi aca arahaguruka
2Samuel12:21 Maz’ abantu biwe baramubaza
2Samuel12:22 Arabishura
2Samuel12:23 None se kw amaze gupfa
2Samuel12:24 Maze Dawidi yirura umugore wiwe Batisheba
2Samuel12:25 atuma ūvugishwa na we Natani kumwita Yedidiya; agenza artyo nk’uk’ Uhoraho yamubariye.
2Samuel12:26 Kandi Yowabu yar’ akirwanya i Raba h’Abamoni; atsinda iboma ryazigama ivomo ryaho.
2Samuel12:27 Araheza atuma intumwa kuri Dawidi
2Samuel12:28 uti None rero koranya izindi ngabo zisigaye
2Samuel12:29 Nuko Dawidi akoranya ingabo zose
2Samuel12:30 Akūra Milikomu igitsibo mu mutwe

2Samuel13:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo ivyābaye n’ibi: Abusalomu mwene Dawidi yar’ afise mushiki we mwiza w’umunyakaranga
2Samuel13:2 Amunoni atuntuzwa no kwifuza mushiki we Tamari
2Samuel13:3 Ariko Amunoni yar’ afise umugenzi bakundana yitwa Yonadabu mwene Shimeya
2Samuel13:4 Aramubaza
2Samuel13:5 Yonadabu aramubgira
2Samuel13:6 Nuko Amunoni araryama
2Samuel13:7 Maze Dawidi atuma i muhira kuri Tamari
2Samuel13:8 Nuko Tamari aja kwa Amunoni musaza we
2Samuel13:9 Yābīra ico yakaranzeko
2Samuel13:10 Maze Amunoni abarira Tamari
2Samuel13:11 Atumuhēreje ngw arye
2Samuel13:12 Na we aramwishura
2Samuel13:13 Mbega nanje noheza ngakwirwa hehe n’ibitētērwa? Kandi nawe woba ugotse mu Bisirayeli. Enda se n’ubivugane n’umwami
2Samuel13:14 Ariko yanka kwumva ivyo amubgiye; maze kuko yamurusha inkomezi amufata ku kagōbēro
2Samuel13:15 Maze Amunoni aca amwanka urunuka; urwanko yamwanse rwaruse urukundo yamukunda. Aramubgira
2Samuel13:16 Na we aramwishura
2Samuel13:17 Maz’ ahamagara umuntu wiwe amusukurira
2Samuel13:18 Kandi yari yambaye umwambaro muremure w’amaboko
2Samuel13:19 Maze Tamari yiyorera umunyota mu mutwe
2Samuel13:20 Maze Abusalomu musaza we amubonye
2Samuel13:21 Maz’ umwami Dawidi yumvise ivyo vyose

2Samuel13:27 Ariko Abusalomu aramuzigitīra
2Samuel13:28 Nuko Abusalomu arahava abarira abasuku biwe

2Samuel14:1 Bukeye Yowabu umwana wa Seruwiya amenya k’ umwami afitiye inkumbu Abusalomu.

2Samuel19:7 Nuko none n’uhaguruke

2Samuel20:1 Hār’ umuntu w’umugesera yitwa Sheba
2Samuel20:2 Nukw Abisirayeli bose bata Dawidi
2Samuel20:3 Nuk’ umwami Dawidi ashitse i we i Yerusalemu
2Samuel20:4 Maz’ umwami abarira Amasa
2Samuel20:5 Nuko Amasa aja guhamagara Abayuda; arikw arenza imisi umwami yamubariye.
2Samuel20:6 Dawidi araheza abarira Abishayi
2Samuel20:7 Nukw ingabo za Yowabu n’ Abakereti n’Abapeleti n’abahizi bose bakurikira Abishayi; bava i Yerusalemu baja guhīga Sheba mwene Bikuri.
2Samuel20:8 Bashitse ku gitandara kinini c’i Gibeyoni
2Samuel20:9 Yowabu abarira Amasa
2Samuel20:10 Ariko Amasa ntiyagira ico yibaza ku nkota Yowabu yar’ afise mu ntoke; nuko Yowabu ayimuzibura ku nda
2Samuel20:11 Umwe mu ngabo za Yowabu ahagarara hejuru ya Amasa
2Samuel20:12 Kandi Amasa yari hagati mu nzira arambaraye mu maraso yiwe
2Samuel20:13 Nukw amaze gukūrwa mu nzira
2Samuel20:14 Sheba anyuragira mu miryango yose y’Abisirayeli
2Samuel20:15 Maz’ ingabo zose zari kuri Yowabu ziraza
2Samuel20:16 Maz’ umugore w’umunyabgenge wo mur’ ico gisagara ashira ijwi hejuru
2Samuel20:17 Nuko yigira hafi y’ah’ ari; nya mugore aramubaza
2Samuel20:18 Aravuga
2Samuel20:19 Jewe nd’umwe mu bakunda ivy’ amahoro kandi b’abizigirwa mu Bisirayeli; ariko wewe urondera kugeseza igisagara
2Samuel20:20 Yowabu aramwishura
2Samuel20:21 Si ko biri; ariko harih’ umuntu wo mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu yitwa Sheba mwene Bikuri
2Samuel20:22 Maz’ uwo mugore aja mu bantu bose ajanye inama y’ubgenge; na bo baragenda baca izosi Sheba mwene Bikuri
2Samuel20:23 Kandi Yowabu yar’ umugabisha w’ingabo zose z’Abisirayeli; Benaya mwene Yehoyada ni we yagabisha Abakereti n’Abapeleti;
2Samuel20:24 Adoramu na we yagaba ivy’ ikori; Yehoshafati mwene Ahiludi ni we yar’ umwanditsi w’ivyaja biraba;
2Samuel20:25 Shewa yar’ umukarani; Sadoki na Abiyatari ni bo bār’ abaherezi;
2Samuel20:26 Ira w’Umuyayiri na we yar’ umujenama mukuru wa Dawidi.

2Samuel21:2 Maz’ umwami ahamagaza ab’i Gibeyoni
2Samuel21:3 Nuko Dawidi abaza ab’i Gibeyoni
2Samuel21:4 Ab’i Gibeyoni baramwishura
2Samuel21:5 Babgira umwami
2Samuel21:6 ni muduhe abantu ndwi mu bahungu biwe
2Samuel21:7 Arik’ umwami Dawidi arēngāna Mefibosheti mwene Yonatani umwuzukuru wa Sauli
2Samuel21:8 Nuk’ umwami afata abahungu babiri ba Risipa umukobga wa Aya
2Samuel21:9 abagabura mu maboko y’ab’i Gibeyoni; babamanika ku musozi imbere y’ Uhoraho; bose ukw ar indwi bagwa hamwe
2Samuel21:10 Maze Risipa umukobga wa Aya ahitana amagunira
2Samuel21:11 Maze babarira Dawidi ivyo Risipa yakoze
2Samuel21:12 Dawidi araheza aragenda yaka abantu b’i Yabeshi‐gileyadi amagufa ya Sauli n’aya Yonatani umuhungu wiwe
2Samuel21:13 Akūray’ ayo magufa yabo
2Samuel21:14 Nuko bahamba ayo magufa ya Sauli na Yonatani umuhungu wiwe i Sela mu gihugu c’Ababenyamini
2Samuel21:15 Bukeye Abafilisitiya bongera gutera Abisirayeli. Dawidi amanukana n’ingabo ziwe
2Samuel21:16 Maze Ishubi‐benobu
2Samuel21:17 Ariko Abishayi umwana wa Seruwiya aramutabara
2Samuel21:18 Hanyuma y’ivyo hongera kuba intambara yo kurwana n’Abafilisitiya i Goba. Sibekayi Umuhushati yica Safu
2Samuel21:19 Maze hasubira kuba iyindi ntambara yo kurwana n’ Abafilisitiya aho nyene i Goba. Eluhanani mwene Yare‐oregimu w’i Betelehemu yica Goliyati Umunyegati
2Samuel21:20 Bukeye hongera kuba intambara i Gati
2Samuel21:21 Maz’ acokoye Abisirayeli
2Samuel21:22 Abo bose ukw ari bane bar’ abo mu Barefa b’i Gati; bicwa na Dawidi n’abantu biwe.
2Samuel22:1 Dawidi yabariye Uhoraho amajambo yo mur’ iyi ndirimbo
2Samuel22:2 Aravuga
2Samuel22:3 N’Imana igitandara canje; ni we nzohungirako. Ni we nkinzo yanje
2Samuel22:4 Ndambaza Uhoraho abereye gushimwa: Ni ho nzokizwa abansi banje.
2Samuel22:5 Imipfunda y’urupfu yaranyizingiriyeko
2Samuel22:6 Ingoyi z’i kuzimu zantaye hagati
2Samuel22:7 Mu mubabaro wanje nambaje Uhoraho
2Samuel22:8 Maz’ isi iratigita
2Samuel22:9 Umwotsi upfunduka mu mazuru yayo
2Samuel22:10 Yandaza ijuru
2Samuel22:11 Iguruka ivyagiye ku mukerubi
2Samuel22:12 Umwiza iwugira ihema riyisāgiriye; Isāgīrwa n’ibicu bibungenze amazi
2Samuel22:13 Ubgiza bukayangana bur’ imbere yayo Butuma amakara yaka.
2Samuel22:14 Uhoraho aturagara ari mw ijuru
2Samuel22:15 Arasa imyampi yiwe
2Samuel22:16 Maz’ agataka ko musi y’ikiyaga karaboneka
2Samuel22:17 Atuma ukuboko ari hejuru
2Samuel22:18 Ankiza umwansi wanje akomeye
2Samuel22:19 Bari bantanze imbere ku musi w’amagorwa yanje
2Samuel22:20 Abinkūramwo
2Samuel22:21 Uhoraho yangereye ibikwiranye n’ukugororoka kwanje
2Samuel22:22 Kuko nitondeye inzira z’ Uhoraho
2Samuel22:23 Kukw amateka yayo yose yar’ imbere yanje
2Samuel22:24 Narayitunganira
2Samuel22:25 Ni co catumye Uhoraho anyishura ibikwiranye n’ukugororoka kwanje
2Samuel22:26 Ku munyembabazi uzokwiyerekana ur’ umunyembabazi; K’ūtunganye uzokwiyerekana ur’ ūtunganye;
2Samuel22:27 K’ūtanduye uzokwiyerekana ur’ ūtanduye; Ku ntabarirwa uzokwiyerekana ur’ ūdadika.
2Samuel22:28 Abacishijwe bugufi uzobakiza
2Samuel22:29 Kukw ari wewe tara ryanje
2Samuel22:30 Kukw ari wewe unshoboza gutera umuce w’ingabo
2Samuel22:31 Imana yo
2Samuel22:32 Ni nde Mana
2Samuel22:33 Imana ni yo buhungiro bganje bukomeye; Irōngōra umugororotsi mu nzira yayo.
2Samuel22:34 Ni yo ihindura ibirenge vyanje nk’ivy’ impongokazi
2Samuel22:35 Yigisha intoke zanje kurasana
2Samuel22:36 Kandi wampaye inkinzo
2Samuel22:37 Intambuko zanje wazāguriye inzira
2Samuel22:38 Nakinagije abansi banje
2Samuel22:39 Narabatobekeranije
2Samuel22:40 Wankenyeje inkomezi ngo ndwane
2Samuel22:41 Watumye ababisha banje bampa ibitugu
2Samuel22:42 Bārēraguje
2Samuel22:43 Maze ndabasya
2Samuel22:44 Wankijije indwano z’abantu banje
2Samuel22:45 Abanyamahanga baje banyunamira bampema; Bumvise inkuru yanje baca baranyoboka.
2Samuel22:46 Abanyamahanga barakabiranye
2Samuel22:47 Uhoraho yamaho; Igitandara canje gihimbazwe; Imana
2Samuel22:48 Ni yo Mana impōra
2Samuel22:49 Inkūra mu babisha banje: Mber’ unshira hejuru y’abampagurukira
2Samuel22:50 Ni co gituma
2Samuel22:51 Umwami yimitse amugabira agakiza gakomeye
2Samuel23:1 Aya ni yo majambo ya Dawidi aheruka: At’ Uku ni ko Dawidi mwene Isayi avuga
2Samuel23:2 Ati Mpwemu w’Uhoraho yavugiye muri jewe
2Samuel23:3 Imana y’Abisirayeli yaravuze
2Samuel23:4 Abarasira nk’umutwenzi iy’ utambitse
2Samuel23:5 Non’ inzu yanje si kw imeze ku Mana? Kuko yasezeranye nanje isezerano ritazovaho
2Samuel23:6 Arikw abantu bose b’abagesera bazoba nk’amahwa abantu bakinjura
2Samuel23:7 Arik’ uwoyakorako Akwiye kugira icuma n’uruti rw’icumu; Umuriro uzoyatongorera aho nyene.
2Samuel23:8 Aya ni yo mazina y’abahizi Dawidi yar’ afise: Yoshebu‐bashebeti w’i Takemoni
2Samuel23:9 Uwa kabiri kuri we muri ba bahizi batatu ni Eleyazari mwene Dodayi Umwahohi. Yari kumwe na Dawidi igihe bahangāra Abafilisitiya bari bakoraniye kubarwanya. Maz’ Abisirayeli bahunze
2Samuel23:10 arahaguruka yica Abafilisitiya
2Samuel23:11 Akurikirwa na Shama mwene Ageye Umuharari. Abafilisitiya bari bakoraniye i Lehi
2Samuel23:12 Ariko we yihagararira muri wa murima
2Samuel23:13 Umusi ur’ izina batatu bo muri bamwe mirongwitatu b’abahizi baramanuka
2Samuel23:14 Ico gihe Dawidi yari mw isenga
2Samuel23:15 Dawidi yumva akumbuye amazi yaho; aravuga
2Samuel23:16 Maze ba bahizi batatu baca mu ngabo z’ Abafilisitiya
2Samuel23:17 Aravuga
2Samuel23:18 Kandi Abishayi murumuna wa Yowabu umwana wa Seruwiya ni we yar’ umukuru wa bamwe mirongwitatu. Yarāgūriye icumu abantu amajana atatu
2Samuel23:19 Yaravugangwa mur’ abo mirongwitatu nyene
2Samuel23:20 Kandi na Benaya mwene Yehoyada
2Samuel23:21 Yishe n’Umunyegiputa mwiza w’akaranga; uwo Munyegiputa yar’ afise icumu mu minwe
2Samuel23:22 Ivyo ni vyo Benaya mwene Yehoyada yakoze
2Samuel23:23 Yaravugangwa mur’ abo mirongwitatu nyene
2Samuel23:24 Asaheli murumuna wa Yowabu yar’ umwe muri bamwe mirongwitatu
2Samuel23:25 na Shama w’i Harodi
2Samuel23:26 na Helezi w’i Paluti
2Samuel23:27 na Abiyezeri w’i Anatoti
2Samuel23:28 na Salumoni w’i Ahohi
2Samuel23:29 na Helebu mwene Bayana w’i Netofati nyene
2Samuel23:30 na Benaya w’i Piratoni
2Samuel23:31 na Abi‐aluboni w’i Arubati
2Samuel23:32 na Eliyaba w’i Shaliboni
2Samuel23:33 na Shama w’i Harari
2Samuel23:34 na Elifeleti mwene Ahasubayi w’i Mayaka
2Samuel23:35 na Hesiro w’i Karumeli
2Samuel23:36 na Igali mwene Natani w’i Zoba
2Samuel23:37 na Seleki w’Umwamoni
2Samuel23:38 na Ira w’i Ituri
2Samuel23:39 na Uriya Umuheti; bose na bose bari mirongwitatu n’indwi.
2Samuel24:1 Maz’ uburake bg’Uhoraho bgongera kuziriringira Abisirayeli; asunika Dawidi ngw abakwegere
2Samuel24:2 Umwami abarira Yowabu umugabisha w’ingabo ziwe yari kuri we
2Samuel24:3 Yowabu yishura umwami
2Samuel24:4 Arikw ijambo ry’umwami rinesha irya Yowabu n’iry’ abagabisha b’ingabo. Nuko Yowabu n’abo bagabisha bava imbere y’umwami
2Samuel24:5 Bajabuka Yorodani
2Samuel24:6 Maze baja i Gileyadi no mu gihugu c’i Tahatimu‐hodishi
2Samuel24:7 baca kw iboma ry’i Tiro no mu bisagara vyose vy’Abahiwi n’ivy’ Abanyakanani
2Samuel24:8 Nuko barangije kugendura igihugu cose basubira i Yerusalemu
2Samuel24:9 Maze Yowabu ashikiriza umwami igitigiri c’abantu bāharūye: mu Bisirayeli hārimw’ abantu b’abahizi bazi kurwanisha inkota
2Samuel24:10 Ariko Dawidi amaze guharūra abantu
2Samuel24:11 Bukeye mu gatondo
2Samuel24:12 riti Genda ubarire Dawidi
2Samuel24:13 Nuko Gadi aja kwa Dawidi arabimubgira; aravuga
2Samuel24:14 Dawidi yishura Gadi
2Samuel24:15 Nuk’ Uhoraho atērēra Abisirayeli ikīza
2Samuel24:16 Maz’ umumarayika akibangurira ukuboko i Yerusalemu ngw ahageseze
2Samuel24:17 Dawidi abonye uwo mumarayika yageseza abantu
2Samuel24:18 Uwo musi nyene Gadi aja kuri Dawidi
2Samuel24:19 Nuko Dawidi yumvise irya Gadi aradūga
2Samuel24:20 Maze Arawuna agize ngw ararāba
2Samuel24:21 Arawuna aramubaza
2Samuel24:22 Arawuna yishura Dawidi
2Samuel24:23 ivyo vyose jewe Arawuna ndabiguhaye
2Samuel24:24 Arik’ umwami yishura Arawuna
2Samuel24:25 Maze Dawidi ahubakira Uhoraho igicaniro
1Kings1:1 Umwami Dawidi yar’ ashaje
1Kings1:2 Bituma abīshikira biwe bamubarira
1Kings1:3 Nuko barondera umwigeme mwiza mu gihugu cose c’Abisirayeli; baronka Abishagi w’i Shunemu
1Kings1:4 Uwo mwigeme yari mwiza w’umunyakaranga; nukw aba uwo kubungabunga umwami
1Kings1:5 Hanyuma Adoniya umwana wa Hagita arishira hejuru
1Kings1:6 Kandi se nta ho yigeze amukankamira
1Kings1:7 Nukw aja inama na Yowabu umwana wa Seruwiya
1Kings1:8 Ariko Sadoki umuherezi na Benaya mwene Yehoyada na Natani uwavugishwa n’Imana na Shimeyi na Reyi na ba bahizi ba Dawidi
1Kings1:9 Bukeye Adoniya abāgira intama n’inka n’amashūri y’ibitegetera ku gitandara c’i Zoheleti hahereranye n’i Eni‐rogeli; atumira abana b’umwami bose
1Kings1:10 Ariko Natani uwavugishwa n’Imana
1Kings1:11 Maze Natani abaza Batisheba nyina wa Salomo
1Kings1:12 None rero
1Kings1:13 Genda ushikīre umwami Dawidi
1Kings1:14 Maz’ ukirik’ urabonana n’ umwami
1Kings1:15 Nuko Batisheba arinjira
1Kings1:16 Maze Batisheba akubita inkoro hasi
1Kings1:17 Aramwishura
1Kings1:18 Ariko none
1Kings1:19 Yabāze inka n’ amashūri y’ibitegetera n’intama vy’isinzi
1Kings1:20 None rer’ amaso y’Abisirayeli bose bayahanze wewe
1Kings1:21 Arik’ utagize ico ukora ga mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma
1Kings1:22 Akirikw arabonana n’umwami
1Kings1:23 Babarira umwami
1Kings1:24 Natani abaza umwami
1Kings1:25 Uyu musi ko yamanutse
1Kings1:26 Ariko jewe umusavyi wawe
1Kings1:27 None ga mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma
1Kings1:28 Maz’ umwami Dawidi aramubarira
1Kings1:29 Umwami ararahira
1Kings1:30 uko nakurahiye Uhoraho Imana ya Isirayeli
1Kings1:31 Maze Batisheba akubita inkoro hasi
1Kings1:32 Maz’ umwami Dawidi aravuga
1Kings1:33 Umwami arababarira
1Kings1:34 maze Sadoki umuherezi n’ ūvugishwa n’Imana Natani baheze bamwimikishirizey’ amavuta
1Kings1:35 Muheze mudūge mumugendaniye
1Kings1:36 Maze Benaya mwene Yehoyada yishura umwami
1Kings1:37 Nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabanye nawe
1Kings1:38 Nuko Sadoki umuherezi n’ ūvugishwa n’Imana Natani na Benaya mwene Yehoyada n’Abakereti n’Abapeleti bamanukana Salomo
1Kings1:39 Umuherezi Sadoki araheza akūra ihembe ry’amavuta mw Ihema
1Kings1:40 Maz’ abantu bose bamukondorera inyuma
1Kings1:41 Maze Adoniya n’abatumire biwe bose bari kumwe na we baravyumva
1Kings1:42 Akibivuga
1Kings1:43 Yonatani yishura Adoniya

1Kings1:45 kandi Sadoki umuherezi n’ūvugishwa n’Imana Natani bamwimikishirije amavuta i Gihoni; ubu baravuyeyo
1Kings1:46 Mbere Salomo yavyagiye ku ntebe y’ubgami.
1Kings1:47 Bitayekw abantu b’umwami baje guhezagira segaba umwami Dawidi
1Kings1:48 mbere yavuze
1Kings1:49 Maz’ abatumire ba Adoniya bose baranduka imitima
1Kings1:50 Maze Adoniya atinya Salomo
1Kings1:51 Nuko babarira Salomo
1Kings1:52 Maze Salomo aravuga
1Kings1:53 Nuk’ umwami Salomo atuma abamukūra ku gicaniro. Nukw araza yikubita imbere y’ umwami Salomo. Salomo aramubarira
1Kings2:1 Igihe ca Dawidi co gutanga kigira gishike
1Kings2:2 ati Ngiye kujana inzira ab’ isi bose bajana; nuko shikama
1Kings2:3 Uze wumvire ivyo Uhoraho Imana yawe yageze
1Kings2:4 ng’ Uhoraho az’ ashitse ijambo yamvuzeko
1Kings2:5 Ikindi
1Kings2:6 Ubgenge bgawe buze bukurōngōre mu vyo uzomugirira
1Kings2:7 Ariko bene Baruzilayi Umugileyadi uz’ ubagirire neza
1Kings2:8 Mugabo harih’ uwundi ngaho
1Kings2:9 Ariko rero wewe ntuz’ ugende utamuhannye; kuk’ ur’ umunyabgenge
1Kings2:10 Nuko Dawidi ahamvya ba sekuruza
1Kings2:11 Kand’ imyaka Dawidi yamaze ku ngoma aganza Abisirayeli yari mirongwine
1Kings2:12 Nuko Salomo asubira ku ngoma ya se Dawidi
1Kings2:13 Maze Adoniya umwana wa Hagita ashikīra Batisheba nyina wa Salomo. Batisheba aramubaza

1Kings2:16 None rero
1Kings2:17 Aramubarira
1Kings2:18 Batisheba aramwishura

1Kings2:21 Aramubgira
1Kings2:22 Arik’ umwami Salomo yishura nyina
1Kings2:23 Maz’ umwami Salomo arahira Uhoraho

1Kings2:25 Nuk’ umwami Salomo arungika Benaya mwene Yehoyada
1Kings2:26 Maz’ umwami abarira Abiyatari umuherezi
1Kings2:27 Uko ni ko Salomo yirukanye Abiyatari mu buherezi bg’Uhoraho
1Kings2:28 Nukw inkuru zishika kuri Yowabu; kandi Yowabu yari yarafatanije na Adoniya
1Kings2:29 Maze babgira umwami Salomo
1Kings2:30 Nuko Benaya aragenda
1Kings2:31 Umwami aramubarira
1Kings2:32 Uhoraho aza kuba amushubije ku mutwe amaraso ya ba bantu babiri yatsindaho
1Kings2:33 Uko ni kw amaraso yabo azosubira ku mutwe wa Yowabu no ku mitwe y’uruvyaro rwiwe ibihe vyose; ariko kuri Dawidi n’uruvyaro rwiwe n’inzu yiwe n’ingoma yiwe hazoba amahoro ava k’Uhoraho ibihe vyose.
1Kings2:34 Nuko Benaya mwene Yehoyada aradūga
1Kings2:35 Maz’ umwami ashira Benaya mwene Yehoyada mu gishingo ca Yowabu ngw abe umugabisha w’ingabo
1Kings2:36 Maz’ umwami atumiza Shimeyi
1Kings2:37 Umusi wayivuyemwo

1Kings2:40 Shimeyi arahaguruka

1Kings2:42 Nuk’ umwami atumiza Shimeyi
1Kings2:43 None n’iki cakubujije kwitondera indahiro y’ Uhoraho n’icagezwe naguhaye?

1Kings2:45 Ariko jewe umwami Salomo nzohabga umugisha
1Kings2:46 Nuk’ umwami agera Benaya mwene Yehoyada kumwica; na we arasohoka
1Kings3:1 Maze Salomo asabira Farawo umwami wa Egiputa
1Kings3:2 Kand’ ico gihe abantu bātangira ibimazi ku mpinga z’ imisozi; kuko gushitsa ico gihe ata ngoro bāribgubakire izina ry’ Uhoraho.
1Kings3:3 Kandi Salomo yakunda Uhoraho
1Kings3:4 Bukeye umwami Salomo aja i Gibeyoni gutangiray’ ibimazi
1Kings3:5 Kandi Salomo akir’ i Gibeyoni
1Kings3:6 Salomo arishura
1Kings3:7 Nuko none
1Kings3:8 Kandi jewe umusavyi wawe ndi hagati mu bantu bawe watoranije
1Kings3:9 None rero
1Kings3:10 Maze binezereza Uhoraho yuko Salomo asavye ivyo.
1Kings3:11 Nukw Imana iramubarira
1Kings3:12 nuko nkugiriye nk’uk’ usavye: ehe nguhaye umutima w’ubgenge wo gutahura
1Kings3:13 Kandi nguhaye n’ico utansavye: nguhaye ubutunzi n’icubahiro
1Kings3:14 Kandi ni wagendera mu nzira zanje
1Kings3:15 Maze Salomo aribambura

1Kings3:17 Umwe muri bo aravuga

1Kings3:20 Na we aca avyuka mu gicugu
1Kings3:21 Ngo mvyuke kwonsa umwana bugira buce

1Kings4:1 Umwami Salomo yar’ umwami w’Abisirayeli bose.
1Kings4:2 Kand’ aba ni bo baganwa biwe: Azariya mwene Sadoki umuherezi;
1Kings4:3 Elihorefu na Ahiya bene Shisha bar’ abakarani; Yehoshafati mwene Ahiludi ni we yar’ umwanditsi w’ ivyaja biraba;
1Kings4:4 Benaya mwene Yehoyada yar’ umugabisha w’ ingabo; Sadoki na Abiyatari ni bo bar’ abaherezi;
1Kings4:5 Azariya mwene Natani yar’ umukuru w’ abamenyekana; Zabudi mwene Natani nyene yar’ umuherezi kandi yar’ umukunzi w’umwami;
1Kings4:6 Ahishari yar’ umubgiriza wo mu rugo; Adoniramu mwene Abuda ni we yagaba ivy’ abanyabikebere.
1Kings4:7 Kand’ umwami Salomo yar’ afise abamenyekana cumi na babiri bakwiragiye mu Bgisirayeli hose
1Kings4:8 Aya ni yo mazina yabo: mwene Huri yatoza ivyo mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu;
1Kings4:9 na mwene Dekeri yatoza ivy’ i Makasi n’i Shalibimo n’i Beti‐shemeshi n’i Eloni‐beti‐hanani;
1Kings4:10 na mwene Hesedi yatoza ivy’ i Aruboti
1Kings4:11 na mwene Abinadabu yatoza ivyo mu misozi yose ihagaze y’i Dori
1Kings4:12 na Bayana mwene Ahiludi yatoza ivy’ i Tanaki n’i Megido
1Kings4:13 na mwene Geberi yatoza ivy’ i Ramoti‐gileyadi
1Kings4:14 na Ahinadabu mwene Ido yatoza ivy’ i Mahanayimu;
1Kings4:15 na Ahimasi yatoza ivy’ Abanafutali
1Kings4:16 na Bayana mwene Hushayi yatoza ivy’ Abasheri n’ivy’ i Beyaloti;
1Kings4:17 na Yehoshafati mwene Paruwa yatoza ivy’ Abisakari;
1Kings4:18 na Shimeyi mwene Ela yatoza ivy’ Ababenyamini;
1Kings4:19 na Gebera mwene Uri yatoza ivyo mu gihugu c’i Gileyadi
1Kings4:20 Kand’ Abayuda n’Abisirayeli bār’ isinzi
1Kings4:21 Kandi Salomo yaganza ibihugu vyose vy’abami
1Kings4:22 Ivyāgaburwa kwa Salomo ku musi ku musi vyar’ ibi: ingero zitwa koro mirongwitatu z’ifu igogōretse
1Kings4:23 n’ibimasa cumi vyagaburiwe neza
1Kings4:24 Kuko yaganza igihugu cose co hakuno ya rwa ruzi Efurate
1Kings4:25 nukw Abayuda n’Abisirayeli bībēra amahoro
1Kings4:26 Kandi Salomo yar’ afise impongore ibihumbi bine z’amafarasi yakwega imikogote yiwe
1Kings4:27 Nukw abo bamenyekana bama batoza ivyo gutunga umwami Salomo n’abaza kurīra ku meza yiwe bose
1Kings4:28 Kandi bama bazana na sayiri n’ivyarire vy’amafarasi akwega imikogote n’ayandi yo kwirukako
1Kings4:29 Nukw Imana iha Salomo ubgenge n’ubuhanga bginshi cane
1Kings4:30 Ubgenge bga Salomo bgāruta ubg’ abanyabgenge bose b’i burasirazuba n’ubg’ Abanyegiputa bgose.
1Kings4:31 Yarusha abandi bantu bose ubgenge
1Kings4:32 Yigeneye imigani ibihumbi bitatu
1Kings4:33 Yar’ azi kudondora ivy’ ibiti
1Kings4:34 Nukw abantu bakava mu mahanga yose bazanywe no kwumva ubgenge bga Salomo
1Kings5:1 Hiramu umwami w’i Tiro yumvise ko bimikishije Salomo amavuta ngw asubire ku ngoma ya se
1Kings5:2 Nuko Salomo atuma kwishura Hiramu
1Kings5:3 ut’ Urazi ko se Dawidi atābonye uburyo bgo kwubaka ingoro y’izina ry’ Uhoraho Imana yiwe
1Kings5:4 Ut’ Ariko we
1Kings5:5 Uti Non’ afise imigabo yo kwubaka ingoro y’izina ry’Uhoraho Imana yiwe
1Kings5:6 Uti None rer’ umubaririre abamwicirira ibiti vy’ amasederi i Lebanoni
1Kings5:7 Nuko Hiramu yumvise amajambo ya Salomo aranezerwa cane
1Kings5:8 Nuko Hiramu atuma kuri Salomo
1Kings5:9 Ut’ Abantu biwe bazobikūra i Lebanoni
1Kings5:10 Nuko Hiramu aha Salomo ibiti vy’amasederi n’ivy’ akajwari
1Kings5:11 Salomo na we agaha Hiramu ingano ingero zitwa koro ibihumbi mirongwibiri zo kugaburira abo mu rugo rwiwe
1Kings5:12 Nuk’ Uhoraho aha Salomo ubgenge nk’uko yamusezeraniye
1Kings5:13 Maz’ umwami Salomo atoza abantu bo kuba abanyabikebere mu Bisirayeli hose; abo yatoje baba ibihumbi mirongwitatu.
1Kings5:14 Akāma abarungika i Lebanoni
1Kings5:15 Kandi Salomo yari yarashizeh’ abantu ibihumbi mirongwirindwi bāshinzwe ivyo kwikorera
1Kings5:16 udashizemw’ abakoresha biwe bakuru bākoresha ivyo bikorwa
1Kings5:17 Nuk’ umwami agera ko bimba amabuye manini‐manini y’igiciro kinini
1Kings5:18 Maz’ abubatsi ba Salomo n’aba Hiramu n’Abagebali barayabāza
1Kings6:1 Maz’ imyaka amajana ane na mirongumunani ishize
1Kings6:2 Iyo ngoro umwami Salomo yubakiye Uhoraho
1Kings6:3 Urubaraza ruherereye imbere y’Ahēra h’iyo ngoro
1Kings6:4 Iyo ngoro ayishiramw’ amadirisha y’ inshingo zikomeye.
1Kings6:5 Mu mbavu z’iyo ngoro ahōmeka utwumba tugerekeranye
1Kings6:6 Utwumba two hasi
1Kings6:7 Mw iyubaka ry’iyo ngoro bayubakishije amabuye yatunganirijwe aho bayimvye; nta nyundo cank’ incabiti cank’ ikindi kintu cose c’icuma cumvikana mur’ iryo yubakwa ryayo.
1Kings6:8 Umuryango w’utwumba two hasi wari ku ruhande rw’i buryo rw’iyo ngoro; abāja mu twumba two hagati bāca ku curirizo cihotaguye mu gushikayo
1Kings6:9 Uko ni ko yubatse iyo ngoro
1Kings6:10 Twa twumba yometse kur’ iyo ngoro impande zose
1Kings6:11 Bukeye ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri Salomo
1Kings6:12 riti Ku vy’ iyi ngoro urik’ urubaka
1Kings6:13 Kandi nzoba mu Bisirayeli
1Kings6:14 Uko ni ko Salomo yubatse iyo ngoro
1Kings6:15 Imbere ku bisika vy’iyo ngoro ahōmeka imbaho z’amasederi; uhereye hasi ugashitsa ku myaro y’urusenge
1Kings6:16 Haruguru imbere mur’ iyo ngoro ahōmeka imbaho z’ amasederi kumara amatambge mirongwibiri
1Kings6:17 Ingoro isigaye hino y’Ahēra Cane yar’ amatambge mirongwine; ni yo yitwa Ahēra.
1Kings6:18 Hose imbere mur’ iyo ngoro hāri hōmetse imbaho z’ amasederi zisharijwekw ibishushanyo vy’uturende n’amashurwe asambuye; hose zar’ imbaho z’ amasederi
1Kings6:19 Nukw atunganya Ahēra Cane aho nyene imbere haruguru mur’ iyo ngoro
1Kings6:20 Kand’ Ahēra Cane
1Kings6:21 Nuko ku ngoro imbere hose ahōmekakw izahabu iramuye
1Kings6:22 Nuko ku ngoro hose yahōmetse izahabu kugeza ingoro yose ihwanye; na ca gicaniro c’imbere y’ Ahēra Cane na co yacometsekw izahabu hose.
1Kings6:23 Abāza mu biti vy’imyelayo ibishushanyo vy’abakerubi bibiri vyo gushira Ahēra Cane
1Kings6:24 Uburebure bg’ibaba rimwe ry’umukerubi bgar’ amatambge atanu
1Kings6:25 Igishushanyo c’ umukerubi ca kabiri uburebure bgaco bgar’ amatambge cumi nyene; abo bakerubi bompi bārangana cabugerwe
1Kings6:26 Uburebure bg’umukerubi umwe bgar’ amatambge cumi
1Kings6:27 Nukw atereka abo bakerubi aho nyene haruguru mur’ iyo ngoro; amababa yabo yar’ ashānje
1Kings6:28 Kand’ abo bakerubi abomekakw izahabu.
1Kings6:29 Ku nzu hose imbere mur’ iyo ngoro ahabāzira ibishushanyo vy’ abakerubi n’ivy’ ibigazi n’ivy’ amashurwe asambuye
1Kings6:30 No hasi mur’ iyo ngoro ahōmeka izahabu
1Kings6:31 Umuryango uja Ahēra Cane awushirakw inzugi z’imbaho z’ imyelayo; uwo muryango
1Kings6:32 Kand’ abāza inzugi zibiri mu mbaho z’imyelayo
1Kings6:33 Akora ibishimaryango vy’ urwinjiriro rw’urusengero mu biti vy’imyelayo
1Kings6:34 akora n’inzugi zaho zibiri mu mbaho z’akajwari; urugi rumwe iyo buguruye
1Kings6:35 Kandi mu kuzibāza azishushanyakw ibishushanyo vy’abakerubi n’ivy’ ibigazi n’ivy’ amashurwe asambuye
1Kings6:36 Urugo rw’inyubakwa arwubakisha amabuye abājwe imirongo itatu igerekeranye
1Kings6:37 Igihe bātanguriye kwubaka itanguriro ry’iyo ngoro y’Uhoraho hāri mu mwaka ugira kane Salomo ari ku ngoma
1Kings6:38 Mu mwaka ugira icumi na rimwe
1Kings7:1 Maze Salomo yubaka iyiwe ngoro; amara imyaka cumi n’itatu mu kw arangiza vyose.
1Kings7:2 Yubatse inzu yitwa iy’ Ikibira c’i Lebanoni
1Kings7:3 Adondekanya imbaho z’amasederi kur’ iyo myaro itambitswe kur’ izo nkingi mirongwine na zitanu uko zinegagiye ar’ icumi‐icumi na zitanu mu murongo.
1Kings7:4 Atambika imbaho z’intumba mu mirongo itatu
1Kings7:5 Inzugi zose
1Kings7:6 Yubaka n’urubaraza rufise inkingi
1Kings7:7 Yubaka n’inzu yo guciramw’ imanza
1Kings7:8 Kand’ ingoro yiwe nyamugari yubatswe kuno nyene; inyubakwa yayo yaca inyuma y’iyo nzu. Yubaka n’iyindi ngoro isa n’iyo nzu y’imanza
1Kings7:9 Ayo mazu yose yari yubakishijwe amabuye y’igiciro kinini abājwe ku rugero
1Kings7:10 Ay’ amatanguriro na yo nyene yar’ ay’ igiciro kinini
1Kings7:11 Hejuru yayo hakurikirakw amabuye y’ igiciro kinini abājwe ku rugero
1Kings7:12 Urugo rw’intangaro rwari rwubakishijwe amabuye abājwe imirongo itatu igerekeranye
1Kings7:13 Bukeye Salomo atuma i Tiro guhamagaza Hiramu.
1Kings7:14 Hiramu uwo
1Kings7:15 Acura inkingi zibiri z’imiringa
1Kings7:16 Maz’ avugutira imiringa mu nkero
1Kings7:17 Acura ibimeze nk’insenga vy’ insobane n’imigufu ihotoranije
1Kings7:18 Acura n’ibisa n’amakomamanga
1Kings7:19 Mugabo
1Kings7:20 Nukw iyo myashi ayishira mu mitwe y’izo nkingi ukw ari zibiri
1Kings7:21 Izo nkingi azishinga ku rubaraza rw’ urusengero; iy’ i buryo ayishinze
1Kings7:22 Ku mitwe y’izo nkingi hari hashushanijwekw amashurwe y’amarebe. Nukw igikorwa c’izo nkingi kirarangira.
1Kings7:23 Maz’ akora igikarabiro citwa ikiyaga
1Kings7:24 Musi y’urubiga rwaco hari hakikujwe n’ibishushanyo vy’uturende
1Kings7:25 Cari giteretswe ku bishushanyo vy’amapfizi cumi n’abiri; atatu yarāba i burārūko
1Kings7:26 Intimba yaco yangana n’ikiganza c’umuntu
1Kings7:27 Acura ibitereko cumi mu miringa. Igitereko kimwe
1Kings7:28 Ivyo bitereko vyari bicuzwe birtya: vyari bifise imiringa y’utubāte ikikujwe n’imikugiro;
1Kings7:29 kur’ utwo tubāte hagati y’iyo mikugiro hār’ ibishushanyo vy’ intambge n’amapfizi n’abakerubi; kur’ iyo mikugiro haruguru y’ivyo bishushanyo vy’intambge n’amapfizi no ku mikugiro yo hepfo yavyo
1Kings7:30 Igitereko cose cari gifise amakurudumu ane acuzwe mu miringa
1Kings7:31 Ivyo bishigikizo vyatega ikimeze bga rugata co guterekwakw ikigarigari; uburebure bgaco bgar’ itambge rimwe
1Kings7:32 Ayo makurudumu ukw ar’ ane yar’ ahahera musi ya twa tubāte
1Kings7:33 Kandi yakozwe nk’ay’ umukogote; ivyuma afasheko
1Kings7:34 Vya bishigikizo ukw ari bine vyo mu mfuruka zine z’igitereko cose vyari vyacuranywe n’ivyo bitereko vyavyo.
1Kings7:35 Hejuru ku gitereko hār’ ikintu cijingurije kimeze nk’urugata; uburebure bgaco bg’igihagararo bgar’ igihimba c’itambge ry’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora; ivyari bigishigikiye bo n’utubāte two kuri co
1Kings7:36 Kur’ ivyo bishigikizo
1Kings7:37 Uko ni ko yakoze ivyo bitereko ukw ar’ icumi; vyose vyavugutiwe mu nkero z’uburyo bumwe; vyarangana cabugerwe
1Kings7:38 Acura n’ibigarigari cumi mu miringa; kimwe‐kimwe cuzuzwa n’imibindi mirongwine; kimwe‐kimwe uburebure bgaco bgar’ amatambge ane y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora. Kand’ ivyo bitereko ukw ar’ icumi
1Kings7:39 Ibitereko bitanu abishira ku ruhande rw’i buryo bg’iyo ngoro
1Kings7:40 Maz’ imibindi n’ivyuma vyo kuyora umunyota n’imibehe Hiramu arabikora na vyo. Uko ni ko yanonosoye igikorwa cose yakorera umwami Salomo c’ingoro y’Uhoraho.
1Kings7:41 Ivyo yakoze vyar’ ibi: za nkingi zompi
1Kings7:42 na vya bishushanyo vy’amakomamanga amajana ane bitondeshejwe kur’ izo nsenga
1Kings7:43 na vya bitereko ukw ar’ icumi
1Kings7:44 na ca kiyaga
1Kings7:45 na ya mibindi na vya vyuma vyo kuyora umunyota na ya mibehe; ivyo bintu vyose Hiramu yakoreye umwami Salomo vy’ingoro y’Uhoraho
1Kings7:46 Umwami yabikoreshereje mu kiyaya ca Yorodani bivugutiwe mu nkero
1Kings7:47 Kandi Salomo apfa kureka ivyo bintu vyose atabigeze ku munzane
1Kings7:48 Kandi Salomo acurisha ibintu vyose vyo mu ngoro y’Uhoraho
1Kings7:49 n’ibiterekwakw amatara
1Kings7:50 n’ inzavya
1Kings7:51 Uko ni kw igikorwa cose umwami Salomo yakoreye ingoro y’Uhoraho carangiye. Maze yinjiza ivyo se Dawidi yari yaragize inyegu y’Uhoraho vyose
1Kings8:1 Maze Salomo akoranya abashingantahe b’Abisirayeli n’ abakuru b’imiryango bose
1Kings8:2 Nukw abagabo bose b’Abisirayeli bakoranira i bgami kwa Salomo
1Kings8:3 Nukw abakuru bose bo mu Bisirayeli baraza
1Kings8:4 Nuko badūgana iyo sandugu y’ Uhoraho
1Kings8:5 Maz’ umwami Salomo hamwe n’ ikoraniro ryose ry’Abisirayeli bari bakoraniye imbere yiwe
1Kings8:6 Maz’ abaherezi binjiza iyo sandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho
1Kings8:7 kukw ivyo bishushanyo vy’abakerubi vyari bishānje amababa hejuru y’ikibanza c’iyo sandugu
1Kings8:8 Kand’ iyo miniho yayo yari miremire
1Kings8:9 Mur’ iyo sandugu nta kindi carimwo atari vya bisate bibiri vy’amabuye Mose yashiriyemw’ i Horebu
1Kings8:10 Maz’ abaherezi bavuye Ahēra
1Kings8:11 bituma abaherezi badashobora guhagararayo ngo bahēreze kubg’ ico gicu
1Kings8:12 Salomo araheza aravuga
1Kings8:13 None ndakwubakiye ingoro yo kubamwo
1Kings8:14 Maz’ umwami arahindukira
1Kings8:15 Maz’ aravuga
1Kings8:16 yuk’ uhereye igihe yakūriye abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli muri Egiputa
1Kings8:17 Kandi data Dawidi yari yaragabiye mu mutima wiwe kuzokwubakira ingoro izina ry’Uhoraho Imana y’ Abisirayeli.
1Kings8:18 Arik’ Uhoraho abarira data Dawidi
1Kings8:19 at’ Ariko wewe ntuzokwubaka iyo ngoro
1Kings8:20 Non’ Uhoraho ashikije iryo jambo ryiwe yavuze
1Kings8:21 Ni ho nashingiye umwanya isandugu irimw’ isezerano ry’Uhoraho yasezeranye na ba sogokuruza
1Kings8:22 Salomo araheza ahagarara imbere y’igicaniro c’Uhoraho
1Kings8:23 aravuga
1Kings8:24 kandi washikije ivyo wasezeraniye data umusavyi wawe Dawidi; mber’ ivyo wavugishije akanwa kawe ubishikishije ukuboko kwawe
1Kings8:25 None rero
1Kings8:26 None rero
1Kings8:27 Ariko se
1Kings8:28 Arik’ Uhoraho Mana yanje
1Kings8:29 kugira ng’ uhoze inyonga zawe kur’ iyi ngoro ku murango no mw ijoro
1Kings8:30 Kand’ uze wame wumva ukwinginga kwanje
1Kings8:31 Umuntu ni yagirira nabi mugenzi we
1Kings8:32 nuk’ uz’ uvyumve uri mw ijuru
1Kings8:33 Kand’ abantu bawe b’Abisirayeli ni baneshwa n’abansi
1Kings8:34 nuk’ uz’ uvyumve uri mw ijuru
1Kings8:35 Kand’ ijuru ni ryakingwa
1Kings8:36 nuk’ uz’ uvyumve uri mw ijuru
1Kings8:37 Inzara ni yatera mu gihugu
1Kings8:38 hakagira ūsenga akinginga
1Kings8:39 nuk’ uz’ uvyumve uri mw ijuru ah’ uba
1Kings8:40 kugira ngo baze bahore bagutinya imisi yose bazomara bakiriho
1Kings8:41 Kandi n’umunyamahanga
1Kings8:42 (kuko batazobura kwumva ivy’ izina ryawe rihambaye
1Kings8:43 uz’ uvyumve uri mw ijuru ah’ uba
1Kings8:44 Kand’ abantu bawe ni baramuka bagiye gutera abansi babo ah’ uzoba ubagomoye hose
1Kings8:45 nuk’ uze wumve ugusenga kwabo n’ugutakamba kwabo uri mw ijuru
1Kings8:46 Kandi ni baramuka bagucumuyeko
1Kings8:47 maze bakīsubiramwo bari mu gihugu bajanywemw’ ar’ inyagano
1Kings8:48 bakakugarukako n’imitima yabo yose n’ivyiyumviro vyabo vyose
1Kings8:49 nuk’ uze wumve ugusenga kwabo n’ugutakamba kwabo uri mw ijuru ah’ uba
1Kings8:50 uharire abantu bawe ivyaha n’ibicumuro vyabo vyose bagucumuyeko
1Kings8:51 kukw ar’ abantu bawe n’ ishamvu yawe wīkūriye muri Egiputa
1Kings8:52 Tereza inyonga
1Kings8:53 Kuko wabarobanuye mu mahanga yose yo mw isi ngo babe ishamvu yawe
1Kings8:54 Nuko Salomo arangije gusengesha ayo majambo yose no kwinginga Uhoraho
1Kings8:55 Arahagarara
1Kings8:56 at’ Uhoraho ahimbazwe
1Kings8:57 Uhoraho Imana yacu abane natwe
1Kings8:58 arikw imitima yacu yame ayīgarukanako
1Kings8:59 Kand’ ayo majambo yanje ningingiye Uhoraho nd’ imbere yiwe
1Kings8:60 kugira ngw amahanga yose yo mw isi amenye k’Uhoraho ari we Mana
1Kings8:61 Nukw imitima yanyu ibe itunganiye Uhoraho Imana yacu
1Kings8:62 Maz’ umwami n’Abisirayeli bose bafataniriza hamwe gutangira ibimazi imbere y’Uhoraho.
1Kings8:63 Salomo azanira Uhoraho inka ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bibiri n’intama ibihumbi ijana na mirongwibiri kw ibimazi vy’ishimwe. Uko ni k’umwami n’Abisirayeli bose bashikirije Uhoraho ingoro yiwe.
1Kings8:64 Kur’ uwo musi umwami ashinga umwanya wo hagati mu nyubakwa imbere y’ingoro y’ Uhoraho
1Kings8:65 Uko ni ko Salomo yagize imisi mikuru ico gihe
1Kings8:66 Ku musi ugira umunani w’ iyinga rya kabiri umwami asezera abantu
1Kings9:1 Maze Salomo arangije kwubaka ingoro y’Uhoraho n’ingoro y’ubgami n’ivyo yagomvye gukora vyose
1Kings9:2 Uhoraho amwiyereka ubugira kabiri
1Kings9:3 Uhoraho aramubarira
1Kings9:4 Nuko nawe ni wagendera imbere yanje nk’uko so Dawidi yagenda
1Kings9:5 nanje nzotuma ingoma yawe ihangama mu Bisirayeli ibihe vyose
1Kings9:6 Ariko ni mwanta
1Kings9:7 nuko nanje nzoherengeteza Abisirayeli mu gihugu nabahaye
1Kings9:8 kand’ iyi ngoro nah’ ar’ agahambaye irtya
1Kings9:9 Bazomwishura
1Kings9:10 Nuko hashize imyaka mirongwibiri
1Kings9:11 umwami Salomo aha Hiramu ibisagara mirongwibiri mu gihugu c’i Galilaya; kandi Hiramu uwo
1Kings9:12 Bukeye Hiramu ava i Tiro aja kugendura ivyo bisagara Salomo yamuhaye; maze ntiyabishima.
1Kings9:13 Aramubarira
1Kings9:14 Kandi Hiramu yari yararungikiye umwami Salomo amazahabu italanto ijana na mirongwibiri.
1Kings9:15 Ubu ni bgo buryo umwami Salomo yashizeh’ abanyabikebere bo kwubaka ingoro y’Uhoraho n’ingoro yiwe ubgiwe n’i Milo n’uruzitiro rw’amabuye rw’i Yerusalemu
1Kings9:16 Kandi Farawo umwami wa Egiputa yari yarateye i Gezeri
1Kings9:17 Nuko Salomo yubaka i Gezeri nyene
1Kings9:18 n’i Bayalati n’i Tamari mu bugaragwa bgo mu gihugu c’Abayuda;
1Kings9:19 n’ibisagara vyose vy’ibigega vyiwe
1Kings9:20 Abantu bose b’amasigarira y’Abamori n’ Abaheti n’Abaferizi n’Abahiwi n’ Abayebusi
1Kings9:21 abuzukuruza babo bari barasigaye mu gihugu
1Kings9:22 Ariko mu Bisirayeli bo
1Kings9:23 Abo ni bo bakoresha bakuru bāgaba ibikorwa vya Salomo; bose na bose bār’ amajana atanu na mirongwitanu
1Kings9:24 Maze wa mukobga wa Farawo yimuka mu gisagara ca Dawidi
1Kings9:25 Kandi Salomo yahora atanga ibimazi vyo kwoswa n’ivy’ ishimwe gatatu‐gatatu mu mwaka
1Kings9:26 Kand’ umwami Salomo abāzīsha amāto i Eziyoni‐geberi
1Kings9:27 Maze Hiramu arungika mur’ ayo māto abantu biwe b’ abasoza bamenyereye ivy’ ikiyaga
1Kings9:28 baragenda baja i Ofiru
1Kings10:1 Umwami w’umugore yaganza i Sheba yumvise ingen’ izina ry’Uhoraho ryahaye Salomo kuba rurangiranwa
1Kings10:2 Nukw ashika i Yerusalemu agendaniwe n’abantu benshi b’ isinzi
1Kings10:3 Nuk’ umwami Salomo amusobanurira ivyo amubajije vyose; nta kintu na kimwe cāmunaniye kw amusobanurira.
1Kings10:4 Nuk’ uwo mwami w’i Sheba abonye ingene Salomo ar’ umunyabgenge
1Kings10:5 n’ivyo kurya vyo ku meza yiwe ukuntu vyari
1Kings10:6 Abarira umwami
1Kings10:7 Ariko sinari navyemeye gushitsa niyiziye
1Kings10:8 Hahirwa abantu bawe
1Kings10:9 Uhoraho Imana yawe ahimbazwe
1Kings10:10 Maz’ aha umwami izahabu italanto ijana na mirongwibiri
1Kings10:11 Kand’ amāto ya Hiramu yahora azana amazahabu ayakūye i Ofiru
1Kings10:12 Ivyo biti vya alumugi umwami ni vyo yabājemw’ inkingi zo mu ngoro y’Uhoraho n’izo mu ngoro yiwe ubgiwe; yabibājemwo n’inanga n’amakembe vy’abaririmvyi; ntihigeze kuza canke kuboneka ibiti vya alumugi nk’ivyo gushitsa na bugingo n’ubu.
1Kings10:13 Nuk’ umwami Salomo aha uwo mwami w’i Sheba ivyo yagomba vyose n’ico amwatse cose
1Kings10:14 Amazahabu yaza kwa Salomo mu mwaka mu mwaka
1Kings10:15 udashizemw’ ayakwa abahanjuzi kw ibibuguro n’ayakwa mu nyungu z’abadandaza
1Kings10:16 Maz’ umwami Salomo acurisha inkinzo nini‐nini amajana abiri mw izahabu
1Kings10:17 Acurisha n’inkinzo nto‐nto amajana atatu mw izahabu nyene
1Kings10:18 Kand’ umwami yibāzishiriza intebe nini y’ubgami mu mahembe y’inzovu
1Kings10:19 iyo ntebe yar’ ifise aho kudondagira hatandatu; aho kwegamira hayo hāri hihese
1Kings10:20 Kandi hār’ ibishushanyo vy’ intambge cumi na bibiri
1Kings10:21 Kand’ ibintu vyose vy’umwami Salomo vyo kunywesha vyar’ ivy’ izahabu
1Kings10:22 Kuk’ umwami yar’ afise amāto y’i Tarushishi yagendera ku kiyaga yajana n’aya Hiramu; ukw imyaka itatu ishize
1Kings10:23 Uko ni k’umwami Salomo yarusha abami bose bo mw isi ubutunzi n’ubgenge.
1Kings10:24 Mu bihugu vyose vyo mw isi hāhora haza abagomba kubona Salomo
1Kings10:25 Umuntu wese yaza azanye indamukanyo
1Kings10:26 Kandi Salomo yironderera imikogote y’intambara n’abo kugendera ku mafarasi; yar’ afise imikogote igihumbi n’amajana ane
1Kings10:27 Amafeza umwami yararushe ayahindura nk’amabuye i Yerusalemu
1Kings10:28 Kand’ amafarasi Salomo yar’ atunze bāyakūra muri Egiputa; abadandaza b’umwami bayagura ar’ amasho
1Kings10:29 Umukogote umwe‐umwe bāwukūra muri Egiputa kuri shekeli z’ifeza amajana atandatu
1Kings11:1 Kand’ umwami Salomo yagomwa abanyamahangakazi benshi
1Kings11:2 bo mu mahanga Uhoraho yari yarabujije Abisirayeli
1Kings11:3 Yar’ afise abagore amajana ndwi b’abamikazi bgite
1Kings11:4 Kukw amaze gusāza
1Kings11:5 kuko Salomo yakurikiye Ashitoreti imanakazi y’Abasidoni
1Kings11:6 Uko ni ko Salomo yakoze ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi
1Kings11:7 Bukeye Salomo ataba ku mpinga y’umusozi werekeye i Yerusalemu igitabo ca Kemoshi
1Kings11:8 Uko ni ko yagiriye abagore biwe bose b’abanyamahangakazi
1Kings11:9 Maz’ Uhoraho arakira Salomo
1Kings11:10 kandi yari yaramutesheje ivyo
1Kings11:11 Ni co catumye Uhoraho abarira Salomo
1Kings11:12 Mugabo sinzobikora ku ngoma yawe kubga so Dawidi
1Kings11:13 Na we nyene sinzomushikura ubgami bgose
1Kings11:14 Maz’ Uhoraho ahagurukiriza Salomo umurwanizi
1Kings11:15 Igihe Dawidi yatera Edomu
1Kings11:16 mbere Yowabu n’Abisirayeli bose bamaray’ amezi atandatu
1Kings11:17 Ico gihe Hadadi ahungana n’Abanyedomu bamwe bo mu bantu ba se
1Kings11:18 Nuko bafata inzira
1Kings11:19 Maze Hadadi atona cane kuri Farawo
1Kings11:20 Hanyuma uwo mugore
1Kings11:21 Maze Hadadi yumvise ko Dawidi yatanze
1Kings11:22 Farawo aramubaza
1Kings11:23 Hanyuma Imana yongera guhagurukiriza Salomo uwundi murwanizi
1Kings11:24 Maz’ igihe Dawidi yageseza ab’i Zoba
1Kings11:25 Uwo na we aba umurwanizi w’Abisirayeli imisi yose Salomo yamaze ku ngoma
1Kings11:26 Maze Yerobowamu mwene Nebati
1Kings11:27 Ivyamuteye kugarariza umwami vyatanguye birtya: Salomo yarikw arubaka i Milo
1Kings11:28 Kandi Yerobowamu uwo yar’ umuntu w’umuhinga; nuko Salomo abonye uwo musore kw ar’ umukozi w’umunyamwete
1Kings11:29 Maz’ umusi ur’ izina
1Kings11:30 Maze Ahiya afata uwo mwambaro musha yari yambaye
1Kings11:31 Abarira Yerobowamu
1Kings11:32 ngw Ariko we azomusigarana umuryango umwe
1Kings11:33 ngw Abitewe n’uko bāmutaye
1Kings11:34 Ngw Ariko ntazomunyaga ubgami bgose
1Kings11:35 Ngw Arik’ ubgo bgami azobunyaga umwana wiwe
1Kings11:36 Ngo Yamar’ uwo mwana wiwe azomuha umuryango umwe
1Kings11:37 Ngo Maze wewe azokwābīra
1Kings11:38 Ngo None rero

1Kings12:1 Bukeye Rehobowamu aja i Shekemu
1Kings12:2 Maze Yerobowamu mwene Nebati aravyumva; kandi yar’ akiri muri Egiputa
1Kings12:3 nuko batuma kumuhamagara. Ashitse araza
1Kings12:4 bati So yadutwaje igitugu; none rero
1Kings12:5 Arabishura

1Kings12:7 Baramwishura

1Kings12:14 ababarira nk’ ukw inama ya ya misore iri

1Kings14:22 Maz’ Abayuda bakora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi
1Kings14:23 Kuko bītabiye ibitabo
1Kings14:24 Mbere mur’ ico gihugu hāri n’abagabo bendana. Kandi bākora ibizira vyose abanyamahanga bākora
1Kings14:25 Maze mu mwaka ugira gatanu umwami Rehobowamu ari ku ngoma

1Kings20:1 Bukeye Beni‐hadadi umwami w’i Siriya akoranya ingabo ziwe zose
1Kings20:2 Atuma intumwa mur’ ico gisagara kuri Ahabu umwami w’Abisirayeli
1Kings20:3 muti Beni‐hadadi agize ngw Amafeza yawe n’amazahabu yawe n’ayiwe; ngo Mbere n’abarusha abandi ubgiza mu bagore bawe no mu bana bawe
1Kings20:4 Umwami w’Abisirayeli arabishura
1Kings20:5 Bukeye izo ntumwa ziragaruka
1Kings20:6 ngw Ariko rer’ ejo nk’ aya mango azorungika abantu biwe i wawe
1Kings20:7 Maz’ umwami w’Abisirayeli atuma guhamagaza abashingantahe bose bo mu gihugu
1Kings20:8 Nukw abo bashingantahe bose n’abantu bose baramwishura
1Kings20:9 Nukw abarira za ntumwa za Beni‐hadadi
1Kings20:10 Beni‐hadadi yongera kumutumako
1Kings20:11 Umwami w’Abisirayeli arabishura
1Kings20:12 Ayo majambo bayabarira Beni‐hadadi akirikw aranywa hamwe na ba bami
1Kings20:13 Ako kanya umuntu avugishwa n’Imana arenguka imbere ya Ahabu umwami w’Abisirayeli
1Kings20:14 Ahabu aramubaza
1Kings20:15 Nukw akoranya iyo mikangara y’abaganwa
1Kings20:16 Mu gihe c’amashōka barasokoroka bava mu gisagara ngo barwane. Kand’ ico gihe Beni‐hadadi yarikw aranywa
1Kings20:17 Ya mikangara y’abaganwa ni bo babanje gusokoroka; kandi Beni‐hadadi yar’ atumye abo kumurerekera
1Kings20:18 Aravuga
1Kings20:19 Maz’ iyo mikangara y’abaganwa
1Kings20:20 batangura gushirako
1Kings20:21 Maz’ umwami w’Abisirayeli na we asokoroka mu gisagara
1Kings20:22 Hanyuma wa muvugishwa aza ku mwami w’Abisirayeli
1Kings20:23 Maz’ abantu b’umwami w’i Siriya baramubarira
1Kings20:24 Kand’ uz’ ugenze urtya: ukwiye gukūrah’ abo bami
1Kings20:25 uheze ukoranye izindi ngabo zingana n’izo wabuze; usubize ifarasi mu gishingo c’iyabuze
1Kings20:26 Nuko wa mwaka utashe
1Kings20:27 Maz’ Abisirayeli barakorakorana
1Kings20:28 Maze haza umuntu w’Imana
1Kings20:29 Nuko bamara imisi ndwi bashagaje ngaho bahanganye. Maze ku musi ugira indwi bararumana. Abisirayeli bica mu Basiriya ingabo ibihumbi ijana ku musi umwe.
1Kings20:30 Abasigaye bahungira mu gisagara c’i Afeka; maz’ uruzitiro rwaho rw’amabuye rusidukira ku bantu ibihumbi mirongwibiri n’indwi mur’ abo bari basigaye. Beni‐hadadi na we arahunga
1Kings20:31 Maz’ abamenyekana biwe baramubarira
1Kings20:32 Nuko bakenyera amagunira
1Kings20:33 Kand’ abo bagabo bari bareretse iryomuvamwo
1Kings20:34 Maze Beni‐hadadi aramubarira
1Kings20:35 Hār’ umuntu wo mu bīga ivy’ ukuvugishwa abarira mugenzi we avugishijwe n’ijambo ry’Uhoraho
1Kings20:36 Uwo muvugishwa aramubarira
1Kings20:37 Uwo muvugishwa abona uwundi muntu
1Kings20:38 Uwo muvugishwa aragenda
1Kings20:39 Maz’ umwami ahaciye
1Kings20:40 Ariko ndiko ndacurumba nja hirya no hino
1Kings20:41 Ubgo nyene aca anyarutsa gukūra ico gitambara mu maso; umwami w’Abisirayeli aca abona kw ar’ uwo mu bavugishwa.
1Kings20:42 Uwo muvugishwa aramubarira
1Kings20:43 Nuk’ umwami w’Abisirayeli aca ataha i we i Samariya

1Kings21:24 Kandi ng’ Ūzogwa mu gisagara mu ba Ahabu azoribga n’imbga; ng’ Ūzogwa mu gahinga azoribga n’ibisīga.

1Kings22:3 Maz’ umwami w’ Abisirayeli abarira abantu biwe
1Kings22:4 Araheza abaza Yehoshafati
1Kings22:5 Maze Yehoshafati abarira umwami w’Abisirayeli

1Kings22:25 Mikaya aramwishura

1Kings22:27 mut’ Umwami agize ng’ Uru rugabo murushire mw ibohero

1Kings22:30 Maz’ umwami w’ Abisirayeli abarira Yehoshafati
1Kings22:31 Kand’ umwami w’i Siriya yari yabariye abagabisha b’imikogote yiwe y’intambara
1Kings22:32 Nukw abo bagabisha b’imikogote y’ intambara babonye Yehoshafati
1Kings22:33 Maz’ abo bagabisha b’imikogote babonye kw atar’ umwami w’Abisirayeli
1Kings22:34 Maz’ umuntu umwe wo mu rugamba apfa kurasa
1Kings22:35 Uwo musi intambara irushiriza kuba ihambaye; umwami bamushigikirira aho nyene mu mukogote wiwe
1Kings22:36 Maze nko ku kirengazuba humvikana akāmo mu ngabo
1Kings22:37 Uko ni k’umwami yatanze; bamujana i Samariya
1Kings22:38 Umukogote wiwe bawogereza ku kidengeri c’i Samariya aho ba maraya biyuhagirira; imbga ziraza zirigata amaraso yiwe nk’ukw ijambo Uhoraho yavuze riri.
1Kings22:39 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Ahabu
1Kings22:40 Uko ni ko Ahabu yahambije ba sekuruza; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Ahaziya asubira ku ngoma yiwe.
1Kings22:41 Yehoshafati mwene Asa aho yima i Buyuda hāri mu mwaka ugira kane Ahabu umwami w’ Abisirayeli ari ku ngoma.
1Kings22:42 Kandi Yehoshafati
1Kings22:43 Kandi yagendera mu ngeso zose za se Asa; ntiyatirimuka ngw azivemwo
1Kings22:44 Kandi Yehoshafati ashira hamwe n’umwami w’Abisirayeli.
1Kings22:45 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Yehoshafati
1Kings22:46 Kand’ abāri basigaye ku bagabo bendana
1Kings22:47 Kandi mur’ ico gihe nta mwami yariho mu gihugu ca Edomu: hāganza uwar’ agihagarikiye.
1Kings22:48 Yehoshafati abāzisha amato y’i Tarushishi yo kwama aja i Ofiru kuzana amazahabu; ariko ntiyashikayo
1Kings22:49 Maze Ahaziya mwene Ahabu asaba Yehoshafati kw abantu biwe bojana n’abiwe mu mato
1Kings22:50 Maze Yehoshafati ahamvya ba sekuruza
1Kings22:51 Ahaziya mwene Ahabu aho yima i Samariya mu Bgisirayeli hāri mu mwaka ugira icumi n’ indwi Yehoshafati umwami w’ Abayuda ari ku ngoma; amara imyaka ibiri aganza Abisirayeli.
1Kings22:52 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi
1Kings22:53 Asaba Bayali arayisenga

2Kings9:9 Ngw Inzu ya Ahabu azoyihindura nk’iya Yerobowamu mwene Nebati
2Kings9:10 Ngo Kand’ imbga zizorīra Yezebeli ku musozi w’i Yezireli
2Kings9:11 Maze Yehu arasohoka
2Kings9:12 Baramwishura
2Kings9:13 Baca babaduka n’ingoga
2Kings9:14 Uku ni ko Yehu mwene Yehoshafati
2Kings9:15 arik’ umwami Yoramu ubgiwe yari yahindukiye asubira i Yezireli
2Kings9:16 Maze Yehu agendera mu mukogote aja i Yezireli
2Kings9:17 Maz’ inderetsi yar’ ihagaze ku munara w’i Yezireli agize artya abona umuce w’ingabo za Yehu zije; aravuga
2Kings9:18 Nuko hagenda umuntu ari kw ifarasi
2Kings9:19 Nukw atuma uwa kabiri na we nyene ari kw ifarasi; abashikiriye arababaza
2Kings9:20 Ya nderetsi iravuga
2Kings9:21 Nuko Yoramu aravuga
2Kings9:22 Maze Yoramu abonye Yehu
2Kings9:23 Yoramu aca ahindukiza amafarasi yiwe
2Kings9:24 Maze Yehu afora umuheto wiwe arawuheza
2Kings9:25 Maze Yehu abarira Bidukari umugabisha wiwe
2Kings9:26 kandi k’Uhoraho yavuze
2Kings9:27 Maze Ahaziya umwami w’i Buyuda abibonye
2Kings9:28 Maz’ abantu biwe bamujana i Yerusalemu ari mu mukogote
2Kings9:29 Kand’ igihe Ahaziya yaja ku ngoma y’i Buyuda
2Kings9:30 Maze Yehu ashitse i Yezireli
2Kings9:31 Maze Yehu agitamaje mw irembo
2Kings9:32 Yehu yunamura amaso arangamiza mw idirisha
2Kings9:33 Arababarira
2Kings9:34 Araheza yinjira mu nzu
2Kings9:35 Ariko bagiye kumuhamba
2Kings9:36 Nuko bagaruka kubimubgira; na we aravuga
2Kings9:37 ati Kand’ umuvyimba wiwe uzohinduka nk’intabire yo ku gahinga mw itongo ry’i Yezireli
2Kings10:1 I Samariya hār’ abahungu mirongwirindwi bandurutse kuri Ahabu. Bukeye Yehu yandika ivyete
2Kings10:2 ati Bene shobuja ko mubafise ngaho
2Kings10:3 mutoranye uwo muri bene shobuja ashimwa kand’ abereye kurusha abandi
2Kings10:4 Ariko baranduka umutima
2Kings10:5 Nuk’ umubgiriza wo mu rugo
2Kings10:6 Yongera kubandikira icete ubga kabiri
2Kings10:7 Nukw ico cete kibashikiriye
2Kings10:8 Intumwa iraza iramubarira
2Kings10:9 Bukeye mu gitondo arasohoka
2Kings10:10 Nuko mumenye kw ata jambo na rimwe Uhoraho yavuze ku nzu ya Ahabu rizokorokera hasi; ereg’ Uhoraho ashikije ivyo yavugishije umusavyi wiwe Eliya.
2Kings10:11 Maze Yehu ageseza abari basigaye bose mu b’ inzu ya Ahabu i Yezireli
2Kings10:12 Araheza arahaguruka avayo
2Kings10:13 ahūra n’ab’ i wabo wa Ahaziya umwami w’i Buyuda; arababaza
2Kings10:14 Abarira abari kumwe na we
2Kings10:15 Avuye aho
2Kings10:16 Aramubarira
2Kings10:17 Ashitse i Samariya
2Kings10:18 Bukeye Yehu akoranya abantu bose
2Kings10:19 None rero ni mumpamagarire ba kamenyi ba Bayali n’abamusenga bose n’abaherezi biwe bose; ntihaze hasigare n’umwe; kuko ngomba guha Bayali ikimazi gihambaye; ūzobura kuza wese azokabona. Ariko Yehu cār’ icenge
2Kings10:20 Maze Yehu aravuga
2Kings10:21 Nuko Yehu atuma mu Bgisirayeli hose; abasenga Bayali bose baraza
2Kings10:22 Maz’ abarira uwajejwe ububīko bg’imyambaro
2Kings10:23 Maze Yehu yinjirana na Yehonadabu mwene Rekabu mu ngoro ya Bayali
2Kings10:24 Nukw arinjira ngw atange ibimazi
2Kings10:25 Maz’ ahejeje kwosa ibimazi
2Kings10:26 Inkingi zari mur’ iyo ngoro ya Bayali bazijana hanze
2Kings10:27 Maze bamenagura inkingi ya Bayali
2Kings10:28 Uko ni ko Yehu yahenebereje ya mana Bayali
2Kings10:29 Ariko rero Yehu ntiyaretse gukurikira ivyaha vya Yerobowamu mwene Nebati
2Kings10:30 Hanyuma Uhoraho abarira Yehu
2Kings10:31 Ariko Yehu ntiyababara kugendera mu vyagezwe vy’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli n’umutima wiwe wose; ntiyava mu vyaha vya Yerobowamu
2Kings10:32 Mur’ ico gihe Uhoraho atangura kugabanya igihugu c’Ubgisirayeli; Hazayeli abanesha ku mbibe zose z’Ubgisirayeli
2Kings10:33 uhereye kuri Yorodani ugasubiza i burasirazuba
2Kings10:34 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Yehu
2Kings10:35 Nuko Yehu ahamvya ba sekuruza
2Kings10:36 Igihe Yehu yamaze ku ngoma y’Abisirayeli yar’ imyaka mirongwibiri n’umunani.
2Kings11:1 Maze Ataliya nyina wa Ahaziya abonye k’umwana wiwe Ahaziya apfuye
2Kings11:2 Ariko Yehosheba umukobga w’umwami Yoramu
2Kings11:3 Maz’ amarana na we imyaka itandatu
2Kings11:4 Mu mwaka ugira indwi
2Kings11:5 Arababarira
2Kings11:6 ikindi kigiragatatu kize gishibame ku kirimba citwa Suri
2Kings11:7 Kand’ imice yanyu ibiri y’abazoba bageze gukūrwa kw isabato
2Kings11:8 muze mukikize umwami impande zose
2Kings11:9 Nukw abo bagabisha bagaba amajana babigenza nk’uk’ uwo muherezi Yehoyada yageze kwose; umuntu wese azana abo kuja ku mbu zabo kw isabato
2Kings11:10 Uwo muherezi aha abo bagabisha amacumu n’inkinzo vyar’ ivy’ umwami Dawidi
2Kings11:11 Nukw abo bashibamyi bahagarara kur’ iyo ngoro
2Kings11:12 Maze Yehoyada asohokana uwo mwana w’umwami
2Kings11:13 Maze Ataliya yumvise urwamo rw’abashibamyi n’abantu
2Kings11:14 Yitegereje abona umwami ahagararanye n’inkingi
2Kings11:15 Maz’ umuherezi Yehoyada abarira abagabisha bagaba amajana
2Kings11:16 Nuko baramukinjurira
2Kings11:17 Maze Yehoyada ashinga isezerano hagati y’Uhoraho n’umwami n’abantu
2Kings11:18 Abantu bose bo mu gihugu baca bagenda ku ngoro ya Bayali
2Kings11:19 Ajana ba bagabisha bagaba amajana na ba Bakariti na ba bashibamyi n’abantu bose bo mu gihugu; basohokana umwami mu ngoro y’Uhoraho
2Kings11:20 Maz’ abantu bose bo mu gihugu baranezerwa
2Kings11:21 Yowasi yar’ amaze imyaka ndwi igihe yaja ku ngoma.
2Kings12:1 Mu mwaka ugira indwi Yehu ari ku ngoma
2Kings12:2 Yowasi akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari vyiza igihe cose Yehoyada umuherezi yar’ akimwigisha.
2Kings12:3 Mugabo ibitabo vyo ku mpinga z’imisozi ntivyakūrwaho; abantu bāri bagitangira ibimazi mur’ ivyo bitabo
2Kings12:4 Bukeye Yowasi abarira abaherezi
2Kings12:5 ayo yose abaherezi bayatware
2Kings12:6 Ariko kurinda ushitsa mu mwaka ugira mirongwibiri na gatatu umwami Yowasi ari ku ngoma
2Kings12:7 Maz’ umwami Yowasi ahamagaza umuherezi Yehoyada n’abandi baherezi
2Kings12:8 Nukw abaherezi bemera kubivamwo
2Kings12:9 Maz’ umuherezi Yehoyada yābīra isandugu
2Kings12:10 Maz’ iyo babonye amahera agwiriye mur’ iyo sandugu
2Kings12:11 Bamaze kugera ayo mahera ku munzane bakayaha abashinzwe gukoresha ibikorwa vyo kur’ iyo ngoro y’Uhoraho; na bo bakayahemba ababāji n’abubatsi bākora kur’ iyo ngoro nyene
2Kings12:12 bo n’abubakisha amabuye n’abayabāza; bakayagura n’imbaho n’amabuye abāje vyo gusanura aho hāsambutse h’ iyo ngoro y’Uhoraho
2Kings12:13 Arikw amahera yazanwa mur’ iyo ngoro y’Uhoraho ntiyakūrwamw’ inzavya z’ifeza cank’ imbugita cank’ imibehe cank’ inzumbete
2Kings12:14 kuko bāyaha abākora ivyo bikorwa ngo bayakoreshe gusanura iyo ngoro.
2Kings12:15 Kand’ abo bantu bāhabga ayo mahera yo guhemba abakozi
2Kings12:16 Arikw amahera y’ibimazi vy’impongano n’ay’ ibimazi bitangirwa ivyaha
2Kings12:17 Bukeye Hazayeli umwami w’i Siriya aradūga
2Kings12:18 Yowasi umwami w’i Buyuda aca yābīra ivyatanzwekw inyegu vyose
2Kings12:19 Nukw ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Yowasi
2Kings12:20 Bukeye abantu bo mu banyarugo biwe baramugarariza
2Kings12:21 Abo banyarugo biwe bāmwishe ni Yozakari umwana wa Shimeyati na Yehozabadi umwana wa Shomeri; nukw arapfa

2Kings13:20 Bukeye Elisa arahwera
2Kings13:21 Umusi ur’ izina

2Kings14:4 Mugabo ibitabo vyo ku mpinga z’imisozi ntivyakūrwaho; abantu bāri bagitangira ibimazi mur’ ivyo bitabo
2Kings14:5 Hanyuma amaze kubona kw ahangamye ku ngoma
2Kings14:6 Arikw abana b’abo bicanyi ntiyabica
2Kings14:7 Kandi yishe mu Banyedomu abantu ibihumbi cumi
2Kings14:8 Hanyuma Amaziya atuma intumwa kuri Yehowasi mwene Yehowahazi
2Kings14:9 Yehowasi umwami w’Abisirayeli atuma kwishura Amaziya umwami w’i Buyuda
2Kings14:10 Nka ko waratsinze Abanyedomu

2Kings14:12 Maz’ Abayuda baneshwa n’Abisirayeli

2Kings14:22 Ni we yasanasannye i Elati

2Kings16:3 ariko yagendera mu ngeso z’abami b’ Abisirayeli
2Kings16:4 Yatanga ibimazi akosereza imibavu mu bitabo no ku mpinga z’imisozi no musi y’igiti cose gitotahaye.

2Kings17:1 Mu mwaka ugira icumi na kabiri Ahazi umwami w’i Buyuda ari ku ngoma
2Kings17:2 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi
2Kings17:3 Bukeye Shalumaneseri umwami w’i Ashuri aradūga
2Kings17:4 Ariko hanyuma umwami w’i Ashuri abona ko Hoseya arimw’ ubugarariji
2Kings17:5 Maz’ umwami w’i Ashuri atera igihugu cose
2Kings17:6 Mu mwaka ugira icenda Hoseya ari ku ngoma
2Kings17:7 Ivyo vyābaye birtyo kukw Abisirayeli bācumuye k’Uhoraho Imana yabo yabakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa
2Kings17:8 bakagendera mu migenzo y’amahanga Uhoraho yari yarirukanye imbere yabo
2Kings17:9 Kand’ Abisirayeli bāma bakora ibidatunganye mu mpisho
2Kings17:10 Kandi bishingiye inkingi na Ashera ku musozi wose uhagaze
2Kings17:11 bakosereza imibavu mu tunyabugoro twose
2Kings17:12 Bagasaba ibigirwamana
2Kings17:13 Yamar’ Uhoraho yama abūrira Abisirayeli n’Abayuda
2Kings17:14 Ariko banka kwumva; bashinga amazosi
2Kings17:15 Bakēngēra amateka yiwe
2Kings17:16 Nuko bata amabgirizwa yose y’Uhoraho Imana yabo
2Kings17:17 bagatanga abana babo b’abahungu n’abakobga kw ibimazi ngo boserezwe mu muriro
2Kings17:18 Ni co catumye Uhoraho arakira cane Abisirayeli
2Kings17:19 Kandi n’Abayuda na bo ntibitondeye amabgirizwa y’Uhoraho Imana yabo
2Kings17:20 Nuk’ Uhoraho aheba uruvyaro rwose rwa Isirayeli
2Kings17:21 Kukw igihe yashikura Abisirayeli
2Kings17:22 Maz’ Abisirayeli bagendera mu vyaha vyose Yerobowamu yakora
2Kings17:23 gushitsa ah’ Uhoraho yabakūriye imbere yiwe
2Kings17:24 Maz’ umwami w’i Ashuri yimura abantu i Babuloni n’i Kuta n’i Ava n’i Hamati n’i Sefaravayimu
2Kings17:25 Ariko bagitangura kuhaba ntibātinya Uhoraho; ni co catumye Uhoraho abatērēra intambge
2Kings17:26 Ni kwo kubarira umwami w’i Ashuri
2Kings17:27 Maz’ umwami w’i Ashuri aravuga
2Kings17:28 Nuk’ umwe mu baherezi bari barambukanywe babakūra i Samariya araza
2Kings17:29 Yamar’ abo mur’ ayo mahanga yose bakomeza kwironderera izabo mana
2Kings17:30 Abāvuye i Babuloni bigirira ikigirwamana citwa Sukoti‐benoti
2Kings17:31 ab’i Ava bigirira Nibuhazi na Tarutaki
2Kings17:32 Ariko n’Uhoraho na we baramusaba
2Kings17:33 Uko ni ko bāsaba Uhoraho
2Kings17:34 No gushitsa uyu musi wa none baracagenza nk’uko bamye bagenza kera; ntibatinya Uhoraho
2Kings17:35 akabasezeranira isezerano
2Kings17:36 ariko jewe Uhoraho nabakūje mu gihugu ca Egiputa ububasha bganje bginshi n’ukuboko kubanguye
2Kings17:37 kand’ amateka n’imigenzo n’ivyagezwe n’amabgirizwa
2Kings17:38 Kand’ isezerano nasezeranye namwe ntimuze muryibagire
2Kings17:39 ariko jewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu abe ari jewe mwubaha; nanje nzobarokora mbakūre mu maboko y’abansi banyu bose.
2Kings17:40 Yamara ntibaruha bavyumva
2Kings17:41 Nukw ab’ ayo mahanga bātinya Uhoraho
2Kings18:1 Mu mwaka ugira gatatu Hoseya mwene Ela
2Kings18:2 Yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’itanu igihe yima
2Kings18:3 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari vyiza
2Kings18:4 Akūrah’ ibitabo vyo ku mpinga z’imisozi
2Kings18:5 Hezekiya yizigira Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli; kandi mu bami bose b’i Buyuda bāmuherukiye nta wahwanye na we
2Kings18:6 kuko yifatanije n’Uhoraho akaramata
2Kings18:7 Kand’ Uhoraho yabana na we
2Kings18:8 Atera Abafilisitiya ukarinda ushitsa i Gaza n’intāra yaho
2Kings18:9 Mu mwaka ugira kane umwami Hezekiya ari ku ngoma
2Kings18:10 Maze hashize imyaka itatu barahanesha; i Samariya hāneshejwe mu mwaka ugira gatandatu Hezekiya ari ku ngoma
2Kings18:11 Umwami w’i Ashuri araheza ajana Abisirayeli ar’ inyagano
2Kings18:12 ivyo vyabaye kukw Abisirayeli batumviye Uhoraho Imana yabo
2Kings18:13 Mu mwaka ugira icumi na kane umwami Hezekiya ari ku ngoma
2Kings18:14 Maze Hezekiya umwami w’i Buyuda atuma ku mwami w’i Ashuri i Lakishi
2Kings18:15 Hezekiya amuha amafeza yose yari mu ngoro y’Uhoraho
2Kings18:16 Mur’ ico gihe Hezekiya umwami w’i Buyuda yomorora izahabu ku nzugi z’urusengero rw’ Uhoraho n’izo ku nkingi yari yarometseko
2Kings18:17 Bukeye umwami w’i Ashuri atuma Tarutani na Rabusarisi na Rabushake
2Kings18:18 Maze bahamagaje umwami
2Kings18:19 Rabushake arababarira
2Kings18:20 Muti K’uvuze ng’ ufise inama n’inkomezi zo kurwana
2Kings18:21 Mut’ Erega wishimiye ya nkoni y’irenga rivunitse
2Kings18:22 Naho mwomubarira ko mwishimiye Uhoraho Imana yanyu: none si yo Hezekiya yakūyeh’ ibitabo vyayo n’ibicaniro vyayo
2Kings18:23 Muti None rero
2Kings18:24 Muti None se woshobora ute gukora mu maso y’umugabisha n’umwe wo mu basavyi ba shebuja bo hanyuma y’abandi
2Kings18:25 Muti Mbega yadūze gutera aha hantu no kuharandura
2Kings18:26 Maze Eliyakimu mwene Hilukiya
2Kings18:27 Ariko Rabushake arabishura
2Kings18:28 Maze Rabushake arahagarara
2Kings18:29 Uku ni k’umwami agize
2Kings18:30 Ngo Kandi Hezekiya ntabizigize Uhoraho
2Kings18:31 Ntimwumvire Hezekiya: kuk’ ukw ari k’umwami w’i Ashuri agize
2Kings18:32 ngo Gushitsa igihe azozira akabajana mu gihugu gihwanye n’icanyu
2Kings18:33 Mbega mu mana z’abanyamahanga hari n’imwe yigeze gukiza igihugu cayo ngo ntigikorokere mu maboko y’umwami w’i Ashuri?
2Kings18:34 Ngo Mbeg’ imana z’i Hamati n’izo muri Arupadi ziri hehe? Imana z’i Sefaravayimu n’iz’ i Hena n’iz’ i Iva ziri hehe? Ngo Mbega zarakijije Samariya ngo ntihakorokere mu maboko yiwe?
2Kings18:35 Ngo N’izihe mu mana zose zo mur’ ivyo bihugu zākijije igihugu cazo ngo ntigikorokere mu maboko yiwe
2Kings18:36 Maz’ abantu barihorera
2Kings18:37 Hanyuma wa muzezwarugo Eliyakimu mwene Hilukiya

2Kings19:7 Ngo Rāba azomushiramw’ uwundi mutima
2Kings19:8 Nuko Rabushake asubira inyuma
2Kings19:9 Bukeye umwami w’i Ashuri yumvise bavuga Tiruhaka umwami w’i Etiyopiya
2Kings19:10 mut’ Uku abe ari ko muzobgira Hezekiya umwami w’i Buyuda

2Kings19:12 Muti Mbeg’ imana z’amahanga

2Kings19:17 Uhoraho
2Kings19:18 bātereye imana zabo mu muriro; ariko ntizar’ imana nya mana
2Kings19:19 Nuko none

2Kings19:21 Ut’ Iri ni ryo jambo Uhoraho yamuvuzeko
2Kings19:22 Uwo watonganije ukamurogotako ni nde? Ni nde wirahiye akararamango ukamurābana agakēngērwe? Erega ni jewe Uwera wa Isirayeli.

2Kings19:32 Uti Ni co gitumye Uhoraho avuga ivy’ umwami w’i Ashuri

2Kings20:1 Mur’ iyo misi Hezekiya ararwara agera hafi yo gupfa. Bukeye ūvugishwa n’Imana Yesaya mwene Amosi aza kuri we
2Kings20:2 Maze Hezekiya ahindukiriza amaso ku rusika
2Kings20:3 ati Tegēra
2Kings20:4 Ariko Yesaya atararēngāna ngw ave mu nyubakwa
2Kings20:5 riti Subira inyuma
2Kings20:6 Uti Kandi ku misi yawe yongeyekw imyaka cumi n’itanu. Uti Kand’ azokurokorana n’iki gisagara
2Kings20:7 Maze Yesaya aravuga
2Kings20:8 Hezekiya abaza Yesaya
2Kings20:9 Yesaya aramwishura
2Kings20:10 Hezekiya aramwishura
2Kings20:11 Nuk’ uwo muvugishwa Yesaya atakambira Uhoraho; na we ahēra ah’ igitūtu cari kigeze ku ntambuko z’urugero rwashinzwe na Ahazi
2Kings20:12 Ico gihe Merodaki‐Baladani mwene Baladani umwami w’i Babuloni arungikira Hezekiya ivyete n’ingemurano
2Kings20:13 Maz’ abātumwe Hezekiya abākīra neza
2Kings20:14 Bukeye haza uwavugishwa n’ Imana Yesaya ku mwami Hezekiya
2Kings20:15 Arongera aramubaza
2Kings20:16 Maze Yesaya abarira Hezekiya
2Kings20:17 Eh’ imisi izoza
2Kings20:18 Kand’ abahungu bawe uzoba wikūriye mu nda wavyaye bazobajana
2Kings20:19 Maze Hezekiya yishura Yesaya
2Kings20:20 Nukw ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Hezekiya
2Kings20:21 Maze Hezekiya ahamvya ba sekuruza
2Kings21:1 Manase yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka cumi n’ibiri; ayimarakw imyaka mirongwitanu n’itanu ar’ i Yerusalemu; nyina yitwa Hefusiba.
2Kings21:2 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi
2Kings21:3 Yongera gutabisha ibitabo ku mpinga z’imisozi
2Kings21:4 Yubaka n’ibicaniro mu ngoro y’Uhoraho
2Kings21:5 Kandi yubakira izo ngabo zose zo kw ijuru ibicaniro mu ntangaro no mu nyubakwa vyo ku ngoro y’Uhoraho.
2Kings21:6 Atanga umuhungu wiwe kw ikimazi ngo yoserezwe mu muriro
2Kings21:7 Ca gishushanyo ca Ashera yabāje agishinga mu ngoro y’Uhoraho
2Kings21:8 Kand’ ati Sinzosubira guturatuza Abisirayeli ngo bave mu gihugu nahaye ba sekuruza
2Kings21:9 Yamara ntibaruha bavyumva; ariko Manase abakwegera mu bibi kuruta ivyo amahanga yakora
2Kings21:10 Bukeye Uhoraho avugira mu basavyi biwe yavugisha
2Kings21:11 ati Manase umwami w’i Buyuda ko yakoze ivyo bizira vyose vy’ubuyobe
2Kings21:12 ni co gitumye jewe Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli mvuze
2Kings21:13 Kand’ umugozi nageresheje i Samariya ni wo nzogeresha i Yerusalemu
2Kings21:14 Kandi nzoshiburira hirya amasigarira yo mw ishamvu yanje
2Kings21:15 kuko bākoze ibibi imbere yanje
2Kings21:16 Kandi Manase yavishije amaraso menshi y’aberanda
2Kings21:17 Nukw ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Manase
2Kings21:18 Nuko Manase ahamvya ba sekuruza
2Kings21:19 Amoni yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’ibiri; ayimarakw imyaka ibiri ar’ i Yerusalemu; nyina yitwa Meshulemeti umukobga wa Harusi w’i Yotuba.
2Kings21:20 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi
2Kings21:21 Yagendana ingeso zose za se
2Kings21:22 Ava k’Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza
2Kings21:23 Bukeye abanyarugo b’ umwami Amoni baramugarariza
2Kings21:24 Maz’ abantu bo mu gihugu bica abo bantu bose bāgararije umwami Amoni
2Kings21:25 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Amoni
2Kings21:26 Nukw ahambga mu mva yiwe yari yarimbishije muri wa murima war’ uwa Uza; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Yosiya asubira ku ngoma yiwe.
2Kings22:1 Yosiya yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka munani; ayimarakw imyaka mirongwitatu n’ umwe ar’ i Yerusalemu; nyina yitwa Yedida
2Kings22:2 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari vyiza
2Kings22:3 Mu mwaka ugira icumi n’ umunani umwami Yosiya ari ku ngoma
2Kings22:4 ati Dūga uje iyo Hilukiya ari
2Kings22:5 bayahe abashinzwe gukoresha ibikorwa vyo ku ngoro y’Uhoraho
2Kings22:6 bayahe ababāji n’ abubatsi n’abubakisha amabuye; ayandi bayagure imbaho n’amabuye abāje vyo gusanura iyo ngoro.
2Kings22:7 Mugabo
2Kings22:8 Bukeye Hilukiya umuherezi mukuru abarira Shafani umukarani
2Kings22:9 Maz’ uwo mukarani Shafani asubira ku mwami
2Kings22:10 Uwo mukarani Shafani yongera kubarira umwami
2Kings22:11 Maz’ umwami yumvise amajambo yo mur’ ico gitabo c’ivyagezwe
2Kings22:12 Maz’ umwami atuma Hilukiya umuherezi na Ahikamu mwene Shafani na Akibori mwene Mikaya n’uwo mukarani Shafani nyene na Asaya umumenyekana wiwe
2Kings22:13 ati Ni mugende munsigurize Uhoraho
2Kings22:14 Nuko Hilukiya umuherezi na Ahikamu na Akibori na Shafani na Asaya baragenda
2Kings22:15 Arabishura

2Kings22:17 muti Kuko bāmuvuyeko

2Kings22:19 ngo Kuko watsinzwe mu mutima wawe
