2Kings23:1 Maz’ umwami atuma guhamagaza abakuru bose b’i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu
2Kings23:2 Umwami araheza aradūga
2Kings23:3 Maz’ umwami ahagararana n’inkingi
2Kings23:4 Maz’ umwami abarira Hilukiya umuherezi mukuru
2Kings23:5 Yirukana abaherezi b’ ivyo bishushanyo
2Kings23:6 Akūra n’igishushanyo ca Ashera mu ngoro y’Uhoraho
2Kings23:7 Asangangura ivyumba vy’ abagabo bendana vyari mu ngoro y’Uhoraho
2Kings23:8 Akūra abaherezi bose mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda
2Kings23:9 Mugabo abo baherezi bo mur’ ivyo bitabo ntibādūga ngo bēgēre igicaniro c’Uhoraho i Yerusalemu
2Kings23:10 Kand’ ahumanya n’i Tofeti mu mwonga wa bene Hinomu
2Kings23:11 Ahīnda amafarasi abami b’i Buyuda bari baraterekereje izuba
2Kings23:12 Kand’ ibicaniro vyari hejuru ku nzu
2Kings23:13 Kand’ ibitabo vyātabge ku mpinga y’umusozi werekeye i Yerusalemu
2Kings23:14 Amenagura amabuye bāshinze kw inkingi
2Kings23:15 Kand’ igicaniro c’i Beteli
2Kings23:16 Maze Yosiya akebutse
2Kings23:17 Maze Yosiya arabaza
2Kings23:18 Umwami aravuga
2Kings23:19 Kand’ utunyabugoro twose two mu bitabo vyo mu bisagara vy’i Samariya
2Kings23:20 Yicira ku bicaniro abaherezi bose bāri ngaho
2Kings23:21 Maz’ umwami abarira abantu bose
2Kings23:22 Ntihigeze kuba umusi wa Pasika uhwanye n’uyo
2Kings23:23 Iyo Pasika y’Uhoraho bāyigiriye i Yerusalemu mu mwaka ugira icumi n’umunani w’umwami Yosiya.
2Kings23:24 Kand’ abahamagara imizimu n’abamenyi n’ibishushanyo vyitwa terafimu n’ibishushanyo vy’ibigirwamana
2Kings23:25 Kandi nta mwami mu bāmwitangiye imbere yar’ ahwanye na we
2Kings23:26 Ariko na ho nyene Uhoraho ntiyahindukiye ngw areke uburake bgiwe bg’inkazi
2Kings23:27 Uhoraho aravuga
2Kings23:28 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Yosiya
2Kings23:29 Ku ngoma yiwe Farawo‐neko umwami wa Egiputa aradūga aja gutera umwami w’i Ashuri ku ruzi Efurate; maz’ umwami Yosiya aja kumutega ngw amurwanye; ariko bakirumanira i Megido
2Kings23:30 Maz’ abantu biwe bajana umuvyimba wiwe mu mukogote w’intambara
2Kings23:31 Yehowahazi yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’itatu; ayimarakw amezi atatu ar’ i Yerusalemu; nyina yitwa Hamutali
2Kings23:32 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi
2Kings23:33 Bukeye Farawo‐neko amuta mu ngoyi amubohera i Ribula mu gihugu c’i Hamati
2Kings23:34 Maze Farawo‐neko yimika Eliyakimu mwene Yosiya nyene
2Kings23:35 Nuko Yehoyakimu aha Farawo ayo mafeza n’amazahabu; mugabo kugira ngw aronke ayo mahera yo gutanga
2Kings23:36 Kandi Yehoyakimu yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’itanu; ayimarakw imyaka cumi n’umwe ar’ i Yerusalemu; nyina yitwa Zebida
2Kings23:37 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi
2Kings24:1 Ku ngoma ya Yehoyakimu

2Kings24:3 Ayo yose Abayuda bāyabonye kubg’ icagezwe c’Uhoraho gusa
2Kings24:4 n’amaraso y’aberanda yavishije; kuko yujuje i Yerusalemu amaraso y’aberanda; nukw ivyo Uhoraho ntiyemera kubiharira.
2Kings24:5 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Yehoyakimu

2Kings24:10 Ico gihe ingabo za Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni ziradūga

2Kings25:3 Ku musi ugira icenda wo mu kwezi kwa kane

2Kings25:10 Maz’ ingabo zose z’Abakaludaya zari kumwe n’uwo mukuru w’abashibamyi zisangangura inzitiro z’i Yerusalemu impande zose.

2Kings25:12 Arikw asiga ba nyarucari bo mur’ ico gihugu

2Kings25:16 Ku vya za nkingi zompi
2Kings25:17 Inkingi imwe‐imwe uburebure bgayo bgar’ amatambge cumi n’umunani y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora; yarik’ umwashi w’umuringa: uburebure bg’uwo mwashi bgar’ amatambge atatu
2Kings25:18 Nuko wa mukuru w’abashibamyi afata Seraya umuherezi mukuru

2Kings25:30 Kandi ku bimutunga
1Chronicles1:1 Adamu na Seti na Enoshi
1Chronicles1:2 na Kenani na Mahalaleli na Yaredi
1Chronicles1:3 na Henoki na Metusela na Lameki
1Chronicles1:4 na Nowa na Shemu na Hamu na Yafeti.
1Chronicles1:5 Aba Yafeti ni Gomeri na Magogi na Madayi na Yavani na Tubalu na Mesheki na Tirasi.
1Chronicles1:6 Aba Gomeri ni Ashikenazi na Rifati na Togaruma.
1Chronicles1:7 Aba Yavani ni Elisha na Tarushishi na Kitimu na Dodanimu.
1Chronicles1:8 Aba Hamu ni Kushi na Misirayimu na Puti na Kanani.
1Chronicles1:9 Aba Kushi ni Seba na Havila na Sabuta na Rama na Sabuteka. Bene Rama ni Sheba na Dedani.
1Chronicles1:10 Kandi Kushi yavyaye na Nimurodi: ni we wa mbere yabaye cīhabugabo mw isi.
1Chronicles1:11 Misirayimu yakomōtsweko n’Abaludi n’Abanami n’Abalehabi n’Abanafutuhi
1Chronicles1:12 n’Abapatirusi n’Abakasiluhi (ni bo bākomōtsweko n’Abafilisitiya)
1Chronicles1:13 Kanani yavyaye imfura yiwe Sidoni
1Chronicles1:14 kandi Kanani ni we yakomōtsweko n’Abayebusi n’Abamori n’Abagirugashi
1Chronicles1:15 n’Abahiwi n’Abaruki n’Abasini
1Chronicles1:16 n’Abaruvadi n’Abasemari n’Abahamati.
1Chronicles1:17 Aba Shemu ni Elamu na Ashuri na Arupakisadi na Ludi na Aramu na Uzi na Huli na Geteri na Mesheki.
1Chronicles1:18 Arupakisadi yavyaye Shela; Shela yavyaye Eberi.
1Chronicles1:19 Eberi yavyaye abahungu babiri: umwe yitwa Pelegi
1Chronicles1:20 Yokitani yavyaye Alumodadi na Shelefu na Hasarumaweti na Yera
1Chronicles1:21 na Hadoramu na Uzalu na Dikila
1Chronicles1:22 na Ebali na Abimayeli na Sheba
1Chronicles1:23 na Ofiru na Havila na Yobabu; abo bose ni bene Yokitani.
1Chronicles1:24 Shemu na Arupakisadi na Shela
1Chronicles1:25 na Eberi na Pelegi na Reyu
1Chronicles1:26 na Serugi na Nahori na Tera
1Chronicles1:27 na Aburamu
1Chronicles1:28 Bene Aburahamu ni Isaka na Ishimayeli.
1Chronicles1:29 Uru ni rwo ruvyaro rwabo: imfura ya Ishimayeli ni Nebayoti
1Chronicles1:30 na Mishima na Duma na Masa na Hadadi na Tema
1Chronicles1:31 na Yeturi na Nafishi na Kedema; abo ni bo bana ba Ishimayeli.
1Chronicles1:32 Aba ni bo bana Ketura
1Chronicles1:33 Bene Midiyani ni Efa na Eferi na Hanoki na Abida na Eludaya. Abo bose n’uruvyaro rwa Ketura.
1Chronicles1:34 Aburahamu yavyaye Isaka. Bene Isaka ni Esau na Isirayeli.
1Chronicles1:35 Bene Esau ni Elifazi na Ruweli na Yushi na Yalamu na Kora.
1Chronicles1:36 Bene Elifazi ni Temani na Omari na Sefi na Gatamu na Kenazi na Timuna na Amaleki.
1Chronicles1:37 Bene Ruweli ni Nahati na Zera na Shama na Miza.
1Chronicles1:38 Bene Seyiri ni Lotani na Shobali na Sibeyoni na Ana na Dishoni na Etseri na Dishani.
1Chronicles1:39 Bene Lotani ni Hori na Homamu; kandi mushiki wa Lotani yari Timuna.
1Chronicles1:40 Bene Shobali ni Aliyani na Manahati na Ebali na Shefi na Onamu. Bene Sibeyoni ni Aya na Ana.
1Chronicles1:41 Bene Ana ni Dishoni. Bene Dishoni ni Hamurani na Eshibani na Yitirani na Kerani.
1Chronicles1:42 Bene Etseri ni Biluhani na Zayavani na Yakani. Bene Dishani ni Uzi na Arani.
1Chronicles1:43 Aba ni bo bami babaye ku ngoma mu gihugu ca Edomu
1Chronicles1:44 Bela atanze
1Chronicles1:45 Yobabu atanze
1Chronicles1:46 Hushamu atanze
1Chronicles1:47 Hadadi atanze
1Chronicles1:48 Samula atanze
1Chronicles1:49 Sauli atanze
1Chronicles1:50 Bayali‐hanani atanze
1Chronicles1:51 Hadadi na we aratanga. Abakuru b’imiryango yakomōtse kuri Edomu ni Timuna na Aliya na Yeteti
1Chronicles1:52 na Oholibama na Ela na Pinoni
1Chronicles1:53 na Kenazi na Temani na Mibusari
1Chronicles1:54 na Magidiyeli na Iramu. Abo ni bo bakuru b’imiryango yakomōtse kuri Edomu.
1Chronicles2:1 Aba ni bo bana ba Isirayeli: Reyubeni na Simeyoni na Lewi na Yuda na Isakari na Zebuloni
1Chronicles2:2 na Dani na Yosefu na Benyamini na Nafutali na Gadi na Asheri.
1Chronicles2:3 Bene Yuda ni Eri na Onani na Shela; abo ukw ari batatu yabavyaranye na Batishuwa Umunyakananikazi. Kandi Eri
1Chronicles2:4 Maze Yuda avyara Peresi na Zera kuri Tamari
1Chronicles2:5 Bene Peresi ni Hesironi na Hamuli.
1Chronicles2:6 Bene Zera ni Zimuri na Etani na Hemani na Kalukoli na Dara; bose na bose bāri batanu.
1Chronicles2:7 Mwene Karumi ni Akani
1Chronicles2:8 Mwene Etani ni Azariya.
1Chronicles2:9 Kand’ abana Hesironi yavyaye ni Yerameyeli na Ramu na Kelubayi.
1Chronicles2:10 Ramu avyara Aminadabu; Aminadabu avyara Nahashoni
1Chronicles2:11 Nahashoni avyara Saluma; Saluma avyara Bowazi.
1Chronicles2:12 Bowazi avyara Obedi; Obedi avyara Isayi.
1Chronicles2:13 Isayi avyara Eliyabu
1Chronicles2:14 uwa kane ni Netaneli
1Chronicles2:15 uwa gatandatu ni Osemu
1Chronicles2:16 kandi bashiki babo ni Seruwiya na Abigayili. Abana ba Seruwiya ni Abishayi na Yowabu na Asaheli
1Chronicles2:17 Abigayili avyara Amasa
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebu mwene Hesironi avyara abana kuri Azuba umugore wiwe
1Chronicles2:19 Azuba apfuye
1Chronicles2:20 Huri avyara Uri
1Chronicles2:21 Hanyuma Hesironi yābīra umukobga wa Makiri se wa Gileyadi
1Chronicles2:22 Segubu avyara Yayiri; Yayiri ni we yaganza ibisagara mirongwibiri na bitatu mu ntāra y’i Gileyadi.
1Chronicles2:23 Hanyuma Geshuri na Aramu banyaga aba Yayiri ivyo bisagara
1Chronicles2:24 Bukeye Hesironi amaze gupfa
1Chronicles2:25 Bene Yerameyeli imfura ya Hesironi n’aba: uw’ imfura ni Ramu
1Chronicles2:26 Kandi Yerameyeli yar’ afise uwundi mugore yitwa Atara; uwo ni we nyina wa Onamu.
1Chronicles2:27 Bene Ramu imfura ya Yerameyeli ni Mayasi na Yamini na Ekeri.
1Chronicles2:28 Bene Onamu ni Shamayi na Yada; bene Shamayi ni Nadabu na Abishuri.
1Chronicles2:29 Muka Abishuri yitwa Abihayili: bavyarana Ahubani na Molidi.
1Chronicles2:30 Bene Nadabu ni Seledi na Apayimu; ariko Seledi apfa ar’ imponnyi.
1Chronicles2:31 Mwene Apayimu ni Ishi; mwene Ishi ni Sheshani; mwene Sheshani ni Ahulayi.
1Chronicles2:32 Bene Yada murumuna wa Shamayi ni Yeteri na Yonatani; ariko Yeteri apfa ar’ imponnyi.
1Chronicles2:33 Bene Yonatani ni Peleti na Zaza. Abo bose ni bo bandurutse kuri Yerameyeli.
1Chronicles2:34 Kandi Sheshani nta muhungu yagira
1Chronicles2:35 nuko Sheshani uwo mugurano wiwe amushingira umukobga wiwe
1Chronicles2:36 Atayi avyara Natani
1Chronicles2:37 Zabadi avyara Efulali
1Chronicles2:38 Obedi avyara Yehu
1Chronicles2:39 Azariya avyara Helesi
1Chronicles2:40 Eleyasa avyara Sisimayi
1Chronicles2:41 Shalumu avyara Yekamiya
1Chronicles2:42 Mwene Kalebu murumuna wa Yerameyeli ni Maresha
1Chronicles2:43 Bene Heburoni ni Kora na Tapuwa na Rekemu na Shema.
1Chronicles2:44 Shema avyara Rahamu se wa Yorikeyamu; Rekemu na we avyara Shamayi.
1Chronicles2:45 Mwene Shamayi ni Mayoni; kandi Mayoni ni we se wa Beti‐suri.
1Chronicles2:46 Kandi Efa
1Chronicles2:47 Bene Yahidayi ni Regemu na Yotamu na Geshani na Peleti na Efa na Shafi.
1Chronicles2:48 Kandi Mayaka
1Chronicles2:49 Kandi bavyarana na Shafi se wa Madumana
1Chronicles2:50 Abo bose ni bo bandurutse kuri Kalebu. Bene Huri imfura ya Efurata ni Shobali se wa Kiriyati‐yeyarimu
1Chronicles2:51 na Saluma se wa Betelehemu
1Chronicles2:52 Kandi Shobali se wa Kiriyati‐yeyarimu yar’ afise abandi bahungu
1Chronicles2:53 Imiryango yandurutse kuri Kiriyati‐yeyarimu n’Abanyituri n’Abaputi n’Abashumati n’Abamishurayi; kur’ abo ni ho handurutse Abasorati n’Abanyeshitayoli.
1Chronicles2:54 Abandurutse kuri Saluma ni Betelehemu n’Abanetofati na Atiroti‐Beti‐Yowabu na Hasi‐hamanahati n’Abasori.
1Chronicles2:55 Imiryango y’abakarani yaba i Yabeshi

1Chronicles3:3 uwa gatanu ni Shefatiya
1Chronicles3:4 Abo ukw ari batandatu ni bo yavyariye i Heburoni; kandi yamaze ku ngoma imyaka ndwi n’amezi atandatu ar’ i Heburoni
1Chronicles3:5 Aba ni bo yavyariye i Yerusalemu: Shimeya na Shobabu na Natani na Salomo
1Chronicles3:6 avyara na Ibuhari na Elishama na Elifeleti
1Chronicles3:7 na Noga na Nefegi na Yafiya

1Chronicles4:1 Abākomōtse kuri Yuda ni Peresi na Hesironi na Karumi na Huri na Shobali.
1Chronicles4:2 Reyaya mwene Shobali yavyaye Yahati; Yahati avyara Ahumayi na Lahadi. Iyo ni yo miryango y’Abazorati.
1Chronicles4:3 Aba ni bo bene Etamu: Yezireli na Ishuma na Idubashi
1Chronicles4:4 kandi Penuweli yari se wa Gedori
1Chronicles4:5 Ashuri se wa Tekowa yar’ afise abagore babiri
1Chronicles4:6 Kuri Nayara avyara Ahuzamu na Heferi na Temeni na Hahashutari. Abo ni bo yavyaranye na Nayara.
1Chronicles4:7 Kuri Hela avyara Zereti na Isuhari na Etunani.
1Chronicles4:8 Hakosi avyara Anubu na Sobeba
1Chronicles4:9 Yabesi yarusha icubahiro bene nyina; kandi nyina yamwise Yabesi
1Chronicles4:10 Yabesi atakambira Imana y’Abisirayeli
1Chronicles4:11 Kelubu murumuna wa Shuha avyara Mehiri se wa Eshitoni.
1Chronicles4:12 Eshitoni avyara Beti‐rafa na Paseya na Tehina se wa Irunahashi. Abo ni bo bantu ba Reka.
1Chronicles4:13 Bene Kenazi ni Otiniyeli na Seraya; bene Otiniyeli ni Hatati na Meyonotayi.
1Chronicles4:14 Meyonotayi avyara Ofura; Seraya avyara Yowabu se wa Geharashimu; kandi bār’ abafundi.
1Chronicles4:15 Bene Kalebu mwene Yefune ni Iru na Ela na Nayamu; mwene Ela ni Kenazi.
1Chronicles4:16 Bene Yehaleleli ni Zifu na Zifa na Tiriya na Asareli.
1Chronicles4:17 Bene Ezera ni Yeteri na Meredi na Eferi na Yaloni; kand’ aba ni bo bana Bitiya umukobga wa Farawo yavyaranye na Meredi
1Chronicles4:18 Umugore wiwe w’Umuyudakazi avyara Yeredi se wa Gedori
1Chronicles4:19 Abana ba muka Hodiya
1Chronicles4:20 Bene Shimoni ni Amunoni na Rina na Beni‐hanani na Tiloni. Bene Ishi ni Zoheti na Beni‐zoheti.
1Chronicles4:21 Aba ni bo bana ba Shela mwene Yuda: Eri se wa Leka
1Chronicles4:22 na Yokimu n’abantu b’i Kozeba
1Chronicles4:23 Abo ni bo bār’ ababumvyi
1Chronicles4:24 Bene Simeyoni ni Nemuweli na Yamini na Yaribu na Zera na Shauli.
1Chronicles4:25 Umuhungu wa Shauli ni Shalumu
1Chronicles4:26 umuhungu wa Mishuma ni Hamuweli
1Chronicles4:27 Shimeyi yavyaye abahungu cumi na batandatu n’ abakobga batandatu; arikw abo bāvukana ntibāvyaye abana benshi; kand’ umuryango wabo wose ntiwagwiriye nk’uw’ Abayuda.
1Chronicles4:28 Kandi bāba i Beri‐sheba n’i Molada n’i Hazari‐shuwali
1Chronicles4:29 n’i Biluha n’i Esemu n’i Toladi
1Chronicles4:30 n’i Betuweli n’i Horuma n’i Sikulagi
1Chronicles4:31 n’i Beti‐marukaboti n’i Hazari‐susimu n’i Beti‐biri n’i Shayarayimu. Ivyo ni vyo vyar’ ibisagara vyabo gushitsa aho Dawidi yīmiye.
1Chronicles4:32 Utundi dusagara twabo ni Etamu na Ayini na Rimoni na Tokeni na Ashani
1Chronicles4:33 bo n’imihana yabo yose yo hirya no hino y’ivyo bisagara nyene
1Chronicles4:34 Aya mazina Meshobabu na Yamuleki na Yosha mwene Amaziya
1Chronicles4:35 na Yoweli na Yehu mwene Yoshibiya
1Chronicles4:36 na Eliyowenayi na Yakoba na Yeshohaya na Asaya na Adiyeli na Yesimiyeli na Benaya;
1Chronicles4:37 na Ziza mwene Shifi
1Chronicles4:38 abo uko tubadōnze amazina ni bo bār’ abakuru mu miryango yabo; kand’ amazu ya ba sekuruza yagenda agwira cane.

1Chronicles4:40 Basanga har’ ubgatsi bgiza butotahaye

1Chronicles4:42 Kandi mur’ abo ba Simeyoni

1Chronicles7:1 Bene Isakari ni Tola na Puwa na Yashubu na Shimuroni ukw ari bane.
1Chronicles7:2 Abo kuri Tola ni Uzi na Refaya na Yeriyeli na Yahumayi na Ibusamu na Shemuweli
1Chronicles7:3 Mwene Uzi ni Izurahiya; bene Izurahiya ni Mikayeli na Obadiya na Yoweli na Ishiya
1Chronicles7:4 Kandi hamwe na bo
1Chronicles7:5 Abandi bagenzi babo bo mu mazu yose y’Abisakari
1Chronicles7:6 Bene Benyamini ni Bela na Bekeri na Yediyayeli
1Chronicles7:7 Abo kuri Bela ni Esiboni na Uzi na Uziyeli na Yerimoti na Iri
1Chronicles7:8 Abo kuri Bekeri ni Zemira na Yowasi na Eliyezeri na Eliyowenayi na Omuri na Yeremoti na Abiya na Anatoti na Alemeti; abo bose bandurutse kuri Bekeri.
1Chronicles7:9 Bār’ abakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza
1Chronicles7:10 Mwene Yediyayeli ni Biluhani; abo kuri Biluhani ni Yushi na Benyamini na Ehudi na Kenana na Zetani na Tarushishi na Ahishahari.
1Chronicles7:11 Abo bose bār’ abo kuri Yediyayeli
1Chronicles7:12 Kandi Shupimu na Hupimu bār’ abo kuri Iri
1Chronicles7:13 Bene Nafutali ni Yakiseli na Guni na Yeseri na Shalumu; abo n’abuzukuru ba Biluha.
1Chronicles7:14 Bene Manase ni Asiriyeli
1Chronicles7:15 Makiri asaba umugeni kwa Hupimu na Shupimu; murumuna we yitwa Mayaka. Umuhungu wiwe wa kabiri yitwa Selofehadi; Selofehadi yavyaye abakobga basa.
1Chronicles7:16 Mayaka muka Makiri avyara umwana w’umuhungu
1Chronicles7:17 Mwene Ulamu ni Bedani. Abo ni bo bo kuri Gileyadi
1Chronicles7:18 Hamoleketi mushiki wa Gileyadi avyara Ishihodi na Abiyezeri na Mahula.
1Chronicles7:19 Bene Shemida ni Ahiyani na Shekemu na Likuhi na Aniyamu.
1Chronicles7:20 Abo kuri Efurayimu ni Shutela
1Chronicles7:21 uwa Tahati ni Zabadi
1Chronicles7:22 Maze Efurayimu se amara imisi myinshi agandaye
1Chronicles7:23 Bukeye arārana n’umugore wiwe
1Chronicles7:24 Umukobga wiwe yitwa Sheyera; ni we yubatse Beti‐horoni ho hepfo n’aho haruguru
1Chronicles7:25 Uwundi muhungu wiwe ni Refa
1Chronicles7:26 uwa Tahani ni Ladani
1Chronicles7:27 uwa Elishama ni Nuni
1Chronicles7:28 Amashamvu yabo aho bāba n’i Beteli n’ibisagara bihakūkira; ah’ i burasirazuba n’i Narani
1Chronicles7:29 ugashitsa no ku rubibe rw’Abamanase
1Chronicles7:30 Bene Asheri ni Imuna
1Chronicles7:31 Bene Beriya ni Heberi na Malukiyeli
1Chronicles7:32 Heberi yavyaye Yafuleti na Shomeri na Hotamu
1Chronicles7:33 Bene Yafuleti ni Pasaki na Bimuhali na Ashuvati; abo ni bo bār’ abana ba Yafuleti.
1Chronicles7:34 Bene Shomeri ni Ahi na Rohega na Yehuba na Aramu.

1Chronicles7:37 na Beseri na Hodi na Shama na Shilusha na Iturani na Beyera.

1Chronicles7:39 Bene Ula ni Ara na Haniyeli na Risiya.
1Chronicles7:40 Abo bose n’abo kuri Asheri
1Chronicles8:1 Benyamini yavyaye Bela
1Chronicles8:2 uwa kane ni Noha
1Chronicles8:3 Abahungu ba Bela ni Adari na Gera na Abihudi
1Chronicles8:4 na Abishuwa na Namani na Ahowa
1Chronicles8:5 na Gera na Shefufani na Huramu.
1Chronicles8:6 Aba ni bo bene Ehudi: bār’ abakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza mu baba i Geba; babajana ar’ inyagano i Manahati;
1Chronicles8:7 ni bo aba: Namani na Ahiya; kandi Gera ni we yabajanye ar’ inyagano
1Chronicles8:8 Shaharayimu avyarira abana mu gihugu c’i Mowabu
1Chronicles8:9 Avyarana na Hodeshi umugore wiwe Yobabu na Sibiya na Mesha na Malukamu
1Chronicles8:10 na Yusi na Shakiya na Miruma. Abo ni bo bār’ abahungu biwe
1Chronicles8:11 Kand’ abo yavyaye kuri Hushimu ni Abitubu na Elipali.
1Chronicles8:12 Bene Elipali ni Eberi na Mishamu na Shemedi; Shemedi uwo ni we yubatse Ono na Lodi bo n’ibisagara bihakūkira;
1Chronicles8:13 Elipali avyara na Beriya na Shema; ni bo bār’ abakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza mu bāba i Ayaloni
1Chronicles8:14 arongera avyara na Ahiyo na Shashaki na Yeremoti.
1Chronicles8:15 Kandi Zebadiya na Aradi na Ederi
1Chronicles8:16 na Mikayeli na Ishipa na Yoha ni bo bene Beriya.
1Chronicles8:17 Kandi Zebadiya na Meshulamu na Hizuki na Heberi
1Chronicles8:18 na Ishimerayi na Izuliya na Yobabu ni bo bene Elipali.
1Chronicles8:19 Kandi Yakimu na Zikuri na Zabudi
1Chronicles8:20 na Eliyenayi na Siletayi na Eliyeli
1Chronicles8:21 na Adaya na Beraya na Shimurati ni bene Shimeyi.
1Chronicles8:22 Kandi Ishupani na Eberi na Eliyeli
1Chronicles8:23 na Abudoni na Zikuri na Hanani
1Chronicles8:24 na Hananiya na Elamu na Anitotiya
1Chronicles8:25 na Ifudeya na Penuweli
1Chronicles8:26 Kandi Shamusherayi na Shehariya na Ataliya
1Chronicles8:27 na Yareshiya na Eliya na Zikuri ni bo bene Yerohamu.
1Chronicles8:28 Abo ni bo bagiye baba abakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza
1Chronicles8:29 Yeyeli se wa Gibeyoni yaba i Gibeyoni nyene; umugore wiwe yitwa Mayaka.
1Chronicles8:30 Imfura yiwe ni Abudoni
1Chronicles8:31 na Gedori na Ahiyo na Zekeri
1Chronicles8:32 na Mikuloti ari we se wa Shimeya. Abo na bo bābāna n’abo b’i wabo i Yerusalemu nyene
1Chronicles8:33 Kandi Neri avyara Kishi
1Chronicles8:34 Umuhungu wa Yonatani ni Meribu‐bayali
1Chronicles8:35 Bene Mika ni Pitoni na Meleki na Tareya na Ahazi.
1Chronicles8:36 Ahazi avyara Yehowada; Yehowada avyara Alemeti na Azimaveti na Zimuri; Zimuri avyara Moza.
1Chronicles8:37 Moza avyara Bineya se wa Rafa; mwene Rafa ni Eleyasa
1Chronicles8:38 Kandi Asela yar’ afise abahungu batandatu
1Chronicles8:39 Abana ba Esheki murumuna we n’aba: imfura yiwe ni Ulamu
1Chronicles8:40 Bene Ulamu bār’ abantu b’abahizi bazi kurasa; bāri bafise abahungu benshi n’abuzukuru benshi
1Chronicles9:1 Nukw Abisirayeli bose bāraharūwe
1Chronicles9:2 Abābanje kugaruka bagasubira mu matongo yabo yo mu bisagara vyabo n’abanyagihugu bo mu Bisirayeli
1Chronicles9:3 Abāgiye kuba i Yerusalemu ni bamwe bo mu Bayuda n’abo mu Babenyamini n’abo mu Befurayimu n’abo mu Bamanase

1Chronicles9:5 N’abo mu ba Shiloni
1Chronicles9:6 N’abo muri bene Zera ni Yeweli n’ab’i wabo
1Chronicles9:7 N’ abo mu ba Benyamini
1Chronicles9:8 bo na Ibuneya mwene Yerohamu
1Chronicles9:9 bo n’ab’ i wabo
1Chronicles9:10 Kand’ abo mu baherezi ni Yedaya na Yehoyaribu na Yakini
1Chronicles9:11 na Azariya mwene Hilukiya
1Chronicles9:12 bo na Adaya mwene Yerohamu
1Chronicles9:13 bo n’abandi bagenzi babo b’abakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza
1Chronicles9:14 Kand’ abo mu Balewi ni Shemaya mwene Hashubu

1Chronicles9:16 bo na Obadiya mwene Shemaya
1Chronicles9:17 Abashibamyi n’aba: Shalumu na Akubu na Talumoni na Ahimani

1Chronicles9:19 Shalumu mwene Kore
1Chronicles9:20 Finehasi mwene Eleyazari ni we yabaganza mur’ ivyo bihe vya kera; kand’ Uhoraho yabana na we.
1Chronicles9:21 Zekariya mwene Meshelemiya ni we yar’ umukumirizi wo ku muryango w’ ihema ry’ibonaniro.
1Chronicles9:22 Abo bose abātoranijwe kuba abakumirizi b’ imiryango
1Chronicles9:23 Nukw abo n’abana babo ni bo bāba kur’ ico gikorwa co kuzigama imiryango y’ingoro y’Uhoraho
1Chronicles9:24 Abo bakumirizi bama ku mpande ukw ari zine
1Chronicles9:25 Kandi bagenzi babo bāri bagezwe ko bakūranwa

1Chronicles16:2 Nuko Dawidi amaze kwosa ikimazi
1Chronicles16:3 Maz’ agaburira abantu bose b’ Abisirayeli
1Chronicles16:4 Kand’ ashiraho bamwe mu Balewi ngo bashitse igikorwa cabo imbere y’isandugu y’Uhoraho
1Chronicles16:5 Abo yashizeho n’ aba: Asafu ni we yari mukuru
1Chronicles16:6 na Benaya na Yahaziyeli abaherezi bari bafise inzumbete
1Chronicles16:7 Kur’ uwo musi Dawidi ni ho yatanguriye gushinga ko Asafu na bagenzi be ari bo baririmba batazira Uhoraho.
1Chronicles16:8 Ni mushime Uhoraho
1Chronicles16:9 Mumuririmbire
1Chronicles16:10 Mwirate izina ryiwe ryera
1Chronicles16:11 Murondere Uhoraho n’inkomezi ziwe; Murondere mu nyonga hiwe ibihe bidashira.
1Chronicles16:12 Mwibuke ibikorwa vyiwe bitangaje yakoze; Ibitangaza vyiwe n’amateka yo mu kanwa kiwe;
1Chronicles16:13 Yemwe ruvyaro rwa Isirayeli umushumba wiwe
1Chronicles16:14 Uhoraho ni we Mana yacu; Amatēka yiwe ari mw isi yose.

1Chronicles16:16 Ni ryo sezerano yasezeranye na Aburahamu

1Chronicles16:18 Akavuga

1Chronicles16:22 Ati Ntimukore ku bo narobanuje amavuta
1Chronicles16:23 Yemwe abari mw isi mwese
1Chronicles16:24 Mwamamaze mu mahanga ubgiza bgiwe
1Chronicles16:25 Kuk’ Uhoraho ahambaye
1Chronicles16:26 Kukw ibigirwamana vy’amahanga vyose ar’ ubusa
1Chronicles16:27 Icubahiro n’ububasha bir’ imbere yiwe
1Chronicles16:28 Yemwe miryango y’amahanga
1Chronicles16:29 Mwaturire Uhoraho ingen’ izina ryiwe ribereye icubahiro; Muze imbere yiwe muzanye ishikanwa. Musenge Uhoraho mwubashe
1Chronicles16:30 Yemwe abari mw isi mwese
1Chronicles16:31 Ijuru ni rinezerwe
1Chronicles16:32 Ikiyaga ni kibomborane bo n’ ibicuzuye
1Chronicles16:33 Ni ho ibiti vyose vyo mw ishamba bizoririmbishwa n’ akanyamuneza imbere y’ Uhoraho
1Chronicles16:34 Ni mushimire Uhoraho yukw ari mwiza: Kukw imbabazi ziwe zamah’ ibihe bidashira.
1Chronicles16:35 Muvuge
1Chronicles16:36 Uhoraho
1Chronicles16:37 Maze kur’ iyo sandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho ahisiga Asafu na bagenzi be
1Chronicles16:38 ahasiga na Obed‐edomu na bagenzi be mirongwitandatu n’ umunani; ahasiga na Obed‐edomu mwene Yedutuni na Hosa ngo bayishibamire.
1Chronicles16:39 Maze Sadoki umuherezi
1Chronicles16:40 kugira ngo baze bame bosereza Uhoraho ibimazi ku gicaniro co kuvyoserezako

1Chronicles17:1 Nuko Dawidi amaze kwinjira ingoro yiwe
1Chronicles17:2 Natani yishura Dawidi
1Chronicles17:3 Arikw iryo joro nyene ijambo ry’Imana riza kuri Natani
1Chronicles17:4 riti Genda ubgire umusavyi wanje Dawidi
1Chronicles17:5 Ut’ Erega ntiyigeze kuba mu nzu uhereye igihe yadūganiye Abisirayeli gushitsa n’ubu
1Chronicles17:6 Uti Mbeg’ ahantu hose yagiye agendana n’Abisirayeli bose
1Chronicles17:7 Nuko rero
1Chronicles17:8 uti Kandi yagendana nawe aho waja hose
1Chronicles17:9 Uti Kand’ abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli azobagenera ahantu
1Chronicles17:10 nko mu bihe yaha abacamanza kuganza abantu biwe b’ Abisirayeli; uti Kand’ azomara igabo abansi bawe bose. Uti Mber’ Uhoraho arakubariye yukw azokugira igisata.
1Chronicles17:11 Uti Hanyuma imisi yawe ni yashika
1Chronicles17:12 Ut’ Uwo ni we azomwubakira ingoro
1Chronicles17:13 Ut’ Azomubera se
1Chronicles17:14 uti Kand’ azomuha kwama ashikamye mu ngoro yiwe no mu bgami bgiwe ibihe vyose; uti Kand’ ingoma yiwe izohora ihangamye ibihe vyose.

1Chronicles26:1 Imbu z’abashibamyi n’izi: mu bandurutse kuri Kora hāri Meshelemiya mwene Kore
1Chronicles26:2 Kandi Meshelemiya yar’ afise abahungu; Zekariya ni we mfura
1Chronicles26:3 uwa gatanu ni Elamu
1Chronicles26:4 Obed‐edomu na we abahungu biwe bār’ aba: Shemaya ni we mfura
1Chronicles26:5 uwa gatandatu ni Amiyeli
1Chronicles26:6 Shemaya umuhungu wiwe na we avyara abahungu
1Chronicles26:7 Shemaya uwo
1Chronicles26:8 Abo bose bār’ abo mu ba Obed‐edomu; abo bo n’abana babo na bagenzi babo bār’ abantu b’inkomezi bashobora ico gikorwa; bose na bose bāri mirongwitandatu na babiri banduruka kuri Obed‐edomu.
1Chronicles26:9 Kandi Meshelemiya
1Chronicles26:10 Kandi Hosa wo mu ba Merari na we abahungu biwe bār’ aba: Shimuri ni we yar’ umukuru muri bo
1Chronicles26:11 Uwa kabiri ni Hilukiya
1Chronicles26:12 Abo bashibamyi
1Chronicles26:13 Maze bapfinda ubupfindo
1Chronicles26:14 Ubgo ku gihera i burasirazuba bgerekana Meshelemiya. Maze bapfindira umuhungu wiwe Zekariya; yar’ umujanama w’ ubgenge; ubupfindo bgiwe bgerekana igihera i burārūko.
1Chronicles26:15 Ubga Obed‐edomu bgerekana igihera i bumanuko
1Chronicles26:16 Ubga Shupimu na Hosa bgerekana igihera i burengerazuba
1Chronicles26:17 Mur’ abo Balewi
1Chronicles26:18 Kand’ i burengerazuba
1Chronicles26:19 Izo ni zo mbu z’abo bashibamyi bo mu ba Kora no mu ba Merari.

1Chronicles26:21 abandurutse kuri Ladani
1Chronicles26:22 n’abana biwe
1Chronicles26:23 Mu ba Amuramu no mu ba Isuhari no mu ba Heburoni no mu ba Uziyeli
1Chronicles26:24 Shebuweli wo mu ba Gerushomu mwene Mose ni we yabaye umukuru w’ububiko bgose.
1Chronicles26:25 Ab’i wabo bo kuri Eliyezeri n’aba: umuhungu wiwe ni Rehabiya
1Chronicles26:26 Shelomoti uwo

1Chronicles26:30 Mu ba Heburoni

1Chronicles26:32 Kandi bagenzi biwe bār’ ibihumbi bibiri n’amajana ndwi
1Chronicles27:1 Ingabo z’Abisirayeli
1Chronicles27:2 Yashobeyamu mwene Zabudiyeli ni we yagaba ku rubu rwa mbere rwo mu kwezi kwa mbere; ingabo zo ku rubu rwiwe zār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bine.
1Chronicles27:3 Yar’ uwo mu ba Peresi
1Chronicles27:4 Dodayi w’Umwahohi ni we yagaba ku rubu rwo mu kwezi kwa kabiri
1Chronicles27:5 Benaya mwene Yehoyada umuherezi mukuru ni we yar’ umugabisha w’ingabo agira gatatu wo mu kwezi kwa gatatu; ingabo zo ku rubu rwiwe zār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bine.
1Chronicles27:6 Benaya uwo yar’ umwe muri ba bahizi mirongwitatu
1Chronicles27:7 Asaheli murumuna wa Yowabu ni we yar’ umugabisha agira kane wo mu kwezi kwa kane; Zebadiya umuhungu wiwe ni we yamusubiriye mu gishingo; ingabo zu ku rubu rwiwe zār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bine.
1Chronicles27:8 Shamuhutu Umwisurahi ni we yar’ umugabisha agira gatanu wo mu kwezi kwa gatanu; ingabo zo ku rubu rwiwe zār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bine.
1Chronicles27:9 Ira mwene Ikeshi Umunyatekowa ni we yar’ umugabisha agira gatandatu wo mu kwezi kwa gatandatu; ingabo zo ku rubu rwiwe zār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bine.
1Chronicles27:10 Helesi Umunyapeloni
1Chronicles27:11 Sibekayi Umuhushati wo mu ba Zerahi
1Chronicles27:12 Abiyezeri w’i Anatoti wo mu Babenyamini ni we yar’ umugabisha agira icenda wo mu kwezi kw’icenda; ingabo zo ku rubu rwiwe zār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bine.
1Chronicles27:13 Maharayi w’i Netofati wo mu ba Zerahi ni we yar’ umugabisha agira icumi wo mu kwezi kw’icumi; ingabo zo ku rubu rwiwe zār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bine.
1Chronicles27:14 Benaya w’i Piratoni wo mu Befurayimu ni we yar’ umugabisha agira icumi na rimwe wo mu kwezi kw’icumi na rimwe; ingabo zo ku rubu rwiwe zār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bine.
1Chronicles27:15 Heludayi w’i Netofati wo mu ba Otiniyeli ni we yar’ umugabisha agira icumi na kabiri wo mu kwezi kw’icumi na kabiri; ingabo zo ku rubu rwiwe zār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bine nyene.
1Chronicles27:16 Kand’ abakuru b’imiryango y’Abisirayeli n’aba: mu ba Reyubeni yari Eliyezeri mwene Zikuri; mu ba Simeyoni yari Shefatiya mwene Mayaka;
1Chronicles27:17 mu ba Lewi yari Hashabiya mwene Kemuweli; mu ba Aroni yari Sadoki;
1Chronicles27:18 mu ba Yuda yari Elihu
1Chronicles27:19 mu ba Zebuloni yari Ishimaya mwene Obadiya; mu ba Nafutali yari Yeremoti mwene Azuriyeli;
1Chronicles27:20 mu ba Efurayimu yari Hosheya mwene Azaziya; mu gihimba c’umuryango wa Manase yari Yoweli mwene Pedaya;
1Chronicles27:21 mu gihimba kindi c’umuryango wa Manase nyene
1Chronicles27:22 mu ba Dani yari Azareli mwene Yerohamu. Abo ni bo bār’ abakuru b’imiryango y’Abisirayeli.
1Chronicles27:23 Ariko Dawidi ntiyaharūra abatarashikana imyaka mirongwibiri
1Chronicles27:24 Yowabu umwana wa Seruwiya atangura guharūra ariko ntiyarangiza; ukwo guharūrwa kwatumye Abisirayeli barakirwa
1Chronicles27:25 Azimaveti mwene Adiyeli ni we yar’ umukuru yajejwe ububīko bg’i bgami; Yonatani mwene Uziya ni we yar’ umukuru yajejwe ibigega biri mu misozi no mu bisagara no mu mihana no mu maboma;
1Chronicles27:26 Eziri mwene Kelubu ni we yaganza abarimyi bākora mu ndimiro;
1Chronicles27:27 Shimeyi w’i Rama ni we yar’ umukuru yajejwe imirima y’imizabibu; Zabudi w’i Shifimu ni we yar’ umukuru yajejwe ivy’ inzabibu zamuwe zo gukānyamwo vino;
1Chronicles27:28 Bayali‐hanani w’i Gederi ni we yar’ umukuru yajejwe ivy’ imyelayo n’imisukomora yo mu biyaya; Yowasi ni we yar’ umukuru yajejwe ububīko bg’amavuta ya elayo;
1Chronicles27:29 Shiturayi w’i Sharoni ni we yar’ umutongore w’amasho yar’ i Sharoni nyene; kandi Shafati mwene Adulayi ni we yar’ umutongore w’ amasho yari mu biyaya;
1Chronicles27:30 Obili w’Umwishimayeli ni we yar’ umubgiriza w’ingamiya; Yedeya w’i Meronoti ni we yar’ umubgiriza w’indogoba;
1Chronicles27:31 Yazizi Umuhaguri ni we yar’ umubgiriza w’imikuku. Abo bose ni bo bāri bajejwe ivy’ itunga ry’umwami Dawidi.
1Chronicles27:32 Yonatani se wabo wa Dawidi ni we yar’ umujanama
1Chronicles27:33 Ahitofeli ni we yar’ umujanama w’umwami; Hushayi Umwaruki yar’ umukunzi w’ umwami;
1Chronicles27:34 Yehoyada mwene Benaya na Abiyatari ni bo bāsubiye mu gishingo ca Ahitofeli; kandi Yowabu ni we yar’ umugabisha w’ingabo z’umwami.

2Chronicles3:2 Atangura kwubaka ku musi ugira kabiri wo mu kwezi kwa kabiri
2Chronicles3:3 Uku ni kw amatanguriro yarēha
2Chronicles3:4 Urubaraza rw’ imbere y’iyo ngoro
2Chronicles3:5 Igice kinini c’iyo ngoro
2Chronicles3:6 Kand’ iyo ngoro ayomekako n’utubuyenge tw’igiciro kinini kugira ngw ishaze; amazahabu yakoresheje yari yavuye i Paravayimu.
2Chronicles3:7 Nukw iyo ngoro ayomekakw izahabu
2Chronicles3:8 Yubaka n’Ahēra Cane; uburebure bgaho bgar’ amatambge mirongwibiri y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora
2Chronicles3:9 Imisumari yahakoresheje yar’ icuzwe mw izahabu irivye shekeli mirongwitanu. Ivyumba vyo hejuru na vyo avyomekakw izahabu.
2Chronicles3:10 Abāza ibishushanyo bibiri vy’abakerubi vyo gushira Ahēra Cane
2Chronicles3:11 Amababa y’abo bakerubi
2Chronicles3:12 Ibaba ry’uwundi mukerubi ryar’ amatambge atanu nyene
2Chronicles3:13 Amababa y’abo bakerubi
2Chronicles3:14 Igihuzu kihakingīra akijisha mu nyuzi z’amasufe n’iz’ amashigisha n’izisa n’agahama n’izera derere; akijishirakw ibishushanyo vy’abakerubi.
2Chronicles3:15 Arondera inkingi zibiri zo gushinga imbere y’iyo ngoro; uburebure bgazo bgar’ amatambge mirongwitatu n’atanu y’ ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora; imyashi yazo
2Chronicles3:16 Acura n’imigufu nk’ iyashizwe Ahēra Cane

2Chronicles4:1 Maz’ acurisha igicaniro mu miringa; uburebure bgaco bgar’ amatambge mirongwibiri y’ ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora
2Chronicles4:2 Maz’ akora igikarabiro citwa ikiyaga
2Chronicles4:3 Musi y’urubiga rwaco hari hakīkūjwe n’ibishushanyo vy’uturende
2Chronicles4:4 Cari giteretswe ku bishushanyo vy’ amapfizi cumi n’abiri; atatu yarāba i burārūko
2Chronicles4:5 Intimba yaco yangana n’ikiganza c’umuntu
2Chronicles4:6 Acura n’ibigarigari cumi vyo kurongamwo; bitanu abishira ku ruhande rw’i buryo
2Chronicles4:7 Acura n’ibiterekwakw amatara cumi mw izahabu
2Chronicles4:8 Abāza n’ameza cumi
2Chronicles4:9 Yubakisha n’urugo rw’inyubakwa
2Chronicles4:10 Ca gikarabiro citwa ikiyaga agishira ku ruhande rw’i buryo bg’iyo ngoro
2Chronicles4:11 Maz’ imibindi n’ivyuma vyo kuyora umunyota n’imibehe Huramu arabikora na vyo. Uko ni ko yanonosoye igikorwa yakorera umwami Salomo c’ingoro y’Imana.
2Chronicles4:12 Ivyo yakoze vyar’ ibi: za nkingi zompi
2Chronicles4:13 na vya bishushanyo vy’amakomamanga amajana ane bitondeshejwe kur’ izo nsenga
2Chronicles4:14 akora na vya bitereko
2Chronicles4:15 na ca kiyaga

2Chronicles9:1 Umwami w’umugore yaganza i Sheba yumvise ingene Salomo yabaye rurangiranwa
2Chronicles9:2 Nuko Salomo amusobanurira ivyo amubajije vyose; nta kintu na kimwe cāmunaniye kw amusobanurira.
2Chronicles9:3 Nuk’ uwo mwami w’i Sheba abonye ingene Salomo ar’ umunyabgenge
2Chronicles9:4 n’ ivyo kurya vyo ku meza yiwe ukuntu vyari
2Chronicles9:5 Abarira umwami
2Chronicles9:6 Ariko sinari navyemeye gushitsa nīyiziye
2Chronicles9:7 Hahirwa abantu bawe
2Chronicles9:8 Uhoraho Imana yawe ahimbazwe
2Chronicles9:9 Maz’ aha umwami izahabu italanto ijana na mirongwibiri
2Chronicles9:10 Kand’ abantu ba Huramu bo n’aba Salomo bāhora bazana amazahabu bayakūye i Ofiru
2Chronicles9:11 Ivyo biti vya alumugi umwami ni vyo yabājemw’ ivyuririzo vy’ ingoro y’Uhoraho n’ivy’ ingoro yiwe ubgiwe; yabibājemwo n’ inanga n’amakembe vy’abaririmvyi; ntihāri hārīgeze kuboneka ibiti vya alumugi nk’ivyo mu gihugu c’i Buyuda.
2Chronicles9:12 Nuk’ umwami Salomo aha uwo mwami w’i Sheba ivyo yagomba vyose n’ico amwatse cose
2Chronicles9:13 Amazahabu yaza kwa Salomo mu mwaka mu mwaka
2Chronicles9:14 udashizekw ayo abahanjuzi n’abadandaza bāzana; kand’ abami bose bo muri Arabiya n’abaganza igihugu bāzanira Salomo amazahabu n’amafeza.
2Chronicles9:15 Maz’ umwami Salomo acurisha inkinzo nini‐nini amajana abiri mw izahabu
2Chronicles9:16 Acurisha n’inkinzo nto‐nto amajana atatu mw izahabu nyene
2Chronicles9:17 Kand’ umwami yibāzishiriza intebe nini y’ubgami mu mahembe y’inzovu
2Chronicles9:18 iyo ntebe yar’ ifise aho kudondagira hatandatu
2Chronicles9:19 Kandi hār’ ibishushanyo vy’intambge cumi na bibiri
2Chronicles9:20 Kand’ ibintu vyose vy’umwami Salomo vyo kunywesha vyar’ ivy’ izahabu
2Chronicles9:21 Kuk’ umwami yar’ afise amāto aja i Tarushishi
2Chronicles9:22 Uko ni k’ umwami Salomo yarusha abami bose bo mw isi ubutunzi n’ubgenge.
2Chronicles9:23 Mu bihugu vyose vyo mw isi hāhora haza abami bagomba kubona Salomo
2Chronicles9:24 Umuntu wese muri bo yaza azanye indamukanyo

2Chronicles20:33 Mugabo ibitabo vyo ku mpinga z’imisozi vyo ntivyākūrwaho; kand’ abantu ntibāribgahereze imitima ku Mana ya ba sekuruza.
2Chronicles20:34 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Yehoshafati
2Chronicles20:35 Hanyuma y’ivyo Yehoshafati umwami w’i Buyuda yifatanya na Ahaziya umwami w’Abisirayeli; Ahaziya uwo yar’ umunyangeso mbi cane.
2Chronicles20:36 Nukw afatanya na we kubāzisha amāto yo kuja i Tarushishi; babāzira ayo māto i Eziyoni‐geberi.

2Chronicles30:22 Hezekiya aremēsha imitima y’Abalewi bose bāgira umwete wo gukorera Uhoraho. Nukw abantu bamara iyo misi ndwi barya ivy’ iyo misi mikuru
2Chronicles30:23 Maz’ ikoraniro ryose baja inama yo kwongera kumara iyindi misi mikuru ndwi; nuko bayimara banezerewe.

2Chronicles31:3 Umwami agera n’umugabane w’ivyo azotanga ku vyo atunze

2Chronicles31:5 Nukw ico cagezwe kimaze gutāngāzwa

2Chronicles31:7 Mu kwezi kwa gatatu ni ho batanguye kurunda ivyo birundo

2Chronicles31:16 mugabo ntibayiha abaramukiwe gukora mu ngoro y’Uhoraho ku rubu rwabo
2Chronicles31:17 Abaherezi bāgenda bandikwa ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari; Abalewi uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru
2Chronicles31:18 Kandi handikwa n’ababo bose
2Chronicles31:19 Kandi kubg’ abaherezi bo mu ba Aroni bāba mu matongo aho bafise amaragiro inyuma y’ibisagara vyabo
2Chronicles31:20 Uko ni ko Hezekiya yakoze mu Buyuda hose; yagenda akora ivyiza n’ibiroranye n’ivy’ ukuri imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yiwe.
2Chronicles31:21 Mu vyo yakora vyose arondera Imana yiwe
2Chronicles32:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo vyose
2Chronicles32:2 Maze Hezekiya abonye ko Senakeribu aje agabiye gutera i Yerusalemu
2Chronicles32:3 aja inama n’abaganwa biwe n’abashingantahe biwe
2Chronicles32:4 Nuko hakorana abantu benshi
2Chronicles32:5 Nuko Hezekiya agumya umutima
2Chronicles32:6 Ashirah’ abagabisha b’ingabo bamenyereye ivy’ intambara kuganza abantu
2Chronicles32:7 ati Ni mushikame
2Chronicles32:8 Mu ruhande rwiwe haherereye inkomezi z’ab’ umubiri
2Chronicles32:9 Hanyuma y’ivyo Senakeribu umwami w’i Ashuri
2Chronicles32:10 ziravuga
2Chronicles32:11 Ngw Aho Hezekiya s’ukubahenda
2Chronicles32:12 Ngo None Hezekiya uwo si we yakūyeh’ ibitabo vyayo n’ ibicaniro vyayo
2Chronicles32:13 Ngo Mbega ntimuzi bo na ba sekuru uko bāgiriye amahanga yose yo mw isi? Ngo Non’ imana z’ayo mahanga yo mur’ ivyo bihugu zarashoboye na gatoya gukiza igihugu cazo ngo ntigikorokere mu maboko yiwe?
2Chronicles32:14 Ngo None mu mana zose z’ amahanga ba sekuru baranduye rwose
2Chronicles32:15 Ngo None Hezekiya ntabahende
2Chronicles32:16 Maz’ izo ntumwa ziwe ziyongeranya gutuka Uhoraho Imana
2Chronicles32:17 Kandi Senakeribu yandika icete co kurogota k’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli no kumuvuga nabi
2Chronicles32:18 Mber’ izo ntumwa zivuga n’ ijwi rirenga mu rurimi rw’Ikiyuda
2Chronicles32:19 Bavuga Imana y’i Yerusalemu nk’ah’ ari co kimwe n’imana z’ amahanga y’isi zakozwe n’intoke z’abantu.
2Chronicles32:20 Ivyo bituma umwami Hezekiya
2Chronicles32:21 Nuk’ Uhoraho arungika umumarayika
2Chronicles32:22 Uko ni k’Uhoraho yakijije Hezekiya n’ababa i Yerusalemu
2Chronicles32:23 Maze benshi bashikanira Uhoraho amashikanwa i Yerusalemu
2Chronicles32:24 Mur’ iyo misi Hezekiya ararwara agera hafi yo gupfa. Asenga Uhoraho
2Chronicles32:25 Ariko Hezekiya
2Chronicles32:26 Ariko Hezekiya yicisha bugufi
2Chronicles32:27 Kandi Hezekiya yari n’itunga ryinshi n’icubahiro cinshi; yironderera ububīko bg’amafeza n’ ubg’ amazahabu n’ubg’ utubuyenge tw’igiciro kinini n’ubg’ imibavu n’ubg’ inkinzo n’ubg’ ibintu vyiza‐vyiza vy’uburyo bgose.
2Chronicles32:28 Kandi yubaka n’amazu y’ibigega y’aho kwimburira ingano na vino n’amavuta ya elayo; n’ impongore z’ibitayega vyiwe vy’ uburyo bgose
2Chronicles32:29 Kandi yironkera n’ ibisagara
2Chronicles32:30 Kandi Hezekiya uwo agomera isōko yo haruguru y’amazi y’i Gihoni

2Chronicles32:33 Maze Hezekiya ahamvya ba sekuruza
2Chronicles33:1 Manase yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka cumi n’ibiri; ayimarakw imyaka mirongwitanu n’itanu ar’ i Yerusalemu.
2Chronicles33:2 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi
2Chronicles33:3 Yongera gutabisha ibitabo ku mpinga z’imisozi
2Chronicles33:4 Yubaka n’ ibicaniro mu ngoro y’Uhoraho
2Chronicles33:5 Kandi yubakira izo ngabo zose zo kw ijuru ibicaniro mu ntangaro no mu nyubakwa vyo ku ngoro y’Uhoraho.
2Chronicles33:6 Atanga abana biwe kw ibimazi ngo boswe mu muriro mu mwonga wa mwene Hinomu
2Chronicles33:7 Ca gishushanyo c’ikigirwamana yabāje agishinga mu ngoro y’Imana
2Chronicles33:8 Kand’ iti Sinzosubira gukūra Abisirayeli ngo bave mu gihugu nashinze ko kizoba ica ba sekuruza

2Chronicles33:11 Ni co catumye Uhoraho abatēza abagabisha b’ingabo z’umwami w’i Ashuri
2Chronicles33:12 Maz’ abonye kw ashitse mu magorwa
2Chronicles33:13 Maz’ ayisenze

2Chronicles33:16 Maz’ asana igicaniro c’Uhoraho

2Chronicles34:1 Yosiya yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka munani; ayimarakw imyaka mirongwitatu n’ umwe ar’i Yerusalemu.
2Chronicles34:2 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari vyiza
2Chronicles34:3 Mu mwaka ugira umunani ari ku ngoma
2Chronicles34:4 basangangura ibicaniro vya za Bayali abahagarikiye
2Chronicles34:5 Aturirira amagufa y’ abaherezi ku bicaniro vyabo; nukw atunganya i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu.
2Chronicles34:6 Kandi ni ko yagenjeje no mu bisagara vyabaye amatongo impande zose
2Chronicles34:7 Asangangura ibicaniro
2Chronicles34:8 Maze mu mwaka ugira icumi n’umunani ari ku ngoma
2Chronicles34:9 Bashikīra Hilukiya umuherezi mukuru
2Chronicles34:10 bayaha abāshinzwe gukoresha ibikorwa vyo ku ngoro y’Uhoraho
2Chronicles34:11 bayaha ababāji n’ abubatsi kugira ngo bagure amabuye abājwe n’ibiti vy’imyaro n’ ivy’ ibishoro vyo gusanura inyubako abami b’i Buyuda bononye.
2Chronicles34:12 Nukw abo bantu bakora ico gikorwa ar’ abizigirwa; abābarāba n’aba: Yahati na Obadiya
2Chronicles34:13 ni bo bāgenda barāba ivy’ abikorezi
2Chronicles34:14 Maze bariko barasohora amahera yazanywe mu ngoro y’Uhoraho

2Chronicles34:16 Shafani ajana ico gitabo
2Chronicles34:17 kandi bābiriye amahera yari mu ngoro y’Uhoraho
2Chronicles34:18 Uwo mukarani Shafani yongera kubarira umwami
2Chronicles34:19 Maz’ umwami yumvise amajambo yo mu vyagezwe
2Chronicles34:20 Umwami araheza atuma Hilukiya na Ahikamu mwene Shafani na Abudoni mwene Mika n’uwo mukarani Shafani nyene na Asaya umumenyekana wiwe
2Chronicles34:21 ati Ni mugende munsigurize Uhoraho
2Chronicles34:22 Nuko Hilukiya n’abo bandi umwami yatumye
2Chronicles34:23 Arabishura

2Chronicles34:25 muti Kuko bāmuvuyeko

2Chronicles34:27 ngo Kuko watsinzwe mu mutima wawe
2Chronicles34:28 Ngo Nukw azoguha guhambga hamwe na ba sogokuruza
