2Chronicles34:30 Umwami araheza aradūga
2Chronicles34:31 Maz’ umwami ahagarara ahantu yamenyereye
2Chronicles34:32 Araheza yemeza iryo sezerano ababa i Yerusalemu n’Ababenyamini bose. Nukw ab’i Yerusalemu bashitsa iryo sezerano ry’ Imana
2Chronicles34:33 Maze Yosiya akūra ibizira vyose vy’ubuyobe mu ntāra zose z’Abisirayeli
2Chronicles35:1 Bukeye Yosiya agira umusi mukuru wa Pasika y’Uhoraho i Yerusalemu. Babāga imyagazi ya Pasika ku musi ugira icumi na kane wo mu kwezi kwa mbere.
2Chronicles35:2 Ashira abaherezi mu mbu zabo
2Chronicles35:3 Kand’ abarira Abalewi berejwe Uhoraho
2Chronicles35:4 Mwitegure kuja mu mbu zanyu
2Chronicles35:5 Muheze muze muhagarare ahantu hēra
2Chronicles35:6 Muheze mubabāgire ivya Pasika
2Chronicles35:7 Maze Yosiya aha abantu bose bari ngaho imyagazi y’intama n’iy’ impene yo mu mikuku
2Chronicles35:8 Kand’ abaganwa biwe na bo nyene nk’uko bavyigombeye baha abantu ibimazi vyo gutanga
2Chronicles35:9 Kandi n’ abakuru b’Abalewi
2Chronicles35:10 Uko ni ko biteguye ivy’ ico gikorwa; abaherezi bahagarara mu myanya yabo
2Chronicles35:11 Nuko bakerera imyagazi ya Pasika
2Chronicles35:12 Bakūrah’ imitigiri yo kuba ibimazi vyo kwoswa
2Chronicles35:13 Baraheza batara inyama z’ivyo bimazi vya Pasika
2Chronicles35:14 Hanyuma bakitegura ivyabo ubgabo bo n’ivy’ abaherezi
2Chronicles35:15 N’abaririmvyi bo mu ba Asafu bāri mu myanya yabo nk’uko vyari vyarashinzwe na Dawidi na Asafu na Hemani na Yedutuni kamenyi w’umwami; abakumirizi na bo bāri ku birimba vyose; na bo nyene ntibārinda kuva ku gikorwa cabo
2Chronicles35:16 Uko ni kw igikorwa cose c’ Uhoraho cātunganijwe kur’ uwo musi
2Chronicles35:17 Ico gihe nyene Abisirayeli bāri ngaho baja mu vy’uwo musi mukuru wa Pasika
2Chronicles35:18 Ntihīgeze kuba umusi wa Pasika uhwanye n’uyo mu Bisirayeli
2Chronicles35:19 Iyo Pasika yabaye mu mwaka ugira icumi n’ umunani Yosiya ari ku ngoma.
2Chronicles35:20 Hanyuma y’ivyo vyose
2Chronicles35:21 Ariko Neko amutumakw intumwa
2Chronicles35:22 Yamara Yosiya ntiyemera guhindukira ngw amureke
2Chronicles35:23 Maz’ abarashi barasa umwami Yosiya; abarira abantu biwe
2Chronicles35:24 Nukw abantu biwe bamukūra mu mukogote yarimwo
2Chronicles35:25 Na Yeremiya aborogera Yosiya
2Chronicles35:26 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Yosiya
2Chronicles35:27 n’ibikorwa vyiwe vyose uhereye ku ca mbere ukageza ku c’imperēra
2Chronicles36:1 Maz’ abantu bo mur’ ico gihugu bahitana Yehowahazi umuhungu wa Yosiya
2Chronicles36:2 Yehowahazi yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’itatu; ayimarakw amezi atatu ar’ i Yerusalemu.
2Chronicles36:3 Bukeye umwami wa Egiputa amukūra ku ngoma i Yerusalemu; igihugu ciwe agicira iciru c’italanto ijana z’ifeza n’italanto imwe y’izahabu.
2Chronicles36:4 Uwo mwami wa Egiputa yimika Eliyakimu mukuru we
2Chronicles36:5 Kandi Yehoyakimu yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’itanu; ayimarakw imyaka cumi n’umwe ar’i Yerusalemu; akora ivyo Uhoraho Imana yiwe abona kw ari bibi.
2Chronicles36:6 Hanyuma Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni araza aramutera
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukadineza atakw ajana n’ ibintu vyo mu ngoro y’Uhoraho i Babuloni
2Chronicles36:8 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Yehoyakimu
2Chronicles36:9 Yehoyakina yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka cumi n’umunani; ayimarakw amezi atatu n’imisi cumi i Yerusalemu; na we akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi.
2Chronicles36:10 Ku gacikamvura umwami Nebukadineza aratuma ngo bamuzane i Babuloni
2Chronicles36:11 Zedekiya yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’ umwe; ayimarakw imyaka cumi n’umwe i Yerusalemu;
2Chronicles36:12 na we akora ivyo Uhoraho Imana yiwe abona kw ari bibi; ntiyicisha bugufi imbere y’uwavugishwa n’ Imana Yeremiya
2Chronicles36:13 Na we agarariza umwami Nebukadineza
2Chronicles36:14 Mbere n’abaherezi bakuru‐bakuru bose bo n’abantu bāgize ivy’ ubuhemu bginshi
2Chronicles36:15 Uhoraho
2Chronicles36:16 Ariko bagashinyagurira izo ntumwa z’Imana
2Chronicles36:17 Nci co catumye abatēza umwami w’Abakaludaya
2Chronicles36:18 Kand’ ibintu vyose vyo mu ngoro y’Imana
2Chronicles36:19 Maze baturira n’ ingoro y’Imana
2Chronicles36:20 Abācitse bagakira inkota
2Chronicles36:21 kwar’ ukugira ngw ijambo Uhoraho yavugiye mu kanwa ka Yeremiya rishike
2Chronicles36:22 Hanyuma mu mwaka wa mbere Kuro umwami w’i Buperesi agiye ku ngoma
2Chronicles36:23 ngo Kuro
Ezra1:1 Mu mwaka wa mbere Kuro umwami w’i Buperesi agiye ku ngoma
Ezra1:2 ngo Kuro
Ezra1:3 Non’ umuntu wese muri mwebge wo mu bantu biwe bose
Ezra1:4 Kand’ ahantu hose hasigaye umuntu w’inyambukīra
Ezra1:5 Nuko
Ezra1:6 Ababanyi babo bose babaha intererano z’ibintu vy’amafeza n’amazahabu n’ibindi
Ezra1:7 Kandi n’umwami Kuro asohora ibintu vy’imbombovu vyakoreshwa mu ngoro y’Uhoraho
Ezra1:8 izo mbombovu Kuro umwami w’i Buperesi mu kuzisohora atuma Mitiredati umuzezwabintu wiwe
Ezra1:9 Kand’ igitigiri cavyo ngiki: amasahani y’izahabu mirongwitatu
Ezra1:10 n’amabakure y’izahabu mirongwitatu
Ezra1:11 Ibintu vy’imbombovu vy’izahabu n’ivy’ ifeza
Ezra2:1 Aba ni bo bo mur’ ico gihugu Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni yari yarajanye i Babuloni nyene ar’ inyagano
Ezra2:2 ni bo bāzananye na Zerubabeli na Yosuwa na Nehemiya
Ezra2:3 abo mu ba Paroshi n’ibihumbi bibiri n’ijana na mirongwirindwi na babiri.
Ezra2:4 Abo mu ba Shefatiya n’amajana atatu na mirongwirindwi na babiri.
Ezra2:5 Abo mu ba Ara n’amajana ndwi na mirongwirindwi na batanu.
Ezra2:6 Abo mu ba Pahati‐mowabu
Ezra2:7 Abo mu ba Elamu n’igihumbi n’amajana abiri na mirongwitanu na bane.
Ezra2:8 Abo mu ba Zatu n’amajana cenda na mirongwine na batanu.
Ezra2:9 Abo mu ba Zakayi n’amajana ndwi na mirongwitandatu.
Ezra2:10 Abo mu ba Bani n’amajana atandatu na mirongwine na babiri.
Ezra2:11 Abo mu ba Bebayi n’amajana atandatu na mirongwibiri na batatu.
Ezra2:12 Abo mu ba Azigadi n’igihumbi n’amajana abiri na mirongwibiri na babiri.
Ezra2:13 Abo mu ba Adonikamu n’amajana atandatu na mirongwitandatu na batandatu.
Ezra2:14 Abo mu ba Bigivayi n’ibihumbi bibiri na mirongwitanu na batandatu.
Ezra2:15 Abo mu ba Adini n’amajana ane na mirongwitanu na bane.
Ezra2:16 Abo mu ba Ateri
Ezra2:17 Abo mu ba Besayi n’amajana atatu na mirongwibiri na batatu.
Ezra2:18 Abo mu ba Yora n’ijana n’icumi na babiri.
Ezra2:19 Abo mu ba Hashumu n’amajana abiri na mirongwibiri na batatu.
Ezra2:20 Ab’i Gibari ni mirongwicenda na batanu.
Ezra2:21 Ab’i Betelehemu n’ijana na mirongwibiri na batatu.
Ezra2:22 Abagabo b’i Netofa ni mirongwitanu na batandatu.
Ezra2:23 Abagabo b’i Anatoti n’ijana na mirongwibiri n’umunani.
Ezra2:24 Ab’i Azimaveti ni mirongwine na babiri.
Ezra2:25 Ab’i Kiriyatarimu n’i Kefira n’i Beroti n’amajana ndwi na mirongwine na batatu.
Ezra2:26 Ab’i Rama n’i Geba n’amajana atandatu na mirongwibiri n’umwe.
Ezra2:27 Abagabo b’i Mikimasi n’ijana na mirongwibiri na babiri.
Ezra2:28 Abagabo b’i Beteli n’i Hayi n’ amajana abiri na mirongwibiri na batatu.
Ezra2:29 Ab’i Nebo ni mirongwitanu na babiri.
Ezra2:30 Ab’i Magibishi n’ijana na mirongwitanu na batandatu.
Ezra2:31 Ab’i Elamu handi n’igihumbi n’amajana abiri na mirongwitanu na bane.
Ezra2:32 Ab’i Harimu n’amajana atatu na mirongwibiri.
Ezra2:33 Ab’i Lodi n’i Hadidi n’i Ono n’amajana ndwi na mirongwibiri na batanu.
Ezra2:34 Ab’i Yeriko n’amajana atatu na mirongwine na batanu.
Ezra2:35 Ab’i Sena n’ibihumbi bitatu n’amajana atandatu na mirongwitatu.
Ezra2:36 Abaherezi n’aba: abo mu ba Yedaya
Ezra2:37 Abo mu ba Imeri n’igihumbi na mirongwitanu na babiri.
Ezra2:38 Abo mu ba Pashuri n’igihumbi n’amajana abiri na mirongwine n’indwi.
Ezra2:39 Abo mu ba Harimu n’igihumbi n’icumi n’indwi.
Ezra2:40 Abalewi n’aba: abo mu ba Yosuwa na Kadimiyeli
Ezra2:41 Abaririmvyi bo mu ba Asafu n’ijana na mirongwibiri n’umunani.
Ezra2:42 Mu bashibamyi
Ezra2:43 Abahawe ibango ry’ibikorwa vy’urusengero n’aba: abo mu ba Siha
Ezra2:44 no mu ba Kerosi
Ezra2:45 no mu ba Lebana
Ezra2:46 no mu ba Hagabu
Ezra2:47 no mu ba Gideli
Ezra2:48 no mu ba Resini
Ezra2:49 no mu ba Uza
Ezra2:50 no mu ba Asina
Ezra2:51 no mu ba Bakibuki
Ezra2:52 no mu ba Basiluti
Ezra2:53 no mu ba Barikosi
Ezra2:54 no mu ba Nesiya
Ezra2:55 Abuzukuruza b’abasavyi ba Salomo n’aba: abo mu ba Sotayi
Ezra2:56 no mu ba Yahala
Ezra2:57 no mu ba Shefatiya
Ezra2:58 Abahawe ibango ry’ibikorwa vy’urusengero bose
Ezra2:59 Kand’ aba ni bo bādūze bava i Telimela n’i Teliharisha n’i Kerubu n’i Adani n’i Imeri
Ezra2:60 Abo mu ba Delaya no mu ba Tobiya no mu ba Nekoda n’amajana atandatu na mirongwitanu na babiri.
Ezra2:61 Abo mu baherezi n’aba: abo mu ba Habaya
Ezra2:62 abo bārondeye amazina yabo mu gitabo kidondora ba sekuruza
Ezra2:63 Umucamateka arababuza ngo ntibarye ku vyera cane
Ezra2:64 Nukw iryo shengero ryose iyo riva rikagera
Ezra2:65 udashizemw’ abagurano n’abaguranokazi babo
Ezra2:66 Amafarasi yabo yar’ amajana ndwi na mirongwitatu n’atandatu; n’inyumbu zabo zar’ amajana abiri na mirongwine na zitanu;
Ezra2:67 n’ingamiya zabo zar’ amajana ane na mirongwitatu na zitanu
Ezra2:68 Bamwe mu bakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza
Ezra2:69 Batanga uko bashoboye
Ezra2:70 Nukw abaherezi n’ Abalewi n’abantu bamwe baba i Yerusalemu no hafi yaho; abaririmvyi n’abashibamyi n’abahawe ibango ry’ibikorwa vy’urusengero bibera mu bisagara vyabo
Ezra3:1 Maz’ ukwezi kugira indwi kubonetse
Ezra3:2 Maze Yosuwa mwene Yehozadaki ahagararana na bagenzi biwe b’abaherezi na Zerubabeli mwene Sheyalitiyeli na bagenzi biwe
Ezra3:3 Ico gicaniro bacubaka aho cahora
Ezra3:4 Bagira imisi mikuru y’insago
Ezra3:5 hanyuma bakomeza gutanga ibimazi vyo kwoswa vy’intasība
Ezra3:6 Guhēra ku musi wa mbere w’ukwezi kw’indwi ni ho batanguye kwosereza Uhoraho ibimazi
Ezra3:7 Kandi bagerera abubatsi n’ababaji amahera
Ezra3:8 Nuko mu mwaka ugira kabiri uhereye aho bashikiye ku kibanza c’ingoro y’Imana i Yerusalemu
Ezra3:9 Maze Yosuwa arīnega hamwe n’abahungu biwe na bagenzi biwe
Ezra3:10 Abubatsi bamaze kwubaka itanguriro ry’urusengero rw’Uhoraho
Ezra3:11 Bakaririmba bahāniranwa
Ezra3:12 Ariko benshi mu baherezi n’Abalewi n’abakuru b’ amazu ya ba sekuruza
Ezra3:13 kand’ abantu ntibashobora gutandukanya urwamo rw’umunezero n’ urwamo rw’amarira; kukw abantu bayogora n’amajwi arenga
Ezra4:1 Maz’ abansi b’Abayuda n’ab’ Ababenyamini bumvise yukw abāvuye mu kinyago bubakira Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli urusengero
Ezra4:2 baca bēgēra Zerubabeli n’abakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza
Ezra4:3 Ariko Zerubabeli na Yosuwa n’abandi bakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza b’Abisirayeli barabishura
Ezra4:4 Maz’ abantu bo mur’ ico gihugu badendebura amaboko y’Abayuda
Ezra4:5 Baha impēra abo kwigenera inama zo kubabuza gushitsa ivyo bagabiye; bikomeza birtyo igihe cose Kuro umwami w’i Buperesi yamaze ku ngoma
Ezra4:6 Mbere ku ngoma ya Ahasuwerusi
Ezra4:7 Kandi no ku ngoma ya Aritazeruzi
Ezra4:8 Rehumu umujanama na Shimushayi umukarani bandikira uwo mwami Aritazeruzi icete
Ezra4:9 mbere Rehumu uwo mujanama na Shimushayi umukarani bafatanya kucandika na bagenzi babo bandi b’Abadinayi n’Abafarisatiki n’Abataripeli n’ Abafarisiti n’Abarikevi
Ezra4:10 n’ ayandi mahanga yose Osinapari umunyacubahiro ahambaye yajabukanye hakuno akabagerēra mu gisagara c’i Samariya
Ezra4:11 Aya majambo n’amwe n’ayo mur’ ico cete bāmwandikiye
Ezra4:12 Urazirikanye
Ezra4:13 None nyaguhora ku ngoma
Ezra4:14 None rero kuko dutunzwe n’agasōsa kava i bgami
Ezra4:15 kugira ngo barondere mu gitabo kidonda ivyagenda biba ku ngoma za ba sogokuruza. Nuko uzobisanga mur’ ico gitabo
Ezra4:16 None rero nyaguhora ku ngoma
Ezra4:17 Maz’ umwami arungikira inyishu uwo mujanama Rehumu na Shimushayi umukarani na bagenzi babo baba i Samariya no mu bindi bihugu vyo hakurya y’ uruzi
Ezra4:18 ca cete mwaturungikira barakinsomeye
Ezra4:19 Nuko nshinga yuko babiserangura; maze basanga ico gisagara mu bihe vya kera caragarariza abami koko
Ezra4:20 Kandi ngo Hābamw’ abami bakomeye cane bāganza i Yerusalemu n’ igihugu cose co hakurya y’uruzi
Ezra4:21 Nuko rero ni mushinge icagezwe bareke kwubaka
Ezra4:22 Kandi mwame mugavye ntimureburure mur’ ivyo
Ezra4:23 Nukw ico cete c’umwami Aritazeruzi kimaze gusomerwa uwo mujanama Rehumu na Shimushayi umukarani na bagenzi babo
Ezra4:24 Nukw igikorwa c’ingoro y’ Imana ir’i Yerusalemu barakireka
Ezra5:1 Maz’ abavugishwa n’Imana Hagayi na Zekariya mwene Ido bavugishwa mw izina ry’Imana y’Abisirayeli
Ezra5:2 Bukeye Zerubabeli mwene Sheyalitiyeli na Yosuwa mwene Yehozadaki bakūra hasi
Ezra5:3 Mur’ iyo misi nyene Tatenayi icēgēra c’umwami co hakuno y’uruzi
Ezra5:4 Kandi barababaza
Ezra5:5 Arikw abakuru b’Abayuda
Ezra5:6 Aya majambo n’amwe n’ayo mu cete canditswe na Tatenayi
Ezra5:7 Nuko bamurungikira icete canditswe girtya
Ezra5:8 Urazirikanye ga mugenzi
Ezra5:9 None twabajije abo bakuru
Ezra5:10 Kandi twababajije amazina yabo
Ezra5:11 Nuko baratwishura
Ezra5:12 Bat’ Ariko hanyuma ba sogokuruza baratsa Imana Nyen’ ijuru
Ezra5:13 Bat’ Ariko mu mwaka wa mbere Kuro umwami w’i Babuloni ari ku ngoma
Ezra5:14 Bati Mbere n’ibikoreshwa vy’izahabu n’ifeza vyahora mur’ iyo ngoro y’Imana
Ezra5:15 Bat’ Aramubgira
Ezra5:16 Nuko bukeye uwo Sheshibazari araza
Ezra5:17 None rero nyaguhora ku ngoma
Ezra6:1 Maz’ umwami Dariyo avuga ko barondera mu nzu ibīkwamw’ ibitabo vy’ivyabaye
Ezra6:2 babona umuzingo w’igitabo mu rugo rw’i bgami ahitwa Akimeta
Ezra6:3 mu mwaka wa mbere umwami Kuro ari ku ngoma
Ezra6:4 Mu kwubaka bakurikiranye imirongo itatu y’amabuye manini‐manini n’umurongo w’ibiti bikiri bishasha; kand’ ibizotangwa kuri yo bize bikūrwe mu ngoro y’umwami.
Ezra6:5 Kandi n’ibintu vy’imbombovu vyākūwe mur’ iyo nzu y’Imana vy’izahabu n’ifeza
Ezra6:6 None rero
Ezra6:7 mureke igikorwa c’ iyo nzu y’Imana kije imbere
Ezra6:8 Kandi nshinze ibgirizwa ry’ ivyo mukwiye gukorera abakuru b’Abayuda mu vyo kwubakisha iyo nzu y’Imana: mugire umwete cane wo guha abo bantu ivyo bazotanga
Ezra6:9 Kandi n’ ivyo bazokena nk’amamasa y’ imikangara n’amapfizi y’intama n’ imyagazi y’intama nyene vyo gutangakw ibimazi vyo kwosereza Imana Nyen’ ijuru
Ezra6:10 kugira ngo baze bahore baha Imana Nyen’ ijuru ibimazi vy’umubabge umota neza
Ezra6:11 Kandi nshinze itēka
Ezra6:12 Kand’ Imana yatumye izina ryayo rihaba
Ezra6:13 Hanyuma Tatenayi icēgēra c’ umwami co hakuno y’uruzi na Shetari‐bozenayi na bagenzi babo bumvise ijambo ry’umwami Dariyo
Ezra6:14 Nukw abakuru b’Abayuda bagira ikiganza ciza mu kwubaka
Ezra6:15 Iyo ngoro yuzura ku musi ugira gatatu w’ukwezi kwa Adari
Ezra6:16 Maz’ Abisirayeli n’abaherezi n’Abalewi
Ezra6:17 Ico gihe co kuyishikiriza Imana
Ezra6:18 Bashirah’ abaherezi ukw imigabane yabo ikurikirana
Ezra6:19 Maz’ abavuye mu kinyago barya ivya Pasika ku musi w’icumi na kane w’ukwezi kwa mbere
Ezra6:20 kukw abaherezi n’Abalewi bari biyereje hamwe
Ezra6:21 Nukw Abisirayeli bari bagarutse bavuye mu kinyago barya ivya Pasika
Ezra6:22 bagira imisi mikuru ndwi y’imitsima itambiwe banezerewe
Ezra7:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo
Ezra7:2 Hilukiya wa Shalumu
Ezra7:3 Ahitubu wa Amariya
Ezra7:4 Merayoti wa Zerahiya
Ezra7:5 Buki wa Abishuwa
Ezra7:6 uwo Ezira aradūga ava i Babuloni; kandi yar’ umunyabgenge w’ivyanditswe kandi w’umuhanga mu vy’ivyagezwe vya Mose vyatanzwe n’ Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli. Umwami amuha ivyo yamusavye vyose
Ezra7:7 Nuko bamwe mu Bisirayeli badūgana n’abaherezi bamwe n’ Abalewi n’abaririmvyi b’abashibamyi n’abahawe ibango ry’ibikorwa vy’urusengero; abo baja i Yerusalemu mu mwaka ugira indwi Aritazeruzi ari ku ngoma.
Ezra7:8 Nuko Ezira ashika i Yerusalemu mu kwezi kwa gatanu kwo mu mwaka ugira indwi nyene uwo mwami ari ku ngoma.
Ezra7:9 Yari yahagurutse ava i Babuloni ku musi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa mbere
Ezra7:10 kuko Ezira yari yarīnāmūye mu mutima kwitwaririka ivyagezwe vy’Uhoraho ngw abishitse
Ezra7:11 Aya majambo n’amwe n’ayo mu cete umwami Aritazeruzi yahaye Ezira umuherezi ari we mwanditsi
Ezra7:12 ngo Jewe Aritazeruzi umwami aganza abami
Ezra7:13 None nshinze ibgirizwa ryo kurekura abo mu bantu b’ Abisirayeli bose baba mu bihugu vyanje bīgombera ubgabo kujana nawe i Yerusalemu
Ezra7:14 Kuko jewe umwami n’abajanama banje ukw ar’ indwi
Ezra7:15 kandi ng’ ugende ujanye amafeza n’amazahabu
Ezra7:16 bo n’amafeza yose n’amazahabu uzosanga mu gihugu c’i Babuloni cose
Ezra7:17 ni co gituma ayo mahera ukwiye kugira umwete cane wo kuzoyagura amamasa n’ amapfizi y’intama bo n’imyagazi
Ezra7:18 Kand’ ibizosāguka kur’ ayo mafeza n’amazahabu
Ezra7:19 kand’ ibintu vy’imbombovu uhawe vyo gukoresha mu ngoro y’Imana yawe
Ezra7:20 Kand’ ibintu vyose ingoro y’ Imana yawe izokenera
Ezra7:21 Kandi jewe umwami Aritazeruzi
Ezra7:22 bikagarukira kw italanto z’ ifeza ijana
Ezra7:23 Ic’ Imana Nyen’ ijuru izokwaka cose kize gihore kigirirwa ingoro yayo bidatevye
Ezra7:24 Kandi turabamenyesha ivy’ abaherezi n’Abalewi
Ezra7:25 Kandi nawe Ezira
Ezra7:26 Maz’ ūtazokwumvira ivyagezwe vy’Imana yawe n’ivyagezwe vyanje umwami
Ezra7:27 Uhoraho Imana ya ba sogokuruza aragahezagirwa
Ezra7:28 Kandi ni we yerekanye imbabazi ziwe kuri jewe imbere y’ umwami n’abajanama biwe
Ezra8:1 Aba ni bo bakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza twādūganye tuva i Babuloni
Ezra8:2 Mu ba Finehasi ni Gerushomu; mu ba Itamari ni Daniyeli; mu ba Dawidi ni Hatushi
Ezra8:3 wo muri bene Shekaniya; mu ba Paroshi ni Zekariya
Ezra8:4 Mu ba Pahati‐mowabu ni Elihowenayi mwene Zerahiya
Ezra8:5 Mu ba Shekaniya ni mwene Yahaziyeli
Ezra8:6 Mu ba Adini ni Ebedi mwene Yonatani; uwo yandikanywe n’abagabo mirongwitanu.
Ezra8:7 Mu ba Elamu ni Yeshaya mwene Ataliya
Ezra8:8 Mu ba Shefatiya ni Zebadiya mwene Mikayeli
Ezra8:9 Mu ba Yowabu ni Obadiya mwene Yehiyeli
Ezra8:10 Mu ba Shelomiti ni mwene Yosifiya
Ezra8:11 Mu ba Bebayi ni Zekariya mwene Bebayi nyene
Ezra8:12 Mu ba Azigadi ni Yohanani mwene Hakatani
Ezra8:13 Mu ba Adonikamu
Ezra8:14 Kandi mu ba Bigivayi ni Utayi na Zabudi
Ezra8:15 Nuko mbakoraniriza ku ruzi rusēsera muri Ahava
Ezra8:16 Maze ntuma kuri Eliyezeri na Ariyeli na Shemaya na Elinatani na Yaribu na Elinatani wundi na Natani na Zekariya na Meshulamu
Ezra8:17 Ndaheza ndabatuma kuri Ido w’umushingantahe w’ahītwa i Kasifiya
Ezra8:18 Maze kubg’ ikiganza ciza c’ Imana yacu cari kuri twebge batuzanira umuntu w’umunyabgenge wo mu bandurutse kuri Mahili
Ezra8:19 na Hashabiya hamwe na Yeshaya wo mu bandurutse kuri Merari
Ezra8:20 bo n’abo mu bahawe ibango ry’ibikorwa vy’urusengero
Ezra8:21 Maze ntāngāriza aho nyene kur’ urwo ruzi Ahava ivyo kwisonzesha
Ezra8:22 Kuko vyanteye isoni gusaba umwami umuce w’ingabo n’abagendera ku mafarasi
Ezra8:23 Nuko turisonzesha
Ezra8:24 Maze ntora icumi na babiri mu bakuru b’abaherezi
Ezra8:25 Maz’ amafeza n’amazahabu n’ ibintu vy’imbombovu mbigera ku munzane babona
Ezra8:26 Nuko ndabigera
Ezra8:27 n’ibikombe vy’izahabu mirongwibiri biciye amahera yitwa dariki igihumbi
Ezra8:28 Ndababgira
Ezra8:29 Muvyitwaririke mubizigame
Ezra8:30 Nukw abaherezi n’Abalewi bākīra ayo mafeza n’amazahabu n’ibindi bintu uk’ urugero rwavyo rwangana
Ezra8:31 Maze ku musi ugira icumi na kabiri w’ukwezi kwa mbere turahaguruka tuva kur’ urwo ruzi Ahava
Ezra8:32 Dushitse i Yerusalemu turuhuka imisi itatu.
Ezra8:33 Maze ku musi ugira kane bagera ku munzane ayo mafeza n’ amazahabu n’ibindi bintu
Ezra8:34 Vyose barabiharūra ukw igitigiri cavyo n’ukuriba kwavyo vyangana. Ico gihe nyene ukuriba kwavyo kwose kurandikwa.
Ezra8:35 Maz’ abāgarutse bavuye mu kinyago bosereza Imana y’Abisirayeli ibimazi; batanga amamasa cumi n’abiri kw ikimazi c’Abisirayeli bose
Ezra8:36 Maz’ amajambo y’ umwami bayashikiriza ivyēgēra vyiwe n’abaganza hakuno y’uruzi
Ezra9:1 Nukw ivyo vyose birangiye
Ezra9:2 kuk’ ubgabo bābiriye abageni bo muri bo
Ezra9:3 Maze numvise ivyo nitantamurirakw imvune bo n’umutamana
Ezra9:4 Maz’ aho ndi hakoranira abahindishwa agashitsi bose n’amajambo y’ Imana y’Abisirayeli
Ezra9:5 Ikimazi ca ni kera kimaze gushikanwa
Ezra9:6 ndavuga
Ezra9:7 Uhereye mu bihe vya ba sogokuruza twamye dukora ibidutsinda vyinshi cane
Ezra9:8 Ariko noneho mur’ aka kanya gatoya Uhoraho Imana yacu atweretse ikigongwe ciwe
Ezra9:9 Kuko na none tur’ abagurano; arikw Imana yacu ntiyaduhebeye mu bugurano bgacu
Ezra9:10 None ga Mana yacu
Ezra9:11 ivyo washingiye mu basavyi bawe wavugisha
Ezra9:12 kand’ uti Ntimuze mushingirane na bo
Ezra9:13 None rero kw ivyo vyose bidushitseko
Ezra9:14 mbega twongeye kurenga ivyagezwe vyawe
Ezra9:15 Uhoraho Mana y’Abisirayeli
Ezra10:1 Nuko Ezira agisenga yātura
Ezra10:2 Maze Shekaniya mwene Yehiyeli
Ezra10:3 Nuko rero none dusezerane isezerano n’Imana yacu yuko twirukana abo bagore bose n’ abana bāvyaye
Ezra10:4 Va hasi
Ezra10:5 Nuko Ezira aca ava hasi
Ezra10:6 Maze Ezira arahaguruka ava imbere y’ingoro y’Imana
Ezra10:7 Hanyuma batāngāza i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu ngw abavuye mu kinyago bose bakoranire i Yerusalemu;
Ezra10:8 kandi ngo mu misi itatu
Ezra10:9 Nuko mur’ iyo misi itatu Abayuda n’Ababenyamini bose bari bamaze gukoranira i Yerusalemu; hāri ku musi ugira mirongwibiri w’ukwezi kw’icenda; abantu bose bagandagaza ku kibuga imbere y’ ingoro y’Imana
Ezra10:10 Maze Ezira umuherezi arahaguruka
Ezra10:11 None ni mwaturire Uhoraho Imana ya ba sogokuruza ivyo
Ezra10:12 Nukw ikoraniro ryose bamwishura n’ijwi rirenga
Ezra10:13 Arikw abantu ni benshi
Ezra10:14 None rer’ abakuru bacu ni basigarire iri koraniro ryose; maz’ abo mu bisagara vyacu bose bābiriye abanyamahangakazi
Ezra10:15 Ariko Yonatani mwene Asaheli na Yahazeya mwene Tikuva ni bo bāvuye hasi bahakana iyo nama; kandi bafatanya na Meshulamu na Shabetayi Umulewi.
Ezra10:16 Nukw abavuye mu kinyago babigenza bartyo. Maze Ezira umuherezi na bamwe bo mu bakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza
Ezra10:17 Ku musi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa mbere bari barangije ivy’ abantu bose bari barābiriye abagore b’abanyamahangakazi.
Ezra10:18 Abo mu bana b’abaherezi bābiriye abagore b’abanyamahangakazi ni Mayaseya na Eliyezeri na Yaribu na Gedaliya muri bene Yosuwa
Ezra10:19 Abo bararahira bakorana mu ntoke yuko birukana abagore babo; kandi batanga impfizi y’ intama kw iciru
Ezra10:20 Muri bene Imeri
Ezra10:21 Muri bene Harimu
Ezra10:22 Muri bene Pashuri
Ezra10:23 Mu Balewi
Ezra10:24 Mu baririmvyi
Ezra10:25 Mu Bisirayeli bandi
Ezra10:26 Mu ba Elamu
Ezra10:27 Mu ba Zatu
Ezra10:28 Mu ba Bebayi
Ezra10:29 Mu ba Bani
Ezra10:30 Mu ba Pahati‐mowabu
Ezra10:31 Mu ba Harimu
Ezra10:32 na Benyamini na Maluki na Shemariya.
Ezra10:33 Mu ba Hashumu
Ezra10:34 Mu ba Bani
Ezra10:35 na Benaya na Bedeya na Keluhi
Ezra10:36 na Vaniya na Meremoti na Eliyashibu
Ezra10:37 na Mataniya na Matenayi na Yahasu
Ezra10:38 na Bani na Binuwi na Shimeyi
Ezra10:39 na Shelemiya na Natani na Adaya
Ezra10:40 na Makinadebayi na Shashayi na Sharayi
Ezra10:41 na Azareli na Shelemiya na Shemariya
Ezra10:42 na Shalumu na Amariya na Yosefu.
Ezra10:43 Mu ba Nebo
Ezra10:44 Abo bose bāri bābiriye abagore b’abanyamahangakazi
Nehemiah1:1 Amajambo ya Nehemiya mwene Hakaliya. Mu kwezi kwa Kisilevu
Nehemiah1:2 Maze Hanani
Nehemiah1:3 Barambgira
Nehemiah1:4 Nuko mmaze kwumva izo nkuru nca nicara ngaho ndarira
Nehemiah1:5 Ndavuga
Nehemiah1:6 None tega ugutwi kwawe wumvirize
Nehemiah1:7 Eka twaragucumuyeko bikomeye
Nehemiah1:8 Ni wibuke ijambo wabariye umusavyi wawe Mose
Nehemiah1:9 ut’ Ariko ni mwampindukirira
Nehemiah1:10 None rero
Nehemiah1:11 Bgirukiro
Nehemiah2:1 Nuko mu mwaka ugira mirongwibiri umwami Aritazeruzi ari ku ngoma
Nehemiah2:2 Nuk’ umwami arambaza
Nehemiah2:3 ndamwishura
Nehemiah2:4 Nuk’ umwami arambaza
Nehemiah2:5 Maze nishura umwami
Nehemiah2:6 Kand’ umwami yar’ avyagiye ngaho ari kumwe n’umwamikazi wiwe; nukw arambaza
Nehemiah2:7 Ndaheza ndamubarira
Nehemiah2:8 bo n’ icete nshira Asafu
Nehemiah2:9 Maze ngenda njanye n’abagabisha b’ingabo bo n’abagendera ku mafarasi umwami yampaye
Nehemiah2:10 Buno Sanibalati Umuhoroni bo na Tobiya Umwamoni w’umugurano bavyumvise
Nehemiah2:11 Nuko nshitse i Yerusalemu mmaray’ imisi itatu.
Nehemiah2:12 Ndaheza mpenga mw ijoro mvyukana n’ abantu bake
Nehemiah2:13 Nukw iryo joro nca mw irembo rija ku mwonga
Nehemiah2:14 Maze nkomeza inzira nshika kw irembo rija kw iriba
Nehemiah2:15 Nukw iryo joro nyene nsubira kudūgana akagezi
Nehemiah2:16 Arikw abakuru ntibari bazi iyo nagiye cank’ ico nakoze
Nehemiah2:17 Maze ndababarira
Nehemiah2:18 Ndaheza mbiganira ingen’ ikiganza ciza c’Imana yanje cabaye kuri jewe
Nehemiah2:19 Ariko Sanibalati Umuhoroni
Nehemiah2:20 Nanje ndabishura
Nehemiah3:1 Bukeye Eliyashibu
Nehemiah3:2 Maz’ ab’ i Yeriko bahēra aho Eliyashibu yagarukiye
Nehemiah3:3 Irembo ryitwa iry’ Amafi ryubakwa na bene Hasenaya
Nehemiah3:4 Bakurikirwa na Meremoti mwene Uriya
Nehemiah3:5 Bakurikirwa n’ab’i Tekowa
Nehemiah3:6 Irembo rya kera ryasanwe na Yoyada mwene Paseya na Meshulamu mwene Besodeya; barishiramw’ imitambikwa yaryo
Nehemiah3:7 Bakurikirwa na Melatiya w’i Gibeya na Yadoni w’i Meronoti
Nehemiah3:8 Bakurikirwa na Uziyeli mwene Harihaya
Nehemiah3:9 Bakurikirwa na Refaya mwene Huri
Nehemiah3:10 akurikirwa na Yedaya mwene Harumafu
Nehemiah3:11 Malakiya mwene Harimu
Nehemiah3:12 Akurikirwa na Shalumu mwene Haloheshi
Nehemiah3:13 Irembo rija ku mwonga ryasanwe na Hanuni bo n’abantu b’i Zanowa; bararyubaka
Nehemiah3:14 Iryo rembo ricishwamw’ umwavu ryasanwe na Malakiya mwene Rekabu
Nehemiah3:15 Irembo rija kw iriba risanwa na Shalumu mwene Koli‐hoze
Nehemiah3:16 Hakurikira Nehemiya mwene Azibuki
Nehemiah3:17 Akurikirwa n’Abalewi
Nehemiah3:18 Hakurikira bagenzi babo bava mu kindi gice c’ intāra y’i Keyila nyene
Nehemiah3:19 Hakurikira umukuru w’i Misipa
Nehemiah3:20 Akurikirwa na Baruki mwene Zabayi
Nehemiah3:21 Akurikirwa na Meremoti mwene Uriya
Nehemiah3:22 Akurikirwa n’abaherezi bo mur’ iyo ntāra.
Nehemiah3:23 Na bo bakurikirwa na Benyamini na Hashubu
Nehemiah3:24 Akurikirwa na Binuwi mwene Henadadi
Nehemiah3:25 Akurikirwa na Palali mwene Uzayi
Nehemiah3:26 bo n’abahawe ibango ry’ibikorwa vy’urusengero bāba muri Ofeli; basana ahahereranye n’irembo ry’amazi ryerekeye i burasirazuba
Nehemiah3:27 Hakurikirakw abantu b’i Tekowa
Nehemiah3:28 Haruguru y’irembo ry’amafarasi hasanwa n’abaherezi
Nehemiah3:29 Hakurikirako Sadoki mwene Imeri
Nehemiah3:30 Akurikirwa na Hananiya mwene Shelemiya
Nehemiah3:31 Hakurikira Malikiya
Nehemiah3:32 Kandi hagati y’ahadūga haja ku mfuruka n’irembo ry’intama hasanwa n’abacuzi b’izahabu hamwe n’abadandaza.
Nehemiah4:1 Bukeye Sanibalati yumvise ko twubaka urwo ruzitiro rw’ amabuye
Nehemiah4:2 avugira imbere ya bagenzi biwe n’imbere y’ingabo z’i Samariya
Nehemiah4:3 Kandi na Tobiya w’Umwamoni yar’ ahagararanye na we
Nehemiah4:4 Maze ndasenga
Nehemiah4:5 Ntutwikire igicumuro cabo
Nehemiah4:6 Nuko dushimikira kwubaka uruzitiro
Nehemiah4:7 Bukeye Sanibalati na Tobiya n’Abarabo n’Abamoni n’Abanyashidodi bumvise yukw igikorwa co gusana uruzitiro rw’i Yerusalemu kija imbere
Nehemiah4:8 bahiga imihigo bose yuko bazoja gutera i Yerusalemu no kutuburabuza.
Nehemiah4:9 Ariko twebge dusenga Imana yacu
Nehemiah4:10 Maz’ Abayuda baravuga
Nehemiah4:11 Kand’ abarwanizi bacu na bo baravuga
Nehemiah4:12 Kand’ Abayuda bāba hafi yabo bama baza kutubūrira bava hirya no hino
Nehemiah4:13 Ni co catumye nshira abantu inyuma y’uruzitiro
Nehemiah4:14 Mbitegereje
Nehemiah4:15 Nukw abansi bacu bumva ko vyamenyekanye muri twebge; Imana ihindura ubusa imigabo yabo
Nehemiah4:16 Uhereye ico gihe mu bantu banje
Nehemiah4:17 Nukw abubaka uruzitiro n’abikorezi n’ababakorera
Nehemiah4:18 N’abubatsi
Nehemiah4:19 Ndaheza mbgira abakuru n’abaganza n’ abandi bose
Nehemiah4:20 none rero ni mwumva inzamba ivuze
Nehemiah4:21 Uko ni ko twākora ico gikorwa; umuce umwe wo muri twebge bitwaza amacumu uhereye mu mutwenzi ugashitsa inyenyeri zibonetse.
Nehemiah4:22 Ico gihe nyene mbarira abantu
Nehemiah4:23 Nuko nanje na bagenzi banje n’abantu banje n’abarinzi bāri kuri jewe
Nehemiah5:1 Bukeye haba ugutaka gukomeye
Nehemiah5:2 bati Twe n’abahungu bacu n’abakobga bacu turi benshi; ni muduhe ibidutunga turye kugira ngo tubeho.
Nehemiah5:3 Abandi baravuga
Nehemiah5:4 Kandi n’abandi baravuga
Nehemiah5:5 Yamara rero
Nehemiah5:6 Numvise ayo majambo n’amaganya yabo nca ndaraka rwose.
Nehemiah5:7 Mmaze kuvyiyumvirako nca ntonganya abakuru n’abaganza
Nehemiah5:8 Ndababgira
Nehemiah5:9 Ndongera ndavuga
Nehemiah5:10 Na jewe nyene
Nehemiah5:11 Mber’ uyu musi mubasubize amatongo yabo
Nehemiah5:12 Na bo baravuga
Nehemiah5:13 Maze nkunkumura umutamana wanje
Nehemiah5:14 Kand’ uhereye umusi umwami Aritazeruzi yangize icēgēra ciwe mu gihugu c’i Buyuda
Nehemiah5:15 Arikw abanyitangiye imbere mu gutwarira umwami
Nehemiah5:16 Ariko nagize umwete wo gukora
Nehemiah5:17 Kand’ abantu ijana na mirongwitanu b’Abayuda n’ababaganza bāma baza kurya i wanje
Nehemiah5:18 Ku musi ku musi twābāga inka imwe n’intama zitandatu z’intorwa
Nehemiah5:19 Ndaheza ndasenga
Nehemiah6:1 Bukeye babgira Sanibalati na Tobiya na Geshemu Umwarabo n’abandi bansi bacu
Nehemiah6:2 Nuko Sanibalati na Geshemu baca bantumako ngo ngende duhūrire mu mihana yo mu kiyaya c’i Ono. Arikw ico bāgomba kwar’ ukungirira nabi.
Nehemiah6:3 Maze mbatumakw intumwa
Nehemiah6:4 Bantumako bartyo ibihetangabo bine
Nehemiah6:5 Ubugira gatanu Sanibalati asubira kuntumak’ umuntu wiwe kuno nyene
Nehemiah6:6 canditswemwo ngo Mu mahanga humvikana impuha
Nehemiah6:7 Bitayeko ngo Washizeho ba kamenyi bo kukwāmāmaza i Yerusalemu
Nehemiah6:8 Ndaheza ntuma kumwishura
Nehemiah6:9 Kuko bose bāgomba kudutera ubgoba
Nehemiah6:10 Bukeye ninjira mu nzu ya Shemaya mwene Delaya
Nehemiah6:11 Nanje ndamwishura
Nehemiah6:12 Maze mvyitegereje mmenya kw atar’ Imana yabimutumye
Nehemiah6:13 Bāmuhēreye ngw antere ubgoba
Nehemiah6:14 Ndaheza ndasenga
Nehemiah6:15 Ku musi ugira mirongwibiri na gatanu w’ukwezi kwa Eluli ni ho twarangije uruzitiro
Nehemiah6:16 Maz’ abansi bacu bose bavyumvise
Nehemiah6:17 Kandi mur’ iyo misi abakuru b’i Buyuda na Tobiya bandikiranira ivyete vyinshi.
Nehemiah6:18 Kandi benshi bo mu Bayuda bari bafitaniye amasezerano na we
Nehemiah6:19 Kandi bama bambgira ivyiza kuri we
Nehemiah7:1 Barangije kwubaka uruzitiro nca nterakw inzugi hose
Nehemiah7:2 Ndaheza nzeza igisagara c’i Yerusalemu mwene wacu Hanani
Nehemiah7:3 ndababgira
Nehemiah7:4 Kand’ ico gisagara cari kinini kikagera kure
Nehemiah7:5 Imana yanje impa ivyiyumviro vyo gukoranya abakuru n’abaganza n’abantu bose ngo mbandikishe ivy’ akārōnda kabo. Ndondeye mbona igitabo kidonda ivy’ akārōnda k’abābanje kudūga
Nehemiah7:6 Aba ni bo bantu bo mu gihugu cacu bādūze bava mu kinyago mu bo Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni yajanye ar’ inyagano
Nehemiah7:7 bāzananye na Zerubabeli na Yosuwa
Nehemiah7:8 abo mu ba Paroshi n’ ibihumbi bibiri n’ijana na mirongwirindwi na babiri.
Nehemiah7:9 Abo mu ba Shefatiya n’amajana atatu na mirongwirindwi na babiri.
Nehemiah7:10 Abo mu ba Ara n’amajana atandatu na mirongwitanu na babiri.
Nehemiah7:11 Abo mu ba Pahati‐mowabu
Nehemiah7:12 Abo mu ba Elamu n’igihumbi n’amajana abiri na mirongwitanu na bane.
Nehemiah7:13 Abo mu ba Zatu n’amajana munani na mirongwine na batanu.
Nehemiah7:14 Abo mu ba Zakayi n’amajana ndwi na mirongwitandatu.
Nehemiah7:15 Abo mu ba Binuwi n’ amajana atandatu na mirongwine n’umunani.
Nehemiah7:16 Abo mu ba Bebayi n’amajana atandatu na mirongwibiri n’umunani.
Nehemiah7:17 Abo mu ba Azigadi n’ibihumbi bibiri n’ amajana atatu na mirongwibiri na babiri.
Nehemiah7:18 Abo mu ba Adonikamu n’amajana atandatu na mirongwitandatu n’indwi.
Nehemiah7:19 Abo mu ba Bigivayi n’ibihumbi bibiri na mirongwitandatu n’indwi.
Nehemiah7:20 Abo mu ba Adini n’amajana atandatu na mirongwitanu na batanu.
Nehemiah7:21 Abo mu ba Ateri
Nehemiah7:22 Abo mu ba Hashumu n’amajana atatu na mirongwibiri n’ umunani.
Nehemiah7:23 Abo mu ba Besayi n’amajana atatu na mirongwibiri na bane.
Nehemiah7:24 Abo mu ba Harifu n’ijana n’icumi na babiri.
Nehemiah7:25 Ab’i Gibeyoni ni mirongwicenda na batanu.
Nehemiah7:26 Abagabo b’i Betelehemu n’i Netofa n’ijana na mirongumunani n’umunani.
Nehemiah7:27 Abagabo b’i Anatoti n’ijana na mirongwibiri n’umunani.
Nehemiah7:28 Abagabo b’i Beti‐azimaveti ni mirongwine na babiri.
Nehemiah7:29 Abagabo b’i Kiriyati‐yeyarimu n’i Kefira n’i Beroti n’amajana ndwi na mirongwine na batatu.
Nehemiah7:30 Abagabo b’i Rama n’i Geba n’amajana atandatu na mirongwibiri n’umwe.
Nehemiah7:31 Abagabo b’i Mikimasi n’ijana na mirongwibiri na babiri.
Nehemiah7:32 Abagabo b’i Beteli n’i Hayi n’ijana na mirongwibiri na batatu.
Nehemiah7:33 Abagabo b’i Nebo handi ni mirongwitanu na babiri.
Nehemiah7:34 Ab’i Elamu handi n’igihumbi n’amajana abiri na mirongwitanu na bane.
Nehemiah7:35 Ab’i Harimu n’ amajana atatu na mirongwibiri.
Nehemiah7:36 Ab’i Yeriko n’amajana atatu na mirongwine na batanu.
Nehemiah7:37 Ab’i Lodi n’i Hadidi n’i Ono n’amajana ndwi na mirongwibiri n’umwe.
Nehemiah7:38 Ab’i Sena n’ibihumbi bitatu n’amajana cenda na mirongwitatu.
Nehemiah7:39 Abaherezi n’aba: abo mu ba Yedaya
Nehemiah7:40 Abo mu ba Imeri n’igihumbi na mirongwitanu na babiri.
Nehemiah7:41 Abo mu ba Pashuri n’igihumbi n’amajana abiri na mirongwine n’indwi.
Nehemiah7:42 Abo mu ba Harimu n’igihumbi n’icumi n’indwi.
Nehemiah7:43 Abalewi n’aba: abo mu ba Yosuwa na Kadimiyeli
Nehemiah7:44 Abaririmvyi bo mu ba Asafu n’ijana na mirongwine n’umunani.
Nehemiah7:45 Abashibamyi n’aba: abo mu ba Shalumu
Nehemiah7:46 Abahawe ibango ry’ibikorwa vy’urusengero n’aba: abo mu ba Siha
Nehemiah7:47 no mu ba Kerosi
Nehemiah7:48 no mu ba Lebana
Nehemiah7:49 no mu ba Hanani
Nehemiah7:50 no mu ba Reyaya
Nehemiah7:51 no mu ba Gazamu
Nehemiah7:52 no mu ba Besayi
Nehemiah7:53 no mu ba Bakibuki
Nehemiah7:54 no mu ba Basiliti
Nehemiah7:55 no mu ba Barikosi
Nehemiah7:56 no mu ba Nesiya
Nehemiah7:57 Abuzukuruza b’abasavyi ba Salomo n’aba: abo mu ba Sotayi
Nehemiah7:58 no mu ba Yahala
Nehemiah7:59 no mu ba Shefatiya
Nehemiah7:60 Abahawe iryo bango bose
Nehemiah7:61 Kand’ aba ni bo bādūze bava i Telimela n’i Teliharisha n’i Kerubu n’i Adoni n’i Imeri
Nehemiah7:62 Abo mu ba Delaya no mu ba Tobiya no mu ba Nekoda n’amajana atandatu na mirongwine na babiri.
Nehemiah7:63 Abo mu baherezi ni bo aba: abo mu ba Habaya
Nehemiah7:64 abo bārondeye amazina yabo mu gitabo kidōndōra ba sekuruza
Nehemiah7:65 Umucamatēka arababuza ngo ntibarye ku vyera cane
Nehemiah7:66 Nukw iryo shengero ryose iyo riva rikagera
Nehemiah7:67 udashizemw’ abagurano n’abaguranokazi babo
Nehemiah7:68 Amafarasi yabo yār’ amajana ndwi na mirongwitatu n’atandatu; n’inyumbu zabo zār’ amajana abiri na mirongwine na zitanu;
Nehemiah7:69 n’ingamiya zabo zār’ amajana ane na mirongwitatu na zitanu
Nehemiah7:70 Bamwe mu bakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza batanze imfashanyo yo gufasha ico gikorwa
Nehemiah7:71 Bamwe mu bakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza bashira mu bubiko burimw’ ibikoreshwa
Nehemiah7:72 Ivyo abandi bantu batanze bishika kuri dariki z’izahabu ibihumbi mirongwibiri nyene
Nehemiah7:73 Nukw abaherezi n’Abalewi n’ abashibamyi n’abaririmvyi n’abantu bamwe
Nehemiah8:1 Maz’ abantu bose iyo bava bakagera bakoranira icarimwe ku kibuga kir’ imbere y’irembo ry’ amazi
Nehemiah8:2 Nuko Ezira umuherezi azana ico gitabo c’ivyagezwe
Nehemiah8:3 Ezira agisoma ahagaze yerekeye ico kibuga kir’ imbere y’irembo ry’amazi
Nehemiah8:4 Ezira
Nehemiah8:5 Nuko Ezira azingurura igitabo abantu bose babona
Nehemiah8:6 Ezira araheza ahimbaza Uhoraho Imana isumba vyose
Nehemiah8:7 Yosuwa na Bani na Sherebiya
Nehemiah8:8 babasomera mu gitabo c’ ivyagezwe vy’Imana mu buryo bgumvikana
Nehemiah8:9 Nehemiya icēgēra c’umwami
Nehemiah8:10 Maze Nehemiya arababgira
Nehemiah8:11 Abalewi na bo bahoza abantu bose
Nehemiah8:12 Nukw abantu bose baraheza baja kurya no kunywa no kugemuranira no kunezeranwa akanyamuneza kenshi
Nehemiah8:13 Ku musi ugira kabiri abakuru b’amyazu ya ba sekuruza bo mu bantu bose
Nehemiah8:14 Baraheza basanga ko mur’ ivyo vyagezwe Uhoraho yahaye Mose handitswe ko mu kwezi kw’indwi Abisirayeli bazokwama bagira imisi mikuru yo kurāra mu nsāgo
Nehemiah8:15 kandi ko bazotāngāza ayo majambo mu bisagara vyose no muri Yerusalemu
Nehemiah8:16 Nukw abantu bava hasi baragenda barondera amashami
Nehemiah8:17 Kand’ ikoraniro ryose ry’abāgarutse bavuye mu kinyago bīcīra insāgo bazirāramwo. Uhereye mu gihe ca Yosuwa mwene Nuni ukageza kur’ uwo musi Abisirayeli ntibaribgigere bagira nk’uko; nuko haba umunezero mwinshi cane.
Nehemiah8:18 Kandi Ezira abasomera igitabo c’ivyagezwe vy’Imana umusi n’ umusi
Nehemiah9:1 Maze ku musi ugira mirongwibiri na kane wo mur’ ukwo kwezi
Nehemiah9:2 Ab’ uruvyaro rwa Isirayeli bītandukanya n’abanyamahanga bose
Nehemiah9:3 Bahagarara aho bari
Nehemiah9:4 Maze Yosuwa na Bani na Kadimiyeli na Shebaniya na Buni na Sherebiya na Bani wundi na Kenani bahagarara ahataramutse hubakiwe Abalewi
Nehemiah9:5 Nukw abo Balewi
Nehemiah9:6 Ezira araheza aravuga
Nehemiah9:7 Uhoraho Mana
Nehemiah9:8 wabonye umutima wiwe kw ar’ uwo kwizigirwa imbere yawe
Nehemiah9:9 Wabonye ivyago vya ba sogokuruza bacu bari muri Egiputa
Nehemiah9:10 werekanye ibimenyetso n’ibitangaza kuri Farawo no ku basavyi biwe no ku bantu bose bo mu gihugu ciwe
Nehemiah9:11 Watandukanije ikiyaga mu maso yabo
Nehemiah9:12 Ubarōngōza inkingi y’igicu ku murango n’ inkingi y’umuriro mw ijoro
Nehemiah9:13 Uramanuka uhagarara ku musozi Sinayi
Nehemiah9:14 Wabamenyesheje isabato yawe yera
Nehemiah9:15 Ubaha umutsima uvuye mw ijuru wo kubamara inzara
Nehemiah9:16 Ariko ba sogokuruza bacu babaye intahetwa
Nehemiah9:17 banka kuyumvira
Nehemiah9:18 Mbere naho bicuriye igishushanyo c’ imasa kivugutiwe
Nehemiah9:19 ariko na ho nyene kubg’ imbabazi zawe nyinshi ntiwabataye mu bugaragwa; inkingi y’igicu ntiyabavuye imbere ku murango ibarōngōra mu nzira
Nehemiah9:20 Wabahaye Mpwemu wawe mwiza wo kubaha ubgenge
Nehemiah9:21 Wabatungiye mu bugaragwa kumara imyaka mirongwine
Nehemiah9:22 Wabagabiye ibihugu vy’abami ubaha n’amahanga
Nehemiah9:23 Wagwije abana babo bangana n’inyenyeri zo kw ijuru
Nehemiah9:24 Nukw abo bana babo baraza binjira ico gihugu baracegukira
Nehemiah9:25 Batsinda ibisagara bikomeye bifise inzitiro z’amabuye
Nehemiah9:26 Ariko ntibakwumviye
Nehemiah9:27 Ni co catumye ubagabura mu maboko y’abansi babo babashira mu vyago. Maze babonye bari mu vyago
Nehemiah9:28 Yamara ngo babone impore
Nehemiah9:29 Wama ubahanura kugira ngo basubire gukurikira ivyagezwe vyawe
Nehemiah9:30 Wamaze imyaka myinshi ubihanganira
Nehemiah9:31 Yamara naho bimeze birtyo
Nehemiah9:32 None
Nehemiah9:33 Ariko mur’ ivyo vyose vyatubayeko
Nehemiah9:34 Abami bacu n’abakuru bacu n’abaherezi bacu na ba sogokuruza bacu ntibitondeye ivyagezwe vyawe
Nehemiah9:35 Ariko mu kuganza kwabo
Nehemiah9:36 Rāba none twebge tur’ abaja! Rāba twagizwe abaja mu gihugu wahaye ba sogokuruza ngo bakibemwo
Nehemiah9:37 Ereg’ imyimbu myinshi abami waduhaye ngo batuganze kubg’ ivyaha vyacu
Nehemiah9:38 Nuko kubg’ ivyo dusezerana isezerano ry’intahava
Nehemiah10:1 Abāshizekw ikimenyetso n’ aba: icēgēra c’umwami
Nehemiah10:2 na Seraya na Azariya na Yeremiya
Nehemiah10:3 na Pashuri na Amariya na Malakiya
Nehemiah10:4 na Hatushi na Shebaniya na Maluki
Nehemiah10:5 na Harimu na Meremoti na Obadiya
Nehemiah10:6 na Daniyeli na Ginetoni ni na Baruki
Nehemiah10:7 na Meshulamu na Abiya na Miyamini
Nehemiah10:8 na Mahaziya na Biligayi na Shemaya; abo ni bo baherezi.
Nehemiah10:9 Abalewi n’aba: Yosuwa mwene Azaniya
Nehemiah10:10 na bagenzi babo Shebaniya na Hodiya na Kelita na Pelaya na Hanani
Nehemiah10:11 na Mika na Rehobu na Hashabiya
Nehemiah10:12 na Zakuri na Sherebiya na Shebaniya
Nehemiah10:13 na Hodiya na Bani na Beninu.
Nehemiah10:14 Abakuru‐bakuru bo mu bantu n’aba: Paroshi na Pahati‐Mowabu na Elamu na Zatu na Bani
Nehemiah10:15 na Buni na Azigadi na Bebayi
Nehemiah10:16 na Adoniya na Bigivayi na Adini
Nehemiah10:17 na Ateri na Hezekiya na Azuri
Nehemiah10:18 na Hodiya na Hashumu na Bezayi
Nehemiah10:19 na Harifu na Anatoti na Nebayi
Nehemiah10:20 na Magipiyashi na Meshulamu na Heziri
Nehemiah10:21 na Meshezabeli na Sadoki na Yaduwa
Nehemiah10:22 na Pelatiya na Hanani na Anaya
Nehemiah10:23 na Hosheya na Hananiya na Hashubu
Nehemiah10:24 na Haloheshi na Piliha na Shobeka
Nehemiah10:25 na Rehumu na Hashabuna na Mayaseya
Nehemiah10:26 na Ahiya na Hanani na Anani
Nehemiah10:27 na Maluki na Harimu na Bayana.
Nehemiah10:28 Kandi n’abandi bantu bose
Nehemiah10:29 abo bose bafatanya na bagenzi babo b’ abakuru
Nehemiah10:30 Bati Kand’ abakobga bacu ntituzobashingira abanyamahanga bo mur’ iki gihugu
Nehemiah10:31 Kand’ abanyamahanga bo mur’ iki gihugu ni bagira ivyo bashora kw isabato
Nehemiah10:32 Kandi dushinze gutanga uk’ umwaka utashe ikigiragatatu ca shekeli
Nehemiah10:33 kugira ngo haze hame haboneka imitsima y’ibiterekerwa
Nehemiah10:34 Kandi twebge abaherezi n’Abalewi n’ abantu dupfinze ubupfindo ngo tumenye ukw amashikanwa y’ inkwi azohora azanwa mu ngoro y’Imana yacu
Nehemiah10:35 Kand’ uk’ umwaka utashe tuzozana mu ngoro y’Uhoraho ivy’ imishuzo yo mu mirima yacu
Nehemiah10:36 kandi tuzozana abahungu bacu b’imfura n’ uburiza bg’ivyo dutunze
Nehemiah10:37 Tuzohora tuzana ifu yacu y’umushuzo isewe iheretuwe
Nehemiah10:38 Kand’ umuherezi wo mu ba Aroni azohora ajana n’Abalewi bagiye kwākīra ibigiracumi vyabo; Abalewi na bo bazokūramw’ ikigiracumi co mur’ ivyo bigiracumi nyene
Nehemiah10:39 Abisirayeli n’Abalewi bazokwama bazana amashikanwa azunguzwa y’ impeke n’aya vino n’ay’ amavuta
Nehemiah11:1 Abakuru b’abantu ni bo bāba i Yerusalemu; maz’ abandi bantu bose bapfinda ubupfindo kugira ng’ umuntu umwe‐umwe mur’ icumi na we az’ agerēre i Yerusalemu ku murwa wera
Nehemiah11:2 Maz’ abantu bahezagira abandi bose bitanze n’ imitima ikunze kuba i Yerusalemu.
Nehemiah11:3 Aba ni bo bāgaba intāra bāba i Yerusalemu; ariko mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda umuntu wese yaba kw itongo ryiwe mu gisagara c’i wabo
Nehemiah11:4 I Yerusalemu hāba bamwe bo mu Bayuda no mu Babenyamini. Mu Bayuda ni Ataya mwene Uziya
Nehemiah11:5 na Mayaseya mwene Baruki
Nehemiah11:6 Abākomotse kuri Peresi bāba i Yerusalemu
Nehemiah11:7 Ababenyamini n’aba: Salu mwene Meshulamu
Nehemiah11:8 hamwe na Gebayi na Salayi
Nehemiah11:9 Yoweli mwene Zikuri yar’ umukoresha wabo
Nehemiah11:10 Mu baherezi n’aba: Yedaya mwene Yoyaribu
Nehemiah11:11 na Seraya mwene Hilukiya
Nehemiah11:12 bo na bagenzi babo bakora ibikorwa vyo mur’ iyo ngoro
Nehemiah11:13 hamwe na bagenzi biwe
Nehemiah11:14 na bagenzi babo
Nehemiah11:15 Mu Balewi n’aba: Shemaya mwene Hasubu
Nehemiah11:16 na Shabetayi na Yozabadi
Nehemiah11:17 Hari na Mataniya mwene Mika
Nehemiah11:18 Abalewi bo ku murwa wera bose na bose bar’ amajana abiri na mirongumunani na bane.
Nehemiah11:19 Abashibamyi
Nehemiah11:20 Abasigaye bo mu Bisirayeli no mu baherezi no mu Balewi bāba mu bindi bisagara vyose vy’i Buyuda
Nehemiah11:21 Arikw abahawe ibango ry’ibikorwa vy’urusengero bāba i Ofeli
Nehemiah11:22 Kand’ umukoresha w’Abalewi i Yerusalemu
Nehemiah11:23 Kuko har’ icagezwe cashinzwe n’ umwami kw abaririmvyi bazohora bahabga ibibatunga ku musi n’ umusi.
Nehemiah11:24 Petahiya mwene Meshezabeli wo mu bandurutse kuri Zera mwene Yuda ni we yar’ umushikirwa w’amajambo y’abantu bose aza ku mwami.
Nehemiah11:25 Kandi ku vy’imihana n’amatongo yayo
Nehemiah11:26 n’i Yeshuwa n’i Molada n’i Beti‐peleti
Nehemiah11:27 n’i Hasari‐shuwali n’i Beri‐sheba no mu bisagara bihakūkira
Nehemiah11:28 bāba n’i Sikulagi
Nehemiah11:29 n’i Eni‐rimoni n’i Zora n’i Yarimuti
Nehemiah11:30 n’i Zanowa n’i Adulamu no mu bisagara bigenda bihakūkira
Nehemiah11:31 Ababenyamini bāba i Geba n’i Mikimashi n’i Aya
Nehemiah11:32 no muri Anatoti n’i Nobu n’i Ananiya
Nehemiah11:33 n’i Hasori n’i Rama n’i Gitayimu
Nehemiah11:34 n’i Hadidi n’i Seboyimu n’i Nebalati
Nehemiah11:35 n’i Lodi n’i Ono ari co kiyaya c’ abanyamyuga.
Nehemiah11:36 Mu Balewi
Nehemiah12:1 Aba ni bo baherezi n’Abalewi bādūganye na Zerubabeli mwene Sheyalitiyeli na Yosuwa; ni Seraya na Yeremiya na Ezira
Nehemiah12:2 na Amariya na Maluki na Hatushi
Nehemiah12:3 na Shekaniya na Rehumu na Meremoti
Nehemiah12:4 na Ido na Ginetoyi na Abiya
Nehemiah12:5 na Miyamini na Mahadiya na Biliga
Nehemiah12:6 na Shemaya na Yoyaribu na Yedaya
Nehemiah12:7 na Salu na Amoki na Hilukiya na Yedaya wundi. Abo ni bo bār’ abakuru b’abaherezi na bagenzi babo mu gihe ca Yosuwa.
Nehemiah12:8 Kand’ Abalewi ni Yosuwa na Binuwi na Kadimiyeli na Sherebiya na Yuda na Mataniya; Mataniya uwo
Nehemiah12:9 kandi bagenzi babo Bakibukiya na Uno bākūranwa na bo
Nehemiah12:10 Yosuwa yavyaye Yoyakimu
Nehemiah12:11 Yoyada avyara Yonatani
Nehemiah12:12 Abaherezi bo mu gihe ca Yoyakimu b’abakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza n’aba: mu ba Seraya ni Meraya; mu ba Yeremiya ni Hananiya;
Nehemiah12:13 mu ba Ezira ni Meshulamu; mu ba Amariya ni Yehohanani;
Nehemiah12:14 mu ba Maluki ni Yonatani; mu ba Shebaniya ni Yosefu;
Nehemiah12:15 mu ba Harimu ni Adina; mu ba Merayoti ni Helikayi;
Nehemiah12:16 mu ba Ido ni Zekariya; mu ba Ginetoni ni Meshulamu;
Nehemiah12:17 mu ba Abiya ni Zikuri; mu ba Minyamini no mu ba Mohadiya ni Pilitayi;
Nehemiah12:18 mu ba Biliga ni Shamuwa; mu ba Shemaya ni Yehonatani;
Nehemiah12:19 mu ba Yoyaribu ni Matenayi; mu ba Yedaya ni Uzi;
Nehemiah12:20 mu ba Salayi ni Kalayi; mu ba Amoki ni Eberi;
Nehemiah12:21 mu ba Hilukiya ni Hashabiya; mu ba Yedaya ni Netaneli.
Nehemiah12:22 Mu Balewi
Nehemiah12:23 Abandurutse kuri Lewi bo mu bakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza bari banditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma
Nehemiah12:24 Kand’ abakuru b’ Abalewi ni Hashabiya na Sherebiya na Yosuwa mwene Kadimiyeli na bagenzi babo
Nehemiah12:25 Mataniya na Bakibukiya na Obadiya na Meshulamu na Talimoni na Akubu bar’ abashibamyi barinda amazu y’ububīko yo ku marembo.
Nehemiah12:26 Abo ni bo bāriho mu gihe ca Yoyakimu mwene Yosuwa
Nehemiah12:27 Igihe bāshikiriza Imana uruzitiro rw’i Yerusalemu
Nehemiah12:28 Nukw abaririmvyi barakorana bava mu biyaya bikikije i Yerusalemu no mu mihana y’ Abanetofati
Nehemiah12:29 n’i Beti‐gilugali no mu misozi y’i Geba n’i Azimaveti
Nehemiah12:30 Nukw abaherezi n’Abalewi bariyeza
Nehemiah12:31 Maze nuriza abakuru b’Abayuda ngo baje hejuru ku ruzitiro
Nehemiah12:32 Bakurikirwa na Hoshaya n’ igice kimwe c’abakuru b’Abayuda
Nehemiah12:33 na Azariya na Ezira na Meshulamu
Nehemiah12:34 na Yuda na Benyamini na Shemaya na Yeremiya
Nehemiah12:35 n’abahungu b’abaherezi bamwe bafise inzumbete: Zekariya mwene Yonatani
Nehemiah12:36 na bagenzi biwe Shemaya na Azareli na Milalayi na Gilalayi na Mahayi na Netaneli na Yuda na Hanani
Nehemiah12:37 baca kw irembo rija kw iriba batumbera imbere yabo
Nehemiah12:38 Uwundi muce w’abagenda bahimbaza ugenda kubasanganira
Nehemiah12:39 Maze baca haruguru y’irembo ry’Abefurayimu no kw irembo rya kera
Nehemiah12:40 Maz’ iyo mice yompi y’abagenda bahimbaza ija guhagarara mu ngoro y’Imana
Nehemiah12:41 bo n’abaherezi Eliyakimu na Mayaseya na Minyamini na Mikaya na Eliyowenayi na Zekariya na Hananiya bafise inzumbete;
Nehemiah12:42 na Mayaseya na Shemaya na Eleyazari na Uzi na Yehohanani na Malakiya na Elamu na Ezeri. Maz’ abaririmvyi baririmba ijwi rirenga
Nehemiah12:43 Uwo musi batanga ibimazi vyinshi
Nehemiah12:44 Kur’ uyo musi batoranya abantu bo kuzezwa ivyumba vy’ ububīko vyo kubīkamw’ amashikanwa azunguzwa
Nehemiah12:45 bagatako bakagenda bahāna imbu mu gukorera Imana yabo no mu kwiyeza. Kand’ abaririmvyi n’abashibamyi ni ko bāgenza
Nehemiah12:46 Kuko kera mu gihe ca Dawidi na Asafu hārih’ abarōngōzi b’abaririmvyi
Nehemiah12:47 Kandi mu gihe ca Zerubabeli na Nehemiya Abisirayeli bātanga imituri y’abaririmvyi n’iy’ abashibamyi
Nehemiah13:1 Kur’ uwo musi abantu basomerwa igitabo ca Mose
Nehemiah13:2 kuko batāsanganije Abisirayeli umutsima n’amazi
Nehemiah13:3 Nukw Abisirayeli bamaze kwumva ivyo vyagezwe
Nehemiah13:4 Arikw ivyo bitarabaho
Nehemiah13:5 yateguriye Tobiya nyene icumba kinini
Nehemiah13:6 Ariko mur’ ico gihe cose sinar’ i Yerusalemu
Nehemiah13:7 Maze nshitse i Yerusalemu mbona ikibi Eliyashibu yakoze
Nehemiah13:8 Birambabaza cane
Nehemiah13:9 ngera ko bahumanura ico cumba; bamaze kugihumanura nsubizamw’ ibintu vy’imbombovu vy’ingoro y’Imana
Nehemiah13:10 Hanyuma nsanga yukw Abalewi batakironka imituri bāgerewe
Nehemiah13:11 Maze nca ntātira abakuru
Nehemiah13:12 Maz’ Abayuda bose baca bazana ibigiracumi vy’impeke n’ivya vino n’ivy’ amavuta ya elayo
Nehemiah13:13 Nshirah’ abazezwabintu vyo mu bubīko
Nehemiah13:14 Ndaheza ndasenga
Nehemiah13:15 Mur’ iyo misi mbona bamwe bo mu Bayuda bagana vino kw isabato
Nehemiah13:16 Hāri n’abantu bavuye i Tiro baba i Yerusalemu
Nehemiah13:17 Ndaheza ntātira abakuru bo mu Bayuda
Nehemiah13:18 Mbega ntimubona kw Imana yacu yaturekuriyekw ivyago
Nehemiah13:19 Isabato itaratangura
Nehemiah13:20 Maz’ abadandaza n’abagura ibintu vy’ uburyo bgose barāra inyuma y’i Yerusalemu rimwe canke kabiri.
Nehemiah13:21 Maze ndabahambarira
Nehemiah13:22 Ndaheza mbgira Abalewi ngo biyeze
Nehemiah13:23 Nuko mur’ ico gihe mbona Abayuda bābiriye abagore bo mu Banyashidodi no mu Bamoni no mu Banyamowabu
Nehemiah13:24 kandi ko benshi bo mu bana babo bavuga ikinyashidodi cank’ urundi rurimi rw’ayandi mahanga gusa
Nehemiah13:25 Maze ndabahambarira ndabavuma
Nehemiah13:26 Mbega Salomo umwami w’ Abisirayeli
Nehemiah13:27 Mbega namwe tubemerere gukora icaha kingana girtyo ngo mwābīre abagore b’abanyamahangakazi
Nehemiah13:28 Kand’ umwe wo mu bahungu ba Yoyada mwene Eliyashibu
Nehemiah13:29 Ndaheza ndasaba
Nehemiah13:30 Uko ni ko nabahumanuye
Nehemiah13:31 kandi natunganije n’ivyo kuzana amashikanwa y’inkwi mu bihe vyashinzwe
Esther1:1 Ku ngoma ya Ahasuwerusi
Esther1:2 ico gihe umwami Ahasuwerusi yar’ ahangamye ku ngoma yiwe ku murwa i Shushani;
Esther1:3 mu mwaka ugira gatatu ari ku ngoma atumirira amazimano abaganwa biwe bose n’abamenyekana biwe; abahambaye b’i Buperesi n’i Bumedi
Esther1:4 Amara imisi myinshi yerekana ubutunzi bg’ ubgami bgiwe bg’icubahiro
Esther1:5 Nukw iyo misi ishize
Esther1:6 Hāri hakinze impuzu zera n’izisa n’akatsi gatoto n’iz’ amasufe
Esther1:7 Babahēra ivyo kunywa mu mabakure y’izahabu — kand’ ayo mabakure amwe yasa ukwayo ayandi ukwayo — babaha ku biturire vy’i bgami
Esther1:8 Kandi mur’ ukwo kunywa vyashinzwe ngo ntihagire ūgōbērwa; kuk’ umwami yari yageze abasuku biwe ng’ umuntu wese agire ukw agomba.
Esther1:9 Kandi n’umwamikazi Vashiti atumirira abagore amazimano mu ngoro y’umwami Ahasuwerusi nyene.
Esther1:10 Nuko ku musi ugira indwi umutima w’umwami umaze gukankamurwa na vino
Esther1:11 ababgira kuzana umwamikazi Vashiti imbere yiwe yambaye igitsibo c’ubgami
Esther1:12 Arik’ umwamikazi Vashiti yanka kuza ngo yemere ijambo ry’umwami ryatumwe izo nkone: bituma umwami ashangashirwa rwose
Esther1:13 Maz’ umwami aca abaza abanyabgenge bazi uko vyahora bigenda mu bihe vyashize; (kuk’ ukw ari k’umwami yahora agenza ku bazi ivyagezwe n’imanza bose).
Esther1:14 Kand’ abār’ akadasohoka ku mwami bāri Karishena na Shetari na Adimata na Tarishishi na Meresi na Marisena na Memukani
Esther1:15 Arababaza
Esther1:16 Maze Memukani arishura
Esther1:17 kukw ivyo umwamikazi yakoze ivyo bizokwamamara mu bagore bose
Esther1:18 Mber’ uyu musi abagore bacu b’i Buperesi n’i Bumedi ni bumva ivyo umwamikazi yakoze
Esther1:19 Umwami avyemeye
Esther1:20 Maz’ iteka umwami aribuce ni ryamara kwamamara mu bihugu vyiwe vyose iyo biva bikagera
Esther1:21 Iyo nama umwami n’abaganwa barayishima; umwami abigenza nk’ukw inama ya Memukani yar’ iri.
Esther1:22 Nukw arungika ivyete mu bihugu vyose vy’umwami
Esther2:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo
Esther2:2 Maz’ abāsukurira umwami baramubgira
Esther2:3 kandi n’ ushireh’ abantu mu bihugu vyawe vyose
Esther2:4 Maz’ umwigeme uzoshima az’ abe umwamikazi mu gishingo ca Vashiti. Nuk’ umwami ashima iyo nama
Esther2:5 Ku murwa i Shushani hār’ Umuyuda yitwa Moridekayi mwene Yayiri
Esther2:6 Yari yakūwe i Yerusalemu ar’ inyagano
Esther2:7 Moridekayi yari yareze Hadasa
Esther2:8 Nukw ibgirizwa ry’umwami n’ icagezwe ciwe bimaze kwamamara
Esther2:9 Ashima uwo mwigeme
Esther2:10 Kandi Esiteri nta ho yigeze aserura ubgoko bgabo ubg’ ari bgo
Esther2:11 Kandi Moridekayi yahora agendagenda uko bukeye inyuma y’urugo rw’inzu y’abigeme
Esther2:12 Nuk’ umwigeme wese yashikwako n’urubu rwiwe rwo kujanwa ku mwami Ahasuwerusi
Esther2:13 Uko ni k’umwigeme wese yabona kuja ku mwami; kand’ iy’ agira aje mu ngoro y’umwami
Esther2:14 Yagenda ku kagoroba
Esther2:15 Nukw igihe ca Esiteri kirashika co kujanwa ku mwami. (Esiteri uwo yari mwene Abihayili
Esther2:16 Nuko mu kwezi kw’icumi
Esther2:17 Nuk’ umwami agomwa Esiteri
Esther2:18 Maz’ umwami atumirira abaganwa biwe bose n’abamenyekana biwe amazimano akomeye; kand’ ayo mazimano yari kubga Esiteri; ibihugu abiharira ikori
Esther2:19 Nuko bongeye gukoranya inkumi ubugira kabiri
Esther2:20 Kandi Esiteri ntiyaribgaserure umuryango wabo cank’ ubgoko bgabo ubg’ ari bgo
Esther2:21 Mur’ iyo misi
Esther2:22 Iyo nama imenywa na Moridekayi; abibarira umwamikazi Esiteri; Esiteri na we abibarira umwami atumwe na Moridekayi.
Esther2:23 Ivyo babisuzumye
Esther3:1 Maze hanyuma y’ivyo umwami Ahasuwerusi akuza Hamani mwene Hamedata
Esther3:2 Maz’ abagendanyi b’ umwami bose bāri ku kirimba i bgami bunamira Hamani
Esther3:3 Maz’ abagendanyi b’ umwami bāri ku kirimba i bgami
Esther3:4 Nuko bashishikara kubimubarira uko bukeye
Esther3:5 Nuko Hamani abonye yuko Moridekayi atamwunamiye canke ngw amwikubite imbere
Esther3:6 Arikw abona yuko gufata Moridekayi wenyene ata kimazi
Esther3:7 Maze mu mwaka ugira icumi na kabiri umwami Ahasuwerusi ari ku ngoma
Esther3:8 Nuko Hamani abarira umwami Ahasuwerusi
Esther3:9 Nuko mwami
Esther3:10 Nuk’ umwami aca yambura impeta ku rutoke
Esther3:11 Umwami abarira Hamani
Esther3:12 Bukeye ku musi w’icumi na gatatu w’ukwezi kwa mbere
Esther3:13 Nuko barungika ivyo vyete babiha intumwa zibijana mu bihugu vy’umwami vyose
Esther3:14 Amakopi y’ico cete bayakwiza mu mahanga yose
Esther3:15 Nukw izo ntumwa zigenda zihuta
Esther4:1 Nuko Moridekayi amenye ibibaye vyose ivy’ ari vyo
Esther4:2 Arinda ashika n’ inyuma y’ikirimba c’i bgami: kukw ata wemererwa guca mu kirimba c’i bgami yambaye igunira.
Esther4:3 Kandi mu gihugu cose
Esther4:4 Maz’ incoreke za Esiteri n’ inkone ziwe baraza barabimubarira; umwamikazi arababara cane: arungikira Moridekayi imyambaro yo kumwambika
Esther4:5 Nuko Esiteri ahamagaza Hataki
Esther4:6 Nuko Hataki arasohoka agenda kuri Moridekayi
Esther4:7 Moridekayi amudōndera vyose ivyamubayeko
Esther4:8 Amuha n’ ikopi y’ivyanditswe vy’iryo teka ryamamajwe i Shushani ryo kubageseza
Esther4:9 Nuko Hataki aragaruka
Esther4:10 Maze Esiteri avugana na Hataki amurungikana amajambo kuri Moridekayi
Esther4:11 at’ Ereg’ abamenyekana b’umwami bose
Esther4:12 Nuko babgira Moridekayi amajambo ya Esiteri.
Esther4:13 Maze Moridekayi na we arabatuma yishura Esiteri
Esther4:14 Kuko ni wapfa kwiyumya mur’ iki gihe
Esther4:15 Maze Esiteri arabatuma yishura Moridekayi
Esther4:16 ati Genda ukoranirize hamwe Abayuda bose bar’ i Shushani
Esther4:17 Nuko Moridekayi aragenda

Esther5:10 Yamara Hamani ariyumanganya

Esther5:12 Hamani arongera arababgira
Esther5:13 Arikw ivyo vyose nta co bimmariye
Esther5:14 Nuk’ umugore wiwe Zereshi n’abagenzi biwe bose bamugīra inama
Esther6:1 Iryo joro nyene umwami abura itiro; aca avuga ko bazana igitabo kidonda ibigenda biba ku ngoma yiwe
Esther6:2 Basanga canditswemwo yuko Moridekayi ari we yareze Bigitana na Tereshi
Esther6:3 Nuk’ umwami arabaza
Esther6:4 Umwami arabaza
Esther6:5 Abo basuku b’ umwami baramubgira
Esther6:6 Nuko Hamani arinjira. Umwami aramubaza
Esther6:7 Maze Hamani abarira umwami
Esther6:8 bozana imyambaro y’ubgami iyo umwami ahora yambara
Esther6:9 Maz’ iyo myambaro n’iyo farasi bobiha umwe mu baganwa b’umwami asumvya abandi icubahiro
Esther6:10 Nuk’ umwami abgira Hamani
Esther6:11 Nuko Hamani yābīra ya myambaro na ya farasi
Esther6:12 Hanyuma Moridekayi asubira ku kirimba i bgami; ariko Hamani arihuta asubira i we
Esther6:13 Maze yigānira Zereshi umugore wiwe n’abagenzi biwe bose
Esther6:14 Bakivugana na we
Esther7:1 Nuk’ umwami na Hamani baza gusangira n’umwamikazi Esiteri.

Esther7:3 Maz’ umwamikazi Esiteri aramwishura

Esther7:9 Maze Haribona

Esther8:1 Kur’ uwo musi nyene umwami Ahasuwerusi agabira umwamikazi Esiteri urugo rwa Hamani umwansi w’Abayuda. Maze Moridekayi aseruka imbere y’umwami; kuko Esiteri yari yavuze ico bapfana.
Esther8:2 Umwami aca yiyambura impeta
Esther8:3 Hanyuma Esiteri yongera kuvugira imbere y’umwami
Esther8:4 Maz’ umwami atunga Esiteri ya nkoni y’izahabu. Nuko Esiteri ava hasi
Esther8:5 aravuga
Esther8:6 Mbega noshobora nte kwihanganira kurāba ivyago bizoba ku bgoko bgacu? Canke noshobora nte kwihanganira kurorēra umuryango wacu urik’ uragesezwa?
Esther8:7 Nuk’ umwami Ahasuwerusi yishura umwamikazi Esiteri na Moridekayi Umuyuda
Esther8:8 Nuko namwe ni mwandikire Abayuda
Esther8:9 Nukw ico gihe abakarani b’ umwami barahamagarwa
Esther8:10 Nuko Moridekayi avyandika mw izina ry’umwami Ahasuwerusi
Esther8:11 Mur’ ivyo vyete umwami yemerera Abayuda bari mu bisagara vyose kwirema inteko ngo bīrwanire
Esther8:12 kand’ ivyo bize bikorwe ku musi umwe mu bihugu vyose vy’ umwami Ahasuwerusi
Esther8:13 Amakopi y’ico cete bayakwiza mu mahanga yose
Esther8:14 Nukw izo ntumwa ziri kuri ya mafarasi atebuka

Esther9:1 Nuko mu kwezi kw’icumi na kabiri kwitwa Adari
Esther9:2 Nukw Abayuda bakoranira mu bisagara vyabo mu bihugu vyose umwami Ahasuwerusi aganza
Esther9:3 Nukw abaganwa bose bo mu bihugu
Esther9:4 Moridekayi uwo yar’ agahambaye mu rugo rw’umwami
Esther9:5 Nukw Abayuda bicisha inkota abansi babo bose
Esther9:6 Ku murwa i Shushani nyene Abayuda bahica abagabo amajana atanu
Esther9:7 Bica na Parishanidata na Dalifoni na Asipata
Esther9:8 na Porata na Adaliya na Aridata
Esther9:9 na Parimashita na Arisayi na Aridayi na Vayizata
Esther9:10 abo bose ukw ar’ icumi bishe
Esther9:11 Kur’ uwo musi bamenyesha umwami igitigiri c’abiciwe ku murwa i Shushani.
Esther9:12 Nuk’ umwami abgira umwamikazi Esiteri
Esther9:13 Esiteri aramwishura
Esther9:14 Nuk’ umwami agera ko biba birtyo; iteka ryamamara i Shushani; bamanika na ya mivyimba ya bene Hamani ukw ar’ icumi.
Esther9:15 Nukw Abayuda bār’ i Shushani bongera kwirema inteko no ku musi w’icumi na kane w’ ukwo kwezi kwitwa Adari
Esther9:16 Kand’ abandi Bayuda bāri mu bihugu umwami aganza birema inteko
Esther9:17 Uko ni ko vyabaye ku musi w’icumi na gatatu w’ukwezi kwitwa Adari; ku musi w’icumi na kane wakwo bararuhuka
Esther9:18 Arikw Abayuda bar’ i Shushani birema inteko ku musi wakwo w’icumi na gatatu
Esther9:19 Ni co gituma uwo musi w’icumi na kane w’ukwezi kwitwa Adari
Esther9:20 Maze Moridekayi yandika ivyabaye
Esther9:21 ashinga ng’ umusi w’icumi na kane n’ uw’ icumi na gatanu w’ukwezi kwitwa Adari
Esther9:22 kuba icibutso c’imisi Abayuda bāruhukiyekw abansi babo
Esther9:23 Nukw Abayuda bemera kwama babigenza nk’uko babitanguye
Esther9:24 kuko Hamani umwansi w’Abayuda bose
Esther9:25 ariko bishitse ku mwami
Esther9:26 Ni co gituma iyo misi bayita Purimu
Esther9:27 bituma Abayuda barundura ivy’ iyo misi yompi ko bazoyigira mikuru
Esther9:28 kandi barundura yukw iyo misi ikwiye kwama yibukwa no kugirwa mikuru ukw ibihe vy’urunganwe rwabo bizogenda bikurikirana
Esther9:29 Nuk’ umwamikazi Esiteri mwene Abihayili
Esther9:30 Nukw Abayuda bose bo mu bihugu ijana na mirongwibiri n’indwi
Esther9:31 yo gushinga ivy’ iyo misi ya Purimu mu bihe vyayo vyashinzwe
Esther9:32 Nukw icagezwe ca Esiteri gishinga ivyo vya Purimu; maze vyandikwa mu gitabo.

Esther10:2 Kand’ ibikorwa vyose yakoresheje ububasha bgiwe n’ubushobozi bgiwe
Esther10:3 Kuk’ uwo Muyuda Moridekayi
Job1:1 Mu gihugu c’i Uzi hār’ umuntu yitwa Yobu; kand’ uwo muntu yar’ umuntu atunganye w’umugororotsi
Job1:2 Yar’ afise abahungu ndwi n’abakobga batatu.
Job1:3 Itunga ryiwe ryar’ intama ibihumbi ndwi
Job1:4 Kand’ abahungu biwe bāhora barondera amazimano mu nzu y’ umuntu wese muri bo ku musi ashinze
Job1:5 Nuk’ ukw imisi y’amazimano yabo yahera

Job1:12 Uhoraho yishura Satani

Job3:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo Yobu yanzika kuvuga
Job3:2 Nuko Yobu aravuga
Job3:3 at’ Umusi navukiyeko urakazimangana
Job3:4 Uwo musi uragacura umwiza; Imana yoye kuwitegereza ir’ iyo hejuru
Job3:5 Umwiza n’igitūtu c’urupfu biwugire uwavyo
Job3:6 Iryo joro
Job3:7 Mber’ iryo joro rirakaba ingumba; Ntirikabonekemwo ijwi ry’ umunezero.
Job3:8 Abazi kuvuma imisi ni barivume
Job3:9 Inyenyeri zo mu gahuru karyo ziragacura umwiza: Ryitege umuco
Job3:10 Kuko ritūgaye inda ya mama
Job3:11 N’iki catumye ntāpfuye nkiri mu nda? N’iki catumye impwemu zanje zitāheze nkiyivamwo?
Job3:12 N’iki catumye ibibero binkikira
Job3:13 Iyaba ari ko vyagenze
Job3:14 Mba ndi kumwe n’abami n’ abajanama bo mw isi
Job3:15 Canke mba ndi kumwe n’ abaganwa bāri bafise izahabu
Job3:16 Iyo mba narabaye nk’inda ikorotse igahishwa
Job3:17 Iyo ni ho abanyakibi barekera kugorana; Iyo ni ho abārushe baruhukira.
Job3:18 Iyo ni ho imbohe zībēra amahoro zose hamwe; Ntiziba zicumva ijwi ry’ūbakoresha abahindagiza.
Job3:19 Uworoshe n’ūhambaye ni ho bari; Umushumba ahafitiye umwidegemvyo kuri shebuja.
Job3:20 N’iki gituma umunyamubabaro ahabga kubona umuco
Job3:21 Bifuza urupfu
Job3:22 Iyo barushe bakabona imva Birabahimbara cane
Job3:23 Mbeg’ umuntu ayobewe inzira
Job3:24 Kuko kuniha kwanje kumbereye ivyo kurya
Job3:25 Kukw ico natinya ari co canshitseko
Job3:26 Simmerewe neza
Job4:1 Maze Elifazi w’i Temani aramubarira
Job4:2 ati Mbeg’ uwogerageza kugira ico akubarira
Job4:3 Rāba ingene wahora wigisha benshi
Job4:4 Amajambo yawe yaramira uwarikw aratemba
Job4:5 Ariko none ni wewe bishitseko
Job4:6 Mbeg’ ivyizigiro vyawe s’uko wubaha Imana? Kand’ inzira zawe zigororotse si zo wishimira?
Job4:7 Ibuka ndakwinginze
Job4:8 Nk’uko ngenda mbibona
Job4:9 Bagesezwa n’impwemu z’ Imana
Job4:10 Kwivuga kw’intambge
Job4:11 Intambge nah’ ikomeye yicwa no kubura ico ifata
Job4:12 Nuko
Job4:13 Nciyumvira ivyiyumviro bivuye mw iravūta ryo mw ijoro
Job4:14 Mfatwa n’ubgoba n’agatengo
Job4:15 Maz’ impwemu zihita imbere yanje
Job4:16 Haca haboneka ikintu gihagaze
Job4:17 Ngo Mbeg’ umuntu buntu yorusha Imana kugororoka? Mbeg’ umuntu yorusha Umuremyi wiwe gutungana?
Job4:18 Rāba kw itizigira abasavyi bayo
Job4:19 None ntivyorushiriza ku baba mu nzu z’ibumba
Job4:20 Hagati y’igihe c’igitondo n’ umugoroba baravunagurwa: Bapfa akagīrīre
Job4:21 Mbeg’ umugozi w’ihema ryabo ntiwabakūwemwo? Bapfa
Job5:1 Enda takamba: mbega har’ ūzokwishura? Ni nde wo mu bera wotabaza?
Job5:2 Ereg’ igipfu ni co cicwa n’ umwikomo
Job5:3 Ubganje nabonye igipfu kiriko kirashōra imizi
Job5:4 Abana biwe bari kure y’ ubuhungiro; Bahonyorerwa mw irembo
Job5:5 Ivyimburwa vyabo bimarwa n’abashonje
Job5:6 Kukw amarushwa atava mu mukungugu
Job5:7 Arik’ umuntu avukira amagorwa
Job5:8 Arikw iyaba jewe
Job5:9 Ni yo ikora ibihambaye bidaserangurwa
Job5:10 Ni yo irekurira imvura kw isi
Job5:11 Ni yo ishira hejuru abaciye bugufi
Job5:12 Yica imigabo y’ingunge
Job5:13 Itegesha abanyabgenge ubugunge bgabo ubgabo
Job5:14 Bahūra n’umwiza ari ku murango
Job5:15 Arikw ikiza umugorwa inkota yo mu kanwa kabo
Job5:16 Uko ni k’umworo agira ivyizigiro
Job5:17 Hahirwa umuntu Imana ihana: Nuko rero ntukagaye igikangiro c’Ūshobora vyose.
Job5:18 Kukw ari yo ikomeretsa
Job5:19 Izokurokora mu vyago bitandatu
Job5:20 Muri kigoyi izogukiza urupfu
Job5:21 Uzohishwa intega y’ururimi; Kandi ntuzotinya ubugesera buje.
Job5:22 Ubugesera n’amapfa uzobitwenga; Kandi ntuzotinya ibikōko vyo mw isi.
Job5:23 Kuk’ uzosezerana isezerano n’ amabuye yo mu gasozi; Kand’ ibikōko vyo mu gasozi bizokwuzura nawe.
Job5:24 Kand’ uzomenya yukw ihema ryawe rir’ amahoro: Uzogendura urugo rw’imikuku yawe
Job5:25 Kand’ uzomenya yuk’ uruvyaro rwawe ruzogwira
Job5:26 Uzoja mu mva wīsāziye neza
Job5:27 Rāba
Job6:1 Maze Yobu arishura
Job6:2 at’ Iyaba umwikomo wanje wāgerwa
Job6:3 Kuko vyari kuremēra kurusha umusenyi wo ku kiyaga: Ni co catumye nihutira kuvuga.
Job6:4 Ereg’ imyampi y’Ūshobora vyose yantobekeranije
Job6:5 Mbeg’ indogoba y’inyeshamba yokwivuga iri n’ubgatsi? Cank’ inka yokwābira iri n’ ico irisha?
Job6:6 Mbeg’ ikitaryoshe coribga kitarimw’ umunyu? Canke se
Job6:7 Umutima wanje wanse kubikorako; Bimmereye nk’ivyo kurya biteye iseseme.

Job6:9 Imana nyene ikemera kumfyonyora
Job6:10 Aho ho ni ho noba ndonse ikinduhura
Job6:11 Mbeg’ inkomezi zanje n’inki ndorereye? Kand’ iherezo ryanje n’iriki nihanganira?

Job6:14 Ūdendebukiwe bikwiye kw atera akagongwe abakunzi biwe

Job6:19 Igugu ry’ab’ i Tema ryari ribīteze
Job6:20 Bamāramāzwa n’uko bāri bavyizigiye
Job6:21 Noneho rero nta co mumaze; Mubonye ibiteye ubgoba

Job6:23 Canke nti Ni mundokore munkūre mu maboko y’umwansi? Canke nti Ni muncungure munkūre mu maboko y’ abampahaza?
Job6:24 Ni munyigishe

Job6:27 Erega mwonapfindira impfuvyi
Job6:28 Enda kunda munyitegereze: N’ukuri sinobesha mu maso yanyu.
Job6:29 Ni mwirimbure

Job7:3 Ni ko nahawe umugabane w’ amezi y’umwunamo

Job17:3 Enda se tanga ingwati

Job17:11 Imisi yanje iraheze
Job17:12 Ijoro baryita umurango
Job17:13 Ko nziga i kuzimu kw ari ho i wanje
Job17:14 Nkaba mbariye rwa rwobo
Job17:15 Non’ ivyizigiro vyanje biri hehe? Kand’ ivyo vyizigiro vyanje ni nde azoruha abibona?
Job17:16 Bizomanuka bishike ku bihindizo vy’i kuzimu
Job18:1 Maze Biludadi w’i Shuhi arishura
Job18:2 ati Muzogeza ryari kurondera amajambo? Ni mwiyumvire
Job18:3 N’iki gituma tugereranywa n’ibikōko
Job18:4 Wewe witabagurana uburake bgawe
Job18:5 N’ukuri urumuri rw’umunyakibi ruzozima
Job18:6 Umuco uzocura umwiza mu nzu yiwe
Job18:7 Intambuko ziwe z’inkomezi zizopfunywa
Job18:8 Ereg’ ivyiwe birenge ni vyo bimutsinda mu ruriba
Job18:9 Ikigāmo kizomufata igitsintsiri
Job18:10 Impururu yo kumufata ihishijwe mw ivu
Job18:11 Azoterwa ubgoba n’ibimukanga irya n’ino
Job18:12 Inkomezi ziwe zizomarwa n’ inzara
Job18:13 Ingingo z’umubiri wiwe zizotsontsomerwa
Job18:14 Azorandurwa mu rugo rwiwe yishimira
Job18:15 Abatar’ abiwe bazokwinjira urugo rwiwe; Amazuku azosukwa ahantu yahora aba.
Job18:16 Imizi yiwe izokwumira hasi
Job18:17 Kwibukwa kwiwe kuzozimangana mw isi

Job18:20 Abazoza inyuma yiwe bazotangarira umusi wiwe
Job18:21 N’ukuri aho ni ho i wabo w’ūgabitanya
Job19:1 Maze Yobu arishura
Job19:2 ati Muzogeza hehe kubabaza umutima wanje
Job19:3 Ubu n’ubugira icumi munshinyagurira; Nta n’agasoni mugira ko kungirira nabi.
Job19:4 Namba naracumuye koko
Job19:5 Namba mugomba kunyiratako
Job19:6 Mumenye yukw ar’ Imana yubitse urubanza rwanje
Job19:7 Rāba
Job19:8 Inzira yanje yarayishibije ngo sinshobore kuhaca; Kandi yakwiragije umwiza mu nzira zanje.
Job19:9 Yanyaze icubahiro canje
Job19:10 Yansanganguye impande zose
Job19:11 Yandometseko n’uburake bgayo
Job19:12 Ingabo zayo zaziye icarimwe
Job19:13 Yantandukanije n’abo tuvukana
Job19:14 Ab’i wacu bantaye
Job19:15 Ababa mu rugo rwanje
Job19:16 Mpamagara umushumba wanje
Job19:17 Umugore wanje azinutswe ubgaku bganje
Job19:18 Mbere n’abana bato barankēngēra; Iyo mvuye hasi bamvuga nabi.
Job19:19 Abajanama banje baranzinutswe bose
Job19:20 Amagufa yanje amatanye n’ urukoba n’inyama: Nshigaje gatoya ngapfa.
Job19:21 Mungirire akagongwe
Job19:22 N’iki kibatera kundendereza nk’ukw Imana ingize? Uk’umubiri wanje wabaye ntikubahāgije?
Job19:23 Icompa amajambo yanje akaba yanditswe! Icompa akaba yanditswe mu gitabo!
Job19:24 Icompa akaba akorogoshowe mu gitandara N’ikaramu y’icuma
Job19:25 Ariko jewe ubganje nzi yuk’ Umucunguzi wanje ariho
Job19:26 Kand’ urukoba rwanje ni rwamara kubora
Job19:27 Nzoyībonera ubganje
Job19:28 Ko muvuga muti Ngo tumutemvye: Mut’ Inyanduruko y’ivyiwe imubonetseko!
Job19:29 Ni mutinye inkota: Kuk’ uburake bgihamagarira inkota

Job20:3 Numvise ibikangisho binteye isoni

Job20:5 Ukwihaya kw’abanyakibi kumara igihe gito
Job20:6 Nah’ ubgibone bgiwe bgoshika kw ijuru

Job21:1 Maze Yobu arishura
Job21:2 ati Ni mwitwaririke kwumva ivyo mvuga; Uko ni ko mwommara umubabaro.

Job21:4 Mbeg’ abantu ni bo nganyira? Icotuma nihangana n’iki?
Job21:5 Ni munyitegereze mwumirwe
Job21:6 Iyo mvyibutse ngira ubgoba
Job21:7 N’iki gituma abanyakibi babaho
Job21:8 Uruvyaro rwabo rwāruka barubona
Job21:9 Ingo zabo zībēra amahoro ata co zīkanga
Job21:10 Impfizi zabo nta ho zihangūra kuvyara; Inka zabo zama zivyara
Job21:11 Ibibondo vyabo birōngōra imbere yabo nk’umukuku
Job21:12 Baririmbisha udushako tw’ ingoma n’inanga

Job21:16 Rāba

Job21:18 Bakaba nk’ibishingwe bitwarwa n’umuyaga

Job21:22 Har’ uwokwigisha Imana ubgenge
Job21:23 Umwe apfa
Job21:24 Ivyansi vyiwe bicuzuye amata
Job21:25 Uwundi apfana intimba mu mutima
Job21:26 Bompi baryamana mu mukungugu
Job21:27 Erega ndazi ivyiyumviro vyanyu
Job21:28 Kuko muvuga
Job21:29 Mbega ntimuraruha mubaza abantu b’ingenzi? Ntimwemeye ivyo bashingiye intahe
Job21:30 Yukw inkozi y’ikibi ihora irokoka ku musi w’ivyago

Job21:32 Yamar’ azoterurirwa mu cobo
Job21:33 Ibisinde vyo mu mwonga bizomworohera
Job21:34 None rero n’iki gituma munyirurisha ivy’ ubusa? Ibisigaye mu vyo munyishura n’ibinyoma bisa!
Job22:1 Maze Elifazi w’i Temani arishura

Job22:3 Mbeg’ ukugororoka kwawe kurahimbara Īshobora vyose? Canke se gutunganya ingeso zawe har’ ico biyungura?
Job22:4 Mbeg’ ukuyubaha kwawe ugira ngo ni kwo kwatumye iguhana
Job22:5 S’ukw ivyaha vyawe bikomeye? Mber’ ibigabitanyo vyawe ntibigira akagero.

Job22:8 Ūhambaye ni we yiganziye igihugu
Job22:9 Wirukanye abapfakazi bagenda imvumure
Job22:10 Ni co gituma imitego igukikije
Job22:11 N’umwiza na wo ukagukikiza

Job22:15 Mbeg’ ugomba gukomeza inzira ya kera

Job22:20 Bati N’ukuri abāri badukūriye hasi bararanduwe
Job22:21 Enda rero ni wiyuzuze na yo

Job22:23 Ni wagaruka kw Īshobora vyose

Job22:26 Ni ho uzonezererwa Īshobora vyose

Job22:28 Iy’ ugize ico ugabira
Job22:29 Ni bagutsinda hasi uzovuga
Job22:30 Mber’ izorokora n’ūrikw igicumuro: N’ukuri uzorokorwa no gutungana kw’amaboko yawe.
Job23:1 Maze Yobu arishura

Job30:1 Ariko none
Job30:2 Non’ inkomezi z’amaboko yabo zommarira iki? Kw ar’ utugoyigoyi tutazoshika mu bigero.
Job30:3 Bazingamitswe n’ugukena n’ inzara
Job30:4 Basoroma utuboga tumera mu bisaka
Job30:5 Bāciwe mu bantu; Bahabga induru nk’ibisuma.
Job30:6 Bituma baba mu bikukumushi vyo mu myonga
Job30:7 Basigaye bābirira mu bisaka nk’inka; Bīryamira hamwe musi y’ ibisuru.
Job30:8 N’abana b’ibipfapfa
Job30:9 Maze noneho mpindutse akavyino kabo
Job30:10 Baranzinutswe
Job30:11 Kukw Imana yabanguruye urutsi rw’umuheto wanje
Job30:12 I buryo bganje hahaguruka imihimbiri
Job30:13 Inzira yanje barayonona
Job30:14 Banziye nk’abaciye mu kirengero kinini: Bānsūmiye bagigimba hakiriko harahomvoka.
Job30:15 Ibiteye ubgoba birampanze
Job30:16 Maze non’ ubugingo bganje bunshongeyemwo; Imisi y’umubabaro irancakiye.
Job30:17 Mw ijoro amagufa yanje yantobekeranirijwemwo
Job30:18 Kubg’ inkomezi nyinshi z’ indwara yanje umwambaro wanje urononekaye
Job30:19 Yanshiburiye mu kivurugu c’ ivyondo
Job30:20 Ndagutakambira
Job30:21 Wampindukiye inkarwe: Ukuboko kwawe kw’inkomezi kurandendereza.
Job30:22 Unteruza umuyaga
Job30:23 Kuko nzi yuk’ uzonshitsa mu rupfu
