Job30:25 Mbega sinaririra ūjigirijwe? Umutima wanje ntiwababazwa n’umukene?
Job30:26 Naziga amahirwe
Job30:27 Amara yanje aradobangana
Job30:28 Ngenda ngandaye ntabona izuba: Mpagarara mw ikoraniro
Job30:29 Ndi mwene wabo w’imbgebge
Job30:30 Urukoba rwanje rurirabuye
Job30:31 Ni co gitumye inanga yanje isigaye ar’ agacurantimba
Job31:1 Nasezeranye isezerano n’ amaso yanje; None noshobora nte gushira ijisho ku mwigeme?
Job31:2 Kuk’ umugabane Imana yompa uvuye mw ijuru woba iki? N’inyegu ivuye iyo hejuru Īshobora vyose yompa yoba inki?
Job31:3 Mbega ntiyoba ubugesera bubīkirwa umugabitanyi
Job31:4 Mbega yo yo ntiyitegereza inzira zanje
Job31:5 Asangwa naragendeye mu binyoma
Job31:6 Ni ngerwe ku munzane w’ ukuri
Job31:7 Asangw’ ibirenge vyanje vyarakebeje mu nzira
Job31:8 Ndakarima
Job31:9 Asangw’ umutima wanje warasutswe n’umugore
Job31:10 Umugore wanje aragasēra uwundi
Job31:11 Kukw ico coba ar’ ishano ritavugwa
Job31:12 Coba ar’ umuriro utongora gushitsa uhoneje
Job31:13 Asangwa narīrengagije ivy’ umushumba wanje cank’ ivy’ incoreke yanje
Job31:14 None nzobikika nte
Job31:15 Mbeg’ iyandemeye mu nda ya mama si yo yamuremye na we? Iyatubumbiye mu nda s’ imwe?
Job31:16 Asangwa narīmye abagorwa ico bifuza
Job31:17 Cank’ asangwa narigunganye ivyo kurya vyanje
Job31:18 Kand’ uhereye mu buto bganje ari jewe nayireze ndi nka se
Job31:19 Kand’ asangwa har’ uwo nabonye yishwe no kubura ico yambara
Job31:20 Asangw’ urukenyerero rwiwe rutampezagiye
Job31:21 Kand’ asangwa narabanguriye ukuboko impfuvyi
Job31:22 Asangwa vyarabaye birtyo
Job31:23 Kukw ivyago vyovuye ku Mana vyantera ubgoba
Job31:24 Asangwa naragize izahabu ivyizigiro vyanje
Job31:25 Kand’ asangwa nanejerejwe n’uk’ ubutunzi bganje ari bginshi
Job31:26 Kand’ asangwa naritegereje izuba igihe ryaka
Job31:27 Umutima wanje ugasukwa na vyo mu mpisho
Job31:28 Ivyo na vyo vyoba ar’ ikibi co guhanirwa mu bacamanza
Job31:29 Asangwa naranejerejwe n’uk’ ūnyanka ageshejwe
Job31:30 Kand’ ari jewe nari narazitiye akanwa kanje ngo ntigacumure
Job31:31 Kand’ asangw’ abo mu rugo rwanje batavuga
Job31:32 Kandi kw ata mushitsi narāje hanze
Job31:33 Kand’ asangwa naratwikiriye ibicumuro vyanje nka Adamu
Job31:34 Mbitewe no gutinya ishengero mu kigohe
Job31:35 Icompa hakagira ūnyumviriza! Ivyo nireguje ndabitereye igikumu: Īshobora vyose n’ inyishure! Kand’ icompa nkabona ibirego vyanditswe n’umwansi wanje!
Job31:36 N’ukuri novyikorera ku rutugu
Job31:37 Noyimenyesha igitigiri c’intambuko zanje
Job31:38 Asangwa mu bgatsi bganje hatakishwa no kundega
Job31:39 Kand’ asangwa narariye ivyeze vyaho ata co nishuye
Job31:40 Asangwa vyarabaye birtyo
Job32:1 Nukw abo bagabo ukw ari batatu bareka kwishura Yobu
Job32:2 Maz’ uburake bga Elihu mwene Barakeli w’i Buzi
Job32:3 Kand’ uburake bgiwe buziriringira na ba bakunzi batatu ba Yobu
Job32:4 Ariko Elihu yari yarīndiriye kuvugana na Yobu
Job32:5 Maze Elihu abonye yukw abo batatu babuze icobava mu kanwa ngo bamwishure
Job32:6 Nuko Elihu mwene Barakeli w’i Buzi aravuga
Job32:7 Naravuze
Job32:8 Ariko har’ impwemu mu bantu
Job32:9 Abakuze si bo banyabgenge bonyene
Job32:10 Ni co gitumye mvuga
Job32:11 Rāba
Job32:12 Mbere nababangiye ugutwi
Job32:13 Mwiyubare
Job32:14 Si jewe yaroreshejekw amajambo yiwe; Nanje sinomwishura amajambo nk’ayanyu.
Job32:15 Ehe barumiwe
Job32:16 Mbega nobuzwa n’ukw ata co bavuga
Job32:17 Jewe nanje ngira mvuge ivyanje
Job32:18 Kukw amajambo anyuzuyemwo
Job32:19 Inda yanje imeze nka vino itagira isaganirizo
Job32:20 Ngira mvuge
Job32:21 Muntunge
Job32:22 Kuko ntazi guhemana; Mbikoze
Job33:1 Enda rero Yobu
Job33:2 Ehe nteranuye akanwa
Job33:3 Amajambo yanje agira aserure ukugororoka kw’umutima wanje
Job33:4 Mpwemu w’Imana ni we yandemye
Job33:5 Ni wabishobora unyishure
Job33:6 Rāba mpwanye nawe imbere y’Imana
Job33:7 Ehe nta gitinyiro mfise co kugutera ubgoba
Job33:8 N’ukuri wavuze numva
Job33:9 Ng’ Uratunganye
Job33:10 Ariko ngw Imana ikuronderakw inyanduruko
Job33:11 Ngw ibirenge vyawe ibishira mu mpatane z’ibiti
Job33:12 Reka nkwishure: mur’ ivyo ntugororotse; Kukw Imana irengeye abantu.
Job33:13 N’iki gituma uyihāririza? Kukw ata co yirirwa isobanura mu vyayo.
Job33:14 Kukw Imana
Job33:15 Mu nzozi
Job33:16 Ni ho izibūra amatwi y’abantu
Job33:17 Kugira ngw igaburuze umuntu imigabo yiwe
Job33:18 Umutima wiwe iwukiza rwa rwobo
Job33:19 Kandi har’ ah’ ahanwa n’ uburibge ari ku buriri bgiwe
Job33:20 Bigatuma umutima wiwe uhura ivyo kurya
Job33:21 Umubiri wiwe urananuka
Job33:22 Mber’ umutima wiwe ukaba wēgereye rwa rwobo
Job33:23 Namba yoba kumwe n’umumarayika
Job33:24 Ni ho amugirira imbabazi
Job33:25 Umubiri wiwe uzotonyanga itōto kurusha uw’ umwana; Azokwiyubura
Job33:26 Asenga Imana
Job33:27 Aririmbira imbere y’abantu
Job33:28 Imana yacunguye umutima wanje ngo ntuje muri rwa rwobo
Job33:29 Rāba
Job33:30 Kugira ngw igarukane umutima wiwe ngo ntuje muri rwa rwobo
Job33:31 Enda bishirek’ umutima
Job33:32 Asangw’ uri n’ico uvuga
Job33:33 Namb’ ata kiriho
Job34:1 Maze Elihu yongera kuvuga
Job34:2 ati Ni mwumve amajambo yanje
Job34:3 Kuk’ ugutwi kurobanura amajambo Nk’ukw akanwa kumviriza ivyo kurya.
Job34:4 Twihitiremw’ igitunganye
Job34:5 Kuko Yobu avuga
Job34:6 Ngo Nah’ ari n’urubanza
Job34:7 Mbega ni nde muntu yomera nka Yobu
Job34:8 Agenda yifatanije n’abakora ivy’ ukugabitanya
Job34:9 Kuko yavuze
Job34:10 Nuko rero ni munyumvirize
Job34:11 Kuk’ umuntu izomusubiriza mu nkōko ibihwanye n’ igikorwa ciwe
Job34:12 Eka n’ivy’ ukuri
Job34:13 Ni nde yayiragije isi? Ni nde yayizigamishije ibiri kuri yo vyose?
Job34:14 Yokwisubizako Mpwemu wayo
Job34:15 Ivyaremwe vyose vyohonera rimwe
Job34:16 None rero namb’ ugize ubgenge
Job34:17 Mbeg’ uwanka guca iziroranye yoshobora kuganza? Mbega wotsindisha Īgororotse ari yo Nyenkomezi?
Job34:18 None birabereye kubarira umwami
Job34:19 None ntibirushirije kuba ibitabereye kubibarira Īdatinya abaganwa ku kigohe
Job34:20 Bapfa mu kanya isase
Job34:21 Kukw inyonga zayo ziri ku nzira z’umuntu
Job34:22 Nta mwiza cank’ igitūtu c’ urupfu Ah’ abakora ivy’ ukugabitanya boshobora kwinyegeza.
Job34:23 Kukw ata gihe Imana yashingiye umuntu Co kurenguka imbere yayo mu manza.
Job34:24 Ivunagura abahizi mu buryo budaserangurika
Job34:25 Kukw izi ibikorwa vyabo
Job34:26 Ibakubita nk’abanyakibi nyene
Job34:27 Kuko bākikamye
Job34:28 Bagatuma ugutaka kw’abagorwa kuyishikako
Job34:29 Iy’ itanze impore
Job34:30 Kugira ng’ ūtubaha Imana ntaje ku ngoma
Job34:31 Mbega har’ uwabariye Imana
Job34:32 At’ Ico ntabona ukinyigishe: Ati Namba naragabitanije sinzosubīra?
Job34:33 Mbeg’ ingero yayo uyankishwa n’ukw idakoze ico ugomba? Kukw ari wewe ukwiye guhitamwo
Job34:34 Abantu bazi gutahura
Job34:35 Bati Yobu avuga ico atazi
Job34:36 Icompa Yobu akageragezwa
Job34:37 Kukw agereka ubugarariji ku caha ciwe
Job35:1 Nuko Elihu akomeza amajambo yiwe
Job35:2 ati Mbeg’ ugira ngw ivyo uvuga ni ko
Job35:3 K’uvuga
Job35:4 Jewe ngira nkwishure
Job35:5 Itegereze mw ijuru urābe; Kand’ urābe iyo hejuru
Job35:6 Asangwa warakoze icaha
Job35:7 Asangw’ ur’ umugororotsi
Job35:8 Mugabo ibibi vyawe vyobabaza umuntu ameze nkawe; N’ubugororotsi bgawe uwo bgogirira ikimazi n’umwana w’umuntu gusa.
Job35:9 Batakishwa n’agahahazo kenshi
Job35:10 Ariko nta wuvuga
Job35:11 Ikatwigisha gusumba ibikōko vyo mw isi
Job35:12 Nuko barataka
Job35:13 Ereg’ Imana ntiyokwumva amagambo y’ubuhuhuta
Job35:14 None ntirushirije kutumva
Job35:15 Ariko noneho
Job35:16 Ni co catumye Yobu ateranurira akanwa kuvuga amagambo y’ubuhuhuta
Job36:1 Elihu ashishikara kuja imbere
Job36:2 ati Nyihanganira gato
Job36:3 Ndahēmbēra akenge
Job36:4 N’ukuri ivyo mvuga s’ibinyoma: Ūfise ubgenge bushitse ari kumwe nawe.
Job36:5 Rāba
Job36:6 Ntizigama ubugingo bg’abanyakibi
Job36:7 Nta ho ikūra inyonga zayo ku bagororotsi
Job36:8 Kand’ iyo baboheshejwe iminyororo
Job36:9 Ibamenyesha ibikorwa vyabo
Job36:10 Kand’ izibūra amatwi yabo ngo bumve inyigisho
Job36:11 Ni bayumvira
Job36:12 Ariko ni batayumvira
Job36:13 Kand’ abatubaha Imana mu mitima yabo bāmana umwikomo: Iyo ibaboshe ntibaruha bayitakambira.
Job36:14 Bapfa bakenyutse
Job36:15 Ikirisha impahazwa uguhahazwa kwazo
Job36:16 N’ukuri iba yaragukūye mu magorwa
Job36:17 Arik’ urubanza rucirwa abanyavyaha rugushitseko kand’ ugeze: Urubanza rw’ukuri uciriwe ruragushikiriye.
Job36:18 Wirinde
Job36:19 Mbeg’ ugutakamba kwawe har’ ico kwokumarira ngo ntubone ivyago
Job36:20 Ntukifuze ijoro
Job36:21 Witonde
Job36:22 Rāba Imana ikora ibihambaye mu bushobozi bgayo: Umwigisha ahwanye na yo ni nde?
Job36:23 Ni nde yayigereye inzira icamwo? Canke ni nde yohangara kuyibarira
Job36:24 Ibuka gutazira ibikorwa vyayo
Job36:25 Abantu bose bahora babirāba
Job36:26 Rāba Imana irahambaye
Job36:27 Kukw idūza udutonyanga tw’ ikiduhu
Job36:28 Ijuru rikayijogotereza
Job36:29 Mbega har’ uwoshobora gutahura ingen’ ibicu bikwiragira
Job36:30 Ikwiragiza imiravyo impande zayo zose; Kand’ itwikira hasi muri nyina w’ikiyaga.
Job36:31 Kukw ivyo ari vyo ikoresha mu gucira amateka amahanga
Job36:32 Yorosa intoke zayo umuravyo
Job36:33 Imituragaro y’inkuba imenyekanisha ivyayo
Job37:1 Ivyo bihindisha agashitsi umutima wanje
Job37:2 Ni mwumve yemwe
Job37:3 Igukwiza musi y’ijuru hose
Job37:4 Hanyuma y’ivyo ijwi ryayo rirahinda
Job37:5 Imana ituragarisha ijwi ryayo bitangaje; Ikora ibikomeye tudashobora gutahura.
Job37:6 Kukw ibarira shelegi
Job37:7 Yugarana abantu bose
Job37:8 Ico gihe ibikōko binyegera mu bgihisho
Job37:9 Mu birēre vy’i bumanuko hava ikirura
Job37:10 Urubura ruzanwa n’impwemu zihumetswe n’Imana
Job37:11 Mber’ ibicu bitwaye intunda ibiremereza amazi; Ibicu bisanzaza imiravyo yayo.
Job37:12 Bikuba iserere nk’ukw igomba
Job37:13 Ni yo ibirungika
Job37:14 Umve ibi
Job37:15 Mbeg’ urazi ingen’ Imana ibigera
Job37:16 Cank’ urazi ingen’ ibicu bishigikiwe? Urazi ibikorwa bitangaje vy’ Iyizi ubgenge bgose?
Job37:17 Cank’ imyambaro yawe igituma isusuruka
Job37:18 Mbega woshobora kwaganura ijuru ufatanije na yo
Job37:19 Enda twigishe ico twoyibarira; Kuko tubuzwa n’umwiza gutunganya amajambo yacu.
Job37:20 Mbega har’ uwoyibarira ko ngomba kugira ico mvuga? None har’ umuntu yokwifuza kumirwa miyonzwa?
Job37:21 Kandi n’ubu abantu ntibashobora guhanga amaso umuco ukayanganira mw ijuru
Job37:22 I burārūko hava ubgiza bukayangana nk’izahabu; Imana yambaye igitinyiro giteye ubgoba.
Job37:23 Īshobora vyose nta ho twoshobora kuyiserangura: ifise ububasha bunyomoje; Kand’ ica imanza zibereye
Job37:24 Ni co gituma abantu bayubaha; Nta ho ishira umutima ku muntu n’umwe yīgize umunyabgenge.
Job38:1 Maz’ Uhoraho yishurira Yobu mu gashururu
Job38:2 at’ Uyo ni nde azimanganya inama Mu magambo atarimw’ ubgenge?
Job38:3 Enda kenyera magabo! Kuko ngira nkubaze
Job38:4 Mbega wewe wari hehe
Job38:5 Ni nde yatamvye amatambge yayo
Job38:6 Ibinogo vy’inkingi zayo vyimbururiwe mu ki? Canke ni nde yashizeh’ ibuye rigumya imfuruka
Job38:7 Igihe inyenyeri zo mu gaturuturu zāririmbira hamwe
Job38:8 Ni nde yugarije ikiyaga inzugi
Job38:9 Igihe nagira ibicu imyambaro yaco
Job38:10 Nkagishingira akarimbi
Job38:11 Nkavuga
Job38:12 Mbeg’ aho wabereye
Job38:13 Ngo na wo ufate imikugiro y’isi
Job38:14 Isi ica irahinduka
Job38:15 Kand’ abanyakibi bakwa umuco wabo
Job38:16 Mbega warashitse mu masōko y’ikiyaga? Canke waragendagenze ahigobetse i bgina bgaco?
Job38:17 Har’ aho weretswe amarembo y’urupfu? Cank’ amarembo y’igitūtu c’ urupfu har’ aho wigeze kuyabona?
Job38:18 Mbega waratahuye ubgaguke bg’isi? Bivuge
Job38:19 Inzira ija i wabo w’umuco iri hehe? N’umwiza na wo ah’ uba ni hehe
Job38:20 Kugira ng’ ubisubize aho bihānira imbibe
Job38:21 Ereg’ urabizi
Job38:22 Har’ aho wigeze gushika mu bubīko bga shelegi? Cank’ urābona ububīko bg’ urubura
Job38:23 Urwo nabīkiye igihe co kuzana amagorwa
Job38:24 Inzira ijana ah’ ibishwarara vy’umuco bitangurira n’ iyihe? Cank’ inzira ijana ah’ umuyaga w’i burasirazuba uturuka
Job38:25 Ni nde yaciriye isegenya imigende imanukana
Job38:26 Kugira ngw arekurire imvura mu gihugu kitagiramw’ abantu
Job38:27 Ngw ahēmbūre ahantu h’ uruharabuga hagadutse
Job38:28 Mbeg’ imvura iri na se? Canke ni nde yavyaye udutonyanga tw’ikime?
Job38:29 Urubura rwavuye mu nda ya nde? N’urume rw’igikonyozi ruva mw ijuru ni nde yarugīriye ku rwahi?
Job38:30 Amazi aravura
Job38:31 Mbega woshobora guhambira hamwe akarundo k’inyenyeri zitwa Kilimiya
Job38:32 Woshobora kurōngōra za Mazaroti mu gihe cazo? Canke woyobora izitwa Arukuturo n’abana bazo?
Job38:33 Mbeg’ urazi ivyagezwe biganza ijuru? Woshobora gushinga uko riganza isi?
Job38:34 Woshobora gushira ijwi hejuru ngo rishikīre ibicu
Job38:35 Woshobora gutuma imiravyo
Job38:36 Ni nde yashize ubgenge mu mutima w’umuntu? Canke mu mushaha wiwe ni nde yahashize ugutahura?
Job38:37 Ni nde yogira ubgenge bgomushoboza guharūra ibicu? Canke ni nde yoshobora gucuranura amazi yo mu mibindi yo mw ijuru
Job38:38 Igihe umukungugu uhinduka ivyondo
Job38:39 Mbega woshobora guhīgira ingore y’intambge? Canke wohāza imigunza y’ intambge
Job38:40 Igihe ziryamye mu masenga yazo
Job38:41 Ni nde aronderera igikōna ivyo kurya
Job39:1 Mbeg’ impene z’ibinyeshamba ziba mu bitandara urazi igihe zivyarira? Canke woshobora kuranga igihe impongokazi zivyarira?
Job39:2 Woshobora kurīmbūra amezi zimara? Canke se womenya igihe zivyarira?
Job39:3 Ziritunatuna
Job39:4 Abana bazo barashisha
Job39:5 Ni nde yarekuye indogoba z’ ibinyeshamba ngo zigende aho zigomba? Canke ni nde yazizituye ku biziriko?
Job39:6 Izo nahinduriye ubugaragwa ngo bube inzu yazo
Job39:7 Zitwenga urwamo rwo mu gisagara
Job39:8 Ku misozi ni ho zigendagenda zirisha
Job39:9 Mbeg’ imbogo yokwemera kugukorera? Canke yotahukira ku gicaniro cawe?
Job39:10 Canke woshobora kuyambika umugozi ngw ikurimire ikivi? Canke se yogenda irakubiturura inyuma yawe mu myonga?
Job39:11 Mbega woyizigira kukw inkomezi zayo ari nyinshi? Canke woyisigarana igikorwa cawe?
Job39:12 Woyishimira ko yokwegeranya ivyo wejeje ikabizana i muhira
Job39:13 Igisīga citwa imbuni gikungutana amababa yaco kwiteragura; Ariko mbeg’ amababa yaco n’ amoya yaco bigira neza?
Job39:14 Kuko kirekera amagi yaco hasi
Job39:15 Kikibagira kw ikirenge coshobora kuyafyonyagura
Job39:16 Kirenga ivyana vyaco
Job39:17 Kukw Imana yacimye ubgenge
Job39:18 Iyo kivudutse ciruka
Job39:19 Mbega ni wewe wahaye ifarasi inkomezi zayo? Canke ni wewe wambitse izosi ryayo umugāra uhungabana?
Job39:20 Ni wewe wayihaye gusimba nk’inzige? Erega gufuha kw’amanyama kwayo guteye ubgoba.
Job39:21 Iy’ iri mu kiyaya irakoba
Job39:22 Itwenga ubgoba
Job39:23 Umutana ugenda ujegera kuri yo
Job39:24 Amakare yayo n’uburake bituma itemaguza imisozi
Job39:25 Uko yumvise inzamba kwose iravuga
Job39:26 Mbeg’ ubgenge bgawe ni bgo butuma agaca kaguruka
Job39:27 Mbeg’ ibgirizwa ryawe ni ryo rituma ikinyakabaka canikiza hejuru
Job39:28 Kiba mu bitandara
Job39:29 Kikir’ aho
Job39:30 Ivyana vyaco na vyo binunuza amaraso; Kand’ ah’ imivyimba iri hose
Job40:1 Uhoraho yongera kubaza Yobu
Job40:2 ati Mbeg’ umunyempāri yohāririza Īshobora vyose? Ūhāririza Imana
Job40:3 Maze Yobu yishura Uhoraho
Job40:4 ati Rāba ndi nta kimazi: nokwishura iki? Nifashe ku munwa.
Job40:5 Mvuze rimwe
Job40:6 Maz’ Uhoraho yishurira Yobu mu gashururu
Job40:7 at’ Enda kenyera magabo! Ngira nkubaze
Job40:8 Mbega woshingūra urwo nashinze? Wompenurirakw ibitari vyo kugira ng’ ubone urubanza?
Job40:9 Canke se
Job40:10 Enda ni wisakare ubgiza n’ ubukuru
Job40:11 Sendereza uburake bgawe busebereye
Job40:12 Witegereze umwibone wese
Job40:13 Ubashire mu mukungugu bose hamwe
Job40:14 Ni ho nanje nzokwemera Yuk’ ukuboko kwawe kw’i buryo kwoshobora kugukiza.
Job40:15 Enda ni witegereze imvubu
Job40:16 Ehe rāba
Job40:17 Izungagiza umurizo wayo udadaye nk’igiti c’isederi; Imitsi yo mu matako yayo irasobekeranye.
Job40:18 Amagufa yayo ameze nk’imiheha y’imiringa; Ingingo zayo zimeze nk’ibihindizo vy’ivyuma.
Job40:19 Mu vyaremwe n’Imana ni yo gakomeye; Iyayiremye ni yo yonyene yoshobora kuyishikiriza inkota.
Job40:20 N’ukuri imisozi iyimereza ivyo kurya
Job40:21 Yiryamira musi y’ibiti vy’ intunda
Job40:22 Ibiti vy’intunda biyikwiza igitūtu; Ibiti bimeze i ruhande y’ umugezi birayikikiza.
Job40:23 Rāba
Job40:24 Mbega har’ uwoyifata iri maso
Job41:1 Mbeg’ ingona woshobora kuyirobesha igera? Canke wofatisha ururimi rwayo umugozi?
Job41:2 Woshobora kuyicisha umugozi w’umuhotora mu zuru? Canke wotoboza umubangabanga wayo uruhindu?
Job41:3 Mbega yokwisaba mu majambo menshi
Job41:4 Mbega yosezerana nawe
Job41:5 Woyikinisha nk’ūkinisha inyoni? Mbega woyizirika ngw abanyakigo bagukorera bayikinishe?
Job41:6 Mbeg’ igihari c’abarovyi coyidandaza? Coyikwiragiza mu bahanjuzi?
Job41:7 Mbeg’ urusāto rwayo worushingagirakw imyampi y’ ingobe
Job41:8 Pfa kuyishirak’ ukuboko gusa! Uze wame wibuka intambara
Job41:9 Eh’ ivyizigiro vyo kuyifata nta vyo: Mbeg’ umuntu ntiyogwishwa igihūmura n’ukw ayirāvye gusa?
Job41:10 Nta wogira ubuhizi bgotuma ahangara kuyikakaza: Nuko rero jewe ni nde yoshobora kumpagarara imbere?
Job41:11 Ni nde yabanje kugira ico ampa ngo ndamwishure? Ibiri musi y’ijuru vyose iyo riva rikagera n’ivyanje.
Job41:12 Ingona sinoreka kuvuga amaguru yayo
Job41:13 Ni nde yoshobora kuyikūrak’ umwambaro w’inyuma? Ni nde yokwishira hagati mu majigo yayo?
Job41:14 Ni nde yoshobora kuyasamika akanwa? Gutera akōba gukikije amenyo yayo.
Job41:15 Ibigaragamba vyayo vy’inkomezi ni vyo igenda yishinzako; Bigerekeranye hamwe nk’ ivyamatanijwe rwose.
Job41:16 Uko kimwe gifatanye n’ikindi Bituma ata muyaga ushobora kubicamwo.
Job41:17 Biramatanye kimwe ku kindi
Job41:18 Kwasamura kwayo guca ibibatsi; Amaso yayo asa n’ugutambika kw’umutwenzi.
Job41:19 Mu kanwa kayo havamw’ imuri zaka
Job41:20 Mu mazuru yayo hapfundukamw’ umwotsi
Job41:21 Impwemu zayo zidomeka amakara
Job41:22 Mw izosi ryayo habamw’ inkomezi; Gutera akōba kwayo kuyihamiriza imbere.
Job41:23 Inyama zo ku mubiri wayo ziramatanye: Ziyimaseko
Job41:24 Umutima wayo ukomeye nk’ ibuye: Mber’ ukomeye nk’urusyo.
Job41:25 Iyo yiburutse abahizi bahinda agashitsi
Job41:26 N’uworamuka ayirwanishije inkota nta co vyomara: N’iyo ryoba icumu cank’ umugenyuzi cank’ umwampi w’ubukera.
Job41:27 Ivyuma ibigereranya n’ivyatsi
Job41:28 Umwampi ntushobora gutuma ihunga; Amabuye atewe n’umugozi ayihindukira nk’ibishingwe.
Job41:29 Ubuhiri ibugereranya n’ibishingwe nyene: Itwenga imivuguvugu y’icumu.
Job41:30 Mu nda hayo hameze nk’injo zikarishe; Ah’ iciye mu vyondo ihasiga imikuku nk’ahaciye umusekuzo w’amenyo.
Job41:31 Isebagiza mw idamba nk’ inkono ibiragira
Job41:32 Inyuma yayo ihasiga inzira ikayangana; Womenga mw idamba hasheshe uruyenzi.
Job41:33 Nta kindi gihwanye na yo kiri kw isi
Job41:34 Irābana agakēngērwe ibishizwe hejuru vyose; Ni yo mwami w’ibinyabgibone vyose.
Job42:1 Maze Yobu yishura Uhoraho
Job42:2 ati Nzi yuk’ ushobora vyose
Job42:3 Uyo ni nde azimanganya inama ata bgenge agira? Erega ni co catumye mvuga ivyo ntatahuye
Job42:4 None ndakwinginze ni wumve
Job42:5 Nari narumvishije ivyawe ugutwi
Job42:6 Ni co kinteye kwizinukwa
Job42:7 Nuk’ Uhoraho amaze kubgira Yobu ayo majambo
Job42:8 None rero ni mwijanire amashūri ndwi n’impfizi z’intama ndwi
Job42:9 Nuko Elifazi w’i Temani na Biludadi w’i Shuhi na Zofari w’i Nayama baragenda
Job42:10 Yobu agisengera bagenzi biwe
Job42:11 Maz’ abo bavukana bose baraza
Job42:12 Nuk’ Uhoraho aha Yobu umugisha mu gihe c’amaheruka kuruta ica mbere: aronka intama ibihumbi cumi na bine
Job42:13 Kand’ avyara n’abahungu ndwi n’abakobga batatu.
Job42:14 Umukobga wa mbere amwita Yemima; uw’ ubuheta amwita Keziya; uwa gatatu amwita Kereni‐hapuki.
Job42:15 Kandi mu gihugu cose nta bigeme bāri bahwanije akaranga n’ abakobga ba Yobu: nuko se abaraga hamwe na basaza babo.
Job42:16 Hanyuma yaho
Job42:17 Nuko Yobu apfa yīsāziye

Psalms23:1 Uhoraho ni we mwungere wanje
Psalms23:2 Amvyagiza mu canya c’ubgatsi butotahaye: Andōngōrera i ruhande y’ amazi adasūma:
Psalms23:3 Aremesha umutima wanje. Anyobora mu nzira zo kugororoka kubg’ izina ryiwe.
Psalms23:4 Mbere naho noca mu mwonga w’igitūtu c’urupfu Sinzogira ikibi ntinya; kuk’ uri kumwe nanje: Inyobozo yawe n’ubuhiri bgawe ni vyo bimpumuriza.
Psalms23:5 Untegurira ameza mu maso y’abansi banje; Wansīze amavuta mu mutwe; igikombe canje kirasēsekaye.
Psalms23:6 N’ukuri ivyiza n’imbabazi bizonyomako imisi yose y’ ukubaho kwanje

Psalms44:20 Namba twaribagiye izina ry’ Imana yacu

Psalms45:1 Umutima wanje urabize
Psalms45:2 Uri n’ubgiza buruta ubg’ abana b’abantu; Igikundiro gisutswe mu minwa yawe: Ni co gitumye Imana iguha umugisha w’ibihe bidashira.
Psalms45:3 Wa muhizi we
Psalms45:4 Ugendane icubahiro

Psalms45:7 Wakunze ukugororoka

Psalms68:28 Imana yawe ikugereye inkomezi

Psalms68:35 Mana
Psalms69:1 Nkiza Mana: Kukw amazi ashitse no ku bugingo bganje.
Psalms69:2 Ndadobeye mw ishayo imira
Psalms69:3 Kurira kwanje kuranduhije; umuhogo urūmye: Amaso yanje yākobotse nkirorereye Imana yanje.
Psalms69:4 Abanyankira ubusa baruta umushatsi wo ku mutwe wanje mu bginshi: Abagomba kundandura
Psalms69:5 Mana
Psalms69:6 Mwami
Psalms69:7 Kuko nihanganira ibitutsi bakumpōra; Isoni zitwikiriye mu maso hanje.
Psalms69:8 Mpindutse akavantara ku bo tuvukana
Psalms69:9 Kukw ishaka ry’inzu yawe rindya; Ibitutsi vy’abagutuka vyaguye kuri jewe.
Psalms69:10 Aho narira
Psalms69:11 Aho nagize amagunira kuba imyambaro yanje
Psalms69:12 Abicara kw irembo baramvuga; Nd’ indirimbo y’ababorewe.
Psalms69:13 Ariko jeho
Psalms69:14 Unshayure mw ishayo
Psalms69:15 Umukuba ntuntware
Psalms69:16 Uhoraho unyishure
Psalms69:17 Kandi ntuhishe umusavyi wawe mu nyonga hawe; Kuko ngowe: unyishure vuba.
Psalms69:18 Wēgēre ubugingo bganje
Psalms69:19 Ni wewe uzi ukuntu ntukwa
Psalms69:20 Ibitutsi vyammenaguye umutima
Psalms69:21 Kandi bāmpaye umururazi kuba ivyo kurya vyanje; Ngize inyota bampa inkarisha ngo ndayinywe.
Psalms69:22 Ameza yabo ahinduke ururiba imbere yabo: Bakiri mu mahoro
Psalms69:23 Amaso yabo n’ahumwe
Psalms69:24 Ubasukek’ ugushangashirwa kwawe
Psalms69:25 I wabo hasigare imisaka
Psalms69:26 Kuko bahama uwo wakubise; Kandi bongeranya umubabaro w’abo wakomerekeje.
Psalms69:27 Ibigabitanyo vyabo ubibasubirize mu nkōko: Ntibaze binjire mu vy’ukugororoka kwawe.
Psalms69:28 Basibanganywe mu gitabo c’ ubugingo
Psalms69:29 Ariko jeho nd’umugorwa
Psalms69:30 Nzotazirisha izina ry’Imana indirimbo: Nzoyihimbarisha ishimwe ry’ ivyo yankoreye.
Psalms69:31 Ivyo bizohimbara Uhoraho kurusha impfizi

Psalms119:1 Hahirwa abagenda batunganye
Psalms119:2 Hahirwa abitondera ivyo yihanikirije
Psalms119:3 Mbere nta c’ukugabitanya bakora
Psalms119:4 Washinze amateka yawe Kugira ngo tuyitonderane umwete.
Psalms119:5 Icompa inzira zanje zigashikama Kugira ngo nitondere ivyo washinze.
Psalms119:6 Aho nzoshirira umutima ku mabgirizwa yawe yose Ni ho ntazomāramāra.
Psalms119:7 Nzogushimisha umutima utunganye Ni namara kwiga imanza zawe ziroranye zibereye.
Psalms119:8 Nzokwitondera ivyo washinze: Ntunte ngo mbe ruhebga.
Psalms119:9 Umusore azokwezesha inzira yiwe iki? Azoyezesha kuyitondera nk’ ukw ijambo ryawe rivuga.
Psalms119:10 Nakurondeje umutima wanje wose; Ntukunde ko mpusha ngo mve mu mabgirizwa yawe.
Psalms119:11 Nabītse ijambo ryawe mu mutima wanje Ngo noye kugucumurako.
Psalms119:12 Uhoraho
Psalms119:13 Namamaje n’iminwa yanje Imanza zose ziroranye z’ akanwa kawe.
Psalms119:14 Nanezererewe inzira y’ivyo wihanikirije Nk’uko nnezererwa ubutunzi bgose.
Psalms119:15 Nzokwiyumvira amateka washinze
Psalms119:16 Nzonezererwa ivyo washinze
Psalms119:17 Ugirire neza umusavyi wawe
Psalms119:18 Hwezesha amaso yanje
Psalms119:19 Nd’ inyambukīra mw isi: Ntumpishe amabgirizwa yawe.
Psalms119:20 Umutima wanje umenaguwe n’igihahamizi Ugirira imanza zawe ziroranye ibihe vyose.
Psalms119:21 Wahannye abibone
Psalms119:22 Unkūrekw agakēngērwe n’ umugayo; Kuko nitondeye ivyo wihanikirije.
Psalms119:23 Nah’ abahambaye bicaye bangīra imigabo
Psalms119:24 Kand’ ivyo wihanikirije na vyo birampimbara
Psalms119:25 Umutima wanje wamatanye n’umukungugu; N’ungire muzima
Psalms119:26 Nakwīgāniye inzira zanje
Psalms119:27 Untahuze inzira y’amateka washinze
Psalms119:28 Umutima wanje ushongeshejwe n’umubabaro: Ndemesha
Psalms119:29 Inzira y’ibinyoma n’ibe kure yanje: Umpere ubuntu ivyagezwe vyawe.
Psalms119:30 Mpisemw’ inzira yo kuba umwizigirwa: Nashize imanza zawe ziroranye imbere yanje.
Psalms119:31 Namatanye n’ivyo wihanikirije: Uhoraho
Psalms119:32 Nzogenda niruka mu nzira y’amabgirizwa yawe Ah’ uzokwagurira umutima wanje.
Psalms119:33 Uhoraho
Psalms119:34 Umpe gutahura
Psalms119:35 Uncishe mu nzira y’amabgirizwa yawe
Psalms119:36 Uhindurire umutima wanje ku vyo wihanikirije
Psalms119:37 Ukebukishe amaso yanje
Psalms119:38 Ushimangirire umusavyi wawe ijambo ryawe Ryasezeraniwe abakwubaha.
Psalms119:39 Unkūrekw agakēngērwe nama ntinya
Psalms119:40 Nahahamiye amateka washinze: Ungire muzima kubg’ ukugororoka kwaw
Psalms119:41 Imbabazi zawe ni zinshikeko
Psalms119:42 Ni ho nzobona ico nishura ūntutse
Psalms119:43 Kandi ntukūre rwose ijambo ry’ukuri mu kanwa kanje: Kuko namye nizigira imanza zawe.
Psalms119:44 Na ntaryo nzokwama nitondera ivyagezwe vyawe
Psalms119:45 Kandi nzogendana umwidegemvyo
Psalms119:46 Nzovugira imbere y’abami ivyo wihanikirije
Psalms119:47 Kandi nzohimbarwa n’amabgirizwa yawe
Psalms119:48 Nzotarikira amaboko amabgirizwa yawe
Psalms119:49 Wibuke ijambo wasezeraniye umusavyi wawe
Psalms119:50 Iki ni co kimmara umubabaro mu marushwa yanje
Psalms119:51 Abibone bantwengera cane mw ijigo
Psalms119:52 Uhoraho
Psalms119:53 Ubushangashirwe buramfashe
Psalms119:54 Ivyo washinze vyambereye indirimbo Mu nzu y’uburāro bganje.
Psalms119:55 Uhoraho
Psalms119:56 Iki ni co nahawe
Psalms119:57 Uhoraho ni we mugabane wanje: Navuze yuko nzokwitondera amajambo yawe.
Psalms119:58 Ngukomeshereje ibobo umutima wanje wose kugira ng’ untunge: Ungirire ikigongwe
Psalms119:59 Ndiyumvira inzira zanje
Psalms119:60 Nkanyaruka
Psalms119:61 Imigozi y’abanyakibi yanyizingiriyeko
Psalms119:62 Mu gicugu nama mvyuka kugira ngo ngushimire Imanza zawe zigororotse.
Psalms119:63 Ngendana n’abakwubaha bose
Psalms119:64 Uhoraho
Psalms119:65 Uhoraho
Psalms119:66 N’unyigishe guhitamwo neza no kumenya ubgenge; Kuko nizeye amabgirizwa yawe.
Psalms119:67 Ntarababazwa narazimira; Ariko noneho nitondera ijambo ryawe.
Psalms119:68 Uri mwiza
Psalms119:69 Abibone bandemeye ikinyoma
Psalms119:70 Imitima yabo iyagayaga nk’ ibinure: Ariko jeho mpimbarwa n’ ivyagezwe vyawe.
Psalms119:71 Kubabazwa kwangiriye ikimazi
Psalms119:72 Ivyagezwe vyo mu kanwa kawe vyambereye Agasumbajana k’amafeza n’ amazahabu.
Psalms119:73 Intoke zawe ni zo zandemye
Psalms119:74 Abakwubaha bazondāba banezerwe; Kuko nizigiye ijambo ryawe.
Psalms119:75 Uhoraho
Psalms119:76 Ndakwinginze
Psalms119:77 Kugira neza kwawe kunshikeko
Psalms119:78 Abībone ni bamāramāre
Psalms119:79 Abakwubaha bampindukirire
Psalms119:80 Umutima wanje utungane mu vyo washinze
Psalms119:81 Umutima wanje udendebuwe no kwifuza agakiza kawe: Ariko nizigira ijambo ryawe.
Psalms119:82 Amaso yanje akobowe no kwifuza ijambo ryawe
Psalms119:83 Kuko mpindutse nk’umukuza w’urusato umanitswe ku mwotsi; Ariko sinibagira ivyo washinze.
Psalms119:84 Mbeg’ imisi y’ubugingo bg’ umusavyi wawe n’ingahe? Abampama uzobacirakw iteka ryari?
Psalms119:85 Abībone
Psalms119:86 Amabgirizwa yawe yose n’ay’ ukwizigirwa: Bampamisha ibinyoma; n’ untabare.
Psalms119:87 Bari bashigaje gatoya bakandandura mw isi: Ariko sinareka amateka washinze.
Psalms119:88 Ungire muzima
Psalms119:89 Ijambo ryawe ryama rihamye mw ijuru Gushitsa ibihe bidashira
Psalms119:90 Ukwizigirwa kwawe kwamaho gushitsa ibihe vyose; Washinze isi
Psalms119:91 Imanza zawe ni zo zituma uyu musi vyose biriho: Kuko vyose ar’ abasavyi bawe.
Psalms119:92 Iyaba ivyagezwe vyawe atari vyo munezero wanje Ico gihe mba nararandukiye mu marushwa yanje.
Psalms119:93 Sinzokwigera nibagira amateka washinze
Psalms119:94 Nd’ uwawe
Psalms119:95 Abanyakibi banderekeye kundandura: Ariko jeho nzoshira umutima ku vyo wihanikirije.
Psalms119:96 Nabonye yuk’ uguhingurwa kwose gufise aho kugarukira; Arikw amabgirizwa yawe arāgutse cane.
Psalms119:97 Ewe kuntu nkunda ivyagezwe vyawe! Ni vyo ndimbūra bukarinda bgīra.
Psalms119:98 Amabgirizwa yawe atuma ndusha abansi banje ubgenge; Kuko na ntaryo yamana nanje.
Psalms119:99 Mfise ubgenge buruta ubg’ abigisha banje bose; Kukw ivyo wihanikirije ari vyo ndimbūra.
Psalms119:100 Ndusha abatāma ubgenge
Psalms119:101 Nabujije ibirenge vyanje inzira mbi yose
Psalms119:102 Sinzotirimuka mu manza zawe ziroranye
Psalms119:103 Ewe kuntu amajambo yawe angēngēra mu māgāge! Arusha ubūki gusōsa mu kanwa kanje.
Psalms119:104 Amateka washinze ni yo andonkesha ubgenge
Psalms119:105 Ijambo ryawe n’itara rimurikira ibirenge vyanje
Psalms119:106 Nararahiye ndarengwa Yuko nzokwitondera imanza zawe zigororotse.
Psalms119:107 Ndababazwa cane: Uhoraho
Psalms119:108 Uhoraho ndakwinginze
Psalms119:109 Ubugingo bganje buri ku maregerege imisi yose
Psalms119:110 Abanyakibi banteze umutego; Ariko sinahushije ngo mve mu mateka washinze.
Psalms119:111 Ivyo wihanikirije navyākiriye ngo bibe umwandu wanje w’ibihe bidashira
Psalms119:112 Nshize umutima wanje ku gushitsa ivyo washinze Ibihe vyose
Psalms119:113 Nanka ab’ imitima ibiri; Arikw ivyagezwe vyawe ndabikunda.
Psalms119:114 Ni wewe bgihisho bganje n’inkinzo yanje
Psalms119:115 Mva i ruhande
Psalms119:116 Umbere ubgishimikizo
Psalms119:117 Undamire
Psalms119:118 Wakēngereye abahushagirika bose bakava mu vyo washinze: Kuk’ ubugunge bgabo ata co bubamariye.
Psalms119:119 Ukūrah’ abanyakibi bose bo mw isi nk’inkamba ku cuma: Ni co gituma nkunda ivyo wihanikirije.
Psalms119:120 Umubiri wanje uhindishwa agashitsi no kugutinya; Kandi ntinya imanza zawe.
Psalms119:121 Nakoze ibigororotse n’ibiroranye: Ntundekerane abampahaza.
Psalms119:122 Wishinge k’uzogirira neza umusavyi wawe: Abībone ntibaze bampahaze.
Psalms119:123 Amaso yanje akobowe no kwifuza agakiza kawe

Psalms119:127 Ni co gituma nkunda amabgirizwa yawe

Psalms119:129 Ivyo wihanikirije n’ibitangaza: Ni co gituma umutima wanje uvyitondera.
Psalms119:130 Guhishurirwa amajambo yawe kuzana umuco
Psalms119:131 Nāsamitse akanwa
Psalms119:132 Unkebuke

Psalms119:134 Uncungure
Psalms119:135 Umurikishirize umusavyi wawe mu nyonga hawe: Unyigishe ivyo washinze.
Psalms119:136 Amaso yanje asendanisha inzūzi z’amazi
Psalms119:137 Ur’ umugororotsi
Psalms119:138 Ivyo wihanikirije wabigeresheje ukugororoka N’ukwizigirwa kw’ukuri.
Psalms119:139 Ishaka ryanje rirandanduye Kukw abarwanizi banje bibagiye amajambo yawe.
Psalms119:140 Ijambo ryawe n’icuma kiramuye; Ni co gituma umusavyi wawe arikunda.
Psalms119:141 Nd’ uwo hasi
Psalms119:142 Ukugororoka kwawe n’ukugororoka kw’ibihe bidashira: Ivyagezwe vyawe n’ukuri.
Psalms119:143 Amarushwa n’intuntu biranshitseko: Yamara
Psalms119:144 Ivyo wihanikirije n’ivyo kugororoka ibihe bidashira: Umpe ubgenge mbone kubaho.
Psalms119:145 Ntakambishije umutima wose; unyishure Uhoraho we: Nzokwitondera ivyo washinze.
Psalms119:146 Ndagutakambiye
Psalms119:147 Umutwenzi utaratambika naratakamvye: Amajambo yawe ni yo nizigiye.
Psalms119:148 Abateramyi batarakūranwa mu bishingo vyabo mba ndi maso

Psalms119:163 Nanka ibinyoma
Psalms119:164 Uko bukeye ngushima ibihetangabo ndwi
Psalms119:165 Abakunda ivyagezwe vyawe bagira amahoro menshi; Nta kibatsitaza bafise.

Ecclesiastes6:2 n’ umuntu Imana yahaye itunga n’ ibintu n’icubahiro

Ecclesiastes6:4 kukw iziye ubusa

Ecclesiastes7:1 Ukuvugwa neza kuruta amavuta atāmirana y’igiciro kinini
Ecclesiastes7:2 Ni vyiza kuja mu nzu y’abagandaye kuruta kuja mu nzu y’intumire: kukw ari ryo herezo ry’abantu bose
Ecclesiastes7:3 Umubabaro uruta agatwengo: kuko naho mu maso hoba hijiriwe
Ecclesiastes7:4 Umutima w’abanyabgenge uri mu nzu y’abagandaye
Ecclesiastes7:5 Iciza n’ ukwumvira igihano c’umunyabgenge kuruta kwumviriza imvyino z’ibipfu.
Ecclesiastes7:6 Nk’uko guturagurika kw’amahwa kumeze musi y’inkono
Ecclesiastes7:7 N’ukuri kugunga guhindura umunyabgenge igipfu
Ecclesiastes7:8 Iherezo ry’ikintu riruta itanguriro ryaco; kand’ uw’ umutima wihangana aruta uw’ umutima w’ubgibone.
Ecclesiastes7:9 Ntukihutire kuraka mu mutima: kuk’ uburake bgama mu mushaha w’ibipfu.
Ecclesiastes7:10 Ntukavuge
Ecclesiastes7:11 Ubgenge bungana n’umwandu mu kuba bgiza: mbere burushiriza kubera bgiza ababona izuba.
Ecclesiastes7:12 Kuk’ ubgenge ar’ ubgugamo
Ecclesiastes7:13 Itegereze igikorwa c’Imana: none ni nde yoshobora kugorora ico yagoramitse?
Ecclesiastes7:14 Ku musi w’amahoro unezerwe; ku musi w’ amarushwa wiyumvire: Imana yarabibangikanije
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ivyo vyose narabibonye mu misi yanje yapfuye ubusa: har’ aho umugororotsi akenyuka kand’ agororotse
Ecclesiastes7:16 Ntube umugororotsi arengeje urugero
Ecclesiastes7:17 Ntube n’umunyavyaha arengeje urugero
Ecclesiastes7:18 Ivyiza n’uko bimwe ubifata
Ecclesiastes7:19 Ubgenge bubera umunyabgenge ububasha kuruta abatware cumi bari mu gisagara.
Ecclesiastes7:20 N’ukuri nta mugororotsi ariho kw isi akora ivyiza ntacumure.
Ecclesiastes7:21 Kand’ ikindi
Ecclesiastes7:22 kuko kenshi na kenshi uzi mu mutima wawe nawe nyene ko watutse abandi.

Ecclesiastes7:24 Ibiri kure
Ecclesiastes7:25 Maze nshira umutima wanje ku kumenya no gusesa no guserangura ubgenge n’ inyanduruko z’ibintu
Ecclesiastes7:26 Nsanga ikintu kirusha urupfu kurura: n’umugore umutima wiwe ar’ imitego n’ururiba
Ecclesiastes7:27 Ehe ngiki ico nabonye
Ecclesiastes7:28 ico umutima wanje ukirondera
Ecclesiastes7:29 Eh’ ico nabonye n’iki kimwe gusa
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ni nde ameze nk’umunyabgenge? Ni nde azi ukw ikintu gisobanurwa? Ubgenge bg’umuntu buzana umuco mu maso hiwe
Ecclesiastes8:2 Ndakugīriye inama: witondere icagezwe c’umwami
Ecclesiastes8:3 Ntukihute kuva imbere yiwe; ntukibande ku kintu kibi: kuko we akora ic’ agomba cose.
Ecclesiastes8:4 Kukw ijambo ry’umwami riri n’ububasha; kandi ni nde yomubaza
Ecclesiastes8:5 Umuntu wese yitondera icagezwe ntazogira ikibi abona; kand’ umutima w’umunyabgenge utahura ko hazoba igihe n’imanza:
Ecclesiastes8:6 kukw ikibaho cose kigira igihe caco n’urubanza rwaco; kukw imibabaro y’umuntu imuvuna:
Ecclesiastes8:7 kukw atazi ikizobaho; none ni nde yomubarira ingene bizomera?
Ecclesiastes8:8 Nta muntu ariho afise ububasha ku mpwemu ziwe
Ecclesiastes8:9 Ivyo vyose naravyiboneye
Ecclesiastes8:10 Kand’ ikigeretseko nabonye abanyavyaha bahambga
Ecclesiastes8:11 Urubanza rw’igikorwa kibi naho ruciwe
Ecclesiastes8:12 Nah’ umunyavyaha yokora ikibi ibihetangabo ijana
Ecclesiastes8:13 ariko nta mahoro azoba ku munyakibi
Ecclesiastes8:14 Harih’ ic’ ubusa gikorerwa kw isi; n’uko har’ abagororotsi bagirirwa ibikwiranye n’igikorwa c’abanyakibi
Ecclesiastes8:15 Maze rero nca nshima ibinezereza
Ecclesiastes8:16 Mmaze gushira umutima wanje ku kumenya ubgenge no kwitegereza igikorwa gikorerwa kw isi — kuko har’ Uwo amaso yiwe atabona agatiro

Ecclesiastes9:1 Ivyo vyose nabishizek’ umutima
Ecclesiastes9:2 Vyose bibashikako kumwe bose: iherezo ni rimwe ku mugororotsi no ku munyakibi; ku munyangeso nziza no ku wejejwe no ku wuhumanye; ku muntu atanga ibimazi no ku muntu atabitanga: nk’uk’ umunyangeso nziza ameze
Ecclesiastes9:3 Ubu n’ubuyobe mu bikorerwa musi y’izuba vyose

Isaiah1:1 Ivyo Yesaya mwene Amosi yeretswe
Isaiah1:2 Ni mwumve
Isaiah1:3 Inka irazi nyeneyo
Isaiah1:4 Ewe wa hanga rikora icaha
Isaiah1:5 Mbega n’ubu muracadaramīra ngo mukubitwe
Isaiah1:6 Uhereye mu bgoro bg’ikirenge ugashitsa ku mutwe nta hazima hariho
Isaiah1:7 Igihugu canyu n’amatongo
Isaiah1:8 Umukobga w’i Siyoni asigaye ameze nk’umutara uri mu ruzabibu
Isaiah1:9 Iyaba Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo atadushigarije amasigarira na makeya
Isaiah1:10 Ni mwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho
Isaiah1:11 Ibimazi vyanyu vy’isinzi bimmariye iki? ni k’Uhoraho abaza. Ati Mpāze ivyo bimazi vyoshejwe vy’amasuguru y’intama
Isaiah1:12 Iyo muje kunshengerera
Isaiah1:13 Ntimukongere kunshikanira amashikanwa atagira ikimazi: imibavu n’igisesema kuri jewe; imboneko z’amezi n’amasabato no gukoranya ibikorane — eka sinshobora kwihanganira amakoraniro y’agahebuza avanze n’ibigabitanyo!
Isaiah1:14 Uko muziririza imboneko z’amezi n’imisi mikuru mwashiriweho
Isaiah1:15 Ni mwatega amaboko yanyu nzobahisha mu nyonga hanje; mbere naho mwosenga amasengesho menshi sinzobumviriza: amaboko yanyu yuzuyekw ibitenga vy’amaraso.
Isaiah1:16 Ni mwiyuhagire
Isaiah1:17 mwige gukora neza; mushimikire imanza zibereye
Isaiah1:18 Enda ni muze
Isaiah1:19 Ni mwemera mukumvira
Isaiah1:20 Na ho ni mwanka mukagarariza
Isaiah1:21 Eh’ ukuntu umurwa wizigirwa ucitse maraya; ahāhora huzura imanza ziroranye
Isaiah1:22 Ifeza zawe zihindutse inkamba
Isaiah1:23 Abakuru bawe n’abagarariji
Isaiah1:24 Ni co gituma Umwami
Isaiah1:25 Nzogufatisha ukuboko kwanje
Isaiah1:26 Nzosubizah’ abacamanza bawe nk’ubga mbere
Isaiah1:27 I Siyoni hazocunguzwa guca iziroranye
Isaiah1:28 Arikw abacumura n’abanyavyaha bazotikirizwa rimwe
Isaiah1:29 Kuko muzomāramāzwa n’ibiti vy’imyeloni mwishimiye
Isaiah1:30 kuko muzomera nk’umweloni uravye amababi
Isaiah1:31 Umunyenkomezi azohinduka nk’ibisūsūrwa

Isaiah3:4 Nzobaha abana babe ari bo babatwara
Isaiah3:5 Abantu bazohahazanya
Isaiah3:6 Ico gihe umuntu azofata uwo bavukana mu rugo rwa se
Isaiah3:7 Uwo musi na we azosemerera
Isaiah3:8 I Yerusalemu haradandabagiranye
Isaiah3:9 Ishusho yo mu maso habo ni yo ibāgiriza; bērura icaha cabo nk’ab’ i Sodomu

Isaiah3:12 Yamar’ abantu banje

Isaiah3:15 mukora ibiki
Isaiah3:16 Bitayeko Uhoraho aravuze
Isaiah3:17 ni co kizotuma Umwami Imana atēza abakobga b’i Siyoni ibihūshi mu bitwariro
Isaiah3:18 Kur’ uwo musi Umwami Imana azobashazūra ugushaza kw’inyerere zabo
Isaiah3:19 n’impeta zo ku matwi
Isaiah3:20 n’ibitsibo
Isaiah3:21 n’impeta zo ku ntoke n’izo ku mazuru
Isaiah3:22 n’impuzu zo ku misi mikuru
Isaiah3:23 n’ivyirore
Isaiah3:24 Maze mu gishingo c’imbazi hazoba umunūko; mu gishingo c’ikimano c’ubudede hazoba umugozi; mu gishingo c’umushatsi utsivye hazoba inkomvorera; mu gishingo c’impuzu y’igisāga hazoba igunira; n’ibikovukovu mu gishingo c’amarangi.
Isaiah3:25 Intōre zawe zizokwicwa n’inkota
Isaiah3:26 Amarembo y’i Siyoni azorira aboroge: hazokwicara hasi hasigaye ar’ umuzigirizwa.
Isaiah4:1 Uwo musi abakobga ndwi bazofata umugabo umwe
Isaiah4:2 Uwo musi ishami ry’Uhoraho rizoba ryiza rifise icubahiro; ivyo igihugu kizokwama bizoryohera abazoba barokotse bo mu Bisirayeli
Isaiah4:3 Maz’ ūzoba asigaye i Siyoni
Isaiah4:4 Umwami Imana amaze kwuhagira imyanda abakobga b’i Siyoni ayirangije
Isaiah4:5 Kandi hejuru y’inzu yose yo ku musozi Siyoni no ku makoraniro yaho Uhoraho azoharemera igicu n’umwotsi ku murango
Isaiah4:6 Kandi hazobah’ ihema ku murango ryo gutera igitūtu kubg’ indugumba
Isaiah5:1 Hinge ndirimbe ivy’ umukunzi wanje
Isaiah5:2 yari yararurimiriye
Isaiah5:3 None rero mwa baba i Yerusalemu
Isaiah5:4 Ico nari gukorera uruzabibu rwanje ntārukoreye n’igiki? Ko naziga ko ruzokwama inzabibu
Isaiah5:5 None rero reka mbereke ivyo ngira ngirire uruzabibu rwanje: ngira nkūreh’ ururombero rwarwo
Isaiah5:6 kandi ndaruririke; ntiruzotuturirwa
Isaiah5:7 Kuk’ uruzabibu rw’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ari rwo nzu ya Isirayeli
Isaiah5:8 Bazobona ibara
Isaiah5:9 Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo yavugiye mu matwi yanje
Isaiah5:10 Kukw imirima cumi y’imizabibu izoreta umubindi umwe
Isaiah5:11 Bazobona ibara
Isaiah5:12 Mw inywa ryabo bagira inanga n’ikembe n’agashako k’ingoma n’umwironge na vino; yamara ntibītegereza igikorwa c’Uhoraho
Isaiah5:13 Ni co catumye abantu banje bajanwa ar’ inyagano
Isaiah5:14 Ni co catumye i kuzimu harangara
Isaiah5:15 Abantu bazosubizwa hasi
Isaiah5:16 arik’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo azoba ashizwe hejuru n’imanza ziroranye
Isaiah5:17 Ico gihe imyagazi y’intama izorisha nk’ah’ ari mu canya cayo
Isaiah5:18 Bazobona ibara
Isaiah5:19 bakavuga
Isaiah5:20 Bazobona ibara
Isaiah5:21 Bazobona ibara
Isaiah5:22 Bazobona ibara
Isaiah5:23 bagatsindanishiriza abanyakibi kubg’ ingurire
Isaiah5:24 Nuko rero
Isaiah5:25 Ni co catumye uburake bg’Uhoraho buziriringira abantu biwe
Isaiah5:26 Kand’ azomanikira amahanga ya kure ibendera
Isaiah5:27 Muri bo nta wuzoruha canke ngw atsitare
Isaiah5:28 imyampi yabo irasongoye
Isaiah5:29 Ukwivuga kwabo kuzoba nk’ukw’ intambge
Isaiah5:30 Kur’ uwo musi bazobabomboranira hejuru nk’ukw ikiyaga kibomborana: kand’ uwokwitegereza ico gihugu yobona har’ umwiza n’ivyago
Isaiah6:1 Mu mwaka Umwami Uziya yatanzemwo
Isaiah6:2 Abaserafi bari bahagaze hejuru yiwe: umuserafi wese yar’ afise amababa atandatu: abiri yayatwikiriza mu maso
Isaiah6:3 Babarirana basemerera
Isaiah6:4 Amatanguriro y’imiryango anyiganyizwa n’ugusemerera kwabo
Isaiah6:5 Maze ndavuga
Isaiah6:6 Maz’ umwe mu baserafi araguruka
Isaiah6:7 arinkoza ku munwa
Isaiah6:8 Numva ijwi ry’Umwami Imana rivuga
Isaiah6:9 Arambarira
Isaiah6:10 Wame ukomantaza umutima w’ubgo bgoko
Isaiah6:11 Ndamubaza
Isaiah6:12 jewe Uhoraho mpejeje gucuranguriza abantu kure
Isaiah6:13 Kandi naho cosigarwamwo n’ikigiracumi co muri bo
Isaiah7:1 Ku ngoma ya Ahazi mwene Yotamu
Isaiah7:2 Babūrira umuryango wa Dawidi
Isaiah7:3 Maz’ Uhoraho abarira Yesaya
Isaiah7:4 maz’ umubarire
Isaiah7:5 Abasiriya n’Abefurayimu na mwene Remaliya ko baguhigiye imihigo
Isaiah7:6 bati Ni muze tudūge dutere i Buyuda
Isaiah7:7 ut’ Ico ni co gitumye Uhoraho Imana agize
Isaiah7:8 Kukw iremezo ry’i Siriya ari Damasiko
Isaiah7:9 kand’ iremezo ry’Abefurayimu ni Samariya
Isaiah7:10 Uhoraho yongera kubarira Ahazi
Isaiah7:11 ati Nyaka ikimenyamenya
Isaiah7:12 Ariko Ahazi arishura
Isaiah7:13 Yesaya aramwishura
Isaiah7:14 Ni co gitumye Uhoraho ubgiwe ari we agira abīhēre ikimenyamenya: Rāba
Isaiah7:15 Urubu n’ubūki ni vyo bizomutunga
Isaiah7:16 Kuk’ uwo mwana ataramenya ubgenge bgo kwanka ibibi no gukunda ivyiza
Isaiah7:17 Uhoraho azogutēza imisi mibi
Isaiah7:18 Kur’ uwo musi Uhoraho azohamagaza uruhwa isāzi ziri ku mpera z’inzūzi zo muri Egiputa
Isaiah7:19 Bizoza
Isaiah7:20 Kur’ uwo musi Uhoraho azomwa ku mutwe n’ubgoya bgo ku mubiri
Isaiah7:21 Kandi kur’ uwo musi umuntu azoragira agaka k’iriza n’intama zibiri;
Isaiah7:22 maze kukw amata bikamwa azoba ari menshi
Isaiah7:23 Kandi kur’ uwo musi ahantu hose hāba imizabibu igihumbi yagurwa amahera yitwa shekeli igihumbi
Isaiah7:24 Hazoshikay’ abitwaje umuheto n’imyampi
Isaiah7:25 Kandi n’imisozi yose yahora irimishwa isuka
Isaiah8:1 Maz’ Uhoraho arambarira
Isaiah8:2 Nanje nzokwitorera ivyabona vyo kwizigirwa vyo kubishingira intahe
Isaiah8:3 Nuko ndārira umugore w’ūvugishwa
Isaiah8:4 Kuk’ uwo mwana ataramenya ubgenge bgo guhamagara
Isaiah8:5 Uhoraho yongera kumbarira
Isaiah8:6 at’ Ubu bgoko ko bganse amazi ya Shilowa atemba buhoro
Isaiah8:7 nuko rero jewe Umwami Imana ngira mbatēze amazi ya rwa ruzi rundi
Isaiah8:8 kand’ azosēndēra ashike i Buyuda: azosendanisha ahahitane
Isaiah8:9 Ni mukorane
Isaiah8:10 Ni muje inama
Isaiah8:11 Kuk’ Uhoraho ambariye artya
Isaiah8:12 ati Ntimwite imihigo vya bindi vyose ubgo bgoko bgita imihigo; ntimukagire ubgoba nk’ubgabo
Isaiah8:13 Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo abe ari we mwemera ko yera
Isaiah8:14 Nukw azobabera ahēra; arikw azobera inzu zompi z’Abisirayeli ibuye ritsitaza n’urutare rugwisha
Isaiah8:15 Benshi bazoritsitarako
Isaiah8:16 Andika ivyo washingiye intahe
Isaiah8:17 Kandi nzokwitega Uhoraho
Isaiah8:18 Ehe twe n’abana Uhoraho yampaye tur’ abo kubera Abisirayeli ibimenyamenya n’ibitangaza biva k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo aba ku musozi Siyoni.
Isaiah8:19 Kandi ni bababgira
Isaiah8:20 Dusubire ku vyagezwe no kuri vya Bishinga intahe! Ni batāvuga ibihwanye na vyo bazoba mu bgirantibuce.
Isaiah8:21 Bazoca mu gihugu bamerewe nabi cane bashonje: maze ni bafatwa n’inzara bazoshangashirwa
Isaiah8:22 bazokwitegereza no kw isi
Isaiah9:1 Ariko ntibuzosubira kwiriranira ukundi ku wahoze ari mu mubabaro. Mu gihe ca kera yateye agakēngērwe igihugu ca Zebuloni n’igihugu ca Nafutali
Isaiah9:2 Abantu bāgendera mu mwiza babonye umuco mwinshi
Isaiah9:3 Wagwije ihanga
Isaiah9:4 Kukw igiti c’ingōgo bāmuremēka
Isaiah9:5 Kukw ivyākīngira abafise ibirwanishwa mu ntambara
Isaiah9:6 Kuk’ umwana atuvukiye
Isaiah9:7 Ukugwira kw’ubutware bgiwe n’amahoro ntibizogira iherezo
Isaiah9:8 Umwami Imana yarungitse ijambo kuri Yakobo
Isaiah9:9 Abantu bose bazobimenya
Isaiah9:10 bat’ Amatafari yarasenyutse
Isaiah9:11 Ico ni co kizotuma Uhoraho abahagurukiriza abansi ba Rezini kubatera
Isaiah9:12 Abasiriya bazomuturuka imbere
Isaiah9:13 Yamar’ abantu ntibāhindukiriye uwabakubise
Isaiah9:14 Ni co kizotuma Uhoraho azoca Abisirayeli umutwe n’umurizo
Isaiah9:15 Umugabo mukuru w’icubahiro ni we mutwe
Isaiah9:16 Kukw abarōngōra ubu bgoko babuzimiza
Isaiah9:17 Ni co gitumye Umwami Imana atazonezererwa imisore yo muri bo
Isaiah9:18 Kukw ibigabitanyo biturira nk’umuriro
Isaiah9:19 Uburake bg’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ni bgo butumye igihugu gitongoka: abantu na bo bakamera nk’inkwi z’umuriro; nta wugirira akagongwe mugenzi we.
Isaiah9:20 Umuntu azosahurira i buryo bgiwe
Isaiah9:21 Manase azorya Efurayimu
Isaiah10:1 Bazobona ibara
Isaiah10:2 kugira ngo bānzure abakene ngo ntibacirwe imanza
Isaiah10:3 None muzogira mute umusi muzoshikīrwa
Isaiah10:4 Nta gisigaye atar’ ugucishwa bugufi mu mbohe
Isaiah10:5 Uzobona ibara
Isaiah10:6 Nzomutuma gutera ihanga rikora ibizira
Isaiah10:7 Arikw ivyo si we avyituma ubgiwe
Isaiah10:8 Kukw avuga
Isaiah10:9 Mbeg’ i Kalino ntihameze nk’i Karikemishi? I Hamati ntihameze nk’i Aripadi
Isaiah10:10 Nk’ uk’ ukuboko kwanje kwashitse ku bihugu vy’ibigirwamana vyari bifise ibishushanyo bibājwe kurusha ivy’ i Yerusalemu n’i Samariya
Isaiah10:11 none sinzogirira i Yerusalemu n’ibigirwamana vyaho nk’uko nagiriye i Samariya n’ibigirwamana vyaho?
Isaiah10:12 Nuko jewe Umwami Imana ni namara guheraheza ivyo nzogirira umusozi Siyoni n’i Yerusalemu vyose
Isaiah10:13 Kuko yavuze
Isaiah10:14 kand’ ukuboko kwanje kwironkeye ubutunzi bg’ amahanga nk’uwironkeye icāri c’ inyoni
Isaiah10:15 Mbeg’ incabiti yokwirata k’ūrikw arayisatuza? Cank’ umusumeno wokwihayagiza k’ūrikw arawukereza? Ni nk’ah’ inkoni yozungagiza ūyītwāje
Isaiah10:16 Ni co kizotuma Umwami
Isaiah10:17 Kand’ umuco w’Abisirayeli uzoba nk’umuriro
Isaiah10:18 Kand’ azoherengeteza ubgiza bg’ikibira ciwe
Isaiah10:19 Kand’ amasigarira y’ibiti vyo mu kibira ciwe azoba imparūrwa
Isaiah10:20 Nuko kur’ uwo musi amasigarira y’Abisirayeli n’abazoba barokotse b’inzu ya Yakobo
Isaiah10:21 Amasigarira azogaruka
Isaiah10:22 Kuk’ ubgoko bganyu
Isaiah10:23 Kuk’ Umwami Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo azogeseza bikomeye mu gihugu cose
Isaiah10:24 Nuko rero
Isaiah10:25 Kuko hasigaye igihe gito cane ubushangashirwe n’uburake bganje bigashitswa mu guhona kwabo.
Isaiah10:26 Nuk’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo azobashongongezakw ikimoko
Isaiah10:27 Kandi kur’ uwo musi imitwaro bābaremēka izobava ku bitugu
Isaiah10:28 bashitse muri Ayati
Isaiah10:29 baserutse hejuru ku kavōvo
Isaiah10:30 Shira ijwi hejuru utakambe
Isaiah10:31 Ab’ i Madimena bacitse igikuba
Isaiah10:32 Kur’ uyu musi wa none barataha i Nobu
Isaiah10:33 Eh’ Umwami Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo azocisha amashami ububasha bgiwe bg’agaterabgoba: ibirebire bisumba ibindi bizokwicirwa
Isaiah10:34 Kand’ ibisaka vyo mu kibira azobitemesha icuma
Isaiah11:1 Ku gishitsi ca Isayi hazobaduka agashami
Isaiah11:2 Mpwemu w’Uhoraho azoba kuri we
Isaiah11:3 Ikizomuhimbara n’ukwubaha Uhoraho; ntazocira urubanza ku bipfa kubonekera amaso yiwe
Isaiah11:4 arikw azocira aboro imanza zibereye
Isaiah11:5 Ubugororotsi buzomubera umukanda mu rukenyerero
Isaiah11:6 Ibingira rizobana n’umwagazi w’intama
Isaiah11:7 Inka izorishanya n’igikōko citwa idubu: izazo zizoryama hamwe
Isaiah11:8 Umwana yonka azokinira ku mwobo w’imamba
Isaiah11:9 Hose ku murwa wanje wera ntihazoba hakir’ ibiryana cank’ ivyica; kuko kumenya Uhoraho kuzoba kwuzuye mw isi
Isaiah11:10 Maze kur’ uwo musi igishitsi ca Isayi kizoba gihagaritswe no kubera amoko ibendera
Isaiah11:11 Kandi kur’ uwo musi Umwami Imana azotuma ukuboko ubugira kabiri
Isaiah11:12 Kand’ azoshingira amahanga ibendera
Isaiah11:13 Ishari ry’Abefurayimu na ryo rizoshira
Isaiah11:14 Bazohwikira Abafilisitiya b’i burengerazuba
Isaiah11:15 Uhoraho azokamya rwose ikigobe c’ikiyaga ca Egiputa
Isaiah11:16 Kandi hazoba inzira y’iroro y’amasigarira y’abantu biwe

Isaiah12:5 Muririmbire Uhoraho

Isaiah13:1 Imbūri yo kuri Babuloni
Isaiah13:2 Ni mushinge ibendera ku musozi muremure w’uruharabuga
Isaiah13:3 Nahaye icagezwe abo nirobanuriye
Isaiah13:4 Umve ukwo guhinda kw’igugu ku musozi
Isaiah13:5 Ziva mu gihugu ca kure
Isaiah13:6 Ni muboroge
Isaiah13:7 Ivyo bizotuma amaboko yose adendebuka
Isaiah13:8 Bazokwiheba; umubabaro n’uburibge bibafate; bazobabara nk’umugore ari ku nda; bazorābana bumirwe; kandi mu maso habo hazohindurira nk’umuriro.
Isaiah13:9 Eh’ umusi w’Uhoraho uraje
Isaiah13:10 Kukw inyenyeri zo kw ijuru n’uburundo bgazo bitazokwaka
Isaiah13:11 Kandi nzohana ab’ isi kubg’ ibibi vyabo
Isaiah13:12 Nzotuvya abantu barushe izahabu nziza‐nziza kuba imparūrwa
Isaiah13:13 Ni co kizotuma ntigitisha amajuru
Isaiah13:14 Maz’ umuntu wese azosubira mu b’i wabo
Isaiah13:15 Uwo bazobona wese bazomusogota
Isaiah13:16 Utuyoya twabo na two bazotubamenagurira imbere; amazu yabo azosahurwa
Isaiah13:17 Rāba nzovyutsa Abamedi ngo babatere; ntibazorāba ifeza
Isaiah13:18 Imiheto yabo izokenyagura imisore
Isaiah13:19 Kandi Babuloni
Isaiah13:20 Ntihazokwigera hasubira kweyerwa ngo hubakwe
Isaiah13:21 Arikw ibikōko vyo mu bugaragwa ni vyo bizohagandagaza: amazu yabo azokwuzura ibihuna; ibisīga vyitwa imbuni na vyo bizohaba
Isaiah13:22 Amabingira azotontomera mu bihome vyabo
Isaiah14:1 Kuk’ Uhoraho azogirira akagongwe aba Yakobo
Isaiah14:2 Amahanga azobajana abasubize i wabo
Isaiah14:3 Maze ku musi Uhoraho azokuruhura umubabaro n’amagorwa n’ibikorwa abaguhindagiza bagukoresha
Isaiah14:4 ni ho uzokwitamba ku muvyimba umwami w’i Babuloni
Isaiah14:5 Uhoraho avunnye inkoni y’abanyakibi
Isaiah14:6 bākubita amahanga baratse
Isaiah14:7 Isi yose ironse impore
Isaiah14:8 Mber’ ibiti vy’akajwari birakwishima hejuru
Isaiah14:9 Hasi i kuzimu harashwabadutse kugusanganira; hakanguye abāpfuye kubgawe
Isaiah14:10 Abo bose bazokubaza
Isaiah14:11 Icubahiro cawe kimanuwe i kuzimu
Isaiah14:12 Ewe kuntu ukorotse uvuye kw ijuru
Isaiah14:13 Wari warībariye mu mutima
Isaiah14:14 uti Nzodūga ndenge ah’ ibicu bigarukira; nzoba nk’ Īsumba vyose.
Isaiah14:15 Yamar’ uzomanurwa
Isaiah14:16 Abazokubona bazoguhanga
Isaiah14:17 Ni we yahindura isi nk’ubugaragwa
Isaiah14:18 Abami b’amahanga bose uko bangana basinzirira itiro ry’urupfu mu cubahiro
Isaiah14:19 ariko weho bāgushiburiye kure y’imva yawe nk’inda y’urusoro iteye ishishi
Isaiah14:20 ntuzohambanwa na bo kuko wagesheje igihugu cawe
Isaiah14:21 Ni mwitegure gutōtōra abana biwe kubg’ ukugabitanya kwa ba sekuruza; boye kuvyuka ngo bakevye isi
Isaiah14:22 Nzobahagurukira
Isaiah14:23 Kandi nzohahindura i wabo w’ibinyogoto
Isaiah14:24 Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ararahiye
Isaiah14:25 nzovunagurira Abashuri mu gihugu canje
Isaiah14:26 Iyo ni yo migabo yagīriwe isi yose
Isaiah14:27 Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo kw ari we yabigabiye
Isaiah14:28 Mu mwaka umwami Ahazi yatanzemwo habayeh’ iyi mbūri.
Isaiah14:29 Yemwe Bufilisitiya bgose
Isaiah14:30 Maz’ abana b’ imfura b’aboro bazogaburirwa
Isaiah14:31 Wa rembo we
Isaiah14:32 Non’ intumwa z’iryo hanga bazozīshura iki? Bazozīshura
Isaiah15:1 Imbūri yo kuri Mowabu: kuko mw ijoro rimwe ahitwa Ari‐Mowabu hageseye
Isaiah15:2 Umukobga w’i Diboni aradūze
Isaiah15:3 Bagenda mu nzira zabo bacoceye amagunira; hejuru ku nzu zabo no ku nama umuntu wese araboroga
Isaiah15:4 I Heshiboni harataka bo n’i Eleyale; mber’ amajwi yabo ashika n’i Yahazi; ni co gituma ingabo z’i Mowabu ziboroga
Isaiah15:5 Umutima wanje uririra Mowabu; impunzi zaho zahungiye i Sowari n’i Egilati‐shelishiya; ahadūga haja i Luhiti ni ho badūga barira ingenda; no mu nzira ija i Horonayimu ni ho batakira ugutaka kw’ubgihebe.
Isaiah15:6 Kukw amazi y’i Nimurimu azokama
Isaiah15:7 Ni co kizotuma ibintu bari barīronkeye n’ ivyo bari barabītse babijana ku mugezi w’ibiti vyitwa arabimu.
Isaiah15:8 Kuk’ ugutaka gukikije ku mbibe z’i Mowabu
Isaiah15:9 Kukw amazi y’i Dimoni yuzuye ibitenga vy’amaraso; kandi nzokwongera guteza i Dimoni ibindi vyago
Isaiah16:1 Abaganza igihugu
Isaiah16:2 Kuko nk’ukw inyoni ziyerēra icāri gisambutse
Isaiah16:3 Tugīre inama
Isaiah16:4 Abirukanywe banje ubemere babe i wawe: kand’ ab’ i Mowabu ubabere ubuhungiro ku babanyaga. Umunyagahahazo ni yahindurwa ubusa
Isaiah16:5 ni ho intebe y’ubgami izoshimangirwa n’imbabazi
Isaiah16:6 Twumvise ubgībone bg’i Mowabu
Isaiah16:7 Ivyo ni vyo bizotuma Abanyamowabu baborogera Mowabu
Isaiah16:8 Kukw imirima y’i Heshiboni iravye
Isaiah16:9 Kubg’ ivyo nzoririra uruzabibu rw’i Sibuma
Isaiah16:10 Akanyamuneza n’ibihimbaro bīkūwe mw itongo rimera cane; nta kuririmba kuzoba mu ruzabibu
Isaiah16:11 Umutima wanje ucurira intimba Mowabu nk’inanga
Isaiah16:12 Kand’ Abanyamowabu ni barasuka
Isaiah16:13 Iryo jambo ni ryo Uhoraho yari yaravuze kuri Mowabu mu bihe vyashize.
Isaiah16:14 Ariko noneho
Isaiah17:1 Imbūri yo kuri Damasiko. Rāba Damasiko hakūweho
Isaiah17:2 Ibisagara vyo muri Aroweri bicitse imisaka; hazoba ah’ imikuku
Isaiah17:3 Ibihome bizoshira muri Efurayimu
Isaiah17:4 Kur’ uwo musi icubahiro ca Yakobo kizokwonda
Isaiah17:5 Bizoba nk’uk’ umugenyi yegeranya ingano zeze
Isaiah17:6 Ariko hazosigaramw’ uduhūmbga
Isaiah17:7 Kur’ uwo musi umuntu azotumbera Umuremyi wiwe
Isaiah17:8 Kandi ntazotumbera ibicaniro
Isaiah17:9 Kur’ uwo musi ibisagara vyiwe bikomeye bizoba nk’imisaka isigaye mw ishamba no ku mpinga z’imisozi
Isaiah17:10 Kuko wibagiye Imana y’agakiza kawe
Isaiah17:11 Ku musi wabiteyeko warabizitiriye
Isaiah17:12 Ewe wa rwamo rw’amahanga menshi abomborana nk’ukubomborana kw’ikiyaga
Isaiah17:13 Amoko azosūma nk’ugusūma kw’amazi menshi: arikw Imana izoyakankamira
Isaiah17:14 Ku mugoroba haba gucika ivutu
Isaiah18:1 Ewe wa gihugu c’amababa ahinda
Isaiah18:2 gituma intumwa zica mu kiyaga zigenda ku mazi ku bitebo vy’inkorogoto
Isaiah18:3 Yemwe ababa mw isi mwese
Isaiah18:4 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho yambariye
Isaiah18:5 Kukw iyimbura ritaragera
Isaiah18:6 Bazocurikirana hamwe babe ab’ ibisīga vy’amero vyo ku misozi miremire
Isaiah18:7 Ico gihe Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo azoshikanirwa ishikanwa n’ubgo bgoko bg’abantu barebare b’umubiri uyagayaga
Isaiah19:1 Imbūri yo kuri Egiputa. Rāba Uhoraho areruwe n’ igicu cihuta
Isaiah19:2 Nzoteranya Abanyegiputa bisubiraniremwo: umuntu wese azorwana n’uwo bavukana
Isaiah19:3 Umutima wa Egiputa uzokamangana
Isaiah19:4 Abanyegiputa nzobagabura mu kuboko kw’umutware w’imburakigongwe
Isaiah19:5 Amazi yo mu ruzi yahora asendanisha nk’ikiyaga azobura
Isaiah19:6 Inzūzi zizonuka
Isaiah19:7 Indimiro zo kuri Nili
Isaiah19:8 Kandi n’ abarovyi na bo bazorira
Isaiah19:9 Kand’ abakora igikorwa co gukūba inyuzi z’uduti twitwa pishita bazomāramāra
Isaiah19:10 Inkingi za Egiputa zizovunagurika
Isaiah19:11 Abaganwa b’i Sowani n’ibipfu rwose; inama z’abajanama ba Farawo b’abanyabgenge zihindutse iz’ ubusa: none muhangara mute kubarira Farawo
Isaiah19:12 Non’ abanyabgenge bawe bari hehe? Ni bakubarire
Isaiah19:13 Abaganwa b’i Sowani bacitse ibipfu
Isaiah19:14 Uhoraho yahasutse impwemu y’iserēre
Isaiah19:15 Kandi muri Egiputa nta gikorwa kizohashoboka
Isaiah19:16 Kur’ uwo musi Egiputa hazocika bga bagore: hazohinda agashitsi hatinye
Isaiah19:17 Kand’ igihugu ca Yuda kizohinduka igiteye ubgoba kuri Egiputa: ūzokibarirwa wese azotinya
Isaiah19:18 Kur’ uwo musi mu gihugu ca Egiputa hazobamw’ ibisagara bitanu bivuga urunyakanani
Isaiah19:19 Kur’ uwo musi hazoba igicaniro cubakiwe Uhoraho mu gihugu ca Egiputa hagati
Isaiah19:20 Bizoba ikimenyetso n’igishingantahe k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo mu gihugu ca Egiputa: kuko bazotakambira Uhoraho kubg’ ababahahaza
Isaiah19:21 Kand’ Uhoraho azokwimenyesha Egiputa
Isaiah19:22 Kand’ Uhoraho azokubita Egiputa
Isaiah19:23 Kur’ uwo musi hazoba inzira y’iroro iva muri Egiputa ija muri Ashuri
Isaiah19:24 Kur’ uwo musi i Bgisirayeli hazoba aha gatatu kuri Egiputa na Ashuri
Isaiah19:25 kuk’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ahahaye umugisha
Isaiah20:1 Umwaka Taritani yatereyemw’ ahitwa Ashidodi
Isaiah20:2 ico gihe ni ho Uhoraho yavugiye muri Yesaya mwene Amosi
Isaiah20:3 Maz’ Uhoraho aravuga
Isaiah20:4 uko ni k’umwami w’i Ashuri azojana abo muri Egiputa ar’ inyagano
Isaiah20:5 Kandi bazokwihebura bamāramāre
Isaiah20:6 Kur’ uwo musi ababa mur’ iki kiyaya c’ikiyaga bazovuga
Isaiah21:1 Imbūri yo ku bugaragwa buri ku kiyaga. Nk’ukw agashururu ko mu gihugu c’i bumanuko gasuriranya
Isaiah21:2 Ivyerekanywe bikomeye ndabihishurirwa; abaryarukanyi bariko bararyarukana
Isaiah21:3 Ni co gitumye ikiyunguyungu canje cuzuye uburibge
Isaiah21:4 Umutima wanje urahuzagizwa
Isaiah21:5 Batunganya ameza
Isaiah21:6 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Umwami Imana ambariye: ati Genda ushireh’ umushibamyi
Isaiah21:7 Ni yabona umuce w’ingabo
Isaiah21:8 Maz’ avuga nk’intambge
Isaiah21:9 non’ ehe haje umuce w’ingabo zigendera ku mafarasi bagenda ari babiri‐babiri. Arongera aravuga
Isaiah21:10 Ewe wa muhūre wanje
Isaiah21:11 Imbūri yo kuri Duma. Harih’ ūmpamagara ar’ i Seyiri
Isaiah21:12 Wa mushibamyi aramwishura
Isaiah21:13 Imbūri yo kuri Arabiya. Yewe wa gugu ry’Abadedani
Isaiah21:14 Uwishwe n’inyota bamuzaniye amazi
Isaiah21:15 Kuko bāriko barahunga inkota
Isaiah21:16 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Umwami Imana ambariye: at’ Umwaka utarashira
Isaiah21:17 n’amasigarira yo mu gitigiri c’ abarashi b’abahizi b’Abakedari bazoba imparūrwa; kuk’ Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli ari we abivuze.
Isaiah22:1 Imbūri yo ku kiyaya c’ ukwerekwa. Noneh’ ubaye ute
Isaiah22:2 Wewe wuzuye urwamo
Isaiah22:3 Abākuganza bose ko bahungiye hamwe
Isaiah22:4 Kubg’ ivyo ndavuga
Isaiah22:5 kukw ar’ umusi w’ubgihebure n’ugusiribangwa n’ukuzazanirwa
Isaiah22:6 Abelamu bapfukūye imitana
Isaiah22:7 Maze mu biyaya vyawe vyiza‐vyiza huzuramw’ imikogote
Isaiah22:8 Agukūrakw igitwikirizo
Isaiah22:9 Mubona ibirengero vy’ibizitiriye umurwa wa Dawidi kw ari vyinshi; mugomera amazi yo mu kidengeri co hepfo.
Isaiah22:10 Muharūra amazu y’i Yerusalemu
Isaiah22:11 Amazi yo mu kidengeri ca kera muyacira urugomero hagati y’inzitiro zompi: ariko ntimwasubiza ijisho ku wari yarakoze ivyo
Isaiah22:12 Kur’ uwo musi Umwami Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo yahamagariye abantu kwiririra no kwiborogera no kwimosha inkomvorera no gukenyera amagunira:
Isaiah22:13 yamara bashiraho kwinezereza no guhimbarwa
Isaiah22:14 Maz’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo yihishurira mu matwi yanje
Isaiah22:15 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize: ati Genda kuri wa mubgiriza Shebuna
Isaiah22:16 ut’ Urakora iki ngaho? uti Kand’ uri kumwe na nde ngaho ko wiyimbiye imva aho nyene? uti Ko wiyimbiye imva ahahera ruguru
Isaiah22:17 Uti Rāba
Isaiah22:18 Uti N’ukuri azokugira itu
Isaiah22:19 Nzokunyaga ububgiriza bgawe
Isaiah22:20 Kur’ uwo musi nzohamagara umusavyi wanje Eliyakimu mwene Hilukiya
Isaiah22:21 mmwambike umwambaro wawe
Isaiah22:22 Kand’ urupfunguzo rw’inzu ya Dawidi nzorushira ku bitugu vyiwe; kand’ azokwugurura ntihagire uwugara
Isaiah22:23 Nzomushimangira nk’umusumari ahantu hagumye
Isaiah22:24 Maze bazomusakārakw icubahiro cose c’inzu ya se
Isaiah22:25 Kur’ uwo musi
Isaiah23:1 Imbūri yo kuri Tiro. Boroga
Isaiah23:2 Ni mujorerwe
Isaiah23:3 ku mazi menshi; inyungu zanyu zar’ impeke zivuye kuri Shihori
Isaiah23:4 Ewe Sidoni māramāra; kukw ikiyaga kivuze
Isaiah23:5 Inkuru ni yashika muri Egiputa bazobabazwa cane n’izo nkuru zivuye i Tiro.
Isaiah23:6 Ni mujabuke muje i Tarushishi; muboroge
Isaiah23:7 Mbeg’ iki ni ca gisagara canyu c’umunezero
Isaiah23:8 Ni nde yagabiye kugirira Tiro ivyo
Isaiah23:9 Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ni we yabigabiye
Isaiah23:10 Sendanisha mu gihugu cawe nk’uko Nili rusendanisha
Isaiah23:11 Yabānguye ukuboko hejuru y’ikiyaga
Isaiah23:12 Aravuga
Isaiah23:13 Ni murābe igihugu c’Abakaludaya: ubgo bgoko ntibukiriho; Abashuri bahahinduye ah’ ibikōko vyo mu bugaragwa. Bashinga ivyo būririrako
Isaiah23:14 Boroga
Isaiah23:15 Maze kur’ uwo musi i Tiro hazokwibagirana imyaka mirongwirindwi
Isaiah23:16 Abira inanga ugendagende mu gisagara
Isaiah23:17 Nukw iyo myaka mirongwirindwi ni yashira Uhoraho azogendera i Tiro
Isaiah23:18 Inyungu n’impēra vyaho bizoba ivyera k’Uhoraho; ntibizobīkwa kandi ntibizoshirwa ukwavyo
Isaiah24:1 Rāba Uhoraho agira ngw ahindure isi umusaka
Isaiah24:2 Maz’ ibizoba ku bantu buntu bizoba no ku muherezi; ibizoba ku mushumba bizoba no kuri shebuja; ibizoba ku mukobga w’umuja bizoba no kuri inabuja; ibizoba ku muguzi bizoba no k’ūshōra; ibizoba k’ūtiza bizoba no k’ūtira; ibizoba k’uwaka inyungu bizoba no k’uwakwa inyungu.
Isaiah24:3 Isi izohinduka umusaka inyagwe rwose; kuk’ Uhoraho ari we avuze iryo jambo.
Isaiah24:4 Igihugu kiriganyira
Isaiah24:5 Kand’ isi ihumanijwe n’abayibamwo; kuko barenze ivyagezwe
Isaiah24:6 Ni co catumye umuvumo utongora isi
Isaiah24:7 Umutobe wa vino uriganyira
Isaiah24:8 Ibinezereza bivuye ku dushako tw’ingoma birashize
Isaiah24:9 Ntibazonywa vino baririmba
Isaiah24:10 Igisagara c’umuvurungano kirasanganguwe
Isaiah24:11 Baririra mu nzira kuko babuze vino; ahār’ umunezero burīje mazingi
Isaiah24:12 Mu gisagara hasigaye amatongo
Isaiah24:13 Kuk’ ukw ari ko bizomera mw isi hagati mu mahanga; bizomera nk’iyo banyiganyije igiti ca elayo
Isaiah24:14 Abo bazoshira amajwi hejuru basemerere
Isaiah24:15 Nuko ni muhimbarize Uhoraho i burasirazuba
Isaiah24:16 Twumvise indirimbo zituruka ku mpera y’isi
Isaiah24:17 Wewe uba mw isi
Isaiah24:18 Nuk’ ūhunga induru y’ibiteye ubgoba azogwa mu rusumanyenzi; uwūrira ngw ave mu rusumanyenzi umutego uzomufata: kukw ingomero zo mw ijuru zigomorowe
Isaiah24:19 Isi iravungaguritse
Isaiah24:20 Isi izodandabagirana nk’imborerwa
Isaiah24:21 Maze kur’ uwo musi Uhoraho azohana ingabo zo hejuru mw ijuru
Isaiah24:22 Bazokoranirizwa hamwe
Isaiah24:23 Ni ho ukwezi kuzomāramāra
Isaiah25:1 Ewe Uhoraho
Isaiah25:2 Kuko wahinduye igisagara ibirundo vy’ amasakamburira
Isaiah25:3 Ni co kizotuma ubgoko bg’ inkomezi bukwubaha
Isaiah25:4 Kuk’ umugorwa wamubereye igihome
Isaiah25:5 Nk’ukw indugumba yo mu gihugu kigadutse ikūrwaho
Isaiah25:6 Kandi kur’ uyu musozi Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo azohategurira amahanga yose amazimano y’inyama zinuze
Isaiah25:7 Kur’ uyu musozi ni ho azoherengetereza icitwikiro c’ukugandara catwikiriye amoko yose
Isaiah25:8 Urupfu azorumira miyonzwa gushitsa ibihe vyose; kand’ Umwami Uhoraho azohanagura amosozi ku maso ya bose; n’ ubumāramāre bgo ku bantu biwe azobukūra kw isi yose; kuk’ Uhoraho ari we abivuze.
Isaiah25:9 Nuko kur’ uwo musi bizovugwa
Isaiah25:10 Kuk’ ukuboko kw’Uhoraho kuri kur’ uyu musozi
Isaiah25:11 Kandi hazosānza amaboko hagati muri co
Isaiah25:12 Kand’ igihome kirekire kigukīngīra c’inzitiro zawe z’amabuye azogisangangura
Isaiah26:1 Kur’ uwo musi iyi ndirimbo izoririmbirwa mu gihugu ca Yuda
Isaiah26:2 Ni mwugurure amarembo
Isaiah26:3 Uzozigama amahoro masa umuntu akwegamikako umutima wiwe
Isaiah26:4 Ni mwizigire Uhoraho ibihe vyose: kuk’ UHORAHO YEHOVA ari we gitandara camah’ ibihe bidashira.
Isaiah26:5 Kuko yashubije hasi ababa ahantu ho hejuru mu gisagara cishira hejuru; agitsinda hasi
Isaiah26:6 Ibirenge bizogisiribanga
Isaiah26:7 Inzira y’umugororotsi iratunganye: ni wewe usena inzira y’umugororotsi.
Isaiah26:8 Mbere mu nzira y’imanza zawe ziroranye
Isaiah26:9 Nakwifurishije umutima wanje mw ijoro; mbere nzokurondeza umushaha wanje wose ubudahumeka; kukw iy’ imanza zawe ziroranye ziri mw isi
Isaiah26:10 Umunyavyaha naho yogirirwa neza nta ho yokwiga kugororoka; mu gihugu c’ubugororotsi azohakorera ibigabitanyo
Isaiah26:11 Uhoraho
Isaiah26:12 Uhoraho
Isaiah26:13 Ewe Uhoraho Mana yacu
Isaiah26:14 Bo barapfuye
Isaiah26:15 Wagwije ihanga
Isaiah26:16 Uhoraho
Isaiah26:17 Nk’uk’ umugore akuriwe amera
Isaiah26:18 Twari dukuriwe
Isaiah26:19 Abapfuye bawe bazoba bazima; imivyimba y’abantu bawe izozuka. Ni mwikangure
Isaiah26:20 Wa bgoko bganje
Isaiah26:21 Kuk’ Uhoraho arikw arava i we azanywe no guhanira ababa mw isi ukugabitanya kwabo; ivu rizogaragaza ibitenga vy’amaraso yaviriye kuri ryo
Isaiah27:1 Kur’ uwo musi Uhoraho azohanisha inkota yiwe ikarishe nini ikomeye Lewiyatani ca kiyoka kinyaruka
Isaiah27:2 Kur’ uwo musi bazovuga
Isaiah27:3 Jewe Uhoraho
Isaiah27:4 Nta burake mfise. Iyaba imikere n’ amahwa vyari bimpagurukiye kuntera
Isaiah27:5 shiti bokwisunga inkomezi zanje
Isaiah27:6 Mu misi izoza Yakobo azoshinga imizi
Isaiah27:7 Mbega yabakubise nk’uko yakubise abābakubita? Canke bishwe nk’uko hāgeseye abo yishe?
Isaiah27:8 Hamwe wabirukana wabahannye ibitarenze urugero; ku musi w’umuyaga uva i burasirazuba wabavumbuje inkūbi y’umuyaga.
Isaiah27:9 Ivyo ni vyo bizotuma ukugabitanya kwa Yakobo kuzokwozwa
Isaiah27:10 Kukw igisagara cubakiwe inzitiro gisigaye gitēterewe
Isaiah27:11 Amashami yaho ni yuma azohānyurwa; abagore bazoza bayacane; kukw iryo hanga ar’ iritagira ubgenge; ni co gituma Iyabaremye itazobagirira akagongwe
Isaiah27:12 Kur’ uwo musi Uhoraho azosekura akūre impeke ziwe
Isaiah27:13 Maze kur’ uwo musi inzamba niniya izovuzwa; kandi hazoza abāriko barahona mu gihugu ca Ashuri
Isaiah28:1 Igitsibo c’ubgibone bg’ababorewe b’Abefurayimu kizobona ibara
Isaiah28:2 Rāba Uhoraho afise umunyenkomezi w’ubushobozi; ni we azobatūra hasi n’inkomezi
Isaiah28:3 Igitsibo c’ubgibone bg’ababorewe b’Abefurayimu kizosiribangwa
Isaiah28:4 kandi n’ishurwe ry’ubgiza bg’icubahiro ciwe rikabiranye
Isaiah28:5 Kur’ uwo musi Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo azobera abantu biwe b’amasigarira igitsibo c’icubahiro n’umugāra w’ubgiza:
Isaiah28:6 n’uwicaye aca imanza azomubera umutima uca iziroranye
Isaiah28:7 Ariko n’Abayuda na bo baradandabagiranywa na vino
Isaiah28:8 Kukw ameza yose yuzuyekw ibirutsi n’ishishi
Isaiah28:9 Uyo azokwigisha nde ubgenge? Kand’ azotahuza ubutumwa nde? Mbega n’abacūtse n’abavuye kw ibere?
Isaiah28:10 Kukw ivyiwe ar’ ibgirizwa ku rindi
Isaiah28:11 Noneho rer’ Uhoraho azovuganira n’ubu bgoko mu kanwa katumvikana no mu rurimi rundi;
Isaiah28:12 ari bgo yari yarabariye
Isaiah28:13 Ni co gituma kuri bo ijambo ry’Uhoraho rizobabera ibgirizwa ku rindi
Isaiah28:14 Nuko rero ni mwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho
Isaiah28:15 Ko muvuga
Isaiah28:16 ni co gitumye Umwami Uhoraho avuga
Isaiah28:17 Kand’ imanza ziroranye ni zo nzogira umugozi ugera
Isaiah28:18 Maz’ isezerano mwasezeranye n’urupfu rizopfa
Isaiah28:19 Uko kizoba gihita kwose kizobafata; kuko kizokwama gihita uko bukeye
Isaiah28:20 Kuk’ uburiri ari bugufi umuntu atoshobora kuburamvyako
Isaiah28:21 Kuk’ Uhoraho azohaguruka nk’uko yahagurutse ku musozi Perasimu
Isaiah28:22 None rero mureke kuba abacokoranyi
Isaiah28:23 Ni mutege amatwi
Isaiah28:24 Mbeg’ umurimyi avyiririra kuzobiba
Isaiah28:25 Iy’ amaze kuyikuma ntahava akamija uburo
Isaiah28:26 Kukw Imana yiwe imwereka neza
Isaiah28:27 Kuk’ uburo budahūzwa imihini ifise ubugi
Isaiah28:28 Mbeg’ impeke z’umutsima mu gusekura barazimenagura? Ereg’ umuntu ntiyokwama arazihūra: mbere naho yozitembagazako ikurudumu y’umukogote wiwe n’amafarasi yiwe
Isaiah28:29 Ivyo na vyo biva k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo
Isaiah29:1 Ewe Ariyeli
Isaiah29:2 maze Ariyeli nzoca mpababaza
Isaiah29:3 Nzogusagazako ngutangatange impande zose
Isaiah29:4 Maz’ uzocishwa bugufi uvugire mw ivu
Isaiah29:5 Arikw ingabo z’abansi bawe zizohava zihinduka nk’umukungugu wiseye
Isaiah29:6 Hazoba guterwa n’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo
Isaiah29:7 Maz’ ingabo z’amahanga yose arwanya Ariyeli
Isaiah29:8 Nuko bizomera nk’umuntu ashonje arota arikw ararya: ngo yikangure agasanga inda iri gusa; canke nk’ūfise inyota arota arikw aranywa: ngo yikangure agasanga akabiranye
Isaiah29:9 Banza muhagarare
Isaiah29:10 Kuk’ Uhoraho abasutsekw impwemu y’uruhuni
Isaiah29:11 Ukwerekwa kwose kwabahindukiye nk’ amajambo yo mu gitabo kimatanishijwe ishashara
Isaiah29:12 maze bagaha ico gitabo ūtazi gusoma
Isaiah29:13 Umwami Imana aravuga
Isaiah29:14 Nuko rero ngira nkore igikorwa c’igitangaza mur’ aba bantu
Isaiah29:15 Bazobona ibara
Isaiah29:16 Ewe bupfu buri hano! Mbeg’ umubumvyi mumuhwanya n’ibumba
Isaiah29:17 Mbega ntihasigaye akanya gato cane
Isaiah29:18 Kur’ uwo musi ibipfamatwi bizokwumva amajambo yo mu gitabo
Isaiah29:19 Kand’ abaciye bugufi na bo bazogwiza umunezero banezererwa Uhoraho
Isaiah29:20 Kuk’ umuntu w’agaterabgoba atituwe
Isaiah29:21 ni bo bacumuza umuntu mw ijambo
Isaiah29:22 None rer’ Uhoraho
Isaiah29:23 Arik’ ubgiwe n’abana biwe ni babona ivyo amaboko yanje akorera hagati muri bo
Isaiah29:24 Kandi n’abazimira mu mitima bazoca ubgenge
Isaiah30:1 Abana b’ibigāba bazobona ibara
Isaiah30:2 bakava hasi ngo bamanuke muri Egiputa batabajije irivuye mu kanwa kanje; ngo bisunge inkomezi za Farawo
Isaiah30:3 Nuko rero za nkomezi za Farawo zizobatētereza
Isaiah30:4 Kukw abaganwa biwe bar’ i Sowani
Isaiah30:5 Bose bazomāramāra kuko bazosanga ar’ abantu batabasha kubagirira ikimazi
Isaiah30:6 Imbūri yo ku bikōko vy’i bumanuko. Baca mu gihugu c’ amagorwa n’umubabaro
Isaiah30:7 Kuko gutabara kwa Egiputa ar’ ubusa
Isaiah30:8 None rero genda
Isaiah30:9 Kukw ar’ ubgoko bg’ibigāba
Isaiah30:10 babarira abamenyi
Isaiah30:11 muve mu nzira mukikame
Isaiah30:12 Ni co gitumye Uwera w’Abisirayeli avuga
Isaiah30:13 ni co gituma ukwo kugabitanya kuzobabera nk’uruzitiro rw’amabuye rurerure rwase umugāga
Isaiah30:14 Kand’ azorusāvya nk’ukw ikibumbano gisāba
Isaiah30:15 Umwami Uhoraho
Isaiah30:16 Yamara mwaravuze
Isaiah30:17 Abantu igihumbi bazokwirukanwa n’akāyaga k’umuntu umwe; akāyaga ka batanu kazotuma muhunga: gushitsa aho muzosigara mumeze nk’igiti kirekire gishinze ku mpinga y’umusozi
Isaiah30:18 Ni kubg’ ivyo Uhoraho ashamaje kugira ngw abagirire ubuntu
Isaiah30:19 Yemwe bantu b’i Siyoni
Isaiah30:20 Kandi nah’ Umwami Imana azobagaburira ivyo kurya vy’amagorwa n’amazi y’amarushwa
Isaiah30:21 kandi ni mwakikamira i buryo cank’ i bumoso
Isaiah30:22 Kandi muzotitura ifeza yometse ku bishushanyo vyanyu vy’ibibāzano
Isaiah30:23 Kand’ azorekurira imvura imbuto muzobiba mu ndimiro
Isaiah30:24 Inka n’indogoba z’imikangara zirima zizorya ivyo kurya birimw’ umunyu
Isaiah30:25 Ku gisozi cose gishizwe hejuru no ku musozi wose muremure hazoba amasōko n’imigezi y’amazi
Isaiah30:26 Kand’ umuco w’ukwezi uzomera nk’uw’ izuba
Isaiah30:27 Eh’ izina ry’Uhoraho riraza rivuye kure
Isaiah30:28 impwemu ziwe zimeze nk’umugezi ushēshe ugashika no mw izosi
Isaiah30:29 Nuko muzogira indirimbo nk’iyo baririmba mw ijoro ku musi mukuru wera; muzogira n’umunezero wo mu mutima nk’uw’ umuntu afise umwironge aja ku musozi w’ Uhoraho
Isaiah30:30 Kand’ Uhoraho azotuma ijwi ryiwe ry’icubahiro ryumvikana
Isaiah30:31 Kukw ijwi ry’Uhoraho rizotuma Abashuri bahababuka
Isaiah30:32 Kand’ ikibando bāgerewe uko kimashuye kwose
Isaiah30:33 Kukw ikirundo c’inkwi citeguwe uhereye kera

Isaiah32:6 Kukw igipfapfa kivuga ivy’ ubupfu

Isaiah32:13 Mu gihugu c’abantu banje hazomera amahwa n’imikēre; mbere bizomera no ku mazu yose banezererwamwo yo ku murwa w’umunezero;

Isaiah33:1 Uzobona ibara
Isaiah33:2 Ewe Uhoraho
Isaiah33:3 Amoko ahungishijwe n’ijwi ryo guhūrīra; kubgo guhaguruka kwawe amahanga arasābagiye.
Isaiah33:4 Bazovumbura iminyago mwanyaze nk’ukw inzige zivumbura
Isaiah33:5 Uhoraho ashizwe hejuru nk’uko yibera iyo hejuru: yuzuza i Siyoni ibiroranye n’ubugororotsi.
Isaiah33:6 Mu bihe vyawe hazobah’ umutēkāno
Isaiah33:7 Ehe
Isaiah33:8 Inzira z’iroro zirasivye
Isaiah33:9 Igihugu kiriganyira
Isaiah33:10 Uhoraho aravuga
Isaiah33:11 Muzosama inda y’umuguruka
Isaiah33:12 Amahanga azoturirwa nk’uko baturira ishwagara; azomera nk’igiteme c’amahwa
Isaiah33:13 Yemwe abari kure
Isaiah33:14 Abanyavyaha b’i Siyoni baratinye; agatengo gafashe giturumbuka abatubaha Imana. Muri twebge ni nde yoshobora kubana n’umuriro utongora

Isaiah49:11 Imisozi yanje yose nzoyihindura inzira

Isaiah49:14 Ariko Siyoni ho haravuga
Isaiah49:15 Mbeg’ umugore yokwibagira umwana akiri kw ibere
Isaiah49:16 Ehe ngushushanije mu biganza vyanje; inzitiro zawe ndazihozakw amaso.
Isaiah49:17 Abana bawe baza bihuta; abāguhoneje n’abāguhinduye amatongo bazokuvamwo bagende.
Isaiah49:18 Unamura amaso urābe impande zose: ba bandi bose barakoranye
Isaiah49:19 Kukw amatongo yawe n’ imisaka yawe n’igihugu cawe cāgeshejwe

Isaiah49:26 Kand’ abaguhahaza nzobagaburira inyama zabo ubgabo

Isaiah50:2 Mbeg’ aho naza
Isaiah50:3 Nambika ijuru ukwirabura

Isaiah50:6 Abankubita nabategeye ibitugu
Isaiah50:7 Arik’ Umwami Uhoraho arantabara
Isaiah50:8 Ūntsindishiriza ari hafi; non’ uwombūranya ni nde? Ngo tuve hasi duhagararane: umubūranyi wanje ni nde? N’aze tubangikane.
Isaiah50:9 Rāba Umwami Uhoraho ni we azompagarikira; non’ uwontsindisha ni nde? Ereg’ abo bose bazosāza nk’impuzu; inyenzi zizobarya zibamare.
Isaiah50:10 Ni nde muri mwebge yubaha Uhoraho
Isaiah50:11 Umve mwese abacana umuriro

Isaiah51:9 Ikangure

Isaiah51:11 Nukw abācunguwe n’Uhoraho bazogaruka

Isaiah52:6 Nuko rer’ abantu banje bazomenya izina ryanje; kur’ uwo musi bazomenya kw ari jewe mvuga: mbere ni jewe nyene.
Isaiah52:7 Ereg’ ibirenge vy’ūzanye inkuru nziza ni vyiza ku misozi
Isaiah52:8 Ijwi ry’abashibamyi bawe! Bashize hejuru bavugiriza impundu hamwe; bazovyibonera imbonankubone aho Uhoraho azogaruka i Siyoni.

Isaiah54:5 Kuko jewe Umuremyi wawe ari jewe mugabo wawe; Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ni ryo zina ryanje; Uwera w’Abisirayeli ni jewe Mucunguzi wawe; nzokwitwa Imana y’isi yose.

Isaiah57:1 Umugororotsi arikw araherengetera
Isaiah57:2 ashitse mu mahoro; umuntu wese muri bo yagendera mu nzira igororotse ashitse mu buruhukiro bgiwe.

Isaiah57:6 Mu nguru ziba mu mwonga ni ho har’ umugabane wawe; izo nyene ni zo mugabane wawe; izo ni zo wūhiye ishikanwa ry’ibiturire
Isaiah57:7 Ku musozi muremure ni ho wubatse uburiri bgawe; kandi ni ho wadūga
Isaiah57:8 Kandi washize icibutso cawe inyuma y’inzugi n’ibishimaryango; kuko wampemukiye
Isaiah57:9 Washengereye umwami ujanye amavuta atāmirana n’imbazi wagwijije; utuma intumwa zawe kure

Isaiah57:12 Nzoserura ukugororoka kwawe n’ibikorwa vyawe; ariko ntibizogira ico bigufasha.

Isaiah65:24 Maze batarampamagara nzobitaba

Isaiah66:1 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize
Isaiah66:2 Kukw ivyo vyose intoke zanje ari zo zabiremye
Isaiah66:3 Ūkerera inka
Isaiah66:4 None nanje nzobatoraniriza amagorwa
Isaiah66:5 Ni mwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho
Isaiah66:6 Umve urwānāga rwumvikana ku murwa
Isaiah66:7 Siyoni hatararamukwa haravyara
Isaiah66:8 Ni nde yigeze kwumva ibimeze birtyo? Ni nde yigeze kubona ibisa birtyo? Mbeg’ igihugu covukira umusi umwe? Ihanga ryovyarirwa icarimwe? Ariko Siyoni ho habaye hakiramukwa haca havyara abana.
Isaiah66:9 Mbega notuma baramukwa
Isaiah66:10 Munezeranwe n’i Yerusalemu
Isaiah66:11 kugira ngo mwonke
Isaiah66:12 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho agize
Isaiah66:13 Nk’uk’ umwana ahūmurizwa na nyina ni ko nzobahūmuriza; kandi muzohūmuririzwa i Yerusalemu.
Isaiah66:14 Muzobibona
Isaiah66:15 Kuk’ Uhoraho azozanana n’ umuriro
Isaiah66:16 Kuk’ Uhoraho azocira abantu bose amateka
Isaiah66:17 Abiyeza bakiyuhagira kugira ngo baje mu bigabiro barōngōye
Isaiah66:18 Kuko nzi ibikorwa vyabo n’ ivyiyumviro vyabo. Igihe kigiye kuza nzokoranya amahanga yose n’ab’ indimi zose; bazoza babone ubgiza bganje.
Isaiah66:19 Kandi nzoshira ikimenyetso muri bo
Isaiah66:20 Nuko bazozana bene wanyu bose babakūye mu mahanga yose kw ishikanwa ryanje Uhoraho
Isaiah66:21 Kandi nzorobanuramwo bamwe mbagire abaherezi n’Abalewi
Isaiah66:22 Kuko nk’ukw ijuru risha n’isi nsha
Isaiah66:23 Igihe kizoza uhereye mu mboneko z’ukwezi ukageza mu mboneko z’ukundi
Isaiah66:24 Nuko bazosohoka baje kwitegereza imivyimba y’abangararije; kukw inyo zabo zitazopfa
Jeremiah1:1 Amajambo ya Yeremiya mwene Hilukiya
Jeremiah1:2 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri we mu mwaka ugira icumi na gatatu Yosiya mwene Amoni
Jeremiah1:3 Kandi ryongera kuza no ku ngoma ya Yehoyakimu mwene Yosiya
Jeremiah1:4 Nukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako
Jeremiah1:5 riti Ntarakubumbira mu nda nari ndakuzi
Jeremiah1:6 Maze ndavuga
Jeremiah1:7 Arik’ Uhoraho arambarira
Jeremiah1:8 Ntuz’ ugire ubgoba kubgabo
Jeremiah1:9 Maz’ Uhoraho arāmvura ukuboko ankora ku munwa; Uhoraho arambarira
Jeremiah1:10 Rāba uyu musi ngushizeho kugira ubushobozi ku mahanga no ku bihugu vy’abami
Jeremiah1:11 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako
Jeremiah1:12 Maz’ Uhoraho aranyishura
Jeremiah1:13 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako ubugira kabiri
Jeremiah1:14 Nuk’ Uhoraho arambarira
Jeremiah1:15 Kuko rāba
Jeremiah1:16 Nanje nzokwātamīra amateka mbaciriye kubg’ ibibi vyabo vyose bākoze; kuko bāndetse
Jeremiah1:17 None rero wewe va hasi ukenyere
Jeremiah1:18 Kuko rāba
Jeremiah1:19 Bazokurwanya
Jeremiah2:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako
Jeremiah2:2 riti Genda usemererere mu matwi y’ab’ i Yerusalemu
Jeremiah2:3 Isirayeli yar’ uwo nirobanuriye
Jeremiah2:4 Ni mwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho
Jeremiah2:5 uku ni k’Uhoraho agize
Jeremiah2:6 Ko batārushe bībaza
Jeremiah2:7 Ushime nabashikanye mu gihugu cama kirumbuka
Jeremiah2:8 Abaherezi ntibārushe bībaza
Jeremiah2:9 Ni co gitumye nzokomeza kubūrana namwe
Jeremiah2:10 Enda ni mujabuke ku bizinga vy’i Kitimu
Jeremiah2:11 Mbega harih’ ihanga ryigeze gukāba imana zaryo
Jeremiah2:12 Ni mwumirwe
Jeremiah2:13 kukw abantu banje bakoze ibibi bibiri: bataye jewe
Jeremiah2:14 Mbega Isirayeli n’umuja yaguzwe? Mbega yavukiye mu buja? None n’iki gitumye acika inyama z’ibisīga?
Jeremiah2:15 Imigunza y’intambge yamwivugiyeko irenza amajwi
Jeremiah2:16 Abantu b’i Nofu n’i Tahapanesi bākujonjanze agahanga.
Jeremiah2:17 Mbega si wewe wavyihamagariye
Jeremiah2:18 None rero n’iki kikujanye mu nzira ija muri Egiputa
Jeremiah2:19 Ivyaha vyawe ni vyo bizogukubita
Jeremiah2:20 Kuk’ uhereye kera wavunnye ingōgo yawe
Jeremiah2:21 Yamara nari naguteye ur’ umuzabibu w’ubgoko
Jeremiah2:22 Naho wokwiyuhagiza ivyitwa amagadi
Jeremiah2:23 Uvuga ute
Jeremiah2:24 ur’ indogoba y’inyeshamba imenyereye ubugaragwa
Jeremiah2:25 Enda ni wirinde
Jeremiah2:26 Nk’ukw igisuma kimāramāra iyo gifashwe
Jeremiah2:27 ababgira ikigegene
Jeremiah2:28 None se za mana zawe wironkeye ziri hehe? Ni zihaguruke
Jeremiah2:29 N’iki kibagombesha kubūrana nanje? Mwese mwarancumuyeko
Jeremiah2:30 Nakubise abo mu gihugu canyu
Jeremiah2:31 Yemwe runganwe rw’iki gihe
Jeremiah2:32 Mbeg’ umwigeme yoshobora kwibagira utugenegene twiwe? Cank’ umugeni yokwibagira umwitwikiro wiwe? Arikw abantu banje bānyibagiye imisi myinshi itoharūrwa.
Jeremiah2:33 Ewe kuntu ugira amīsīgiranzira kugira ngo bakugomwe! Bitayeko wahavuye wigisha n’abagore b’abanyavyaha ingeso zawe!
Jeremiah2:34 Mbere no ku mpuzu zawe haboneka amaraso y’abantu b’abakene wishe batagira igicumuro
Jeremiah2:35 Ariko naho bimeze birtyo
Jeremiah2:36 Ukubagiranira iki guhindura inzira yawe? Egiputa hazogutētereza
Jeremiah2:37 Na ho nyene uzovayo witwaye impungenge; jewe Uhoraho ko nagaye abo wishimiye

Jeremiah3:2 Unamurira amaso ku mpinga mu ruharabuga
Jeremiah3:3 Ni co gitumye imvura ibuzwa
Jeremiah3:4 Mbe ntiwoca uhēra ubu ukantakambira
Jeremiah3:5 uti Mbeg’ uzohorana uburake imisi yose? Uzobgamana gushitsa kw iherezo? Mbega si wewe wavuze ibintu bibi
Jeremiah3:6 Kandi ku ngoma y’umwami Yosiya
Jeremiah3:7 Amaze gukora ivyo vyose
Jeremiah3:8 Mmaze kwirukana Isirayeli Inamusubiranyuma

Jeremiah3:12 Genda uvuge aya majambo werekeye i burārūko
Jeremiah3:13 Pfa kwemera gusa ukugabitanya kwawe
Jeremiah3:14 Garuka
Jeremiah3:15 mbahe abungere bameze nk’uk’ umutima wanje ugomba
Jeremiah3:16 Maze mur’ iyo misi
Jeremiah3:17 Ico gihe bazokwita Yerusalemu intebe y’ubgami bganje
Jeremiah3:18 Mur’ iyo misi ab’ inzu ya Yuda bazogendana n’ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli
Jeremiah3:19 Ariko narībajije

Jeremiah3:23 N’ukuri kwishimira ugutabarwa kuva ku misozi n’ukw’ ubusa
Jeremiah3:24 Arik’ uhereye no mu buto bgacu

Jeremiah5:9 Mbeg’ ivyo ntibizotuma nisidukira? ni k’Uhoraho abaza; mbeg’ ivyo umutima wanje ntuzobihōra ubgoko bumeze burtyo?

Jeremiah5:20 Mutāngāze ibi ku b’inzu ya Yakobo
Jeremiah5:21 mut’ Enda ni mwumve ibi
Jeremiah5:22 muti Mbega nta n’ukuruha mumutinya? ni k’Uhoraho abajije; muti Nta guhindira agashitsi imbere yiwe
Jeremiah5:23 Yamar’ ubu bgoko bgo bufise umutima ugarariza
Jeremiah5:24 Nta ho bīvuganya mu mitima
Jeremiah5:25 Mut’ Ibigabitanyo vyanyu ni vyo bibujije ivyo
Jeremiah5:26 Muti Kuko mu bantu biwe habonekamw’ abantu b’abanyakibi: baratega nk’ukw abatezi b’inyoni batega; batega umutego
Jeremiah5:27 Nk’ukw igisamba cokwuzuzwa izo nyoni
Jeremiah5:28 Bacitse ibisēme
Jeremiah5:29 Mbeg’ ivyo ntibizotuma nisidukira? ni jewe Uhoraho mbibajije; mbeg’ umutima wanje ntuzohōra ubgoko bumeze burtyo?
Jeremiah5:30 Habonetse ikintu c’akumiza giteye ubgoba mu gihugu:
Jeremiah5:31 ba kamenyi bavuga ibinyoma
