Jeremiah7:4 Ntimwizigire amagambo y’ibinyoma
Jeremiah7:5 Erega ni mwatunganya ingeso zanyu n’ibikorwa vyanyu
Jeremiah7:6 ni mudahahaza ingenzi cank’ impfuvyi cank’ umupfakazi
Jeremiah7:7 nuko nanje nzobabesha aha hantu
Jeremiah7:8 Mbega ko mwizigiye amagambo y’ibinyoma adafise ikimazi!
Jeremiah7:9 Mbega birashoboka ko mwiba
Jeremiah7:10 maze mukaza mugahagarara imbere yanje mur’ iyi ngoro yitirirwa izina ryanje
Jeremiah7:11 Non’ iyi ngoro yitirirwa izina ryanje

Jeremiah7:13 Kandi none

Jeremiah7:15 Kandi nzobahinda mbirukane mu nyonga zanje

Jeremiah7:19 Mbega ni jewe baritera gusa? Si bo baryitera

Jeremiah7:22 Kukw ata co nabariye ba sogokuruza banyu

Jeremiah7:26 ariko na ho nyene ntibānyumvira
Jeremiah7:27 Nawe naho wobabgira ayo majambo yose ntibazokwumva; kandi naho wobahamagara ntibazokwitaba.
Jeremiah7:28 Ubabgire
Jeremiah7:29 Ni wiharangure umushatsi
Jeremiah7:30 Kuk’ uruvyaro rwa Yuda bakoze ibibi mu nyonga zanje
Jeremiah7:31 Batavye ibitabo i Tofeti
Jeremiah7:32 None rer’ umve

Jeremiah8:4 Kand’ ubabgire
Jeremiah8:5 None rero n’iki cashubije inyuma aba bantu b’i Yerusalemu
Jeremiah8:6 Narateze ugutwi ndumviriza
Jeremiah8:7 Mber’ igisīga sarumfune co mu kirēre kizi ibihe vyaco cāgerewe

Jeremiah8:13 Nzobanzura rwose

Jeremiah8:17 Ehe ngira ndungike inzoka z’imvuvyi muri mwebge
Jeremiah8:18 Icompa nkabona uko nomarwa umubabaro! Umutima wanje undendebukiyemwo.

Jeremiah9:9 Mbeg’ ivyo ntibizotuma nisidukira? ni jewe Uhoraho mbibajije; mbeg’ umutima wanje ntuzobihōra ubgoko bumeze burtyo?

Jeremiah9:11 Kand’ i Yerusalemu nzohahindura ibirundo vy’amasakamburira

Jeremiah9:14 ariko bakagendera mu budadarare bg’imitima yabo

Jeremiah10:5 Ben’ ivyo bishushanyo bisa n’ibikanganyoni bishinzwe mu mirima
Jeremiah10:6 Nta gihwanye nawe
Jeremiah10:7 Ni nde atogutinya ga Mwami w’amahanga? kuko bikubereye; kuko mu banyabgenge bose bo mu mahanga
Jeremiah10:8 Ariko bose uko bangana n’ibiyingiyingi n’ibipfu; ukwigisha kw’igishushanyo guhwanye n’igiti buti.

Jeremiah10:10 Arik’ Uhoraho ni we Mana y’ukuri; ni we Mana nzima

Jeremiah10:12 Rurema ni yo yaremesheje isi ubushobozi bgayo
Jeremiah10:13 iy’ ishize ijwi hejuru haba gusūma kw’amazi yo hejuru; irandisha ibipfungu bikava ku mpera y’isi; iremera imvura imiravyo
Jeremiah10:14 Non’ umuntu wese kw ar’ ikiyingiyingi ata bgenge agira! Umucuzi w’izahabu wese azotēterezwa n’igishushanyo ciwe yasaruye

Jeremiah11:1 Ijambo rivuye k’Uhoraho riza kuri Yeremiya
Jeremiah11:2 riti Ni mwumve amajambo y’iri sezerano
Jeremiah11:3 ubabgire
Jeremiah11:4 iryo nihanikirije ba sogokuruza ku musi nabakūriye mu gihugu ca Egiputa
Jeremiah11:5 kugira ngo mbone gushitsa indahiro narahiye ba sogokuruza
Jeremiah11:6 Maz’ Uhoraho arambarira
Jeremiah11:7 Kuko nihanikirije rwose ba sogokuruza banyu
Jeremiah11:8 Yamara ntibānyumvira
Jeremiah11:9 Uhoraho arambarira
Jeremiah11:10 Bahindukiriye ibigabitanyo vya ba sekuruza bāhora banka kwumva amajambo yanje; bakurikiye izindi mana ngw abe ari zo basaba: ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli n’ab’ inzu ya Yuda bishe isezerano ryanje nasezeranye na ba sekuruza.
Jeremiah11:11 Nuko rero nzobazanakw ivyago batazoshobora gukira
Jeremiah11:12 Maz’ ibisagara vy’i Buyuda n’ababa i Yerusalemu bazogenda gutakambira imana bāhora bosereza imibavu: ariko ntizizobakiza na gatoya mu gihe c’ivyago vyabo.
Jeremiah11:13 Kuk’ ukw ibisagara vyawe bingana
Jeremiah11:14 None rero ntusengere ubu bgoko
Jeremiah11:15 Mbeg’ inkundwakazi yanje igikora iki mu nzu yanje
Jeremiah11:16 Jewe Uhoraho nari nakwise igiti ca elayo kiremvye giteye igomwe
Jeremiah11:17 Kuko jewe Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo nari narakubaditse
Jeremiah11:18 Maz’ Uhoraho
Jeremiah11:19 Ariko nari mmeze nk’umwagazi w’intama w’ikirīga ujanwa kubāgwa; sinari nzi yuko bampigiye imihigo
Jeremiah11:20 Ariko
Jeremiah11:21 None rero
Jeremiah11:22 uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize rero
Jeremiah11:23 ntihazoba hakiri n’amasigarira muri bo

Jeremiah12:2 Warababaditse

Jeremiah12:4 Igihugu kizogeza ryari kuboroga
Jeremiah12:5 Ko wirukanye n’abiruka ku maguru bakakuruhisha
Jeremiah12:6 Kuko na bene wanyu n’inzu ya so ari bo nyene bakuryarutse; ni bo nyene bakuvuza induru inyuma: nawe ntuz’ ubemerere
Jeremiah12:7 Nahevye inzu yanje
Jeremiah12:8 Ishamvu yanje yampindukiye nk’intambge yo mu kibira: irantontomeye
Jeremiah12:9 Mbeg’ ishamvu yanje ntiyampindukiye nk’ igisīga c’amabara y’uruyoberane? Mbeg’ ibindi bisīga ntivyagikonganije impande zose? Ni mugende mukoranye ibikōko vyo mw ishamba vyose

Jeremiah12:11 Bāhagize amatongo; haramborogera

Jeremiah12:13 Bābivye ingano
Jeremiah12:14 Uku ni ko mvuze

Jeremiah12:17 Ariko ni banka kwumva
Jeremiah13:1 Uku ni k’Uhoraho yambariye
Jeremiah13:2 Nuko ngura umukanda nk’ukw ijambo ry’ Uhoraho ryambariye

Jeremiah13:4 riti Jana wa mukanda wagura
Jeremiah13:5 Nuko ndagenda

Jeremiah13:7 Nuko ndagenda nja kuri Efurate

Jeremiah13:9 rit’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize

Jeremiah14:14 Uhoraho aranyishura

Jeremiah14:18 Iyo nsohotse nkaja ku gahinga

Jeremiah14:22 Mu bigirwamana vy’imburakimazi vy’ amahanga har’ ivyoshobora kurekura imvura? Cank’ ijuru ubgaryo ryoshobora kurekura iy’ umurindi? Mbeg’ ūbishobora si wewe Uhoraho Mana yacu? Ni co gituma tukwitega; kukw ari wewe waremye ivyo vyose.

Jeremiah25:1 Ijambo ryaje kuri Yeremiya ku vy’abantu bose b’i Buyuda mu mwaka ugira kane Yehoyakimu mwene Yosiya
Jeremiah25:2 Iryo ni ryo Yeremiya uwavugishwa n’Imana yabariye abantu bose b’i Buyuda
Jeremiah25:3 at’ Uhereye mu mwaka ugira icumi na gatatu wa Yosiya mwene Amoni
Jeremiah25:4 Kand’ Uhoraho yabatumyekw abasavyi biwe bose abo yavugisha
Jeremiah25:5 at’ Enda ni mugaruke
Jeremiah25:6 Kandi ntimugakurikire izindi mana ngo muzisabe
Jeremiah25:7 Ariko mwebge ntimwanyumviye
Jeremiah25:8 None rero
Jeremiah25:9 nzotuma kugomora imiryango yose y’i burārūko
Jeremiah25:10 Ikindi
Jeremiah25:11 Kand’ iki gihugu cose kizoba amatongo n’akajoreza; kand’ ayo mahanga azokorera umwami w’i Babuloni imyaka mirongwirindwi.
Jeremiah25:12 Hanyuma y’ivyo
Jeremiah25:13 Kandi nzoshitsa kur’ ico gihugu amajambo yanje yose y’ivyo nakigeneye
Jeremiah25:14 Kandi na bo ubgabo amahanga menshi n’abami bahambaye bazobahindura abaja; kandi nzoba mbashubirije mu nkōko ibihwanye n’ivyo bākoze
Jeremiah25:15 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho ambariye
Jeremiah25:16 Bazokinywa badandabagirane
Jeremiah25:17 Nuko nābīra igikombe mu kuboko kw’ Uhoraho
Jeremiah25:18 ni yo aya: Yerusalemu n’ibisagara vy’i Buyuda n’abami baho n’abaganwa baho
Jeremiah25:19 nkiramiza Farawo
Jeremiah25:20 bo n’amahanga yose y’ikivange
Jeremiah25:21 n’i Edomu n’i Mowabu n’ab’ umuryango wa Amoni
Jeremiah25:22 nkiramiza n’abami bose b’i Tiro n’abami bose b’i Sidoni
Jeremiah25:23 n’i Dedani n’i Tema n’i Buzi; n’abica amasoso bose;
Jeremiah25:24 n’ abami bose b’i Arabiya
Jeremiah25:25 n’abami bose b’i Zimuri
Jeremiah25:26 n’abami bose b’i burārūko
Jeremiah25:27 Kand’ uz’ ubabarire
Jeremiah25:28 Maze ni baramuka banse kwābīra igikombe mu kuboko kwawe ngo banywe
Jeremiah25:29 ko ntanguriye ku gisagara citiriwe izina ryanje kuhazana ivyago
Jeremiah25:30 Nuko rero
Jeremiah25:31 Ijwi ryavyo rizoshika no ku mpera y’isi; kuk’ Uhoraho afitaniye imibūrano n’amahanga
Jeremiah25:32 Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize
Jeremiah25:33 Abishwe n’Uhoraho bazohēra ku mpera y’isi bashike ku yindi
Jeremiah25:34 Muboroge
Jeremiah25:35 Abungere ntibazobona inzira yo guhunga
Jeremiah25:36 Umve ijwi ry’ ukurira kw’abungere
Jeremiah25:37 Impongore zār’ amahoro zisigaye zumaniwe
Jeremiah25:38 Yahevye ahiwe nk’ukw intambge iheba ikibundo cayo; kukw igihugu cabo gihindutse akajoreza kubg’ ubukare bg’inkota itwaza igitugu
Jeremiah26:1 Mu matangura yo kuba ku ngoma kwa Yehoyakimu mwene Yosiya umwami w’Abayuda
Jeremiah26:2 rit’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize
Jeremiah26:3 Kumbure bohava bumva
Jeremiah26:4 Kand’ ubabarire
Jeremiah26:5 ngo mwumvire amajambo y’ abasavyi biwe avugisha
Jeremiah26:6 ngo Ni ho azohindura iyi ngoro kuba nk’i Shilo
Jeremiah26:7 Maz’ abaherezi na ba kamenyi n’ abantu bose bumva Yeremiya avugira ayo majambo yose mu ngoro y’Uhoraho.
Jeremiah26:8 Nuko Yeremiya aheraheje kuvuga vyose Uhoraho yamugeze kubarira abantu bose
Jeremiah26:9 N’iki kikuvugisha mw izina ry’Uhoraho ngw Iyi ngoro izomera nk’i Shilo
Jeremiah26:10 Maz’ abaganwa b’i Buyuda bumvise ivyo
Jeremiah26:11 Maz’ abaherezi na ba kamenyi babarira abaganwa n’abantu bose
Jeremiah26:12 Maze Yeremiya abarira abaganwa bose n’abantu bose
Jeremiah26:13 None rero mutunganye ingeso zanyu n’ibikorwa vyanyu
Jeremiah26:14 Ariko jeho ndi mu maboko yanyu: mungire nk’uko mubona ko bikwiye kandi bibereye mu maso yanyu.
Jeremiah26:15 Kimwe gusa
Jeremiah26:16 Maz’ abaganwa n’abantu bose babarira abaherezi n’abo ba kamenyi
Jeremiah26:17 Maze hava hasi bamwe bo mu bashingantahe b’igihugu
Jeremiah26:18 bati Mika w’i Moresheti yavugishwa n’Imana ku ngoma ya Hezekiya umwami w’i Buyuda; kandi yabariye abantu bose b’i Buyuda
Jeremiah26:19 Mbega Hezekiya umwami w’i Buyuda n’Abayuda bose mugira ngo bāramwishe? Hezekiya ntiyaciye atinya Uhoraho
Jeremiah26:20 Kandi hāri n’uwundi yavugishwa mw izina ry’Uhoraho
Jeremiah26:21 Maz’ umwami Yehoyakimu n’intōre ziwe zose n’abaganwa bose
Jeremiah26:22 nuk’ umwami Yehoyakimu atuma abantu muri Egiputa
Jeremiah26:23 bakwega Uriya bamukūra muri Egiputa
Jeremiah26:24 Ariko Ahikamu mwene Shafani atabara Yeremiya

Jeremiah27:2 riti Rondera imvuto n’ingōgo
Jeremiah27:3 ibindi ubirungikire umwami w’i Edomu
Jeremiah27:4 ubatume amajambo bashīra ba shebuja
Jeremiah27:5 mut’ Uhoraho agize ngo Ni jewe naremye isi

Jeremiah28:6 Yeremiya ūvugishwa n’Imana aravuga

Jeremiah35:4 mbinjiza mu ngoro y’Uhoraho

Jeremiah35:6 Na bo baravuga

Jeremiah36:1 Mu mwaka ugira kane Yehoyakimu mwene Yosiya umwami w’i Buyuda ari ku ngoma
Jeremiah36:2 rit’ Abīra umuzingo w’igitabo
Jeremiah36:3 Kumbure ab’ inzu ya Yuda bokwumva ivyago vyose nageneye kubatēza
Jeremiah36:4 Nuko Yeremiya ahamagara Baruki mwene Neriya; maze Baruki yandika amajambo yose y’ Uhoraho mu muzingo w’igitabo
Jeremiah36:5 Nuko Yeremiya abarira Baruki
Jeremiah36:6 nuko rero wewe genda usome mur’ uwo muzingo amajambo y’Uhoraho wanditse ukūye mu kanwa kanje
Jeremiah36:7 Kumbure bokwitwara k’Uhoraho
Jeremiah36:8 Nuko Baruki mwene Neriya akora vyose nk’uk’ ūvugishwa n’Imana Yeremiya yamubariye
Jeremiah36:9 Maze mu mwaka ugira gatanu Yehoyakimu mwene Yosiya umwami w’i Buyuda ari ku ngoma
Jeremiah36:10 Nuko Baruki asoma muri ca gitabo amajambo ya Yeremiya ahagaze mu ngoro y’Uhoraho
Jeremiah36:11 Maze Mikaya mwene Gemariya
Jeremiah36:12 aramanuka aja mu ngoro y’umwami
Jeremiah36:13 Nuko Mikaya abatondera amajambo yose yumvise
Jeremiah36:14 Nukw abo baganwa bose batuma Yehudi mwene Netaniya
Jeremiah36:15 Baramubgira
Jeremiah36:16 Nuko bumvise amajambo yose
Jeremiah36:17 Babaza Baruki
Jeremiah36:18 Nuko Baruki arabishura
Jeremiah36:19 Maz’ abo baganwa babarira Baruki
Jeremiah36:20 Baja ah’ umwami ari mw irebe
Jeremiah36:21 Nuk’ umwami atuma Yehudi kuzana uwo muzingo: awuzana awukūye mu cumba ca Elishama umukarani. Nuko Yehudi awusomera umwami n’abaganwa bose bāri bahagaze i ruhande yiwe.
Jeremiah36:22 Kand’ umwami yar’ avyagiye mu ngoro yabamwo mu gihe c’ imbeho; hāri mu kwezi kw’icenda. Imbere yiwe hār’ umuriro mu coto.
Jeremiah36:23 Nuko Yehudi amaze gusoma impapuro zitatu canke zine
Jeremiah36:24 Kandi nta bgoba bāgira
Jeremiah36:25 Yamara Elunatani na Delaya na Gemariya bari binginze umwami ngo ntaturire uwo muzingo: yanka kubumva.
Jeremiah36:26 Maz’ umwami abarira Yerameyeli umwana w’umwami na Seraya mwene Aziriyeli
Jeremiah36:27 Hanyuma ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri Yeremiya
Jeremiah36:28 riti Subira wābīre uwundi muzingo
Jeremiah36:29 Kandi ku vya Yehoyakimu umwami w’i Buyuda uvuge
Jeremiah36:30 Nuko rero
Jeremiah36:31 Kandi nzomuhanana n’uruvyaro rwiwe n’abasavyi biwe
Jeremiah36:32 Nuko Yeremiya yābīra uwundi muzingo
Jeremiah37:1 Zedekiya mwene Yosiya aja ku ngoma mu gishingo ca Koniya mwene Yehoyakimu
Jeremiah37:2 Ariko ntiyumvira amajambo y’Uhoraho ayo yavugisha Yeremiya
Jeremiah37:3 Maz’ umwami Zedekiya atuma Yehukali mwene Shelemiya na Zefaniya mwene Mayaseya umuherezi kuri Yeremiya uwavugishwa n’Imana
Jeremiah37:4 Kandi Yeremiya yar’ acigendagendera mu bandi bantu
Jeremiah37:5 Kand’ ingabo za Farawo zari zije zivuye muri Egiputa: maz’ Abakaludaya bari bugarije i Yerusalemu bumvise inkuru zavyo
Jeremiah37:6 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kur’ uwo yavugisha Yeremiya
Jeremiah37:7 rit’ Uku ni k’ Uhoraho agize

Jeremiah37:16 Nuko Yeremiya amaze gushika mw ibohero

Jeremiah49:12 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho agize
Jeremiah49:13 Kuko nirahiye ubganje
Jeremiah49:14 Numvise inkuru zivuye k’ Uhoraho
Jeremiah49:15 Kuko rāba
Jeremiah49:16 Gutera ubgoba kwawe n’ubgibone bgo mu mutima wawe vyaraguhenze
Jeremiah49:17 Kandi Edomu hazohinduka akajoreza: ūzohaca wese azojorerwa
Jeremiah49:18 Nk’ukw i Sodomu n’i Gomora vyabaye
Jeremiah49:19 Eh’ azodūga nk’intambge ivuye kuri Yorodani iyo rwigize akagabo
Jeremiah49:20 Nuko rero ni mwumve inama Uhoraho yarunduye kuri Edomu
Jeremiah49:21 Isi ihindishwa agashitsi no kwumva ugusenyerana kwabo; amarūru yabo yumvikana gushitsa ku Kiyaga Gitukura.
Jeremiah49:22 Eh’ azodūga aguruke nk’inkukuma
Jeremiah49:23 Ivy’ i Damasiko. I Hamati haratēterewe
Jeremiah49:24 I Damasiko haradendebukiwe
Jeremiah49:25 Mbega n’ iki catumye igisagara c’ishimwe kitāzigurijwe
Jeremiah49:26 Ni co gitumye imisore yaho izohindikirana mu nzira zaho
Jeremiah49:27 Nzokwanda umuriro uruzitiro rw’i Damasiko
Jeremiah49:28 Ivy’ i Kedari
Jeremiah49:29 Bazonyaga amahema yabo n’ imikuku yabo
Jeremiah49:30 Muhunge
Jeremiah49:31 Ni muhaguruke mudūge
Jeremiah49:32 Ingamiya zabo zizoba iminyago
Jeremiah49:33 Kand’ i Hazori hazoba i wabo w’imbgebge
Jeremiah49:34 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryaje kuri Yeremiya uwavugishwa na we
Jeremiah49:35 rit’ Uku ni k’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize
Jeremiah49:36 Kandi nzohuruza kuri Elamu imiyaga ine iturutse ku mpande zine z’ijuru
Jeremiah49:37 Nzotera Abelamu agatengo imbere y’abansi babo
Jeremiah49:38 Nzoshinga intebe yanje y’ubgami i Elamu
Jeremiah49:39 Yamara mu misi yo hanyuma nzotuma Abelamu bahindukira bave mu kinyago
Jeremiah50:1 Ijambo Uhoraho yavuze ku vy’i Babuloni
Jeremiah50:2 Mubitāngāze mu mahanga
Jeremiah50:3 Kukw i burārūko hazoturuka ihanga rije kuhatera
Jeremiah50:4 Kuko mur’ iyo misi no mur’ ico gihe
Jeremiah50:5 Bazobaza ivy’ i Siyoni bahērekeje amaso
Jeremiah50:6 Abantu banje bābaye intama zizimiye; abungere babo bārabajimije
Jeremiah50:7 Abābabonye bose bāgiye babatsontsomera; abarwanizi babo bāvuze
Jeremiah50:8 Muhunge muve hagati y’i Babuloni
Jeremiah50:9 Kuko rāba
Jeremiah50:10 I Bukaludaya hazohinduka isahu: abahasahura bose bazohāga
Jeremiah50:11 Kuko vyabanezereye
Jeremiah50:12 nuko rero nyoko azogira ibitētērwa vyinshi
Jeremiah50:13 Kubg’ uburake bg’ Uhoraho ntihazosubira kugerērwa
Jeremiah50:14 Mwebge mwese abarashi
Jeremiah50:15 Muhīrahire mur’ irya n’ino; hazokoma amashi
Jeremiah50:16 Murandure i Babuloni umubivyi
Jeremiah50:17 Abisirayeli n’intama zisābagiye; intambge zarabasanzaje: umwami w’i Ashuri ni we yabanje kubarotsa
Jeremiah50:18 Nuko rero
Jeremiah50:19 Kandi nzogarukana Abisirayeli mu canya cabo
Jeremiah50:20 Mur’ iyo misi no mur’ ico gihe
Jeremiah50:21 Dūga utere igihugu c’i Meratayimu
Jeremiah50:22 Akarūru k’ intambara kari mu gihugu
Jeremiah50:23 Ewe kuntu ya nyundo yar’ igeramiye isi yose ivunitse
Jeremiah50:24 Naguteze umutego
Jeremiah50:25 Uhoraho yuguruye ububīko bg’ibirwanishwa vyiwe
Jeremiah50:26 Ni muze muhatere
Jeremiah50:27 Ni mwice amakombe yaho yose; n’amanuke aje kubāgwa. Babonye ibara! Kuk’ umusi wabo washitse
Jeremiah50:28 Ni mwumve ingene bahunga
Jeremiah50:29 Ni muhamagare abarashi bakoranire kurwanya Babuloni
Jeremiah50:30 Ni co gitumye imisore yaho izohindikirana mu nzira zaho
Jeremiah50:31 Ehe tuzohigūra twe nawe
Jeremiah50:32 Umunyabgibone azotsitara atembe
Jeremiah50:33 Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize
Jeremiah50:34 Arik’ Umucunguzi wabo arakomeye: Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ni ryo zina ryiwe; azobītsa mu manza zabo
Jeremiah50:35 Inkota iri ku Bakaludaya
Jeremiah50:36 Inkota iri ku birata
Jeremiah50:37 Inkota iri ku mafarasi yabo
Jeremiah50:38 Ikigatwa kizoba ku mazi yaho
Jeremiah50:39 Ni co kizotuma ibikōko vyo mu bugaragwa bizobanayo n’amabingira
Jeremiah50:40 Nk’uko vyabaye hamwe Imana yakomvomvora i Sodomu n’i Gomora
Jeremiah50:41 Eh’ ubgoko buraje buvuye i burārūko; ihanga rikomeye n’ abami benshi bazovyutswa bave ku mpera y’isi.
Jeremiah50:42 Bābiriye imiheto n’amacumu; ni ba ruburakigongwe
Jeremiah50:43 Umwami w’i Babuloni yumvise inkuru zavyo
Jeremiah50:44 Eh’ azodūga nk’intambge ivuye kuri Yorodani iyo rwigize akagabo
Jeremiah50:45 Nuko rero ni mwumve inama Uhoraho yarunduye kuri Babuloni
Jeremiah50:46 Isi ihindishwa agashitsi no kwumva gutsindwa kw’i Babuloni: amarūru yaho yumvikana mu mahanga.
Jeremiah51:1 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize
Jeremiah51:2 Kandi nzorungika i Babuloni abagosozi bazohagosora
Jeremiah51:3 Umurashi ntaz’ aruhe afora umuheto wiwe
Jeremiah51:4 Bazokwicwa bahindikirane aho nyene i Bukaludaya
Jeremiah51:5 Kukw Abisirayeli atar’ intābga
Jeremiah51:6 Ni muhunge muve hagati muri Babuloni
Jeremiah51:7 Babuloni cār’ igikombe c’izahabu mu kuboko kw’Uhoraho
Jeremiah51:8 I Babuloni harakomvomvowe giturumbuka
Jeremiah51:9 Twagerageje kuvūra Babuloni
Jeremiah51:10 Uhoraho yerekanye ukugororoka kwacu; enda ni muze twamamaze i Siyoni igikorwa c’Uhoraho Imana yacu.
Jeremiah51:11 Mukarishe imyampi
Jeremiah51:12 Mushinge ibendera mwerekeye inzitiro z’i Babuloni
Jeremiah51:13 Ewe uba ku materaniro y’amazi menshi
Jeremiah51:14 Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo yirahiye ubgiwe
Jeremiah51:15 Rurema ni yo yaremesheje isi ubushobozi bgayo
Jeremiah51:16 iy’ ishize ijwi hejuru haba gusūma kw’ amazi yo hejuru; irandisha ibipfungu bikava ku mpera y’isi; iremera imvura imiravyo
Jeremiah51:17 Non’ umuntu wese kw ar’ ikiyingiyingi ata bgenge agira! Umucuzi w’izahabu wese azotēterezwa n’igishushanyo ciwe yasaruye
Jeremiah51:18 N’ivy’ ubusa gusa
Jeremiah51:19 Arik’ umugabane wa Yakobo we si kw ameze
Jeremiah51:20 Ni wewe nyundo yanje
Jeremiah51:21 ni wewe nzomenaguza ifarasi n’ūyigenderako;
Jeremiah51:22 ni wewe nzomenaguza umukogote n’ūwugenderamwo; ni wewe nzomenaguza umugabo n’umugore; ni wewe nzomenaguza umutāma n’umusore; ni wewe nzomenaguza umuhungu n’umukobga;
Jeremiah51:23 ni wewe nzomenaguza umwungere n’umukuku wiwe; ni wewe nzomenaguza umurimyi n’inka arimisha; ni wewe nzomenaguza abagabisha n’abaganza.
Jeremiah51:24 Kand’ ab’ i Babuloni
Jeremiah51:25 Ehe tuzohigūra twe nawe
Jeremiah51:26 Ntibazoba bakigukūrako n’ibuye ryo kugumya imfuruka
Jeremiah51:27 Mushinge ibendera mu gihugu
Jeremiah51:28 Mwiteguze amahanga kurwana na ho
Jeremiah51:29 Isi ihinze agashitsi
Jeremiah51:30 Abahizi b’i Babuloni bahevye kurwana
Jeremiah51:31 Intabaza imwe izohūra n’iyindi
Jeremiah51:32 kandi ko bazitiye ivyambu giturumbuka
Jeremiah51:33 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize
Jeremiah51:34 Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni yaramfyonderanije
Jeremiah51:35 Ivyo nagiriwe nabi bikaba no ku mubiri wanje ni bisubire kuri Babuloni
Jeremiah51:36 None rero
Jeremiah51:37 Kand’ i Babuloni hazocika ibirundo vy’amasakamburira
Jeremiah51:38 Bazokwivuga nk’imigunza y’intambge bose icarimwe
Jeremiah51:39 Bamaze kuborerwa nzobategurira amazimano
Jeremiah51:40 Nzobamanukana nk’ imyagazi y’intama ija kubāgwa
Jeremiah51:41 Ewe kuntu i Sheshaki hatsinzwe! Ahār’ ibihimbaro vy’isi yose ukuntu hazirimukiwe! Ewe kuntu i Babuloni hahindutse ibitongozi hagati mu yandi mahanga!
Jeremiah51:42 Ikiyaga kiradūze kīziye i Babuloni: harengewe n’isinzi ry’ imipfunda yaco.
Jeremiah51:43 Ibisagara vyaho bihindutse ibitongozi
Jeremiah51:44 Kandi nzohanira ca kigirwamana Beli i Babuloni
Jeremiah51:45 Yemwe bantu banje
Jeremiah51:46 Imitima yanyu ntidendebukirwe
Jeremiah51:47 Nuko rero
Jeremiah51:48 Ni ho ijuru n’isi n’ibirimwo vyose bizoririmbishwa n’umunezero wo kwitamba kuri Babuloni; kukw abanyazi bazohāzira bavuye i burārūko
Jeremiah51:49 Nk’uko Babuloni hāhindikiranije abishwe b’Abisirayeli
Jeremiah51:50 Yemwe abakize inkota
Jeremiah51:51 Turatēterewe
Jeremiah51:52 Nuko rero
Jeremiah51:53 Naho Babuloni hodūga hagashika kw ijuru
Jeremiah51:54 Ijwi ry’amarūru riturutse i Babuloni
Jeremiah51:55 Kuk’ Uhoraho ahoneje i Babuloni
Jeremiah51:56 mber’ abanyazi barahashitse
Jeremiah51:57 Kandi nzoboreza abaganwa baho n’abanyabgenge baho
Jeremiah51:58 Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize
Jeremiah51:59 Ivyo uwavugishwa n’Imana Yeremiya yageze Seraya mwene Neriya
Jeremiah51:60 Nuko Yeremiya yari yanditse mu gitabo ivyago vyose bizotera i Babuloni
Jeremiah51:61 Maze Yeremiya abarira Seraya
Jeremiah51:62 kand’ ut’ Ewe Uhoraho
Jeremiah51:63 Urangije rero gusoma iki gitabo
Jeremiah51:64 kand’ uz’ uvuge
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekiya yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’umwe; ayimarakw imyaka cumi n’umwe i Yerusalemu. Nyina yitwa Hamutali
Jeremiah52:2 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi
Jeremiah52:3 Kukw ivyabaye i Yerusalemu n’i Buyuda vyavuye ku burake bg’Uhoraho
Jeremiah52:4 Mu mwaka ugira icenda Zedekiya ari ku ngoma
Jeremiah52:5 Nuko bakomeza kwugariza ico gisagara gushitsa ku mwaka ugira icumi na rimwe umwami Zedekiya ari ku ngoma.
Jeremiah52:6 Mu kwezi kwa kane
Jeremiah52:7 Abakaludaya baraheza basatura uruzitiro rw’ ico gisagara; maz’ ingabo zose zirahunga
Jeremiah52:8 Maz’ ingabo z’Abakaludaya zōma inyuma y’umwami Zedekiya
Jeremiah52:9 Maze bafata umwami
Jeremiah52:10 Nuk’ umwami w’i Babuloni yicira abahungu ba Zedekiya imbere y’amaso yiwe nyene; yicira n’ abaganwa bose b’i Buyuda i Ribula.
Jeremiah52:11 Anogora amaso Zedekiya; maz’ uwo mwami w’i Babuloni amwambika umunyororo
Jeremiah52:12 Maze mu kwezi kwa gatanu
Jeremiah52:13 Araheza yanda umuriro ingoro y’Uhoraho n’ingoro y’ umwami
Jeremiah52:14 Maz’ ingabo zose z’Abakaludaya zari kumwe n’uwo mukuru w’abashibamyi
Jeremiah52:15 Maze Nebuzaradani
Jeremiah52:16 Ariko Nebuzaradani
Jeremiah52:17 Kand’ inkingi z’imiringa zari mu ngoro y’Uhoraho
Jeremiah52:18 Bajana n’imibindi
Jeremiah52:19 kandi n’ibikombe
Jeremiah52:20 Ku vya za nkingi zompi
Jeremiah52:21 Ku vy’inkingi
Jeremiah52:22 Yarik’ umwashi w’umuringa; uburebure bg’umwashi umwe‐umwe bgar’ amatambge atanu
Jeremiah52:23 Ibisa n’amakomamanga vyari mirongwicenda na bitandatu ku mpande zine; amakomamanga yose na yose yar’ ijana kur’ urwo rusenga hirya no hino.
Jeremiah52:24 Nuko wa mukuru w’abashibamyi afata Seraya umuherezi mukuru
Jeremiah52:25 kandi mu gisagara ahafatira uwaganza ivy’ abahizi b’ intambara
Jeremiah52:26 Maze Nebuzaradani
Jeremiah52:27 Umwami w’i Babuloni arabazibagura
Jeremiah52:28 Aba ni bo bantu Nebukadineza yajanye ar’ inyagano: mu mwaka w’indwi yajanye Abayuda ibihumbi bitatu na mirongwibiri na batatu;
Jeremiah52:29 mu mwaka ugira icumi n’umunani Nebukadineza ari ku ngoma
Jeremiah52:30 mu mwaka ugira mirongwibiri na gatatu Nebukadineza ari ku ngoma
Jeremiah52:31 Maze mu mwaka ugira mirongwitatu n’indwi Yehoyakina umwami w’i Buyuda ari mu mugozi
Jeremiah52:32 Amuyāgīsha neza
Jeremiah52:33 Amunyuranurira impuzu zo mw ibohero amwambika izindi
Jeremiah52:34 Kandi ku bimutunga
Lamentations1:1 Ewe kuntu igisagara cari cuzuye abantu gisigaye cicaye ubusa! Ukuntu cahindutse nk’umupfakazi! Icar’ agakomeye mu mahanga
Lamentations1:2 Kirāra kirarira mw ijoro
Lamentations1:3 Abayuda bajanywe ar’ inyagano
Lamentations1:4 Inzira z’i Siyoni ziraboroga
Lamentations1:5 Abarwanizi baho bahagiye hejuru
Lamentations1:6 Icubahiro cose c’umukobga ari we Siyoni camuvuyeko: Abaganwa baho bahindutse nk’impongo zibuze ubgatsi
Lamentations1:7 Mu gihe c’umubabaro waho n’ivyago
Lamentations1:8 Yerusalemu hakoze ivyaha birengereje; ni co catumye hahinduka nk’ikintu giteye iseseme: Abāhora bahubaha bose basigaye bahakēngēra
Lamentations1:9 Ibiteye isoni vyaho vyashitse no ku myambaro yaho; ntihāri hārībajije ivy’ amaherezo yaho; Ni co catumye hacishwa bugufi bitangaje; ntihagira ūhahūmuriza. Uhoraho we
Lamentations1:10 Umurwanizi yashingirije ukuboko kwiwe ibintu vyaho vyose bihimbara: Kandi hitegereje ingen’ abanyamahanga binjiye ahantu haho hēra
Lamentations1:11 Abantu baho bose baraniha
Lamentations1:12 Yemwe mwese abīhitira
Lamentations1:13 Yarungitse umuriro mu magufa yanje uvuye iyo hejuru
Lamentations1:14 Ukuboko kwiwe kwamboheyekw ingōgo y’ibicumuro vyanje; Vyarasobekeranye
Lamentations1:15 Umwami Imana yatītūye abahizi banje bose bāba i wanje; Yarungitse abaza kungirirak’ umusi mukuru ngo bafyonyagure imisore yanje: Umwami Imana yahonyanze umukobga w’inkumi w’i Buyuda
Lamentations1:16 Ivyo ni vyo bindiza; amaso yanje
Lamentations1:17 Siyoni hata amaboko
Lamentations1:18 Uhoraho aragororotse
Lamentations1:19 Natabaje abūzure banje
Lamentations1:20 Uhoraho we
Lamentations1:21 Ni wumve ingene nniha; nta wo kumpūmuriza ngira; Abansi banje bose bumvise ivyago mbonye; baranezerwa kukw ari wewe wabikoze: Uzotuma umusi washinze ushika
Lamentations1:22 Ububi bgabo bgose ni bushike imbere yawe; Ubagirire nk’uko wangiriye umpōra ibicumuro vyanje vyose: Kuko kuniha kwanje ari kwinshi
Lamentations2:1 Ewe kuntu Umwami Imana yaratse
Lamentations2:2 Umwami Imana asanganguye amazu yose ya Yakobo ata kagongwe; Yahenuranye uburake ibihome vy’umukobga w’i Buyuda; Arabitsinda gushitsa hasi: Abami n’abaganwa babo yabahinduye ibihumane.
Lamentations2:3 Kubg’ uburake bgiwe bg’inkazi yakondoye ihembe ryose ry’Abisirayeli; Yapfunye ukuboko kwiwe kw’i buryo imbere y’abansi: Kandi yaturiye Yakobo
Lamentations2:4 Yamufōreye umuheto nk’ umwansi
Lamentations2:5 Umwami Imana yahindukiye i Bgisirayeli nk’umwansi
Lamentations2:6 Yashikuye ihema ryiwe nk’ ah’ ar’ umutara wo mu murima; Yasanganguye ahantu hiwe h’ikoraniro: Uhoraho yatumye imisi mikuru n’amasabato vyibagirana i Siyoni
Lamentations2:7 Umwami Imana yashibuye igicaniro ciwe
Lamentations2:8 Uhoraho yagabiye gusangangura uruzitiro rw’umukobga w’i Siyoni: Yahageresheje umugozi
Lamentations2:9 Amarembo yaho anyikiye mu kuzimu; ibihindizo vyaho yaravyononye
Lamentations2:10 Abashingantahe b’umukobga w’i Siyoni bicaye hasi
Lamentations2:11 Amaso yanje yakobowe n’ amosozi
Lamentations2:12 Babaza ba nyina
Lamentations2:13 Nokubarira iki? Nokugereranya n’iki
Lamentations2:14 Ba kamenyi bawe bākurotoreye ivy’ ubusa n’ivy’ ubupfu; Kandi ntibāguseruriye ibigabitanyo vyawe
Lamentations2:15 Abahita bose bakwitamba ku muvyimba bakubita amashi ku yandi; Bakavuza agahwa
Lamentations2:16 Abansi bawe bose barakwasamiye cane
Lamentations2:17 Uhoraho yakoze ico yagabiye; Yashikije ijambo ryiwe yashinze mu misi ya kera; Yagukubise hasi ata kagongwe; Yahaye umwansi kukwitamba hejuru
Lamentations2:18 Umutima w’ab’ i Yerusalemu watakambiye Uhoraho; Bat’ Ewe wa ruzitiro rw’umukobga w’i Siyoni
Lamentations2:19 Va hasi uboroge mw ijoro
Lamentations2:20 Uhoraho we
Lamentations2:21 Umusore n’umutāma barambaraye hasi mu nzira; Abigeme banje n’imisore yanje bahindikiranijwe n’ inkota; Wabatikije ku musi w’uburake bgawe; warabariritse ata kagongwe.
Lamentations2:22 Wampamagariye ibinteye ubgoba irya n’ino
Lamentations3:1 Nd’ umuntu yabonye umubabaro uzanywe n’inkoni y’uburake bgayo.
Lamentations3:2 Yaranjanye ancisha mu mwiza
Lamentations3:3 N’ukuri yashishikaye kumbangurira ukuboko vuba na vuba burinda bgira.
Lamentations3:4 Yasāzishije inyama zanje n’ urukoba rwanje; yavunaguye amagufa yanje.
Lamentations3:5 Yaranziguje
Lamentations3:6 Yangerereye ahantu h’umwiza nk’abapfuye kera.
Lamentations3:7 Yankubakuvye impande zose ngo sincārūke; yatumye umunyororo wanje undemēra.
Lamentations3:8 Mber’ iyo ndamutakambiye ndamutabaza
Lamentations3:9 Yajibije inzira zanje ibibuye bibājwe; yagoretse inzira zanje.
Lamentations3:10 Ammereye nk’igikōko citwa idubu kibundiye kwica
Lamentations3:11 Yakikamitse inzira zanje
Lamentations3:12 Yamfōreyek’ umuheto
Lamentations3:13 Imyampi yo mu mutana wiwe ayintobekeranije mu mafyigo.
Lamentations3:14 Nahindutse ak’ amenyo mu bgoko bgacu bgose
Lamentations3:15 Yanyujuje ibamba
Lamentations3:16 Amenyo yanje yayahongoje urusekebuye
Lamentations3:17 Kand’ ubugingo bganje bgatandukanijwe n’amahoro
Lamentations3:18 Maze ndavuga
Lamentations3:19 Ibuka umubabaro wanje n’ intuntu yanje
Lamentations3:20 Umutima wanje wama uvyibuka
Lamentations3:21 Ibi ni vyo nibuka
Lamentations3:22 N’ukw imbabazi z’Uhoraho ari zo zatumye tudaherengetezwa
Lamentations3:23 Cama ari gisha uko bukeye; ingen’ ar’ umwizigirwa bīratangaje.
Lamentations3:24 Uhoraho ni we mugabane wanje
Lamentations3:25 Uhoraho agirira neza abamwiteze
Lamentations3:26 Ni vyiza k’umuntu yizigira
Lamentations3:27 Ni vyiza k’umuntu amenyerezwa ingōgo yo kuganzwa akiri muto.
Lamentations3:28 Ni yicare wenyene
Lamentations3:29 N’ashikane umunwa wiwe mu mukungugu
Lamentations3:30 N’ategere umusaya ūmukubita; bamuhāze ibitutsi.
Lamentations3:31 Kuk’ Umwami Imana ata ho azota umuntu ruhebga.
Lamentations3:32 Naho yomubabaza
Lamentations3:33 Kukw atababaza abantu abigomba
Lamentations3:34 Gusiribanga imbohe zose zo mw isi
Lamentations3:35 Canke kugoreka urubanza rw’ umuntu mu nyonga z’Īsumba vyose
Lamentations3:36 Canke kurya urubanza rw’ umuntu
Lamentations3:37 Ni nde yovuga ikintu
Lamentations3:38 Mbega mu kanwa k’Īsumba vyose ntihavamw’ ivyago n’ivyiza?
Lamentations3:39 Umuntu akiriho
Lamentations3:40 Enda ni dusesangure ingeso zacu
Lamentations3:41 Ducurūrire imitima yacu Imana yo mw ijuru
Lamentations3:42 Tuti Twaracumuye
Lamentations3:43 Wadutwikiriye uburake
Lamentations3:44 Witwikiriye igicu
Lamentations3:45 Waduhinduye nk’udukokorwa n’umwavu hagati y’amahanga.
Lamentations3:46 Abansi bacu bose baratwasamiye.
Lamentations3:47 Ibiteye ubgoba n’urusumanyenzi bidushitseko
Lamentations3:48 Amaso yanje atemberanamw’ inzūzi z’amosozi
Lamentations3:49 Amaso yanje aracunduguta
Lamentations3:50 Gushitsa igihe Uhoraho azokwitegereza
Lamentations3:51 Amaso yanje aransābije kubgo kuririra abakobga bose bo mu gisagara cacu.
Lamentations3:52 Abanyankira ubusa bampīze cane nk’inyoni
Lamentations3:53 Batsinze ubugingo bganje mw ibohero i bgina
Lamentations3:54 Amazi yarandenze ku mutwe; maze ndavuga
Lamentations3:55 Natakambiye izina ryawe
Lamentations3:56 Wumva ijwi ryanje; ntukinge ugutwi kwawe ngo ntiwumve kuniha kwanje n’ugutaka kwanje.
Lamentations3:57 Umusi nagutakambira waranyegereye; uravuga
Lamentations3:58 Mwami
Lamentations3:59 Uhoraho
Lamentations3:60 Wabonye guhōra kwabo kwose n’imigabo bangīra yose.
Lamentations3:61 Wumvise ibitutsi vyabo
Lamentations3:62 N’amagambo y’abahagurutswa no kuntera
Lamentations3:63 Ni witegereze iyicara ryabo n’īva hasi ryabo: mbaye akavyino kabo.
Lamentations3:64 Uhoraho we
Lamentations3:65 Uzobaha umutima ukomantaye
Lamentations3:66 Uzobirukana uri n’uburake
Lamentations4:1 Ewe kuntu izahabu yafyirifyitiye! Ukuntu izahabu nziza yahindutse ukundi! Amabuye y’ahēra h’urusengero yasābagijwe mu mayirabiri yose.
Lamentations4:2 Abahungu b’igikundiro b’i Siyoni
Lamentations4:3 Imbgebge zo ziha ivyana vyazo amabgabga
Lamentations4:4 Ururimi rw’umwana yonka rufatanye n’uruhekenyero
Lamentations4:5 Abāri bamenyereye gufungura ibigemānije basigaye bagwira isari mu nzira; Abārerewe mu mpuzu z’ inyambarabami basigaye barambarara ku macukiro.
Lamentations4:6 Kukw ibigabitanyo vy’umukobga w’ubgoko bgacu bikomeye gusumba icaha c’i Sodomu
Lamentations4:7 Abaganwa biwe bāhora bakayangana kurusha shelegi
Lamentations4:8 Noneho mu maso habo hasigaye harusha imivyiro kwirabura; ntibakimenyekana mu nzira: Urukoba rwabo rumatanye n’ amagufa; rwārūmye nk’igiti.
Lamentations4:9 Abicwa n’inkota ni bo bapfa rwiza kuruta abicwa n’ inzara; Kukw abo bo bagenda bashirira hejuru
Lamentations4:10 Abagore bāri bafise ikigongwe basigaye bafata abana bīvyariye
Lamentations4:11 Uhoraho yashikije ubushangashirwe bgiwe
Lamentations4:12 Abami bo mw isi
Lamentations4:13 Vyatewe n’ivyaha vya ba kamenyi baho
Lamentations4:14 Badandabagirana mu nzira zaho nk’impumyi
Lamentations4:15 Barabahāniranwa
Lamentations4:16 Igitsure c’Uhoraho carabashwiragije; ntagisubira kubashirak’ umutima: Na bo ntibubashe abaherezi
Lamentations4:17 Amaso yacu yakobowe no kurereka ugutabarwa kwacu
Lamentations4:18 Baraturyamiye
Lamentations4:19 Abaduhīga barusha inkukuma zo mu kirēre kunyaruka: Badukinagiza ku misozi miremire
Lamentations4:20 Uwar’ atubereye nk’impwemu duhumeka
Lamentations4:21 Ni winezererwe
Lamentations4:22 Igihano c’ukugabitanya kwawe kirarangiye
Lamentations5:1 Uhoraho we
Lamentations5:2 Ishamvu yacu yegukiwe n’ abanyamahanga
Lamentations5:3 Tur’ impfuvyi ntitukigira ba data
Lamentations5:4 Tunywa amazi tuyaguze; Inkwi tuzironka ku biguzi.
Lamentations5:5 Abaduhīga batuguye ku gakanu: Turarushe
Lamentations5:6 Twakomeye amashi Abanyegiputa
Lamentations5:7 Ba data bakoze ivyaha
Lamentations5:8 Abagurano ni bo basigaye batuganza: Nta wuriho wo kuturokora ngw atugobotore mu maboko yabo.
Lamentations5:9 Ivyo kurya tubironka duhevye amagara
Lamentations5:10 Urukoba rwacu rusigaye rwirabura nk’inkono
Lamentations5:11 Bafata abagore bo muri Siyoni ku kagōbēro
Lamentations5:12 Abaganwa bāmanitswe babasungaje ukuboko kumwe: N’abatāma ntibābagirira udusoni.
Lamentations5:13 Imisore isigaye ikorerwa insyo
Lamentations5:14 Abatāma bāhevye kwicara ku nama
Lamentations5:15 Umunezero wo mu mitima yacu urashize; Imvyino zacu zahindutse amaborogo.
Lamentations5:16 Ibitsibo vyo ku mitwe yacu birakorotse: Tubonye ibara
Lamentations5:17 Ni co gituma imitima yacu ihondobera
Lamentations5:18 Bitewe n’uk’ umusozi Siyoni ucitse amatongo: Imbgebge zisigaye zihatambatamba.
Lamentations5:19 Weho
Lamentations5:20 N’iki catumye utwibagira ibihe vyose
Lamentations5:21 N’utwigarukanire
Lamentations5:22 Shiti waradutaye ruhebga
Ezekiel1:1 Mu mwaka wa mirongwitatu
Ezekiel1:2 Kur’ uwo musi ugira gatanu w’ukwo kwezi
Ezekiel1:3 ijambo ry’ Uhoraho ryanjeko jewe umuherezi Ezekiyeli mwene Buzi
Ezekiel1:4 Ngize ntya
Ezekiel1:5 Kandi muri wo hagati havamw’ ishusho y’ibinyabugingo bine. Kand’ uku ni ko vyasa: vyari bifise ishusho y’umuntu.
Ezekiel1:6 Kimwe‐kimwe cari gifise mu maso hane
Ezekiel1:7 Kand’ ibirenge vyavyo vyar’ inambi; mu bgōro bg’ ibirenge vyavyo hari hameze nk’ imbere mu nzāra z’inyana: kandi vyakayangana nk’umuringa w’ umwakaka.
Ezekiel1:8 Kandi vyari bifise amaboko nk’ay’ umuntu musi y’amababa yavyo mu mpande zavyo ukw ari zine; ivyo ukw ari bine
Ezekiel1:9 amababa yavyo yar’ asomanye; nta ho vyahindukira iyo bigenda; vyose vyagenda bibanze.
Ezekiel1:10 Mu maso havyo uko hāsa
Ezekiel1:11 Kandi mu maso havyo n’amababa yavyo vyari bihānye inta ahahera hejuru; amababa abiri ya kimwe‐kimwe yasomana n’ay’ ikindi
Ezekiel1:12 Kandi vyose vyagenda bibanze; aho Mpwemu yerekeje ni ho vyaja; nta ho vyahindukira iyo bigenda.
Ezekiel1:13 Kandi ku vy’ishusho y’ivyo binyabugingo uko yar’ imeze
Ezekiel1:14 Ivyo binyabugingo vyariruka bigakimirana
Ezekiel1:15 Nuko ncitegereza ivyo binyabugingo
Ezekiel1:16 Ayo makurudumu
Ezekiel1:17 Iy’ agiye
Ezekiel1:18 Ahihese hayo hāshika hejuru biteye ubgoba; kandi yose ukw ar’ ane
Ezekiel1:19 Kand’ ivyo binyabugingo iyo bigiye
Ezekiel1:20 Aho Mpwemu yerekeje hose ni ho vyaja
Ezekiel1:21 Iyo bigiye na yo yaragenda; vyahagarara agahagarara; vyaterurwa ngo bive kw isi
Ezekiel1:22 Hejuru y’imitwe y’ ivyo binyabugingo hār’ ikimeze nk’itāzānure ry’ijuru
Ezekiel1:23 Kandi musi y’iryo tāzānure
Ezekiel1:24 Kand’ iyo bigiye
Ezekiel1:25 Kandi hirya y’itāzānure ry’ijuru ryo hejuru y’imitwe yavyo hār’ ijwi: nuko vyarahagarara bikabumba amababa yavyo.
Ezekiel1:26 Hirya y’iryo tāzānure ryo hejuru y’imitwe yavyo hār’ igisa n’intebe y’ubgami imeze nk’akabuyenge kitwa safiro; kandi hejuru kur’ ico kintu casa n’intebe y’ubgami hār’ igisa n’umuntu.
Ezekiel1:27 Uhereye ahobaye mu rukenyerero rwiwe ugasubiza ahahera haruguru
Ezekiel1:28 Nk’uk’ umunywamazi wo ku gicu usa ku musi w’imvura

Ezekiel5:8 nuko rero

Ezekiel5:13 Uko ni ko nzoba nimaze ishavu
Ezekiel5:14 Kand’ ikindi nzoguhindura umusaka n’igitutsi mu mahanga agukikije
Ezekiel5:15 Maz’ uzoba igitutsi n’agatwengo n’akabarore n’akajoreza mu mahanga agukikije
Ezekiel5:16 kandi nkabarasa imyampi mibi ya kigoyi yo kubageseza
Ezekiel5:17 kandi nzobatēza kigoyi n’ibikōko vy’inkazi

Ezekiel6:2 riti Mwana w’umuntu
Ezekiel6:3 uti Yemwe misozi y’i Bgisirayeli
Ezekiel6:4 Kand’ ibicaniro vyanyu bizosigara bitamāriwe
Ezekiel6:5 Nzorambika imivyimba y’Abisirayeli imbere y’ibigirwamana vyabo; kand’ amagufa yanyu nzoyatāgaguza impande zose z’ibicaniro vyanyu.
Ezekiel6:6 Aho muba hose ibisagara bizogesezwa
Ezekiel6:7 Kand’ abishwe bazohindikirana hagati muri mwebge
Ezekiel6:8 Yamara nzosiga amasigarira
Ezekiel6:9 Kand’ abazoba baracitse bo muri mwebge bazonyibuka bari mu mahanga
Ezekiel6:10 Kandi bazomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho: simbivugiye ubusa ko nzobatēza ivyo vyago.

Ezekiel8:5 Maz’ arambarira

Ezekiel8:13 Arongera arambgira

Ezekiel9:1 Maz’ asemererera mu matwi yanje n’ijwi rirenga
Ezekiel9:2 Nuko haza abantu batandatu baciye mu nzira yo mu kirimba co haruguru cārābana n’i burārūko
Ezekiel9:3 Kand’ ubgiza bg’Imana y’Abisirayeli bgari buvuye ku mukerubi aho bgahora
Ezekiel9:4 Nuk’ Uhoraho aramubgira
Ezekiel9:5 Ba bandi ababgira numva
Ezekiel9:6 mwice mutikize umutāma n’umusore n’ umwigeme n’abana bato n’ abagore: ariko ntihagire umuntu n’umwe mwēgēra mu barikw ico kimenyetso; kandi muhēre ku rusengero rwanje rwera. Baca bahēra kuri ba bakuru bār’ imbere y’ingoro.

Ezekiel10:1 Maze ngize ntya mbona mw itāzānure ry’ijuru ryo hejuru y’imitwe ya ba bakerubi
Ezekiel10:2 Maz’ Uhoraho abarira wa muntu yambaye impuzu zera
Ezekiel10:3 Kandi ba bakerubi bāri bahagaze i buryo bg’ ingoro igihe wa muntu yahaca; maz’ igipfungu cuzura mu nyubakwa y’imbere.
Ezekiel10:4 Nuk’ ubgiza bg’Uhoraho buradūga buva ku mukerubi
Ezekiel10:5 Kand’ uguhinda kw’amababa y’abakerubi kwarumvikana kugashika no mu ntangaro
Ezekiel10:6 Nukw imaze kubarira wa muntu yambaye impuzu zera
Ezekiel10:7 Maz’ umukerubi umwe atuma ukuboko hagati ya ba bakerubi
Ezekiel10:8 Kandi musi y’amababa ya ba bakerubi hāboneka ibisa n’amaboko y’umuntu.
Ezekiel10:9 Nuko ngize ntya
Ezekiel10:10 Kand’ uko yasa
Ezekiel10:11 Iy’ agiye
Ezekiel10:12 Kand’ imibiri yabo yose
Ezekiel10:13 Kand’ ayo makurudumu yitwa Nyawizinguriza: yiswe artyo numva.
Ezekiel10:14 Kand’ umwe‐umwe yar’ afise mu maso hane: mu maso ha mbere hāri mu maso h’umukerubi
Ezekiel10:15 Maz’ abo bakerubi bādūga intumbgejuru; abo ni bo vya binyabugingo nari naraboneye ku ruzi Kebari.
Ezekiel10:16 Kand’ abo bakerubi iyo bagiye
Ezekiel10:17 Iyo bahagaze na yo yarahagarara; bādūga intumbgejuru akadūgana na bo: kukw impwemu y’ikinyabugingo cose yari muri yo.
Ezekiel10:18 Maz’ ubgiza bg’Uhoraho buragenda buva imbere y’irebe ry’ingoro
Ezekiel10:19 Maz’ abakerubi baterura amababa yabo
Ezekiel10:20 Abo ni bo vya binyabugingo nari narabonye biri musi y’Imana y’Abisirayeli ku ruzi Kebari; ndaheza mmenya kw ari bo bakerubi.
Ezekiel10:21 Umwe‐umwe yar’ afise mu maso hane
Ezekiel10:22 Kand’ ishusho yo mu maso habo uko yar’ iri n’imwe nyene n’iyo naboneye ku ruzi Kebari

Ezekiel22:7 Ababa muri wewe bakēngēra ba se na ba nyina; muri wewe ni ho bahahariza umuntu w’akavantara; muri wewe ni ho barīra impfuvyi n’ abapfakazi.

Ezekiel23:2 riti Mwana w’umuntu

Ezekiel23:4 Amazina yabo
Ezekiel23:5 Maze
Ezekiel23:6 bose bār’ imisore iteye igomwe
Ezekiel23:7 Nukw abahurumbira nk’ikimaka

Ezekiel23:9 Ni co catumye ndamutanga mu maboko y’abūzure biwe
Ezekiel23:10 Nukw abo batwikurura ibiteye isoni vyiwe; batwara abahungu biwe n’abakobga biwe
Ezekiel23:11 Nuko murumuna we Oholiba abona ivyo
Ezekiel23:12 Yagomwa Abashuri ni bo babanyi biwe

Ezekiel23:15 bakenyeje imikanda mu rukenyerero
Ezekiel23:16 Ako kanya abakubise amaso
Ezekiel23:17 Maz’ ab’i Babuloni baraza
Ezekiel23:18 Uko ni ko yagaragaje ubusambanyi bgiwe
Ezekiel23:19 Yamara yakomeje kugwiza ubumaka bgiwe
Ezekiel23:20 Agomwa abasambanyi baho
Ezekiel23:21 Uko ni ko wibukirije ubushakanyi bgo mu buto bgawe
Ezekiel23:22 Nuko rero
Ezekiel23:23 ni bo b’i Babuloni
Ezekiel23:24 Nuko bazogutera bafise ibirwanishwa
Ezekiel23:25 Nzokurekurirakw ifuhe ryanje
Ezekiel23:26 Bazogukoba n’imyambaro yawe
Ezekiel23:27 Uko ni ko nzozimiriza ubushakanyi bgawe
Ezekiel23:28 Kuk’ ukw ari k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize
Ezekiel23:29 na bo bazoguhanana urwanko
Ezekiel23:30 Ivyo ni vyo uzogirirwa
Ezekiel23:31 Watoye inzira ya mukurwawe
Ezekiel23:32 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize
Ezekiel23:33 Uzokwuzura ububorerwe n’ umubabaro
Ezekiel23:34 Uzokinywerako
Ezekiel23:35 None rero
Ezekiel23:36 Uhoraho yongera kumbarira
Ezekiel23:37 Kuko basambanye
Ezekiel23:38 Ikigeretseko bankoreye n’ikindi: kur’ uwo musi nyene bahumanije ahēra hanje
Ezekiel23:39 Kuko bamaze kwica abana babo
Ezekiel23:40 Ubabgire
Ezekiel23:41 mwicara ku musegamuro mutimbitse
Ezekiel23:42 Maz’ urwamo rw’ishengero ryidibamiye rwahōga aho muri; kandi hamwe n’abantu ba nyarucari hazanywe n’ababorewe bavuye mu bugaragwa; babambika mwempi imiringa ku maboko
Ezekiel23:43 Maze mvuga ivy’ uwo asāziye mu busambanyi
Ezekiel23:44 Bītera i we nk’abītera kwa maraya: uko ni ko bīteye kwa Ohola no kwa Oholiba
Ezekiel23:45 Kand’ abagororotsi ni bo bazobacira urubanza ruberanye n’abasambanyikazi
Ezekiel23:46 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Umwami Uhoraho agize
Ezekiel23:47 Ico gitero kizobicisha amabuye
Ezekiel23:48 Uko ni ko nzoca ubushakanyi mu gihugu
Ezekiel23:49 Kandi bazobasubiriza mu nkōko ibikwiranye n’ubushakanyi bganyu

Ezekiel24:4 wegeranye inkekera z’inyama uzishiremwo
Ezekiel24:5 uzikūye kuri nziza cane yo mu mukuku; ukomānye inkwi musi
Ezekiel24:6 Nuko rero

Ezekiel24:10 Komānya inkwi

Ezekiel26:5 Hazosigara ar’ aho kwanikira insenga hagati mu kiyaga; ni jewe mbivuze
Ezekiel26:6 Kandi n’abakobga baho bari mu misozi bazoririkwa n’inkota: maze bazomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho.
Ezekiel26:7 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize

Ezekiel26:9 Inzitiro zawe z’amabuye azozihirikakw ibiti vy’ imigogo vyo kuzihomvora
Ezekiel26:10 Kandi kukw amafarasi yiwe ari menshi

Ezekiel26:18 Noneh’ ababa kuri co bazohinda agashitsi ku musi w’ugusenyerana kwawe; mber’ ibizinga vyo mu kiyaga bizohagarikwa umutima n’uk’ uherengeteye.

Ezekiel27:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryongera kunzako
Ezekiel27:2 riti Nawe
Ezekiel27:3 ubarire Tiro
Ezekiel27:4 Mw idamba ry’ikiyaga ni ho hākubereye urubibe; abākubaje nk’ubgato bāsozereye ubgiza bgawe.
Ezekiel27:5 Imbaho zawe zose bāzibāje mu miberoshi ivuye i Seniri; bākūye amasederi i Lebanoni bayakubāziramw’ umuringoti.
Ezekiel27:6 Mu biti vy’imyeloni vy’i Bashani ni vyo bākubāziyemw’ ingafe; intebe zawe bāzibāje mu mbaho z’imiteyashuri zākūwe mu bizinga vyo mu kiyaga vyitwa i Kitimu
Ezekiel27:7 Igihuzu cawe c’ubgato gikozwe mu mpuzu zera derere zijererenze amabara zivuye muri Egiputa
Ezekiel27:8 Ababa i Sidoni no muri Aruvadi ni bo bār’ abasoza bawe: abanyabgenge bawe baba muri wewe
Ezekiel27:9 Abashingantahe b’i Gebali n’abanyabgenge baho bāri muri wewe bahoma imiguma yawe: amato yose yo mu kiyaga n’abasoza bayo vyāri muri wewe
Ezekiel27:10 Ab’i Buperesi n’ab’i Ludi n’ab’i Puti bāri mu ngabo zawe
Ezekiel27:11 Abagabo bo muri Aruvadi bāri kumwe n’ ingabo zawe impande zose ku nzitiro zawe z’amabuye
Ezekiel27:12 Ab’i Tarushishi bādandaza nawe kubg’ ibitayega vy’ubutunzi bgawe bg’uburyo bginshi; amafeza n’ivyuma n’amabati n’amasāsu ni vyo bākāba ivyawe.
Ezekiel27:13 Ab’i Yavani n’ab’i Tubali n’ab’i Mesheki na bo bādandaza nawe: bāshōra abagurano n’imbombovu z’ivyakozwe mu miringa bakabikāba ivyawe.
Ezekiel27:14 Ab’ inzu ya Togaruma bākāba ivyawe amafarasi n’amafarasi y’intambara n’inyumbu.
Ezekiel27:15 Abantu b’i Dedani na bo bādandaza nawe: ibidandazwa vy’ababa hirya no hino ku kiyaga vyari mu maboko yawe; kandi bākuzanira amahembe y’inzovu n’imbaho z’ibiti vyitwa imipingo ngo bakābe nawe.
Ezekiel27:16 N’ab’i Siriya bādandaza nawe kubg’ ibitayega vy’ibintu vyavuye mu buhinga bgawe: bākāba ivyawe utubuyenge twitwa nofekina
Ezekiel27:17 N’ab’i Buyuda bo n’abo mu gihugu c’i Bgisirayeli bādandaza nawe: bākāba ivyawe ingano ziva i Miniti
Ezekiel27:18 N’ab’i Damasiko na bo bādandaza nawe ibitayega vy’ibintu vyavuye mu buhinga bgawe
Ezekiel27:19 Ab’i Vedani n’ab’i Yavani bākāba ivyawe inyuzi; ivyuma birtyorowe
Ezekiel27:20 Ab’i Dedani bar’ abadandaji bawe b’impuzu z’ igiciro kinini zo kwicarwako ku mafarasi.
Ezekiel27:21 Abo muri Arabiya n’abaganwa bose b’i Kedari bār’ abadandaji bawe wiganziye; bākudandariza imyagazi y’intama n’ amapfizi yazo n’impene.
Ezekiel27:22 Abadandaji b’i Sheba n’i Rama bār’ abadandaji bawe; bākāba ivyawe imibavu irusha iyindi yose kwinjira
Ezekiel27:23 Ab’i Harani n’ab’i Kanehe n’abo muri Edeni n’abadandaji b’i Sheba no muri Ashuri n’i Kilumadi bār’ abadandaji bawe.
Ezekiel27:24 Abo ni bo badandaji bawe bāshōra ibintu vy’ intōrwa
Ezekiel27:25 Amato y’i Tarushishi yaseha ibidandazwa vyawe: nuk’ uranengesera
Ezekiel27:26 Abasoza bawe bagushikanye mu mazi menshi: umuyaga uvuye i burasirazuba ugusābiriza mw idamba mu kiyaga.
Ezekiel27:27 Ubutunzi bgawe
Ezekiel27:28 Imihana izohindishwa agashitsi n’urwamo rw’akāyaga k’abatumbereza bawe.
Ezekiel27:29 N’abakoresha ingafe bose n’ abasoza n’abatumbereza ubgato bose bo mu kiyaga bazokwururuka bave mu mato yabo
Ezekiel27:30 bazorenza amajwi bakuririra
Ezekiel27:31 kandi bazokwimosha inkomvorera kubgawe
Ezekiel27:32 Mu maborogo yabo bazogucurira intimba
Ezekiel27:33 Hamwe ibishōrano vyawe vyahora biza bivuye mu kiyaga
Ezekiel27:34 Igihe ikiyaga cagusāvya
Ezekiel27:35 Ababa ku kiyaga bose baragutangariye
Ezekiel27:36 Abadandaza bo mu mahanga bakuvuzakw agahwa; wahindutse agaterabgoba

Ezekiel31:4 Catungwa n’amazi
Ezekiel31:5 Ni co catumye uburebure bgaco bushirwa hejuru y’ibiti vyose vyo mu gahinga; n’ amasango yaco agatagarara
Ezekiel31:6 N’ibiguruka vyose vyo mu kirēre bikārika mu mashami yaco; n’ ibikōko vyose vyo mw ishamba bikavyarira ivyana vyavyo musi y’amashami yaco
Ezekiel31:7 Uko ni ko cabaye ciza mu kuba agahambaye
Ezekiel31:8 Amasederi yandi yo mw itongo ry’Imana nta yashobora kucababa; n’imiberoshi ntiyaruha ingana n’ amasango yaco

Ezekiel31:18 Mu biti vyo muri Edeni n’ ikihe munganya kugira icubahiro no kuba agahambaye? Yamar’ uzomanukanwa hamwe n’ibiti vyo muri Edeni ushike i kuzimu: uzoryama hagati mu batākebge
Ezekiel32:1 Maze mu mwaka w’icumi na kabiri
Ezekiel32:2 riti Mwana w’umuntu
Ezekiel32:3 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize
Ezekiel32:4 Kandi nzogusiga ngaho i musozi
Ezekiel32:5 Mbere nzokwiragiza inyama zawe ku misozi
Ezekiel32:6 Kand’ igihugu ugenda wogamwo nzogitotesha amaraso yawe gushitsa no ku misozi miremire; n’ibihoro vy’imigezi bizokwuzura wewe.
Ezekiel32:7 Igihe nzokudorongeza
Ezekiel32:8 Imuri zose zaka kw ijuru nzotuma zicura umwiza hejuru yawe
Ezekiel32:9 Nzotuma imitima y’amahanga menshi ihagarara igihe nzokwiza ivy’ ukugesera kwawe mu mahanga
Ezekiel32:10 Mbere nzotuma amoko menshi agutangarira
Ezekiel32:11 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Umwami Uhoraho agize
Ezekiel32:12 Nzotuma ishengero ryawe riririkwa n’inkota z’ abahizi; abo bose ni bo b’agaterabgoba bo mu mahanga. Ubgibone bga Egiputa bazobuhindura ubusa
Ezekiel32:13 Kandi nzohonnya ibitungwa vyaho vyose bir’ i ruhande y’amazi menshi; kandi nta kirenge c’umuntu kizokwongera kuyatoba
Ezekiel32:14 Ni ho nzotuma amazi yaho atonganuka
Ezekiel32:15 Igihe nzohindura igihugu ca Egiputa amatongo n’imisaka
Ezekiel32:16 Ako ni ko gacurantimba bazocura; abakobga b’amahanga bazocura intimba bartyo: ni ko bazocurira intimba Egiputa n’ishengero ryaho ryose
Ezekiel32:17 Maze mur’ uwo mwaka w’ icumi na kabiri nyene
Ezekiel32:18 riti Mwana w’umuntu
Ezekiel32:19 Uti Ni nde urusha ubgiza? Manuka uryamikwe mu batākebge.
Ezekiel32:20 Bazohindikirana hagati y’abicishijwe inkota: Egiputa hāgaburiwe inkota: ni muhakwegane n’ishengero ryaho ryose.
Ezekiel32:21 Abanyenkomezi bo mu bahizi bazovugana na bo bar’ epfo iyo i kuzimu
Ezekiel32:22 Uwa Ashuri ni yo ari
Ezekiel32:23 Imva zabo ziri mu bgigobeko bga rwa rwobo
Ezekiel32:24 Uwa Elamu ni yo ari
Ezekiel32:25 Bāmwubakiye uburiri hagati y’abishwe ari kumwe n’ishengero ryiwe ryose; imva z’abiwe ziramukikije; abo bose n’abatākebge
Ezekiel32:26 Uw’ i Mesheki n’uw’ i Tubali ni yo bari
Ezekiel32:27 Kandi ntibaryamye hamwe n’abahizi bāhindikiranye bo mu batākebge
Ezekiel32:28 Nawe nyene uzovunagurirwa hagati y’abatākebge
Ezekiel32:29 Uwa Edomu ni yo ari
Ezekiel32:30 Abaganwa b’i burārūko ni yo bari bose
Ezekiel32:31 Farawo azobibona
Ezekiel32:32 Kuko nashize ivy’ agaterabgoba kiwe mw isi y’abariho; na we azorambikwa hagati y’abatākebge

Ezekiel33:2 riti Mwana w’umuntu
Ezekiel33:3 uyo yobona inkota ije iteye igihugu
Ezekiel33:4 nuk’ uwokwumva ijwi ry’inzamba wese
Ezekiel33:5 Yumvise ijwi ry’inzamba
Ezekiel33:6 Arikw iyo nderetsi ni yabona inkota ije
Ezekiel33:7 Ni ko nawe
Ezekiel33:8 Ni nabarira umunyavyaha
Ezekiel33:9 Yamara ni wabūrira umunyavyaha ivy’ ingeso ziwe
Ezekiel33:10 Nuko rero
Ezekiel33:11 Ubabgire
Ezekiel33:12 Nuko rero
Ezekiel33:13 Ni nabgira umugororotsi kw azobaho
Ezekiel33:14 Ikindi kandi
Ezekiel33:15 uwo munyavyaha agasubiza ingwati nyeneyo
Ezekiel33:16 Mu vyaha vyiwe vyose yakoze
Ezekiel33:17 Yamar’ ab’ ubgoko bganyu baravuga
Ezekiel33:18 Umugororotsi ni yahindukira akava mu bugororotsi bgiwe
Ezekiel33:19 Kand’ umunyavyaha ni yahindukira akava mu vyaha vyiwe
Ezekiel33:20 Yamara muravuga
Ezekiel33:21 Maze mu mwaka ugira icumi na kabiri uhereye aho twambukaniwe tur’ inyagano
Ezekiel33:22 Ukuboko kw’Uhoraho kwari kwarāye kunjeko ku mugoroba
Ezekiel33:23 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako
Ezekiel33:24 riti Mwana w’umuntu
Ezekiel33:25 Nuko rero
Ezekiel33:26 Ko mwishimiye inkota zanyu
Ezekiel33:27 Ukw abe ari k’ uzobabgira
Ezekiel33:28 Kand’ igihugu nzogihindura imisaka n’akajoreza
Ezekiel33:29 Maze bazomenya yuko jewe nd’Uhoraho
Ezekiel33:30 Kandi nawe
Ezekiel33:31 Maze baza kuri wewe nk’ ukw abantu basanzwe baza
Ezekiel33:32 Kandi rāba
Ezekiel33:33 Arikw igihe vya bindi bizoshikira
Ezekiel34:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryanjeko
Ezekiel34:2 riti Mwana w’umuntu
Ezekiel34:3 Ut’ Ariko mweho muzirya ibinure
Ezekiel34:4 Īdakomeye ntimwayisindagije
Ezekiel34:5 Nuko zirasābagira kukw ata mwungere; zihinduka ivyo kurya vy’ibikōko vyose vyo mw ishamba
Ezekiel34:6 Intama zanje zayerereye ku misozi yose
Ezekiel34:7 Nuko rero
Ezekiel34:8 ngo Ndahiye ukubaho kwanje
Ezekiel34:9 nuko rero
Ezekiel34:10 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize
Ezekiel34:11 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Umwami Uhoraho agize
Ezekiel34:12 Nk’ uk’ umwungere abariritsa umukuku wiwe mu gihe ari mu ntama ziwe zāsābagiriye kure
Ezekiel34:13 Kandi nzozizana ndazikūye mu mahanga
Ezekiel34:14 Nzoziragira mu canya ciza
Ezekiel34:15 Ni jewe ubganje nzokwiragirira intama zanje
Ezekiel34:16 Nzorondera iyazimiye
Ezekiel34:17 Kandi nawe
Ezekiel34:18 Mbega muvyita icoroshe
Ezekiel34:19 Maz’ intama zanje zo
Ezekiel34:20 Nuko rero
Ezekiel34:21 Ko muzisitisha imbavu n’ibitugu
Ezekiel34:22 ni co gituma ngira nkize umukuku wanje ngo ntube ukiba inyagano ukundi; kandi nce urubanza hagati y’ibitungwa n’ibindi.
Ezekiel34:23 Nzoziha umwungere umwe
Ezekiel34:24 Nanje Uhoraho
Ezekiel34:25 Kandi nzosezerana na zo isezerano ry’amahoro
Ezekiel34:26 Nzoziha umugisha hamwe n’uturambi duherereye ku musozi wanje; kandi nzorekura imvura mu gihe cayo; hazogwa imvura ihesha umugisha.
Ezekiel34:27 Maz’ igiti co mw ishamba kizokwama
Ezekiel34:28 Ntizizokwongera kuba inyagano z’abanyamahanga ukundi
Ezekiel34:29 Nzozimereza umuyigwe w’agahagarika
Ezekiel34:30 Maze zizomenya yuko jewe Uhoraho Imana yazo ndi kumwe na zo
Ezekiel34:31 Kandi namwe ntama zanje

Ezekiel35:2 riti Mwana w’umuntu

Ezekiel35:4 Ibisagara vyawe nzobigira imisaka
Ezekiel35:5 Ko wāmanye inyankane idahangūra
Ezekiel35:6 nuko rero ndahiye ukubaho kwanje
Ezekiel35:7 Uko ni k’umusozi Seyiri nzowuhindura akajoreza n’amatongo; kandi nzowuherengetezak’ uwahaca amaja n’amaza.
Ezekiel35:8 Kandi nzokwuzuza imisozi yaho abahindikiranijwe baho: abāriritswe n’inkota bazogwa ku misozi yawe
Ezekiel35:9 Nzoguhindura amatongo ibihe bidashira
Ezekiel35:10 Ko wagize ngw Ayo mahanga ukw ar’ abiri n’ivyo bihugu ukw ari bibiri bizoba ivyawe

Ezekiel37:1 Ukuboko kw’Uhoraho kwanjeko

Ezekiel37:3 Maz’ arambaza
Ezekiel37:4 Arongera arambarira
Ezekiel37:5 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho abarira aya magufa
Ezekiel37:6 Kandi ngira mbashirekw imitsi

Ezekiel37:8 Ngize ntya mbona arikw imitsi

Ezekiel37:10 Nuko nca mvuga nk’ukw ambariye
Ezekiel37:11 Nukw arambarira

Ezekiel38:5 ab’ i Buperesi n’abo muri Etiyopiya n’ab’ i Puti bazoba bari kumwe na bo
Ezekiel38:6 na Gomeri n’ingabo ziwe zose
Ezekiel38:7 Kenyera witegure

Ezekiel38:22 Nzomushitsakw iteka namuciriyeko

Ezekiel39:1 Nuko rero
Ezekiel39:2 nzoguhindukiza ngushorere
Ezekiel39:3 kand’ umuheto wawe ufashe mu kubamfu nzowukubita ukoroke
Ezekiel39:4 Muzogwa ku misozi y’i Bgisirayeli
Ezekiel39:5 Uzogwa mu gahinga ka sabaderi
Ezekiel39:6 Kandi nzokwanda umuriro Magogi
Ezekiel39:7 Izina ryanje ryera nzorimenyekanisha hagati mu bantu banje b’Abisirayeli; kandi sinzokunda kw izina ryanje ryongera guhumanywa ukundi: maz’ amahanga azomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho
Ezekiel39:8 Ehe biraje
Ezekiel39:9 Ni ho ababa mu bisagara vy’i Bgisirayeli bazosokoroka
Ezekiel39:10 bitume batakirinda kuja gusenya ku misozi
Ezekiel39:11 Kur’ uwo musi nzoha Gogi aho guhambga mu Bgisirayeli
Ezekiel39:12 Ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli bazomara amezi ndwi babahamba
Ezekiel39:13 Mber’ abantu bose bo mu gihugu bazobahamba; bizobaha kuvugangwa ku musi nzoba nshizwe hejuru
Ezekiel39:14 Kandi bazotora abantu bo kwama bakora ico gikorwa; bazogendagenda mu gihugu bahamba imivyimba yasigaye ku gasozi
Ezekiel39:15 kand’ abahita mu gihugu ni bahaca
Ezekiel39:16 Kandi hazobah’ igisagara kizokwitwa Hamona. Uko ni ko bazohumanura igihugu.
Ezekiel39:17 Nuko rero
Ezekiel39:18 Muzorya inyama z’abahambaye
Ezekiel39:19 Kandi muzorya ibinure muhāge
Ezekiel39:20 Muzohāgira ku meza yanje
Ezekiel39:21 Ubgiza bganje nzobushira hagati mu mahanga; kand’ amahanga yose azobona iteka nashikije
Ezekiel39:22 Uko ni kw ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli bazomenya yuko nd’ Uhoraho Imana yabo
Ezekiel39:23 Kand’ amahanga azomenya yukw ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli bājanywekw inyagano bahōwe ibigabitanyo vyabo; kuko bāncumuyeko
Ezekiel39:24 Nabashubirije mu nkōko ibihwanye n’ukwandura kwabo n’ibihwanye n’ibigabitanyo vyabo; mbahisha mu nyonga hanje.
Ezekiel39:25 Nuko rero
Ezekiel39:26 Bazokwibagira ibitētērwa vyabo
Ezekiel39:27 mmaze kubagarukana mbakūye mu mahanga
Ezekiel39:28 Maze bazomenyeshwa yuko nd’ Uhoraho Imana yabo
Ezekiel39:29 canke ngo nongere kubahisha mu nyonga hanje; kuko nzoba nasutse Mpwemu wanje ku nzu ya Isirayeli
Ezekiel40:1 Mu mwaka ugira mirongwibiri na gatanu uhereye aho twambukaniwe tur’ inyagano
Ezekiel40:2 Mur’ ukwo kwerekwa n’Imana
Ezekiel40:3 Nukw anshikanaho
Ezekiel40:4 Maz’ uwo muntu arambarira
Ezekiel40:5 Mbona urugo rw’amabuye rukikije ingoro impande zose; kandi wa muntu yari n’irenga ry’ ikigeresho mu ntoke; uburebure bgaryo bgār’ amatambge atandatu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora
Ezekiel40:6 Nukw aza ku kirimba cerekeye i burasirazuba
Ezekiel40:7 Icumba cose c’abashibamyi
Ezekiel40:8 Agera n’urubaraza rw’ikirimba rurābana n’ingoro
Ezekiel40:9 Maz’ agera amakika y’urwo rubaraza rw’ikirimba
Ezekiel40:10 Ivyumba bigendanye ico kirirīsi c’ikirimba cerekeye i burasirazuba vyāri bitatu ku ruhande rumwe
Ezekiel40:11 Agera ubgaguke bgo hagati y’ibirimba
Ezekiel40:12 imirēre yaca imbere y’ivyo vyumba yar’ iy’ itambge rimwe ku ruhande rumwe
Ezekiel40:13 Maz’ agera ico kirimba
Ezekiel40:14 Aharūra amatambge mirongwitandatu y’ ibishimaryango; kand’ urugo rwagarukira kur’ ivyo bishimaryango
Ezekiel40:15 Uhereye inyuma mw ishikiro ry’ikirimba ugashitsa ku rubaraza rw’ikirimba rw’imbere yar’ amatambge mirongwitanu.
Ezekiel40:16 Kandi hār’ amadirisha atugururwa kur’ ivyo vyumba
Ezekiel40:17 Maz’ anshikana mu rugo rwo mu ntangaro; mbona ivyumba n’ umusezero w’amabuye ujanye urugo impande zose: hār’ ivyumba mirongwitatu kur’ uwo musezero.
Ezekiel40:18 Mu mpande z’ibirimba ni ho uwo musezero wagendera
Ezekiel40:19 Maz’ agera uburebure ahereye imbere y’ikirimba c’intangaro
Ezekiel40:20 Agera uburebure bg’ikirirīsi c’ikirimba c’intangaro kirābana n’i burārūko
Ezekiel40:21 Ivyumba bigendanye ikirirīsi caco vyāri bitatu ku ruhande rumwe n’ibindi bitatu ku rundi; n’ibishimaryango vyaco n’urubaraza rwaco vyāri cabugerwe n’ivy’ ikirimba ca mbere: ikirirīsi caco kiba amatambge mirongwitanu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora
Ezekiel40:22 Amadirisha yo kuri co n’amabaraza yaco
Ezekiel40:23 Inyubakwa yar’ ifise ikirimba kirābana n’ico kirimba c’intangaro aherekeye i burārūko
Ezekiel40:24 Maz’ anjana aherekeye i bumanuko; ngize ntya mbona har’ ikirimba kirābana n’i bumanuko; agera ibishimaryango vyaco n’ amabaraza yaco
Ezekiel40:25 Kandi kuri co hārikw amadirisha bo no ku mabaraza yaco impande zose
Ezekiel40:26 Kuhashika kwār’ ukudondagira ku ngazi y’amabuye y’intambuko ndwi; kand’ amabaraza yaco yar’ ahahera imbere: kandi cāri gishushanijwekw ibigazi
Ezekiel40:27 Kandi hāri n’ikirimba kija mu nyubakwa ku ruhande rw’i bumanuko: maz’ agera ahereye kur’ ico kirimba agashika ku kindi
Ezekiel40:28 Maz’ anshikana mu nyubakwa ancishije mur’ ico kirimba c’ ahahera i bumanuko: arakigera
Ezekiel40:29 agera n’ivyumba bigendanye ikirirīsi caco
Ezekiel40:30 Kandi hār’ amabaraza ahakikije
Ezekiel40:31 Ayo mabaraza yaco yar’ ahahera mu ntangaro; ku bishimaryango vyaco hari hashushanijwekw ibigazi: kuhashika kwār’ ukudondagira ku ngazi y’amabuye y’intambuko munani.
Ezekiel40:32 Maz’ anshikana mu nyubakwa ahahera i burasirazuba: agera ikirimba caho
Ezekiel40:33 agera n’ivyumba bigendanye ikirirīsi caco
Ezekiel40:34 Amabaraza yaco yar’ ahahera mu ntangaro; ku bishimaryango vyaco hāri hashushanijwekw ibigazi ku ruhande rumwe no ku rundi; kuhashika kwār’ ukudondagira ku ngazi y’amabuye y’intambuko munani.
Ezekiel40:35 Maz’ anshikana ku kirimba c’ahahera i burārūko; arakigera
Ezekiel40:36 agera n’ivyumba bigendanye ikirirīsi caco
Ezekiel40:37 Ibishimaryango vyaco vyār’ ahahera mu ntangaro; kur’ ivyo bishimaryango hāri hashushanijwekw ibigazi ku ruhande rumwe no ku rundi; kuhashika kwār’ ukudondagira ku ngazi y’amabuye y’intambuko munani.
Ezekiel40:38 Kandi hār’ akumba gafise umuryango urābana n’ibishimaryango vy’ico kirimba; aho ni ho bāronga ibimazi vyo kwoswa.
Ezekiel40:39 No ku rubaraza rw’ikirimba hār’ ameza abiri ku ruhande rumwe
Ezekiel40:40 Ku ruhande rw’inyuma
Ezekiel40:41 Ku ruhande rumwe hār’ ameza ane
Ezekiel40:42 Kandi hāri n’ameza ane y’ibimazi vyo kwoswa
Ezekiel40:43 Hāri n’imambo zinegagiye ku nzu imbere impande zose; uburebure bgazo bgar’ itambge rimwe ry’intoke; kandi ku meza hār’ inyama zo guhēreza.
Ezekiel40:44 Hepfo y’ikirimba c’inyubakwa hār’ ivyumba vy’abaririmvyi imbere mu nyubakwa
Ezekiel40:45 Maz’ arambarira
Ezekiel40:46 Kand’ icumba kirābana n’i burārūko n’ic’ abaherezi bājejwe igicaniro: ari bo bene Sadoki
Ezekiel40:47 Nukw agera inyubakwa
Ezekiel40:48 Maz’ anshikana ku rubaraza rw’ingoro
Ezekiel40:49 Uburebure bg’urubaraza bgār’ amatambge mirongwibiri
Ezekiel41:1 Maz’ anjana ku rusengero
Ezekiel41:2 Ubgaguke bgo mw irebe buba amatambge cumi; kand’ impande z’irebe
Ezekiel41:3 Maz’ adwēbēra imbere
Ezekiel41:4 Agera n’uburebure bgaho bg’ umurambararo
Ezekiel41:5 Maz’ agera intimba y’inzu
Ezekiel41:6 Kand’ utwo twumba two mu mbavu twāri mu mirongo itatu
Ezekiel41:7 Utwo twumba two mu mbavu twagenda turutana uko tudūze dukikije ingoro
Ezekiel41:8 Mbona yukw iyo ngoro yari n’ itanguriro rirerire impande zose; amatanguriro y’utwumba two mu mbavu yar’ irenga rimwe ry’ amatambge atandatu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora n’ayandi atandatu y’intoke.
Ezekiel41:9 Intimba y’ igisika cubakiwe utwo twumba two mu mbavu
Ezekiel41:10 Kandi guhera kur’ utwo twumba hār’ umwanya w’amatambge mirongwibiri ukikuje ingoro impande zose.
Ezekiel41:11 Imiryango y’utwo twumba two mu mbavu yari yerekeye ha handi hāsigaye; umuryango umwe wari werekeye i burārūko
Ezekiel41:12 Kandi hār’ inzu yar’ imbere y’ uwo mwanya uciye hagati
Ezekiel41:13 Nukw agera uburebure bg’ umurambararo bg’ingoro buba amatambge ijana; agera n’uwo mwanya uciye hagati bo na ya nzu n’intimba yayo
Ezekiel41:14 agera n’ubgaguke bg’imbere y’ urusengero bo na wa mwanya uciye hagati aharābana n’i burasirazuba
Ezekiel41:15 Agera n’uburebure bg’ umurambararo bga ya nzu irābana na wa mwanya uciye hagati inyuma y’ingoro
Ezekiel41:16 no mw irebe
Ezekiel41:17 no gushitsa hejuru y’irebe
Ezekiel41:18 Kandi vyāri bisharijwekw ibishushanyo vy’abakerubi n’ibigazi; hagati y’umukerubi n’uwundi hāri harobetse ikigazi; kand’ umukerubi wese yar’ afise mu maso habiri
Ezekiel41:19 ahasa n’ah’ umuntu harābana n’ikigazi ku ruhande rumwe
Ezekiel41:20 Uhereye hasi ugashitsa hejuru y’irebe hari hashushanijwekw abakerubi n’ibigazi; uko ni ko vyashushanijwe guheza urusengero rwose.
Ezekiel41:21 Ibisapfu vy’urusengero vyangana impande zose; kand’ uruhande rw’imbere rw’Ahēra Cane rwāsa kumwe n’urusengero.
Ezekiel41:22 Igicaniro car’ ikibazano; uburebure bg’igihagararo bgaco bgar’ amatambge atatu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora
Ezekiel41:23 Kand’ urusengero n’Ahēra Cane vyari bifise amarebe abiri;
Ezekiel41:24 amarebe yompi yar’ afise inzugi zibiri zisomana; irebe rimwe ryagira inzugi zibiri
Ezekiel41:25 Kand’ izo nzugi z’urusengero zāri zishushanijwekw abakerubi n’ibigazi
Ezekiel41:26 Kandi hār’ amadirisha atugururwa n’ibigazi bishushanijwe ku rubaraza hirya no hino mu mpande zarwo; utwumba two mu mbavu z’ingoro
Ezekiel42:1 Maz’ ankūrayo
Ezekiel42:2 Uruhande rwarimw’ urugi rw’aharābana n’i burārūko
Ezekiel42:3 Iyo nzu yari n’ amabaraza agerekeranye mu mirongo itatu
Ezekiel42:4 Imbere y’iyo nzu irimw’ ivyumba hār’ inzira
Ezekiel42:5 Ivyumba vyo hejuru vyarutwa n’ivyo hasi bo n’ivyo hagati mur’ iyo nzu
Ezekiel42:6 Kuko vyubatswe mu mirongo itatu igerekeranye
Ezekiel42:7 Igisika c’ahahera inyuma y’inzu irimw’ ivyumba kirābana no mu ntangaro imbere y’ibindi vyumba
Ezekiel42:8 Kuko vya vyumba birāba mu ntangaro
Ezekiel42:9 Musi y’ivyo vyumba hār’ icanzo
Ezekiel42:10 Mu ntimba y’urugo rw’amabuye rw’inyubakwa ahahera i burasirazuba
Ezekiel42:11 Inzira yaca imbere yavyo yasa n’iyaca imbere y’ivyumba vy’ aherekeye i burārūko; ivyo hino n’ ivyo hirya vyose vyari cabugerwe mu burebure no mu bgaguke
Ezekiel42:12 Inzugi z’ivyumba vy’aherekeye i bumanuko na zo ni ko zari zimeze. Ku mutwe w’ inzira
Ezekiel42:13 Maz’ arambarira
Ezekiel42:14 Abaherezi iyo binjiye ahēra
Ezekiel42:15 Nukw arangije kugera imbere mu ngoro
Ezekiel42:16 Agera ku ruhande rw’i burasirazuba
Ezekiel42:17 Maz’ agera ku ruhande rw’i burārūko
Ezekiel42:18 Agera uruhande rw’i bumanuko
Ezekiel42:19 Maz’ ahindukirira mu ruhande rw’i burengerazuba
Ezekiel42:20 Uko ni ko yageze izo mpande ukw ari zine: urugo rwari ruhakikuje impande zose
Ezekiel43:1 Maze hanyuma anjana ku kirimba
Ezekiel43:2 ngize ntya mbona ubgiza bg’Imana y’ Abisirayeli buje buturutse mu nzira y’i burasirazuba. Ijwi ryayo ryari rimeze nk’ugusūma kw’ amazi menshi; isi ikayanganishwa n’ubgiza bgayo.
Ezekiel43:3 Ivyo neretswe vyari bimeze nk’ivyo neretswe igihe nazanwa no guhonnya igisagara; ivyo neretswe vyari bimeze nk’ivyo nerekewe ku ruzi Kebari; maze nikubita hasi nubamye.
Ezekiel43:4 Maz’ ubgiza bg’Uhoraho bginjira mu ngoro buciye mu kirimba gihera i burasirazuba.
Ezekiel43:5 Mpwemu aranterura
Ezekiel43:6 Maze numva ūmbarira ari mu ngoro; nuk’ umuntu aca ampagarara i ruhande.
Ezekiel43:7 Arambgira
Ezekiel43:8 kuko begereje irebe ryabo hambavu y’irebe ryanje
Ezekiel43:9 Noneho ni bankūre imbere ubgo bumaka bgabo
Ezekiel43:10 Nuko rero
Ezekiel43:11 Maze ni bamāramāzwa n’ivyo bākoze vyose
Ezekiel43:12 Iki ni co cagezwe c’iyo ngoro: mw itāba ry’uwo murwa
Ezekiel43:13 Kand’ aya az’ abe ari yo matambge y’igicaniro
Ezekiel43:14 Guhera ku ntebe hasi gushitsa ku ntera y’ahahera hepfo
Ezekiel43:15 N’ ahahera hejuru ku gicaniro habe amatambge ane; kandi hejuru ku gicaniro ahacanwa nyene haze hashingwe amahembe ane.
Ezekiel43:16 Aho gucanwa
Ezekiel43:17 Kand’ intera gihagazeko
Ezekiel43:18 Maz’ arambarira
Ezekiel43:19 Abaherezi b’ Abalewi
Ezekiel43:20 Uze wābīre ku maraso yaco
Ezekiel43:21 Kand’ uze wābīre iyo masa y’ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha
Ezekiel43:22 Maze ku musi ugira kabiri uz’ utange isuguru y’impene itagira agasembga kw ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha; bayihumanuze igicaniro nk’uko bāgihumanurishije ya masa.
Ezekiel43:23 Ni waheza kugihumanura
Ezekiel43:24 Uheze uvyigize hafi imbere y’Uhoraho
Ezekiel43:25 Uko bukeye kumara imisi ndwi
Ezekiel43:26 Baze bamare imisi ndwi batangira igicaniro impongano
Ezekiel43:27 Maze ni barangiza iyo misi
Ezekiel44:1 Maz’ arangarukana anshikana ku kirimba c’ahēra
Ezekiel44:2 Maz’ Uhoraho arambarira
Ezekiel44:3 Ariko segaba we
Ezekiel44:4 Maz’ anshikana imbere y’ingoro ancishije mu kirimba kirābana n’i burārūko; maze ngize ntya mbona ubgiza bg’Uhoraho bguzuye ingoro y’Uhoraho: nca nikubita hasi nubamye.
Ezekiel44:5 Maz’ Uhoraho arambarira
Ezekiel44:6 Uz’ ubgire ba bagarariji
Ezekiel44:7 ko mwinjije abanyamahanga batākebge mu mitima no ku mibiri ngo babe ahēra hanje
Ezekiel44:8 Kandi ntimwarinze ivyera vyanje mwajejwe
Ezekiel44:9 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize
Ezekiel44:10 Mbere n’Abalewi bāngiye kure
Ezekiel44:11 Bazosigara ar’ ibikomaguzi ahēra hanje
Ezekiel44:12 Ko bābakoreye bar’ imbere y’ibigirwamana vyabo
Ezekiel44:13 Ntibazonyegēra ngo bankorere igikorwa c’ubuherezi
Ezekiel44:14 Nzobahindura abo kuzezwa ingoro
Ezekiel44:15 Arikw abaherezi b’Abalewi
Ezekiel44:16 bazokwinjira ahēra hanje
Ezekiel44:17 Kandi ni baza baciye mu birimba vy’ inyubakwa
Ezekiel44:18 Baze bambare ibitambara vyera mu mitwe
Ezekiel44:19 Kandi ni basohoka bagashika mu ntangaro
Ezekiel44:20 Kandi ntibakimoshe inkomvorera
Ezekiel44:21 Ntihakagire uwo mu baherezi anywa vino igihe bagira baje mu nyubakwa.
Ezekiel44:22 Kandi ntibaze bacūre abapfakazi
Ezekiel44:23 Baze bigishe abantu banje gutandukanya ivyera n’ibitar’ ivyera
Ezekiel44:24 Mu mibūrano baze babe ari bo baca imanza; nk’ukw ivyagezwe vyanje bibgiriza
Ezekiel44:25 Ntibakēgēre umuvyimba w’umuntu n’umwe kugira ngo ntibīhumanye; nta bandi bokwihumanisha shit’ abaye se canke nyina
Ezekiel44:26 Maze ni yamara guhumanurwa bamuharūrire imisi ndwi.
Ezekiel44:27 Umusi azosubira gushika ahēra
Ezekiel44:28 Kandi ntihaze hagire uwundi mugabane bagira: umugabane wabo ni jewe; ntimuze mubahe ishamvu mu Bisirayeli: ishamvu yabo ni jewe.
Ezekiel44:29 Baze barye kw ishikanwa ry’amafu
Ezekiel44:30 Indobanurwa z’imishuzo yose y’ivyimburwa vyose
Ezekiel44:31 Abaherezi ntibakagire icipfiriye na kimwe bazorya
Ezekiel45:1 Maze
Ezekiel45:2 Kuri wo muze mukūre ikibanza c’ahēra
Ezekiel45:3 Uru ni rwo rugezo uzogera: uburebure bube irenga ingero ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bitanu
Ezekiel45:4 Uzoba umugabane wera ukūwe ku gihugu; hazoba ah’ abaherezi
Ezekiel45:5 Abalewi baherereza mu ngoro
Ezekiel45:6 Kandi muze murobanure ishamvu y’igisagara
Ezekiel45:7 Kand’ ahazoba aha segaba haze habe mu mpande zompi za wa mugabane wera w’ ishikanwa bo n’ishamvu y’igisagara
Ezekiel45:8 Aho hazomubera ishamvu hagati mu Bisirayeli mur’ ico gihugu; kandi ba segaba banje ntibazokwongera guhahaza abantu banje; ariko bazogabanganiriza igihugu ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli
Ezekiel45:9 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize
Ezekiel45:10 Mugire umunzane w’ukuri
Ezekiel45:11 Efa na batu bibe urugero rumwe
Ezekiel45:12 Shekeli ikābe gera mirongwibiri; shekeli zitanu zibe zitanu nyene
Ezekiel45:13 Iri ni ryo shikanwa muzoshikana: mu ngano muze mutange kimwe ca gatandatu co muri efa
Ezekiel45:14 urugero rw’amavuta rushinzwe muzotanga rwo muri batu igera amavuta
Ezekiel45:15 mutange n’umwagazi w’intama umwe‐umwe ukūwe mu mukuku w’amajana abiri‐abiri
Ezekiel45:16 Abantu bose bo mu gihugu bazozanira segaba w’Abisirayeli iryo shikanwa.
Ezekiel45:17 Ariko segaba az’ abe ari we atanga ibimazi vyo kwoswa
Ezekiel45:18 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize
Ezekiel45:19 Umuherezi aze yābīre ku maraso y’ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha

Ezekiel45:24 Kand’ az’ ashikane ishikanwa ry’amafu
Ezekiel45:25 Mu kwezi kw’indwi
Ezekiel46:1 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize

Ezekiel46:3 Kand’ abantu bo mu gihugu baze bahore basengera imbere y’Uhoraho bar’ inyuma y’ico kirimba ku masabato no mu mboneko z’ukwezi.
Ezekiel46:4 Ibimazi vyo kwoswa segaba azohora atanga k’Uhoraho ku musi w’isabato bize bibe imyagazi y’intama itandatu itagira agasembga
Ezekiel46:5 kand’ ishikanwa ry’ifu rigerekwa kur’ iyo mpfizi y’ intama rize ribe ingero yitwa efa

Ezekiel46:7 Kand’ az’ ashikane ishikanwa ry’ifu

Ezekiel47:1 Nukw angarukana ku muryango w’ingoro; ngize ntya

Ezekiel47:5 Hanyuma agera ikindi gihumbi

Ezekiel47:7 Nkiriko ndagenda

Ezekiel47:10 Kand’ abarovyi bazohagarara ku nkombe zaco; uhereye kuri Eni‐gedi ugashitsa kuri Enegulayimu hazoba aho gutera insenga; hazobamw’ amafi y’uburyo bginshi
Ezekiel47:11 Arikw ivyondo n’ibishanga vyo ku nkengēra yaco ntibizokira
Ezekiel47:12 Kandi ku nkombe z’urwo ruzi

Ezekiel47:17 Nuko rer’ urugabano ruzovuduka ku kiyaga ruce i Hazari‐Enoni ho ku rugabano rw’i Damasiko

Ezekiel48:1 Nukw aya ni yo mazina y’ imiryango: uhereye ahahera i burārūko
Ezekiel48:2 Kand’ ujanye ku rugabano rwa Dani
Ezekiel48:3 Kand’ ujanye ku rugabano rwa Asheri
Ezekiel48:4 Kand’ ujanye ku rugabano rwa Nafutali
Ezekiel48:5 Kand’ ujanye ku rugabano rwa Manase
Ezekiel48:6 Kand’ ujanye ku rugabano rwa Efurayimu
Ezekiel48:7 Kand’ ujanye ku rugabano rwa Reyubeni
Ezekiel48:8 Kand’ ujanye ku rugabano rwa Yuda
Ezekiel48:9 Uwo mugabane muzoshikanira Uhoraho
Ezekiel48:10 Nuk’ uwo mugabane wera uzoba uw’ abaherezi; uruhande rwawo rurābana n’i burārūko
Ezekiel48:11 Uzoba uw’ abaherezi bejejwe bo muri bene Sadoki
Ezekiel48:12 Uzobabera ishamvu ikūwe ku mugabane washikanywe usatuwe ku gihugu
Ezekiel48:13 Abalewi na bo bazogira umugabane ugendanye ku rugabano rw’abaherezi
Ezekiel48:14 Kandi ntibaze bagire aho bagura kuri wo
Ezekiel48:15 Ikirēre c’amatambge ibihumbi bitanu casigaye ku bgaguke bgaho
Ezekiel48:16 Izi ni zo ngero zaco: uruhande rw’i burārūko ruzoba amatambge ibihumbi bine n’amajana atanu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora
Ezekiel48:17 Kand’ ico gisagara kize kigire imparure: aharābana n’i burārūko habe amatambge amajana abiri na mirongwitanu
Ezekiel48:18 Maz’ ahasigaye hahereranye n’uburebure bg’umugabane wera w’ishikanwa
Ezekiel48:19 Ababa mu gisagara bo mu miryango yose y’ Abisirayeli
Ezekiel48:20 Umugabane w’ishikanwa wose na wose uzoba amakika ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bitanu n’uburebure ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bitanu nyene: umugabane wera w’ishikanwa muze muwushikane ungana impande zose ukw ari zine
Ezekiel48:21 Ahasigaye ho mu mpande zompi z’umugabane wera w’ishikanwa bo n’ishamvu y’igisagara
Ezekiel48:22 Nuk’ uhereye kw ishamvu y’Abalewi ugashitsa kw ishamvu y’igisagara
Ezekiel48:23 Nuko ku vy’imiryango isigaye: uhereye i burasirazuba ugashitsa i burengerazuba hazoba umugabane wa Benyamini.
Ezekiel48:24 Kand’ ujanye ku rugabano rwa Benyamini
Ezekiel48:25 Kand’ ujanye ku rugabano rwa Simeyoni
Ezekiel48:26 Kand’ ujanye ku rugabano rwa Isakari
Ezekiel48:27 Kand’ ujanye ku rugabano rwa Zebuloni
Ezekiel48:28 Kand’ ujanye ku rugabano rwa Gadi
Ezekiel48:29 Ico ni co gihugu muzogaburira imiryango y’Abisirayeli ngo bacegukire
Ezekiel48:30 Aya ni yo azoba amarembo y’ igisagara; ku ruhande rw’i burārūko uburebure buzoba amatambge ibihumbi bine n’amajana atanu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora:
Ezekiel48:31 kand’ amarembo y’igisagara azokwitiranywa n’amazina y’imiryango y’Abisirayeli; ahahera i burārūko amarembo azoba atatu: rimwe rizoba irembo rya Reyubeni
Ezekiel48:32 Ku ruhande rw’i burasirazuba uburebure buzoba amatambge ibihumbi bine n’amajana atanu nyene
Ezekiel48:33 Ku ruhande rw’i bumanuko uburebure buzoba amatambge ibihumbi bine n’amajana atanu nyene
Ezekiel48:34 Ku ruhande rw’i burengerazuba uburebure buzoba amatambge ibihumbi bine n’amajana atanu nyene
Ezekiel48:35 Kuhakikuza n’amatambge ibihumbi cumi n’umunani y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora: kand’ uhereye uwo musi izina ry’ico gisagara rizokwitwa ng’ Uhoraho ni ho aba.

Daniel1:3 Nuk’ umwami abarira Ashipenazi
Daniel1:4 b’imisore batagira agasembga

Daniel3:1 Umwami Nebukadineza yakoze igishushanyo mw izahabu
Daniel3:2 Nuk’ umwami Nebukadineza atuma gukoranya ivyēgēra vyiwe n’abaganwa n’abagabisha n’abajanama bakuru
Daniel3:3 Nukw ivyēgēra vy’umwami n’abaganwa n’abagabisha n’abajanama bakuru n’abazezwabintu n’abacamanza n’abashingantahe n’abatware bose bo mur’ izo ntāra bakoranywa no guhezagira ico gishushanyo umwami Nebukadineza yari yāhagaritse. Nuko bahagarara imbere y’ico gishushanyo yāhagaritse.
Daniel3:4 Umusiguzi asemerera n’ijwi rirenga
Daniel3:5 ngo Ni mwumva amajwi y’inzamba n’imyironge n’inanga n’amakembe n’imiduri n’ivyitwa sumponya n’ibindi vy’ubgoko bgose bivuzwa

Daniel3:10 washizeh’ icagezwe

Daniel3:26 Maze Nebukadineza yīgira ku muryango w’iryo tanure ry’umuriro uhinda
Daniel3:27 Maz’ ivyēgēra vy’umwami n’abaganwa n’abagabisha n’abajanama b’umwami bakoranye bitegereza abo bagabo
Daniel3:28 Nebukadineza aravuga
Daniel3:29 Ni co gitumye nshinga icagezwe
Daniel3:30 Maz’ umwami ashira hejuru Shaduraka na Meshaki na Abedunego mu gihugu c’i Babuloni.
Daniel4:1 Jewe umwami Nebukadineza ndabandikiye
Daniel4:2 Mbonye kw ari vyiza guserura ibimenyetso n’ibitangaza Imana isumba vyose yankoreye.
Daniel4:3 Es’ ukuntu ibimenyetso vyayo ar’ ibikomeye
Daniel4:4 Jewe Nebukadineza nari ngaho ngazagaza mu nzu yanje
Daniel4:5 Ndota inzozi zintera ubgoba; ivyiyumviro nagize ndi ku kirwa
Daniel4:6 kubg’ ivyo mpamagaza abanyabgenge bose b’i Babuloni
Daniel4:7 Abanyamarēba n’abapfumu n’Abakaludaya n’abamenyi bararenguka: mbarotorera izo nzozi
Daniel4:8 Arik’ ubuheruka hinjira Daniyeli
Daniel4:9 nti Yewe Beluteshaza
Daniel4:10 Ivyo nerekewe mu mutwe ndi ku kirwa n’ibi: Nagize ntya
Daniel4:11 Ico giti kirakura
Daniel4:12 Ibibabi vyaco vyari vyiza
Daniel4:13 Maze mu vyo nerekewe mu mutwe ndi ku kirwa
Daniel4:14 asemerera n’ijwi rirenga
Daniel4:15 Arikw igishitsi ukirekerane n’imizi yaco mu kuzimu
Daniel4:16 kand’ umutima waco ntube ukiba uw’ umuntu
Daniel4:17 Urwo rubanza rwaciwe n’abashibamyi
Daniel4:18 Izo nzozi ni jewe umwami Nebukadineza nazirose; nuko rero Beluteshaza
Daniel4:19 Nuko Daniyeli
Daniel4:20 Ico giti wabonye gikura kigakomera
Daniel4:21 kand’ ibibabi vyaco vyari vyiza
Daniel4:22 ico giti ni wewe
Daniel4:23 Kandi mwami
Daniel4:24 nuko
Daniel4:25 ng’ Uzokwirukanwa mu bantu
Daniel4:26 Kandi nk’uko bāgeze kw igishitsi n’imizi vy’ico giti birekerwaho
Daniel4:27 None mugenzi
Daniel4:28 Nukw ivyo vyose bishika ku mwami Nebukadineza.
Daniel4:29 Hashize amezi cumi n’abiri yarikw aranobanga mu rugo rwiwe i Babuloni.
Daniel4:30 Umwami aravuga
Daniel4:31 Iryo jambo umwami akirikūra mu kanwa
Daniel4:32 Urirukanywe mu bantu

Daniel4:34 Igihe cashinzwe kirangiye
Daniel4:35 Kand’ ababa kw isi bose ibagereranya n’ubusa
Daniel4:36 Nuk’ uwo mwanya ubgenge bganje buragaruka
Daniel4:37 Noneho jewe Nebukadineza nshima Umwami wo mw ijuru
Daniel5:1 Umwami Belushaza arondeza amazimano menshi
Daniel5:2 Maze Belushaza ahimvye igiturire
Daniel5:3 Nuko bazana ivyo bintu vy’izahabu vyari vyaranyazwe mu rusengero mu ngoro y’Imana i Yerusalemu; maz’ umwami n’abaganwa biwe n’abamikazi biwe n’ incoreke ziwe z’intoni babinyweramwo:
Daniel5:4 banywa ibiturire
Daniel5:5 Buno nyene haboneka intoke z’umuntu zandika ku gihome c’igisika mu ngoro y’umwami
Daniel5:6 Maze mu nyonga h’ umwami harahindurira
Daniel5:7 Umwami ahamagara n’ijwi rirenga ngo bamuzanire abapfumu n’Abakaludaya n’abamenyi. Umwami abarira abo banyabgenge b’i Babuloni
Daniel5:8 Maz’ abanyabgenge bose b’umwami baca barinjira: ariko birabananira gusoma iyo nyandiko
Daniel5:9 Maz’ umwami Belushaza aranduka umutima
Daniel5:10 Maz’ umugabekazi
Daniel5:11 kuko mu gihugu cawe har’ umuntu arimw’ impwemu z’imana zera. Kandi ku ngoma ya so umuco no gutahura n’ubgenge buhwanye n’ubgenge bg’izo mana vyabonetse muri we. Kandi so umwami Nebukadineza
Daniel5:12 kuko mur’ uwo muntu Daniyeli uwo umwami yise Beluteshaza
Daniel5:13 Nuko Daniyeli bamurengukana imbere y’umwami. Umwami abaza Daniyeli
Daniel5:14 Numvise bakuvuga ngw impwemu z’imana ziri muri wewe
Daniel5:15 Kandi bari bamaze kunzanira abanyabgenge b’abapfumu kugira ngo bansomere iyo nyandiko
Daniel5:16 Ariko numvise weho k’ushobora gusobanura ibintu
Daniel5:17 Daniyeli yishura umwami
Daniel5:18 Zirikana mugenzi
Daniel5:19 Kandi kubg’ ubukuru yamuhaye
Daniel5:20 Ariko yishize hejuru
Daniel5:21 Nuko yirukanwa mu bantu

Daniel5:23 ariko winantaje ku Mwami Nyen’ ijuru
Daniel5:24 Maz’ ico gihimba c’igikonjo kirarungikwa

Daniel5:26 Kand’ ukw ivyo bisobanurwa n’uku: Mene
Daniel5:27 Tekel
Daniel5:28 Peres
