Daniel6:1 Maze Dariyo abona kw ari vyiza kugabanganya igihugu abaganwa ijana na mirongwibiri
Daniel6:2 Kand’ ashira hejuru yabo abakuru batatu bo kubaganza
Daniel6:3 Maze Daniyeli aba agakomeye kuruta abandi bakuru n’abaganwa
Daniel6:4 Maze ba bakuru n’abaganwa baherako barondera urwitwazo rw’ ico borega Daniyeli ku vy’igihugu; ariko bamuburak’ urwitwazo na rumwe cank’ igitiriganye; kuko yar’ umwizigirwa
Daniel6:5 Bukeye abo bagabo baravugana
Daniel6:6 Nukw abo bakuru n’ abaganwa bakondorera ku mwami Dariyo
Daniel6:7 abakuru bose b’igihugu
Daniel6:8 Nuko rero
Daniel6:9 Nuk’ umwami Dariyo asinya ku candiko c’ico cihanikirizo.
Daniel6:10 Maze Daniyeli amenye kw ico candiko casinyweko
Daniel6:11 Bukeye ba bagabo barakondora
Daniel6:12 Baraza bavugira imbere y’umwami ivya ca cihanikirizo ciwe
Daniel6:13 Baca bishura umwami
Daniel6:14 Maz’ umwami yumvise iryo jambo biramutuntuza
Daniel6:15 Ba bagabo bongera gukondorera ku mwami
Daniel6:16 Nuk’ umwami apfa kubigera
Daniel6:17 Maze bazana ikibuye
Daniel6:18 Nuk’ umwami asubira mu ngoro yiwe
Daniel6:19 Ijoro rikeye mu mutwenzi umwami aravyukuruka
Daniel6:20 Ashitse hafi ya rwa rwobo Daniyeli yarimwo
Daniel6:21 Maze Daniyeli yishura umwami
Daniel6:22 Imana yanje yarungitse umumarayika wayo
Daniel6:23 Maz’ umwami aca aranezerwa cane
Daniel6:24 Maz’ umwami avuga ko bazana ba bagabo bāreze Daniyeli; babaterera muri rwa rwobo rw’intambge
Daniel6:25 Nuk’ umwami Dariyo yandikira amoko yose n’amahanga n’ abavuga indimi zitari zimwe baba mw isi yose
Daniel6:26 Nshinze icagezwe ngo mu bgami bganje iyo buva bukagera
Daniel6:27 Ni yo irokora igakiza
Daniel6:28 Nuko ku ngoma ya Dariyo no ku ngoma ya Kuro Umuperesi
Daniel7:1 Mu mwaka wa mbere Belushaza umwami w’i Babuloni ari ku ngoma
Daniel7:2 Nuko Daniyeli aravuga
Daniel7:3 Mur’ ico kiyaga hiburukamw’ ibikōko binini bine bidasangiye ubgoko.
Daniel7:4 Ica mbere casa n’intambge
Daniel7:5 Ndongera mbona ikindi gikōko ca kabiri gisa n’icitwa idubu; cari gihengarariye uruhande rumwe
Daniel7:6 Hanyuma y’ivyo mbona ikindi gikōko gisa n’ingwe; mu mbavu zaco cari gifise amababa ane
Daniel7:7 Hanyuma y’ivyo
Daniel7:8 Nitegereje ayo mahembe
Daniel7:9 Nkomeza kwitegereza
Daniel7:10 Uruzi rw’ umuriro rwiburuka ruva imbere yiwe; ibihumbi n’ibihumbi baramukorera
Daniel7:11 Naritegereje ico gihe kubg’ ijwi rya ya magambo yo kwihayagiza ka gahembe kāvuga; nkiriko nditegereza
Daniel7:12 Kandi na vya bikōko bindi
Daniel7:13 Kandi mu vyo neretswe mw ijoro
Daniel7:14 Aca ahabga inganji n’icubahiro n’ubgami
Daniel7:15 Maze jewe Daniyeli
Daniel7:16 Nuko nēgēra umwe mu bari bahagazeho
Daniel7:17 At’ Ivyo bikōko binini ukw ari bine
Daniel7:18 Arikw abera b’Īsumba vyose bazohabga ubgo bgami
Daniel7:19 Maze nca nifuza kumenya ivy’ ukuri vy’igikōko ca kane cari gifise itandukaniro na vya bindi vyose
Daniel7:20 Kandi nifuza kumenya ivya ya mahembe cumi yari mu mutwe waco
Daniel7:21 Maze nitegereje mbona iryo hembe rirwanya abera
Daniel7:22 gushitsa Uwa mbere na mbere aje
Daniel7:23 Maze wa wundi arambarira
Daniel7:24 Kandi ku vy’ayo mahembe cumi
Daniel7:25 Īsumba vyose azoyivugakw amajambo y’agatītūro
Daniel7:26 Arikw imanza zizoshingwa
Daniel7:27 Kand’ ubgami n’inganji n’ubukuru bg’ubgami bgose buri musi y’ijuru hose bizogabirwa ubgoko bg’abera b’ Īsumba vyose; ubgami bgayo n’ubgami buzokwamaho
Daniel7:28 Ayo majambo agarukiye aho. Ariko jewe Daniyeli ivyiyumviro vyanje bimpagarika umutima
Daniel8:1 Mu mwaka ugira gatatu umwami Belushaza ari ku ngoma
Daniel8:2 Mbona ivyo neretswe nko mu nzozi
Daniel8:3 Nunamuye amaso mbona impfizi y’intama ifise amahembe abiri
Daniel8:4 Mbona iyo mpfizi y’intama igenda itwariranya
Daniel8:5 Nkivyitegereza
Daniel8:6 Iza kuri ya mpfizi y’intama y’amahembe abiri
Daniel8:7 Mbona yēgereye iyo mpfizi y’intama
Daniel8:8 Maz’ iyo mpfizi y’impene yīgira agahambaye bihebuje; imaze kugira ubushobozi
Daniel8:9 Kuri rimwe mur’ ayo
Daniel8:10 Rihinduka rinini ryagamba no mu ngabo zo mw ijuru
Daniel8:11 Nuko ryīgira agahambaye
Daniel8:12 Izo ngabo bo n’ico kimazi gihora gitangwa
Daniel8:13 Maze numva uwera avuga; kand’ uwundi mu bera abaza umwe yabanje kuvuga
Daniel8:14 Aranyishura
Daniel8:15 Nuko jewe ubganje Daniyeli mmaze kubona ivyo neretswe
Daniel8:16 Maze numva ijwi ry’umuntu riturutse hagati mu ruzi Ulayi
Daniel8:17 Nuko yēgēra aho nari mpagaze; anshikiriye ncika ivutu
Daniel8:18 Akirikw aravugana nanje
Daniel8:19 Arambgira
Daniel8:20 Impfizi y’intama y’amahembe abiri wabonye ni bo bami b’Abamedi n’Abaperesi.
Daniel8:21 Impfizi y’impene y’ibisambi ni we mwami w’i Bugiriki; kand’ ihembe rinini ryari hagati y’amaso yayo ni we mwami wabo wa mbere.
Daniel8:22 Kandi nk’uko ryakondotse
Daniel8:23 Igihe ingoma yabo igira ihere
Daniel8:24 Ububasha bgiwe buzoba bukomeye
Daniel8:25 Akenge kiwe kazotuma ivy’ ubugunge birorana; azokwīgira agahambaye mu mutima wiwe
Daniel8:26 Kand’ ivyerekanywe vy’ubgira bugaca vy’iyo misi vyavuzwe
Daniel8:27 Maze jewe Daniyeli nca ncika intege

Daniel9:5 twaracumuye
Daniel9:6 Ntitwumviye abasavyi bawe
Daniel9:7 Bgirukiro
Daniel9:8 Bgirukiro
Daniel9:9 Umwami Imana yacu ni we afise imbabazi no guharira ivyaha
Daniel9:10 ntitwumvire Uhoraho Imana yacu
Daniel9:11 Ni koko
Daniel9:12 Maz’ ishitsa amajambo yayo yatuvuzeko twe n’abacamanza bacu bātuganza
Daniel9:13 Ivyo vyago vyose vyadushitseko nk’uko vyanditswe mu vyagezwe vya Mose; yamara nta ho twinginze Uhoraho Imana yacu ngw idutunge

Daniel9:25 Nuk’ umenye

Daniel9:27 Kand’ azosezerana na benshi isezerano rikomeye kumara iyinga rimwe: ni ryagera hagati azokūrah’ ibimazi n’amashikanwa; ūgeseza azoza kw ibaba ry’ibizira; maz’ ubuyobe buzosukwa kur’ uyo ageseza
Daniel10:1 Mu mwaka ugira gatatu Kuro umwami w’i Buperesi ari ku ngoma
Daniel10:2 Mur’ iyo misi jewe Daniyeli namaze amayinga atatu yiramvuriye ntuntuye.
Daniel10:3 Nta binōbōye narya
Daniel10:4 Maze ku musi ugira mirongwibiri na kane w’ukwezi kwa mbere
Daniel10:5 Nunamuye amaso mbona umuntu yambaye impuzu zera
Daniel10:6 Kand’ umubiri wiwe wasa n’akabuyenge kitwa tarushishi
Daniel10:7 Ni jewe Daniyeli gusa nabonye ivyo vyerekanywe
Daniel10:8 Nuko jeho nsigaraho nd’umwe
Daniel10:9 Yamara numva ijwi ry’amajambo yiwe; nkiryumva
Daniel10:10 Nuko haza ukuboko kunkorako
Daniel10:11 Arambgira
Daniel10:12 Maz’ arambgira
Daniel10:13 Ariko segaba w’ ubgami bg’i Buperesi yamaze imisi mirongwibiri n’umwe andwanya. Hanyuma Mikayeli
Daniel10:14 Nuko none nzanywe no kugutahuza ibizoba ku bgoko bganyu mu misi y’iherezo; kukw ivyo weretswe ar’ ibizoba hahise igihe kirekire.
Daniel10:15 Ambgiye ayo majambo
Daniel10:16 Maze haza ūfise ishusho nk’iy’ abana b’abantu
Daniel10:17 Mbega nkanje
Daniel10:18 Uwasa n’umuntu yongera kunkorako
Daniel10:19 Arambgira
Daniel10:20 Arambaza
Daniel10:21 Ariko ndakubarira ivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivy’ ukuri: kandi nta wuriho wo kuntabara kubarwanya atari Mikayeli umugabisha wanyu.
Daniel11:1 Kandi nanje
Daniel11:2 Nuko none ngira nkwereke ivy’ ukuri. Haracasigaye abandi bami batatu bazokwima i Buperesi; arik’ uwa kane azorusha abandi bose ubutunzi bginshi: uwo ni yamara kuba umunyabushobozi kubg’ ubutunzi bgiwe
Daniel11:3 Maz’ umwami ahambaye azohaguruka
Daniel11:4 Ni yamara guhaguruka
Daniel11:5 Nuk’ umwami w’i bumanuko azoba ūkomeye; arik’ umwe wo mu baganwa biwe azomurusha ububasha
Daniel11:6 Hashize imyaka bazokwuzura
Daniel11:7 Ariko mu ngundu zo ku gishitsi c’i wabo hazovyuka ūzosubira ku ngoma ya se
Daniel11:8 kand’ ibigirwamana vyabo na vyo
Daniel11:9 Hanyuma uwo mwami na we azotera igihugu c’umwami w’i bumanuko
Daniel11:10 Hanyuma abana biwe bazovyura intambara
Daniel11:11 Maz’ umwami w’i bumanuko azoshungumirwa
Daniel11:12 Amaze kujana izo ngabo kw inyagano
Daniel11:13 kuk’ umwami w’i burārūko azogaruka
Daniel11:14 Ico gihe benshi bazokūrira hasi umwami w’i bumanuko
Daniel11:15 Nuk’ umwami w’i burārūko azoza
Daniel11:16 Arik’ ūzoba amuteye azogira nk’uko yigombeye
Daniel11:17 Hanyuma azoja imigabo yo gusidukana n’ingabo z’igihugu ciwe cose; arikw azokwihanura
Daniel11:18 Hanyuma y’ivyo azohindukiza amaso
Daniel11:19 Maz’ azohindukiza amaso yerekeze mu maboma yo mu gihugu ciwe bgite; arikw azotsitara
Daniel11:20 Bukeye hazovyuka uwundi mu gishingo ciwe
Daniel11:21 Bukeye mu gishingo ciwe hazovyuka umuntu w’inkēngērwa
Daniel11:22 Maz’ ingabo zizoba zisebereye nk’uruzi zizotembanwa n’umuvo imbere yiwe
Daniel11:23 Kandi hagize umuntu yifatanya na we
Daniel11:24 Mu gihe c’impore azotera intambara aharusha ahandi kumera mu gihugu; azokora ivyo ba sekuru na ba sekuruza batigeze gukora; azogabanganya abantu amasahu n’iminyago n’itunga; mber’ azomara igihe gitoya yīgīriye imigabo yo gutera amaboma akomeye.
Daniel11:25 Maz’ azokwiyungunganya mu bubasha bgiwe n’ ubugabo
Daniel11:26 Mber’ abazoba barya ku binōbōye vyiwe ni bo bazomufyonyora; ingabo ziwe zizotembanwa n’umuvo
Daniel11:27 Abo bami bompi imitima yabo izoba iyo gukora ikibi; bazovugana ibinyoma bari ku meza amwe: arikw ivyabo ntibizororana
Daniel11:28 Nukw azosubirana mu gihugu ciwe ibintu vyinshi; kand’ umutima wiwe uzoba wanse isezerano ryera
Daniel11:29 Nuko mu gihe cashinzwe azosubira kuja gutera i bumanuko; arikw ico gihe co hanyuma ntikizomera nk’ica mbere.
Daniel11:30 Kukw amāto y’i Kitimu azomutera
Daniel11:31 Azogomora ingabo ziwe
Daniel11:32 Abakora ibibi vyo kurwanya isezerano azobazimirisha akarimi keza; arikw abantu bazi Imana yabo bazoshikama bakore ibikomeye.
Daniel11:33 Kand’ abari n’ubgenge bo mu bantu bazokwigisha benshi; ariko bazokwicwa n’inkota n’umuriro no gushumikwa no kuba inyagano kumara igihe.
Daniel11:34 Ni bakorokera mur’ ivyo vyago
Daniel11:35 Kandi bamwe mur’ abo banyabgenge bazokwicwa
Daniel11:36 Nuk’ uwo mwami azokora uko yigombeye
Daniel11:37 Kandi ntazobabara imana za ba sekuruza
Daniel11:38 Ariko mu gishingo cazo azokwubaha imana y’amaboma; mber’ imana ba sekuruza batigeze kumenya azoyubahisha kuyishikanira izahabu n’ifeza n’utubuyenge tw’igiciro kinini n’ibintu vy’igikundiro.
Daniel11:39 Kand’ azonesha amaboma arusha ayandi gukomera
Daniel11:40 Maze mu gihe c’ iherezo umwami w’i bumanuko azomutera
Daniel11:41 Azoshika no mu gihugu c’ubgiza; henshi hazotikizwa
Daniel11:42 Nukw azoshingiriza ukuboko ibihugu bitari bimwe
Daniel11:43 Azoganza itunga ry’izahabu n’ifeza n’ibintu vyose vy’igiciro vyo muri Egiputa; Abalibuwa n’Abanyetiyopiya bazomukakako.
Daniel11:44 Arikw inkuru zivuye i burasirazuba n’i burārūko zizomuhagarika umutima
Daniel11:45 Azoshinga amahema yiwe y’ ubgami hagati y’ikiyaga n’umusozi wera w’ubgiza; yamar’ ageze ku musi w’iherezo ryiwe nta wuzomutabara.

Daniel12:2 Kandi benshi bo mu bazoba basinziriye mw ivu hasi bazokwikangura
Daniel12:3 Kand’ abāgize ubgenge bazokayangana nk’ugukayangana kwo mw itāzānure ry’ijuru
Daniel12:4 Nuko rero wewe Daniyeli
Daniel12:5 Maze jewe Daniyeli nditegereza
Daniel12:6 Umwe abaza wa muntu yambaye impuzu zera
Daniel12:7 Mbona wa muntu yambaye impuzu zera
Daniel12:8 Ndavyumva
Daniel12:9 Aranyishura
Daniel12:10 Benshi bazotunganywa
Daniel12:11 Ikimazi co kwoswa gihora gitangwa uko bukeye uhereye igihe kizokūrirwaho
Daniel12:12 Hahirwa uzorīndīra
Daniel12:13 Nuko ni wīgīre

Hosea1:2 Igihe Uhoraho yatangura kuvugisha Hoseya ubga mbere
Hosea1:3 Nukw aragenda
Hosea1:4 Maz’ Uhoraho aramubarira

Hosea1:7 Ariko nzogirira ikigongwe inzu ya Yuda
Hosea1:8 Nukw acukije Ntambabazi
Hosea1:9 Uhoraho aravuga
Hosea1:10 Yamar’ amaherezo
Hosea1:11 Kand’ Abayuda n’Abisirayeli bazokoranira hamwe
Hosea2:1 Mwite barumuna banyu
Hosea2:2 Ni mwībūranire na nyoko
Hosea2:3 kugira ngo sinze ndamusige amēnya
Hosea2:4 Mbere sinzogirira abana biwe imbabazi
Hosea2:5 nyina akaba yarīhinduye maraya
Hosea2:6 Ni co gituma ngira nsākize amahwa inzira yiwe
Hosea2:7 Azokwirukira abūzure biwe
Hosea2:8 Erega ntiyamenye kw ari jewe namuha za ngano na vino n’amavuta
Hosea2:9 Ni co gituma nzosubira ku ngano zanje mu gihe zokweze
Hosea2:10 Noneho ngira ngaragarize ibiteye isoni vyiwe imbere y’abūzure biwe
Hosea2:11 Nzomucakw ibitwengo
Hosea2:12 Kandi nzoririka imizabibu yiwe n’imisukoni yiwe
Hosea2:13 Nzomuhōra imisi yamaze yosereza za Bayali imibavu
Hosea2:14 Nuko rero
Hosea2:15 Nzohamukomōrera imizabibu yiwe
Hosea2:16 Kandi kur’ uwo musi
Hosea2:17 Kuko nzokūra mu kanwa kiwe amazina ya za Bayali
Hosea2:18 Maze kur’ uwo musi nzosezerana isezerano n’ibikōko vyo mw ishamba
Hosea2:19 Kandi nzokwikwerera ube uwanje ibihe bidashira; mbere nzokwikwerera mu bugororotsi no mu kuroranya no mu kugira neza no mu mbabazi.
Hosea2:20 Ni koko nzokwikwerera mu kuba umwizigirwa: nawe uzommenya jewe Uhoraho.
Hosea2:21 Kandi kur’ uwo musi nzokwitaba ijuru
Hosea2:22 isi na yo yitabe ingano na vino n’amavuta
Hosea2:23 Ni jewe nzomwibibira mu gihugu; kandi Ntambabazi nzomugirira imbabazi
Hosea3:1 Maz’ Uhoraho arambarira
Hosea3:2 Nuko ndamutangakw intete z’ifeza cumi na zitanu
Hosea3:3 Maze ndamubarira
Hosea3:4 Kukw Abisirayeli bazomara imisi myinshi ata mwami
Hosea3:5 maz’ amaherezo Abisirayeli bazogaruka
Hosea4:1 Ni mwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho
Hosea4:2 Nta kindi kiriho
Hosea4:3 Ni co gituma igihugu kirira
Hosea4:4 Ariko nta muntu abirwanya
Hosea4:5 Uzotsitara ku murango
Hosea4:6 Abantu banje baranduwe no kutagira ubgenge: wewe ko wataye ubgenge
Hosea4:7 Uko bākomeje kugwira
Hosea4:8 Ivyaha vy’abantu banje ni vyo vyo kurya vyabo; bashira imitima ku bigabitanyo vyabo.
Hosea4:9 Nuko nk’uko bimeze ku banyagihugu
Hosea4:10 Maze bazorya ntibahāge
Hosea4:11 Ubusambanyi na vino n’umubira wayo bimara ubgenge.
Hosea4:12 Abantu banje bagisha inama igiti gusa
Hosea4:13 Bacumitira ibimazi ku mpinga z’imisozi
Hosea4:14 Sinzohana abakobga banyu ni bīgira ba maraya
Hosea4:15 Ewe Isirayeli
Hosea4:16 Isirayeli yabaye ikiganda nk’ inka y’ishashi y’ikiganda: non’ Uhoraho yobaragira nk’umwagazi w’intama ahantu h’amaramvya?
Hosea4:17 Efurayimu yifatanije n’ibigirwamana: n’umureke!
Hosea4:18 Ibinyobga vyabo vyacitse umururazi: basambana ubudahumeka; abatware babo bakunda ibiteye isoni birenze urugero.
Hosea4:19 Igihuhuta cabatwaye mu mababa yaco; kandi bazomāramāzwa n’ibimazi vyabo.
Hosea5:1 Ni mwumve ibi
Hosea5:2 Abagarariji biyongeranije cane kwica: ariko nzobahana bose.
Hosea5:3 Efurayimu ndamuzi
Hosea5:4 Ibikorwa vyabo ntibizobakundira kugaruka ku Mana yabo: kukw impwemu y’ubumaka iri muri bo
Hosea5:5 Ubgibone bga Isirayeli ni bgo bumwagiriza imbonankubone: ni co kizotuma Isirayeli na Efurayimu bazotemba mu bigabitanyo vyabo
Hosea5:6 Bazojana imikuku yabo n’amasho yabo baja kurondera Uhoraho
Hosea5:7 Bāryarutse Uhoraho
Hosea5:8 Muvugirize inzamba i Gibeya
Hosea5:9 Efurayimu azosigara ar’ imbura ku musi wo guhanwa: namenyesheje imiryango y’Abisirayeli ibitazobura kubaho.
Hosea5:10 Abaganwa b’i Buyuda bahwanye n’abashingūra akarimbi k’urubibe: nzobasukak’ uburake bganje nk’amazi.
Hosea5:11 Efurayimu arahahajwe
Hosea5:12 Ni co gituma mmereye Efurayimu nk’ inyenzi ku mpuzu
Hosea5:13 Igihe Efurayimu yabonye indwara yiwe
Hosea5:14 Kuko nzomerera Efurayimu nk’intambge
Hosea5:15 Nzogenda nisubirire i wanje

Hosea6:2 Imisi ibiri ishize azoduhēmbūra: ku musi ugira gatatu azoduhagurutsa
Hosea6:3 Enda tumenye Uhoraho
Hosea6:4 Ewe Efurayimu
Hosea6:5 Ni co gituma nzobatemagurisha abavugishwa nanje; nzobicisha amajambo yo mu kanwa kanje; kand’ imanza mbaciriye zizokwira hose nk’umuco.

Hosea7:3 Umwami bamuteresha umunezero ivyaha vyabo

Amos5:6 Jewe Uhoraho abe ari jewe musiguza
Amos5:7 Yemwe abahindura imanza zigacika umururazi
Amos5:8 Umwe yaremye inyenyeri zitwa Kilimiya na Oriyoni abe ari we mubaza; ni we ahindura igitūtu c’urupfu kigacika agatondo
Amos5:9 ni we atuma agatikizo gasūmira abanyenkomezi
Amos5:10 Banka ūhanūrira mw ishikiro ry’igisagara
Amos5:11 Nuko rero
Amos5:12 Kuko nzi ibicumuro vyanyu ingen’ ari vyinshi
Amos5:13 Ni co gituma umunyamakenga apfa kwinumira mu gihe nk’ico
Amos5:14 Ivyiza abe ari vyo mushishikara
Amos5:15 Mwanke ibibi
Amos5:16 Nuko rero
Amos5:17 No mu mirima yose y’imizabibu hazoba amaborogo: kuko nzoba nciye hagati muri mwebge
Amos5:18 Muzobona ibara
Amos5:19 Erega ni nk’ah’ umuntu yohunga intambge agahūra n’idubu
Amos5:20 Mbeg’ umusi w’Uhoraho ntuzoba umwiza? Mugira ng’uzoba umuco? Mber’ uzoba umwiza w’umuzitanya
Amos5:21 Nzinutswe imisi mikuru yanyu
Amos5:22 Mbere naho mwonshikanira ibimazi vyoswa n’amashikanwa y’amafu
Amos5:23 Nkūra urwamo rw’indirimbo zanyu mu matwi
Amos5:24 Arikw imanza ziroranye
Amos5:25 Mbega mwaranzaniye ibimazi n’amashikanwa mu bugaragwa ya myaka ukw ari mirongwine
Amos5:26 Nuko rero muzorerura Sikuti umwami wanyu
Amos5:27 Ni co kizotuma mbambukanisha mur’ inyagano hirya y’i Damasiko
Amos6:1 Bazobona ibara
Amos6:2 Enda ni mugende
Amos6:3 Yemwe ko mushira kure umusi mubi
Amos6:4 Bīryāmira ku mariri yakozwe mu mahembe y’inzovu
Amos6:5 bavugira inanga mu bijandajando
Amos6:6 bakanywesha vino ivyato
Amos6:7 Nuko ni co gituma bazogenda ar’ aba mbere mu bambukanwa ar’ inyagano
Amos6:8 ni k’Uhoraho Imana Nyen’ ingabo agize. Umwami Uhoraho arirahiye
Amos6:9 Naho mu nzu imwe hosigaramw’ abantu cumi
Amos6:10 Umuntu ni yaza guterura umuvyimba wa mwene wabo ngw awuturire

Amos6:13 yemwe abahimbarwa n’ikintu kitagira ikimazi
Amos6:14 Arikw ehe rāba
Amos7:1 Ibi ni vyo Umwami Uhoraho yanyeretse: ehe rāba

Amos7:7 Ibi ni vyo yanyeretse: ehe rāba

Amos7:9 kand’ ibitabo aba Isaka bātavye ku mpinga z’imisozi bizosigara bitamāriwe

Amos8:1 Ibi ni vyo Umwami Uhoraho yanyeretse: ngize ntya
Amos8:2 Maz’ arambaza

Amos8:5 mukavuga
Amos8:6 ngo dushōre ifeza twigurire abarushwa
Amos8:7 Uhoraho arahiye ubgiza bga Yakobo

Amos8:11 Eh’ imisi izoza
Amos8:12 Kandi bazonyavuta bakubite ku kiyaga baje ku kindi; bazojarajara bakubite n’i burārūko baje n’i burasirazuba
Amos8:13 Kur’ uwo musi inkumi nziza‐nziza bo n’abasore bazorabikwa n’inyota.
Amos8:14 Abarahira ubuyobe bg’i Samariya
Amos9:1 Nabonye Umwami Imana ahagaze i ruhande y’igicaniro

Amos9:3 Kandi naho bokwinyegeza ku mpinga ya Karumeli
Amos9:4 Kandi naho bokwambukanwa n’abansi babo ar’ inyagano

Amos9:10 Abanyavyaha bose bo mu bantu banje bazokwicwa n’inkota

Amos9:12 kugira ngo begukire amasigarira y’Abanyedomu

Amos9:15 Kandi nzobateragira mu gihugu cabo
Obadiah1:1 Ivyo Obadiya yeretswe. Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize ku vy’Abanyedomu. Twumvise inkuru zivuye k’Uhoraho
Obadiah1:2 Rāba
Obadiah1:3 Ubgibone bgo mu mutima wawe bgaraguhenze
Obadiah1:4 Naho wodūga intumbgejuru nk’inkukuma
Obadiah1:5 Ewe kuntu ugeseye! Ibisuma vyokūzira
Obadiah1:6 Ewe kuntu ivya Esau bisesanguwe! Itunga ryiwe ryari rinyegejwe ukuntu risokorowe!
Obadiah1:7 Abo mwari mwifatanije bose bāragusohoye
Obadiah1:8 Mbega kur’ uwo musi sinzorandura abanyabgenge bo muri Edomu
Obadiah1:9 Ewe Temani
Obadiah1:10 Kubg’ inabi wagiriye mwene nyoko Yakobo uzomāramāra
Obadiah1:11 Kuri wa musi wari wihagarariye urāba utw’ ininga
Obadiah1:12 Yamara ntiwar’ ukwiye kurāba utw’ ininga umusi wa mwene nyoko ugeze
Obadiah1:13 Abantu banje ntiwari kubāzira mw irembo
Obadiah1:14 Ntiwar’ ukwiye guhagarara mu mayirabiri ng’ utikize ababo bacitse
Obadiah1:15 Kuk’ umusi w’Uhoraho uri hafi
Obadiah1:16 Kand’ uko mwanywereye ku musozi wanje wera
Obadiah1:17 Ariko ku musozi Siyoni hazoba ubukiriro
Obadiah1:18 Kand’ ab’ inzu ya Yakobo bazoba umuriro

Obadiah1:21 Kand’ abatabazi bazodūga ku musozi Siyoni

Jonah1:12 Arabishura

Jonah1:17 Uhoraho agera urufi runini ngo rumire Yona. Maze Yona amara mu nda y’urufi imisi itatu n’amajoro atatu.

Micah1:5 Ivyo vyose vyatewe n’igicumuro ca Yakobo

Micah1:7 Ibishushanyo vyaho vyose bibajwe bizojanjagurwa bicike ubunywenywe
Micah1:8 Kubg’ ivyo nzorira mboroge
Micah1:9 Kuk’ uruguma rwaho rutazovūrika: mbere rwashitse n’i Buyuda; rushika kw irembo ry’ abantu banje
Micah1:10 Ntimukabikerukirize i Gati
Micah1:11 Enda vayo wambaye ubusa utēterewe

Micah1:15 Namwe muba i Maresha nzobarungikira ūzobanesha; ubgiza bg’ Abisirayeli buzoshika no muri Adulamu.

Micah7:20 Ukuri kwawe uzogushitsa kuri Yakobo
Nahum1:1 Imbūri yo kuri Ninewe. Igitabo c’ivyo Nahumu Umwelekoshi yeretswe.
Nahum1:2 Uhoraho n’Imana ifūha kandi ni we ahōra; Uhoraho arahōra kandi yuzuye uburake; Uhoraho yihōra abarwanizi biwe
Nahum1:3 Uhoraho ateba kuraka
Nahum1:4 Akankamira ikiyaga akagikamya
Nahum1:5 Imisozi ishizwe mu gatengo na we
Nahum1:6 Ni nde yoshobora guhagarara imbere y’ ubushangashirwe bgiwe? Kandi ni nde yoshobora kwihanganira uburake bgiwe bukaze? Uburake bgiwe busukwa nk’umuriro
Nahum1:7 Uhoraho ni mwiza
Nahum1:8 Arikw abarwanizi biwe azotuma batwarwa n’uruzi rusendanisha
Nahum1:9 Ivyo muja imigabo k’Uhoraho n’ibiki? Azobageseza rwose: ubgo buyobe ntibuzorinda guhaguruka ubugira kabiri.
Nahum1:10 Kuko naho bomera nk’amahwa azitanye
Nahum1:11 Muri wewe haturutse uwagiye imigabo mibi k’Uhoraho
Nahum1:12 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize
Nahum1:13 Mber’ ubu ngira mvune ingōgo yiwe ikuveko
Nahum1:14 Kand’ Uhoraho yarashinze ivyawe
Nahum1:15 Rāba ku misozi ibirenge vy’ ūzanye inkuru nziza
Nahum2:1 Ūjonjanga arakudūgiye: mera magabo ku ruzitiro rw’amabuye
Nahum2:2 Kuk’ Uhoraho agarukanye icubahiro c’aba Yakobo
Nahum2:3 Inkinzo z’abahizi biwe ziratukura
Nahum2:4 Imikogote y’intambara igenda akābushūngwe mu mayira
Nahum2:5 Ahamagara abahizi biwe
Nahum2:6 Imigomero y’inzūzi iragomorowe
Nahum2:7 Umwamikazi yambitswe ubusa
Nahum2:8 Ninewe hameze nk’ikidengeri c’amazi gisenzwe: barasemerera
Nahum2:9 Ni musahure amafeza
Nahum2:10 Hasigaye ubusa
Nahum2:11 Urwobo rw’intambge rwabaye iki
Nahum2:12 Ereg’ intambge yahora itabagura ivyo guhimvya ivyana vyayo
Nahum2:13 Ehe nzohigūra nawe
Nahum3:1 Igisagara kivisha amaraso kirakabona ibara! Cuzuye ibinyoma n’isahu; nta ho gisība kunyaga.
Nahum3:2 Humvikana inyobozo
Nahum3:3 uwisuka mu rugamba ari kw ifarasi
Nahum3:4 Ivyo vyose vyatewe n’ubusambanyi burenze urugero bga maraya ateye igomwe
Nahum3:5 Ehe nzohigūra nawe
Nahum3:6 ngutere ivyatsi
Nahum3:7 Nukw abazokurāba bose bazoguhunga
Nahum3:8 Mbega har’ ico urusha No‐Amona
Nahum3:9 Isinzi ry’Abanyetiyopiya n’ Abanyegiputa ni bo bār’ inkomezi zaho; Abaputi n’Abalubimu bār’ abatabazi baho.
Nahum3:10 Ariko hāranyazwe
Nahum3:11 Nawe n’uko
Nahum3:12 Amaboma yawe yose azoba nk’ibiti vy’imisukoni
Nahum3:13 Eh’ abantu bawe bari muri wewe bameze bga bagore; amarembo y’igihugu cawe yugururiwe abansi bawe: umuriro watōngōye imyugariro yawe.
Nahum3:14 Enda ni wivomere amazi azomara igihe uzoba wugarijwe; amaboma yawe n’uyakomeze; ja mw ibumba
Nahum3:15 Aho ni houmuriro uzogutōngōrera; uzotikizwa n’inkota
Nahum3:16 Abadandaza bawe wabagwijije kurusha inyenyeri zo kw ijuru; bameze nk’inzige zizingurura amababa yazo
Nahum3:17 Abagaba bawe bameze nk’inzige
Nahum3:18 Ewe kuntu abungere bawe bisinziriye
Nahum3:19 Uruguma rwawe nta kōyōkwe rugira; igikomere cawe ntikizokira: abumvise inkuru zawe bose bakubita amashi ku yandi; mbega ni nde utāhora ugirira nabi?
Habakkuk1:1 Imbūri uwavugishwa n’Imana Habakuki yeretswe.
Habakkuk1:2 Uhoraho we
Habakkuk1:3 N’iki gituma unyereka ibigabitanyo
Habakkuk1:4 Ni co gituma amabgirizwa asigaye yāfōrorotse
Habakkuk1:5 Enda ni murābe mu mahanga
Habakkuk1:6 Kukw ehe rāba
Habakkuk1:7 Abo n’ibirara vy’inkazi

Zechariah12:2 at’ Ehe nzohindura Yerusalemu igikombe co kudandabagiranya amahanga yose ahakikije

Zechariah12:4 Kur’ uwo musi
Zechariah12:5 Abatware b’ Abayuda bazokwibgira mu mitima
Zechariah12:6 Kur’ uwo musi abatware b’Abayuda nzobahindura nk’urujo rurik’ umuriro rushirwa mu nkwi
Zechariah12:7 Kand’ Uhoraho azobanza gukiza amahema y’Abayuda
Zechariah12:8 Kur’ uwo musi Uhoraho azokīranira ababa i Yerusalemu; umunyantege nke wo muri bo kur’ uwo musi azomera nka Dawidi; kand’ inzu ya Dawidi izomera nk’Imana
Zechariah12:9 Kandi kur’ uwo musi nzokwitwaririka kugeseza amahanga yose yaje gutera i Yerusalemu.
Zechariah12:10 Kandi nzosuka ku nzu ya Dawidi no ku baba i Yerusalemu impwemu y’ubuntu n’iyo gusenga; kandi bazokwitegereza uwo bācumise; bazomuborogera nk’ ūborogera umwana wiwe w’ikinege
Zechariah12:11 Kur’ uwo musi hazoba umuborogo ukomeye i Yerusalemu
Zechariah12:12 Kand’ igihugu kizoboroga
Zechariah12:13 umuryango w’inzu ya Lewi ukwawo
Zechariah12:14 n’iyindi miryango yose isigaye
Zechariah13:1 Kur’ uwo musi ab’inzu ya Dawidi n’ababa i Yerusalemu bazotoborerwa imbizi yo kubōza ivyaha n’ibihumane.
Zechariah13:2 Kandi kur’ uwo musi nzoherengeteza amazina y’ibigirwamana mu gihugu
Zechariah13:3 Maze ni haramuka habonetse uwīgira ngw aravugishijwe
Zechariah13:4 Nuko kur’ uwo musi abīgira abavugishwa n’Imana bazogira isoni z’ivyo bārose
Zechariah13:5 arik’ umuntu wese azovuga
Zechariah13:6 Kandi bamubajije
Zechariah13:7 Ikangure
Zechariah13:8 Mur’ ico gihugu cose
Zechariah13:9 Kand’ ico gice ca gatatu nzobacisha mu muriro wo mu ruganda
Zechariah14:1 Eh’ umusi uraje
Zechariah14:2 Kuko nzoba nkoranije amahanga yose ngw atere i Yerusalemu; umurwa uzotsindwa
Zechariah14:3 Maz’ Uhoraho azokwisidukira
Zechariah14:4 Kur’ uwo musi azohagarika ibirenge ku musozi Elayono werekeye i Yerusalemu ahahera i burasirazuba; uwo musozi Elayono uzotemukamwo kubiri uhereye aherekeye i burasirazuba ugashitsa aherekeye i burengerazuba; uzocikamw’ uruhomoka runini cane; igihimba c’uwo musozi kizokwikumira i burārūko
Zechariah14:5 Muzohunga muce mu ruhomoka rwo mu misozi yanje; kuk’ uruhomoka rwo mur’ iyo misozi ruzoshika no kuri Azeli: mbere muzohunga nk’uko mwāhunze hamwe isi yatigita ku ngoma ya Uziya umwami w’i Buyuda; maz’ Uhoraho Imana yanje azoza azananye n’abera bose.
Zechariah14:6 Kur’ uwo musi ntihazoba har’ umuco utamanzuye
Zechariah14:7 arik’ uzoba umusi umwe rudende uzwi n’Uhoraho
Zechariah14:8 Kandi kur’ uwo musi amazi y’ubugingo azova i Yerusalemu; amazi amwe azotembera mu kiyaga c’i burasirazuba
Zechariah14:9 Kand’ Uhoraho azoba Umwami aganza isi yose; kur’ uwo musi Uhoraho azomenyekana kw ar’ umwe gusa
Zechariah14:10 Igihugu cose kizohinduka ikiyaya
Zechariah14:11 Maz’ abantu bazohagerēra
Zechariah14:12 Iki ni co cago Uhoraho azotēza amahanga yose azoba ateye Yerusalemu: inyama z’imibiri yabo zizobatikimirako bagihagaze
Zechariah14:13 Kur’ uwo musi Uhoraho azobaca umuhongo w’akaburarugero; maz’ umuntu wese asūmire ukuboko mugenzi we
Zechariah14:14 Kand’ Abayuda bar’ i Yerusalemu bazorwana
Zechariah14:15 Kand’ ico cago nyene kizoba ku mafarasi no ku nyumbu no ku ngamiya no ku ndogoba no ku bindi bitungwa vyos bizoba aho bashagaje.
Zechariah14:16 Maz’ umuntu wese wo mu masigarira yo mu mahanga yose yateye i Yerusalemu azodūga uk’ umwaka utashe gusenga Umwami Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo no kumara imisi mikuru y’insago.
Zechariah14:17 Arik’ umuntu wese wo mu miryango yose yo kw isi atazodūga ngw aje i Yerusalemu gusenga Umwami Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo
Zechariah14:18 kandi n’ihanga rya Egiputa ni ritadūga ngo rize
Zechariah14:19 Ico kizoba igihano Egiputa hazohanwa
Zechariah14:20 Kur’ uwo musi ku nzogera z’amafarasi hazoba handitswe ngo yerejwe uhoraho. Kand’ inkono zo mu ngoro y’Uhoraho zizomera nk’inzavya z’imbere y’igicaniro.
Zechariah14:21 Mber’ inkono yose ir’ i Yerusalemu n’i Buyuda izoba yerejwe Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo; maz’ abatanga ibimazi bose bazoza kuzābīra

Malachi2:1 Nuko rero mwa baherezi mwe
Malachi2:2 Ni mwanka kwumva
Malachi2:3 Rāba nzovuma imbuto zanyu

Malachi2:9 Nanje ni co gitumye mbahindura inkēngērwa

Malachi3:1 Umve ngira ntume integuza yanje
Malachi3:2 Ariko ni nde azoshobora kwihanganira umusi w’ukuza kwiwe
Malachi3:3 Kand’ azovyagira nk’ uwicaye avugutira ifeza akayimaramw’ inkamba: kand’ abahungu ba Lewi azobamaramw’ inkamba
Malachi3:4 Ni ho amashikanwa y’i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu azohimbara Uhoraho
Malachi3:5 Kandi nzobēgēra nce amateka; nzokwihutira kwagiriza abarozi
Malachi3:6 Kuko jewe Uhoraho ata ho mpinduka; ni co gituma
Malachi3:7 Uhereye mu bihe vya ba sogokuruza muhora mukevya mugata amabgirizwa yanje
Malachi3:8 Mbeg’ umuntu yogunga Imana? Ariko mwebge mwarangunze. Yamara muravuga
Malachi3:9 Wa muvumo murawuvumwe: kukw ihanga ryose uko mungana mwangunze.
Malachi3:10 Muzane mu bubīko ikigiracumi gishitse
Malachi3:11 Nzokankamira ururyi kubganyu
Malachi3:12 Kand’ amahanga yose azobīta abanyehirwe: kuko muzoba igihugu c’igikundiro
Malachi3:13 Amagambo mwamvuze yar’ akomeye
Malachi3:14 Mwavuze ngo Gukorera Imana nta kimazi; kandi muti Vyatwunguye iki ko twitondeye ivyo yashinze
Malachi3:15 Noneh’ abībone ni bo twita abanyehirwe
Malachi3:16 Nukw abubaha Uhoraho baragānīra; Uhoraho atega amatwi arumviriza; maz’ igitabo candikirwa imbere yiwe c’icibutso c’abubaha Uhoraho bakiyumvira izina ryiwe.
Malachi3:17 Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize
Malachi3:18 Aho ni ho muzosubira kumenya yuko har’ itandukaniro ry’umugororotsi n’umunyakibi
Malachi4:1 Ehe rāba
Malachi4:2 Ariko mweho abubaha izina ryanje izuba ry’ubugororotsi rizobarasira
Malachi4:3 Kandi muzosiribanga abanyakibi; bazoba umunyota musi y’ibirenge vyanyu ku musi nzoshinga
Malachi4:4 Ni mwibuke ivyagezwe vy’ umusavyi wanje Mose
Malachi4:5 Umve nzobarungikira Eliya uwavugishwa nanje
Malachi4:6 Uwo ni we gisāngānya azosāngānya imitima ya ba se n’iy’ abana; kugira ngo noye kuzoza ngatera isi umuvumo.

Matthew10:1 Ahamagara abigishwa biwe cumi na babiri
Matthew10:2 Amazina y’izo ntumwa cumi na zibiri n’aya: Uwa mbere ni Simoni
Matthew10:3 na Filipo na Barutolomayo na Toma na Matayo umutozakori

Matthew10:12 Mucinjira mu nzu muyiramutse;

Matthew10:15 Ndababgire ukuri

Matthew10:23 Ni babahama mu gisagara kimwe
Matthew10:24 Umwigishwa ntaruta umwigisha; kandi n’umushumba ntaruta shebuja.
Matthew10:25 Umwigishwa biramubereye kumera nk’umwigisha wiwe
Matthew10:26 Nuko ntimuze mubatinye

Matthew10:28 Ntimuze mutinye abica umubiri

Matthew10:30 Ariko n’umushatsi wo ku mitwe yanyu wose waraharūwe.
Matthew10:31 Nuko ntimutinye: mwebge muruta utunyoni twinshi.
Matthew10:32 Umuntu wese azonyaturira imbere y’abantu

Matthew15:4 Kukw Imana yavuze
Matthew15:5 Ariko mweho

Matthew15:13 Arabishura

Matthew16:1 Abafarisayo n’Abasadukayo baraza
Matthew16:2 Na we arabishura
Matthew16:3 Mu mutwenzi
Matthew16:4 Ab’ igihe kibi c’ubumaka barondera ikimenyetso
Matthew16:5 Abigishwa bafata hakurya
Matthew16:6 Yesu arababgira
Matthew16:7 Bībūranya bati Ntitwatekeye imitsima.
Matthew16:8 Yesu arabimenya
Matthew16:9 Ntimuraruha mubimenya
Matthew16:10 Canke ya mitsima ndwi ku bihumbi bine
Matthew16:11 N’iki kibabujije gutahura ko ntababgiye imitsima? Ariko mwirinde umwambiro w’Abafarisayo n’Abasadukayo.
Matthew16:12 Buno batahura kw atababgiye kwirinda umwambiro w’umutsima butsima
Matthew16:13 Yesu aja mu misozi ihera i Kayisariya mu bga Filipo
Matthew16:14 Na bo bati Bamwe bagira ng’ uri Yohana Umubatizi
Matthew16:15 Arababaza
Matthew16:16 Simoni Petero aramwishura
Matthew16:17 Yesu aramwishura
Matthew16:18 Nanje ndakubgira yuk’ uri Petero
Matthew16:19 Nzoguha impfunguzo z’ubgami bgo mw ijuru: kand’ ico uzohambira mw isi kizoba gihambiriwe mw ijuru; n’ico uzohamburura mw isi kizoba gihamburuwe mw ijuru.
Matthew16:20 Maze yihanikiriza abigishwa ngo ntihagire umuntu babgira kw ari we Kristo.
Matthew16:21 Kuva ubgo Yesu atangura guserurira abigishwa biwe kw akwiye kuzoja i Yerusalemu no kuzobabazwa uburyo bginshi n’abashingantahe n’abaherezi bakuru n’abanyabgenge b’ivyanditswe
Matthew16:22 Petero aramwihererana
Matthew16:23 Ahindukirira Petero
Matthew16:24 Buno Yesu abgira abigishwa biwe
Matthew16:25 Kuk’ ūgomba gukiza ubugingo bgiwe azobubura
Matthew16:26 Kand’ umuntu vyomumarira iki kwunguka ivyo mw isi vyose ni yākwa ubugingo bgiwe kw icīru? Cank’ umuntu yotanga iki ngw acungure ubugingo bgiwe?
Matthew16:27 Kuk’ Umwana w’umuntu azohava aza afise ubgiza bga Se
Matthew16:28 Ndababgire ukuri: Mur’ aba bahagaze hano harimwo bamwe batazobona urupfu gushitsa aho bazobonera Umwana w’umuntu aje mu bgami bgiwe.

Matthew17:2 Ahinduka ukundi imbere yabo
Matthew17:3 Maze Mose na Eliya barababonekera

Matthew27:1 Umutwenzi utambitse abaherezi bakuru bose n’abashingantahe b’ubgo bgoko bagīra inama Yesu ngo bamwice.

Matthew27:3 Maze Yuda yamuguze
Matthew27:4 ati Nācumuye

Matthew27:7 Baja inama

Matthew27:10 bazigura ubgatsi n’umubumvyi

Romans1:15 ni co gituma jeho kubganje niteguye kubabgira ubutumwa bgiza namwe mur’ i Roma.
Romans1:16 Kuk’ ubutumwa bgiza butantera isoni
Romans1:17 Kuko muri bgo ari ho ukugororoka kuva ku Mana guhishurwa
Romans1:18 Uburake bg’Imana bgarahishuwe
Romans1:19 Kukw ivyo umuntu yomenya vy’Imana vyerekanwa muri bo
Romans1:20 Kukw ibitaboneka vyayo
Romans1:21 kuko bāmenye Imana ntibayubahe nk’Imana
Romans1:22 Biyise abanyabgenge bacika ibipfu
Romans1:23 icubahiro c’Imana idapfa baragikāba ngo basenge ibishushanyo bisa n’umuntu apfa
Romans1:24 Ni co catumye Imana ibaheba ngo bakore ibiteye isoni
Romans1:25 kuk’ ukuri kw’Imana bāgukāvye ibinyoma
Romans1:26 Ni co catumye Imana ibaheba ngo bifuze ivyonona: kukw abagore babo ic’ imibiri yabo yaremewe bāgihinduye ukundi
Romans1:27 Kandi n’abagabo n’uko
Romans1:28 Kandi nk’uko banse kumenya Imana mu mitima yabo
Romans1:29 buzuye ukugabitanya kwose
Romans1:30 n’abavuga abandi nabi
Romans1:31 n’ibipfu
Romans1:32 Abo
Romans2:1 Ni co gituma utagira ico wireguza
Romans2:2 Ariko turazi yuk’ urubanza rw’Imana ar’ urw’ ukuri
Romans2:3 Wewe ga muntu
Romans2:4 Cank’ ukēngēra itunga ryo kugira neza kwayo n’iry’ imbabazi zayo n’iry’ ukwihangana kwayo? Ntuzi yuko kugira neza kw’Imana kugushikana ku kwihana?
Romans2:5 Ariko kuk’ ufise umutima ukomantaye utihana
Romans2:6 izokwishura umuntu wese ibikwiranye n’ivyo yakoze.
Romans2:7 Abarondera ubgiza n’icubahiro no kudapfa
Romans2:8 Ariko ku bakēbana ntibumvire ivy’ ukuri
Romans2:9 n’amarushwa n’ivyago ku bugingo bg’umuntu wese akora ibibi
Romans2:10 Arik’ ubgiza n’icubahiro n’amahoro bizoba ku muntu wese akora ivyiza
Romans2:11 kukw Imana itarobanura abantu ku cubahiro.
Romans2:12 Abākoze ivyaha bose
Romans2:13 kukw abumvise ivyagezwe atari bo bagororoka imbere y’Imana
Romans2:14 Abanyamahanga badafise ivyagezwe n’Imana iyo bakoze ibibgirizwa na vyo kubgabo
Romans2:15 kuko berekana igikorwa kibgirijwe n’ivyagezwe canditswe mu mitima yabo
Romans2:16 Ni ko bizoba ku musi Imana izocira amabanga y’abantu amateka muri Yesu Kristo
Romans2:17 Ko witwa Umuyuda
Romans2:18 ukamenya ivy’ igomba
Romans2:19 ukishima yuk’ ushobora kujana impumyi
Romans2:20 n’umuhanūzi w’abanyabgenge buke
Romans2:21 nuko wewe wigisha abandi
Romans2:22 Wewe ubabuza gusambana
Romans2:23 Wewe wirata ivyagezwe
Romans2:24 Izina ry’Imana muritukisha mu mahanga
Romans2:25 Kuko gukebga kugira ico kukumarira
Romans2:26 Non’ ūtākebge ni yitondera ibibgirijwe n’ivyagezwe
Romans2:27 Kand’ ūtākebge umubiri ni yitondera ivyagezwe
Romans2:28 Kuk’ Umuyuda wo ku rukoba atari we Muyuda; kand’ ugukebga kwo ku rukoba kwo ku mubiri atari kwo gukebga.
Romans2:29 Arik’ Umuyuda wo mu mutima ni we Muyuda
Romans3:1 Non’ Umuyuda aruta abandi ate? Canke gukebga kumara iki?
Romans3:2 Arabibarusha vyose. Ica mbere
Romans3:3 Tuvuge iki? Naho bamwe batizeye
Romans3:4 Biragahera: arikw Imana iboneke kw ar’ inyakuri
Romans3:5 Ariko namb’ ukugabitanya kwacu kwāshimagije ukugororoka kw’Imana
Romans3:6 Eka na mba! Iyo biba birtyo
Romans3:7 Ariko namb’ ibinyoma vyanje vyatumye ukuri kw’Imana kurushiriza kwerekanwa
Romans3:8 Kandi n’iki kitubuza gukora ibibi kugira ngw ivyiza bibeho? (nk’uko batubeshera
Romans3:9 Nuko tuvuge iki? Mbega turuta abandi? Oya
Romans3:10 nk’uko handitswe
Romans3:11 Nta wutahura
Romans3:12 Bārazimiye iyo bava bakagera
Romans3:13 Imihogo yabo n’imva zirangāye
Romans3:14 Akanwa kabo kuzuye ukuvuma no kujingitwa
Romans3:15 Ibirenge vyabo vyihutira kuvisha amaraso.
Romans3:16 Guhonnya no kubabaza biri mu nzira zabo
Romans3:17 Inzira y’amahoro ntibāyimenye;
Romans3:18 Nta gutinya Imana kuri mu maso yabo.
Romans3:19 Ariko turazi yukw ivy’ ivyagezwe bivuga vyose bibibgira abaganzwa na vyo
Romans3:20 kukw imbere yayo ata muntu azotsindanishirizwa n’ibikorwa bibgirijwe n’ivyagezwe
Romans3:21 Ariko noneh’ ivyagezwe bitariho
Romans3:22 n’ukugororoka kuva ku Mana
Romans3:23 bose bākoze ivyaha
Romans3:24 batsindanishirizwa n’ubuntu bgayo
Romans3:25 uwo Imana yashizeho kuba impongano y’uwizera
Romans3:26 no kugira ngo yerekane ukugororoka kwayo mur’ iki gihe
Romans3:27 None rer’ ukwihaya kuri hehe? Kwarabujijwe. Kwabujijwe n’ivyagezwe ki? Mbega n’ivy’ ibikorwa? Haba na mba: kwabujijwe n’ivy’ ukwizera.
Romans3:28 Ni co gituma twiyumvira yuk’ umuntu atsindanishirizwa n’ukwizera
Romans3:29 Cank’ Imana n’iy’ Abayuda bonyene? Mbega s’iy’ abanyamahanga na bo? Ego me
Romans3:30 kw Imana ar’ imwe
Romans3:31 Mbega non’ ivyagezwe tubihinduza ubusa ukwizera? Eka na mba: ushime turabigumisha.
Romans4:1 None rero
Romans4:2 Iyo Aburahamu atsindanishirizwa n’ibikorwa
Romans4:3 Ivyanditswe bivuga iki? Bivuga ngo Aburahamu yizeye Imana
Romans4:4 Yamar’ ūkora
Romans4:5 Arik’ ūdakora
Romans4:6 nk’uko Dawidi na we yavuze ubuhīrwe bg’umuntu uwo Imana iharūra nk’ūgororotse
Romans4:7 ati Hahirwa abāhariwe ibigabitanyo vyabo
Romans4:8 Hahirwa umuntu Uhoraho atazoharūrakw icaha.
Romans4:9 Mbeg’ ubgo buhirwe buvugwa ku bākebge bonyene
Romans4:10 Kwāharūwe ryari? Yari yarakebge
Romans4:11 Kand’ ahabga ikimenyetso
Romans4:12 kand’ abe na sekuruza w’abākebge
Romans4:13 Kukw atari kubg’ ivyagezwe Aburahamu yasezeraniwe cank’ uruvyaro rwiwe
Romans4:14 Abizigira ivyagezwe iyo baba ari bo baragwa
Romans4:15 Kukw ivyagezwe bizana uburake
Romans4:16 Ni co gituma ivyo vyavuye ku kwizera
Romans4:17 mu nyonga z’Iyo yizeye (nk’uko vyanditswe
Romans4:18 Aburahamu yizera yizigiye ibitokwizigiwe
Romans4:19 Kandi ntiyagabanukak’ ukwizera
Romans4:20 Ariko yiyumviriye ic’ Imana yamusezeraniye
Romans4:21 amenya neza adakekeranya yukw ico yasezeranye ishobora no kugikora.
Romans4:22 Ni co catumye bimuharūrwako nk’ukugororoka.

Romans4:24 ariko no kubgacu

Romans5:1 None rero
Romans5:2 yadushikanishije ukwizera mur’ ubu buntu duhagazemwo
Romans5:3 Kandi si vyo vyonyene
Romans5:4 kand’ ukwihangana kugatera kudatsindwa no kugeragezwa; kudatsindwa no kugeragezwa kugatera kwizigira ibitaraba;
Romans5:5 ukwo kwizigira ntigutētereza
Romans5:6 Tugifise intege nke
Romans5:7 Kw ar’ ibigoye k’umuntu apfira umugororotsi
Romans5:8 arikw Imana yatweretse urukundo rwayo idukunda
Romans5:9 Nuko none tumaze gutsindanishirizwa n’amaraso yiwe
Romans5:10 Ko twujujwe n’Imana n’urupfu rw’Umwana wayo
Romans5:11 Kandi si vyo vyonyene
Romans5:12 None rero ko bimeze birtyo
Romans5:13 ivyagezwe bitarabaho
Romans5:14 Arik’ uhereye kuri Adamu
Romans5:15 Arikw ingabire y’Imana ntimera nka ca gicumuro. Kw igicumuro c’umwe catumye abenshi bapfa
Romans5:16 Kand’ iyo ngabire ntiyaje nk’icazanywe n’igicumuro c’umuntu umwe: kuko gucirwa urubanza kwavuye ku muntu umwe
Romans5:17 Kw igicumuro c’umwe catumye urupfu rushirwa ku ngoma n’umwe
Romans5:18 None rero nk’uko gucirwa urubanza kwazanywe n’igicumuro kimwe ku bantu bose

Romans5:20 Arikw ivyagezwe vyaje na vyo

Romans6:1 Nuko tuvuge iki? Mbega twame dukora ivyaha kugira ng’ubuntu bg’Imana bugwire?
Romans6:2 Biragahera. Twebge twapfuye ku caha
Romans6:3 Canke ntimuzi yuko twese abābatirijwe kuba muri Kristo Yesu
Romans6:4 None rero kubatizwa kwatumye duhambanwa na we tuba mu rupfu rwiwe
Romans6:5 Ko twakoranijwe na we n’igishushanyo c’urupfu rwiwe
Romans6:6 Kandi tumenye iki
Romans6:7 kuk’ uwapfuye aba atsindanishirijwe icaha.
Romans6:8 Ariko bisanzwe twapfanye na Kristo
Romans6:9 kuko tuzi yuko Kristo
Romans6:10 Ukwo gupfa yapfuye
Romans6:11 Abe ari ko namwe mwiyumvira ko mwāpfuye ku caha
Romans6:12 None rer’ icaha ntikikabe ku ngoma mu mibiri yanyu izopfa
Romans6:13 Kandi ntimugahe icaha imibiri yanyu ngw ikoreshwe n’ukugabitanya; ariko mwishikanire Imana nk’abazuke bavuye mu bapfuye
Romans6:14 Icaha ntikizobaganza
Romans6:15 Nuko tugire dute? Mbega dukore ivyaha
Romans6:16 Ntimuzi yuko shobuja mwihaye kuba abagurano bo kumwumvira
Romans6:17 Arikw Imana ishimwe yuko naho mwar’ abagurano b’icaha
Romans6:18 kandi mwacunguwe ngo ntimuganzwe n’icaha
Romans6:19 Mbivuze nk’imvugo y’abantu
Romans6:20 Mukir’ abagurano b’icaha
Romans6:21 None rer’ ico gihe mwari n’imbuto ki mu bibamāramāza ubu? Kukw amaherezo yavyo ar’ urupfu.
Romans6:22 Ariko noneho
Romans6:23 Ingero y’icaha n’urupfu; arikw ingabire y’Imana n’ubugingo budashira
Romans7:1 Canke ga bene Data
Romans7:2 Kukw ivyagezwe bihambirira umugore ku mugabo wiwe
Romans7:3 None rero
Romans7:4 None rero namwe
Romans7:5 Tukiganzwa n’akameremere kacu
Romans7:6 Ariko noneho ntitukiganzwa n’ivyagezwe
Romans7:7 Nuko tuvuge iki? Mbeg’ ivyagezwe n’icaha? Eka na mba. Ariko simba naramenye icaha
Romans7:8 Arikw icaha kibonye urwitwazo mu vyagezwe
Romans7:9 Nanje kera nariho
Romans7:10 kand’ ico cagezwe co kuzana ubugingo nakibona kinzanira urupfu.
Romans7:11 Kukw icaha campendahenze
Romans7:12 None rer’ ivyagezwe n’ivyera
Romans7:13 Mbeg’ iciza cambereye urupfu? Eka na mba! Arikw icaha ni co cārubaye
Romans7:14 Kuko tuzi yukw ivyagezwe ar’ ivy’ impwemu; ariko jewe nganzwa n’akameremere kanje
Romans7:15 Sinzi ico nkora; kukw ico ngomba atari co nkora
Romans7:16 Ariko ko nkora ico ntagomba
Romans7:17 None rero si jewe nkibikora
Romans7:18 Ndazi yuko muri jewe
Romans7:19 Kukw iciza ngomba atari co nkora
Romans7:20 Ariko ko nkora ico ntagomba
Romans7:21 Ni ko mbona ikingera
Romans7:22 Nnezererwa ivyagezwe n’Imana mu mutima wanje
Romans7:23 ariko mbona ikindi kingera kiri mu mubiri wanje kirwanya ikingera co mu mutima wanje
Romans7:24 Ewe jewe ndagowe! Ni nde yonkiza umubiri untera uru rupfu?
Romans7:25 Imana ishimwe
Romans8:1 Nuko rero noneh’ abari muri Kristo Yesu nta rubanza ruzobatsinda.
Romans8:2 Kukw ikingera ca Mpwemu w’ubugingo bgo muri Kristo Yesu cancunguye ngo singanzwe n’icangera c’icaha n’ic’ urupfu.
Romans8:3 Ic’ ivyagezwe bitāshoboye gukora kuko bifise intege nke kubg’ akameremere kacu
Romans8:4 kugira ngw ivy’ ivyagezwe bibgiriza bishikanwe muri twebge
Romans8:5 Kukw abaganzwa n’akameremere k’umubiri bitwaririka ivy’ umubiri
Romans8:6 Kwitwaririka ivy’ umubiri kuzana urupfu
Romans8:7 Kuko kwitwaririka ivy’ umubiri gutera kwanka Imana
Romans8:8 Kand’ abaganzwa n’akameremere k’umubiri ntibashobora guhimbara Imana.
Romans8:9 Ariko mweho ntimuganzwa n’akameremere k’umubiri
Romans8:10 Bisanzwe Kristo ari muri mwebge
Romans8:11 Ariko bisanzwe Mpwemu w’Iyazuye Yesu imukūye mu bapfuye aba muri mwebge
Romans8:12 None rero
Romans8:13 Kuko namba mwitondera ivy’ akameremere kanyu
Romans8:14 Abarōngōrwa na Mpwemu w’Imana bose ni bo bana b’Imana.
Romans8:15 Kuko mutāhawe impwemu y’ubuja ngo mwongere gutinya; ariko mwāhawe impwemu yo kubahindura abana b’Imana
Romans8:16 Mpwemu ubgiwe abgiririkanya n’impwemu yacu
Romans8:17 Ariko ko tur’ abana bayo
Romans8:18 Niyumvira yukw imibabaro y’iki gihe idakwiye kugereranywa n’ubgiza tuzohishurirwa.
Romans8:19 Kukw ivyaremwe vyiteze uguhishurwa kw’abana b’Imana biguhahamiye cane.
Romans8:20 Kukw ivyaremwe vyagezwe kuganzwa n’ibitagira ikimazi
Romans8:21 kugira ngo vyizigire yuko na vyo bizocungurwa ngo ntibibe ibija vyo kubora
Romans8:22 Kuko tuzi yukw ivyaremwe vyose binihira hamwe bikaramukirwa hamwe kugeza n’ubu:
Romans8:23 kandi si co gusa
Romans8:24 Kuko twakijijwe mu buryo bgo kugira ico twiteze: arikw icari citezwe iyo kibonetse ntikiba kicitegwa. Ic’ umuntu abonye
Romans8:25 Yamara ko twiteze ico tutarabona
Romans8:26 Ni ko na Mpwemu adufasha mu ntege nke zacu: kuko tutazi uko dukwiye gusenga
Romans8:27 arikw Īsesa imitima irazi ivyo Mpwemu yiyumvira
Romans8:28 Kandi turazi yuko ku bakunda Imana vyose bifataniriza hamwe kubazanira ivyiza
Romans8:29 Kukw abo yamenye kera yabatoranirije kera gushushanywa n’ishusho y’Umwana wayo
Romans8:30 abo yatoranije kera
Romans8:31 Ko bimeze birtyo
Romans8:32 Ītimanye Umwana wayo
Romans8:33 Ni nde azorega abo Imana yatoranije? Mbega n’Imana
Romans8:34 Ni nde azobatsindisha? Mbega ni Kristo Yesu
Romans8:35 Ni nde azodutandukanya n’urukundo rwa Kristo? Mbega n’amarushwa
Romans8:36 Nk’uko handitswe
Romans8:37 Ariko mur’ ivyo vyose turushishwaho kunesha n’uwadukunze.
Romans8:38 Kuko mmenye neza ntabikekeranya yuko naho rwoba urupfu
Romans8:39 cank’ uburebure bg’igihagararo

Romans9:2 yuko mfise intuntu nyinshi n’umubabaro udahengeshanya mu mutima.
Romans9:3 Iyaba vyashoboka
Romans9:4 ni bo Bisirayeli
Romans9:5 bafise ba sogokuruza ba bandi
Romans9:6 Ariko s’ukugira ngw ijambo ry’Imana ntiryashitse: kukw abamutse kuri Isirayeli atari bo Bisirayeli bose.

Romans9:8 Ni kwo kuvuga kw abana b’umubiri atari bo bana b’Imana

Romans9:12 ico gihe yabgiwe

Romans9:23 kugira ngo yerekanire ubutunzi bg’ubgiza bgayo ku nzavya z’ikigongwe

Romans11:2 Imana ntiyataye abantu bayo yamenye kera. Canke ntimuzi ukw ivyanditswe bivuga kuri Eliya? Ko yareze Abisirayeli ku Mana
Romans11:3 ati Mwami
Romans11:4 Arikw Imana yamwishuye ngw iki? Iti Nishigarije abantu ibihumbi ndwi batāpfukamiye Bayali.

Romans11:6 Ariko ni vyaba bivuye ku buntu
Romans11:7 None vyabaye bite se? Ic’ Abisirayeli bārondeye

Romans11:10 Amaso yabo n’ahumwe

Romans11:12 Ariko

Romans11:17 Ariko namb’ amashami amwe yarahanyuwe
Romans11:18 ntiwihayagize kur’ ayo mashami. Namb’ uyihayagizako s’igishitsi kimeze kuri wewe

Romans12:1 Nuko bene Data
Romans12:2 Ntimushushanywe n’ivy’ iki gihe
Romans12:3 Ndabgira umuntu wese muri mwebge
Romans12:4 Nk’uko mu mubiri umwe dufise ingingo nyinshi
Romans12:5 natwe ni ko turi; turi benshi
Romans12:6 Nuko dufise ingabire zitandukana
Romans12:7 canke namba twarahawe igikorwa co mw ishengero

Romans15:1 Twebge abakomeye dukwiye kwihanganira intege nke z’abadakomeye

Romans15:3 Kuko na Kristo atinejereje
Romans15:4 Kukw ivyanditswe kera vyose vyandikiwe kutwigisha

Romans15:7 Nuko mwemerane

Romans15:11 Kand’ arongera

Romans15:20 namanye imigabo yo kuvuga ubutumwa bgiza
Romans15:21 yamara ngo bimere nk’uko handitswe
Romans15:22 Ni co gituma ngira igisīvya kenshi co kuza i wanyu:

Romans15:24 aho nzogīra i Sipaniya. Kuko nizigira kuzobarāba nciye iyo

Romans15:28 Ni naheraheza ivyo

Romans15:31 nkire ab’i Yudaya batayumvira
Romans15:32 mbone uko nza i wanyu nnezerewe
Romans15:33 Imana Nyen’ amahoro ibane namwe mwese. Amen.
Romans16:1 Mbashimiye Foyibe mwene Data
Romans16:2 ngo mumwākīre kubg’ Umwami wacu
Romans16:3 Muntahirize Purisikila na Akwila abākoranye nanje muri Kristo Yesu
Romans16:4 kandi bāhevye iyabo mitwe ko yocibga kugira ngo bakize amagara yanje. Si jewe jenyene mbashima
Romans16:5 Kandi muntahirize ishengero ryo mu nzu yabo. Muntahirize Epayineto
Romans16:6 Muntahirize Mariya yakoreye mwebge cane.
Romans16:7 Muntahirize Andironiko na Yuniya
Romans16:8 Muntahirize Ampuliyato
Romans16:9 Muntahirize Urubano
Romans16:10 Muntahirize Apele yagejejwe akarama muri Kristo. Muntahirize abo mu bo kwa Arisitobulo.
Romans16:11 Muntahirize Herodiyoni dusangiye umuryango. Muntahirize abo mu bo kwa Narukiso
Romans16:12 Muntahirize Tirufayina na Tirufosa
Romans16:13 Muntahirize Rufo
Romans16:14 Muntahirize Asunkirito
Romans16:15 Muntahirize Filologo na Yuliya
Romans16:16 Muramukanishe kugumbirana kwera. Amashengero ya Kristo yose arabaganūtsa.
Romans16:17 Ariko bene Data
Romans16:18 Kukw abameze bartyo Umwami wacu Kristo atari we bajakariye
Romans16:19 Igitumye mbabgira ivyo
Romans16:20 Imana Nyen’ amahoro izofyonyorera Satani vuba musi y’ibirenge vyanyu. Ubuntu bg’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo bubane namwe.

Colossians1:2 turabandikiye bene Data bo muri Kristo bera b’abizigirwa

Colossians1:10 kugira ngo mugende nk’uko bibereye ab’ Umwami wacu

Colossians1:14 Mur’ uwo ni ho dufise ugucungurwa

Colossians1:18 Ni we mutwe w’umubiri
Colossians1:19 Kukw Imana yahimbawe n’uk’ ukunengesera kwayo kwose kuba muri we:
Colossians1:20 kandi yahimbawe no kumuha kwuzuza vyose na yo
Colossians1:21 Namwe abāri bāratandukanijwe n’Imana kera
Colossians1:22 none yabuzurije na yo mu mubiri wiwe w’umuntu kubg’ urupfu yapfuye
Colossians1:23 asangwa muhora mwizeye
Colossians1:24 None nnezererewe amagorwa yanje yo kubganyu
Colossians1:25 iryo nacikiye umukozi
Colossians1:26 ni ryo banga ryari ryarahishijwe uhereye kera hose n’ibihe vyose
Colossians1:27 abo Imana yakunze kumenyesha itunga ry’ubgiza bg’iri banga
Colossians1:28 Natwe ni we twamamaza
Colossians1:29 ico ni co kintamisha
Colossians2:1 Ndagomba ko mumenya ukuntu mbarwanira intambara
Colossians2:2 kugira ngw imitima yabo ireme
Colossians2:3 muri we ni ho itunga ryose ry’ubgenge n’ukumenya ryahishijwe.
Colossians2:4 Mvuze ivyo kugira ngo ntihagire ūbahendagirisha amagambo y’inyosha.
Colossians2:5 Kuko naho ntari kumwe namwe ku mubiri
Colossians2:6 Nuko nk’uko mwākiriye Kristo Yesu Umwami wacu
Colossians2:7 mushinze imizi muri we
Colossians2:8 Mwirinde
Colossians2:9 Kuko muri we ari ho haba ukunengesera kwose kw’Ubumana mu buryo bg’umubiri.
Colossians2:10 Kandi munengeserezwa no kumubamwo
Colossians2:11 Kandi muri we mwākebge ugukebga kutar’ ukw’ intoke
Colossians2:12 kuko mwahambanywe na we mw ibatizwa
Colossians2:13 Kandi hamwe mwari mugipfuye mwishwe n’ibicumuro vyanyu n’ukudakebga kw’imibiri yanyu
Colossians2:14 ihanaguye n’icete kitwagiriza
Colossians2:15 Kandi yambuye abakuru n’abafise ububasha
Colossians2:16 Nuko ntihakagire ūbahinyura ku biribga canke ku binyobga
Colossians2:17 ivyo vyar’ igitūtu c’ivyari birāriye kuzoza
Colossians2:18 Ntihakagire umuntu abagunga impēra yanyu
Colossians2:19 kand’ atifatanya na wa Mutwe
Colossians2:20 Asangwa mwarapfanye na Kristo
Colossians2:21 ngo
Colossians2:22 kand’ ivyo vyose biba biheze iyo birīwe — mukumvira ivyagezwe n’abantu n’inyigisho zabo?
Colossians2:23 Ayo mabgirizwa koko afise ishusho y’ubgenge
Colossians3:1 None rer’ asangwa mwarazuranywe na Kristo
Colossians3:2 Mushire imitima ku biri hejuru
Colossians3:3 Kuko mwapfuye
Colossians3:4 Kristo
Colossians3:5 Nuko mwice ingingo zanyu ziri mw isi
Colossians3:6 ivyo ni vyo bizanira uburake bg’Imana abantu b’intabarirwa.
Colossians3:7 Namwe mwabigenderamwo kera
Colossians3:8 Ariko noneho mwiyambure n’ibi vyose: uburake
Colossians3:9 Ntimukabeshane
Colossians3:10 mukambara umuntu musha
Colossians3:11 aho ntihaba Umugiriki cank’ Umuyuda
Colossians3:12 Nuko rero
Colossians3:13 mwihanganirana
Colossians3:14 Ikigeretse kur’ ivyo vyose mwambare urukundo
Colossians3:15 Kand’ amahoro ya Kristo aganze mu mitima yanyu
Colossians3:16 Ijambo rya Kristo ribe muri mwebge rigwiriye
Colossians3:17 Kand’ ivyo muzokora vyose
Colossians3:18 Bagore
Colossians3:19 Bagabo
Colossians3:20 Bana
Colossians3:21 Ba se
Colossians3:22 Bagurano
Colossians3:23 Ivyo mukora vyose
Colossians3:24 muzi yuko muzohabga impēra na Shobuja mukuru
Colossians3:25 Kuk’ ūgabitanya azokwihōrwa nk’uko yagabitanije: kandi nta kurobanura ku butoni.
Colossians4:1 Ba shebuja
Colossians4:2 Mukovye mu gusenga
Colossians4:3 kandi natwe nyene mudusengere
Colossians4:4 kugira ngo ndariserure nk’uko nkwiye kuvuga.
Colossians4:5 Mugendane ubgenge ku bo hanze
Colossians4:6 Imvugo zanyu zamane ubuntu bg’Imana
Colossians4:7 Tukiko mwene Data dukunda
Colossians4:8 Ni we mbatumyeko kubg’ ivyo nyene
Colossians4:9 ndamutumanye na Onesimo mwene Data w’umwizigirwa
Colossians4:10 Arisitariko
Colossians4:11 Na Yesu
Colossians4:12 Epafura w’i wanyu
Colossians4:13 Ndamushingira intahe yukw abagirira umwete mwinshi
Colossians4:14 Luka
Colossians4:15 Muntahirize bene Data b’i Lawodikiya
Colossians4:16 Kand’ iki cete ni mwaheza kugisomerwa
Colossians4:17 Kandi muze mubarire Arukipo
Colossians4:18 Uku ni kwo gutasha kwanje Paulo
1Thessalonians1:1 Paulo na Siluwano na Timoteyo turabandikiye abo mw ishengero ry’i Tesalonike
1Thessalonians1:2 Mwese tubashimira Imana imisi yose
1Thessalonians1:3 twibuka ubudasība ibikorwa vyanyu biva ku kwizera
1Thessalonians1:4 Bene Data bakundwa n’Imana
1Thessalonians1:5 kuk’ ubutumwa bgacu butābashitseko ar’ amajambo yonyene ariko bgarimwo n’ubushobozi na Mpwemu Yera
1Thessalonians1:6 Namwe mwaratwīgānye
1Thessalonians1:7 bituma muba icitegererezo c’abizera bose bar’ i Makedoniya no muri Akaya.
1Thessalonians1:8 Kuko muri mwebge humvikanye ijambo ry’Umwami wacu
1Thessalonians1:9 Kuko bose bīvugira ubgabo inkuru z’ingene twaje muri mwebge
1Thessalonians1:10 kandi ngo mwitege Umwana wayo kw ava mw ijuru
1Thessalonians2:1 Bene Data
1Thessalonians2:2 ariko tumaze kubabarizwa i Filipi no kuhatētererezwa
1Thessalonians2:3 Kuk’ uguhanūra kwacu kutava mu buzimire
1Thessalonians2:4 ariko nk’ukw Imana yatwemeye ko tur’ abo kuzezwa ubutumwa

1Thessalonians2:6 Kandi ntitwarondera icubahiro co ku bantu
1Thessalonians2:7 Ariko twaritonda hagati muri mwebge
1Thessalonians2:8 Ni ko twabagirira igishika
1Thessalonians2:9 Bene Data

1Thessalonians2:11 nk’uko muzi ingene twari tumeze ku muntu wese muri mwebge
1Thessalonians2:12 kugira ngo mugende nk’uko bibereye ab’ Imana

1Thessalonians2:14 Namwe bene Data
1Thessalonians2:15 bishe Umwami Yesu n’abāvugishwa n’Imana

1Thessalonians3:2 dutuma Timoteyo

1Timothy1:1 Paulo
1Timothy1:2 ndakwandikiye Timoteyo
1Timothy1:3 Nuko guma muri Efeso
1Timothy1:4 ntibababare ivy’ imigani y’ibinyoma n’ivyo kuzīrōra ivy’ akārōnda katagira iherezo
1Timothy1:5 Arikw inyanduruko y’ukwigisha kwacu n’ukugira ngo bagire urukundo ruva mu mutima utanduye
1Timothy1:6 Ivyo bamwe bārabihushije
1Timothy1:7 bagomba kuba abigisha b’ivyagezwe
1Timothy1:8 Ariko turazi yukw ivyagezwe ari vyiza
1Timothy1:9 azi yukw ivyagezwe bitāshiriweh’ umugororotsi
1Timothy1:10 abashakanyi
1Timothy1:11 gukurikira ubutumwa bg’ubgiza bg’Imana ishemagizwa
1Timothy1:12 Ndashimira Kristo Yesu Umwami wacu yabinshoboje
1Timothy1:13 naho nabanje kumurogotako no kumuhīga no kumwambika ibara. Ariko naragiriwe ikigongwe kuko nabikoze ntabizi ntarizera;
1Timothy1:14 kand’ ubuntu bg’Umwami wacu bgiyongeranya kuri jewe

1Timothy2:2 kandi cane‐cane abami n’abashizwe hejuru bose
1Timothy2:3 Ivyo ni vyo vyiza vyemerwa mu nyonga z’Imana Umukiza wacu

1Timothy2:5 Kuko har’ Imana imwe
1Timothy2:6 yitanze kw incungu ya bose. Kand’ ivyo bishingirwe intahe mu bihe vyavyo
1Timothy2:7 ni co nashiriweho kuba umusiguzi n’intumwa (mvuze ukuri

1Timothy3:4 aganza neza abo mu rugo rwiwe
1Timothy3:5 (Ūtazi kuganza abo mu rugo rwiwe yoshobora ate kuzigama ishengero ry’Imana?)

1Timothy3:7 Kand’ akwiye gushingirwa intahe neza n’abo hanze
1Timothy3:8 Kandi n’abakozi b’ishengero na bo nyene
1Timothy3:9 Ariko bagumye ibanga ry’ukwizera
1Timothy3:10 Kand’ abo babanze kugezwa
1Timothy3:11 N’abagore nyene babe inyankamugayo
1Timothy3:12 Umukozi w’ishengero wese abe umugabo afise umugore umwe gusa
1Timothy3:13 Kukw abākoze neza ico gikorwa c’ibango ryabo bīronkera igishingo ciza n’ubushizi bg’amanga bginshi mu kwizera Kristo Yesu.

1Timothy3:15 ariko ni naba ngitevye n’ukugira ng’uz’ umenye uko bikwiye kugenzwa mu ngoro y’Imana

1Timothy4:2 bavugisha uburyarya bg’abanyabinyoma
1Timothy4:3 baziza kwābīrana
1Timothy4:4 Ico Imana yaremye cose ni ciza

1Timothy4:11 Wame ubgiriza ivyo kand’ uvyigisha.

1Timothy5:2 n’abatamakazi nyene nka ba nyoko
1Timothy5:3 Wubahe abapfakazi b’inyakamwe vy’ukuri.
1Timothy5:4 Ariko
1Timothy5:5 Umupfakazi w’inyakamwe asigaye ar’ umwe
1Timothy5:6 Ariko
1Timothy5:7 Ubabgirize ivyo
1Timothy5:8 Arik’ umuntu n’atātunga abo mu nzu y’i wabo
1Timothy5:9 Ntihakagire umupfakazi yandikirwa gufashwa ataramara imyaka mirongwitandatu y’amavuka
1Timothy5:10 handikwe ūshimirwa ibikorwa vyiza
1Timothy5:11 Arikw abapfakazi bakiri bato ntubemerere
1Timothy5:12 bagatsindwa n’urubanza kuko bavuye mw isezerano ryabo rya mbere.
1Timothy5:13 Kand’ ikindi
1Timothy5:14 Ni co gituma ngomba kw abapfakazi bakiri bato bābīrwa
1Timothy5:15 Kuko n’ubu bamwe bamaze guta inzira
1Timothy5:16 Umugore wese yizera namb’ afise incuti z’abapfakazi
1Timothy5:17 Abakuru b’ishengero baganza neza ni babiyumvire ko bakwiye guhabga icubahiro kirushiriza
1Timothy5:18 Kukw icanditswe kivuga
1Timothy5:19 Umukuru ntukemere ico bazomukuregako hatabonetse ivyabona bibiri canke bitatu.
1Timothy5:20 Abakora ivyaha ubahanire mu maso ya bose
1Timothy5:21 Ndakwihanikiririza mu nyonga z’Imana na Yesu Kristo n’imbere y’abamarayika bātoranijwe
1Timothy5:22 Ntukagire umuntu wihutira kurambikakw ibiganza
1Timothy5:23 Uhereye none ntunywe amazi gusa
1Timothy5:24 Har’ abantu ivyaha vyabo biboneka bikabītangira imbere mu kuja mu rubanza; hari n’abandi bibāza inyuma.
1Timothy5:25 Kand’ ibikorwa vyiza na vyo n’uko

1Timothy6:2 Kand’ abafise ba shebuja bizera
1Timothy6:3 Umuntu ni yigisha ukundi
1Timothy6:4 azoba yikakishije
1Timothy6:5 n’ibihāri bidashira vy’abantu bononekaye ubgenge
1Timothy6:6 Ariko kwubaha Imana gufatanije no kubūmbga n’ivy’ ufise kuvamw’ inyungu nyinshi koko:
1Timothy6:7 kukw ata co twazanye mw isi kand’ ata co dushobora kuyivanamwo.

1Timothy6:9 Arikw abagomba kuba abatunzi bagwa mu nyosha no mu mutego no mu kwifuza kwinshi kw’ubupfu gusinzikaza

1Timothy6:11 Ariko weho
1Timothy6:12 wame urwana intambara nziza yo kwizera

1Timothy6:19 bībīkire ubutunzi buzoba itanguriro ryiza mu gihe kizoza

2Timothy4:22 Umwami abane n’umutima wawe. Ubuntu bg’Imana bubane namwe.

Hebrews9:2 Kuko hār’ ihema ryiteguwe
Hebrews9:3 Kandi hirya y’igihuzu ca kabiri gikinze
Hebrews9:4 hārimw’ igicaniro co kwoserezakw imibavu cakozwe mw izahabu
Hebrews9:5 Kandi hejuru yayo hār’ abakerubi b’ubgiza bateye igitūtu umutemere wo guhongerako: ivyo ntidushobora kubidonda kimwe‐kimwe nonaha.
Hebrews9:6 Nukw ivyo vyateguwe birtyo
Hebrews9:7 ariko mu rya kabiri hinjiramw’ umuherezi mukuru wenyene
Hebrews9:8 Mpwemu Yera amenyekanisha artyo yukw inzira ija ahēra cane itaribgerekanwe
Hebrews9:9 ni ryo kigereranyo c’igihe ca none
Hebrews9:10 kukw ivyo
Hebrews9:11 Ariko Kristo amaze kuza
Hebrews9:12 Kand’ amaraso y’impene cank’ ay’ amashūri
Hebrews9:13 Non’ amaraso y’impene n’ay’ amapfizi bo n’umunyota w’inka y’iriza ucucagiwe abahumanye
Hebrews9:14 mbeg’ amaraso ya Kristo
Hebrews9:15 Ni co gituma aba umuhūza
Hebrews9:16 Kukw ah’ icete c’iragi kiri hakwiye rwose yuk’ urupfu rw’uwaraze ruseruka.
Hebrews9:17 Icete c’iragi kibeshwaho n’urupfu rwonyene
Hebrews9:18 Ni co gituma isezerano rya mbere ritāsezeranywe ata maraso.
Hebrews9:19 Mose amaze kubgira abantu bose amabgirizwa yose nk’uko vyagezwe
Hebrews9:20 arababgira
Hebrews9:21 Kand’ ihema n’imbombovu zose z’ivy’ ubuherezi
Hebrews9:22 Nk’ukw ivyagezwe biri
Hebrews9:23 Nuko vyari bibereye kw ibigereranyo vy’ivyo mw ijuru vyozwa n’ivyo bimazi
Hebrews9:24 Kuko Kristo atinjiye ahēra cane hākozwe n’intoke
Hebrews9:25 Kandi ntiyashikanyweyo no kwitanga kenshi
Hebrews9:26 kukw iyo biba birtyo
Hebrews9:27 Kandi nk’ukw abantu bābīkiwe gupfa rimwe
Hebrews9:28 na Kristo n’uko
Hebrews10:1 Ivyagezwe ko bifise igitūtu c’ivyiza bizoza
Hebrews10:2 Iyo bibishobora
Hebrews10:3 Ariko mur’ ivyo bimazi har’ icibukiriza ivyaha uk’ umwaka utashe.
Hebrews10:4 Kuko bidashoboka kw amaraso y’amapfizi n’ay’ impene akūrah’ ivyaha.
Hebrews10:5 Ni co catumye
Hebrews10:6 Ibimazi vyoshejwe bidasonōye
Hebrews10:7 Mperako ndavuga
Hebrews10:8 Ahejeje kuvuga haruguru
Hebrews10:9 aherakw aravuga
Hebrews10:10 Ukwo kugomba kwayo ni kwo kwatumye twezwa
Hebrews10:11 Kand’ umuherezi wese ahagarara uko bukeye akora ivy’ ubuherezi
Hebrews10:12 Arik’ uwo we
Hebrews10:13 ahēraho
Hebrews10:14 Kukw ikimazi kimwe ari co yatunganishije rwose abezwa
Hebrews10:15 Kandi na Mpwemu Yera ni we cabona kidushingira intahe y’ivyo. Amaze kuvuga
Hebrews10:16 at’ Iri ni ryo sezerano nzosezerana na bo Hanyuma y’iyo misi
Hebrews10:17 ati Kand’ ivyaha vyabo n’ukugabitanya kwabo sinzovyibuka ukundi.
Hebrews10:18 Ariko
Hebrews10:19 Nuko bene Data
Hebrews10:20 duciye mu nzira yadutoboreye nsha iri n’ubugingo
Hebrews10:21 kandi ko dufise umuherezi akomeye aganza urugo rw’Imana
Hebrews10:22 twegereze dufise imitima y’ukuri
Hebrews10:23 Tugumye ukwatura ivyizigiro vyacu ntikunyiganyige
Hebrews10:24 kandi twiyumviraneko
Hebrews10:25 twoye guheba gukoranira hamwe
Hebrews10:26 Kuko namba dukora ivyaha ibigirankana
Hebrews10:27 ariko haba hasigaye kwitegana ubgoba gucirwakw iteka
Hebrews10:28 Ūkēngereye ivyagezwe vya Mose
Hebrews10:29 Mugira ng’umuntu ntazoba akwiye guhanwa ibirushirije cane
Hebrews10:30 Kuko tuzi uwavuze
Hebrews10:31 Erega birateye ubgoba gukorokera mu maboko y’Imana nzima.
Hebrews10:32 Ariko mwibuke imisi ya mbere
Hebrews10:33 kimwe
Hebrews10:34 Kuko mwababaranye n’ababoshwe
Hebrews10:35 Nuko ntimute ubushizi bg’ubgoba bganyu
Hebrews10:36 Kuko mukwiye kwihangana
Hebrews10:37 Kuko hasigaye igihe gito cane
Hebrews10:38 Ariko
Hebrews10:39 Ariko tweho ntitur’ abo mu biyonjorora bagahona
Hebrews11:1 Ukwizera n’ukumenya rwose ivyizigirwa
Hebrews11:2 Icatumye aba kera bashingirwa intahe n’uko bari bagufise.
Hebrews11:3 Ukwizera ni kwo kutumenyesha yukw isi yaremwe n’ijambo ry’Imana
Hebrews11:4 Ukwizera ni kwo kwatumye Abeli aha Imana ikimazi kiruta ica Kayini
Hebrews11:5 Ukwizera ni kwo kwatumye Henoki ajanwa mw ijuru
Hebrews11:6 kand’ ūtizera ntibishoboka kw ayihimbara; kuk’ uwēgēra Imana akwiye kwizera yukw iriho
Hebrews11:7 Ukwizera ni kwo kwatumye Nowa yubaha
Hebrews11:8 Ukwizera ni kwo kwatumye Aburahamu yumvira Imana imuhamagaye
Hebrews11:9 Ukwizera ni kwo kwatumye aba inyambukīra mu gihugu yasezeraniwe
Hebrews11:10 Kuko yar’ arorereye ca gisagara cubatswe kw itanguriro
Hebrews11:11 Ukwizera ni kwo kwatumye na Sara ashobozwa gusama inda
Hebrews11:12 Ni co catumye umuntu umwe — kand’ uwo yar’ akāheze — yāmukwako n’isinzi nk’inyenyeri zo kw ijuru
Hebrews11:13 Abo bose bāpfuye bacizeye
Hebrews11:14 Abavuga bartyo baba berekana yuko barondera igihugu cabo bgite.
Hebrews11:15 Iyo baba barakumbuye ico bavuyemwo
Hebrews11:16 Ariko noneho barifuza igihugu kirushije ico kuba ciza
Hebrews11:17 Ukwizera ni kwo kwatumye Aburahamu atanga Isaka kw ikimazi
Hebrews11:18 uwo yari yarabariwe ivyiwe
Hebrews11:19 kuko yishimiye yukw Imana ishobora no kuzura abapfuye
Hebrews11:20 Ukwizera ni kwo kwatumye Isaka ahezagira Yakobo na Esau abahesha imigisha y’ibizoba.
Hebrews11:21 Ukwizera ni kwo kwatumye Yakobo
Hebrews11:22 Ukwizera ni kwo kwatumye Yosefu
Hebrews11:23 Ukwizera ni kwo kwatumye Mose
Hebrews11:24 Ukwizera ni kwo kwatumye Mose
Hebrews11:25 agahitamwo kugiriranwa nabi n’abantu b’Imana
Hebrews11:26 kuko yiyumviriye yuko gucokoranwa na Kristo ar’ ubutunzi burengeye itunga ryo muri Egiputa
Hebrews11:27 Ukwizera ni kwo kwatumye ava muri Egiputa
Hebrews11:28 Ukwizera ni kwo kwatumye ashinga Pasika
Hebrews11:29 Ukwizera ni kwo kwatumye baca mu Kiyaga Gitukura
Hebrews11:30 Ukwizera ni kwo kwatumye inzitiro z’amabuye z’i Yeriko zisenyuka
Hebrews11:31 Ukwizera ni kwo kwatumye Rahabu
Hebrews11:32 Mvuge ikindi ki? Kukw igihe condengana ndondoye ivya Gideyoni n’ivya Baraki n’ivya Samusoni n’ivya Yefuta n’ivya Dawidi n’ivya Samweli n’ivy’ abāvugishwa n’Imana
Hebrews11:33 bāheshejwe n’ukwizera gutsinda abami
Hebrews11:34 no kuzimya ubukare bg’umuriro
Hebrews11:35 Abagore bāgaruriwe abo bābuze bazutse
Hebrews11:36 Abandi bāgeragereshwa gushinyagurirwa no gukubitwa ibimoko
Hebrews11:37 bicishijwe amabuye
Hebrews11:38 (isi ntiyar’ ibabereye ko bayibamwo)
Hebrews11:39 Abo bose bamaze gushingirwa intahe kubg’ ukwizera kwabo
Hebrews11:40 kukw Imana yatuboneye kera ikirushiriza kuba ciza
Hebrews12:1 Nuko natwe
Hebrews12:2 dutumbereye Yesu wenyene
Hebrews12:3 Nuko mushire imitima kur’ uyo yihanganiye ibihāri bihambaye birtyo abanyavyaha bāmuhāririje
Hebrews12:4 Ntimuragera ku kuvishwa amaraso murwanya icaha
Hebrews12:5 kandi mwibagiye rya jambo ribahubūra ribahanūra nk’abana
Hebrews12:6 Kuk’ uwo Uhoraho akunda ari we akāngīra
Hebrews12:7 Ico mukwiye kwihanganira n’ugutozwa indero nziza. Imana ibagirira nk’abana bayo. N’umwana ki
Hebrews12:8 Ariko namba mudakāngīrwa nk’ico abandi bose bakorerwa
Hebrews12:9 Kandi twari dufise ba data b’imibiri
Hebrews12:10 Kuko ba bandi bādukāngīra imisi mike nk’uko bāgomba
Hebrews12:11 Nta gikāngīro kiboneka ko giteye umunezero ako kanya
Hebrews12:12 Nuko mugorore amaboko acitse urudendevu
Hebrews12:13 kandi muharurire ibirenge vyanyu inzira zigororotse
Hebrews12:14 Mukurikire kugiriranira amahoro n’abantu bose
Hebrews12:15 mwizigame
Hebrews12:16 ntihabeh’ umushakanyi
Hebrews12:17 Kuko muzi yuko hanyuma
Hebrews12:18 Ntimwegereye umusozi wokorwako
Hebrews12:19 n’inzamba ivuga
Hebrews12:20 kuko batābashije ivyagezwe
Hebrews12:21 Kand’ ivyabonetse vyar’ ibiteye ubgoba
Hebrews12:22 Ariko mwegereye umusozi Siyoni
Hebrews12:23 n’ishengero ry’abana b’imfura banditswe mw ijuru
Hebrews12:24 mwegereye na Yesu
Hebrews12:25 Mwirinde ntimwanke kwumva Iyirikw iravuga. Ba bandi ko batākize
Hebrews12:26 Ijwi ryayo ryanyiganyigije isi ico gihe: ariko noneh’ irasezeranye
Hebrews12:27 Iryo jambo
Hebrews12:28 Ni co gituma
Hebrews12:29 kukw Imana yacu ar’ umuriro utōngōra.
Hebrews13:1 Ugukunda bene Data ni kugumeho.
Hebrews13:2 Ntimwibagire kugirira neza abashitsi: kuko bamwe bāgize bartyo bāhaye indāro abamarayika batabizi.
Hebrews13:3 Mwibuke ababoshwe nk’ababohanywe na bo: mwibuke n’abagirirwa nabi
Hebrews13:4 Umubano w’abābīranye ni wubahwe na bose
Hebrews13:5 Gukunda amahera ntikube mu ngeso zanyu; ivyo mufise bibabumbe; kuk’ ubgayo yavuze
Hebrews13:6 Ni co gituma tuvuga dushize ubgoba
Hebrews13:7 Mwibuke abābaganza
Hebrews13:8 Yesu Kristo uko yar’ ar’ ejo
Hebrews13:9 Ntimutwarwe n’inyigisho z’uburyo bginshi zādutse; kukw iciza ar’ uk’ umutima ushikamizwa n’ubuntu bg’Imana
Hebrews13:10 Dufise igicaniro
Hebrews13:11 Kukw imivyimba ya vya bitungwa
Hebrews13:12 Ni co catumye na Yesu ababarizwa inyuma y’irembo
Hebrews13:13 Nuko tuve mur’ izo nsago
Hebrews13:14 Kuko hano tutahafise igisagara kizokwamaho
Hebrews13:15 Nuko na ntaryo twame duha Imana ikimazi co gukenguruka tubiheshwa n’uyo
Hebrews13:16 Kugira neza no kugira ubuntu ntimukavyibagire
Hebrews13:17 Mwumvire ababaganza
Hebrews13:18 Mudusengere
Hebrews13:19 Kandi ndabinginga nshimitse ngo mudusengere
Hebrews13:20 Imana Nyen’ amahoro
Hebrews13:21 ibe ari yo ibatunganya rwose mu ciza cose
Hebrews13:22 Ariko bene Data
Hebrews13:23 Mumenye yuko mwene Data Timoteyo yarekuwe: ni yaza vuba tuzobonana namwe.
Hebrews13:24 Muntahirize ababaganza bose
Hebrews13:25 Ubuntu bubane namwe mwese. Amen.
James1:1 Yakobo
James1:2 Mwiyumvire kw ar’ ivyo kunezererwa rwose
James1:3 mumenye yukw ibigeza ukwizera kwanyu bitera ukwihangana.
James1:4 Arik’ ukwihangana gukwiye guhīngūra igikorwa cakwo
James1:5 Arikw asangwa har’ uwo muri mwebge akennye ubgenge
James1:6 Arikw asabe yizeye
James1:7 Uyo muntu yoye kwiyumvira kw ari n’ic’ azohabga n’Umwami Imana
James1:8 kukw ar’ umuntu w’imitima ibiri
James1:9 Ariko
James1:10 umutunzi na we
James1:11 Kukw izuba rirasa
James1:12 Hahirwa umuntu yihanganira ibimugerageza
James1:13 Umuntu ni yageragezwa gukora ibibi
James1:14 Arik’ umuntu wese ageragezwa
James1:15 Maz’ ukwo kwifuza gutwara inda
James1:16 Ntimuzimire
James1:17 Gutanga kwose kwiza
James1:18 Nk’uko yabigabiye ubgayo
James1:19 Ivyo murabizi
James1:20 kuk’ uburake bg’umuntu budakora ivy’ ukugororoka kw’Imana.

James1:22 Kandi mube abakora ivy’ iryo jambo
James1:23 Kuk’ uwumva iryo jambo ntarikore
James1:24 Amaze kwirāba
James1:25 Ariko
James1:26 Umuntu ni yigira ngo n’umunyedini
James1:27 Idini itunganye itagira agasembga imbere y’Imana Data wa twese
James2:1 Bene Data
James2:2 Mw isinagogi yanyu ni hinjiramw’ umuntu yambaye impeta y’izahabu n’impuzu zishajije
James2:3 namwe mukitegereza uwambaye impuzu zishajije
James2:4 none se ntimuba mwisobanuye
James2:5 Ni mwumve
James2:6 Ariko mweho mwatētereje umworo. Non’ abatunzi si bo babatwaza amanyama
James2:7 Si bo barogota kw izina ryiza mwitirirwa?
James2:8 Mugabo namba mushitsa icagezwe c’i bgami nk’uko canditswe
James2:9 Arikw iyo murobanuye abantu ku cubahiro
James2:10 Kuk’ umuntu wese azokwitondera ivyagezwe vyose
James2:11 Uwavuze
James2:12 Muvuge kandi mukore nk’abagira bacirwe urubanza n’ivyagezwe bizana umwidegemvyo.
James2:13 Kuk’ urubanza rutagirira akagongwe ūtāgize akagongwe. Ariko mu rubanza ikigongwe kiratsinda.
James2:14 Vyomara iki ga bene Data
James2:15 Ni haba hariho mwene Data uw’ ari we wese yoba yambaye ubusa
James2:16 maz’ umwe muri mwebge akamubgira
James2:17 Ni ko bimeze
James2:18 Nk’umuntu yovuga
James2:19 Wemera yukw Imana ar’ imwe. Ugize neza; abadayimoni na bo nyene baravyemera
James2:20 Ariko wa muntu w’imburakimazi we
James2:21 Aburahamu sogokuruza
James2:22 Ntubona yuk’ ukwizera kwafatanije n’ibikorwa vyiwe
James2:23 Kand’ icanditswe kirashika
James2:24 Murabona yukw ibikorwa ari vyo bitsindanishiriza umuntu
James2:25 Kandi na Rahabu maraya ni ko vyabaye: mbega ntiyatsindanishirijwe n’ibikorwa kuko yahaye za ntumwa indāro
James2:26 Nk’uk’ umubiri utarimw’ impwemu uba upfuye

1Peter1:1 Petero
1Peter1:2 mwatoranirijwe mu kweza kwa Mpwemu nk’ukw Imana Data wa twese yabamenye uhereye kera
1Peter1:3 Imana y’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo
1Peter1:4 ngo tuze twegukire umwandu utazobora
1Peter1:5 mwebge abazigamwa n’ubushobozi bg’Imana kubg’ ukwizera
1Peter1:6 Ivyo murabinezererwa cane
1Peter1:7 kugira ngo kuramura kw’ukwizera kwanyu (kand’ ukwo kwizera kurusha igiciro izahabu ishira
1Peter1:8 Uwo muramukunda naho mutigeze kumubona; kandi n’ubu
1Peter1:9 mugahabga ikizanwa n’ukwizera kwanyu
1Peter1:10 Ivy’ ako gakiza
1Peter1:11 basesa igihe ic’ ari co n’ibimenyetso vyaco
1Peter1:12 Kandi bāhishurirwa yukw atari bo bavyikorera
1Peter1:13 Nuko rero mukenyere mu mitima yanyu
1Peter1:14 Mumere nk’abana bagamburuka
1Peter1:15 Ariko nk’ukw Iyabahamagaye ar’ iyera
1Peter1:16 Kuko vyanditswe
1Peter1:17 Kandi kw Iyo mwambaza muyita So ari yo icira umuntu wese urubanza rukwiranye n’ivyo yakoze itarobanuye ku cubahiro
1Peter1:18 Muzi yukw ivyo mwacungujwe ngo muve mu ngeso zanyu z’imburakimazi mwatojwe na ba sogokuruza atar’ ibishira
1Peter1:19 ariko mwacungujwe amaraso y’igiciro kinini
1Peter1:20 Uwo yamenywe n’Imana kera
1Peter1:21 mwebge abo yahaye kwizera Imana
1Peter1:22 Nuko rero
1Peter1:23 Kuko mwavyawe ubga kabiri
1Peter1:24 Kuko
1Peter1:25 Arikw ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryamah’ ibihe bidashira. Kand’ iryo ni ryo jambo ry’ubutumwa bgiza mwabgiwe.
1Peter2:1 Nuko rero mwiyambure inzigo yose n’ubugunge bgose n’uburyarya n’ishari no kuvuga abandi nabi kwose
1Peter2:2 mumere nk’inzoya zivutse vuba
1Peter2:3 asangwa mwarayumvirije mukumva yuk’ Umwami wacu agira neza.
1Peter2:4 Nuko mumwēgēre
1Peter2:5 mwubakwe nk’amabuye afise ubugingo
1Peter2:6 Kuko mu vyanditswe harimw’ aya majambo
1Peter2:7 Nuko mwebge abizera ni mwebge mwagerewe ico giciro
1Peter2:8 N’ibuye ritsitaza n’urutare rugwisha; kuko batsitara kw ijambo ry’Imana
1Peter2:9 Ariko mweho mur’ ubgoko bgātoranijwe
1Peter2:10 kera nta bantu mwarimwo

1Peter2:14 cank’ abakuru

1Peter2:16 ngo mube nk’abidegemvya
1Peter2:17 Mwubahe abantu bose; mukunde bene Data; mutinye Imana; mwubahe umwami.

1Peter3:1 Namwe bagore n’uko
1Peter3:2 ni bābona ingeso zanyu zitunganye zifatanije n’ugutinya.
1Peter3:3 Ugushaza kwanyu ntikube ukwo ku rukoba kwo gutsiba umushatsi

Revelation19:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo numva mw ijuru ikimeze nk’ijwi rirenga ry’ishengero ryinshi
Revelation19:2 kukw amateka yayo ar’ay’ ukuri n’ukugororoka. Yaciriyekw iteka umwe maraya w’agahebuza
Revelation19:3 Rivuga ubugira kabiri
Revelation19:4 Ba bakuru mirongwibiri na bane na vya binyabugingo bine vyikubita hasi
Revelation19:5 Ijwi riva kur’ iyo ntebe rivuga
Revelation19:6 Numva ikimeze nk’ijwi ry’ishengero rinini
Revelation19:7 Tunezerwe
Revelation19:8 Kandi yahawe kwambara impuzu zera nziza
Revelation19:9 Umumarayika arambarira
Revelation19:10 Nikubitishwa hasi imbere y’ibirenge vyiwe no kumusenga. Arambarira
Revelation19:11 Mbona ijuru ryuguruye
Revelation19:12 Inyonga ziwe n’imbeya z’umuriro
Revelation19:13 Yambaye impuzu zājobetswe mu maraso
Revelation19:14 Ingabo zo mw ijuru ziramukurikira
Revelation19:15 Mu kanwa kiwe havamw’ inkota ikarishe
Revelation19:16 Kandi ku mpuzu ziwe no ku kibero
Revelation19:17 Mbona umumarayika ahagaze ku zuba; asemerera n’ijwi rirenga
Revelation19:18 ngo murye inyama z’abami n’iz’ abakuru b’abagabisha b’abasoda n’iz’ abahizi n’iz’ amafarasi n’iz’ abayicarako n’iz’ abantu bose
Revelation19:19 Mbona ca gikōko n’abami bo kw isi n’ingabo zabo bakoraniye kurwanya ūvyagiye kuri ya farasi n’ingabo ziwe.
Revelation19:20 Ico gikōko gifatwa mpiri
Revelation19:21 Abasigaye bicishwa inkota y’ūvyagiye kuri ya farasi
Revelation20:1 Mbona umumarayika amanuka avuye mw ijuru
Revelation20:2 Afata ca gisato
Revelation20:3 agikororera i kuzimu
Revelation20:4 Mbona intebe z’ubgami
Revelation20:5 Abapfuye bandi ntibaba bazima iyo myaka igihumbi itarashira. Ukwo ni kwo kuzuka kwa mbere.
Revelation20:6 Ūri mu mugabane wo kuzuka kwa mbere arahiriwe kandi n’uwera. Urupfu rwa kabiri ntirugira ububasha ku bameze bartyo
Revelation20:7 Kand’ iyo myaka igihumbi ni yashira
Revelation20:8 azosokoroka aje kuzimiza amahanga yo mu mfuruka zine z’isi
Revelation20:9 Baradūga bakwira isi yose
Revelation20:10 Kand’ Umurwanizi yabazimiza atererwa muri ca kiyaga caka umuriro n’amazuku
Revelation20:11 Mbona intebe niniya yera
Revelation20:12 Mbona abapfuye
Revelation20:13 Ikiyaga kigarukana abapfuye bo muri co
Revelation20:14 Rupfu na Kuzimu batererwa muri ca kiyaga caka umuriro. Ico kiyaga caka umuriro ni co rupfu rwa kabiri.
Revelation20:15 Kand’ umuntu wese atabonetse ko yanditswe muri ca gitabo c’ubugingo atererwa mur’ ico kiyaga caka umuriro.
Revelation21:1 Mbona ijuru risha n’isi nsha: kukw ijuru rya mbere n’isi ya mbere vyari vyagiye
Revelation21:2 Mbona umurwa wera
Revelation21:3 Numva ijwi rirenga
Revelation21:4 Izohanagura amosozi yose ku maso yabo
Revelation21:5 Īvyagira kuri ya ntebe iravuga
Revelation21:6 Kand’ irambarira
Revelation21:7 Ūnesha azoragwa ivyo
Revelation21:8 Arikw ibijora
Revelation21:9 Haza umwe wo muri ba bamarayika ndwi
Revelation21:10 Anjana ku musozi munini muremure ndi muri Mpwemu
Revelation21:11 ufise ubgiza bg’Imana. Ugukayangana kwawo gusa n’ukw’ ibuye ry’akabuyenge ry’igiciro kinini cane
Revelation21:12 uzigujwe n’urugo runini rurerure rufise ibirimba cumi na bibiri
Revelation21:13 Ahahera i burasirazuba har’ ibirimba bitatu; ahahera i burārūko har’ ibirimba bitatu; ahahera i bumanuko har’ ibirimba bitatu; ahahera i burengerazuba har’ ibirimba bitatu.
Revelation21:14 Urugo ruziguje uwo murwa rufise amatanguriro cumi n’abiri
Revelation21:15 Uwavugana nanje yar’ afise irenga ry’izahabu ry’ikigeresho
Revelation21:16 Uwo murwa ungana impande zose
Revelation21:17 Agera urugo rwawo
Revelation21:18 Urugo rwawo rwubakishijwe yasipi
Revelation21:19 Amatanguriro y’urugo rwa wa murwa yar’ asharijwe n’amabuye y’amoko yose y’utubuyenge tw’igiciro kinini. Ibuye ry’itanguriro rya mbere ryari yasipi
Revelation21:20 irya gatanu ryari sarudonikisi
Revelation21:21 Kand’ ibirimba
Revelation21:22 Kandi sinabonye urusengero kuri wo
Revelation21:23 Kandi wa murwa nturinda kwākirwa n’izuba canke n’ukwezi
Revelation21:24 Kand’ amahanga azogendera mu muco wawo
Revelation21:25 Ibirimba vyawo ntibijishwa na rimwe
Revelation21:26 Kandi bazozanay’ ubgiza n’icubahiro vy’amahanga.
Revelation21:27 Kandi kuri wo nta ho hazogera ikintu gihumanya
Revelation22:1 Anyereka uruzi rw’amazi y’ubugingo
Revelation22:2 Hagati y’irango rya wa murwa
Revelation22:3 Nta muvumo uzoba ukiriho. Intebe y’Imana na wa Mwagazi izoba muri wa murwa
Revelation22:4 bazorāba mu nyonga hayo
Revelation22:5 Nta joro rizoba rikiriho
Revelation22:6 Arambarira
Revelation22:7 Kand’ ehe ndaza vuba. Hahirwa uwitondera amajambo yavugishijwe yo mur’ iki gitabo.
Revelation22:8 Ni jewe Yohana numvise ivyo
Revelation22:9 Arambarira
Revelation22:10 Kand’ arambarira
Revelation22:11 Ūgabitanya n’ashishikare agabitanye; uwanduye mu mutima n’ashishikare yandure; ūgororotse n’ashishikare agororoke; uwera n’ashishikare yezwe.
Revelation22:12 Ehe ndaza vuba
Revelation22:13 Ndi Alufa na Omega
Revelation22:14 Hahirwa abamesura imvune zabo
Revelation22:15 Inyuma hazoba imbga n’abarozi n’abashakanyi n’abicanyi n’abasenga ibigirwamana
Revelation22:16 Jewe Yesu ntumye umumarayika wanje gushingira intahe mwebge ivyo
Revelation22:17 Kandi Mpwemu bo na wa mugeni barahamagara
Revelation22:18 Uwumva wese amajambo yavugishijwe yo mur’ iki gitabo ndabishingira intahe kuri we
Revelation22:19 Kandi ni hagira umuntu akūra ku majambo y’igitabo c’ibi vyavugishijwe na yo
Revelation22:20 Ūshingira intahe ivyo
